# Resonance Dream IDEAS тАФ living queue

Each idea has a status (`queued` / `in-progress` / `demoable` / `polished` / `dead`),
a slug (becomes the route `/dream/<n>-<slug>`), and a spec terse enough for
the Dream Agent to build from. Add new ideas to the bottom; promote
items by editing status in place.

The agent appends new ideas here from research cycles. Karel adds ideas
via Claude Code conversation; assistant transcribes into this file.

---

## ┬з732 (cycle 732 ┬╖ DEEP тАФ "THE DISSOLVE") тАФ SHIPPED `1428-dissolve-room`; one banked тнР

The DEEP fire: ONE massively-bigger concept (a long-form, irreversible ego-dissolution / NDE-tunnel тАФ the lab-thin long-form/accumulating-state category, cashing jury #2 "break the always-consonant spell") attacked via 2 approaches on 2 fresh surfaces. Shipped the render-robust DOM/CSS-3D approach (`1428-dissolve-room`) тАФ zero GPU dependency + surface-contrasts last night's three.js winner `1426`. The non-winner was built demoable + scoped-clean (`tsc --noEmit`=0 / repo-pinned `eslint --max-warnings 0`=0), backed up to scratchpad `banked-732/`, folder `rm -rf`'d тАФ never committed. Full rebuildable spec:

- **тнР `1432-egress` тАФ the three.js volumetric twin of THE DISSOLVE (resurrect for a slot with distance from three.js).** *The same long-form irreversible dying-into-light, but in true volumetric 3-D: a solid instanced-mesh room that comes apart into a tunnel drawing you toward a blooming additive light.* **Render (three.js r0.182, base package only тАФ no `examples/jsm`):** an `InstancedMesh` room shell (~800 cells: 4 side walls + far wall toward the light) of unlit `MeshBasicMaterial` boxes (no scene lights тЖТ nothing renders black from lighting misconfig); a deep central light = a warming emissive `SphereGeometry` core + 3 layered **additive glow sprites** (hand-rolled radial-gradient `CanvasTexture`, `AdditiveBlending`, `depthWrite:false`); `FogExp2` that thins toward center as the light grows; camera drifts down -Z (`lerp(13, -9, easedProgress)`) with a slow sub-Hz orbit, `lookAt` the light. **Arc (`dissolve.ts`):** the identical monotonic irreversible `progress` accumulator (`DISSOLVE_SECONDS=300`, only rises, holds at 1), `buildHomes()` + pure `cellTransform(cell, progress, lean, out)` pushing cells radially out / clearing a central tunnel radius / dimming; `phaseFor`/`phaseLabel` formingтЖТlooseningтЖТdissolvingтЖТlight; `lean` (hold/steer) pulls the *look/tuning* back without lowering the true clock. **Tuning (`audio.ts`) = identical to `1428`:** inharmonic Risset partials `[0.5,1.0,1.19,1.56,2.02,2.55,3.06]├Ч55Hz`, Railsback stretch 1.00тЖТ~1.06, widening chorus detune, light-cluster gated into the final phase, тЖТ shared `createVoidReverb` тЖТ master (silenceтЖТтЙд0.18) тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`; deterministic. **Input:** tilt (beta) to lean in + pointer/finger hold to pull back; desktop fallback = hold-mouse + drag-up to lean in. **Robust WebGL init** (3-way guarded: capability check + constructor try/catch + `getContext()` null-check) тЖТ amber fallback notice with audio still playing (audio is WebGL-independent). Full teardown: cancel RAF, dispose geometries/materials/glow-texture/renderer, stop oscillators, `ctx.close()`. **Files (4, all client, no route.ts):** `page.tsx`, `dissolve.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`. Refs **Susan Blackmore *Dying to Live* (1993)** / **Jean-Claude Risset** / the DMT-models-NDE universal-scaffold finding. **Ambition 4/5** (long-form accumulating-state + anti-consonant Railsback tuning [jury #2] + named-refs + тЙе3 subsystems + tilt input). **Why banked, not shipped:** three.js OUTPUT would be **back-to-back with ┬з731's winner `1426`** (also three.js) тАФ for the DEEP winner slot, that surface-repeat is the exact "too similar" pattern Karel flags, and the DOM/CSS-3D twin is more render-robust (zero GPU black-frame risk) for an unattended push. **Resurrect:** built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-732/1432-egress/`); ship the next slot whose recent winners are NOT three.js тАФ the volumetric bloom-tunnel is more spectacular than the DOM version and its ideas are already noted in `1428`'s README as next-cycle deepening.

## ┬з731 (cycle 731 ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers) тАФ SHIPPED `1426-biome-field`; two banked тнРтнР/тнР

The WIDE fire: three unrelated directions, each clearing the ambition floor via different tags, all OFF the 2026-07-10 bans. Shipped the one maximally different from every recent winner + cashing jury prov #5 (Anadol Dataland, built-on-by-nothing). The two non-winners were built demoable + scoped-clean (`tsc`=0 / repo-pinned `eslint --max-warnings 0`=0 each), backed up to scratchpad `banked-731/`, folders `rm -rf`'d тАФ never committed. Full rebuildable specs:

- **тнРтнР `1428-dissolve-room` тАФ TOP ship-next (highest-ambition non-winner, 4/5; the direct cash of jury #2 "break the always-consonant spell").** *What ego-dissolution feels like as a room: a solid glowing lattice that loosens over minutes and tunnels toward a light, tuned so it was never quite in tune.* **Render (pure DOM/CSS-3D тАФ no canvas/WebGL/SVG):** 343 real `<div>` cells (7├Ч7├Ч7 centred grid) in a `transform-style: preserve-3d` scene under CSS `perspective`, driven each frame via `translate3d`/`rotateX/Y`/`translateZ` written straight to DOM refs; far light + screen bloom. **The long-form arc (accumulating state, NOT a loop):** a single monotonic `progress` accumulator (`lattice.ts`) integrates `driftSpeed/DISSOLVE_SECONDS` (~300 s at 1├Ч) and only rises тАФ cells widen spacing, push radially out (open a tunnel), fade into a growing central clear-radius (the tunnel mouth), tumble+dim as they detach; `effectivePhase` lets tilt-lean + finger-hold pull-back recover the *look/tuning* while the underlying clock keeps marching (genuinely different at minute 5 vs minute 1 тАФ the lab-thin long-form/memory category). **The tuning (the point):** inharmonic bell partials `[0.5,1.0,1.19,1.56,2.02,2.55,3.06]├Ч55 Hz` (Risset), none a small integer тЖТ faint beating even at rest; a Railsback octave-stretch exponent 1.00тЖТ~1.06 + widening chorus detune drift *further* from consonance as it dissolves; high inharmonic "light" cluster fades in with the tunnel; void reverb тЖТ master silenceтЖТ0.18 тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`. **Input:** tilt (device orientation) to lean-in/steer + finger/pointer hold to pull back; desktop falls back to drag (UI notes it); drift-speed slider 0.40├ЧтАУ2.20├Ч; elapsed/phase readout (formingтЖТlooseningтЖТdissolvingтЖТlight). **Files (4, all client, no route.ts):** `page.tsx` (stage + single RAF loop + input + controls + teardown: oscillators stopped, context closed, RAF cancelled, orientation listener removed), `lattice.ts` (grid + `progress` + `effectivePhase` + `cellVisual`), `audio.ts` (inharmonic stretched drone engine), `README.md`. Refs **Susan Blackmore *Dying to Live* (1993)** / ketamine k-hole dissociation / **Jean-Claude Risset** inharmonic bells. **Ambition 4/5** (long-form accumulating-state + anti-consonant tuning [jury #2] + named-refs + тЙе3 subsystems + tilt input). SAFETY: all motion sub-Hz, `prefersReducedMotion` freezes to formed-but-alive. **Why banked, not shipped:** DOM/CSS-3D + dissonance overlaps ┬з728's winner `1408-wolf-ring` on BOTH surface and theme; for a WIDE cycle whose job is diversity, that recent-winner overlap is the tiebreaker, NOT quality. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim from scratchpad the next slot that isn't DOM/CSS-3D-adjacent or dissonance-adjacent тАФ it's the highest-ambition piece of the fire and fully render-robust (no GPU gamble, phone-perfect).

- **тнР `1424-flow-mandala` тАФ the camera revival (resurrect for a camera slot not back-to-back with ┬з729's `1412`).** *Your whole body's motion, seen through the webcam, is the hand that melts a fractal mandala.* **Input (self-contained, NO libraries):** each camera frame downsampled to 96├Ч72 grayscale; the optical-flow gradient constraint `Ix┬╖u+Iy┬╖v+It=0` solved per cell for normal flow, box-blurred into a dense field packed as an RGBA8 texture (`flow.ts`); the same class serves the synthetic fallback (pointer-injected blobs + idle Lissajous auto-demo). **Warp+melt (WebGL2, `shader.ts`/`render.ts`):** a fullscreen fragment shader maps screenтЖТcortical `(log r,╬╕)` (reuses `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`) so stripes/hex become tunnels/spirals/honeycombs folded into an N-fold kaleidoscopic Kl├╝ver mandala; a **ping-pong RGBA8 feedback buffer advects the previous frame along the flow field** and repaints a fresh mandala on top тЖТ movement leaves flowing melting trails. **Audio (`audio.ts`):** shared `droneBank` cosmic bed + inharmonic partial cluster (stretched ratios 1,1.34,1.78,2.41,3.16,4.27) + highpassed noise; motion energy only opens filters/raises density/detunes (timbre, not melody); master тЙд0.18 тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`. DMT-intense on motion, cosmic-drift at rest. **Files (6, all client, no route.ts):** `page.tsx`, `flow.ts`, `shader.ts`, `render.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`. Refs **Heinrich Kl├╝ver form constants (1926)** / **Golan Levin** optical-flow works. **Ambition 3/5** (тЙе3 subsystems + named-refs + revives camera lane [jury #5]). Never blank (hard-coded mandala brightness floor); camera-denied тЖТ rose message + pointer/auto-demo through same pipeline; WebGL2-absent тЖТ amber notice + drifting fallback; full teardown incl. stopping every MediaStream track; no strobe, `prefersReducedMotion` honored. **Why banked, not shipped:** cameraтЖТWebGL2 overlaps ┬з729's winner `1412-time-smear` (also cameraтЖТWebGL2) most directly тАФ the softest WIDE-diversity pick this cycle. **Resurrect:** built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-731/1424-flow-mandala/`); ship for a camera slot with distance from 1412.

## ┬з730 (cycle 730 ┬╖ DEEP тАФ "BEAT FIELD тАФ compose in the beating itself") тАФ SHIPPED `1418-beat-field`; two GPU-compute approaches banked тнРтнР/тнР

The DEEP concept: **the music is composed in the BEATING itself тАФ a continuous PlompтАУLevelt/Sethares roughness field you SCULPT by detuning a stack of voices** (pure lock тЖТ shimmer тЖТ AM tremolo тЖТ howl), dissonance as the played medium, computed on the GPU. Built to finally SHIP the 2nd GPU-compute piece (jury #1, banked twice) via three render strategies; shipped the raw-WGSL one. The two non-winners were built demoable + scoped-clean (`tsc`/`eslint` 0 each), backed up to scratchpad `banked-730/`, folders `rm -rf`'d тАФ never committed. Full rebuildable specs:

- **тнРтнР `1420-beat-loom` тАФ TOP ship-next (the LOVE-FIT cash + the fresh-research stack).** *Same concept (beating as the played medium) rendered on the loved `130-tsl-particle-compute` stack.* **Render:** three.js **`WebGPURenderer`** + **TSL** тАФ a genuine `computeNode` (`renderer.computeAsync`) advances each of ~40,000 cells' `(envelope, phase)` vec2 in an `instancedArray` storage buffer every frame (deliberately coupling-free / no neighbor reads тЖТ race-free without ping-pong), read back by a `PointsNodeMaterial` node graph via `field.element(vertexIndex)` тАФ GPU state truly carried forward, not a uniform-driven material. **Files (6, all client, no route.ts):** `page.tsx` (pointer-drag x=bt / y=drive + keys 1тАУ5 chord / тЖСтЖУ root / тЖРтЖТ nudge, ~5 s idle self-sweep, live tier badge, design-notes overlay, `PrototypeNav`, full teardown incl. `renderer.dispose()`), `field.ts` (single-source PlompтАУLevelt/Sethares kernel `s=0.24/(0.021┬╖min+19)`, `r=a1┬╖a2┬╖(e^{-3.5┬╖s┬╖df}тИТe^{-5.75┬╖s┬╖df})`; split-partial builder `h┬╖f ┬▒ h┬╖bt/2`; `calibrateRange`+`roughnessField` baseline-subtracted so lockтЙИ0/howlтЙИ1 every preset), `audio.ts` (48 osc = 24 beating pairs, render-independent, 2 s fade тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` тЙд0.20, optional drone+void bed), `renderField.ts` (the WebGPURenderer+TSL compute+points material), `three-webgpu.d.ts` (ambient decls тАФ `three/webgpu`/`three/tsl` ship no types), `README.md`. Refs **Sethares** / **Plomp & Levelt 1965** / **Robert Borghesi *ASTRODITHER* (2026-07-01)** [┬з730 dive тАФ the exact three.js+WebGPU+TSL-compute audio-reactive-field stack this borrows]. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 2nd GPU-compute via TSL + #5 today's ASTRODITHER dive + named-refs + тЙе3 subsystems + love-fit `130`). **Why banked, not shipped:** de-selected ONLY because A/`1418` is the more *literal* WGSL cash of jury #1's "prove 1348 wasn't a fluke" (1348 was raw WGSL; TSL is one abstraction off), lands on a thinner surface (raw WebGPU vs three.js 2├Ч), and has a sturdier three-tier synchronous fallback than B's WebGPURenderer-or-black тАФ NOT on quality (this is the higher-ambition, love-fit piece). **The sole knock:** the storage-buffer read in the points material is headless-unverifiable (could paint a dark frame if wrong), and WebGPURenderer, since WebGPU is now universal, won't fall to WebGL if the compute *runs* but reads wrong. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim from scratchpad the moment Karel's browser confirms the loom renders (not black) тАФ it's the love-fit follow-up and the freshest-research piece of the fire.

- **тнР `1422-beat-mesh` тАФ the universal-render safety floor (resurrect when a piece needs guaranteed-render-everywhere GPU compute).** *Same concept via **WebGL2 GPGPU** тАФ genuine float-texture ping-pong compute, renders on essentially any WebGL2 device.* **Render (`gl.ts`):** a 4-rung ladder walked with `checkFramebufferStatus` before committing a tier тАФ `RGBA32F` float ping-pong тЖТ `RGBA16F/HALF_FLOAT` (with `OES_texture_float_linear`-aware filtering to avoid black float textures) тЖТ single-pass analytic fragment тЖТ Canvas2D grid тЖТ stub; never throws, never a black frame; GLSL roughness fn mirrors `field.ts` exactly; dark-violet floor + live tier badge (`GPGPU` emerald / `fragment` / `Canvas` amber). **Files (5, all client, no route.ts):** `field.ts` (same kernel + 4-voice├Ч6-partial model + `bt` log-map + 5 chord presets + `computeFrame()` тЖТ 24 self-beat pair sources + total-roughness scalar), `audio.ts` (`BeatAudio`: 48 osc real beating pairs, render-independent, 0тЖТтЙд0.20 fade тЖТ limiter, optional drone+void bed, full teardown), `gl.ts`, `page.tsx` (pointer-drag + 1тАУ5/тЖСтЖУ/тЖРтЖТ keys, 5 s idle self-sweep, reduced-motion slowing + ~0.18 Hz breathing, roughness meter, design-notes overlay, `PrototypeNav`), `README.md`. Refs **Sethares** / **Plomp & Levelt 1965**. **Ambition 2тАУ3/5** (#1 GPU-compute [WebGL2-GPGPU] + тЙе3 subsystems + named-ref). **Why banked, not shipped:** WebGL2-GPGPU is not *WebGPU* тЖТ the softest cash of jury #1's specific "WebGPU-compute" ask, though it's the most render-robust of the three. **Resurrect:** the moment the lab wants a GPU-compute field that is guaranteed to paint on any device (e.g. a piece that MUST render for a public/installation showing) тАФ this is that piece. Built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-730/1422-beat-mesh/`).

## ┬з729 (cycle 729 ┬╖ WIDE тАФ camera revival + 2nd WebGPU-compute) тАФ SHIPPED `1412-time-smear`; two orthogonal explorers banked тнРтнР/тнР

The WIDE fire cashed the two loudest STILL-open jury asks at once (camera lane collapsed to 1├Ч тЖТ revive [#5]; 2nd WebGPU-compute "prove 1348 wasn't a fluke" [#1]), both now also love-backed. Shipped **A `1412-time-smear`** (live-camera slit-scan). The two non-winners were built demoable + scoped-clean (`tsc`/`eslint` 0 each). Full rebuildable specs:

- **тнРтнР `1414-beat-field` тАФ TOP ship-next (the jury-#1 cash, "prove 1348 wasn't a fluke").** *What if the music were composed in the BEATING itself?* Detune a stack of voices and sculpt the interference along one arc: pure lock (silence-of-beating, dark calm) тЖТ ~1тАУ3 Hz shimmer тЖТ AM tremolo тЖТ dense roughness (the howl). Dissonance is the PLAYED medium. **This was fully BUILT this cycle to demoable + `tsc`/`eslint`-clean, all three render tiers present** (`gpu.ts` WGSL-compute over a 320├Ч320 `rgba16float` storage texture + blit тЖТ `gl.ts` WebGL2 fragment тЖТ `canvas2d.ts` coarse-grid, live tier badge, dark-violet never-black floor, audio in `audio.ts` fully GPU-independent; `field.ts` = single-source PlompтАУLevelt/Sethares kernel `r=a1┬╖a2┬╖(exp(-3.5┬╖s┬╖df)тИТexp(-5.75┬╖s┬╖df))`, `s=0.24/(0.021┬╖min+19)`, driving the 24-osc pool `h┬╖f ┬▒ h┬╖bt/2` so upper partials roughen first). Input: pointer-drag (x=beat-rate 0.25тЖТ42 Hz log, y=brightness), keys 1тАУ5 chord / тЖСтЖУ root / тЖРтЖТ nudge. Refs Sethares / PlompтАУLevelt 1965 / XenRoll v0.4.3 (June 2026). **De-selected ONLY to avoid back-to-back-dissonance winners** тАФ 728 already shipped `1408-wolf-ring` (dissonance/temperament), so shipping beat-field this very next cycle would be the exact "too similar in design and theme" pattern Karel flags; it is NOT verification-cowardice (the winner 1412 is itself an unverifiable-headless camera+WebGL2 piece). The one honest knock is the standing headless "can't confirm the WebGPU compute pass paints vs a quiet dark frame" gap тАФ but it is materially well-defended (real WebGL2 + Canvas2D fallbacks, audio independent of render, dark-violet floors). **One browser render-confirmation from shippable** тАФ ship next cycle that isn't a dissonance winner; rebuild verbatim from this spec (the build was clean). love-fit: newly-loved `130-tsl-particle-compute`.

- **тнР `1416-nebula-thread` тАФ cosmic-ambient, phone-perfect (tilt).** Thread a path through a 3D nebula to VOICE the tones hidden in its density: drift as a mote of light (three.js additive point-cloud тАФ 6,500 haze stars + 40 dense "chime nodes" with a camera-relative toroidal wrap for a boundless field, depth-fade, soft radial glow), steering by **tilt** (gammaтЖТturn, betaтЖТclimb; pointer/drag + arrow-key fallback). Each node's pitch comes from the harmonic series of 55 Hz (incl. un-tempered 7th/11th тАФ deliberately NOT pentatonic); amplitude тИЭ quadratic proximity within a ~62-unit radius, panned by projected screen side (`StereoPannerNode`), glassy-bell `PeriodicWave` timbre, over the shared `startDroneBank` bed тЖТ `createVoidReverb` тЖТ master 0.18 тЖТ limiter. Idle >2.6 s auto-pilots a slow curve. Built demoable + `tsc`/`eslint`-clean this cycle. De-selected only because it cashes no *specific* live provocation while A cashed #5 (and B is the higher-ambition GPU cash). Resurrect near-verbatim for a calm cosmic-ambient slot тАФ the ONLY fully phone-friendly (tilt) piece of the fire, love-fit `262`/`321`/`243`. Honest limit: pitch is fixed per node-cell rather than continuously position-derived (a consequence of the toroidal wrap).

## ┬з727 (cycle 727 ┬╖ WIDE тАФ "Perceive the Hidden") тАФ SHIPPED `1398-ear-of-static` (the ┬з726 тнРтнР banked anchor, cashing jury #4); two orthogonal explorers banked тнРтнР/тнР

The WIDE fire: three orthogonal instruments about surfacing structure that isn't obviously there, each on a distinct fresh non-Canvas2D/non-SVG substrate. Shipped **A `1398-ear-of-static`** (auditory pareidolia тАФ the ┬з726 banked тнРтнР TOP ship-next, shipped verbatim-from-spec to cash the jury's #4 "ship the anchor you keep banking"). The two non-winners, both built demoable + scoped-clean (`tsc`/`eslint` 0), backed up to scratchpad `banked-727/`, folders `rm -rf`'d тАФ never committed. Full rebuildable specs:

- **тнРтнР `1402-echo-void` тАФ TOP ship-next (the WebGPU-compute cash of jury #1, one browser-render confirmation away).** `input:tap/space ping + arrows/drag steer heading ┬╖ output:WebGPU-compute point-cloud void (WebGL2 gl.POINTS тЖТ Canvas2D sonar-sweep fallback chain) ┬╖ tech:echolocation / wavefront reveal (grep-0├Ч adult; `echolocat|sonar`=0) ┬╖ pole:cosmic-ambient-dark / NDE ┬╖ ref biosonar / Alvin Lucier / James Turrell ┬╖ love-fit 130/236/262/321`. **Spec (8 files, all client, no route.ts):** `geometry.ts` тАФ `mulberry32(0x1402ec0)` seeds a deterministic 3D "cathedral" (pillar ring, flagstone floor, vault, curved apse, monoliths) тЖТ point cloud + ~41 acoustic surfaces. `camera.ts` тАФ heading vector + column-major view-projection (handles WebGPU zтИИ[0,1] AND WebGL zтИИ[тИТ1,1]) + point projection. `webgpu.ts` тАФ PRIMARY: a compute pass (`dispatchWorkgroups` over points) decays a storage-buffer brightness + adds a Gaussian pulse where each active shell (radius=SPEED┬╖elapsed) crosses a point's origin-distance; instanced additive-glow render pass reads that buffer in the vertex stage; typed `WebGPUUnsupportedError`, mirrors `1348-prism-cortex`'s device-request/feature-detect; **binds the canvas context LAST (after all pipeline creation)** so init-failure leaves the canvas clean for fallback. `wavefront.ts` тАФ shared `Renderer` contract, CPU brightness stepping, WebGL2 `gl.POINTS` fallback, Canvas2D sonar-sweep fallback, `createRenderer` capability probe (WebGPUтЖТWebGL2тЖТCanvas2D). `audio.ts` (`EchoAudio`) тАФ per-surface return on ping: delay=2┬╖dist/SPEED (so TIME emerges from geometry тАФ near walls answer first, far apse last), `PannerNode({panningModel:"HRTF"})` at the surface's true bearing with the listener re-oriented to heading each frame, JI pitch by surface id (root тЙИ98 Hz), level тИЭ 1/dist; low shared `droneBank` bed + shared `convolutionVoid`; voice cap 14/ping, тЙе95 ms; limiter тЖТ master peak 0.18 ramp-from-silence; full teardown. `page.tsx` тАФ Begin (gesture-gated), ping/steer input, idle auto-ping (~4тАУ6 s, drifting heading, cold-start only), live `WebGPU`(emerald)/`WebGL2`/`Canvas`(amber) badge, `prefersReducedMotion` slows+softens the wavefront, `PrototypeNav`. `webgpu-types.d.ts` тАФ `@webgpu/types` shim (as 1348). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 echolocation-as-instrument grep-0├Ч тАФ a genuinely fresh perception-by-active-emission interaction model + #2 тЙе5 subsystems [WebGPU wavefront compute + seeded hidden-3D geometry + HRTF spatialized-echo engine + point-cloud renderer + ping/steer input] + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з727 WebGPU-critical-mass dive). **Why banked, not shipped:** the builder's own decisive open risk тАФ **WGSL pipeline-validation errors surface asynchronously (not thrown), so a subtle shader bug would render a DARK GPU frame rather than falling back, and since the ┬з727 dive confirms WebGPU is now UNIVERSAL that black frame would hit ALL users тАФ un-verifiable on this headless box.** A concrete production-black-screen gamble, not generic verification-debt. De-selected on that risk alone; it cleared the floor + dodged every ban + is the freshest substrate of the fire. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim the moment Karel's browser confirms the WebGPU compute path renders (not black); the dive already retired the Safari-reach objection, so this is one render-confirmation from shippable. If the WGSL is fussy, ship it WebGL2-primary (proven, lower-risk) with WebGPU as an opportunistic upgrade. Built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-727/1402-echo-void/`).
- **тнР `1404-mobile-choir` тАФ resurrect for a calm cosmic-ambient slot (the fully-verifiable, phone-perfect one).** `input:tilt (deviceorientation, iOS requestPermission-in-tap) + pointer-drag fallback + tap-to-pluck ┬╖ output:REAL DOM/CSS-3D (perspective + preserve-3d nested arm/bead divs, per-frame transform writes тАФ no canvas/WebGL/SVG) ┬╖ tech:Calder pendular-sway тЖТ JI-pentatonic crossing-chimes (grep-0├Ч; `calder`=0├Ч) ┬╖ pole:cosmic-ambient/meditative ┬╖ ref Alexander Calder mobiles / wind-chime JI`. **Spec (3 files + README, all client, no route.ts):** `mobile.ts` тАФ `mulberry32(0x1404)` deterministic Calder tree (7 arms / 8 beads, 5-limit major-pentatonic `[1,9/8,5/4,3/2,5/3]`├Ч55 Hz├Ч2^{2..4}), damped spherical-pendulum `stepMobile(dt, gravityVec)` sway integrator + mat4 `computeWorld()`/`screenOf()` projection for crossing detection. `audio.ts` (`MobileAudio`) тАФ glassy sine-partial bells (~6 ms attack, long decay), voice cap 10 oldest-stolen, pan by projected x; on two beads on DIFFERENT arms crossing within `CROSS_THRESH=34px` ring their JI interval (rate-limited тЙе90 ms global / 420 ms per pair); low shared `droneBank` through `convolutionVoid`; master тЙд0.20 ramp-from-silence тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`; full teardown. `page.tsx` тАФ nested `preserve-3d` divs, tilt (`SWAY_DEG=26`/`SPIN_DEG=44`) + drag + tap-pluck, `тЧПtilt`/`тЧЛpointer` badge, idle circular "breeze" (`BREEZE_A/W=0.34/0.5`, off under reduced-motion) so it drifts+chimes within ~2 s hands-free, `text-rose-300` permission note, `PrototypeNav`. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 kinetic-mobile-as-instrument + DOM/CSS-3D fresh render substrate + #2 тЙе6 subsystems [tilt input + CSS-3D renderer + pendular-sway model + crossing-detector + JI chime synth + drone] + #3 named ref Calder). **Why banked, not shipped:** cleared the floor + is the ONLY fully-verifiable piece of the fire (deterministic DOM/CSS, no GPU) + phone-perfect тАФ but cashes no *specific* live jury provocation (A cashed #4, B was the #1 WebGPU cash), and the fire's stronger draw was retiring jury #4 by shipping the named anchor. **Resurrect:** ship for a calm cosmic-ambient slot near-verbatim (it's low-risk); the one browser pass wanted is sway/chime density + the `deviceorientation` beta-offset per-device calibration (constants in its README). Built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-727/1404-mobile-choir/`).

**Cross-fire lesson recorded (the ┬з723/┬з725/┬з726 near-duplicate discipline, applied hard this fire):** grepping the technique├Чsubstrate combo BEFORE briefing killed my first two picks тАФ **Chladni/plate-modes** (`1095-plate-modes`/`1278-faraday-relief`/`165`/`19`) and **singing-bowl/friction** (`1133-resonant-bowl`/`960-cristal-friction`) тАФ and confirmed **sandpile/SOC** (`1145-critical-brain`), **DLA** (`1085-lightning-organ`), **Lenia** (`1086-lenia-organisms`), **boids/flock** (`75`/`16`/`1059`) are all taken. In a ~1400-prototype lab the fresh *physics* is essentially mined out; the surviving 0├Ч lanes are fresh **interaction models** (┬з726's lesson) тАФ auditory pareidolia, echolocation, kinetic-mobile тАФ not new sims.

## ┬з726 (cycle 726 ┬╖ DEEP тАФ "Apophenia") тАФ SHIPPED `1396-apophenia-field`; two same-concept explorers banked тнРтнР/тнР

The DEEP concept: **apophenia тАФ the mind finding pattern in NOISE (the core cognition of the psychedelic/hypnagogic state per the REBUS / controlled-hallucination model: relaxed priors тЖТ the brain's generative model finds structure everywhere), made playable тАФ where your directed ATTENTION self-fulfillingly crystallizes latent structure out of a noise field and sounds it.** Grep-0├Ч lane (`apophenia|pareidolia`=0, `pattern/signal/meaning-in-noise`=0, `connect-the-dot`=0). Shipped the deterministic SVG realization; banked the auditory + 3D ones. Both built demoable + scoped-clean (`tsc`/`eslint` 0). Full rebuildable specs:

- **тЬЕ CONSUMED ┬з727 тАФ SHIPPED as `1398-ear-of-static`** (rebuilt verbatim-from-this-spec and shipped cycle 727 to cash jury #4). Original bank entry retained below for provenance. **тнРтнР `1398-ear-of-static` тАФ was TOP ship-next.** `input:pointer+keyboard focus-sweep ┬╖ output:WebGL2 spectral "ear" ribbon ┬╖ tech:AUDITORY pareidolia (hidden JI resonances resolve out of filtered noise) ┬╖ pole:hypnagogic ┬╖ ref musical-ear-syndrome / Alvin Lucier / Anil Seth *Being You*`. **Spec (5 files, all client, no route.ts):** `resonances.ts` тАФ `mulberry32` seeds ~7 hidden resonances snapped to a 5-limit JI grid, min-spacing-constrained across a normalized frequency ribbon, each with a looping 3тАУ5 note melodic contour. `audio.ts` (`EarAudio`) тАФ LCG noise-buffer bed тЖТ filter bank тЖТ compressor/limiter (master 0.20, ramp-from-~0 over 2.2 s); per-resonance bandpass "ring" on the SAME noise (Q+gain climb with alignment level) PLUS an always-running-but-gated melody oscillator per resonance driven by a 25 ms look-ahead scheduler (timing only, NOT a drum grid); noise thins around a resolving fragment; shared `startDroneBank` bed + `createVoidReverb`. `shader.ts` тАФ full-screen-triangle WebGL2 fragment: dim animated hiss that sharpens/brightens under the focus, bright pitched ridges where resonances resolve, slow (<3 Hz) luminance drift, reduced-motion aware. `page.tsx` тАФ Begin (gesture-gated), focus-sweep via pointer-drag + `A S D F G H J K L ;` (jump to preset bands) + arrows/space (lock), dwell (~0.35 s) locks a fragment into a held consonant weave, generous alignment (tolerance ~0.06 + wide gaussian) so seeking is reliably rewarded, idle self-demo auto-finds every ~5тАУ6 s, WebGL2-absent тЖТ amber notice + SVG focus-meter fallback + audio-anyway, full teardown, `PrototypeNav`. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 auditory-pareidolia-instrument grep-0├Ч + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [noise-bed synth + hidden-resonance detector + focus-sweep input + WebGL2 spectral renderer + resolve-out voices] + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з726 REBUS dive). **Why banked, not shipped:** it's GPU + audio-FIRST тЖТ nothing about it can be eye/ear-confirmed on a headless box, and its concept reads least at a silent phone-glance (1396's deterministic SVG had zero verification-unknowns). **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim where Karel's browser confirms the mix balance (ring vs melody vs bed-thinning) + WebGL2 render; tuning constants are called out in its README. Built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-726/1398-ear-of-static/`).
- **тнР `1400-noise-oracle` тАФ resurrect on a screen (love-fit).** `input:pointer-drag gaze + keyboard ┬╖ output:three.js 8k-mote noise-cloud ┬╖ tech:3D form-crystallization from noise ┬╖ pole:cosmic ┬╖ ref Conrad 1958 / Anil Seth / Refik Anadol ┬╖ love-fit 130/236/262/321`. **Spec (6 files, all client, no route.ts):** `rng.ts` (mulberry32, no Math.random/Date.now). `forms.ts` тАФ 14 hidden forms on a Fibonacci sphere, each with scattered-vs-ideal mote layouts + a 5-limit-JI-pentatonic chord (sizeтЖТregister, symmetry-orderтЖТvoicing). `scene.ts` тАФ `THREE.Points` noise-field (shader-drifted), attention-gaze detector (~17┬░ dwell cone), form-crystallizer (scatteredтЖТideal lerp + connecting `LineSegments`), idle self-demo, full teardown + context-loss + no-WebGL fallback controller. `audio.ts` тАФ master тЙд0.22 ramp-from-silence тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`; shared `startDroneBank` (`setDrive` climbs as forms accumulate) + `createVoidReverb`; per-form transient chords (тЙд12 voices) + sustained constellation voices (тЙд8), oldest-stolen. `page.tsx` тАФ Begin, reticle, pointer-drag/keys/arrows to steer + tap/space to force-recognize, WebGL-absent amber fallback + DOM/keyboard control, `PrototypeNav`. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 3D-form-crystallization-from-noise + #2 тЙе5 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з726 dive). **Why banked, not shipped:** GPU verification-debt (builder's own open risk: "can't confirm crystallized rings/mandalas read as *shapes* vs noise headless at the chosen `uSize`/mote-count/`CONE_COS`") + three.js is 2├Ч in the recent window (1384/1392). **Resurrect:** on a real screen for a tuning pass of those constants; strong love-fit to the loved point-cloud cluster. Built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-726/1400-noise-oracle/`).

## ┬з722 (cycle 722 ┬╖ DEEP тАФ "The World Composes") тАФ SHIPPED `1374-sky-strata`; two same-thesis explorers banked тнРтнР/тнР

The DEEP concept: **the live external world composes the piece тАФ current real data (not the user, not a synth seed) authors key/tempo/palette/mode, and you play the second voice inside the world it has tuned.** Shipped the verifiable NOAA sky-composer; banked the WebGL2 aurora and the earthquake-choir. Both built demoable + scoped-clean (`tsc`/`eslint` 0). Full rebuildable specs:

- **тнРтнР `1376-earth-pulse` тАФ TOP ship-next (the strongest INSTRUMENT of the three + opens the multi-feed lane).** `input:live USGS earthquakes + played scrub/strike ┬╖ output:deterministic inline-SVG world of seismic ripples ┬╖ tech:event-data тЖТ spatial drone-choir (magтЖТpitch, lonтЖТpan, depthтЖТtimbre) ┬╖ pole:ritual/cosmic-ambient ┬╖ ref Ryoji Ikeda datamatics + Florian Dombois auditory seismology`. **Spec (5 files, all client, no route.ts):** `data.ts` fetches `earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/feed/v1.0/summary/all_day.geojson` (5 s abort, 120 s repoll, filter junk mags, cap ~120 most-significant by recency+magnitude, sort ascending by time); `simulateQuakes()` тЖТ ~40 plausible events labeled `live:false` on failure. `mapping.ts` pure: **magnitudeтЖТpitch** (bigger = LOWER, snapped to a 5-limit JI pentatonic so the choir is always consonant), **longitudeтЖТstereo pan**, **depthтЖТlowpass cutoff + ring hue** (shallow bright, deep dark), **magnitudeтЖТloudness + ring radius + decay**, trailing-window `activityLevel`тЖТdrone drive. `audio.ts` = tectonic `startDroneBank` bed + per-quake struck voice (detuned sine/triangle partials, fast-attack/long-release, `StereoPannerNode`, depth lowpass) through `createVoidReverb`; master тЙд0.22 + 2 s exp fade + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + **10-voice concurrency cap** (guards the burst); full teardown. `page.tsx` = inline-SVG equirectangular world (hand-drawn continent silhouettes + graticule + deterministic starfield тАФ NO map tiles), one pulsing hue-by-depth ring per quake, a **timeline scrubber** (`min-h-[44px]`) that auto-sweeps the compressed day (~80 s loop) firing each quake as the playhead crosses it, drag-to-scrub (wrap-safe crossing detection), click-a-ripple re-strike, number-keys 1тАУ0 re-strike the ten most recent; LIVE(emerald)/simulated(amber) badge + count + max-mag + last-fired place; never blank (rings pulse pre-Begin); `prefers-reduced-motion` gentler expansion. **Why banked, not shipped:** this DEEP fire exists to cash jury **#4** ("ship the sky-composer anchor you keep banking") тАФ 1376 is a *different* real feed (earthquakes), so shipping it would repeat the exact banked-the-anchor-ship-the-diversifier move the jury named. It is the strongest *instrument* of the three and the most surprising, so it is the emphatic **TOP ship-next**. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim the very next fire (deterministic SVG тЖТ headless-verifiable, USGS CORS is reliably open), OR promote its dataтЖТmusic `mapping.ts` to `_shared` to open the whole real-world-data lane (weather / tides / ISS / transit / air-quality). Built demoable this fire.

- **тнР `1372-sky-weather` тАФ the WebGL2 aurora spectacle of the shipped concept.** `input:live NOAA space-weather + pointer steer/pluck ┬╖ output:raw WebGL2 fbm-warped aurora curtains + twinkling stars ┬╖ tech:same dataтЖТdrivers engine as 1374 + generative pad ┬╖ pole:cosmic-ambient ┬╖ ref Refik Anadol (data-as-pigment) ┬╖ love-fit 130/236/321/262`. **Spec (5 files, no route.ts):** `data.ts` = same three NOAA SWPC feeds as 1374 (header-row skip, freshest-valid, 5 s abort, 60 s repoll, strict `simulateSky()` `live:false` fallback). `mapping.ts` = single pure `skyToDrivers(sky)` (speedтЖТtempo/drift, densityтЖТthickness/strands, тИТBzтЖТminor mode + brighter curtains, KpтЖТenergy/palette/root) consumed identically by audio+visuals. `gl.ts` = raw WebGL2 full-screen triangle via `gl_VertexID` (no buffer), fbm-warped curtains + additive tone-map, `hasWebGL2()` probe + context-loss handling + pointer steer (drift offset + cursor-column brightness bump); builder pre-fixed two GLSL UB spots (reversed-edge `smoothstep`, `pow(negative,2.0)`). `audio.ts` = `startDroneBank` (driveтЖРenergy) + self-scheduling major/minor-pentatonic arp at mapping tempo through `createVoidReverb` + brighter played foreground voice (taps + AтАУJ keys); master тЙд0.22 + 2 s fade + limiter, gesture-gated, full teardown. `page.tsx` = silent visual demo pre-Begin + idle auto-demo after 4 s, HUD with LIVE/simulated badge, WebGL2-absent + context-lost readable notices (audio still plays), reduced-motion. **Why banked:** the WebGL2 render can't be eye-verified headless AND the live NOAA fetch can't be exercised here тАФ the exact two-verification-unknowns that keep de-selecting GPU pieces; 1374 realizes the *same* sky-composer concept on a deterministic verifiable render. **Resurrect:** ship in a slot where Karel's browser confirms both fetch + GPU render, OR graft this aurora onto 1374 as its "confirmed-environment" WebGL upgrade path (the SVG strata stay the safe fallback). Built demoable this fire.

WIDE fire that deliberately **broke the 4-cycle spatial-lattice/phasing rut** (719+720 were both lattices). Three orthogonal CONCEPTS, not three fresh substrates: a piano that answers you, a piece composed by the live sky, a form-constant organ. Shipped the responsive-partner one (cashes the still-unmet jury #5 + is the only headless-verifiable render). The two banked are fully built demoable + scoped-clean (scoped `tsc`+`eslint` reported 0/0 by each builder), backed up to scratchpad `banked-721/`, folders `rm -rf`'d. Both are strong next fires on genuinely new axes (external data; the form-constant engine).

- **тнРтнР `1368-sky-composer` тАФ TOP ship-next (the lab's first REAL external-data sonification + best love-fit).** `input:live NOAA space-weather data ┬╖ output:WebGL2 aurora curtains ┬╖ tech:dataтЖТmusic/visual mapping engine + generative cosmic pad ┬╖ pole:cosmic-ambient ┬╖ ref Refik Anadol (data-as-pigment) ┬╖ love-fit 130/236/321/262`. **Spec (5 files):** `data.ts` fetches three NOAA SWPC 1-day JSON feeds (`solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json` [speed/density/temp], `solar-wind/mag-1-day.json` [Bx/By/Bz/Bt], `noaa-planetary-k-index.json` [Kp]) тАФ row[0] is a header row, parse subsequent rows, take freshest valid; per-request 5 s abort; on any failure a slowly-drifting `simulateSky()` fallback labeled `"simulated"` so it's never blank/silent. `mapping.ts` = the single dataтЖТdrivers engine (speed/density/southward-Bz/Kp тЖТ 0..1 + `darkMode`) consumed identically by audio + visuals: **speedтЖТarp tempo + aurora drift**, **densityтЖТvoicing thickness + strand count**, **negative BzтЖТdarker mode + brighter/more-active curtains**, **KpтЖТoverall energy (low = deep drone + faint green; high = fuller pad, reds/violets, more motion, тЙд3 Hz)**. `gl.ts` = raw WebGL2 full-screen-triangle fragment aurora (procedural wavy curtains + twinkling stars, additive/tone-mapped, `hasWebGL2()` probe + context-loss dispose). `audio.ts` = shared `startDroneBank` bed + a self-scheduling generative arpeggio (majorтЖТminor pentatonic on southward Bz) through `createVoidReverb`. Master тЙд0.22 + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + exp fade-in, gesture-gated Begin; live HUD readout (wind speed/density/Bz/Kp + live-vs-simulated label тЙе`text-sm`/`/70`); full teardown (rAF + 60 s data interval + listeners + context-loss + `AudioContext.close()`); `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts curtain motion. **Why banked, not shipped:** a WebGL2 aurora can't be eye-verified on a headless box AND the live NOAA fetch can't be exercised here (falls to clearly-labeled synthetic sky), so two verification unknowns тАФ 1366's deterministic SVG had zero. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim in a slot where Karel's browser confirms both the fetch (is NOAA actually CORS-permissive from Vercel? verify) and the render; or promote `mapping.ts` to a reusable `_shared` dataтЖТmusic primitive and open the whole real-world-data-sonification lane (weather / seismic / transit / ISS passes).
- **тнР `1370-form-organ` тАФ the form-constant engine, finally played (intense pole, thin lane).** `input:QWERTY + on-screen two-row organ ┬╖ output:WebGL2 log-polar exp-warp fragment ┬╖ tech:BressloffтАУCowan form constants on the shared LOGPOLAR_GLSL engine ┬╖ pole:intense (DMT) ┬╖ ref BressloffтАУCowan + Android Jones (living)`. **Spec (3 files):** `shader.ts` splices the shared `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` **verbatim** and calls its `screenToCortex`/`formConstant`/`honeycomb` (GLSL ES 3.00, full-screen triangle); accumulates up to `MAX_BLOOMS=10` note-blooms as radiating shells with an iridescent DMT palette (magenta/teal/gold), per-channel chromatic split, additive tone-map, sub-0.2 Hz ambient breath, and a reduced-motion path. Key-region selects/blends the four form constants (tunnel/spoke/spiral/honeycomb), pitch тЖТ warp frequency / stripe density; sustained-while-held, soft exp-decay on release; idle auto-demo (4 s) self-plays a slow chord progression morphing through the constants (silent visual demo runs pre-Begin so it's never blank). `audio.ts` = `FormOrganAudio`: sustained additive drawbar organ (5 sine partials + triangle body) in 5-limit JI, per-key gate with soft attack / 1.3 s release, composes `startDroneBank` (drive-opening bed) + `createVoidReverb`, master тЙд0.22 + `DynamicsCompressor` + exp fade-in. Opt-in Shimmer + instant Kill; `createSafeFlicker`/`prefersReducedMotion` clamp all flicker тЙд3 Hz (critical for this intense flicker-prone piece). No-WebGL2 тЖТ readable notice + audio still plays. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `AudioContext.close()`). **Why banked:** the least-fresh CONCEPT of the three тАФ form-constant/log-polar has the most lab-prior and the shared engine already exists тАФ plus a WebGL2 fragment field can't be eye-verified headless. **Resurrect:** desktop/keyboard slot; OR тАФ the higher-value move тАФ use this shader as the seed to **promote the form-constant engine to a first-class played `_shared/psych` primitive** (PSYCHEDELIC.md's standing "single most load-bearing" ask), so every future psychedelic piece can drop in the exp-warp organ.

## ┬з720 (cycle 720 ┬╖ DEEP тАФ "The Breathing Lattice") тАФ SHIPPED `1362-lattice-loom`; two "spatial-lattice" explorers banked тнРтнР/тнР

DEEP concept: *a spatial LATTICE instrument whose TIME is phasing, not a drum grid*, attacked via three fresh non-Canvas2D substrates ├Ч three non-pointer inputs. Shipped the DOM/CSS-3D one (the sharpest cash of jury #1's named 1272 surface + the only headless-verifiable render). The two banked are fully built demoable + scoped-clean (backed up to scratchpad `banked-720/`, folders `rm -rf`'d). Both are next fires of this thread тАФ ship near-verbatim in the right slot.

- **тнРтнР `1360-hex-breath` тАФ TOP ship-next (the three.js ┬з719 anchor jury #4 wants shipped).** `input:mic-breath ┬╖ output:three.js InstancedMesh 3D crystal ┬╖ tech:3:4:5 polymetric phasing + form-constant breath-warp ┬╖ pole:intense/warm-psilocybin ┬╖ ref Robert Hodgin + BressloffтАУCowan`. **Spec:** ~2500 additive glowing nodes clipped from a 17┬│ cubic grid to a sphere in a single `InstancedMesh`, perspective camera + slow auto-orbit. Breath (mic RMS тЖТ smoothed signal, OR ~0.1 Hz auto-breath LFO if no mic; space/b key to manual-pulse) drives a uniform group scale (the form-constant "breath") + `startDroneBank.setDrive`. Crystal carved into three axis-dominant regions (┬▒X/┬▒Y/┬▒Z octahedral pyramids); a lookahead scheduler on `audioContext.currentTime` fires three JI voices at periods `BASE├Ч{3,4,5}` тАФ each fire sounds a JI pluck AND injects a travelling light-ring in its region; the 3:4:5 drift realigns only every ~42 s (Reich phase, spatial + heard). Master тЙд0.22 + limiter + fade-in, mic is analyser-sink only (feedback-safe), full three.js dispose + `AudioContext.close()` teardown, `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **Why banked, not shipped:** three.js/GPU render can't be eye-verified on a headless box (the standing verification-debt that also sank 1342/1356/1358) + mic-permission gates a 06:30 phone glance (auto-breath mitigates); 1362 more sharply cashed the jury's *named* #1 DOM/CSS surface and IS verifiable. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim in an ear/GPU-tunable slot, OR promote its 3:4:5 polymetric scheduler + instanced-lattice builder to `_shared/psych` (the polymetric-phasing engine is reusable across the thread).
- **тнР `1364-glide-shells` тАФ cosmic-ambient / love-fit.** `input:device-tilt ┬╖ output:WebGL2 ~80k-point cloud (26 concentric Fibonacci-sphere shells) ┬╖ tech:Shepard-Risset glide traversal ┬╖ pole:cosmic-ambient (jh─Бna/void) ┬╖ ref Refik Anadol + Risset/Shepard ┬╖ love-fit 130/236/321/262`. **Spec:** single additive `gl.POINTS` draw (`blendFunc ONE,ONE`, depth off); positions computed once into a static buffer, points-per-shell тИЭ r┬▓ so inner shells pack a warm core. Vertex shader = perspective MVP + `gather` compression + outward Gaussian activation band; frag = soft round glow. `deviceorientation` ╬▓/╬│ magnitude drives `gather` (camera 2.75тЖТ0.8, pulling you inward toward the void core) + view tilt; pointer tilt-proxy + idle auto-drift fallbacks; iOS `requestPermission()` tap. TIME = shared `startShepard` endless glide, its rate mirrored by the outward luminance-band sweep so light + pitch ascend in lockstep; low `droneBank` bed through `createVoidReverb`. Master тЙд0.22 + limiter + fade-in, Canvas2D subsample fallback when no WebGL2, `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts point count/rotation/glide, full GL + audio teardown. **Honest caveat (README):** the visual band re-integrates an independent copy of the Shepard rate formula (engine keeps its phase private) тАФ locked in practice, tiny drift possible over very long sessions. **Why banked:** conceptually closest to already-banked тнРтнР`1350-gpu-murmur`/`1358-tilt-nebula` (same tiltтЖТgather-the-void + Shepard gesture) + raw-WebGL2 point-cloud can't be eye-verified headless. **Resurrect:** phone/tilt slot, or fold into 1350 as its WebGL2 (non-WebGPU) fallback path.

## ┬з719 (cycle 719 ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ SHIPPED `1354-glyph-canon`; two "time-without-a-drum" explorers banked тнРтнР/тнР

**Context.** WIDE fire ("Time Without a Drum") тАФ 3 orthogonal altered-states instruments, each on a DIFFERENT fresh non-Canvas2D surface + a distinct non-pointer input, all carrying rhythmic TIME via **phasing / polymeter / Shepard glide** (NOT a step-sequencer) тАФ the head-on service of the current (2026-07-09) jury's **#2** (*"don't let the groove machine become the new bell тАФ find TIME somewhere other than a drum grid: polymetric phasing, a swung melodic loop"*) on the fresh surfaces its **#1** keeps naming. Winner **`1354-glyph-canon`** (glyph-terminal, keyboard, a Reich phase canon whose two de-phasing voices are two drifting glyph-ring streams) shipped for: sharpest fresh-substrate cash (glyph-terminal is jury-named 0├Ч-in-window / cycle-2 of celebrated 1270) + highest ambition (4/5) + lowest ship-risk on a headless box (deterministic canvas-text + Web Audio, no GPU/mic/camera/tilt/CDN) + most phone-playable + it makes jury #2 *visible*. The two below are fully built + folder-clean (scoped `tsc`+`eslint` both 0/0), backed up to scratchpad `banked-719/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuildable from these specs.

- **тнРтнР `1356-breath-lattice` тАФ `queued` (TOP SHIP-NEXT тАФ the freshest 3D substrate + the intense/warm pole + a clean polymetric phase engine).** *Breathe a three-dimensional form-constant lattice into bloom тАФ a real 3D object in space, TIME carried by polymetric melodic phasing.* Substrate = **three.js (vanilla)** тАФ an `InstancedMesh` of ~1,976 emissive octahedra hex-packed on a slowly auto-orbiting torus (76 major rings ├Ч 26 per ring, staggered half-step) + a second additive halo point-cloud sharing the live positions тЖТ a Kl├╝ver honeycomb/funnel form-constant in real depth with parallax + `FogExp2`; deep indigo space, warm emberтЖТamberтЖТgold on soft/dark breath cooling to violet/teal on bright breath (warm-organic psilocybin register the lab is thin on). **Input = mic-breath (analysis-only:** `getUserMedia`тЖТ`MediaStreamSource`тЖТ`AnalyserNode`, **never to `destination`**): RMS swells node scale/brightness/hex-open/bloom; spectral centroid twists the tube + shifts palette warmth. Each note lights the ring nearest its pitch (you *see* the polymeter). **TIME = 3/4/5 polymetric JI phasing:** three melodic streams share one 0.28 s base pulse but sound every 3, 4, 5 pulses and each walks its own pure-ratio 7-note melody тАФ Reich phase music on arpeggios, zero drum grid; breath gates how many streams are audible (soft = 1 + drone; deep = 3; >0.7 opens a 4th octave-up layer). **Audio** `audio.ts`: FM voices (index rises with breath brightness), soft attack/long release, voice cap 16 oldest-steal, `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed (root 55 Hz) + `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` (blooms wider on soft breath); master тЙд0.2, gesture-gated, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Files `page.tsx`+`audio.ts`+`lattice.ts` (`buildTorusLattice`)+`README.md`. Living ref **Robert Hodgin + BressloffтАУCowan (2001) + Steve Reich**. Safety: no strobe (smooth swell + ~0.06 rad/s orbit), `prefersReducedMotion()` shallows orbit/travel/wobble; Stop тЙд80 ms + stop mic tracks + `renderer.dispose()`/`forceContextLoss()` + close ctx. Degrades: no WebGL тЖТ notice, audio keeps running; mic-denied тЖТ ~0.1 Hz auto-breath LFO + on-screen slider (never blank/silent). **Ambition #2 (тЙе5: mic analysis + three.js instanced-lattice renderer + form-constant warp + polymetric JI synth + drone = 5) + #3 (living ref).** *De-selected only because three.js/GPU render + mic permission can't be eye/ear-verified on a headless box, and mic gates a 06:30 phone glance (auto-breath mitigates). Resurrect near-verbatim in a GPU/ear-tunable slot тАФ it is the strongest single ship-next; or promote its **polymetric-3/4/5 phasing scheduler** + torus hex-lattice builder to `_shared/psych` primitives.*

- **тнР `1358-tilt-nebula` тАФ `queued` (love-fit + phone-native tilt + a real Shepard-Risset glide).** *Tilt your phone to gather a drifting nebula of ~120k points into a luminous jh─Бna core and release it into the boundless void, TIME carried by a Shepard-Risset endless glide.* Substrate = **raw WebGL2 `gl.POINTS`** тАФ 120k particles in static VBOs, hand-written shaders (no three.js/Canvas2D), particles on a fat spherical shell drifting on a cheap trig-based swirl (curl-noise stand-in), additive soft round sprites, violetтЖТteal cooling to white-gold on gather, depth-cued. **Input = device-tilt** (`deviceorientation` beta/gamma, iOS `requestPermission()` gated behind Begin): tilt magnitude = *gather amount* тЖТ cloud collapses to a dense core (staggered per-particle so it blooms, never snaps); level тЖТ disperse to the void; pointer-distance/press desktop fallback + ~2.6 s idle auto-orbit. **TIME = Shepard-Risset endless glide** (`_shared/psych/shepard.ts`, 7 octave-spaced partials under a moving Gaussian log-freq envelope): gather raises glide `drive` + opens a 55 Hz drone lowpass + increases send into `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`. Files `page.tsx`+`glmath.ts` (mat4)+`README.md`. Living ref **Refik Anadol (DATALAND 2026) + Robert Hodgin + Risset/Shepard**. **Love-fit:** rides Karel's loved particle/point-cloud cluster (`130-tsl-particle-compute`, `236-particle-life-song`, `321-spectral-flight`, `262-aurora-particle`). Safety: no strobe (~0.6 Hz breathing), `prefersReducedMotion()` shallows drift/spin/smoothing; Stop тЙд80 ms; teardown deletes VBOs/program + `WEBGL_lose_context`. Degrades: no WebGL2 тЖТ notice + audio keeps playing; no gyro тЖТ pointer + auto-orbit. **Ambition #2 (тЙе3: tilt sensor + WebGL2 120k point-cloud + Shepard glide + convolution-void drone = 4) + #3 (living ref).** *De-selected as (a) conceptually closest to the already-banked тнРтнР `1350-gpu-murmur` (tilt-gathered particle void тАФ same gesture, different substrate) and (b) a raw-WebGL2 120k-point cloud can't be eye-verified headless. Resurrect for a phone/tilt slot, or fold into 1350 as the WebGL2-fallback path; or promote the point-cloud to a `_shared/psych` primitive.*

## ┬з718 (cycle 718 ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ SHIPPED `1348-prism-cortex` (the banked тнРтнР WebGPU anchor, cashed); two GPU-compute explorers banked тнРтнР/тнРтнР

**Context.** DEEP fire on ONE concept тАФ *the lab's first WebGPU compute-shader psychedelic instrument* тАФ attacked via three GPU-compute techniques ├Ч three fresh inputs, cashing the ┬з717-banked WebGPU anchor to answer the current (2026-07-09) jury's **#4** (*"stop banking your own research anchor тАФ ship it"*) + **#1** (*"get off Canvas2D тАФ ship the still-0├Ч WebGPU compute field"*). Winner **`1348-prism-cortex`** = the ┬з717 `1342` anchor rebuilt (WGSL Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion compute тЖТ inverse log-polar form-constant warp, MIDI/QWERTY-played, DMT-intense; idle auto-demo makes it phone-alive). Build GREEN via compile-mode; page.js 42.5 kB. The two below are fully built + folder-clean, backed up to scratchpad `banked-718/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuildable from these specs.

- **тнРтнР `1350-gpu-murmur` тАФ `queued` (TOP SHIP-NEXT тАФ most phone-native of the fire + best love-fit + lowest WebGPU ship-risk).** *A jh─Бna oceanic-boundless void as 180k luminous motes integrated entirely on the GPU, gathered by your phone's tilt.* Substrate = **WebGPU compute on storage BUFFERS** (the most robust GPU path тАФ no storage-texture-write dependency). `gpu.ts`: two storage buffers (position+velocity, 180k particles); a WGSL `@compute` integrator each frame = curl-noise flow field + a **gatherтЖФdisperse attractor**; render = additive **point sprites** (soft glow) over near-black void + exponential depth fog; only uniforms + one view-proj matrix leave the CPU. **Input = device-tilt** (iOS `requestPermission` gated behind Begin) steers the attractor (tilt forward=gather тЖТ soft-white core blooms, back=disperse тЖТ motes thin into dark); pointer-drag desktop fallback; ~0.1 Hz **auto-breath** gather/disperse when idle. **Audio** `audio.ts`: `convolutionVoid` + `droneBank` drone with a ~0.1 Hz breath swell; gather density opens a lowpass / raises pad amplitude (light + sound inhale together); optional Shepard undertone; master тЙд0.25, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, exp fade-in. Living ref **Robert Hodgin (flight404) + Refik Anadol**. Safety: no strobe (0.1 Hz swell only), `prefers-reduced-motion`, full teardown (rAF + listeners + `audioCtx.close()` + `device.destroy()` + buffer destroys). Degrades: no WebGPU тЖТ readable notice. **Ambition #2 (тЙе3: tilt sensor + WGSL particle-compute integrator + additive point-cloud render + convolution-void breath-drone = 4) + #3 (living ref).** **Love-fit:** directly extends the loved *compute*/particle cluster (`130-tsl-particle-compute`, `236-particle-life-song`, `321-spectral-flight`, `262-aurora-particle`, `243-spectral-cloud`). *Resurrect near-verbatim in a phone/tilt slot тАФ it is the strongest single ship-next: WebGPU-compute-on-buffers is the lowest-risk GPU substrate to eye-verify + it is phone-native + love-backed. Or promote its gather/disperse GPU point-field to a shared `_shared/psych` primitive.*
- **тнРтнР `1352-hex-bloom` тАФ `queued` (a distinct GPU-compute technique + audio-degrades-gracefully + lowest shader-compile risk).** *Psilocybin honeycomb + spiral form-constants blooming from a BelousovтАУZhabotinsky / cyclic-cellular-automaton chemistry on the GPU, excited by a QWERTY organ.* Substrate = **WebGPU compute** (ping-pong `256├Ч256` `u32` storage buffers), mirroring the repo's proven `1053-ripple-loom` compute pipeline (lowest shader-compile risk). `wgsl.ts`: a **GreenbergтАУHastings cyclic CA** (12 states, Moore neighborhood, toroidal) steps each frame тАФ broken wavefronts curl into rotating **spirals** on their own; a seed pass injects pinwheel nuclei from the organ; a render pass folds the field through a **6-fold hex kaleidoscope + log-polar warp + honeycomb grille** into a warm amber/rose/green texture; a blit pass copies to the swap-chain. **Input = QWERTY organ** (2├Ч8 grid тЖТ screen regions + warm pentatonic pitches); keys **excite** a CA region (nucleate a spiral) AND hold a **sustained detuned-partial pad** (attack/hold/release тАФ explicitly NOT a struck bell, dodging the banned JI-strike spine); idle **auto-demo** excites on a slow clock. **Audio** `audio.ts`: sustained warm pad voices + `droneBank` bed + `convolutionVoid` reverb; master тЙд0.25, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Living ref **Jason Rampe (Visions of Chaos / softologyblog) + Memo Akten**; BressloffтАУCowan for the form-constant map. Safety: CA evolves slowly (no strobe), `prefers-reduced-motion`, full teardown. Degrades **best of the three**: no WebGPU тЖТ the organ still makes sound (audio-only fallback), plus a readable notice. **Ambition #2 (тЙе3: QWERTY excitation grid + WGSL cyclic-CA compute + hex-kaleidoscope/log-polar render + warm pad-drone = 4) + #3 (living ref).** *Resurrect for a distinct GPU-compute technique (cyclic-CA spirals, 0├Ч in-window as compute) + its graceful audio-only degrade тАФ strong for a desktop/keyboard slot.*

## ┬з717 (cycle 717 ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ SHIPPED `1344-light-tunnel`; two fresh-substrate explorers banked тнРтнР/тнРтнР

**Context.** WIDE fire attacking the current (2026-07-09) jury's **#1 four-times-unmet demand**: Canvas2D hit 9├Ч of the last 15 тАФ *"force a fresh substrate."* Three explorers, three fresh substrates, all off Canvas2D, each on a distinct non-pointer input. Winner `1344-light-tunnel` (SVG DOM line-art, tilt-steered NDE tunnel) shipped for lowest ship-risk + best phone-glance. The two below are fully built + folder-clean, backed up to scratchpad `banked-717/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. Both are rebuildable from these specs.

- **тЬЕ `1342-prism-cortex` тАФ SHIPPED cycle 718 as `1348-prism-cortex`** (this anchor was cashed тАФ see ┬з718 above; answers the jury's "ship the anchor" demand). Original spec retained below for provenance. **тнРтнР (was TOP SHIP-NEXT тАФ the fire's highest ambition + the freshest substrate + the MIDI-0├Ч input lane).** *WebGPU-compute DMT-breakthrough instrument you PLAY on a keyboard.* Substrate = **WebGPU** (`<canvas>` `webgpu` context тАФ NO Canvas2D/WebGL2). Per frame `gpu.ts`: a WGSL `@compute` shader evolves a **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** field (chemicals A/B) in a ping-pong `rgba16float` **storage texture** (6тАУ12 iters/frame; note-on = soft gaussian chemical-B injection), then a render pass samples it through an **inverse log-polar warp** (`exp`/`log`: screen тЖТ cortical `(╬╕, log r)`) so RD spots become tunnels/spirals/honeycombs тАФ the Kl├╝ver form constants тАФ folded into a kaleidoscopic mirror-symmetric bloom with a thin-film cosine iridescence palette. **Input = Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`) primary: pitch-class тЖТ ring angle ╬╕, pitch-height тЖТ radius (log r), velocity тЖТ injection strength + hue + entropy; **QWERTY** (AтАУL / ZтАУM rows = ~2-oct scale) fallback; always-on **auto-demo** pentatonic phrase before you play; pointer deliberately NOT an input. **Audio** `audio.ts`: per-note warm detuned-saw(├Ч3)+sine-sub **pad-drone** voice (soft attack / long release тАФ not a bell, not a drum) + faint `droneBank` bed; sustained polyphony raises a global **entropy** that speeds the RD reaction + warp churn + saturation + opens the pad lowpass; master тЙд0.24, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, 12-voice cap, full dispose. Living ref **Marpi + Android Jones**. Safety: no strobe (only a ~0.4 Hz breath), soft exp-decay note blooms, `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts churn/contrast/saturation/iters. Degrades: no WebGPU adapter тЖТ `text-rose-300` "WebGPU required" notice + Chrome/Edge/Safari-18 hint (intentionally **no** 2D fallback тАФ the substrate IS the piece); no MIDI тЖТ QWERTY; no input тЖТ auto-demo. **Ambition #2 (тЙе3: MIDI engine + WebGPU-compute RD + log-polar warp render + pad-drone = 4) + #3 (living ref).** *De-selected only because MIDI/QWERTY gate a 06:30 phone reviewer (auto-demo-only on a phone тЖТ reads watched) + WebGPU is the one substrate a headless box can't verify renders тАФ resurrect in a desktop/MIDI slot where the compute field can be eye-tuned. It is the strongest single resurrect the lab has queued: WebGPU-compute is 0├Ч in-window and MIDI is the jury's named 0├Ч input.*

- **тнРтнР `1346-breath-galaxy` тАФ `queued` (best love-fit + a current living ref + phone-native mic input + the calm pole).** *A three.js GPU point-cloud galaxy your breath gathers and disperses.* Substrate = **three.js** (`THREE.WebGLRenderer` + a single `THREE.Points` of ~100k points from a `BufferGeometry` + custom additive `ShaderMaterial`, soft round points via fragment `smoothstep`). All motion is GPU-side via uniforms (`uTime`/`uGather`/`uPixelRatio`) тАФ position buffer written **once**, never per-frame. Vertex shader: remaps each mote's radius inward toward a small core as `uGather` rises (`mix(r, r*0.15+0.18, uGather)`), adds weightless sinusoidal drift that grows as gather falls (dispersion), a slow global rotation, cool-violet outer motes тЖТ warm gold-white gathering core that brightens with coherence. **Input = mic-as-real-input** via shared `useMicAnalyser` (`AnalyserNode`, **analysis-only, never routed to `destination`** тЖТ no feedback): read RMS + steadiness (variance); loud **and** steady hum тЖТ high gather target, silence тЖТ 0, eased slowly so nothing snaps. Gather = boundlessness collapsing to a unity core; disperse = the boundary dissolving into the void (jh─Бna). **Audio** `audio-engine.ts`: warm JI `droneBank` inside `convolutionVoid` reverb + a real audio-rate ~0.1 Hz LFO macro-swell on master; gather opens the drone lowpass + blooms a shimmering high partial + wets the void (coherence sounds luminous); no beat/sequencer/bell/granular-freeze; master тЙд0.205, fade-in, limiter, full dispose (stop mic tracks, dispose geometry/material/renderer, remove canvas, close AudioContext). Living ref **Refik Anadol** (2026 DATALAND / Latent City point-cloud year). Safety: calm pole тАФ slow luminance drift only, тЙд3 Hz, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows rotation/drift. Degrades: no WebGL тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice; no mic тЖТ gentle ~10 s **auto-breath LFO** drives gather/disperse + `text-rose-300` HUD note. **Ambition #2 (тЙе3: mic RMS/steadiness analysis + three.js GPU point-cloud + gatherтЖФdisperse field + drone/void audio = 4) + #3 (living ref).** *De-selected because three.js is the least-fresh of the three substrates (1├Ч in-window, celebrated but not 0├Ч) and the calm pole reads less "one-glance huh" than the tunnel тАФ ship near-verbatim in a slot for its love-fit, or promote its gather/disperse point-field to a shared primitive.*

## ┬з716 (cycle 716 ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ SHIPPED `1338-shadow-808`; two groove-engine siblings banked тнРтнР/тнРтнР

DEEP concept **"The Groove Engine"** тАФ the lab's first real generative-groove instrument: your **body-motion** conducts a living, swung, evolving **drum groove** (real swing + per-step probability + a time-based buildтЖТdrop), the direct answer to the last three juries' loudest unmet ask (*"not one rhythm, groove, beat, or deliberate dissonance in the whole window"*). Research-first: **BeatState** (beatstate.net) + WebSynths Grooves тАФ browser groove-boxes shipping the **polymetric per-voice-length + per-step-probability + swing** engine the lab has never had. Both banked below are **fully built + self-verified** this fire (folder `tsc --noEmit` clean; `eslint --max-warnings 0` тАФ 1340 clean, 1336 one trivial unused-import), backed up to scratchpad `banked-716/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ rebuild from these specs. Neither added deps or an api route; all input is camera `getUserMedia` frame-diff + Web Audio + Canvas.

- **тнРтнР `1340-dub-conductor` тАФ TOP SHIP-NEXT (the "dissonance" piece the jury keeps asking for).** *Conduct dub-techno with two hands in the air.* Camera two-region frame-diff (LEFT/RIGHT half) тЖТ two controllers (motion energy + vertical centroid = two hands). LEFT hand тЖТ a **minor-9 chord stab** (D F A C E) + a **b9 (Eb) tension voice** through a resonant lowpass: **height = cutoff** (low = dark/dissonant, raise = open/resolve), **motion = re-trigger + detune + b9 loudness** тЖТ a controllable **dissonance-that-resolves** (the ONLY piece in this fire that cashes the jury's harmonic-dissonance ask). RIGHT hand тЖТ **dub space**: height = delay feedback/mix (`FB_HARD_MAX=0.85` runaway clamp), motion = off-beat perc + a delay "throw". **Converge** both hands = BUILD (riser); sharp **SPREAD**/burst = DROP (strip to dark filtered kick a beat, slam open). Engine: look-ahead scheduler ~122 BPM 4/4, steady kick + **off-beat** stab/open-hat on the "&" (dub-techno signature), swing + BeatState probability, dotted-8th `DelayNode` feedback + convolution reverb. Files (in `banked-716/1340-dub-conductor/`): `page.tsx`+`dub.ts`+`hands.ts`+`draw.ts`+`README.md`. Living ref: **Robert Henke / Monolake**. Degrades: auto-demo two-hand sweep plays a real dub groove on Begin; pointer/two-touch fallback. **Resurrect verbatim in a camera-or-pointer slot; its only de-selection reasons were phone-glance subtlety + that a dub delay-feedback chain's audio can't be ear-verified headless тАФ ship it a cycle it can be tuned.** `state: dub-trance / tension-release ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient тЖТ intense.` Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: two-region tracker + dub scheduler + resonant-filter chord-dissonance engine + delay/reverb space + dark-room viz = 5; #3 living ref Monolake).
- **тнРтнР `1336-flow-drummer` тАФ the freshest ENGINE (polymetric Euclidean phasing, 0├Ч in-lab).** *Your whole-body motion conducts an evolving polymetric drum groove.* Camera 32├Ч24 frame-diff optical flow тЖТ `MotionState` {total energy, LEFT/RIGHT/TOP/BOTTOM quadrant motion, velocity}. Mapping: total energy = density/fills (stillness тЖТ skeletal kick pulse); quadrant motion = which VOICES wake (L=kick, R=snare, T=hats, B=perc, clap rides energy); velocity = swing depth + ratchet prob + master filter; a sustained burst = timed **buildтЖТdropтЖТslam** (riser 2 bars, silence a beat, slam + a stab that resolves to a fifth). Engine: 5 synth voices each on its OWN **Euclidean** pulse length **16/12/7/5/16** on a shared 124-BPM 16th look-ahead clock тЖТ the voices **phase** so the pattern never simply repeats (the polymeter IS the psychedelic drift тАФ the genuinely 0├Ч-in-lab technique; every prior lab sequencer is fixed-grid). Visual: **thermal** magmaтЖТcyan optical-flow motion-trail flow-field + a 16-step indicator + тЙд3 Hz kick pulse. Files (in `banked-716/1336-flow-drummer/`): `page.tsx`+`flow.ts`+`groove.ts`+`visual.ts`+`README.md` (drop the unused `Link` import from page.tsx on rebuild). Living ref: **Max Cooper** *Emergence* + BeatState. Degrades: pointer conducting + a self-driving auto-demo that periodically swells past the build threshold. **Resurrect to promote the polymetric-Euclidean engine тАФ consider extracting it to `_shared/psych/euclidGroove.ts` as the lab's first shared rhythm primitive.** `state: embodied-groove trance ┬╖ pole: intense.` Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: optical-flow analyzer + polymetric Euclidean scheduler + drum synth + build/drop machine + thermal flow-field = 5; #3 living ref Max Cooper).
- **Deepen the winner `1338-shadow-808` next cycle (from its README + the siblings):** (1) graft 1336's **polymetric Euclidean** per-voice lengths onto the 808 grid so armed steps phase instead of looping on a fixed 8; (2) graft 1340's **resolvable b9 chord stab** as a 6th "harmony" lane so the danced groove gains a tension-release melodic layer (cashes the dissonance ask into the shipped line); (3) a **shake/whole-body-burst тЖТ fill** gesture; (4) per-voice swing (global today); (5) if promoted, a shared `euclidGroove.ts` / `look-ahead scheduler` primitive both 1336 and 1338 could import.

## ┬з714 (cycle 714 ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ SHIPPED `1329-breath-drop`; one embodied sibling banked тнРтнР

**Mode DEEP тАФ one massively-bigger concept, two embodied technical attacks.** "**Earn the Drop**": an EDM build-and-drop where the tension scalar **TтИИ[0,1] is the player's body, not a self-running clock** (the played, embodied counterpart to the lab's *watched* `387-drop-engine`). A real 126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer gates its layers (kickтЖТhatsтЖТriser+ShepardтЖТsnare-fillтЖТ**DROP** = impact + four-on-the-floor) on T, which densifies a log-polar Kl├╝ver form-constant WebGL2 field that **blooms** (not a strobe; SafeFlicker тЙд3 Hz) on the drop. Direct answer to the 2026-07-08 jury's #2 (put TIME/a beat/a drop in the room) + #4 (make instruments, not watched arcs) + #5 (embodied sensor lane 0├Ч). Research-first anchor: **arXiv:2604.27957 (2026)** embodied-gestureтЖТlive-intensity + Motion-to-Emotion "tension = fast, large movements" (RESEARCH ┬з714) тЖТ both attacks. Both fully built + folder-clean (tsc/eslint 0 in isolation), backed up to scratchpad `banked-714/`.

- **SHIPPED `1329-breath-drop`** (winner) тАФ WebGL2 + **mic-as-real-input**: a sustained rising **hum** charges T (RMS level + spectral-centroid pitch), a sharp **exhale** (spectral-flux onset, adaptive `mean+2.5╧Г`) fires the drop; keyboard fallback (SPACE/ENTER) + auto-demo; feedback-safe (high-passed band, analyser neverтЖТdestination, adaptive threshold, headphones prompt). Won on: fills the jury's most-emphatic ~0├Ч lane (mic-as-real-input, "passive-gain only") + most surprising ("breathe the drop into being") + plays on any device (mic universal; tilt needs a phone) + rides the loved hum/voice cluster. See INDEX ┬з714 + STATE ┬з714.

- **тнРтнР `1327-tilt-drop` (banked тАФ SHIP-NEXT; the phone-delight pick)** тАФ WebGL2 + **device-tilt**. **The one question:** what if you had to *earn the drop* with your body? Tilt the phone past a baseline-relative deadzone (grip-agnostic тАФ baseline captured from first readings, then absolute deviation) to **charge T**; hold flat to decay it; at TтЙе0.7 a **sharp shake** (`DeviceMotionEvent` acceleration spike) fires the drop (kick+sub boom+noise burst, riser sucked out, full four-on-the-floor, visual SLAM). Same 126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer + T-gated layers + log-polar form-constant WebGL2 field + Shepard/drone bed as the winner. Pointer drag(charge)/flick(drop) desktop fallback with a "open on your phone" note; 2.5 s auto-demo halting on first real input; iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent`/`DeviceMotionEvent` `requestPermission()` inside the Begin gesture. Master тЙд0.26 тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; full teardown. **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** the **most immediately graspable on a 06:30 phone glance** (tilt-to-charge, shake-to-drop is instantly legible) + the intense club-peak pole; de-selected ONLY because **device-tilt is NOT a jury-0├Ч lane** (`83-kids-tilt-rain` + last cycle's banked `1325-chrysanthemum` both used it) so `1329`'s mic-as-real-input was the stronger jury-#5 answer, AND tilt needs a phone to play (motion sensors absent on desktop) whereas the mic plays everywhere. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim in a tilt slot (assign a fresh number) тАФ it's the phone-delight pick and the intense pole is well-served; OR fold its grip-agnostic baseline-relative tilt mapping (`tilt.ts`) into any future phone build as the lab's reusable tilt primitive. Files: `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `shader.ts` + `tilt.ts` + `README.md`; imports `_shared/psych/{logpolar,shepard,droneBank,safeFlicker}`. Self-verified `tsc`=0, `eslint`=0. INPUT device-tilt charge + shake-to-drop (pointer fallback) ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGL2 log-polar form-constant fragment shader ┬╖ TECH player-charged 126-BPM step-sequencer build-and-drop ┬╖ PALETTE DMT-adjacent club-peak neon. Full source in `banked-714/1327-tilt-drop/`. Refs (living): Max Cooper ┬╖ Robert Henke (*Lumi├иre*).

- **Shared next-cycle move:** the two standing `_shared/psych` promotions still hold тАФ `1324-dream-machine`'s `field.ts` entropy-axis controller тЖТ `entropyController.ts`, and `desync.ts` тЖТ `_shared/psych/desync.ts` (┬з712). Your pointer is the body (a bright present-tense mark); it leaves **three visual echoes at fixed lags** (0.2/0.5/0.9 s, each dimmer/cooler/larger тАФ Daniel Rozin echo-mirror lineage); the AUDIO reads from a **separately-drifting** lag (0.3тЖТ1.2 s slow sine) and its position is drawn as a faint **rose ring**, so you literally watch the heard body drift away from the seen echoes. A steady **~2.8 Hz pulse** fires one soft pentatonic note per tick from the *lagged* position (pitch=vertical, pan=horizontal) тАФ the most rhythmic audio of the three. Pointer-**hold** = "let go / dissociate": echoes fan apart, audio lag widens, pulse softens/slows; release re-binds. **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** the most legible + most PLAYED + lowest ship-risk (Canvas2D) + Canvas2D-diverse; de-selected ONLY because it would be a **second consecutive pointer-timing instrument** after 711's `1316-moire-drift` (both make the see-vs-hear timing relationship the subject тАФ 1316 bound, 1322 unbound) AND it does not deliver the cosmic-ambient pole this cycle was justified on. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim in any clear slot that isn't a timing-instrument тАФ it cleanly cashes the jury's #1+#2 asks (PLAYED + TIME) and its payoff is legible on a 06:30 glance (cuts verification-debt). **тнРтнР BANKED тАФ `1299-euclid-drift`** (a **tilt-driven Euclidean polyrhythm** garden тАФ the purest *groove* piece of the three, and the one that most directly answers the jury's "put a rhythm/beat in it"). `status: built-then-banked` (fully written cycle 705, scratchpad `banked-705/1299-euclid-drift/`). **The one question:** tilt your phone to steer through a garden of interlocking polyrhythms, leaning the device to sculpt a living groove. **Technique:** genuine recursive **Bjorklund** construction (`bjorklund.ts` тАФ `euclideanRhythm(k,n)`, verified E(3,8)=`x..x..x.` tresillo, E(5,8)=`x.xx.xx.` cinquillo) drives **five concentric rings** E(3,8)/E(4,7)/E(5,8)/E(5,16)/E(7,16) sharing one looping bar тЖТ real 7-against-8 polymeter; a pure-Web-Audio rhythm engine (`audio.ts`): bar-looping transport, Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler, five hand-synth percussion voices (plucked sub-bass, tom, conga, wood-block, hat), master lowpassтЖТ`DynamicsCompressor`тЖТgain (тЙд0.3). **Tilt (DeviceOrientation)** is primary: L/R moves a focus cursor that re-voices which rings are loud (others fade to a floor, never silent) + shifts each ring's phase; F/B drives tempo + a drive-lowpass. iOS `requestPermission` in-gesture; **pointer fallback** on desktop/no-gyro drives the same two axes (note that tilt is intended, never blank); tap toggles a ring / bumps its onset count k. Canvas2D concentric rings with rotating onset-dots + a soft-pulsing strike-line; Reactable/Bauhaus palette (off-white + one warm + one cool on slate); `prefers-reduced-motion` honoured. Files: `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `bjorklund.ts` + `README.md`. Self-verified `tsc`=0, `eslint`=0, Bjorklund cases pass. **Why it lost:** its Toussaint (2005) reference is the weaker one against the jury's *living*-AV-artist ask, and it de-selected only vs 1297's named-0├Ч camera lane тАФ NOT on quality. **Resurrect:** ship in a tilt/groove slot (assign a fresh number), OR promote `bjorklund.ts` to `_shared/` тАФ Euclidean rhythm is the lab's thinnest axis (rhythm/groove ~0├Ч), a high-leverage primitive for future pieces. One honest gap: untested on physical iOS, so the `beta`/`gamma` neutral-angle mapping may want per-device calibration. INPUT tilt/DeviceOrientation (pointer fallback) ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D concentric rhythm rings ┬╖ TECH Euclidean/Bjorklund polyrhythm ┬╖ PALETTE Reactable off-white+warm+cool.
