## ┬з702 (cycle 702 ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ SHIPPED `1288-gasket-cathedral`; two non-winners banked

**SHIPPED тАФ `1288-gasket-cathedral`** (the top-rung 3D deepening of `1285` тАФ walk *inside* the Apollonian gasket as a first-person navigable cathedral of ~480 nested HRTF-spatialised nacre bells; see INDEX/STATE ┬з702). Its own cycle-2 deepening (from its README): (1) **sub-strike resonance** тАФ striking a large bell briefly excites its tangent children so a chord ripples down the gasket by tangency graph; (2) **curved-space navigation** тАФ move by *inversion* through spheres (M├╢bius/Kleinian transport) so the packing tiles infinitely as you pass into a bell (the true *Indra's Pearls* move); (3) on-screen thumb-pad for touch movement independent of gaze + a tangency-graph minimap; (4) physicalised reverb sized by local gap volume; (5) bell timbres from struck-shell mode shapes (├а la 1280-earth-bell) instead of two detuned partials.

**тнРтнР `1290-soddy-conductor` тАФ the phone-first reliable sibling (strongest resurrect).** `status: built-then-banked` (fully written cycle 702, scratchpad `banked-702/`). **The one question:** the Apollonian gasket as a 3D instrument laid before you тАФ a lattice of nested bells you play by pointing, biggest = lowest, answering as a spatial chord. **Technique:** same 3D Soddy/Apollonian packing (SoddyтАУGosset seed bends `[тИТ0.449, 4.449]` = `2┬▒тИЪ6`; identity `(╬гk)┬▓=3╬гk┬▓` holds; **460 spheres, 6 levels, max tangency error ~2e-13**, `runSelfCheck` logged + on-screen) rendered as a three.js **`InstancedMesh`** of real spheres with an **orbit camera** (drag-rotate, scroll/pinch-zoom); **`THREE.Raycaster`** picks the sphere under the pointer (nearest-to-ray fallback on a miss) and a sweep-drag arpeggiates whatever it crosses; each strike drives a pooled **HRTF `PannerNode`** at the sphere's world position with the listener tracking the orbit camera (panner/listener pattern lifted from the build-passing 1082). CurvatureтЖТ5-limit-JI, root+fifth drone bed + void reverb, master тЙд0.3. 2s-idle **auto-demo runs a rising largeтЖТsmall arpeggio** so a hands-free reviewer immediately hears the packing as a climbing JI chord + sees each struck sphere flare; nacre/thin-film-on-slate palette; 2D-projection WebGL fallback (still audible). Files: `packing.ts` + `audio.ts` + `scene.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`. **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** it's a 3D object-you-orbit-and-strike (an orrery you're *outside*), so it answers jury #1's "a room you're **inside**, a spatial-audio field" LESS fully than the navigable 1288, and it sits nearer the lab's existing orbit-and-ring groove (1226-loom, 1280-earth-bell). **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim as the **mobile-review default** (no pointer-lock, works on a phone via tap тАФ arguably the better 06:30-on-a-phone experience than 1288's pointer-lock), assign a fresh number; OR graft its `Raycaster` tap-to-ring + linear-solve centre computation into 1288 so the cathedral is tappable on phones. INPUT orbit-drag + ray-pick/sweep ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js instanced-sphere 3D instrument ┬╖ TECH 3D Soddy/Apollonian sphere-packing ┬╖ PALETTE nacre/thin-film on slate.

**тнР `1289-kleinian-descent` тАФ the true infinite-regress descent.** `status: built-then-banked` (scratchpad `banked-702/`). **The one question:** *fall forever* into the Apollonian gasket тАФ an endlessly self-nesting sphere-inversion fractal where the depth of the fold you're inside is the chord you hear. **Technique:** a full-screen **WebGL2 raymarch** of a 3D **Kleinian / kaleidoscopic-IFS** distance estimator (repeated sphere inversions `p=p/dot(p,p)` interleaved with box/plane folds, Jacobian-accumulated DE тАФ the iq/Fractal-Lab/fractal.garden Apollonian family) with thin-film/nacre normal-based iridescence; the camera **auto-descends** forward through gap after gap (pointer/touch steers the fall, scroll/slider sets speed), never hitting a wall. A matching **CPU port of the DE** (`sampleField`: distance + `log2` nesting scale + gradient) samples the camera's local nesting depth every frame тЖТ 5-limit JI pitch (deeper nesting = higher), ringing a voice on each fold-cell crossing over a root+fifth drone bed. Numerically probed: threads a simulated 60s fall with min DE 0.0128, **zero wall-slams** (also the photosensitivity safeguard тАФ motion is slow smooth luminance drift, no strobe), visiting ~14 JI buckets across 3 octaves. Files: `shader.ts` (KleinianField + sampleField) + `audio.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`. **Why it lost:** the builder honestly self-flagged it тАФ because the primary descent is forward flight through a period-2 tiling rather than a literal infinite zoom, a passive viewer could read it as a **drifting full-screen shader-field** (the exact still-live ban), even though the steer/speed controls + live depth-HUD + path-responsive audio push it toward played. **Resurrect:** when the shader-field window clears, OR re-cast as a **literal self-similar scale-zoom** (rescale the coordinate frame each time you cross a nesting boundary) so the "fall forever" is genuinely infinite regress, not a flythrough тАФ that also makes the depthтЖТpitch climb unbounded. INPUT pointer/touch steer + speed ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGL2 raymarched Kleinian descent ┬╖ TECH 3D Kleinian sphere-inversion IFS DE ┬╖ PALETTE thin-film nacre on deep-slate void.

## ┬з700 (cycle 700 ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ SHIPPED `1284-quantum-etch`; two non-winners banked

**тнРтнР `1283-quantum-cloud` тАФ the orbitable 3D probability object (strongest resurrect).** `status: built-then-banked` (fully written cycle 700, scratchpad `dream-losers-700/`). **The one question:** ORBIT a living cloud of quantum probability тАФ the same TDSE split-step engine, but rendered as a real 3-D object you fly around. **Technique:** identical split-step-Fourier TDSE solver (128┬▓/64┬▓, zero-dep radix-2 FFT, raised-cosine absorbing border; norm verified 0.034% over 200 steps moving / 0.003% central) feeding a **three.js `THREE.Points` cloud** тАФ each of N┬▓ points laid on the XZ plane, its HEIGHT (Y) + point-SIZE = local |╧И|┬▓ and its COLOUR = phase arg(╧И) through a cool tealтЖТblueтЖТviolet cyclic ramp via a custom additive `ShaderMaterial`; the cloud visibly bulges where probability concentrates and sinks flat where |╧И|┬▓тЖТ0, so the surface reads as a density landscape you orbit (OrbitControls, damped, polar-clamped above the plane) rather than a flat screensaver. Smoothed-peak luminance (never strobes), plane-raycast picking so tap-vs-drag disambiguates (tap stamps a wall/well or fires a packet, drag orbits), 2D |╧И|┬▓ heat-field WebGL fallback. Same 4 presets (double-slit / Bunimovich stadium / lattice / harmonic), same radial-k-spectrum тЖТ JI partial-bank + mallet audio, `_shared/psych` bed. Files: `fft.ts` + `schrodinger.ts` + `scene.ts` (three.js cloud + orbit + dispose) + `audio.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`. **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** (a) its additive-blend glow-on-ink edges toward the still-live cosmic-glow-on-dark ban even though it's a scientific density cloud, and (b) a 3-D height-map of a fundamentally 2-D field is a rendering abstraction whose "quantum-ness" (interference/tunnelling) reads LESS immediately than 1284's nodal fringe fan, and it is the hardest of the three to eye-verify headless. **Resurrect:** ship on a particle/3D-object slot when the point-cloud window is clear (assign a fresh number тЙе1285), and **push the palette off additive-glow** (a lighter/neutral ground) to clear the cosmic-glow ban. INPUT tap-stamp/fire + orbit-drag ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js orbitable 3D probability point-cloud ┬╖ TECH time-dependent Schr├╢dinger / split-step Fourier (fresh-to-lab) ┬╖ PALETTE tealтЖТviolet luminous cloud on ink.

**тнР `1282-quantum-ripple` тАФ the reference |╧И|┬▓ field, the best-verified solver of the fire.** `status: built-then-banked` (scratchpad `dream-losers-700/`). **The one question:** play quantum mechanics as a rippling tide-pool of probability тАФ the original banked-from-699 concept, rebuilt clean. **Technique:** the canonical Canvas2D render of the same split-step-Fourier TDSE тАФ |╧И|┬▓ brightness auto-gained ├Ч a cyclic cool **phase-hue** overlay (violetтЖТblueтЖТteal) on graphite, faint wall/well overlay, bilinear upscale of the 128┬▓ grid. **Best-verified numerics of the three:** norm drift **0.00006% over 300 steps** (three orders of magnitude under the 0.1% target), presets bounded over 400 steps, spectrum bins normalize to 1.0. ## ┬з699 (cycle 699 ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ SHIPPED `1280-earth-bell`; two non-winners banked

**тнРтнР `1279-quantum-ripple` тАФ the highest-ambition candidate of the fire, the criterion-#1 reach (strongest resurrect).** `status: built-then-banked` (fully written cycle 699, scratchpad `dream-losers-699/`). **The one question:** play quantum mechanics as a rippling tide-pool of probability тАФ sculpt a landscape of walls/wells, drop a wave-packet, watch it interfere with itself, TUNNEL through barriers, and settle into shimmering "quantum-scar" standing waves, each pattern a chord. **Technique (fresh-to-lab, grep-verified тАФ the only quantum-adjacent piece is `1142-orbital-cloud`, which is STATIC atomic-orbital shapes; this is a DYNAMICAL time-dependent simulation):** solve the 2D **time-dependent Schr├╢dinger equation** by the **split-step Fourier method** (potential half-kick тЖТ kinetic full-step in Fourier space тЖТ half-kick), on a 128┬▓ grid (64┬▓ under reduced-motion), with a hand-written strided radix-2 Cooley-Tukey 2D FFT (zero deps) and an absorbing boundary mask. **Numerically verified:** a free packet conserves norm to 1.0000 (the scheme is unitary by construction), a closed stadium billiard holds ~96% over 800 substeps while forming a coherent scarred pattern, nothing goes non-finite. **Played:** tool-toggle inject/wall/well тАФ drag to paint the potential, tap to fire a momentum-aimed Gaussian packet; 4 presets (double-slit / stadium / lattice / harmonic). **Audio:** a 5-voice just-intonation partial bank driven by the radial k-spectrum (a scar that locks into an n-fold pattern rings a chord), presence-driven brightness, a 3-voice pooled mallet on wall contact, over `startDroneBank` + `createVoidReverb` тЖТ limiter (тЙд8 voices). **Render:** Canvas2D |╧И|┬▓ brightness + cyclic cool phase-hue (violetтЖТblueтЖТteal) on graphite, faint potential overlay тАФ crisp scientific field, no bloom, no strobe. Files: `fft.ts` + `schrodinger.ts` + `render.ts` + `audio.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`. **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** (a) its Canvas2D |╧И|┬▓ field is the candidate closest to the still-live "shader-field-you-stare-at" ban (even though it's genuinely sculpted/played), and (b) whether the interference/scars *read* as psychedelic is the hardest of the three to eye-verify on the headless box. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim next fire (fresh number тЙе1282) as the criterion-#1 continuation, OR тАФ highest value тАФ **promote its split-step TDSE solver into `_shared/psych/schrodinger.ts`** as a reusable primitive (any future interference/quantum piece wants it). INPUT draw-potential + tap-inject ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D played |╧И|┬▓ wave-field ┬╖ TECH time-dependent Schr├╢dinger / split-step Fourier (fresh-to-lab) ┬╖ PALETTE cool phase-hue on graphite.

**тнР `1281-eternal-rise` тАФ the freshest register: a played eternal-ascent (rhythmic Risset, not just pitch-Shepard).** `status: built-then-banked` (scratchpad `dream-losers-699/`). **The one question:** play an impossible motion тАФ a tempo AND a pitch that rise (or fall) forever and never arrive тАФ and feel time dissolve into an endless staircase. **Technique:** the lab has pitch-Shepard (`40`/`132`/`187`); this adds the **rhythmic Risset accelerando** (the tempo analog) as a PLAYED instrument with a visual analog тАФ that combination is new to the lab. Six octave-spaced metric strata under a moving Gaussian log-tempo envelope, driven by a proper lookahead Web Audio scheduler (25 ms timer, ~110 ms horizon vs `AudioContext.currentTime`), each stratum recycling its octave only at the near-silent tail so the accelerando is seamless; two shared `startShepard` engines (rising + falling) crossfaded by steer-sign so the pitch glide reverses live. **Played:** vertical drag = glide rate + direction of BOTH pitch and tempo; tap = an accent grain that itself spirals up the ladder; "let go" eases to a slow floor drift. **Visual:** a Canvas2D rotating **logarithmic-spiral barber-pole** тАФ marks born faint at center, streaming out along a log-spiral, fading at the rim, per-stratum rings whose beads ORBIT at pulse rate (motion, never a flash), faint pitch-partial spokes; monochrome bone-white on ink; rotation/stream speed tied to the signed log-tempo velocity. Files: `rissetRhythm.ts` + `audio.ts` + `spiral.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`. **Why it lost:** weakest floor (#3 + a size argument) and an almost entirely **ear-dependent** payoff (the seamlessness of the endless pitch+tempo recycle) that can't be verified on the headless box. **Resurrect:** ship once ear-verified in Karel's browser (fresh number тЙе1282); cycle-2 = tie the steer to breath (mic) so slowing your breath slows the impossible descent. INPUT drag-rate/direction + tap-accent ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D rotating log-spiral barber-pole ┬╖ TECH Risset rhythm + Shepard-Risset glissando ┬╖ PALETTE monochrome barber-pole.

INPUT drag-drive+tap ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGL2 oil-on-water field ┬╖ TECH parametric-Faraday + angle-dependent mode competition (grep-0├Ч) ┬╖ PALETTE liquid-metal/petrol.

**тнР `1277-faraday-sand` тАФ the most LEGIBLE member: a cymatic sand plate (the "cymatics photograph" read).** `status: built-then-banked` (scratchpad `dream-losers-698/`). **The one question:** vertically vibrate a virtual plate and watch ~4000 sand grains flee the antinodes and pile onto the nodal lines, DRAWING the figure of the current symmetry in real time. **Technique:** the same parametric-Faraday field drives a **Chladni grain migration** тАФ each grain steps down тИЗI (I = h┬▓) toward |h|тЙИ0 with a jitter тИЭ I that kicks it off the shaking antinodes; grains self-organize into the nodal zero-set (stripes / grid / honeycomb / 12-fold rosette). Audio subharmonic f/2 + a settledness-driven ring partial (the plate "sings" once the figure locks) + scatter hiss on tap. Charcoal plate + warm bone-white grains тАФ a clean escape from BOTH the shader-field and the cosmic-glow looks. **Why it lost:** its engine uses a **uniform cross-saturation c=1.3** for all mode pairs, so the symmetric coexistence state is formally unstable тАФ a *held* hexagon/quasicrystal slowly drifts toward a single stripe (breaks its own "four figures" thesis on a long look), and this can't be eye-verified on the headless box; 1278 guarantees the four figures instead. Also it would be the lab's 3rd Canvas2D-particle output in the last-10. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim with ONE fix тАФ swap the uniform c for 1276's angle-dependent coupling (co-selected c<1) so hex/quasi hold тАФ then it's the most one-glance-legible Faraday piece of the three. Files: `faraday.ts` (field + grain migration) + `audio.ts` + `page.tsx` (Canvas2D plate) + `README.md`. INPUT drag-drive+tap ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D migrating-sand cymatic-plate ┬╖ TECH parametric-Faraday + Chladni grain migration (grep-0├Ч) ┬╖ PALETTE sand-on-graphite.

## ┬з697 (cycle 697 ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ SHIPPED `1273-swarm-choir`; two non-winners banked

**SHIPPED тАФ `1273-swarm-choir`** (grep-0├Ч swarmalator instrument; see INDEX/STATE ┬з697). Its own cycle-2 deepening: chirality (double-mill/vortex states), spatial-hash to NтЙИ2000, slow modal drift of the audio scale degrees.

**тнРтнР `1274-faraday` тАФ a played parametric Faraday-wave fluid (NEAR-READY, strongest resurrect).** `status: built-then-banked` (fully written this cycle, backed up in scratchpad `dream-losers-697/`, not committed). **The one question:** what if you could play the standing-wave patterns of a vibrating fluid тАФ drive a virtual liquid and watch it self-organize into stripes тЖТ squares тЖТ hexagons тЖТ a 12-fold quasicrystal (the same geometry as Kl├╝ver visual form-constants), each symmetry a chord? **Technique (grep-0├Ч):** don't solve NavierтАУStokes тАФ evolve the slow-envelope amplitudes A_j of six standing-wave modes at 0тАУ150┬░ sharing one wavenumber, each a parametric (Mathieu) oscillator `dA_j/dt = A_j(╧Г_j тИТ A_j┬▓ тИТ c┬╖╬г A_k┬▓)`; ╧Г_j is the parametric growth rate (тИЭ ╬╡ тИТ ╬╡_c, the Mathieu tongue) positive only for the currently-selected symmetry, cubic self-saturation bounds every mode (numerically bulletproof тАФ verified: stripeтЖТ1 mode, squareтЖТ2 orthogonal, hexagonтЖТ3 at 60┬░, quasicrystalтЖТall 6 equal, ╬╡<0.34тЖТenergy exactly 0). **Played:** drag LтЖФR = drive frequency (selects symmetry + wavelength), drag тЖХ = drive amplitude ╬╡, tap = inject a ripple that knocks the pattern down to re-lock. **Audio:** the fluid answers at f/2 (real subharmonic); symmetry picks the chord (stripe=fifth ┬╖ square=minor ┬╖ hexagon=major-add9 ┬╖ quasicrystal=wide shimmer), surface energy blooms it open. **Output:** WebGL fragment-shader mode-sum in a liquid-metal/petrol palette (Canvas2D 132┬▓ fallback) тАФ a *driven, played* fluid (allowed) not a static shader-you-stare-at. Refs Faraday 1831 + Edwards & Fauve quasipatterns + Chen & Vi├▒als + Kl├╝ver form-constants. **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** it edges toward the still-live "full-screen shader-field" ban even though it's played, and 1273 also cashed jury #6 by name + a fresher research chain. **Resurrect:** ship near-verbatim next fire as the psychedelic-geometry sibling (assign a fresh number тЙе1276), OR fold its quasicrystal-symmetry engine into a future form-constant piece.

**тнР `1275-duet` тАФ a call-and-response duet with Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano (cashes jury #2).** `status: built-then-banked` (backed up in scratchpad `dream-losers-697/`). **The one question:** you play a phrase and pause; Karel's recorded piano answers, his notes granularly re-pitched to harmonise with what you just played тАФ the jury's most-repeated personal ask ("make the real piano PLAYABLE, not wallpaper"). **State machine:** LISTEN (play the on-screen keyboard / A S D F G H J K, captured to a phrase buffer) тЖТ ANALYZE (on a ~900 ms rest, derive the phrase tonic) тЖТ RESPOND (a retrograde canon harmonised up a diatonic third, dropped an octave). **Real audio (read-only):** tries the EXISTING `GET /api/audio/[id]` (default id or a pasted id/URL), decodes it, and voices each ghost note by granular resynthesis (overlapping ~120 ms grains, per-grain autocorrelation fundamental, playbackRate = targetHz/grainHz clamped ┬▒1 octave) тАФ his actual recorded notes transposed onto the harmonising pitches. **Self-sufficient synth fallback** so it's demoable with zero network (a warm synth-piano ghost + a `text-rose-300` "synth stand-in" notice). Two-lane note-bloom viz (you = candle-gold, ghost = soft violet, harmony threads linking them), warm-dusk palette. **Why it lost:** duet/granular are lab-common (grep 53├Ч/72├Ч), so it doesn't cash criterion #1 the way the two grep-0├Ч siblings do; and the real-audio path can't be verified on the headless box. **Resurrect:** ship once the `/api/audio/[id]` real-audio path is verified in Karel's browser (assign a fresh number тЙе1276); cycle-2 = live mic onset/pitch detection so you can sing/play an acoustic instrument and the ghost answers your true pitches.

## ┬з696 тАФ DEEP fire (cycle 696, 2026-07-07). Theme: **"the DOM itself as a psychedelic 3D surface тАФ a live grid of HTML cells warped in CSS `matrix3d` into an infinite lattice-tunnel you play."** Cashing JURY 2026-07-07 **#3** (reach a top rung тАФ 14/15 sat at 2тАУ3) + **#2/#4** (make it PLAYABLE, not a screensaver). Two DEEP builders on the SAME grep-0├Ч surface (spreadsheet/DOM-grid + CSS-3D tunnel, both grep-0├Ч) via orthogonal musical models. Curated WINNER = **`1272-lattice-tracker`** (SHIPPED тАФ a PLAYED step-sequencer tracker in a tunnel corridor; won on unambiguous played-ness + novel-to-lab interaction; ambition 4/5). One non-winner fully built + folder tsc/eslint clean, backed up to scratchpad `dream-losers-696/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule, preserved with full rebuild spec below. *Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1273 (1270/1272 committed; 1271 was this build folder).*

### тнР TOP RESURRECT тАФ `cell-cathedral` (was 1271; the autonomous-organism sibling) ┬╖ status: `queued` (built once, scratchpad-backed)
**Why banked, not shipped:** identical grep-0├Ч surface as the winner (real `<div>` grid + CSS-3D lattice-tunnel), so surface wasn't the differentiator; it lost on two counts only тАФ (1) its **excitable-cellular-automaton engine is lab-prior** (reaction-diffusion 6├Ч; excitable media was the banked-not-shipped 1269-oregonator), so its ambition #1 rests solely on the shared surface, and (2) a **pacemaker keeps it breathing autonomously**, which edges toward the "screensaver you occasionally poke" liability the jury polices тАФ where the winning tracker is unambiguously PLAYED. **It is the stronger PURE-TRANSPORT / cosmic-ambient piece** (a genuinely trippy breathing machine-organism), so it's the top resurrect.
**What it is:** a 24├Ч24 grid of live HTML `<div>` cells (16├Ч16 under reduced-motion) laid out with CSS `grid`+`gap` (the graphite gap IS the tunnel's lattice mortar). Runs a **GreenbergтАУHastings excitable automaton** (rest тЖТ firing тЖТ 6-tick refractory, Moore threshold 1, toroidal); seeds spread as rings and тАФ via an asymmetric broken-front seed stamp тАФ curl into spirals; a seeded-`mulberry32` pacemaker re-seeds only when the field goes quiet. The container is `rotateX(62┬░)` inside `perspective:760px` and flown inward each frame тАФ the sim is sampled through a scrolling `cameraRow` window over fixed DOM geometry so rows stream toward the viewer seamlessly (toroidal wrap) while pitch stays pinned to sim coords; firing cells lift with `translateZ`/`scale`/lime glow; a vignette masks recycle seams. **Audio:** every firing cell voices a folded **JI tonnetz** (rows = 3/2, cols = 5/4) through a fixed 16-voice round-robin pool + `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed + `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb + master compressor; per-tick fire cap so clusters ring not mud. **Played:** click/drag hit-tests straight through the CSS-3D transform to stamp seeds, typing perturbs, a Perturb button drops spiral seeds, instant Stop kills all. Palette graphite `#080b10` + electric-lime `#b6f24a` (no cyan/indigo, no parchment). Global luminance breath gated through `createSafeFlicker` (тЙд~2.2 Hz).
**Rebuild:** re-instantiate from scratchpad `dream-losers-696/1271-cell-cathedral/` (page.tsx + README) at a fresh number тЙе1273. Cleanest resurrect paths: **(a)** ship standalone on a particle/cosmic-ambient slot when the tracker's tabular surface has cooled (it's the same DOM-grid engine, so tag the surface carefully to avoid a 2-in-a-row grid monoculture тАФ differentiate by making it clearly the *organism* not the *spreadsheet*); or **(b)** fold as an alternate **"grow" mode** onto 1272-lattice-tracker тАФ one DOM-tunnel engine, two modes: *play* (tracker) and *breathe* (excitable-CA) тАФ a genuine cycle-2 deepening.
**Cycle-2 deepenings (from its README):** two-species FitzHugh-Nagumo-ish inhibitor so spirals meander (map inhibitor тЖТ detune/lowpass); a **harmonic camera** where the flying `cameraRow` slowly transposes the whole tonnetz (comma-pumped key drift, lit tonic column); mic-onset seeding (`_shared/use-mic-analyser`) so humming stamps seeds at the detected pitch.

## ┬з695 тАФ WIDE fire (cycle 695, 2026-07-07). - **тнР `1268-swarmalator` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (highest pure ambition of the fire).** O'KeeffeтАУHongтАУStrogatz **swarmalators** (Nature Communications 8:1504, 2017): NтЙИ400 particles each carrying 2D position AND internal phase ╬╕, with **reciprocal** coupling (phaseтЖТspace via J, spaceтЖТphase via K) тАФ genuinely NOT boids (no phase) and NOT Kuramoto (no space); grep-0├Ч. DRAG a force-well cursor; J/K sliders + 5 preset buttons sweep the **five canonical states** (static sync / static phase wave / splintered phase wave / active phase wave [K<0 churn] / static async), each audibly distinct with an on-screen state classifier + live R readout. **Voice:** two-op Chowning **FM bells** тАФ clusters tight in BOTH phase and space ring bells (pitch from bin/size, pan by centroid-X), global order parameter R=|mean e^{i╬╕}| drives the FM modulation index (RтЙИ1 тЖТ pure/settled; low R тЖТ bright/churning) + a soft always-on bed, тЙд7 voices, per-bin cooldowns, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **Engine:** forward-Euler, soft-cored 1/|╬Фx|, O(N┬▓) halved via force antisymmetry, mulberry32. **Files existed:** `swarmalator.ts` (engine + `orderParameter`/`computeClusters`/`classifyState`/`PRESETS`) + `fm.ts` (`BellEngine`) + `page.tsx` (Canvas2D hue-sprite atlas render) + `README.md`. **Palette:** phase-wheel hue additive-glow (`lighter`) on cool-slate `#10141c`. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 swarmalators grep-0├Ч ┬╖ #3 O'Keeffe┬╖Hong┬╖Strogatz 2017 / Strogatz *Sync* ┬╖ #6 banked). **Why banked not shipped:** its `lighter` additive-glow-on-dark output flirts with the still-live cosmic-glow-on-dark ban, and the glyph-terminal was the fresher NEW surface the jury's #1 demanded. Resurrect on a particle/field slot тАФ and **push the palette further off cosmic-glow** (a lighter/neutral ground). *Deepening:* paint persistent phase-bands into the field that recruit + braid and trigger sustained FM chords (compose the swarm's harmony).
- **`1269-oregonator` тАФ banked (superb engineering; hold until shader-fields cool).** BelousovтАУZhabotinsky / **Oregonator** excitable medium (Barkley kinetics a=0.75, b=0.06, ╬╡=0.02, Du=1.7, 8 substeps) as a **mallet instrument**: TAP nucleates a rotating **spiral** (canonical broken-front construction тАФ excited half-disk overlapping a perpendicular refractory half-disk leaving one free end), HOLD-DRAG paints temporary refractory barriers. **Engine:** WebGL2 ping-pong RGBA16F (R=u, G=v, B=barrier), 9-pt isotropic Laplacian, no-flux CLAMP_TO_EDGE + a lock-step **96├Ч54 CPU shadow** that detects edge-triggered upward crossings (front arrivals) + opposed-neighbor crossings (**collisions/annihilations**) тЖТ strike **inharmonic modal-metal resonators** (partials 1 / 2.756 / 5.404 / 8.933 / 13.34, higher = quieter+shorter; bandpassed-noise mallet attack; pitch = event-Y on minor-pentatonic; collisions ring brighter+longer) over a soft bed; Canvas2D fallback = the shadow model upscaled. **Files:** `tuning.ts` (shared kinetics) / `prng.ts` (mulberry32) / `field.ts` (WebGL2) / `shadow.ts` (CPU event-detector) / `audio.ts` (modal bank) / `page.tsx` / `README.md`. **Palette:** ferroin rust-orange field / cerulean oxidized fronts / hot cyan-white leading edge / graphite refractory tails. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 BZ/Oregonator grep-0├Ч ┬╖ #2 тЙе4 subsystems ┬╖ #3 Belousov 1959 / Zhabotinsky 1964 / Field-K├╢r├╢s-Noyes Oregonator 1972 / Barkley / Winfree *When Time Breaks Down* 1987 ┬╖ #6 banked). **Why banked:** OUTPUT is the full-screen WebGL2 fragment-shader field тАФ still on the JURY 2026-07-07 ban list and ~5├Ч in the last 15 shipped (1251/1254/1257/1259/1263); reaction-diffusion is lab-prior (1257-lattice, which the jury named a "screensaver"). Resurrect the moment shader-fields cool, ideally with the **per-spiral drifting-tuning "chemical duet"** deepening (each spiral gets its own tuning centre; an annihilation resolves as a genuine interval between two tunings). Builder's honest caveat: exact steady-state coverage % + spiral tightness want a small live nudge to substeps/Du.

- **`1266-dream-echo`** тнР (resurrect at тЙе1268) тАФ **the room as a spatial call-and-response partner: a canon that walks with you and answers in your key from where you struck.** A first-person de Chirico colonnade (same proven nav) whose MEMORY layer is an `EchoCanon`: it records each strike `{step, worldPosition, velocity}`, keeps a running degree histogram to name the emerging tonic, and on a ~4.8 s phrase delay **replays** the strikes back through fresh HRTF panners *at their original world positions* (so the answer arrives from where you struck it, from behind/beside you as you've walked on) тАФ voice-led to the nearest chord tone of the tonic then lifted a diatonic fifth (round 1) / octave (round 2), rounds stacking into an accumulating chorus (echo voices capped тЙд12, pending replays тЙд64, all under a limiter). Visible memory glyphs: **teal for your strikes, cyan for the room's replies**, slow-fading so accumulation reads on screen. Files: `page.tsx` + `scene.ts` (EchoScene + memory-glyph pool) + `audio.ts` (EchoAudio тАФ dual live/remembered voices) + `echo.ts` (EchoCanon, pure-logic recorder+canon, owns the shared JI tuning) + `README.md`. Named refs de Chirico + the canon/round tradition + spatial-audio room-acoustics memory (arXiv 2510.00238). `ambition #2 (5 subsystems) + #3 + #4`. **Why it lost:** like 1265 its payoff is chiefly AUDIBLE (a transposed spatial canon), with a real "does it read as *the room finishing your phrase* or as clutter?" risk the builder flagged and that can't be ear-verified on the headless box тАФ `1267`'s visible growth is the safer, more legible ship. **How to resurrect:** ship as the "the room answers" sibling, OR fold its **from-original-position transposed replay** into `1267-dream-growth` so each grown element periodically replays the phrase that grew it (memory you can walk back through AND hear answer). ## ┬з691 тАФ WIDE fire (cycle 691, 2026-07-07). Theme: **"three endogenous/cosmic altered states via three starved inputs"** тАФ continuing the PRIMARY DIRECTION (PSYCHEDELIC) on the cosmic-ambient/endogenous pole (INTENSE just shipped 690), each brief on a distinct *starved* input to escape the audio-file (4├Ч) + pale-print (~5├Ч) monocultures AND the forming full-screen-WebGL-field pattern (last 3 ships 1251/1254/1257 all shader fields). Curated WINNER = **`1259-auroral`** (SHIPPED тАФ Earth's live NOAA auroral oval sung back as a cosmic curtain-field; the aurora sibling of the jury-beloved 1193-tremor-core). Two non-winners fully built + folder tsc/eslint clean, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule, preserved here with full specs. *Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1261 (1259 committed; 1258/1260 were these build folders; 1253-ganzfeld / 1252-chrysanthemum still banked from ┬з689; 1255/1256 from ┬з690; 1247-thermal / 1245-antiphon still reserved).*

- **тнР TOP resurrect тАФ `1258-stillness`** (`state: meditative-boundless / clear-light ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`). **The interaction the jury keeps asking for: novelty in the INTERACTION, not the model.** A stillness-biofeedback dissolution тАФ the *stiller* you hold, the more a structured cool field melts toward a boundless high-key white-gold Ganzfeld and the audio opens; any movement re-condenses it (inverts "move = more viz"). Input = **camera** (starved, jury-flagged тЙд1├Ч) via plain **frame-differencing** (64├Ч48 offscreen canvas, mean abs luminance delta тЖТ motion energy, EMA-smoothed тАФ NO MediaPipe/dep); `stillness` integrates asymmetrically (slow ~6s rise, fast ~0.4s collapse). Output = full-screen WebGL2 fragment field (fBm domain-warp тЖТ desaturate тЖТ center-out radial bloom тЖТ near-uniform luminous void). Audio = shared `startShepard` + `startDroneBank` тЖТ `createVoidReverb` тЖТ limiter, gesture-gated; opens with the light. Graceful camera-denied fallback (breath-drift ~0.1 Hz + "no camera тАФ just drift" button) + Canvas2D no-WebGL2 fallback; `prefers-reduced-motion`; no strobe. **Ambition #2 (camera + frame-diff + WebGL field + audio bed = 4) + #3 (Lutz/Davidson gamma-synchrony PNAS 2004; Ganzfeld; jh─Бna clear-light).** **Why it lost:** its output is the **4th full-screen WebGL shader field in a row** (1251/1254/1257 + this) тАФ a re-camp of the exact forming monoculture this WIDE existed to escape; and its payoff hook is slower than auroral's instant one-glance read (needs camera grant + ~6s of held stillness). **How to resurrect:** ship it the moment the WebGL-field window has cleared тАФ the inverted stillness-reward interaction is genuinely the abandoned "novelty in the interaction/form" rung the jury flags, and the concept is a standout. Built at `1258-stillness/` (page.tsx + README) before removal.

- **тнР `1260-threshold`** (`state: hypnagogia / sleep-threshold ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient / dreamlike`). Draw at the edge of sleep: your finger's trail persists on a **Canvas2D ping-pong feedback buffer** (two swapped offscreen canvases, prior frame redrawn scaled/rotated/offset + faded by decay <1 so it always settles тАФ never a strobe) and blooms into Kl├╝ver form-constant motes (lattice / cobweb / spiral / faces-in-noise, ~90 motes easing toward targets) that self-morph whether or not you steer; a `mulberry32`-seeded **teleport state machine** (~12тАУ25s) softly cross-morphs the whole field to a new form + hue with a filtered-noise gust (dream discontinuity, a smooth ~0.5тАУ1s dissolve, never a hard cut). Input = **touch/draw** (starved, pointer + touch, preventDefault mid-stroke). Audio = shared `startDroneBank` + `createVoidReverb` + glassy stroke-bells (pitchтЖФheight, panтЖФx, soft attack/long release) + teleport gust, through a limiter. Warm hypnagogic dusk palette (amber/rose/deep-violet on near-black). **Ambition #2 (draw + feedback ping-pong + form-morph state machine + audio bells = 4) + #3 (hypnagogia/Tetris-effect Stickgold; MIT Dormio / Adam Haar Horowitz; Kl├╝ver form constants).** **Why it lost:** the feedback-trail-accumulator technique already has a lab ancestor (1047-tracer-drift), so it's less novel to the lab than auroral's live-data-map; and the builder honestly notes it's dim until you draw and the faces-in-noise read as clustered blobs тАФ a weaker one-glance hook. **How to resurrect:** pair the teleport/scene-cut mechanic (the fresh part) with a brighter self-driving idle bloom so it reads without input; or fold the dream-teleport state machine into another piece as a "scene discontinuity" layer. Built at `1260-threshold/` (page.tsx + field.ts + audio.ts + README) before removal.

## ┬з690 тАФ DEEP fire (cycle 690, 2026-07-07). Theme: **"a drug-free DMT-*Breakthrough* ascent"** тАФ ONE massive concept (a ~3.5-min stateful escalation bloom тЖТ growth тЖТ lattice-saturation тЖТ breakthrough, carried by a rising Shepard bed) attacked via 3 rendering approaches, on the INTENSE pole (due after 688 cosmic-ambient + 689 dissociative). Cashes JURY #1 (break the FORM) + #2 (reach a genuinely new technique). Two non-winners fully built + folder tsc/eslint clean, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule, preserved here with full specs. *Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1258 (1257 committed; 1255/1256 were these build folders; 1253-ganzfeld / 1252-chrysanthemum still banked from ┬з689; 1247-thermal / 1248 from ┬з687; 1245-antiphon still reserved).*

- **`1255-breakthrough`** тнР (INTENSE ┬╖ Cluster-1 DMT breakthrough ┬╖ **mic** neural-gain) тАФ status `queued` (built demoable this fire, banked). **A drug-free flight THROUGH negatively-curved hyperspace.** Full-screen WebGL2 fragment field: screenтЖТlog-polar `log(r)` axis so a forward-transport accumulator `uZ` makes cells expand and *multiply exponentially* from the vanishing point (the accelerating breakthrough tunnel), a Poincar├й-ball-ish negative-curvature radial pinch (`uWarp`), N-fold kaleidoscopic mandala, brick-offset honeycomb lattice, high-key thin-film/nacre iridescence. Stateful BLOOMтЖТTUNNELтЖТSATURATIONтЖТBREAKTHROUGH arc (~3.3 min, gently loops). Rising Shepard(`dir:1`)+JI droneтЖТvoid reverbтЖТlimiter. Mic energy тЖТ deeper/faster melt, LFO fallback. Named ref **Segerman/Woodard/Nelson *hypVR-Ray* / h3.hypernom.com** + Kl├╝ver/BressloffтАУCowan. **ambition #2+#3.** *Why it lost:* (a) a "fly into a tunnel" FORM **re-camps 688-borealis's tunnel** two cycles later тАФ the exact re-camp the jury polices; (b) the H┬│ claim is honestly a *fake* тАФ it's a 2.5D log-polar forward-transport with a curvature pinch, not a true hyperbolic-honeycomb raymarch, so no real #1. **How to resurrect properly:** wait until the borealis tunnel has receded from the diversity window, AND attempt an **actual H┬│ raymarch** (M├╢bius transport through a Poincar├й-ball honeycomb, per hypVR-Ray) to genuinely cash the #1 the fake declines. Best one-phone-glance hook of the three; the legibility is real, only the novelty was thin.

- **`1256-hyperspace`** тнР (INTENSE ┬╖ Cluster-1 ┬╖ **mic** neural-gain) тАФ status `queued` (built demoable this fire, banked). **The four Kl├╝ver form constants ESCALATING into a breakthrough, using the cortex's own log-polar geometry as the engine.** Full-screen WebGL2 field that imports the shared `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` and morphs a single `uFormMix` uniform tunnelтЖТspiralтЖТhoneycomb (the actual BressloffтАУCowan account of why cortical stripes/hex become perceived tunnels/spirals/honeycombs), N-fold kaleidoscope climbing 3тЖТ12, fBm domain-warp breathing, a `uReorg` breakthrough-coherence sharpen, high-key thin-film iridescence. Stateful BloomтЖТSpiralтЖТHoneycombтЖТBreakthroughтЖТre-bloom arc (~200s). Rising Shepard+JI droneтЖТvoid reverbтЖТlimiter. Mic energy тЖТ reorg rate + octave count (REBUS neural gain), bass тЖТ warp depth, LFO fallback. **Has the best in-app design-notes panel of the fire** (teaches the BressloffтАУCowan mechanism тАФ genuine Karel-facing value). Named ref **Kl├╝ver form constants + BressloffтАУCowan** (*Geometric visual hallucinationsтАж*) + Carhart-Harris/Friston REBUS. **ambition #2+#3.** *Why it lost:* it's the *Nth* log-polar form-constant field (1038/1042/1044 lineage) тАФ "novelty in the model, not the form," the floor-scrape the jury explicitly warns against; and its FORM (a field you watch) is close to the lab's recent void/field pieces. **How to resurrect:** ship it as the deliberate **"explainer" psychedelic piece** (its teaching notes are its edge тАФ pair with a "show me why" annotated mode), OR fold its clean `uFormMix` form-constant morph *into another build's display pass* (e.g. as the SATURATION-phase warp inside `1257-lattice`'s RD membrane тАФ the named next-cycle deepening).

## ┬з689 тАФ WIDE fire (cycle 689, 2026-07-07). Theme: **"three altered states via three starved inputs"** тАФ continuing the PRIMARY DIRECTION (PSYCHEDELIC) across the *whole* spectrum in one fire (one INTENSE, one COSMIC-AMBIENT, one DISSOCIATIVE), each on a distinct starved input (mic / gyro / keyboard) to escape three monocultures at once (flat-pale-print output+palette 5├Ч, real-piano input 4├Ч now that the JURY ask is cashed, jury's jewel-on-dark-3D-object). Curated WINNER = **`1254-dissolve`** (SHIPPED тАФ the ketamine K-hole where sound & image slowly come unbound). Two non-winners fully built + folder tsc/eslint clean, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule, preserved here with full specs. *Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1255 (1254 committed; 1252/1253 were these build folders; 1247/1248 still banked from ┬з687; 1245 still reserved for the antiphon rebuild).*

- **тнР TOP resurrect тАФ `1253-ganzfeld`** (`state: meditative-Oceanic-Boundlessness/Ganzfeld ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`). A drug-free Ganzfeld/Ganzflicker field: full-viewport *uniform* pearlescent-opal glow with imperceptibly-slow perlin drift so the visual system fills the void with its own imagery; **device-orientation (gyro) untethered OOB drift** (no fixed up-vector; tilt the phone to float тАФ **phone-native, ideal for Karel's 06:30 phone review**), desktop auto-drift fallback; breath-paced radial bloom at ~0.1 Hz; opt-in **тЙд3 Hz safe photic pulse** (routed through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`, off by default, warning-gated, instant kill) that lets faint Kl├╝ver form-constants emerge. Audio = shepard + drone through `convolutionVoid`. **Ambition #1 (ganzfeld + gyro both grep-0├Ч) + #2 (4 subsystems) + #5** тАФ the freshest researchтЖТbuild chain of the fire: **arXiv 2507.09011 (July 2026)**, "imagery capacity predicts Ganzflicker content" (aphantasicsтЖТdots, hyperphantasicsтЖТfaces тЖТ we promise the *field*, not a vision). Named refs Gysin *Dreamachine* (1959) / Collective Act (2022). **Why it lost:** it *repeats 688-borealis's cosmic-ambient pole* (I rotated the winner to a fresh pole), and the steady-Ganzfeld default risks reading as "a slow gradient" on a one-glance look (the payoff is inside the viewer's head). **Resurrect FIRST** тАФ it's the strongest single item in the queue, phone-native, and the moment a cosmic-ambient slot is clear of the borealis tunnel it should ship. Built at `1253-ganzfeld/` (page.tsx + shader.ts + orientation.ts + audio.ts + README) before removal.

- **тнР `1252-chrysanthemum`** (`state: DMT/LSD breathing-fractal-melt ┬╖ pole: intense`). Your **voice/room mic** melts the whole screen into a breathing, blooming DMT chrysanthemum: full-screen WebGL2 fragment field = fBm domain-warp ("breathing") + N-fold kaleidoscope UV fold (petals grow 5тЖТ16 with loudness) + inverse log-polar form-constant (`LOGPOLAR_GLSL`, phi drifts tunnelsтЖТspiralsтЖТspokes) + thin-film iridescence + a **high-key neural-gain tonemap that whitens the whole field at peak** (not jewel-on-black). Carrier = `droneBank` + `shepard` surging at bloom, through a limiter; graceful mic-denial тЖТ internal-LFO auto-drive + `text-rose-300` message. **Ambition #2 (3 subsystems) + #3** (Kl├╝ver form constants / BressloffтАУCowan; Carhart-Harris & Friston *entropic brain / REBUS* тАФ loudness raises octaves/flow/saturation/reorg-rate and *loosens* symmetry at peak). **Why it lost:** the *technique* (log-polar melt) is closest to lab-vocabulary (cf. 1038/1042/1044 form-constant fields) тАФ the floor-scraper of the three (#2+#3 only, no #1 claim), and the least-surprising "expected psychedelic melt." Still a lovely, legible one-glance INTENSE piece; resurrect when the intense pole is due and pair with a fresh technique to lift it above the floor. Built at `1252-chrysanthemum/` (page.tsx + shaders.ts + audio.ts + README) before removal.

## ┬з688 тАФ DEEP fire (cycle 688, 2026-07-07). Theme: **"a >5-min single-take stateful tunnel-to-light PASSAGE carried by Karel's REAL piano"** тАФ cashing JURY 2026-07-06 #2 (reach the abandoned top rung: a genuine long-form stateful piece, 0├Ч/15) + re-engaging the neglected PRIMARY DIRECTION (PSYCHEDELIC, cosmic-ambient pole тАФ NDE tunnel-to-light). Three builders, one concept, three technical approaches. Curated WINNER = **`1251-borealis`** (SHIPPED тАФ the volumetric raymarched tunnel you fly *into*). Two non-winners fully built + folder tsc/eslint clean, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule, preserved here. *Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1252 (1251 committed; 1249/1250 were these build folders; 1247/1248 still banked from ┬з687; 1245 still reserved for the antiphon rebuild).*

### тнР `1250-lumen` тАФ `queued` тАФ **TOP RESURRECT of this fire (the purest never-repeats engine тАФ the exact 0├Ч long-form rung, done as an accumulator not a script).** *Karel's piano drives an Eno-style generative field that genuinely never repeats.*
- **Concept:** no phase timeline. A `Drift` object of coupled slow integrators тАФ `phi` (form-constant angle, tunnelтЖТspiralтЖТspoke), `honey` (honeycomb-lattice blend), `freq` (ring density), `zoom` (cortical log-r offset), `swirl` (╬╕ rotation), `temp` (palette emberтЖФgold-white), `lumen` (toward-light accumulator, also opens reverb+drone), `phase` (continuous inward drift) тАФ **never reset while playing.** Each target = seconds-smoothed sum of (1) mutually-detuned LFOs at near-coprime periods (43/59/71/89/107/131/163/197 s тЖТ astronomically long recurrence), (2) **a per-parameter OrnsteinтАУUhlenbeck integrated-noise random walk** (the decisive part тАФ exact state is non-recurrent by construction, no two runs alike), (3) the piano's slow spectral envelope (seconds-scale energy+centroid running average тАФ steers, never triggers). Every move an exponential approach with multi-second time constants тЖТ nothing hard-cuts. Live readout (elapsed ┬╖ form name ┬╖ freq ┬╖ temp ┬╖ lumen) makes the living system legible. **FORM:** full-screen WebGL2 warm-cosmic **field** (deep-dark тЖТ ember тЖТ gold тЖТ warm near-white) via the shared `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` spliced into the frag shader; Canvas2D CPU log-polar fallback. **PALETTE:** luminous warm-cosmic drift (non-jewel, non-pale-print). Files existed: `page.tsx` (Drift + RAF + HUD + fallback) + `render.ts` (WebGL2 field) + `audio.ts` (`LumenAudio`: loopтЖТsrcGainтЖТ[Analyser]+VoidReverbтЖТbusтЖРDroneBankтЖТmaster(0.45)тЖТlimiter; `readEnvelope()` + `setLumen()`). **Named refs:** Brian Eno *Reflection*/*77 Million Paintings*; Kl├╝ver form constants; BressloffтАУCowan retino-cortical log map; Cognition Interactive "living visual systems" (Medium 2026-02-24). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #4 long-form).
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** it is the **most conceptually rigorous** answer to the jury's 0├Ч long-form rung тАФ genuine non-repetition via *integrated accumulated state*, not a script. BUT a formless slow drift with no narrative signposts is the **weakest one-phone-glance read** of the three (the jury's gold standard) тАФ at 06:30 it risks reading as "a beautiful screensaver," where borealis's *flying into a tunnel of light* lands in one second. **Resurrect the moment a long-form/ambient-room or Tauri-installation slot is wanted** (its multi-minute non-repetition is a feature there, not a cost), OR fold its OU-accumulator drift engine into `1251-borealis` as the next-cycle deepening that makes borealis's ring-frequency / approach wander genuinely non-recurrent (see borealis README "next-cycle deepening").

### тнР `1249-threshold` тАФ `queued` тАФ **RESURRECT (the legible scripted NDE-stage arc тАФ the readable-journey counterpart to borealis's raw transport).** *Karel's piano walks you through the five stages of a near-death passage.*
- **Concept:** a scripted, legible **five-phase state machine** тАФ `BODY (0тАУ75s, cellular honeycomb, barely moving) тЖТ ONSET (75тАУ150s, lattice loosens, spirals begin) тЖТ TUNNEL (150тАУ270s, concentric rings rush inward) тЖТ LIGHT (270тАУ360s, bloom floods to warm white, piano ducks under the wash) тЖТ RETURN (360тАУ450s, light recedes to soft spokes, piano returns forward)`, тЙИ450s/7.5min total. Smoothstepped keyframe interpolation on BOTH the visual field and the audio bed тЖТ continuous morph, never a snap/loop; a single monotonic inward accumulator so the tunnel never recurs. Current phase name + a thin progress line shown subtly тАФ the arc feels guided and inevitable. **FORM:** full-screen WebGL2 form-constant **field** (honeycombтЖТringsтЖТwhite bloom) via the shared `_shared/psych/logpolar`; Canvas2D CPU fallback. Audio: pianoтЖТVoidReverbтЖТAnalyser (onsets brighten the light) + DroneBank + an endless-**falling** Shepard glide swelling through TUNNEL. **PALETTE:** luminous white-gold NDE tunnel-to-light (non-jewel). Files existed: `page.tsx` (state machine + RAF) + `render.ts` (field shader) + `audio.ts` (loader+fallback+bed). **Named refs:** Karolina Halatek *Terminal*; Kl├╝ver form constants / BressloffтАУCowan; Brian Eno *Reflection*. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #4 long-form/multi-cycle).
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** it has the **most legible "minute 5 тЙа minute 1"** (named phases + progress line make the journey unmistakable) тАФ but its flat 2D warped field is the **least novel visual** of the three (the lab has rendered form-constant fields before тАФ 1038/1042/1044), where borealis's raymarched *volumetric depth you fly through* is genuinely fresh and the better embodiment of Halatek's walk-through-tunnel reference. **Resurrect as the guided/therapeutic-arc variant**, OR fold its explicit NDE stage-gating INTO borealis (borealis is currently a continuous drift; adding threshold's five-phase scripting would give it a legible narrative on top of the embodied transport тАФ the strongest single deepening of the winner, noted in borealis's README).

## ┬з687 тАФ WIDE fire (cycle 687, 2026-07-07). Theme: **"three ways Karel's REAL recording becomes a non-object, non-notation FORM"** тАФ cashing JURY 2026-07-06 #3 (SHIP THE REAL PIANO, the loudest recurring unmet ask, drove only 1├Ч/15) + #1 (break the FORM) + #4 (a genuinely new palette register) while deliberately *avoiding* the emerging "real-recordingтЖТself-inking-notation" sub-camp (1234/1236). Curated WINNER = **`1246-warp`** (SHIPPED). Two non-winners fully built + folder tsc/eslint clean, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule, preserved here. *Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1249 (1246 committed; 1247/1248 were these build folders; 1245 still reserved for the antiphon rebuild).*

### тнРтнР `1247-thermal` тАФ `queued` тАФ **TOP RESURRECT (highest raw ambition of the fire тАФ the lab's first full NavierтАУStokes weather chart).** *Karel's recording rendered as a live synoptic weather system.*
- **Concept:** the real recording plays; its live spectrum forces a real 2-D **Jos Stam *Stable Fluids* (SIGGRAPH 1999)** semi-Lagrangian solver (128├Ч72 CPU typed-array grid: add-force тЖТ diffuse[GaussтАУSeidel] тЖТ project[Poisson pressure] тЖТ advect тЖТ project, + a scalar temperature field). **AudioтЖТweather:** spectral flux (onsets)тЖТa **vorticity gust** (curl force, a spinning eddy blows across); RMS loudnessтЖТ**buoyancy** (warm plumes rise); spectral centroid (register)тЖТ**horizontal wind shear** (bass = low fast jet, treble = high wispy cirrus); + a continuous faint background wind so it's alive before Begin. **FORM:** a **pale synoptic chart** (Canvas2D) тАФ off-white paper `#f2efe6`, faint filled temperature contour bands (steel-blue `#5a7a9a` тЖФ terracotta `#c56b4a`), **marching-squares isobars** of the pressure field, **LIC-lite advected wind streamlines**, warm/cold **front ticks** on strong thermal gradients, a compass rose, live wind/pressure-trend/gust readouts. **PALETTE:** pale meteorological chart (non-jewel). **INPUT:** playback + Begin/Pause. Files existed: `page.tsx` + `fluid.ts` (the solver) + `chart.ts` (renderer) + `audio.ts` (loader+fallback+AudioEngine) + `README.md`. **Named refs:** Stam 1999; **arXiv 2601.15982 *Real-Time Inviscid Fluid Dynamics and Aero-acoustics on a Sphere* (Jan 2026)**; synoptic charts / Ryoji Ikeda. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [real-audio loader + FFT feature extraction + full fluid solver + chart renderer = 4] + #3 named refs + #5 THIS cycle's arXiv 2601.15982 dive тЖТ the clean today's-researchтЖТtoday's-build chain).
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** it is the **most ambitious and most surprising** of the three (the lab's first real NavierтАУStokes fluid sim as a FORM), BUT its **pale-flat-Canvas2D-chart palette re-camps `1244-dayline`** (shipped the *previous* cycle 686 тАФ also a pale Canvas2D flat chart/map) тАФ exactly the subtle palette re-camp the jury polices тАФ and its CPU fluid solver is the fire's biggest perf/deploy risk on a straight-to-prod push. **Resurrect the moment a pale-chart slot is clear of dayline** (a few cycles out), or when a WebGPU-compute stretch is wanted (its README's next step: WebGPU port for a finer grid + true LIC + an actual aeroacoustic sound coupling per arXiv 2601.15982, so the wind you *see* also *sounds* like wind under the piano). **This is the strongest single resurrect in the queue.**

### тнР `1248-verdure` тАФ `queued` тАФ **RESURRECT (the long-form stateful one тАФ a garden that is genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1).** *Karel's whole recording grows a Lindenmayer botanical garden on a herbarium plate.*
- **Concept:** the real recording plays startтЖТfinish; over its FULL duration an **L-system garden** grows with **accumulating state** (the canvas is never cleared). Genuine grammar (axiom `X`; rules `X тЖТ F+[[X]-X]-F[-FX]+X`, `F тЖТ FF` тАФ the *Algorithmic Beauty of Plants* bushy plant) run through a stack-based turtle. **AudioтЖТgrowth:** onset (spectral-flux gate)тЖТadvance the active plant's revealed depth; loud attackтЖТa **bloom** opens at the newest tip; spectral centroid *at germination*тЖТbranching angle + reach (bright/high = acute/fine/tall, low = broad boughs); RMS at germinationтЖТinternode length + plant size; **phrase boundary** (RMS below floor >0.8s after voiced audio)тЖТ**germinate a new plant** at the emptiest soil spot. Per-plant geometry expanded once at germination then *revealed* incrementally (cheap, persistent); plants mature & stop, growth moves to the newest; caps тЙд260 seg/plant, тЙд30 plants, тЙд6200 total. So minute 1 = a sprout, minute 5 = a dense meadow of distinct specimens, each the fossil of the phrase that grew it. **FORM:** a pressed-specimen **herbarium plate** (Canvas2D тАФ aged cream `#efe8d5` + grain, plate border/corner ticks, an italic "Hortus Resonans ┬╖ Pl. I" cartouche). **PALETTE:** botanical-herbarium print (sage/olive/dried-ivy foliage, walnut stems, dried-rose/ochre blooms, charcoal ink) тАФ non-jewel, dark-on-light. **INPUT:** playback + Begin/Pause + elapsed/plant-count readout. Files existed: `page.tsx` + `garden.ts` (grammar + turtle + `GardenSim` state + `GardenViz` renderer) + `audio.ts` (loader+fallback+`GardenAudio` RMS/flux/centroid) + `README.md`. **Named ref:** Lindenmayer L-systems (1968); Prusinkiewicz & Lindenmayer, *The Algorithmic Beauty of Plants* (1990). **Ambition 2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [real-audio + onset/pitch analysis + stateful L-system growth + herbarium renderer] + #3 named ref + a real long-form/stateful commitment).
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** it's the only one hitting the **long-form-stateful** top-rung тАФ but `1234-almanac` (long-form canonical-hours) already cashed that rung recently, shrinking its differentiation, and long-form's payoff **takes minutes to read**, a weak fit for the 06:30 one-phone-glance review (the same reason 1245-antiphon and 1188 were banked). **Resurrect for a long-form / botanical-print slot** once almanac has receded, or as a Tauri/installation ambient-room piece where the multi-minute evolution is a feature not a cost. **Honest gap (next-cycle deepening):** a plant's *form* is sampled once at germination тАФ mid-phrase pitch drift doesn't yet reshape a growing plant; modulate the *unrevealed* geometry as it extends. Also: seasons over the arc (springтЖТautumn palette drift), and seed-back-into-audio (mature blooms ring a soft sympathetic tone, closing soundтЖТformтЖТsound).

## ┬з685 тАФ WIDE fire, ALL THREE built + curated. Winner `1244-dayline` **SHIPPED cycle 686** (2026-07-07) after the ship-block was relieved with an isolation-build validation. Two non-winners preserved as resurrects. *Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1246 тАФ 1244 is now committed; 1245 is reserved for the antiphon rebuild.*

> **тЬЕ BLOCKER RELIEVED (see STATE ┬з686):** cycle 685's "hard build ceiling" is **not** a hard block. `npm run build` still EMFILEs at the ~640-route baseline (container `ulimit -n` = 4096, unraisable; `next.config` off-limits), BUT the EMFILE fires *after* a clean compile+lint+type-check and is purely proportional to route count. A new route validates from **inside** the scope fence via (a) the full-tree build *reaching* "Collecting page data" (whole-app code checks pass) + (b) an **isolation build** тАФ `mv` the ~639 other tracked prototype folders to a scratchpad hold, build the reduced ~66-route tree with no fd pressure, confirm the new route static-generates (`тЬУ 66/66, тЧЛ prerender`), `mv` everything back (fully reversible). Proven on `1244-dayline` this cycle. Karel's fd fix (raise `ulimit -n` / cap Next static-gen concurrency / archive old routes) is now a nice-to-have for a clean *full* local build, not a stopgap.

**WIDE fire: "three non-object FORMS, one per builder тАФ a PAGE, a MAP, a CONVERSATION" тАФ directly cashing JURY 2026-07-06's #1 provocation (break the FORM, not just the timbre) + palette-escape (all three high-key/light, none jewel-on-dark) + fresh inputs (keyboard-text / live-clock / mic+tap, none pointer-orbit). All three pure client-side (Web Audio + Canvas2D), zero deps, no api route. Curated WINNER = `1244-dayline` тАФ SHIPPED cycle 686.**

### тЬЕ `1244-dayline` тАФ `SHIPPED cycle 686` (was TOP RESURRECT / curated WINNER of cycle 685)
**The Earth is a clock-sequencer: the day/night terminator sweeps a flat world map and every city it crosses at dawn/dusk plays a note.** Fully offline solar astronomy (declination ╬┤ тЙИ тИТ23.44┬░┬╖cos(360/365┬╖(day+10)); subsolar lon = тИТ15┬░┬╖(UTCтИТ12); lit when solar altitude тЙе 0; dawn = up-crossing, dusk = down-crossing) drives ~44 hardcoded world cities as a self-composing sequencer + a drone tracking total sunlit landmass. Pitch тЖР latitude (pentatonic, poleward higher), pan тЖР longitude, brighter partials north. Controls: Begin, Play/Pause, log time-speed (real-time тЖТ a day/40s), scrub time-of-day, Now. Pale printed-atlas palette (warm paper landmasses, slate seas, luminous amber-dawn / rose-dusk terminator edge), dark-on-light readable UI. Canvas2D flat map (NOT a 3D globe), retina-aware, jump-suppression on scrub so it doesn't fire a burst on time-jumps. **Named refs:** Refik Anadol *Machine Dreams: Rainforest* / Dataland (opened 2026-06-20 тАФ this cycle's research dive); Ryoji Ikeda *data.tron*; classic terminator maps. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [offline astronomy engine + city sequencer + generative drone + map renderer] + #3 named ref + #5 research-from-this-cycle тЖТ the clean today's-researchтЖТtoday's-build chain the jury named as best-in-class). **Why it won the curation:** highest floor of the three, bulletproof/deterministic/offline (zero deploy risk), real-world-data / about-the-world (jury's praised 1193-tremor-core lane), and reads in one phone glance ("hear the sun move around the Earth"). **Preserved:** full folder (page.tsx + astro.ts + cities.ts + audio.ts + map-canvas.ts + README) verified tsc+eslint clean; scratchpad copy this session, but the spec here is complete enough to rebuild if lost. **Honest gaps:** coarse hand-authored continent polygons; astronomy omits equation-of-time + refraction (documented).

### тнРтнР `1245-antiphon` тАФ `queued` тАФ **SHIP-NEXT** (the CONVERSATION form тАФ a musical intelligence that listens & answers; now the loudest unmet jury ask + seeded by ┬з686 arXiv 2602.05064. Rebuild from this spec at slug `1245-antiphon`; validate via the isolation-build path in STATE ┬з686.)
**What if the instrument talked back?** You tap/QWERTY (or clap/hum via optional mic) a short phrase; a generative partner analyses it (note-count, mean IOI, contour, register, density) and answers *in the gap* with a phrase-derived transform тАФ echo / augment / diminish / invert / retrograde / cadence / leave-space тАФ biased by conversational dynamics (dense human тЖТ sparse machine, and vice-versa), plus a 3-phrase motif memory that ~38% quotes you back. Drawn as a scrolling two-lane manuscript transcript (you=ink-teal top stave, partner=ochre bottom), clinical high-key palette, slow ~0.7 Hz who's-speaking glow (no strobe). **Named ref:** George Lewis *Voyager* (1988тАУ); Terry Riley. **Ambition 2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [tap/QWERTY + mic onset/pitch + generative response engine + transcript renderer] + #3 named ref). **Why banked not shipped:** the richest engine of the three and the strongest "musical intelligence not object-to-pluck" (jury #2 lane, cf. praised 1218-shadow) тАФ but it needs the reviewer to *play several turns* to land, so it's a lower one-phone-glance hit-rate than the winning map for a 06:30 review; ship it on a live-performance / "play with me" slot. **Honest gap:** mic pitch tracking is coarse (onsets reliable; claps fall back to a default degree; humming > percussion); machine replies quantised to an 8th grid. Fully built in `src/app/dream/1245-antiphon/` before prune (page.tsx + audio.ts + respond.ts + transcript-canvas.ts + mic.ts + README).

### `1243-calligram` тАФ `queued` тАФ the PAGE form (writing as an instrument)
**Type a poem; each letter both sounds a diatonic note and settles as ink into a living concrete-poem that is also a legible waveform score.** aтАжz climb a C-major scale (a=C3тАжzтЙИD#6); vowels ring long/soft, consonants short/percussive with a key-clack, SPACE=breath-rest, ENTER=tonic cadence+line-break, punctuation=bright accent. Glyphs place on a sine-wave baseline rotated to the tangent (flowing calligram), word-spacing follows typing tempo (fast burst clusters tight), fresh ink glows vermilionтЖТcools to oxblood. Letterpress palette (cream `#f4ecd8` / oxblood `#2a1a12` / vermilion `#b3402a`). 3 ghost-typed seed phrases. **Named refs:** Apollinaire *Calligrammes* (1918); Alva Noto/Carsten Nicolai *Unitxt*; Toshio Iwai. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 subsystems + #3 named ref). **Why banked:** charming & grep-0├Ч on "concrete-poetry", but generative-typography/paint has the most lab priors (100/153/223/160) and it doesn't form pictorial silhouettes (baseline reads as "flowing verse" not an Apollinaire shape) тАФ least surprising of the three. **Resurrect** with a target-outline fill (real calligram silhouettes) + page scroll/auto-scale. Fully built in `src/app/dream/1243-calligram/` before prune.

## ┬з684 тАФ banked DEEP non-winners (cycle 684, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder eslint exit 0 + tsc folder-clean ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Max committed folder after this fire = 1242 (winner `1242-stretto`). Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1244.*

**DEEP fire: "one concept тАФ a machine answers your single line with genuinely INDEPENDENT melodic voices (real counterpoint, not chords), assembling as a living score тАФ via three contrapuntal engines." A deliberate deepening of the jury-praised past winner `1218-shadow` (which did homophonic chord-harmonization). Shipped `1242-stretto` (a real self-correcting canon, riso duotone тАФ won on morning-glance kinesis + the Consonance-fix "aha" toggle + a runtime-verified true canon). These two are strong тнР resurrects; all three are pure client-side (Web Audio + Canvas/SVG), zero deps, no api route, no mic тАФ they demo from a Generate button.**

### `1241-parnassus` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the most beautiful of the fire тАФ a warm illuminated species-counterpoint score)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *strict species counterpoint over a cantus firmus, inking on parchment.*
- **Concept:** a cantus firmus (generated by a scored random walk, or drawn by tapping pitch lanes) is answered by 1тАУ3 **independent** counter-voices found by a **Viterbi/DP search** per voice whose soft cost encodes the classical rules тАФ consonant on strong beats (perfect consonances sparing), **no parallel 5ths/8ves**, contrary/oblique + stepwise preferred, perfect-interval open + stepwise contrary-motion cadence to a perfect close; least-bad candidate when none is perfect (never dead-ends). 1st species note-against-note; 2nd adds passing/neighbour tones; florid mixes decoration + rhythm. Strictly diatonic (no accidentals) so the score reads at a glance. Warm **vocal consort** (per-voice detuned-triangle/sine chorus, ADSR, vibrato, per-voice lowpass, feedback-delay reverb, master 0.24 тЖТ limiter, distinct register/pan/timbre per voice so independence is audible). **FORM:** a self-inking **parchment manuscript PAGE** (Canvas2D staff rules, bar lines, filled/open colored noteheads + stems + per-voice contour, sweeping crimson playhead, live named-interval teaching readout). **PALETTE:** warm parchment + ink. **INPUT:** Generate-a-cantus / draw + species / voices / mode / tempo. Ref: **Fux, *Gradus ad Parnassum* (1725)**. Fully built + folder-clean last fire (runtime test: 0 dissonant strong-beat pairs, 0 parallel 5ths/8ves, distinct note-counts per voice across every mode├Чspecies├Чvoices).
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** its self-inking-parchment-manuscript **form + palette overlaps `1236-neume`** (an illuminated antiphonary self-inking on vellum) shipped only 4 fires ago тАФ a subtle re-camp of exactly the axes the jury polices; and "florid" is a decorated 2nd-species framework, not true 4th-species suspensions (builder disclosed). But it is the **most beautiful and most pedagogically legible** of the three. **Resurrect when a warm-manuscript register is wanted and 1236 has receded** тАФ or pair with 1242 as the two ends of a counterpoint spectrum (strict species vs canon). Deepen with real 4th-species suspensions + a florid 5th species + confidence-shaded ink.

### `1243-strands` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the sharpest *deepening* тАФ literally inverts 1218's objective)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *free counterpoint that maximizes voice independence, woven as four ribbons.*
- **Concept:** the lead line (generate / drag-to-sketch a contour / on-screen keyboard) is answered by up to three accompanying voices chosen each step by a **beam search (width 10)** over diatonic voice-leading space scoring (1) vertical consonance (thirds/sixths reward, 2nds/7ths/tritone penalise), (2) **independence of motion** (contrary rewarded hard, parallel perfects penalised hard), (3) melodic smoothness. An **independence-weight slider** scales term 2 тАФ turned down the voices collapse to ~91% similar motion (homophonic, like 1218); turned up they reach ~61% contrary (a musically-correct ceiling for 4 simultaneous voices) тАФ so the slider IS the inversion of 1218's *minimize-motion* objective made audible/visible. Four distinct timbres (sine lead / triangle alto / detuned-saw tenor / soft-square bass, ADSR + vibrato + lowpass + reverb, master 0.24 тЖТ limiter, Chris-Wilson scheduler). **FORM:** a score-like **woven field** (Canvas2D four braided ribbons тАФ slate/rust/teal/gold on off-white тАФ over a light pitch grid, sweeping playhead, live contrary-motion "independence meter"). **PALETTE:** clinical off-white / calm four-color. **INPUT:** generate / draw-contour / keyboard + independence-weight + voice-count. Ref: **Tymoczko, *A Geometry of Music* (2011)**; Fux. Fully built + folder-clean last fire.
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** the braided-ribbon **field reads less immediately as a *score*/notation** than 1242's crystallizing roll (it's a cousin of the lab's many field visualizers), and it could not be auditioned headless. But it is the **cleanest conceptual deepening** тАФ it doesn't just add independent voices, it *inverts the exact objective* of the winner it descends from, exposed as a live knob. **Resurrect for the clinical/high-key palette slot** or when a pure independence-vs-consonance study is wanted. Deepen by rendering the ribbons *as* a real notation staff and adding a per-voice register-lock so the braid never crosses.

## ┬з683 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 683, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder eslint exit 0 + tsc folder-clean ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Max committed folder after this fire = 1238 (winner `1238-heliograph`). Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1241 (1239/1240 were these two's build folders).*

- **`antiphon`** (was `1239-antiphon`) тАФ тнР RESURRECT. *A written musical CONVERSATION.* You type a short line; it's sung back deterministically (lettersтЖТDorian scale degrees over ~1.7 oct; vowels sustain/accent, consonants quick; word-lengthтЖТduration; sentence-lengthтЖТa sine phrase-arc; `space`тЖТbreath, `,`тЖТlonger breath, `.`тЖТfalling cadence to tonic, `?`тЖТrising open question, `!`тЖТemphatic tonic) in a warm cantor voice тАФ then the instrument **ANSWERS** with a genuine reply, not an echo: (1) contour **inversion** about your first pitch, (2) a **response register** a fifth-plus below in a darker timbre, (3) a leading listening-**rest** + rhythmic augmentation, (4) **motific quotation** of your first few notes for lines тЙе4, (5) resolves a question **downward**. Visual = the accumulating two-column illuminated transcript itself: your lines left (indigo), replies right (terracotta), each a Canvas2D neume contour with noteheads + a sweeping playhead; **riso duotone on parchment**, seeds a machine greeting so it's never blank. Web Audio (two-voice synth + a synthesized decaying-noise convolution reverb) + Canvas2D, zero deps, no api route. **Why it's strong:** cashes TWO starved lanes at once тАФ the **conversation** FORM (jury's list) + **text** INPUT (near-0├Ч); the answer-not-echo algorithm is a genuine fresh idea. Ambition 2/5 (#2 subsystems + #3 antiphonal-chant/neumes/fugal-answer refs). **Resurrect as-is** (it was demoable); a deepening would add a real turn-taking *memory* (the machine develops a motif across turns) or a modal shift as the conversation "warms."
- **`cavern`** (was `1240-cavern`) тАФ тнР RESURRECT. *Draw the shape of a room, then HEAR it.* Freehand pointer strokes define a chamber boundary; the drawn geometry drives a live resonant model: enclosed **area**тЖТSabine RT60 (`0.161┬╖V/(S┬╖a)`, 2.5-D volume) + low modal fundamental; wall **roughness** (isoperimetric excess `P/(2тИЪ(╧АA))тИТ1`)тЖТHF damping/diffusion; bounding-box **dims**тЖТaxial room eigen-modes `f=(c/2)тИЪ((nx/Lx)┬▓+(ny/Ly)┬▓)` octave-shifted into an audible boomy band. Synthesis (native nodes, no worklet/samples): a bank of 4 tuned **Schroeder feedback-comb** filters (feedback gain solved from RT60, damping lowpass from roughness) + 6 high-Q **bandpass modal** resonators (Q tracks decay), excited by a **wandering source** that reflects off the drawn polygon and fires stereo-panned filtered-noise impulses on each bounce; a faint air-bed swells for big caves. Canvas2D: charcoal-on-warm-ochre "cave wall," ember source with expanding wavefront ripples, faint standing-wave bands, live readout (size m┬▓ / RT60 s / dominant mode Hz / roughness %). Presets (Cavern/Corridor/Dome) so it demos instantly + never blank/silent. Refs: Sabine 1922; Schroeder 1962 / Stautner-Puckette 1982 / Jot-Chaigne 1991 FDN; Xenakis UPIC + Golan Levin *Yellowtail* draw-lineage. **Why it's strong:** cashes TWO starved lanes тАФ **draw** INPUT (1├Ч/15) + a **room** FORM; the drawтЖТacoustics cross-modal mapping is the boldest single idea of the two banks. Ambition 2/5 (#2 five-plus subsystems + #3 named refs). Documented liberty: the octave-shift of true (subsonic) modal freqs into an audible band тАФ a deliberate musicality choice. **Resurrect as-is**; a deepening would add a true 2D FDTD wave sim on the drawn domain (real modes, no octave fudge) as a WebGPU compute stretch.

## ┬з682 тАФ banked DEEP non-winners (cycle 682, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder eslint/tsc clean ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Max committed folder after this fire = 1236 (winner `1236-neume`). Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1238.*

**DEEP fire: "one concept тАФ Karel's real recording writes its own score as it plays тАФ via three notation FORMS." All three cash JURY 2026-07-06 (break the form: a self-inking page; ship the real piano; fresh non-jewel palette). Shipped `1236-neume` (illuminated plainchant antiphonary, parchment/gilt тАФ won on surprise + robustness-on-the-real-recording + the "Liturgy" lineage with `1234-almanac`). These two are strong тнР resurrects тАФ both use the same offline pipeline (radix-2 FFT тЖТ spectral-flux onset тЖТ YIN pitch тЖТ reveal-in-sync-to-playhead) on the real recording `549fc519-тАж` via read-only `/api/audio/[id]` + mandatory offline fallback.**

### `1235-plainsong` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (highest transcription fidelity of the fire тАФ verified 14/14 exact pitch matches on the fallback phrase)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *the recording engraved as a precise Western grand-staff manuscript, clinical-white palette.*
- **Concept:** identical pipeline to 1236 but rendered as **exact Western notation** on a **grand staff (SVG)** тАФ treble/bass clef split (тЙеC4 treble), ledger lines, stem direction, explicit sharps (no key signature), note-values (sixteenthтАжwhole from inter-onset ratios), systems wrapping downward, a slim **carmine** playhead sweeping in sync. **FORM:** SVG notation PAGE on paper-cream. **PALETTE:** clinical white + charcoal ink + one muted-carmine accent. **INPUT:** play + play/pause + seek scrubber. Fully built + folder-clean last fire.
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** grand-staff is the *expected* transcription output (lower surprise than the antiphonary), and exact placement reads "broken" when monophonic YIN slips on Karel's real polyphonic/pedal recording (1236's contour-only neumes degrade more gracefully). But it is the **most rigorous** of the three and the cleanest "engraver's page." **Resurrect when a precise-notation register is wanted**, or pair it with 1236 as the two ends of a notation spectrum (exact vs contour). Could deepen with beaming (not flags), a key signature, and a confidence-shaded ink weight so low-confidence notes render lighter (honest about detection error).

### `1237-scroll` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (boldest single motion idea тАФ wetтЖТset crystallization + risograph duotone)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *the recording as an unrolling piano-roll that crystallizes into notation, riso ink-blue + warm-red on cream.*
- **Concept:** same pipeline; the output is a **horizontally-scrolling roll** (pitch = vertical axis with a faint lane grid, time = horizontal). At each onset a **wet ink-blue blob** stamps at a fixed printing-head; over ~1s it **contracts and *sets*** into a crisp **warm-red** notehead+stem+duration-beam snapped to its pitch lane, the two ink layers offset a couple px + `multiply`-composited for the **riso overprint/misregistration** feel; older notes trail behind as fixed notation as the roll slides leftward. **FORM:** Canvas2D scrolling scroll/roll. **PALETTE:** risograph two-color (blue + warm red on cream). **INPUT:** play + play/pause + seek. Fully built + folder-clean last fire.
- **Why it lost, not why it's weak:** closest of the three to a scrolling timeline/field (slightly less of a clean form-break than a page that fills), and the piano-roll idiom is more familiar than an illuminated chant. But the **strokeтЖТglyph crystallization is a genuinely fresh visual idea** and the riso duotone is a bold palette escape. **Resurrect for the next print-register / kinetic-notation slot.** Could deepen the crystallization (ink bleeding into paper fibre, the red plate "registering" a beat late for true misregistration) and add a paper-grain texture pass.

## ┬з681 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 681, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder eslint/tsc 0/0 ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Max committed folder after this fire = 1234 (winner `1234-almanac`). Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1235.*

**WIDE fire: "three ways Karel's real recording becomes a non-object FORM." All three cash JURY 2026-07-06 (break the form, fresh non-jewel palette, ship the real piano). Shipped `1234-almanac` (the long-form >5-min canonical-hours piece тАФ jury #2 + the named `1162` resurrection). These two are strong тнР resurrects тАФ both use the real recording `549fc519-тАж` via the read-only `/api/audio/[id]` loader + mandatory offline fallback.**

### `1233-plainsong` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (highest research-chain of the fire, 3/5 тАФ cashes ┬з681 dive #1, streaming piano transcription)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *a blank page listens to Karel's piano and notates it as it plays тАФ self-inking manuscript, clinical-white palette.*
- **Concept:** the real recording plays; the buffer is pre-scanned for **onsets** (half-wave-rectified spectral flux + moving-threshold peak-picking) and **pitch** (**YIN** тАФ CMND + parabolic interpolation, 40тАУ2100 Hz gated, snapped to equal temperament). Detected notes are placed on a **grand staff** leftтЖТright тАФ X = onset time, Y = diatonic pitch (with sharps + ledger lines), ink weight = loudness тАФ as a muted-red playhead sweeps and systems wrap downward, so by the end you have a full scrollable "transcription." **FORM:** SVG notation **PAGE** (brace, treble+bass clefs, five-line staves) on near-white paper тАФ deliberately not an object/field. **PALETTE:** clinical white + charcoal ink + one muted-red accent. **INPUT:** play + scrub/scroll the page timeline.
- **Files existed at:** `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` (loader+fallback) + `analyze.ts` (FFT, spectral-flux onset, YIN) + `notation.ts` (grand-staff geometry) + `README.md` (rebuild from this spec). **Named ref:** YIN тАФ de Cheveign├й & Kawahara, 2002.
- **Ambition:** #2 (тЙе3 subsystems: real-audio + onset + YIN pitch + notation renderer) + #3 (YIN) + #5 (┬з681 research dive #1) = **3/5**. **Limits (next-cycle):** monophonic (one pitch per onset) + always-sharp spelling тАФ add polyphony (multi-pitch salience) + key-aware spelling. Lost the ship only because `1234` cashes the louder jury provocation (long-form). **Resurrect next time a clinical/notation register or a real-piano piece is wanted.**

### `1232-atlas` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the boldest palette + form escape тАФ riso cartography)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *Karel's recording as a PLACE you walk through тАФ a contour map you traverse, scrubbing the real audio wherever you stand.*
- **Concept:** a short-time FFT of the recording becomes a **spectral heightfield** тАФ X(westтЖТeast)=time, Y(southтЖТnorth)=log pitch band (55 HzтАУ7 kHz), elevation=loudness(dB). Two box-blur passes + **marching squares** extract iso-loudness **contour lines**; the coastline is one level, peaks are named, the deepest basin is water. You **traverse** (drag-pan + WASD marker); a **granular-scrub** read-head reads the real audio at the marker's east/west position (time-stretch without pitch change), and a biquad **bandpass** whose centre rises with the marker's elevation makes "high ground" audibly brighter. Live FFT ripples nearby contours. **FORM:** 2D cartographic **MAP** (Canvas2D) тАФ coastlines, compass rose, place-labels, you-are-here, a "longitude of now" meridian. **PALETTE:** **RISOGRAPH** ink-blue `#2340a0` + warm-red `#f24a3a` on cream `#f4efe3`. **INPUT:** map traversal.
- **Files existed at:** `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` (loader+fallback+GranularScrubEngine) + `terrain.ts` (FFT, heightfield, marching-squares) + `mapdraw.ts` (cartographic renderer) + `README.md`. **Named ref:** Xenakis **UPIC** (drawn territory тЖТ sound; Atlas inverts it тАФ territory *out of* sound) + spectrogram-as-landscape.
- **Ambition:** #2 (тЙе3 subsystems: FFT terrain + granular scrub + marching-squares cartographic renderer + navigation) + #3 (UPIC) = **2/5**. Lowest ambition of the three + the "map you scrub" is the closest to a spatial-field navigation, so it lost the ship тАФ but it is the most *beautiful palette + form escape* the fire produced. **Resurrect when a riso/print register or a spatial-navigation piece is wanted;** next-cycle deepenings in its README (valley-following pathfinding, novelty-curve provinces, printable 2-plate PNG export).
