## ┬з680 тАФ banked DEEP non-winners (cycle 680, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder eslint/tsc 0/0 ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Max committed folder after this fire = 1231 (winner `1231-cardium`). Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1232.*

**DEEP fire: one concept тАФ *a self-composing excitable medium, the ARC being the composition* тАФ via 3 excitable models. Shipped `1231-cardium` (FitzHughтАУNagumo cardiac reentry on a 3D sphere тЖТ rhythmic-pulse voice; won on freshest voice + most distinct 3D object + altered-states fit). тЪая╕П The excitable-media family is lab-prior (BZ `1207`, Alfv├йn `1209`, Izhikevich `1219`) тАФ resurrect these two ONLY with a genuinely differentiating axis, and prefer leaving the family entirely for a while.**

### `1229-kindling` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the `1219-ignition` Izhikevich long-form, now realized in 3D + the jury's literal "change the voice to FM" ask)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *a sheet of living neural tissue composes itself over minutes тАФ sparse sparks тЖТ traveling waves тЖТ spirals тЖТ global synchrony тЖТ refractory hush тАФ and you only tend it.*
- **Concept:** a 96├Ч96 grid of regular-spiking **Izhikevich (2003)** neurons (`dv/dt=0.04v┬▓+5v+140тИТu+I`, `du/dt=a(bvтИТu)`, spike at vтЙе30: vтЖРc,uтЖРu+d; a=0.02,b=0.2,c=тИТ65,d=8) with 4-neighbour gap-junction (Laplacian) coupling on a toroidal grid so spikes propagate as waves that curl into spirals. A slow ~105 s drive/coupling swell + per-cell slow-recovery + a **global fatigue** memory force genuine phase transitions and a refractory quiescence, so it never loops identically (builder verified over 150 s through all 5 named regimes). **OUTPUT:** three.js 3D **height-field membrane** (deforming sheet, orbiting camera, tealтЖТelectric-plumтЖТamber emissive on deep indigo). **VOICE:** event-driven Chowning **FM** blips тАФ each spatially-coherent firing cluster fires one short inharmonic carrier+modulator blip (brightтЖТdark index envelope), pitch/pan from cluster location, fusing into rhythmic pulses at synchrony; 12-voice steal + compressor limiter. **INPUT:** pointer poke injects a current bump; excitability slider calmтЖФstorm.
- **Files existed at:** `page.tsx` + `sim.ts` + `membrane.ts` + `voice.ts` + `README.md` (rebuild from this spec). **Named refs:** Izhikevich IEEE-TNN 2003 ┬╖ Chowning FM 1973.
- **Why banked not shipped:** it IS the already-banked `1219-ignition` concept тАФ shipping it moves the lab less than a fresh surface+voice (which is why the sphere/pulse `1231` won). But it is excellent + best-verified of the three, and cashes the FM-voice ask; **top resurrect once a fresh angle differentiates it** (e.g. per-region tuning, or drive it from Karel's real piano onsets).

### `1230-oregon` тАФ **RESURRECT-WITH-CAUTION (near-dupe of the banked `1207-oregonator`)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *a self-composing BelousovтАУZhabotinsky membrane тАФ real chemical spiral waves composing themselves over 5 minutes.*
- **Concept:** a **Barkley** two-variable excitable reaction-diffusion medium (~200 grid, `тИВu/тИВt=(1/╬╡)u(1тИТu)(uтИТ(v+b)/a)+Dс╡дтИЗ┬▓u`, `тИВv/тИВt=uтИТv`, no-flux) producing target waves + rotating spirals + defect turbulence; internal ~5.5 min clock sweeps excitability through quiescenceтЖТtargetsтЖТsingle spiralтЖТmulti-armтЖТbreakupтЖТrecovery, with substrate fatigue + randomized seeding so it never loops. **OUTPUT:** activator concentration displaced onto a domed 3D surface (three.js, orbiting camera) in BZ crimsonтЗДblue-violet fronts on warm amber. **VOICE:** persistent **additive-spectral** bank whose partials bloom/retract with measured wavefront length/curvature/spiral-arm count (more arms тЖТ richer inharmonic spectrum) + filtered-noise nucleation "breaths." **INPUT:** tap seeds a spiral rotor; excite slider calmтЖФturbulent.
- **Files existed at:** `page.tsx` + `bz-core.ts` + `spectral-voice.ts` + `README.md`. **Named refs:** BelousovтАУZhabotinsky ┬╖ Field/K├╢r├╢s/Noyes Oregonator 1972/74 ┬╖ Barkley ┬╖ Winfree.
- **Why banked:** near-duplicate of the banked `1207-oregonator` (BZ, ┬з673); the additive-spectral voice was also the closest of the three to the drone-pad family the jury is tired of. Resurrect ONLY with a genuinely differentiating angle (e.g. two coupled BZ layers, or a non-additive voice).

## ┬з679 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 679, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder eslint/tsc 0/0 ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Max committed folder after this fire = 1226 (winner `1226-loom`). Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1229.*

**WIDE fire: 3 orthogonal FRESH-VOICE instruments (the jury's literal #2 "change the voice" ask). Shipped `1226-loom` (scanned synthesis тАФ the on-screen shape IS the wavetable, the most literal cash of ┬з679 research dive #1 + the most honest end-to-end mechanism + fully deterministic). The two below were built complete + folder-clean and `rm -rf`'d. Both bring a genuinely fresh synthesis VOICE the recent window lacks.**

### `1227-operators` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the fresh-FM-voice lane тАФ the jury's literal #2 "change the voice to FM" ask)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *sculpt an FM operator graph as a 3D galaxy тАФ drag a modulator into orbit around a carrier and hear the timbre bloom.*
- **Concept:** real **Chowning/DX-style FM** (John Chowning JAES 1973 ┬╖ Yamaha DX7 algorithms). 6 sine operators per voice at fundamental ├Ч fixed ratio `{1,1,2,3,3.5,7}`; a modulator's output тЖТ `GainNode` (gain = **modulation index ├Ч modulated base freq**) тЖТ the target oscillator's `.frequency` AudioParam (so the gain literally IS the FM peak deviation). Dragging a violet modulator sphere toward an amber carrier in the 3D scene raises the index (derived from 3D distance) тЖТ sidebands audibly + visibly bloom (beam thickness tracks index); 4 DX-flavoured presets (2-OP ┬╖ 4-op STACK ┬╖ PARALLEL ┬╖ FEEDBACK); a rose feedback op self-modulates through a short `DelayNode` loop. `a s d f g h j k` (A-minor pentatonic) or pads; idle auto-arpeggiator; bottom waveform ribbon from an AnalyserNode.
- **Engine (all delivered, folder eslint 0 + tsc 0):** `fm-engine.ts` (6-op FM voice, modulator-gain FM wiring, Delay-loop feedback, per-carrier ADSR, masterтЖТcompressorтЖТdestination + AnalyserNode tap, 6-voice cap + oldest-steal), `renderer.ts` (three.js role-tinted glowing spheres [carriers amber / modulators violet / feedback rose / idle indigo] + index-driven beam meshes + camera-orbit + raycast drag + note-pulses + star dust), `page.tsx`, `README.md`. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 four subsystems [FM graph engine + 3D graph editor + AnalyserNode spectrum + keyboard] + #3 named refs [Chowning 1973 ┬╖ Yamaha DX7 algorithms]). **state: playable-synth ┬╖ pole: bright/electric.** **Why banked (not a quality loss):** cleanest "change the voice" cash, but lost to 1226 on ambition (no #5/research tie) + interaction *depth* тАФ **ratios are fixed** (sculpting changes index only, not the ratios) and **modulation index is global across voices** (a property of the shared geometry, not per-voice). **Deepen on resurrect:** per-voice + per-edge index; user-editable ratios (drag radially = ratio, tangentially = index); a real single-sample recursive feedback op via a worklet (the Delay-loop is an approximation, disclosed); a log-frequency FFT display instead of the time-domain scope.

### `1228-reed` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the physical-wind-model / live-breath lane)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *blow into your screen and a reed pipe self-oscillates тАФ breathe harder and it overblows into the next register.*
- **Concept:** a real **nonlinear wind-instrument physical model** (McIntyre, Schumacher & Woodhouse, JASA 1983 ┬╖ J.O. Smith digital waveguide). A delay-line **bore** (length тЖТ pitch) with a one-pole-lowpass + phase-invert **open-end reflection**; at the mouthpiece the returning pressure meets **breath pressure**, their difference passes a saturating **reed table** (`r = clamp(offset+slope┬╖╬Фp, ┬▒1)`, STK/MSW form) and re-enters the bore тАФ a negative-resistance element that **self-oscillates** into a stable limit cycle once breath crosses threshold (fully emergent, not triggered). **Breath = the input:** mic RMS primary; hold-to-blow button + slider + auto-Demo fallback (always works headless / no mic). `a s d f g h j k` retunes the bore across a D-minor scale.
- **Engine (all delivered, folder eslint 0 + tsc 0):** `waveguide-worklet-src.ts` (Blob-URL `AudioWorkletProcessor`: delay-line bore + reflection filter + reed table + DC blocker + breath-thresholded odd-integer register vent + ~30fps viz frames), `audio.ts` (worklet loader + master rampтЖТDynamicsCompressor limiter + subtractive square-osc fallback), `renderer.ts` (three.js brass/oxblood translucent bore + flared bell + teal pressure standing-wave `cos(modeF┬╖╧Аx/2)`+ripple, fluttering reed), `page.tsx` (mic request + `text-rose-300` denial fallback, breath meter, holes), `README.md`. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 four subsystems [waveguide DSP worklet + reed nonlinearity + mic/breath input + 3D bore renderer] + #3 named refs [McIntyreтАУSchumacherтАУWoodhouse 1983 ┬╖ J.O. Smith digital waveguide]). **state: playable-physical-wind ┬╖ pole: warm/breathy.** **Why banked:** the boldest fresh voice, but **тЪая╕П two honest edges cost it the win:** (1) the **overblow is *assisted*, not emergent** тАФ a pure single-delay clarinet keeps its fundamental, so the register jump is a breath-thresholded vent that divides the delay length by odd integers (steered, not arising unaided; the *self-oscillation* IS emergent); (2) the visible pressure wave is **reconstructed** from reported register/RMS, not the raw delay-line contents; plus the mic path is **unverifiable headless**. **Deepen on resurrect:** a genuine tonehole lattice so overblow emerges from the bore geometry (register key = a real vent hole, not a length divider); render the *actual* delay-line contents as the pressure wave; a reed-mass/Bernoulli-flow junction (reed inertia + beating-reed collision) instead of the clamped-linear table; test the mic-breath path on Karel's hardware.

Smith digital waveguide / KarplusтАУStrong]). **state: embodied ┬╖ pole: kinetic.** **тЪая╕П Why banked (2 reasons):** (1) it re-derives the ┬з670 banked **`1198-limbline`** almost exactly тАФ resurrect by MERGING, not re-opening; (2) KarplusтАУStrong was just shipped 1220-torsion the prior night (voice-freshness loss). **Builder-disclosed edge:** switched to a `new Function("import(...)")` indirect CDN load claiming the literal `webpackIgnore` import tripped `TS2307` тАФ but 1224/1225 used the literal recipe cleanly, so on resurrect use the proven literal `webpackIgnore` import (as 1185/1225 do), not `new Function` (which risks the ESLint `no-new-func` rule + CSP). ### `1224-augur` тАФ `queued` (тЪая╕П near-duplicate of shipped `803-body-chimes` + banked `1199-resonant-room`) тАФ *your posture tunes a set of bells тАФ each joint an inharmonic resonator that detunes as you bend it.*
- **Concept:** full-body MediaPipe Pose тЖТ 8 JOINTS (elbows/shoulders/hips/knees) become **inharmonic modal resonators** (decaying-sine partial banks + noise mallet); joint flexion angle тЖТ base pitch (A-minor-pentatonic) + inharmonicity `f_k = k┬╖f0┬╖тИЪ(1+B┬╖k┬▓)` (straight limb тЖТ clear tone, folded тЖТ stretched bell-clang); angular-acceleration crossing a gated/refractory threshold тЖТ a strike (harder snap тЖТ louder+brighter mallet); a held pose = a soft sustained shimmer of the loaded resonators. three.js indigoтЖТacid-lime glowing orbs (colour lerps by bend) shedding expanding additive 3D icosphere shells on strike; auto-cycling virtual-skeleton fallback + drag-joints + static SVG glyph on total WebGL/audio failure.
- **Engine (all delivered, folder eslint 0 + tsc 0, virtual-skeleton simulation-verified ~26 strikes/40s):** `pose.ts` (PoseLandmarker rig + 8-joint angle/velocity/accel + edge-detected strike gate + forward-kinematic virtual skeleton), `audio.ts` (`ModalEnsemble` 8 inharmonic resonators + noise mallet + sustained shimmer + 14-group polyphony/steal/onended; gainтЖТlowpassтЖТlimiter), `renderer.ts` (`AugurScene` orthographic 3D orbs+shells), `page.tsx`, `README.md`. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 five subsystems + #3 named refs [BlazePose 2020 ┬╖ J.-M. Adrien "The missing link: modal synthesis" / CCRMA modal]). **state: embodied ┬╖ pole: kinetic-meditative.** **тЪая╕П Why banked (2 reasons):** (1) concept collides with the SHIPPED **`803-body-chimes`** (bodyтЖТmodal bells) AND the ┬з670-dropped **`1199-resonant-room`** ("dropped as closest to shipped 803-body-chimes") тАФ the lab has effectively built this twice already; (2) modal-percussion is a recurring recent voice (1193/1213). **Resurrect ONLY with a genuinely different differentiator** (e.g. a true FDTD/waveguide-mesh *coupled* body membrane so joints resonate each other, not independent struck bells). **Builder-disclosed edge:** flexion measured in the image plane (approximate under foreshortening); auto-mode strikes cluster near full-extension (acos singularity) so most auto strikes are near-max strength (limiter + volume keep it safe); strike thresholds tuned by feel (in-UI sensitivity slider re-calibrates).

### `1219-ignition` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT-FIRST (the excitable-membrane / long-form lane)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *ignite a sheet of spiking neurons and it drums itself, evolving over minutes.* (Cashes the ┬з669 тнР banked `1195-ignition` idea, still never shipped, AND the starved LONG-FORM-generative lane. Ship the next long-form / excitable-media slot once the 2D full-screen-field output cluster cools тАФ the ONLY reason it lost to 1220 this fire was that its output surface is the over-represented one, not any quality gap: it was the HIGHER ambition build, 4/5.)
- **Concept:** a 120├Ч70 grid of **Izhikevich (2003) spiking neurons** integrated live; decaying synaptic-conductance coupling turns a tap into a **travelling spike wave** with an amber refractory tail; wavefronts strike **inharmonic modal-metal tones** (decaying-sine partial bank + noise mallet). Never reset тАФ ambient excitation + slow excitability drift make it genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1. Tap/drag to inject current, nucleate waves, collide fronts. ### `1221-foldsong` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the fresh-VOICE lane тАФ the jury's literal "change the voice" ask)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *play a plain sine and fold it, live, into a rich West-Coast voice you can watch bloom.* (The lab's FIRST wavefolder + FIRST lowpass-gate тАФ a genuinely new synthesis engine. Ping (percussive) vs Hold (sustained) modes.
- **Engine (all delivered, folder lint 0/0 + tsc 0):** `fold-engine.ts` = complex osc (primary sine + secondary FM modulator) тЖТ `WaveShaperNode` folder swapping among **72 pre-computed sine-fold curves** for live depth (4├Ч oversampling) тЖТ **Buchla-292 lowpass gate** (one fast-attack/slow-vactrol-decay envelope driving BOTH biquad cutoff AND VCA gain), 12-voice cap + steal + onended, ping/hold. `scope-renderer.ts` = warm-phosphor Canvas2D vector-scope (analytic Lissajous from the fold curve, amber ellipseтЖТmany-lobed rose as it folds, over the REAL folded waveform from an AnalyserNode in cyan, fade-not-clear persistence, RMS-driven bloom, no strobe). `page.tsx` = Start gesture, XY pad, keyboards, ping/hold, readout, fallbacks. Files: `page.tsx` / `fold-engine.ts` / `scope-renderer.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0├Ч wavefolder+lowpass-gate voice + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [complex osc + wavefolder + LPG + vector-scope] + #3 named refs [Don Buchla 259/292 ┬╖ Serge Tcherepnin ┬╖ West-Coast synthesis ┬╖ vactrol LPG]). **state: playable-synth ┬╖ pole: warm/analog.** **Honest edges (builder-disclosed):** WaveShaper folder can alias at richest folds + high notes (not band-limited); the Lissajous is synthesised from the fold curve (osc1 vs quadrature osc2), not a literal stereo XY capture (the waveform overlay IS real audio); pad always plucks the root in ping to avoid stuck voices. **Deepen on resurrect:** a genuine two-channel XY scope capture, band-limited (BLIT/anti-derivative) folding, and a slow LFO/random "gesture" mode so it plays itself for the 06:30 glance.

## ┬з676 тАФ banked DEEP non-winners (cycle 676, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder lint 0/0 ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Complete build briefs тЖТ resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1219. Max committed folder after this fire = 1218.*

**DEEP fire: one concept тАФ *a responsive jazz duet partner that answers you in time* (Karel's directive #4, "jazz responsive") тАФ attacked via 3 DIFFERENT musical intelligences. Shipped `1218-shadow` (real-time functional voice-leading harmonizer тАФ the deepest engine + fully deterministic + freshest visualization). The two below were built complete + folder-clean and `rm -rf`'d. All three share: active keyboard/mic input, a fresh non-JI FM voice, a distinct non-chiaroscuro/non-bright duotone, Canvas2D notation (NOT a shader-field), a Wilson two-clocks look-ahead scheduler, and the ┬з676 research chain (LiveBand arXiv 2606.03803 Jun 2026 ┬╖ LK Jam arXiv 2606.21018 ┬╖ ReaLJam 2502.21267 тАФ lookahead-commit made client-side).**

### `1216-consort` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT-FIRST (the mic / live-performance path)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *sing/hum/play and a band answers you in time.* (Directly cashes Karel's literal "jazz responsive" ask тАФ a mic'd duet partner тАФ the live-performance lane. Ship the next live-performance slot once a mic can be tested on his hardware. NOTE: supersedes the ┬з675 `1215-consort` twin тАФ same lane, cleaner build; treat 1216 as the canonical mic-consort seed.)
- **Concept:** sing / hum / play / tap into the mic; the app **listens** in real time and a warm generative **consort** (walking triangle+lowpass bass + 2-op FM-Rhodes comped chords) **answers you in time**, harmonising the pitches it hears and locking to your tempo. Nothing pre-sequenced. On Begin it establishes a default tempo (96) + tonic (C) so there's life before you make a sound.
- **Engine (all delivered, folder lint 0/0):** `analysis.ts` = **YIN** pitch detector (de Cheveign├й & Kawahara 2002 тАФ squared-difference тЖТ CMND тЖТ abs-threshold dip тЖТ parabolic interp, clarity+RMS gating + median filter, monophonic) ┬╖ **spectral-flux onset** (adaptive running-avg├Ч1.6 + ~80 ms refractory) тЖТ median IOI тЖТ BPM (clamp 60тАУ180) ┬╖ **KrumhanslтАУSchmuckler** key-finding (decaying pitch-class histogram vs 24 rotated KrumhanslтАУKessler profiles, adopts a new key only on strong correlation) ┬╖ a `MicListener` class wrapping getUserMedia + AnalyserNode. `consort-engine.ts` = a ~120 ms look-ahead beat clock (Wilson two-clocks); walking bass on downbeats; 2-op FM-Rhodes comped on off-beats, **voiced so the top note is your most-recently-heard pitch**; weighted diatonic-7th Markov harmony; onset **phase-nudge** + tempo slew so the consort audibly locks to you; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + master ramp-from-0 + bounded polyphony w/ voice-steal. `page.tsx` = warm **amber/dim-teal charcoal DUOTONE** lead-sheet ribbon (amber melody beads scrolling on a staff, teal consort chord-blocks+bass beneath, listening meter, live KEY/CHORD/BPM readout) + **full mic-free fallback** (on-screen 1-octave keyboard + number keys 1тАУ8 + Auto-perform demo тЖТ the identical downstream `feedNote` path). Files existed: `page.tsx` / `analysis.ts` / `consort-engine.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs [YIN 2002 ┬╖ KrumhanslтАУSchmuckler ┬╖ Raphael *Music Plus One* ┬╖ Wilson two-clocks ┬╖ Chowning] ┬╖ #5 ┬з676 research). **state: responsive-duet ┬╖ pole: warm/intimate.** **Why banked, not shipped (not a quality loss):** the most *Resonance-fit-for-Karel* (a pianist's mic'd duet partner is literally his ask) тАФ lost only because mic-detection can't be verified headless and its lead-sheet ribbon is quieter on a cold 06:30 glance; `1218`'s deeper voice-leading engine + full determinism won the tiebreak. **Honest edges (builder-disclosed):** monophonic pitch only (chords lock YIN to the strongest partial); noisy/reverberant rooms raise false onsets + smear tempo; key/tempo need a few notes to settle (seeds C); mic accuracy unverified headless (the keyboard/Auto-perform path exercises the identical logic and is the reliable demo route).

### `1217-tradefours` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT (the trade-fours / call-and-response path)** тАФ `queued` тАФ *trade fours with the machine тАФ it answers with YOUR lick, developed.* (Ship the next call-and-response / generative-melody slot. The most novel-to-lab *concept* of the three тАФ develop-your-motif call-and-response, distinct from pitch-tracking and from harmonization.)
- **Concept:** you play a short phrase over 4 bars (on-screen piano / QWERTY / Web-MIDI); on the turnaround the machine answers over bars 5тАУ8 with an **improvised melodic response that DEVELOPS your own motif** тАФ transposed to fit the changes, inverted, rhythmically displaced, fragmented + sequenced, with a cadential tail resolving onto a chord tone тАФ over a swinging FM-piano+bass comp. Fully deterministic (no mic), demos perfectly via a Demo button that injects a scripted human call.
- **Engine (all delivered, folder lint 0/0):** `motif.ts` = melodic memory (capture your notes as abstract `(scaleDegree, onset, duration, velocity)`) + a **transformation grammar** (`generateResponse`: diatonic transpose ┬╖ melodic inversion around a pivot ┬╖ rhythmic displacement/augmentation ┬╖ fragmentation+sequence ┬╖ cadential tail), everything in scale degrees + **snapped to the actual chord tones** of the answer bars so it always sits in the harmony; three progressions offered (**iiтАУVтАУI** turnaround ┬╖ **8-bar blues** ┬╖ **D-dorian modal vamp**); seed lick if you play nothing. `engine.ts` = `TradeEngine` тАФ Wilson two-clocks look-ahead scheduler (~120 ms), swing clock, walking bass (triangleтЖТlowpass w/ chromatic approach), comping 2-op FM piano on backbeats, per-turn capture + partner-answer generation, bounded polyphony + master ramp-from-0 + limiter, `getSnapshot()` for the visuals. `page.tsx` = **indigo (YOU) / coral (PARTNER)** two-lane trading timeline (note beads, bar/beat grid, a bold trade divider at the turnaround, moving playhead) + a big **YOUR TURN / PARTNER'S TURN** readout + chord/bar/tempo, tempo+swing sliders, progression selector, on-screen + QWERTY keyboard lit live, optional Web MIDI, Demo button. Files existed: `page.tsx` / `motif.ts` / `engine.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs [David Cope EMI/recombinant ┬╖ jazz "trading fours" ┬╖ Schoenberg developing variation ┬╖ Wilson two-clocks ┬╖ Chowning] ┬╖ #5 ┬з676 research). **state: responsive-duet ┬╖ pole: playful/call-and-response.** **Why banked:** the most legible/delightful *interaction* ("it played my idea back, developed!") and fully deterministic тАФ lost to `1218` only because its answer is a rule grammar (musical + on-changes but no human micro-timing / no surprise a learned model brings) while 1218's voice-leading search is a bigger algorithmic nut with a fresher visualization. **Resurrect the deepening:** fuse it with 1218 тАФ a partner that *both* harmonizes you in the moment (voice-led) *and* trades a developed melodic answer at the turnaround. **Honest edges (builder-disclosed):** motif capture ends ~120 ms before the turnaround (a phrase played exactly on the barline can be missed); chord-tone snapping is down-beat-only (fast off-beat runs can pass non-chord tones); moving the tempo slider rebases the clock and can drop/double one scheduled beat.

## ┬з675 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 675, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder lint 0/0 ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Complete build briefs тЖТ resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1216. Max committed folder after this fire = 1213.*

**WIDE fire: 3 orthogonal *massively-bigger* concepts on 3 fresh output surfaces / voices / palettes / inputs (none sharing a tag). Shipped `1213-splatsong` (true 3D-Gaussian-splat impact instrument тАФ the only #1-clearing brief [new rendering medium, grep-0├Ч] + directly implements this cycle's WebSplatter/SonicGauss research). The two below were built complete + folder-clean and `rm -rf`'d. Each fills a lane the diversity audit flagged as starved.**

### `1215-consort` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT-FIRST** тАФ `queued` тАФ *a duet partner that follows you.* (Directly cashes Karel's own directive #4 тАФ a "jazz responsive" journey-engine alternative тАФ a live-performance lane 0├Ч in the recent window. Ship the next live-performance / score-following slot.)
- **Concept:** sing / hum / play / tap into the mic; the app **listens** in real time and a warm generative **consort** (a walking-ish bass + comped Rhodes-ish chords) **answers you in time**, harmonising the pitches it hears and locking to your tempo. Nothing pre-sequenced тАФ the accompaniment is generated beat-by-beat from what you do right now. On Begin it establishes a tempo + tonic so there's life before you make a sound.
- **Engine (all delivered, lint 0/0):** `analysis.ts` = full **YIN** pitch detector (de Cheveign├й & Kawahara 2002 тАФ squared-difference `d(╧Д)` тЖТ cumulative-mean-normalised `d'(╧Д)` тЖТ absolute-threshold dip тЖТ parabolic interpolation, clarity+RMS gating + median filter) ┬╖ **spectral-flux onset** detection (adaptive running-avg├Ч1.6 threshold + refractory) тЖТ median inter-onset-interval тЖТ BPM ┬╖ **KrumhanslтАУSchmuckler** key-finding (rolling pitch-class histogram vs 24 rotated KrumhanslтАУKessler profiles) ┬╖ diatonic-triad selection that voices the chord to *contain* the heard note. `consort-engine.ts` = a **~120 ms look-ahead beat clock** (Chris Wilson "A Tale of Two Clocks") scheduling on `audioCtx.currentTime`; walking triangle+lowpass bass on even steps; **2-op FM electric-piano (Rhodes "bark")** comped chords on off-beats; onset **phase-nudge** so the consort audibly locks onto you; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + master ramp-from-0. `page.tsx` = warm **amber/dim-teal charcoal DUOTONE** lead-sheet ribbon (amber melody beads scrolling on a staff, teal consort chord-blocks+bass beneath, listening meter, live key/chord/BPM readout) + **full mic-free fallback** (on-screen 1-octave keyboard + number keys 1тАУ8 + auto-perform demo тЖТ the identical downstream path). Files existed: `page.tsx` / `analysis.ts` / `consort-engine.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [onset+YIN+key detector ┬╖ look-ahead accompaniment scheduler ┬╖ FM-Rhodes+bass synth ┬╖ Canvas2D notation renderer] ┬╖ #3 named refs [YIN 2002 ┬╖ KrumhanslтАУSchmuckler ┬╖ Raphael *Music Plus One* ┬╖ Wilson two-clocks]). **state: responsive/call-and-response ┬╖ pole: warm/intimate.** **Why banked, not shipped (not a quality loss):** the most *Resonance-fit-for-Karel* build (a pianist/composer's duet partner is literally his world) + a genuinely useful live-performance piece тАФ lost only because its notation-ribbon is the least spectacular on a cold 06:30 glance and mic-detection can't be verified headless; `1213`'s new rendering medium + direct research-chain won the ambition tiebreak. **Honest edges (builder-disclosed):** monophonic pitch only (chords confuse YIN); noisy/reverberant rooms raise false onsets + smear tempo; key/tempo need a few notes to settle; mic-detection accuracy unverified headless (the keyboard/auto-perform path exercises the identical logic and is the reliable demo route).

### `1214-reef` тАФ `queued` тАФ *grow an instrument over ten minutes, and its growing body changes how it sounds.* (Fills the starved LONG-FORM / stateful lane тАФ a piece genuinely different at minute 8 than minute 1, with real memory. Ship the next long-form/stateful slot.)
- **Concept:** a coral/vine **grows** via space-colonization (Runions et al., leaf-venation, SIGGRAPH 2005) toward nutrient attractor-clouds you seed with the pointer; the accreting branch graph **is** the instrument. You **seed** to steer growth and **prune** a node to delete its whole subtree (audibly thins/retunes the piece). A slow **tide clock (~8.5 s)** sends an excitation **out from the root** travelling by path-length so segments fire parent-before-child тАФ you *hear the shape spread* тАФ and because the reef keeps growing, each tide strikes **more and lower** segments (sparse-high plucks early тЖТ thick-low chordal wash late). The graph is **never reset** тАФ it is the persistent long-form state/memory. Faint high "accretion ticks" make growth audible between tides.
- **Engine (all delivered, lint 0/0):** `reef-model.ts` = pure space-colonization (`growStep`, attractor influence/kill-distance, `makeReef` seed sprout, `scatterNutrient`, `pruneAt` subtree-delete+reindex, Murray-ish thickening via subtree tip-count, `pitchForPath` minor-pentatonic snap; ambient-nutrient trickle + ~760-node cap so a dense reef matures over minutes). `reef-engine.ts` = 26 **Karplus-Strong / digital-waveguide** voices (feedback delay-line + loop damping; freq тЖР accumulated branch length, ring тЖР thickness), voice-stealing, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master ramp-from-0. `page.tsx` = crisp DPR-aware **two-color prussian-blue + vermilion riso** Canvas2D vector rendering (branch skeleton + nodes + travelling vermilion wavefront + soft nutrient clouds). Files existed: `page.tsx` / `reef-model.ts` / `reef-engine.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [space-colonization growth ┬╖ Karplus-Strong resonator network ┬╖ Canvas2D vector renderer ┬╖ pointer seed/prune] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Runions et al. 2005 ┬╖ Witten & Sander DLA 1981 ┬╖ J.O. Smith digital waveguide networks]; plus a long-form #4-ish commitment). **state: generative/long-form ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient (printerly).** **Why banked:** fills a genuinely starved lane and the two-color riso cashes the never-shipped palette provocation, BUT the "structure IS the instrument" claim is softer than advertised тАФ the KS voices are struck *independently* in tide-order rather than acoustically cross-coupled (a tractable model, builder-disclosed), so it's "the shape decides which strings ring, and when" more than true cross-branch resonance. **Resurrect with the deepening that makes it non-derivable:** a real scattering-junction waveguide network (Kelly-Lochbaum junctions at branch nodes) so pruning/growth changes genuine cross-coupled resonance, not just the strike-set. **Honest edges:** pitch тЖР accumulated path length (a proxy, not a measured modal freq); 10-minute growth pacing tuned by reasoning not a stopwatch; retuning a stolen still-ringing voice can click on very dense tides.

## ┬з674 тАФ banked DEEP non-winners (cycle 674, 2026-07-06) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + folder lint 0/0 + project tsc 0 ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Complete build briefs тЖТ resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1213. Max committed folder after this fire = 1210.*

**DEEP fire: one concept тАФ a playable strict-MONOCHROME Ryoji-Ikeda data-instrument voiced in the clinical sine/noise/click register тАФ attacked via 3 technical routes to "how does visible monochrome data become sound." This cashes the jury's never-shipped provocation #1 example (a two-color Ikeda/riso constraint, banked at ┬з669/┬з671, never shipped) AND breaks the NEW emerging monoculture (chromatic-chiaroscuro 5├Ч in the last 10). Shipped `1210-datamatics` (draw-a-spectrogram тЖТ 64-partial additive sine bank тАФ the strongest researchтЖТbuild chain [Phosphor Feb 2026 / Tembrica Mar 2026 / ANS / UPIC] + the most original cross-modal drawтЖТsound instrument). The two below were built complete + folder-clean and `rm -rf`'d. Shared idiom for all: strict monochrome (white on true black + one thin accent), pure sine + filtered-noise + click voice (NOT JI-choir/modal/granular/FM), active input, crisp Canvas2D raster, hard photosensitive-safety gate (no bar-flash strobe тАФ only the thin playhead moves), Ikeda named refs.**

### `1211-test-pattern` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT-FIRST** тАФ `queued` тАФ *scrub a Ryoji-Ikeda test pattern and play the barcode.*
- **Concept:** the lab's most literally-Ikeda piece ("test pattern [n┬║1211]"). A wall of **4 horizontal barcode lanes** of black/white bars (seeded `mulberry32` bitstream тЖТ merged bars тЖТ sounding onsets), each lane a different register; a **playhead** sweeps across all lanes (auto) OR you **drag anywhere to scrub by hand**; each bar's leading edge under the playhead fires a precisely-timed voice. Presets sparse/dense/pure-grid + regenerate + scan-speed.
- **Why banked, not shipped (not a quality loss тАФ clean 0/0 build):** `1210` won on directly implementing this cycle's research (imageтЖТadditive) + being the more original *instrument*; `1211` (barcode-scrub) reads closer to a step-sequencer with a barcode skin тАФ but it is the **directest cash of the jury's two-color Ikeda provocation** and the most rhythmic. **Resurrect the next rhythmic/percussive-Ikeda or two-color-constraint slot.**
- **Engine (all delivered):** `audio-engine.ts` = master gain (ramped from 0) тЖТ lowpass тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; an **analytic look-ahead scheduler** on `ctx.currentTime` (crossings computed analytically, queued ~90 ms ahead тЖТ sample-accurate, not jittery `setTimeout`) for auto-scan + an audio-clock scrub path for dragging; **4 pure voices** (sine pip ┬╖ gated sustained sine ┬╖ filtered-noise tick ┬╖ sub-bass pulse); 22-voice cap + `onended` cleanup. `patterns.ts` = 4 lanes with **near-coprime bar counts 61/43/26/17** so onsets drift into polyrhythm; pentatonic pitch-snap. `renderer.ts` = Canvas2D white-bars-on-black + one thin cyan playhead + tiny synced markers, DPR-aware. Files existed: `page.tsx` / `audio-engine.ts` / `patterns.ts` / `renderer.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 Ikeda / Alva Noto-Carsten Nicolai ┬╖ #5 the Ikeda-idiom research). **Honest edge (builder-disclosed):** the optional "drag on a lane to redraw its bars" was not wired; only the auto-scan is truly sample-accurate (the scrub path schedules a few ms ahead of `now`); extreme-fast zips can drop hits past the polyphony cap.

### `1212-data-matrix` тАФ `queued` тАФ *toggle a datamatrix and it plays itself.*
- **Concept:** a **32├Ч24 datamatrix / QR-like grid** of on/off cells you click-drag to toggle; a **column-scan** sweeps on the audio clock and rings each lit cell in the active column as a **pure sine pip** (row тЖТ major-pentatonic pitch so a column IS a consonant chord, the march IS a rhythm) + a filtered-noise click per attack; bounded polyphony (cap 8/column, `1/тИЪn` gain). Optional **Conway's-Game-of-Life** mode evolves the grid once per loop on a toroidal grid (bounded) so it **plays itself** (the glider preset auto-enables it) тАФ a self-composing datamatics; faint descending binary "rain" behind. Seeds dots/block/diagonal/glider + clear + 3тАУ14 col/s scan.
- **Why banked:** clean single-file build, the strongest "plays itself" morning property, but conceptually closest to a conventional grid step-sequencer (many lab cousins) тАФ the least-distinctive *concept* of the three. **Resurrect for a generative/self-evolving-sequencer slot, or fold its Life-evolution into 1210 as the generative MODE (noted in 1210's README).** Files existed: `page.tsx` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 Ikeda / Conway ┬╖ #5 the Ikeda-idiom research). **Honest edge:** the CA steps inside the scheduler look-ahead (an evolve step appears a sub-frame early); Life on a small torus can settle into still-lifes (re-seed for constant motion).

## ┬з673 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 673, 2026-07-05) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + tsc/eslint clean in-folder ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Complete build briefs тЖТ resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1210. Max committed folder after this fire = 1209.*

**WIDE fire: 3 orthogonal grep-0├Ч excitable-medium/coupled-oscillator engines, each a fresh non-JI voice + a distinct non-bright chromatic-chiaroscuro palette + active-gesture input. Shipped `1209-alfven` (pluckable magnetic field-lines тЖТ additive Alfv├йn-wave resynthesis; three.js 3D тАФ the starved output surface + the most surprising hook + sight&sound share one honest model). The two below were built complete + folder-clean and `rm -rf`'d.**

- **тнР `1207-oregonator` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (the strongest pure build of the three).** BelousovтАУZhabotinsky **excitable medium** as a *mallet instrument*: TAP to break a wavefront and nucleate a rotating spiral, HOLD-DRAG to paint temporary refractory barriers; wavefront **collisions/annihilations** strike a bank of **inharmonic modal-metal resonators** (ratios 1/2.756/5.404/8.933/13.34, higher partials decay faster, bandpassed-noise mallet attack; pitch = event-Y on a warm minor-pentatonic; collisions ring brighter+longer). **Engine:** FitzHughтАУNagumo/Oregonator-equivalent two-var kinetics (activator u, slow recovery v w/ an `eps2` slow-recovery factor) on ping-pong `RGBA16F` GPU textures (9-pt isotropic Laplacian, no-flux CLAMP_TO_EDGE); a **96├Ч54 CPU shadow model** runs the same kinetics/stamps in lock-step so edge-triggered threshold crossings = wavefront arrivals, opposed crossings = collisions тЖТ cheap real-time event detection w/o full GPU readback. Two-lobe stamp (excited|refractory across an axis) makes a *spiral* not a target. Verified numerically excitable (rest stable until triggered; broken-front тЖТ persistent spiral ~12тАУ14% coverage). Canvas2D fallback = the shadow model upscaled. **Palette:** real ferroin rust-orange field / cerulean oxidized fronts / hot cyan-white leading edge / graphite refractory tails тАФ chromatic chiaroscuro. **Ambition 3/5** (novel-to-lab excitable-medium spiral form [#1, grep-0├Ч Oregonator/Belousov/Zhabotinsky] + 4 subsystems [GPU RD + CPU shadow event-detector + modal-metal synth + pointer control] + named refs [#3: Zhabotinsky 1964 / Field-K├╢r├╢s-Noyes Oregonator 1972 / Winfree *When Time Breaks Down* 1987]). **Why banked not shipped:** output genre is a full-screen WebGL2 fragment-shader field тАФ the over-represented last-10 output cluster (~5├Ч, flagged AVOID) тАФ so 1209's starved three.js-3D surface won the diversity tiebreak. Resurrect the moment shader-fields cool. *Its own next-cycle deepening:* per-spiral drifting tuning centres so distinct spirals become distinct instruments and an annihilation resolves as a genuine interval between two tunings (a chemical duet).

- **`1208-swarmalator` тАФ banked, hold until murmuration cools.** Strogatz **swarmalators** (particles carrying BOTH 2D position AND an internal phase ╬╕; colour=phase on a hue wheel): DRAG an attractor (a "cursor swarmalator" force-well) + steer **J** (phaseтЖТspace coupling) and **K** (spaceтЖТphase coupling) sliders through the **five canonical states** (static sync / static phase wave / splintered phase wave / active phase wave [K<0 churn] / static async), each of which *sounds* different. **Voice:** two-op Chowning **FM bells** тАФ phase-tight+spatially-tight clusters ring bells (pitch from bin/size, pan by centroid-X), global phase-coherence R=|mean e^{i╬╕}| drives the FM modulation index (high R = pure/settled, low R = bright/churning) + a soft FM bed; 7-voice budget, per-bin cooldowns. **Engine:** forward-Euler, soft-cored 1/|╬Фx|, N=420, O(N┬▓) halved via force antisymmetry; the reciprocal spaceтЖФphase coupling is what makes it *not* boids (no phase) and *not* Kuramoto (no space). **Palette:** iridescent phase-wheel additive glow (`lighter`) over graphite radial ground + vignette; cleared each frame so it's a shimmering aggregate, not a trailed flock. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 swarmalators grep-0├Ч [Kuramoto 34├Ч / boids 19├Ч are neither] + тЙе3 subsystems + #3 O'Keeffe┬╖Hong┬╖Strogatz Nat.Comms 8:1504 2017 / Strogatz *Sync* 2003). **Why banked:** 1206-murmuration (a particle swarm) shipped the *immediately prior* cycle тАФ a second glowing-2D-swarm risks reading as monoculture on Karel's cold morning glance; genuinely fresh engine, so resurrect once тЙе1 non-swarm ships between. *Deepening:* paint persistent phase-bands into the field that recruit+braid and trigger sustained FM chords (compose the swarm's harmony).

## ┬з672 тАФ banked DEEP non-winners (cycle 672, 2026-07-05) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + next-lint-dir/tsc clean in-folder ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Complete build briefs тЖТ resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1207. Max committed folder after this fire = 1206.*

**DEEP fire: one massive concept тАФ a many-hand *collaborative* ensemble (the jury's un-cashed provocation #5, "the single largest un-built category") тАФ attacked via 3 topologies, all sharing the same research spine: a lookahead-commit distributed clock (StreamMUSE arXiv 2606.11886 [10 Jun 2026] + ReaLJam arXiv 2502.21267). Transport = `BroadcastChannel` (same-origin multi-tab; zero-infra; try/catch тЖТ solo). Shipped `1206-murmuration` (collaborative flock-instrument тАФ its only overlap with prior art is the *visual*, boids; the concept is un-built). The two below were built complete + folder-clean and `rm -rf`'d; each shadows a specific prior prototype at the *concept* level, which is why they were banked, not shipped. Grep audit that shaped the fire: multi-user/WebRTC is NOT 0├Ч (508/729/1077 duets); `754-conducted-table` = conductor+chairs; `1183-in-c-loom` = In C ensemble; `1059`/`537` = flock visuals. Non-JI voices required (JI-choir banned this week); chromatic-chiaroscuro palettes; active input.**

### `1204-baton-ensemble` тАФ resurrect ONLY if Karel wants the *conductor* topology specifically (else it re-skins 754)
- **Concept:** the lab's first *conducted* many-voice ensemble. Lowest peer-id = **conductor**; drags a baton on the canvas тАФ horizontal = tempo (78тАУ128 BPM), vertical = dynamics, sustained travel drifts the key-center/mode (Slendro/Pelog/Pentatonic/Aeolian). Other peers are **players**, each auto-assigned one chair; tap to cycle its register. Solo = you conduct a full 7-chair ghost section.
- **Clock:** conductor broadcasts `(anchorBeat, anchorTimeMs, secPerBeat, bpm, dynamics, rootMidi, modeIndex, baton)`; a 40 ms scheduler commits each owned chair's note `LOOKAHEAD_BEATS=2` ahead at `audioCtx.currentTime + (beatTime-now)/1000` and broadcasts `{chair, beat, midi, vel, atMs}` intents so all clients render phase-locked. Tempo changes re-anchor at the current fractional beat (continuous phase).
- **Voice:** 2-operator **FM** mallet/bell тАФ one timbre per chair (Gong/Bourdon/Saron/Gender/Gangsa/Kantilan/Bell), differentiated by ratio + brightness, short percussive amp env + decaying mod-index. Gamelan-ish, warm-but-bright-edged; NOT a drone. Feedback delay for space, compressor on the sum. All synthesized.
- **Palette:** deep teal/charcoal radial base; accents lerp violet(calm)тЖТamber(loud/fast); baton trail + beat light-threads to each chair; live peers = filled colored discs, ghosts = dashed rings. No strobe.
- **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 refs ReaLJam/StreamMUSE ┬╖ #5 StreamMUSE тЙд14d). **Why banked, not shipped:** concept-level shadow of `754-conducted-table` (conductor+chairs friends fill from phones) тАФ the "same instrument twice" trap the jury flagged (1190тЙИ1152). **Honest limit:** each client sounds only the chairs it owns тЖТ the intended demo is two tabs on ONE machine (chairs sum to the full ensemble exactly once); cross-device needs remote-intentтЖТlocal-audio echo + a clock-offset handshake.

### `1205-loom-in-c` тАФ resurrect ONLY if Karel wants a *multiplayer* In C (else it re-skins 1183)
- **Concept:** the lab's first *leaderless* many-voice ensemble тАФ a whole room playing Terry Riley's *In C* (1964), everyone advancing the **53 cells** at their own pace, held by a shared eighth-note pulse; the collective texture is a living braid of where each player currently is. Solo = ~6 seeded ghost-walkers (a pure function of the shared beat index, so every tab computes an identical ghost braid) drift through the score; each real peer claims one strand and the ghost steps aside. A herding rule keeps the room within ~3 cells (Riley's own performance direction).
- **Clock:** shared tempo + origin `t0` broadcast once тЖТ identical beat-indexтЖТwall-time on every client; 40 ms scheduler looks ~2 beats ahead; each peer broadcasts `{from, cell, beat, midi}` the moment it commits an onset. Host (lowest id) sounds the pulse + ghosts; each peer sounds only its own strand (braid carried once).
- **Voice:** physical-modeling **struck-bar / marimba** тАФ inharmonic modal partials (~1 : 3.9 : 9.4 : 16.2) + a mallet-knock noise transient; the In-C pulse is a bright high-C pip. Warm/percussive, never a drone. The 53 cells (`cells.ts`) are faithful in *shape and harmonic arc* (C-major brighten 1тАУ20 тЖТ BтЩн mixolydian turn 21тАУ39 тЖТ bright BтЩо/F# resolution to a C octave 40тАУ53), not an exact transcription (the score is intentionally open).
- **Palette:** tealтЖТcharcoal base; each human strand a distinct amberтЖТviolet hue, ghosts cool desaturated teal; onset beads of light travel each thread; a per-strand vertical bow shows how far through the score it is (you *see* the room's spread open/close). ~1 Hz whole-note breath, no strobe.
- **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 refs Terry Riley *In C* 1964 + ReaLJam/StreamMUSE ┬╖ #5 StreamMUSE тЙд14d). **Why banked, not shipped:** concept-level shadow of `1183-in-c-loom` (self-organising *In C* ensemble) тАФ theme AND name overlap. The genuinely-new part vs 1183 is the *multiplayer* strand-claiming; if Karel wants networked In C, this is the resurrect. **Honest limit:** same-origin multi-tab only; cross-device WebRTC flagged as next (protocol is already the right shape).

## ┬з671 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 671, 2026-07-05) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT + tsc/eslint clean in-folder ┬╖ `rm -rf`'d, NOT committed (non-winner rule). *Specs below are complete build briefs тЖТ resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1204. Max committed folder after this fire = 1203.*

**WIDE fire: 3 orthogonal fresh-VOICE explorers directly cashing the 2026-07-05 jury's two headline provocations (#1 chromatic range not bright-daylight; #2 ban the JI-choir/drone voice тЖТ a fundamentally different synthesis). Each pairs a distinct non-JI voice with an active input and a chromatic-chiaroscuro palette. Shipped `1203-gendy` (Xenakis GENDYN stochastic-waveform synthesis тАФ the single freshest VOICE, a whole synthesis category the lab has never had). The two below were built complete + folder-clean (tsc/eslint) and `rm -rf`'d. ┬з671 grep audit that shaped the fire: spectral-resynthesis / scanned-synthesis / waveshaping / WebRTC are all lab-prior (NOT fresh); Izhikevich + GENDYN are grep-0├Ч.**

### `1201-ignition` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT-FIRST** тАФ `queued` тАФ *a living sheet of spiking neurons you ignite with a touch.* (This is the ┬з669 тнР `1195-ignition` concept, re-raced + rebuilt this cycle and STILL the top resurrect тАФ banked twice now on VOICE-freshness sequencing, never on quality.) A 96├Ч96 torus lattice of **Izhikevich spiking neurons** (`v'=0.04v┬▓+5v+140тИТu+I`, `u'=a(bvтИТu)`, spike-reset; RS params a=0.02 b=0.2 c=тИТ65 d=8, two half-steps/frame) with **diffusive spike-field coupling** (a spike deposits into a field that diffuses + decays + feeds back as input current) so a **touch injects current** and ignition spreads as travelling spike-waves / spirals; arrow-keys/slider nudge global excitability; auto-ignition on idle. **VOICE = inharmonic modal percussion** (struck free-free-bar partials 1:2.756:5.404:8.933, per-partial fast decay + noise-mallet transient, per-voice lowpass, тЙд14-voice steal + 38 ms global rate-limit, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, gain ramped from 0 тАФ NOT a JI pad). **OUTPUT = full-screen WebGL2** voltage field (RG8 texture upload/frame) in **tealтЖТviridianтЖТcopperтЖТember chromatic chiaroscuro** with ember bloom; Canvas2D `putImageData` fallback + `webglcontextlost`. Files existed: `page.tsx` / `sim.ts` (`IgnitionSim`) / `synth.ts` (`ModalPercussion`) / `render.ts` (`FieldRenderer`) / `README.md`. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 Izhikevich excitable-membrane sim тАФ grep-0├Ч, distinct from the WilsonтАУCowan *field* at `1098-cortical-bloom`; #2 тЙе3 subsystems [neuron lattice + spike-field diffusion + modal synth + WebGL2 render = 4]; #3 HodgkinтАУHuxley 1952 / Izhikevich 2003 / Winfree spiral waves / Cook & Smith modal; #5 ┬з671 research). **state: hypnagogia ┬╖ pole: intense.** **Why banked (not a quality loss тАФ strongest 4/5 floor of the three):** its modal-percussion voice is the least-fresh of the three against a jury whose *headline* is voice homogenization (modal echoes `1193`'s recent gong), where GENDYN is a categorically new voice; and "a neural field that sounds when touched" has a lab cousin in `1098`. **The builder numerically verified** a touched pulse yields an expanding wavefront (~2 cells/frame, spike-count tracking the ring perimeter), not a global flash or dead spot. **Top pick for the next intense / excitable-media / active-touch slot** тАФ a keeper engine. Honest edge: constants hand-tuned (extreme excitability favours busy turbulence over clean isolated spirals); shader/audio not live-verified headless.

### `1202-torsion` тАФ `queued` тАФ **supersedes the ┬з669-banked `1197-torsion`** (this rebuild delivered the TRUE projected-crossing detector 1197 lacked). *Tie a sound into a knotted shape тАФ and re-tie it to change the tone.* A continuous **(p,q) torus knot** (`r=cos(q┬╖t)+2; x=r┬╖cos(p┬╖t); y=r┬╖sin(p┬╖t); z=тИТsin(q┬╖t)`) swept into a glowing tube via a **rotation-minimizing frame** with closed-loop twist correction; **drag re-ties it** (interpolating p,q through non-integer values тЖТ crossings open/close continuously; preset knots (2,3)(3,2)(2,5)(3,4)). **The honest improvement over 1197 (delivered, not heuristic):** a REAL screen-space crossing detector тАФ the sampled centreline is projected through the live view rotation and every non-adjacent segment pair is tested for a true 2D intersection; a pair that was NOT crossing last frame and IS now is a crossing "birth" тЖТ that plucks a string. **VOICE = real KarplusтАУStrong plucked-string waveguide** (`AudioWorklet` delay-line ring buffer length `sampleRate/f`, noise-burst excite, one-zero lowpass in the feedback loop; `ScriptProcessorNode` fallback; pentatonic scale-snap so re-tying stays musical; crossing number `min(p(qтИТ1),q(pтИТ1))` + ratio p:q тЖТ pitch, crossing density/torsion тЖТ brightness + pluck rhythm; limiter + ramped master). **PALETTE = strict TWO-COLOUR Ikeda/riso** тАФ deep indigo ground + vermilion knot + blends (enforced in-shader) тАФ the directest cash of jury provocation #1's "two-color Ikeda/riso constraint." **OUTPUT = WebGL2 emissive two-pass tube** (solid + additive rim bloom; the builder also fixed a real depth-buffer-not-cleared occlusion bug found in review) with a Canvas2D projected-centreline glow fallback. Files existed: `page.tsx` / `knot.ts` (centreline + RMF tube + crossing detector) / `render.ts` (`KnotRenderer`) / `synth.ts` (`WaveguideSynth`) / `ks-worklet.ts` (polyphonic KS worklet string) / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 knot theory тАФ grep-0├Ч; #2 тЙе3 subsystems [knot geometry + true crossing detector + KS waveguide + WebGL2 tube = 4]; #3 torus knots / Karplus & Strong 1983 / Ryoji Ikeda). **state: hypnagogic dream-logic ┬╖ pole: cosmic-intimate.** **Why banked:** the strongest *palette* answer + a genuinely distinct plucked voice, but GENDYN was the freshest VOICE this fire and knotтЖТpluck was already a queued/banked idea (less surprising than a never-had synthesis category). **Resurrect the next two-colour-constraint / plucked-string slot тАФ it is now a better build than the 1197 it replaces.** Honest edge: not live browser-smoke-tested (code review + clean gates only).

### `1198-limbline` тАФ тнР **RESURRECT-FIRST** тАФ `queued` тАФ *your whole body is a set of plucked strings.* MediaPipe **Pose** 33-landmark skeleton; each of ~10 **bones** (upper-arms 11-13/12-14, forearms 13-15/14-16, thighs 23-25/24-26, shins 25-27/26-28, spine mid-shoulderтЖТmid-hip, shoulders 11-12) is a literal **Karplus-Strong plucked-string waveguide** (noise-burst тЖТ tuned delay line `sampleRate/f` тЖТ 2-tap lowpass feedback comb, rendered per-pluck to an `AudioBuffer`). Joint **velocity plucks** the string (velocityтЖТamplitude+brightness); **limb extension in-frame тЖТ pitch** (fold in = higher, extend = lower; snapped to a warm minor-pentatonic so any combination is consonant but the TIMBRE is a bright decaying pluck, NOT a JI pad); stereo-panned by limb x; body strums itself as it moves and decays to silence at rest. Canvas2D additive **glowing waveguide filaments** with **travelling energy pulses** down a plucked bone, jewel-per-limb hues on graphite (chromatic chiaroscuro), dim self-view + vignette. Fallback: 10 limb pads + keys 1тАУ0 + auto-strum drive the same engine. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [Pose + KS waveguide bank + Canvas2D filament render]; #3 Karplus & Strong 1983 / Krueger *Videoplace* / Sonified Body тАФ #1 NOT claimed, PoseLandmarker lab-common). **state: kinetic ┬╖ pole: embodied.** **Why banked, not shipped:** a strong, robust build with a genuinely distinct plucked-waveguide voice тАФ lost to `1200` only because gaitтЖТtempo is the *fresher* angle (0├Ч even within embodiment) and a granular rhythmic form is further from the lab's existing continuous body pieces; `1198`'s "limbsтЖТstrings" is nearer 803/811 territory. **Top pick for the next embodied / physical-modeling slot.** Files existed: `page.tsx` / `pose.ts` / `synth.ts` / `render.ts` / `README.md`. *Honestly-disclosed rough edge: pluck thresholds tuned by reasoning, not live webcam; ships the sanctioned Canvas2D path (not literal WebGL2).*

### `1199-resonant-room` тАФ `queued` тАФ *your body plays a giant virtual drumhead; the room's own modes are the music.* MediaPipe **Pose** skeleton; each visible joint (nose 0, elbows 13/14, wrists 15/16, knees 25/26, ankles 27/28) is a moving contact that injects a Gaussian energy bump (scaled by inter-frame speed) into a **128├Ч128 finite-difference (FDTD) 2D wave-equation membrane** (`u_next = 2u тИТ u_prev + c┬▓тИЗ┬▓u`, damped, Dirichlet boundary, NaN-guarded). Four fixed pickup cells' RMS + a curvature-based brightness scalar continuously drive a **10-resonator inharmonic Bessel-mode plate bank** (high-Q bandpass, circular-drumhead ratios, fтВАтЙИ92 Hz, brightness-tilted lowтЖФhigh, struck transients, soft-clip bus). **VOICE = struck/resonant plate physical modeling, NOT a JI choir.** Output: WebGL2 chiaroscuro **heightfield shader** with bloom (indigo troughs тЖТ cyan crests тЖТ amber strikes) + Canvas2D `putImageData` twin + skeleton overlay. Fallback: drag-to-strike the drumhead / arrow-keys + space move a mallet, same engine. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [Pose + FDTD membrane sim + modal bank + WebGL2 render = 4]; #3 Smith *PASP* / Bilbao *Numerical Sound Synthesis* 2009 / Krueger). **state: resonant ┬╖ pole: embodied.** **Why banked & de-prioritized:** the strongest *simulation* of the three (audio genuinely read OUT of the membrane, not just triggered), BUT the closest to the already-shipped **`803-body-chimes`** ("your moving body plays a room-sized instrument with modal physical-modeling resonance") тАФ shipping it risked the "same-instrument-twice" trap the jury flagged (`1190тЙИ1152`). **Resurrect only with a mechanism that makes it non-derivable from 803** (e.g. a true eigenbasis mode-projection instead of the brightness-tilt approximation, or a spatial/binaural room dimension). Files existed: `page.tsx` / `pose.ts` / `membrane.ts` / `audio.ts` / `render.ts` / `README.md`.

magтЖТJI-pentatonic-snapped pitch, depthтЖТcutoff/detune, stick-slip bandpass-swept noise onset, 16-voice steal, teardown), `strata.ts` (pure-TS `StrataModel` тАФ depthтЖТy, lonтЖТx, `spawn`/`tick`/`snapshot`, age-based ring growth/fade, mag-scaled size), `page.tsx` (bright rice-paper inline-SVG depth column тАФ labeled Crust/Upper-mantle/Transition/Lower-mantle bands + depth axis 0тАУ700 km, quakes bloom as depth-placed concentric rings; gesture-gated Listen/Stop, 150s time-compressed scheduler w/ 250 ms min inter-onset, RAF throttled ~30fps, live readout + emerald/amber status badge, `text-rose-300` audio notice, `PrototypeNav`), `README.md`. **Named refs:** "Echoes of the Land" (arXiv 2507.14947, 2025); Alexandre Estrela "RedSkyFalls" (Venice Biennale 2026); Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology*; USGS/Zhigang Peng; Andrea Polli. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [live seismic sonification тАФ grep-0├Ч] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [live fetch/parse/fallback + inharmonic modal gong synth w/ stick-slip + SVG strata renderer + time-compressed scheduler] + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з668 research). **Why banked, not a quality loss:** it's the more *legible/scientific* rendering (a clean labeled depth section) тАФ but 1193's WebGL cross-section reads as more physically *transporting* (a glowing cut-open planet) and better embodies the depthтЖТtimbre mapping by ringing each quake at its true radius; the SVG surface is also 2├Ч in the last 10 (1180/1190) vs WebGL 1├Ч (1188), so WebGL was the fresher-in-window surface. **Honest gaps (from its report):** latitude intentionally unused (it's a depth section, not a map); the "inharmonic" partials are hand-tuned empirical ratios, not modal analysis; ear/eye timing reasoned not browser-verified headless. **The cleanest resurrect is the mode-toggle on 1193** (mirrors the 1153/1154, 1165/1166, 1188тЖФ1189 sibling-toggle pattern). ### тнР `1191-tremor-gongs` тАФ `CONSUMED as 1193-tremor-core (cycle 668, 2026-07-05)` тАФ the live-seismic gong concept shipped this fire, on a fresh WebGL2 Earth CROSS-SECTION surface (NOT the bright-2D-map form this was banked on тАФ that form concern is exactly why the DEEP race rendered depth-structure instead of geography; ┬з668 also sharpened the synth with a stick-slip friction onset). **Hear the living Earth right now тАФ the planet's REAL, LIVE earthquakes each strike a resonant inharmonic metal gong.** The lab has sonified space-weather (1173) but **never the solid Earth** тАФ live seismic is grep-0├Ч. **Build (done, 5 files):** `feeds.ts` (fetch USGS `earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/feed/v1.0/summary/all_day.geojson` тАФ keyless, CORS, past-24h; parse `features[].properties.{mag,place,time}` + `geometry.coordinates=[lon,lat,depth_km]` with NaN/null guards; **mandatory embedded ~12-quake fallback** [mag 1.5тАУ6.2] so it always runs + sounds identical; `тЧП live┬╖N` vs `тЧЛ sample data` amber status; ~60s re-poll), `gong.ts` (`GongEngine` тАФ each strike = sum of ~7 **inharmonic** bell partials [0.5, 1.0, 1.19, 1.71, 2.0, 2.74, 3.0] with independent exponential decays тЖТ gentle lowpass тЖТ shared procedural convolver reverb тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` тЖТ master ~0.2; **magтЖТpitch [bigger=LOWER, ~55 HzтАж660 Hz snapped to a just pentatonic grid so overlaps stay consonant] + amp + decay length**; **depthтЖТlowpass cutoff + inharmonic detune** [deep=dark/muffled, shallow=bright]; 16-voice oldest-steal; ramp-from-0 + full teardown), `map.ts` (bright ivory equirectangular Canvas2D world тАФ never clears to black тАФ faint ink graticule + low-poly continents + expanding bronze ripples scaled by magnitude; reduced-motion aware), `page.tsx` (gesture-gated "Listen to the Earth"; **24h time-compressed to ~150 s chronological looping scheduler**, min 250 ms inter-onset so it reads as a slow bell-choir not a machine-gun; live readout place/`M x.x`/depth/time + live/sample status; `PrototypeNav`), `README.md`. **Named refs:** Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology*; USGS "Listening to Earthquakes" (Zhigang Peng); Andrea Polli environmental-data sonification. **Tags:** INPUT live real-world data (USGS, no user input) ┬╖ OUTPUT bright Canvas2D world-map + ripples ┬╖ TECHNIQUE inharmonic modal bell-gong synthesis driven by live seismic data + scheduler ┬╖ PALETTE bright rice-paper/bronze/ink ┬╖ VIBE contemplative/about-the-world. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [live seismic sonification тАФ grep-0├Ч] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [live fetch+parse+fallback + modal bell synth + Canvas2D map + scheduler] + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з667 research). **Why banked, not a quality loss:** genuinely fresh domain + instantly demoable + cashes jury provocation #5 (real-world data, 0├Ч in window) тАФ but its FORM (live keyless feed тЖТ sonify тЖТ bright 2D map) repeats `1173-solar-wind-choir` from 4 cycles back, exactly the "bright data-map local minimum" the ┬з661/┬з662 notes flagged; shipping it risks a new form-camp. **Honest gaps:** live USGS fetch may 404/CORS through the sandbox proxy тЖТ falls back to sample data (resolves in a real browser); continents are hand-drawn low-poly, not GIS; the timeline restarts its cycle when a re-poll brings new data. Rebuild from this spec at тЙе1193.

### `1192-strange-song` тАФ `queued` тАФ resurrect on the next **bright-generative / chaos** lane (or as a "chaos тЖФ order" companion pairing)
**Can deterministic chaos compose? A strange attractor's endless never-repeating trajectory sings its own path as luminous ink-in-water.** **Build (done, 3 files):** `attractor.ts` (RK4 4th-order integrator + 3 selectable systems with correct classic params тАФ **Lorenz** ╧Г=10 ╧Б=28 ╬▓=8/3, **R├╢ssler** a=0.2 b=0.2 c=5.7, **Aizawa** a=0.95 b=0.7 c=0.6 d=3.5 e=0.25 f=0.1; per-axis running min/max normalization + smoothed speed estimate + `nudge()` perturbation + warm-up/`reset()`; small fixed dt, several sub-steps/frame for a smooth filament), `audio.ts` (coordinateтЖТmusic: **heightтЖТpitch quantized to a bright Lydian scale over ~3 octaves** so always consonant, **lateralтЖТpan**, **speedтЖТnote-density + lowpass brightness**, **Lorenz wing-swap [sign flip of x]тЖТbass punctuation**; dual-osc + per-note lowpass pluck/bow, 12-voice oldest-steal, generated convolver reverb, `DynamicsCompressor` тЖТ master ~0.2 ramped from 0; notes gated by speed + pitch-change, NOT one-per-integration-step; full teardown), `page.tsx` (Canvas2D **ink-in-water** тАФ never clears to black: ~0.05-alpha warm-paper wash each frame so trails persist as diffusion while the ground stays light + two-pass glow [wide soft under bright core] in hues shifting with pitch/speed; slow-rotating 2D projection; Lorenz/R├╢ssler/Aizawa selector + speed dial + pointer-drag `nudge`; Begin/Stop; graceful canvas/audio degradation + reduced-motion; `PrototypeNav`), `README.md`. **Named refs:** Edward Lorenz *Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow* (1963, butterfly effect); Otto R├╢ssler (1976); the Aizawa attractor. **Tags:** INPUT light pointer-nudge + selectors ┬╖ OUTPUT bright Canvas2D ink-in-water ┬╖ TECHNIQUE RK4 strange-attractor ODE тЖТ coordinate-to-music sonifier ┬╖ PALETTE bright warm-paper/luminous-ink ┬╖ VIBE generative/meditative-bright/chaos-as-composer. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [strange-attractor RK4 тАФ grep-0├Ч] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [RK4 ODE integrator + coordinateтЖТmusic sonifier + ink-in-water Canvas2D renderer] + #3 named refs). **Why banked:** beautiful + bright, but the most *passive* of the three (you watch chaos rather than shape it) + Canvas2D (the over-used output surface); Quietude's inversion gives more surprise + agency. **Honest gap:** mapping constants (heightтЖТpitch window, speedтЖТbrightness range, ink hue ramp, projection scale, per-system speedScale) all tuned blind/headless тАФ whether it reads as *musical* vs *wandering* is exactly the open question, unverified without hardware; the projection may flatten Aizawa's 3D torus. Rebuild from this spec at тЙе1193.

## ┬з666 banked seed тАФ 2026-07-05 (cycle 666 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ **DEEP** тАФ ONE concept, *Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano gives itself a time of day, painting a bright daylit sky that evolves dawnтЖТdusk across the whole piece*, raced via 2 renderers; shipped `1188-welcome-sky` = the raw-WebGL2 volumetric raymarch тАФ it won on being the more physically transporting bright sky + a clean strict-null build. The sibling below was built complete by a parallel builder + builder-verified, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. Backed up to scratchpad `dream-losers-666/1189-turner-sky/`. Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1190, or as a render-mode toggle on 1188.)

### `1189-turner-sky` тАФ the SAME daylit-sky concept as a **painterly Turner/Constable OIL-SKY** instead of a physical raymarch (real-audio INPUT [Welcome Home recording + file-drop + synth fallback] ┬╖ **three.js layered brush-stroke sprites** OUTPUT ┬╖ bright dawnтЖТdusk PALETTE ┬╖ painterly/oil VIBE) тАФ `queued`. The same day-clock engine (`progress = currentTime/duration` sweeps sun + palette dawnтЖТmiddayтЖТdusk) but rendered as **impasto luminosity**: an orthographic screen-space three.js scene тАФ a full-screen gradient `ShaderMaterial` backdrop (warm horizon band + radial sun glow), an additive sun sprite with bloom-like halos, and **16 cloud meshes across 3 parallax depths carrying runtime-generated `CanvasTexture` brush-stroke textures** (soft impasto puffs + brushy bezier streaks). RMSтЖТcloud thickness/opacity/quantity + halo; centroidтЖТwarm/cool glaze + wispy/heavy bias; fluxтЖТsoft onset bloom. Canvas2D multi-ring-blurred-blob fallback + `hasWebGL()`; full three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()`. **Why banked, not a quality loss:** genuinely lovely and clearly distinct from the sibling's raymarched look тАФ but (1) the raw-WebGL2 raymarch reads as more physically *transporting* (real self-shadowed volume vs. faked impasto sprites тАФ its own README's honest gap), and (2) at curation it carried an outstanding strict-null build error (`sky.ts`: `'g' is possibly 'null'` in the Canvas2D fallback, ~20 lines) that the winner didn't тАФ so the clean build won the authoritative gate. **Honest gaps (from its README):** impasto is faked with layered translucent sprites (not paint-sim/normal-mapped thickness); the day-clock restarts on buffer loop (re-dawns each pass); centroidтЖТaltitude is a soft bias, not a physical cloud model. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [real-audio analysis + three.js painterly cloud renderer + gradient/sun shader + reverb/limiter + Canvas2D fallback] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Turner; Constable; Eno *77 Million Paintings*; Anadol] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з666). **SAFETY:** slow luminance lerps only, no strobe; gesture-gated + limiter + ~0.2 ramped master + reduced-motion + full teardown. **No API route** (READ-only of existing `/api/audio/<id>`). **To resurrect:** fix the `'g' is possibly null` strict-null guard first, then ship as a **"raymarch тЖФ painted" render-mode toggle on 1188** (see both aesthetics of the same evolving day тАФ mirrors the 1153/1154, 1165/1166 sibling-toggle pattern), or standalone on a bright/painterly lane. Full working build in scratchpad `dream-losers-666/1189-turner-sky/` (`page.tsx` + `sky.ts` + `audio.ts` + `README.md`); rebuild from this spec at a number тЙе1190.

## ┬з665 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 665, 2026-07-05) тАФ FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-665/`, both `tsc`+folder-eslint clean ┬╖ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

**WIDE fire: 3 orthogonal sensor/embodied explorers cashing the jury's #1 "zero embodied in fifteen" gap. Shipped `1185-face-organ` (facial-blendshape formant vocal instrument тАФ won on the jury gap + 06:30 phone-reviewability + love-alignment). The two runners-up below were both fully built + verified; resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1188 (their folders were backed up then `rm -rf`'d; max committed folder after this fire = 1185).**

### тнР `1187-quietude` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (the freshest *vibe* of the fire; ship it the next audio-first / meditative / conceptual slot тАФ ideally once audio-first isn't freshly saturated, i.e. a couple ships past 1183/1165)
- **The concept (an inversion):** SILENCE is the instrument. The mic doesn't drive the sound тАФ it *gates* it. A just-intonation drone-choir (110 Hz root, partials 1┬╖9/8┬╖5/4┬╖3/2┬╖5/3┬╖15/8┬╖2/1, тЙд0.3 Hz per-voice shimmer, procedural reverb) is always synthesizing internally; the room's quiet opens it (slow attack) and any sound ducks it (fast release). An **adaptive noise floor** (fast-fall / slow-rise running minimum of RMS) self-calibrates to any room and rejects steady speaker/fan bleed, so there's no fixed threshold тАФ it works quiet or loud. Sustained stillness is rewarded: a **stillness timer** unlocks new overtones/voices every few quiet seconds, so deep silence is audibly richer; a disturbance shatters a bright gold/ivory radial mandala into drifting motes that reconverge as quiet returns.
- **Why it didn't ship this fire:** it's the most surprising *conceptually*, but its payoff needs a **silent room + headphones + patience** тАФ a hard 06:30 phone sell, and speaker-bleed risk on a phone. Face-organ demos instantly ("open your mouth тЖТ a choir sings").
- **Named refs:** John Cage *4тА▓33тА│* (1952); ├Йliane Radigue drone practice. **Tags:** INPUT mic-as-silence-sensor (inverted) ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D radial bloom ┬╖ TECHNIQUE adaptive-noise-floor gating of a JI drone-choir ┬╖ PALETTE bright gold/ivory ┬╖ VIBE meditative/conceptual. **Ambition** 2тАУ3/5 (тЙе3 subsystems + Cage ref + conceptual novelty). Fallback: no mic тЖТ a "still mode" that rewards NOT touching (pointer/keyboard idle grows the bloom). Full build in `dream-losers-665/1187-quietude/` (page.tsx + floor.ts + choir.ts + bloom.ts + README).

### `1186-tilt-field` тАФ `queued` тАФ lesser seed (tilt already shipped at `1170-tilt-pool` cycle 661, so it's redundant *in the window* тАФ resurrect only when tilt is stale again, OR harvest its **Tonnetz voice-leading engine** for a keyboard/MIDI harmonic-space instrument)
- **The concept:** tilt your phone to play a **Tonnetz / neo-Riemannian** lattice of bright triads тАФ `gamma` (L/R tilt) sweeps the root along the circle of fifths, `beta` (F/B tilt) changes chord color/register тАФ with smooth greedy **nearest-tone voice-leading** between chords through a 4-voice detuned cathedral-organ pad (shared lowpass + feedback delay + slow arpeggiation). Luminous aurora-pastel lattice on a warm light background; iOS `requestPermission()` gate + pointer/arrow-keys desktop fallback.
- **The reusable gem:** `harmony.ts` (circle-of-fifths roots ├Ч 5 bright quality rows majтЖТadd9тЖТmaj7тЖТmaj9тЖТlydian) + the greedy voice-leading in `audio.ts` are cleanly separable and would upgrade any harmonic-navigation prototype. **Named ref:** Euler/Riemann *Tonnetz*. **Tags:** INPUT device-tilt (pointer/keys fallback) ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D luminous lattice ┬╖ TECHNIQUE Tonnetz harmonic navigation + pad synthesis ┬╖ PALETTE bright aurora. Full build in `dream-losers-665/1186-tilt-field/`.

## ┬з664 тАФ banked DEEP non-winner (cycle 664, 2026-07-05) тАФ FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-664/`, `tsc`+folder-eslint clean ┬╖ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

**DEEP fire: ONE concept (an audio-first generative minimalist ensemble that performs forever, genuinely different at minute 6 than minute 1) raced via two process-music philosophies. Shipped `1183-in-c-loom` (faithful Terry Riley *In C* тАФ discrete cell-advancement + herding; won on 06:30 phone-reviewability, its interlocking payoff lands within ~15s over a recognizable pulse). The runner-up below is the more *rigorous* realization of continuous phasing тАФ and directly fixes the honest gap the banked `1181-in-c-loom` spec documented (grid-quantization тЙа real continuous phasing). Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1185 (its folder was `rm -rf`'d after backup; max committed folder after this fire = 1183).**

### тнР `1184-phase-mill` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (ship as the continuous-phasing counterpart / a "cell-advance тЖФ tempo-drift" mode toggle on 1183; or standalone the next audio-first / process-music slot)
**A Steve Reich continuous-tempo *phasing* engine тАФ N players loop ONE short cell at hair-different tempi, drift smoothly out of unison into shimmering resultant patterns, then slowly re-gather over many minutes.** This is the CONTINUOUS-clock counterpart to 1183's discrete cell-advancement, and it's the honest fix for the gap 1181's spec flagged: the phasing here is a real consequence of near-rational tempo ratios, not cell-length arithmetic on a shared eighth grid. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-664/1184-phase-mill/`, 4 files):** `phase.ts` (the *Piano Phase* 12-note cell as semitone offsets, `mulberry32`, and the `PhaseMill` model тАФ each player a continuous `schedPos`/`schedTime` advanced at `tempoRatio = 1 + k┬╖epsilon┬╖(1+jitter)`; `collect(horizon)` emits every onset crossed to a lookahead horizon; `snapshot(t)` returns per-player phases + circular `spreadDeg` + normalized dispersion + a `converging` flag sampled 0.8s ahead; phase continuity preserved across config changes so slider moves don't jump), `audio.ts` (25ms lookahead scheduler, marimba/celesta pluck with per-player pan/timbre + soft tonic-triad drone, 24-voice oldest-steal тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter тЖТ 0.2 master, full teardown), `page.tsx` (bright ivory `#faf4e6`/stone-ink palette, minimal phase-wheel canvas тАФ dots orbiting a 12-tick ring, fanning apart + re-gathering тАФ live readout "N voices ┬╖ X┬░ spread ┬╖ drifting apart / re-converging / locked in unison", tempo + drift-rate + voices sliders, re-roll + drone toggles, `text-rose-600` no-audio fallback, `PrototypeNav`), `README.md`. **Named refs:** Steve Reich *Piano Phase* (1967), *Clapping Music*, *Music for 18 Musicians*. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab **continuous-tempo phasing** [grep-0├Ч] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [continuous phase model + lookahead scheduler + per-player polysynth + phase-wheel viz] + #3 named refs). **Why banked, not a quality loss:** it's the more rigorous phasing realization and arguably the more conceptually pure piece тАФ but its signature payoff (drift тЖТ re-convergence) is subtle and unfolds over minutes, a harder 06:30-phone sell than In C's steady-pulse ensemble that interlocks audibly within seconds. **The cleanest resurrect is as a "cell-advance тЖФ tempo-drift" mode toggle grafted onto 1183** (both are the one process-minimalism idea in two clocks тАФ a real cycle-2 deepening, mirrors the 1153/1154 linesтЖФcondensate + 1165/1166 melodyтЖФfield sibling pattern). **Honest gap:** built headless тАФ whether the resultant/interference melodies actually *emerge* and whether the re-gathering *reads* as a payoff wants Karel's speakers; the near-unison opening is quiet drama by design.

## ┬з663 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 663, 2026-07-05) тАФ BOTH FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-663/`, `tsc`+folder-eslint clean ┬╖ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

Shipped `1180-illuminated-word` (cross-modal textтЖТmusic on a bright SVG manuscript тАФ won on being the furthest-from-the-fortnight AND the most phone-reviewable/personal). The two below both cleared the floor and are strong; banked with full rebuild specs. Resurrect at fresh numbers тЙе1183 (their folders were `rm -rf`'d after backup; max committed folder after this fire = 1180).**

### тнР `1181-in-c-loom` тАФ `SHIPPED as 1183-in-c-loom (cycle 664, 2026-07-05)` тАФ the audio-first / long-form-stateful lane cashed; its documented grid-quantized honest gap is fixed by the newly-banked `1184-phase-mill` (continuous phasing). Original spec below, kept for reference.
**A faithful Terry Riley *In C* generative ensemble that performs forever тАФ a self-organizing minimalist tapestry with real musical STATE.** ~12 virtual players each independently advance (forward-only, probabilistic repetition) through **53 authored melodic cells** in C major/mixolydian, gently herded so no player runs >3 modules ahead, over a steady high-C eighth-note pulse тАФ they phase apart and re-converge into ever-shifting interlocking patterns. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-663/1181-in-c-loom/`, 4 files):** `ensemble.ts` (53 cells tracing a brightтЖТBтЩн-shadedтЖТresolving arc + `InCEnsemble` player state machine + `mulberry32` + wrap-to-new-pass), `audio.ts` (25 ms-lookahead scheduler onto `ctx.currentTime`, warm marimba pluck + detuned drone pad, 22-voice oldest-first steal, `DynamicsCompressor` тЖТ ~0.2 master, full teardown, optional read-only `/api/audio/<id>` piano-seed whose coarse RMS biases advancement тАФ degrades to pure synth on any failure), `page.tsx` (warm ivory/amber high-key palette, spare constellation canvas тАФ players as dots on a 53-tick ring, sub-strobe glow, reduced-motion flattens it тАФ live spread readout "N players across modules 12тАУ17 ┬╖ pass 2", tempo + density dials, seed toggle, Web-Audio-unavailable notice), `README.md`. **Named refs:** Terry Riley *In C* (1964); Steve Reich *Piano Phase*. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab **In-C phase-minimalism ensemble** [grep-0├Ч] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [53-cell bank + per-player state machine ├Ч12 + lookahead-scheduled polysynth + minimal constellation viz] + #3 named refs). **Why banked, not a quality loss:** genuinely strong and the cleanest fill for the audio-first/long-form lane тАФ but 1180 is furthest-from-the-fortnight AND instantly phone-demoable (this piece rewards patient minutes-long listening, a harder 06:30-phone sell). **Honest gap:** everything is eighth-grid-quantized, so phasing comes from cell length + advancement timing rather than the continuous independent tempi of a real *In C*; musicality of the 53 cells is designed-not-heard.

### `1182-strange-song` тАФ `queued` тАФ resurrect on the next **generative-visual / bright-chaos** lane (or as a companion "chaos тЖФ order" pairing)
**Deterministic chaos as a composer тАФ a strange attractor's endless never-repeating path drawn as luminous ink-in-water while it sings its own trajectory.** An RK4-integrated attractor (Lorenz `╧Г=10 ╧Б=28 ╬▓=8/3` default, + R├╢ssler + Aizawa selectable) traces a filament that never exactly repeats; heightтЖТpitch (pentatonic-quantized), lateralтЖТpan, speedтЖТnote-density/brightness, Lorenz wing-swapтЖТbass note. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-663/1182-strange-song/`, 4 files):** `attractor.ts` (RK4 integrator + 3 systems with per-axis normalisation + speed estimate + `nudge()` perturbation), `audio.ts` (12-voice steal, per-note lowpass + dual-osc, generated-convolver reverb, `DynamicsCompressor` тЖТ 0.2 master, full teardown), `page.tsx` (Canvas2D ink-in-water renderer тАФ two-pass glow on a warm paper wash that never clears to black, so it stays BRIGHT per the glow-ban; attractor selector, speed dial, drag-to-nudge, reduced-motion, graceful audio/canvas degradation, `PrototypeNav`), `README.md`. **Deliberately shipped the robust Canvas2D renderer (no WebGL/WebGPU dependency)** so it renders identically on phone + desktop. **Named refs:** Edward Lorenz (1963, butterfly effect); Otto R├╢ssler (1976); Aizawa. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab **strange-attractor dynamics** [grep-0├Ч] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [RK4 ODE integrator + coordinateтЖТmusic sonifier + ink-in-water Canvas2D renderer] + #3 named refs). **Why banked:** beautiful and bright, but the most *passive* of the three (you watch chaos rather than shape it), and 1180's text input gives more agency + surprise. **Honest gap:** the pentatonic quantization + mapping constants are tuned blind (no live display/speakers headless) тАФ wants an ear/eye pass; whether the attractor *reads* as musical vs. wandering is unverified.
