### тнР `1171-solar-wind-choir` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (ship the next real-world / cosmos-data lane, once it won't stack on `1161-flight-choir`'s "bright live-data-map" form тАФ i.e. after тЙе1 non-data ship)
**Hear the sun's weather hitting Earth *right now* тАФ three live NOAA space-weather feeds sung as a just-intonation choir over a bright daylit readout.** The freshest-research piece of the fire (today's ┬з661 dive тЖТ Helioradar AV 2026), banked ONLY because its form (live keyless feed тЖТ sonify тЖТ bright 2D readout) repeats `1161-flight-choir` from two ships ago and shipping it risked a new "bright data-map" local minimum тАФ a sequencing call, not a quality one. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-661/1171-solar-wind-choir/`):** `page.tsx` = gesture-gated Begin/Stop; parallel client fetch+parse of three keyless NOAA SWPC JSON feeds тАФ plasma-5-minute (speed/density/temp), mag-5-minute (Bz/Bt), noaa-planetary-k-index (Kp 0тАУ9) тАФ with a **mandatory embedded fallback snapshot** (shows `тЧП live`+timestamp on success, `тЧЛ using sample data` in amber on failure) re-polling ~60 s; a `computeTargets` dataтЖТmusic mapping engine; an **8-voice JI choir synth** (detuned sine/triangle тЖТ formant peaking filters + shared vibrato + high-shelf shimmer тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter тЖТ ~0.2 master); a **bright daylit Canvas2D** readout (sunтЖТEarth wind streaks whose speed = wind speed, Kp aurora ribbon, legible live numbers). **Mapping:** wind speed тЖТ register/energy + streak speed ┬╖ density тЖТ active-voice count / chord richness ┬╖ **Bz** (southward/negative = real storm driver) тЖТ consonanceтЖФtension cross-fade + palette toward violet ┬╖ Bt тЖТ shimmer/brightness ┬╖ Kp тЖТ aurora sparkle voices + brightness. **Named refs:** Helioradar AV (av.helioradar.com, 2026 тАФ this cycle's research finding); Andrea Polli *Atmospherics / Weather Works*. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [live multi-endpoint fetch+parse+fallback + mapping engine + JI choir synth + Canvas2D readout] + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з661 research [Helioradar 2026]). **Honest gap:** the live NOAA fetch couldn't be exercised headless (CORS/rate-limits may force the fallback in a real browser тАФ built to sound identical either way); ear-legibility of the mapping wants Karel's speakers.

### `1172-midi-fresco` тАФ `queued` тАФ resurrect for a **MIDI / live-performance** cycle where Karel can plug in a controller (its headline input is not desktop/phone-exercisable without hardware)
**The lab's first Web MIDI: every note you play paints a living Renaissance *fresco* тАФ pigment blooming into wet plaster in real time.** Play a MIDI controller (or QWERTY / on-screen keyboard) and each note both *sounds* a warm plucked/struck tone and *paints* mineral pigment into a luminous plaster wall; held notes keep blooming wet-into-wet, released notes dry and settle permanently. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-661/1172-midi-fresco/`, 4 files):** `page.tsx` (Begin/Stop, `navigator.requestMIDIAccess()` note-on/off/velocity + device-name + hot-plug via `onstatechange`, QWERTY two-octave C-major + on-screen tap fallback, RAF, teardown), `fresco.ts` (persistent offscreen plaster wall accumulating feathered brush dabs + held-note bloom/spread + drying + gold-leaf shimmer + baked ivory ground w/ grain), `audio.ts` (2-detuned-osc тЖТ velocity-lowpass тЖТ struck envelope, 16-voice oldest-steal, `DynamicsCompressor` тЖТ 0.2 master), `README.md`. **Mapping:** pitch тЖТ x-position + pigment hue (one pigment per pitch-class: terracotta/ochre/gold/verdigris/lapis/sienna) ┬╖ velocity тЖТ stroke size + saturation + filter-open ┬╖ hold тЖТ bloom spread + (>0.8 s) gold-leaf glint ┬╖ release тЖТ ~1.6 s dry, pigment stays. **Named refs:** Brian Eno *77 Million Paintings* (2006); Toshio Iwai *Elektroplankton/Tenori-on*; buon fresco (paint-into-wet-plaster metaphor). **Ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab **Web MIDI input** [grep-0├Ч; `1162-key-garden` was also MIDI but banked, never shipped] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [Web MIDI + QWERTY/on-screen fallback + polysynth + generative-fresco Canvas2D] + #3 named ref [Eno]). **Why banked:** genuine lab-first input, but its real demo path for a hardware-less reviewer is QWERTY (least *embodied* in practice), and generative-painting viz has more lab priors (100/153/223/160) than the two siblings; the strongest ship-context is a live-performance cycle with a real controller + Karel's ears. **safeFlicker тЙд3 Hz gold-leaf shimmer honored; not yet tested on real MIDI hardware.**

## ┬з660 тАФ banked DEEP non-winner (cycle 660, 2026-07-04) тАФ FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-660/`, `tsc`+folder-eslint clean ┬╖ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

**DEEP fire: ONE fresh concept тАФ *the instrument is inside your own ear* (combination/difference "ear tones") тАФ raced via 2 approaches. Shipped `1165-third-ear` (the active phantom-MELODY тАФ it won on being the more *legible* demonstration [a tune you hear that no speaker plays, with a built-in A/B proof toggle], on being ACTIVE + bright/alert, and on deliberately dodging the cosmic-ambient VIBE the 2026-07-04 jury BANNED this cycle). The sibling below is the immersive phantom-FIELD тАФ richer + more transporting, but it repeats the meditative-drone register the jury is fatigued by, so it's the cleanest TOP resurrect for the moment the near-black-glow ban lifts. Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1166 (its folder was `rm -rf`'d after backup; max committed folder after this fire = 1165).**

### тнР `1166-ear-tone-field` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (ship the next immersive / cosmic-ambient-AUDIO lane, once the jury's near-black-glow ban has cooled)
**The SAME otoacoustic phenomenon as a sustained immersive Amacher installation тАФ you are inside a low chord your own ear is helping to make.** Where 1165 puts a moving melody in the phantom line, this makes a whole shimmering harmonic HAZE: **9 pairs of loud close pure sines** whose spacings `╬ФтВЦ = root ┬╖ rтВЦ` (`rтВЦ тИИ {1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2, 9/4, 5/2}`) are tuned so every evoked **difference tone is a just multiple of one common phantom root** тЖТ a maximally-consonant pentatonic-overtone stack no oscillator plays. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-660/1166-ear-tone-field/`):** `audio.ts` = `EarToneField` тАФ 9-pair sine bank in the 1.05тАУ3.45 kHz sweet spot + a **seeded (`mulberry32(0x1166ea)`) 14-stage evolution schedule** (30тАУ64 s/stage, ~10 min before repeat) that modulates the phantom root through a just progression while density + cluster spread breathe (smoothstep cross-fades) + a continuous slow drift LFO; a gentle **binaural bed** (two ~104 Hz sub-primaries ┬▒2 Hz, panned L/R via `StereoPannerNode`) for inside-the-skull motion; **per-oscillator gain scaled DOWN with active-voice count** so the sum never clips; master `DynamicsCompressor` limiter тЖТ conservative master (0.2). `page.tsx` = gesture-gated Begin/Stop, ear-tone-center + density sliders, hold-to-mute A/B, minimal Canvas2D listening readout (high primary constellation + low phantom markers + breathing ring), Web-Audio-unavailable notice, idle instructional state, full teardown. **Mapping:** center slider тЖТ cluster center 1500тАУ2900 Hz ┬╖ density slider тЖТ how many pairs sound ┬╖ stage schedule тЖТ phantom-root modulation + density/spread breathing. **Named refs:** Maryanne Amacher *Sound Characters (Making the Third Ear)* 1999; Tartini *terzo suono* 1714; La Monte Young / Marian Zazeela *Dream House* (sustained just-intonation drone lineage); Alvin Lucier. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 combination/difference-tone synthesis grep-0├Ч + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [9-pair difference-tuned bank + seeded 14-stage evolver + binaural bed + voice-count-scaled safety + minimal viz] + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з660 Sonorities-2026 research). **Why banked not shipped (sequencing, not weakness):** it's the richer, more *transporting* build (the immersion lens that won 1142/1148), BUT its aesthetic register is the meditative sustained-drone the jury just banned for a week ("ban the near-black glow"), and long-form immersive drone is nearest the lab's heaviest territory (1148/1152/1138-theta-ear); 1165's active bright melody diversifies harder AND demonstrates the phenomenon more legibly. **Honest gap:** built headless тАФ whether the ear-tones actually *ring* is designed-not-heard; the conservative safety limiter may keep primaries below the effect's sweet spot (documented in its README); ideal loudness/center want a real-ears pass. **The cleanest resurrect is standalone as the cosmic-ambient calm sibling once the glow-ban lifts тАФ or as a "melody тЖФ field" mode toggle grafted onto 1165** (both are the one ear-tone phenomenon in two registers, a real cycle-2 deepening тАФ mirrors the 1153/1154 linesтЖФcondensate pattern).

Shipped `1161-flight-choir` (live ADS-B air-traffic sonified over a bright daylight world-map тАФ the real-world-data lane, jury #5, highest ambition [4/5, grep-0├Ч aircraft data source]). The two below lost on ambition/territory, not quality. Resurrect at a fresh number (their folders were `rm -rf`'d after backup; renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder after this fire = 1161).**

### тнР `1162-loom-of-hours` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (ship the next real-piano / bright-textile cycle тАФ honors the jury's explicit 1155 praise: "use Karel's real Path music")
**Karel's REAL "Welcome Home" solo piano woven into a living bright textile as it plays тАФ every note a weft thread, the whole track a finished tapestry.** The jury named 1155-crucible a standout precisely for using his real piano + being bright; this is the same mandate in a NON-physics register. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-659/1162-loom-of-hours/`):** `audio.ts` = 3-tier loader (real recording `549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` via read-only `GET /api/audio/<id>`, both response shapes, 8s abort тЖТ dropped file тЖТ offline-rendered piano arpeggio fallback) + `sourceтЖТdry+convolverтЖТcomp/limiterтЖТanalyser` graph exposing RMS/flux/centroid; `loom.ts` = `mulberry32` + centroidтЖТbright-hue palette + adaptive `OnsetDetector` + `LoomWeaver` (warp columns, incremental weft rows on an offscreen buffer, `(column+row)`-parity over/under interlace so it reads as CLOTH not stripes, scroll-when-full, idle warp shimmer, edge glow); `page.tsx` = bright ivory loom, gesture-gated, source chip (emerald/violet/amber). **Mapping:** onset (spectral flux)тЖТadvance one weft row ┬╖ centroidтЖТthread hue (deep terracottaтЖТpale gold/sky) ┬╖ RMSтЖТweft thickness + lit-warp density. **Named refs:** Anni Albers / Bauhaus weaving; Jacquard loom as proto-computer; textile-as-code. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [real-audio decode + onset/spectral analysis + generative plain-weave renderer + reverb/limiter] + #3 named ref). **Why banked not shipped:** lower ambition floor (2/5 vs winner's 4/5) and "visualize Karel's piano" sits nearer the lab's existing paint/tapestry territory; the real-world-data lane was the louder unfilled jury gap this fire. **Honest gap:** onsetтЙаpolyphonic transcription (dense pedalled passages merge to thicker rows); centroidтЖТhue tuned for solo piano; no export of the finished cloth. **Ship next real-piano/bright-textile slot.**

### `1163-answer-song` тАФ `queued` тАФ the live-performance call-and-response lane (resurrect on a mic / live-duet slot)
**Sing a short phrase; a warm bright choir sings an ANSWER back тАФ a turn-taking generative duet you also SEE (your coralтЖТgold ribbon vs the answer's skyтЖТviolet ribbon).** Live-performance fitness (Karel #3) + audio-first-leaning (jury #4). **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-659/1163-answer-song/`):** `listen.ts` = from-scratch **NSDF/McLeod pitch detector** (key-maxima peak-pick + parabolic interp, 80тАУ1000 Hz, clarity gate) + `PhraseSegmenter` (quantize to C-major-pentatonic, ~650ms silence = phrase end); `respond.ts` = `generateAnswer()` (transpose/invert/**Continuator-style interval-Markov continue**/develop in scale-index space + cadential tonic resolution + anti-echo guard + evolving 8-phrase memory, deterministic mulberry32) + `ChoirEngine` (detuned choir, thirds harmony, procedural convolver reverb, limiter); `viz.ts` = bright two-ribbon dialogue canvas; `page.tsx` = mic path + always-visible QWERTY/on-screen keyboard fallback, phase machine idleтЖТlisteningтЖТthinkingтЖТanswering. **Named refs:** Pachet *Continuator*; call-and-response / antiphon; McLeod & Wyvill NSDF. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why banked:** pitch-detection + mic pieces are well-trodden in the lab (not grep-0├Ч); the "answer not echo" is the fresh bit but ambition tops at 2/5. **Honest gap:** entirely code-verified тАФ NSDF detector, segmenter thresholds, answer musicality all reasoned headless, not ear-tested; octave-doubling risk near 1kHz; keyboard fallback has fixed durations. **Resurrect on a mic/live-duet slot** тАФ the cleanest next step is a real hardware pitch-tune pass.

### тнР `1161-seismic-song` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (ship the next real-world-data / non-physics cycle тАФ directly answers jury 2026-07-04 provocation #5)
**The last 24 hours of the entire Earth's earthquakes, as music, over a bright daylight world-map.** Answers the jury's "build about something other than physics тАФ sonify the real world, so the piece is *about* something other than a Hamiltonian" тАФ a 0├Ч lane. **Build (already done, in scratchpad `dream-losers-658/1161-seismic-song/`):** `seismic-data.ts` = robust USGS `all_day.geojson` parser (**live, CORS-open, keyless** тАФ fetched client-side, NO API route) + a **mandatory embedded ~30-quake fallback snapshot** so it always plays + mulberry32 + equirectangular projection + low-poly continent outlines + bright magnitude color scale; `seismic-audio.ts` = `SeismicAudio` тАФ an inharmonic bell/gong voice pool where **magтЖТpitch (62Hz great-quake gong тЖТ 660Hz micro-chime) + loudness + decay-length**, **depthтЖТlowpass timbre (shallow bright, deep muffled)**, **lonтЖТstereo pan**, **latтЖТoctave lift**, over a slow A1/E2 drone pad, through a shared convolver reverb + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; `page.tsx` = bright Canvas2D map (pale-blue ocean, warm-sand continents, graticule), an ~84s playhead sweeping the 24h window, each quake blooming as a magnitude-sized/colored ripple, live legend (time/mag/depth/place), emerald "N live quakes" / amber "sample data" status chips. **Named refs:** "Sounds of Seismic (SoS)" *Electronica Earthwork* (sos.allshookup.org); Sarah Smith, earthquake sonification at Stanford CCRMA. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 real-world-data sonification grep-0├Ч + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [live fetch + parse + sonification engine + map viz + fallback] + #3 named refs). **Why banked not shipped (sequencing):** the fire's flagship priority was the jury's *loudest* gap (embodiment) + the love convergence on camera; this answers a *different* (also 0├Ч, also strong) lane, so it's the cleanest TOP resurrect тАФ ship it next non-physics cycle. **Honest gap:** voice balance / reverb / pitch-range designed but not ear-tuned (headless); a real CORS check against the live feed in prod is worth a glance (the fallback guarantees it plays regardless).

### `1162-key-garden` тАФ `queued` тАФ the lab's FIRST Web MIDI integration (resurrect on a MIDI / live-performance lane)
**A sunlit generative garden played by a MIDI keyboard, your computer keys, or an on-screen piano.** Answers the jury's named MIDI 0├Ч lane (provocation #3). **Build (already done, in scratchpad `dream-losers-658/1162-key-garden/`):** `page.tsx` = three input paths тАФ **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`, note-on/off, device-name readout) + **QWERTY** tracker-piano (`A S D F G H J K` white, `W E T Y U` sharps, `Z`/`X` octave) + on-screen mini-piano тАФ idle meadow swaying on mount, live readout, full teardown (`input.onmidimessage=null`); `audio.ts` = `GardenAudio` polyphonic plucked/belled synth (detuned tri+sine, velocityтЖТamplitude+brightness, 16-voice stealing) through offline-rendered reverb + compressor; `garden.ts` = high-key daylit scene (sky+sun+meadow), per-note plants (**pitchтЖТx + pitch-classтЖТbright spring hue**, **velocityтЖТthickness/height**, **heldтЖТgrowth**, **releasedтЖТfade-to-meadow**), mulberry32 per-plant jitter. **Named ref:** Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton* (2005) / *Tenori-on*; L-system generative botany (Lindenmayer). **Ambition 3/5** (#1 Web MIDI grep-0├Ч + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named ref). **Why banked second:** genuine lab-first Web MIDI, but its *real* demo path is QWERTY (least *embodied* in practice тАФ most reviewers have no MIDI keyboard), and generative-botany viz is nearest the lab's prior paint/kids territory, so it's the least-diverse of the three despite the novel input. **Honest gap:** QWERTY/on-screen path is code-verified; the actual MIDI-hardware path + sound are unverified (no device, headless).

## ┬з657 тАФ banked DEEP non-winner (cycle 657, 2026-07-04) тАФ FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-657/`, `tsc`+eslint clean ┬╖ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

**DEEP fire: ONE concept тАФ fly forever through an infinite gyroid "impossible cathedral" тАФ raced via 2 parallel RENDERING approaches. Shipped `1158-gyroid-cathedral` (the from-scratch marching-cubes MESH тАФ it won on the diversity audit [three.js meshed geometry is only 3├Ч in the last 10 shipped, whereas raw-WebGL2-fragment output is 6├Ч = over-represented = banned this cycle, and 1159 uses exactly that banned output], on the higher novel-technique ambition claim [marching cubes is a genuine lab-first algorithm; raymarching is NOT novel тАФ 1148 already raymarched], and on mechanism legibility [you see the actual gyroid surface]). The sibling below was built complete + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit`/folder-lint 0, backed up to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d. Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1160.**

### тнР `1159-gyroid-lightfall` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (the "cathedral of LIGHT" тАФ resurrect as a render-mode toggle on 1158, or when a fragment-shader lane is explicitly due)
**The SAME infinite gyroid, but rendered as a raymarched *luminous volume* instead of a solid mesh тАФ a "cathedral of dissolving light."** A single WebGL2 fragment shader (full-screen triangle, no three.js) volumetrically front-to-back marches the analytic gyroid `dot(sin p, cos p.yzx)`, accumulating emission/absorption around a soft density band `dens = 1 тИТ smoothstep(0, band, |g тИТ iso|)` so the walls *glow* rather than read as stone; analytic gradient (shared sin/cos) drives a violetтЖФteal thin-film shift by normal ┬╖ Fresnel ┬╖ depth, with an ACES-ish tone map + sRGB so the accumulated glow never full-screen flashes. Infinite world-space camera advance + pointer-drag steer; `iso` drifts slowly for a dissolving feel. Same audio as 1158 (JI chord over A1, gradient-magnitude-driven lowpass, convolution reverb, limiter). **Files preserved in scratchpad `dream-losers-657/1159-gyroid-lightfall/`:** `page.tsx` (WebGL2 renderer + HUD + fallbacks), `shaders.ts` (the raymarch GLSL), `gyroid.ts` (JS field+gradient for audio), `audio.ts`, `README.md`. **Why banked not shipped (sequencing, not weakness):** it's arguably the *more transporting* of the two (soft dissolving light vs crisp stone тАФ the immersion lens that won 1142/1148), BUT (a) its raw-WebGL2-fragment output is the over-represented modality this window (6├Ч in last 10 тАФ the diversity hard-gate), and (b) raymarching is not novel-to-lab (1148), so its ambition floor is a notch below the mesh's marching-cubes lab-first. **The cleanest resurrect is as a "solid тЖФ light" render-mode toggle grafted onto 1158** тАФ both are aesthetics of the one gyroid field, a real cycle-2 deepening (mirrors the 1153/1154 "linesтЖФcondensate" pattern). **Named refs:** Schoen 1970; Schwarz P/D; gyroid acoustic crystal PMC9951337; Callophrys rubi; arXiv 2512.18308 (Dec 2025); ├Н├▒igo Qu├нlez / Shadertoy distance-field lineage. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з657 research). **SAFETY-compliant** (tone-mapped, no strobe, reduced-motion lowers steps). **Nit:** glow/absorption/band constants tuned blind (no live display) тАФ want a nudge on resurrect; fixed-step (not sphere-traced) so thin edge-on walls can shimmer slightly (hidden by the soft band + dither).

## ┬з656 тАФ banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 656, 2026-07-04) тАФ both FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-656/`, `tsc`+eslint clean

### тнР `1156-gyroid-cathedral` тАФ `queued` тАФ TOP RESURRECT (ship the next cosmic-ambient / passive-immersion lane)
**The most *transporting* piece the lab has made in weeks тАФ a genuinely fresh domain.** Fly through an INFINITE **gyroid** тАФ Alan Schoen's triply-periodic minimal surface (NASA, 1970), implicit `sin x┬╖cos y + sin y┬╖cos z + sin z┬╖cos x = t`. Space-filling + periodic тЖТ an endless labyrinthine "impossible cathedral" that reads exactly like DMT/mystical architecture. **Build (already done, in scratchpad):** `gyroid.ts` = blended TPMS field (gyroid тЖФ Schwarz-P `cos x+cos y+cos z=t` тЖФ Schwarz-D) + analytic gradient + a **from-scratch marching-cubes** polygoniser (full 256-case edge/tri tables, NO three addons); `scene.ts` = marches one 2╧А chunk, instances it on a 5├Ч5├Ч5 lattice that **re-centres on the camera each frame** for seamless infinite flight (one draw call for all 125 instances), `MeshPhysicalMaterial` with real thin-film **iridescence** + teal-cyan **fresnel rim** via `onBeforeCompile`, exp fog, drag-steer; `audio.ts` = geometry-sampled cavernous **drone** (local field/gradient/curvature тЖТ lowpass cutoff + just-intonation chord over A1 + convolution reverb). Iridescent violet-teal on near-black. **Why it's the fresh domain:** `gyroid`/`minimal surface`/`triply periodic` all grep-0├Ч. **Named refs:** Alan Schoen (gyroid, NASA TN D-5541, 1970); Hermann Schwarz (P/D surfaces); gyroid **acoustic crystal** topological-sound (PMC9951337, 2023 тАФ grounds geometryтЖТdrone as real physics); butterfly-wing gyroid photonics (Callophrys rubi); arXiv **2512.18308** (Dec 2025, new chiral gyrating-surface family). **Diversity:** three.js meshed geometry OUTPUT (deliberately NOT a raymarch fragment shader тАФ dodges the banned raw-WebGL2-fragment). **Ambition 4/5.** **Resurrect:** ship standalone as the cosmic-ambient calm ship; perf note тАФ the ~160 ms re-march allocates fresh Float32Arrays (GC pressure), drops to 30┬│ under reduced-motion; a human-GPU frame-rate check is the one thing unverifiable headless.

### `1157-scalogram-veil` тАФ `queued` тАФ resurrect for a fresh-audio-analysis / meditative lane
**Your voice through a WAVELET instead of an FFT.** Live mic тЖТ a real **continuous wavelet transform (Morlet)** тАФ scale-adaptive windows give crisp time resolution on transients the FFT smears. Sing/hum/whistle and watch a **scalogram** bloom as a three.js scrolling **3D scale-terrain** (time in depth, scale/pitch across, magnitude as height + ice-tealтЖТwhite emissive on `#04070f`), with a pitch readout, a ridge sonifier, and an optional faint FFT-overlay that makes the wavelet's sharper transients legible. **Build (done, scratchpad):** `cwt.ts` = radix-2 FFT + bank of 72 L2-normalised Morlet filters evaluated in the frequency domain (scaleтЖФfreq `a = ╧Й0┬╖fs/(2╧А┬╖f)`, ╧Й0тЙИ5тАУ6); `mic.ts` = getUserMedia + box-filter decimation to ~16 kHz, no mic monitor (feedback-safe), generated-arpeggio fallback if mic denied, ridge sonify, limiter; `page.tsx` = three.js `BufferGeometry` terrain (220├Ч72 verts, history ring). **Fresh:** `wavelet`/`scalogram` grep-0├Ч (the lab is all-FFT). **Named refs:** Grossmann & Morlet (CWT, 1984); Morlet/Gabor wavelet. **Ambition 3/5.** **Resurrect note:** wants a human-ears mic-gain/gamma tuning pass + check box-filter aliasing near ~8 kHz; ~128 ms analysis latency (fine for a meditative visualiser, not tight rhythmic feedback).

- **One question:** what if you could FEEL psychedelic time-dilation тАФ a single moment stretching toward eternity, then snapping back тАФ rendered as precise data rather than swirl? Two clocks run side-by-side: **OBJ** (real wall time, never bends) and **SUBJ** (a warped grid clock at 1/dilation that drives both the lattice AND a pure-sine metronome). Drag up тЖТ dilation deepens: born-ticks spread apart (the lattice thins toward one held instant, Wittmann's *stretched present*), the metronome slows in lock-step, a sub-sine sags in pitch; the gap **DEBT = OBJтИТSUBJ** + a Shannon **tick-entropy** read out on right-edge sparklines. Release тЖТ cadence snaps home. ### тнР TOP resurrect тАФ `1134-slow-machine` тАФ the COLD Ikeda-monochrome readout of the same "music with memory" engine (active seed+steer INPUT ┬╖ **SVG-primary Ikeda data-notation** OUTPUT ┬╖ pure black + white + one electric-cyan ┬╖ cerebral/clinical) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when a genuinely cerebral / Ikeda-monochrome / non-immersion lane is due, OR fold as a "cold readout" skin toggle onto 1135
- **The question:** same engine, opposite aesthetic тАФ what if the machine-with-memory were rendered as a precise Ryoji Ikeda instrument readout instead of an immersive field? The one version that most-literally cashes the jury's *named* "Ikeda monochrome" palette provocation.
- **Built (complete, this fire):** `engine.ts` тАФ `SlowMachine`: mulberry32-seeded live Markov matrix over Dorian/Pentatonic/Phrygian degrees; tension-weighted `step()` тЖТ Hebbian reinforcement тЖТ decay + steered mutation + slow baseline drift; `seedMotif`/`perturb`/`snapshot` (entropy/consonance/density/age). `audio.ts` тАФ `SlowMachineAudio`: pad bed (registerтЖТpitch, tensionтЖТcutoff) + 2-op FM bell per note + ticks on rests тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`, Chris-Wilson 25 ms look-ahead / 120 ms schedule-ahead scheduler, gesture-gated, full `dispose()`. `page.tsx` тАФ seed stage (scale + tap-a-motif + still Ikeda test-pattern title before Begin) тЖТ live stage: **SVG memory-lattice ring** (nodes=degrees; edges thicken + brighten toward white as reinforced; firing edge glows cyan), a **scrolling Canvas2D note-stream** (test-pattern marks), 3 **sparklines** (entropy/consonance/density), 4 steering dials + PERTURB, design-notes toggle, `text-rose-300` audio-fallback with a visual-only clock. Builder-verified `tsc --noEmit | grep 1134` = 0, `eslint` exit 0.

- **Why de-selected (not weakness):** off the PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion brand тАФ it reads as a clinical instrument readout, not "transport me." The whole point of running DEEP was to see if the concept could be made immersive; 1135 succeeded, so the immersive one shipped. **Resurrect FIRST** on any cerebral/Ikeda/non-immersion cycle, or fold 1134's cold lattice onto 1135 as an alternate "cold readout" view of the same running engine (the DEEP-mode graft). **Named refs:** Ryoji Ikeda (*datamatics*/*test pattern*), Markov+Hebbian composition, Brian Eno generative, Terry Riley *In C*. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [Markov engine + Hebbian reinforce/decay + FM/pad synth + SVG/Canvas Ikeda notation] + #3 named refs). Rebuild from this spec.

## ┬з647 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-03 (cycle 647 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing all four 2026-07-03 jury bans on a different axis-set; shipped `1133-resonant-bowl` (cosmic-ambient singing-bowl sound-bath тАФ it won on serving Karel's PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion driver while balancing the jury-flagged intense-heavy lane, cool-luminous palette, true-3D three.js, active strike+rub). The two below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit`/folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1134.** Both dodge every 2026-07-03 jury ban.)

### `slow-machine` тАФ a piece of music with MEMORY that never loops (active seed+steer INPUT ┬╖ **SVG-primary Ikeda data-notation** OUTPUT ┬╖ pure black + white + one electric-cyan ┬╖ cosmic/cerebral) тАФ `queued`, **top resurrect** when a long-form-generative / Ikeda-monochrome / non-spectacle-conceptual lane is due
- **The question:** what if a piece of music learned from every note it just played тАФ Hebbian reinforcement + decay + live steering feeding back into one Markov matrix so the exact state never recurs тАФ and you could watch its mind drift?
- **Built (complete, this fire):** `engine.ts` тАФ `SlowMachine`: live Markov matrix `M[i][j]` over 5тАУ7 scale degrees, seedable Mulberry32 (never Math.random); `step()` = tension-weighted sample тЖТ Hebbian bump тЖТ decay + steered mutation; `seedMotif()` / `perturb()` / `snapshot()` (matrix/entropy/consonance/density). `audio.ts` тАФ sine/triangle pad bed (registerтЖТpitch, tensionтЖТlowpass) + 2-op FM bell + dry ticks тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`; 25ms look-ahead scheduler ~120ms ahead. `page.tsx` тАФ seed stage (Dorian/Pentatonic/Phrygian + tap-a-motif) тЖТ live stage (SVG memory-lattice: nodes=degrees, edges thicken/brighten as they reinforce, active transition glows cyan; scrolling velocity-sized note-stream; entropy/consonance/density sparklines) + DENSITY/TENSION/REGISTER/MUTATION dials + PERTURB + Design-notes. Builder-reported ESLint 0, no TS errors in folder.
- **Why it was strong (18/18-tie winner-candidate):** the most conceptually *surprising* build of the fire (a machine with memory, not a spectacle тАФ directly answers the jury's "STOP cashing the jury, surprise it"), the most-literal cash of the jury's named "Ikeda monochrome" palette provocation, fills the thin long-form-generative-with-**state/memory** categorical-menu slot, and has the lowest verification debt in the lab (pure SVG + WebAudio, guaranteed to run on Karel's 06:30 phone тАФ the jury's #1 liability).
- **Why de-selected (not weakness):** off the PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion brand тАФ it reads cerebral/data-viz rather than "transport me to an altered state," so it lost the tiebreaker to `1133`'s literal meditative sound-bath. **Resurrect FIRST** on any cerebral/long-form/Ikeda cycle, or when the lane needs a non-spectacle conceptual piece. Named refs: Ryoji Ikeda (*datamatics*/*test pattern*), Markov+Hebbian composition, Brian Eno generative/systems music. Ambition honest 3/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [Markov engine + Hebbian reinforce/decay + FM/pad synth + SVG notation] + #3 named refs + soft-#5 long-form-stateful). Rebuild from this spec.

### `liquid-room` тАФ peak-LSD, the room turns to liquid you stir (active drag + mic/file INPUT ┬╖ **WebGL2 fragment-shader stable-fluids field** OUTPUT ┬╖ indigoтЖТelectric-cyanтЖТhot-magenta on near-black ┬╖ intense) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when an intense-pole / GPU-shader lane is due (the lane is currently intense-heavy тАФ hold until it cools)
- **The question:** what if the moment reality liquefies and melts were a screen you could reach into and stir, driven by sound?
- **Built (complete, this fire):** `fluid.ts` тАФ `LiquidField` full Jos-Stam stable-fluids solver entirely in WebGL2 fragment shaders on ping-pong `RGBA16F` float FBOs (256┬▓): advect velocity тЖТ curl тЖТ **audio-driven vorticity confinement** (the "melting") тЖТ divergence тЖТ 30-iter Jacobi pressure тЖТ gradient subtract тЖТ advect dye тЖТ display (coolтЖТhot palette + 4├Ч4 Bayer dither + bloom). NOT a particle system тАФ a real advected velocity+dye field. `audio-engine.ts` тАФ self-playing detuned drone + mic (analyser-only, no feedback) + drop-a-file; FFT low/mid/high + RMS тЖТ swirl/shimmer/brightness; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. `page.tsx` тАФ drag-to-stir, HUD, Canvas2D reaction-diffusion fallback if float-FBOs absent. Builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` + eslint 0-in-folder.
- **THE RESEARCH-CHAIN build of this fire** (RESEARCH ┬з647 тАФ Robert Borghesi's *ASTRODITHER*, 2026, audio-reactive WebGPU fluid + dither): today's-researchтЖТtoday's-build was visible here. **Why de-selected:** fluid sim is the lab's single most-trodden technique (19 READMEs mention fluid/Navier/RD), it adds to the already intense-heavy lane the jury flagged, and hand-rolled WebGL2 shaders carry the highest headless-verification risk of the three (mitigated by its Canvas2D fallback). **Resurrect** on an intense GPU cycle once the lane has cooled; pair with Karel's real piano as the melting carrier. Named refs: Jos Stam "Stable Fluids" (SIGGRAPH 1999) + ASTRODITHER (Borghesi 2026). Ambition honest 3/5 (#3 named ref + #5 RESEARCH ┬з647 <30d + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [FFT analysis + GPU fluid solver + drag forcing + dither post]). Rebuild from this spec.

## ┬з646 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-03 (cycle 646 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing all four 2026-07-03 jury bans; shipped `1130-spectral-scrub` (Karel's real piano through a granular-phase-vocoder + WebGL2-spectral-field instrument тАФ it won on cashing the jury's #1 overdue mandate: put his actual Welcome Home recording through the pipeline, which the whole 15-build window ignored). The two below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1133.** Both dodge every 2026-07-03 jury ban; grounded in RESEARCH ┬з646.)

### `flock-organ` тАФ a GPU swarm you conduct into an instrument (active pointer-drag INPUT ┬╖ **WebGL2 GPGPU float-texture particle flock** OUTPUT ┬╖ electric neon magenta/cyan on near-black ┬╖ intense) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when a GPU/particle or live-performance lane is due
- **The question:** what if a swarm of thousands of GPU-simulated particles was a playable instrument тАФ you drag to herd the flock, and its living structure (density, velocity, coherence) is what you *hear*, an electric organism you conduct?
- **Built (complete):** `flock.ts` тАФ WebGL2 GPGPU sim; each particle's pos+vel packed into one `RGBA32F` texel, ping-pong FBOs (`EXT_color_buffer_float`), up to ~43k particles; forces = large-N Reynolds boids (centroid cohesion + attractor swirl + inverse-square repulsor on Shift/right-click + curl-of-2D-simplex-noise turbulence); additive neon point-splat into a fading float trail, tone-mapped present. `audio.ts` тАФ 7-partial additive bank + bandpass noise voice + enveloped sine grains тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; **flockтЖТsound map**: centroid-YтЖТroot pitch (pentatonic), centroid-XтЖТpan, speedтЖТlowpass cutoff, **coherence (Vicsek order param |mean(v╠В)|)тЖТharmonicity** (ordered = pure tuned partials + quiet noise; chaotic = beating detune + louder noise), densityтЖТgrain rate; EMA-smoothed, gesture-gated. `fallback.ts` тАФ `probeWebGL2()` + Canvas2D CPU boids (~450) so it still demos + herds. `page.tsx` + `README.md`.
- **Refs:** Craig Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds, and Schools" (SIGGRAPH 1987); Robert Hodgin (flight404) flocking/particle work.
- **Deepen next:** real GPU neighbour search (texture spatial-hash grid) for true alignment/separation; GPU-side parallel-reduce of statistics to remove the readback stall and read *all* particles; multiple attractors / two-hand steering splitting the flock into duetting sub-swarms.
- **Note (credibility):** TSL compute already shipped (`130-tsl-particle-compute`) тАФ this is a fresh *application* of GPGPU, NOT a first-ever-compute claim.

### `slow-machine` тАФ a piece of music with memory that never loops (active seed+steer INPUT ┬╖ **cold Ikeda data-notation** OUTPUT тАФ Canvas2D hard-edged marks + SVG lattice/sparklines ┬╖ pure black + white + one red ┬╖ cerebral) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when a long-form-generative or Ikeda-monochrome lane is due
- **The question:** what if a piece had memory тАФ a long-form generative system you seed and steer that evolves and never repeats, so minute 5 is genuinely different from minute 1, rendered as cold Ikeda data-notation?
- **Built (complete):** `engine.ts` тАФ `SlowMachine`: a **Markov transition matrix** `M[i][j]` over scale degrees under three per-step forces тАФ **Hebbian reinforcement** (path taken bumped = memory), **mutation+decay** (rows leak to baseline + steered noise = forgetting), **tension bias** (reweight by interval consonance); because reinforcement + stochastic mutation + live steering all feed back, the **exact matrix state never recurs** тАФ a drifting attractor, not a loop; `snapshot()` exposes matrix+entropy+consonance+mean-interval so the drift is legible immediately; seedable PRNG. `audio.ts` тАФ sine pad bed (pitch/brightness тЖР register/tension) + 2-op FM bells per event + dry ticks тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor`; 25 ms look-ahead scheduler ~120 ms ahead. `render.ts` тАФ crisp black/white/red Ikeda marks (octave grid, scrolling time ticks, velocity-sized points, red live-event guide) + SVG sparklines. `page.tsx` (pre-start seed: scale buttons + tap-a-motif; live steer: DENSITY/TENSION/REGISTER/MUTATION dials + PERTURB + drop-a-motif strip; live memory-lattice + entropy/consonance/density sparklines) + `README.md`.
- **Refs:** Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics* / *test pattern*; Brian Eno *Music for Airports* (generative); Terry Riley *In C* (evolving non-looping process).
- **Deepen next:** a second interacting voice/matrix (call-and-response between two drifting machines); export the evolving score; longer-horizon memory (slow-decay habits that resurface after minutes) to make the "it remembers" arc land over a full listen.

### тнР TOP resurrect тАФ `kinetic-solid` (drag-to-bias + audio-only-bias INPUT ┬╖ **three.js** orthographic point-cloud OUTPUT ┬╖ ivory-on-slate ┬╖ uncanny) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when the abstract-form / three.js lane is due
- **What:** the abstract sibling of the shipped dancer тАФ ~300тАУ600 flat, equal-size, un-shaded ivory dots sampled on the surface of an **invisible rotating 3D solid** and projected **orthographically** (no perspective, no shading, `depthTest:false` so no occlusion), so the brain manufactures a solid whose depth ordering is mathematically undecidable тЖТ it **bistably flips** its spin. Resurrect on an abstract-form / three.js cycle, OR fold its 3-form selector into 1129 as a cycle-2 "abstract form" toggle (the DEEP-mode graft). **Deepen:** more forms (superquadric, Klein-bottle silhouette); a "commit strength" that reads how hard the drag tips the flip; a two-solid duet where two ambiguous forms flip in/out of sync. **NAMED REFS:** Wallach & O'Connell (1953); Ullman (1979); Miles rotating-trapezoid lineage (1931). **Ambition 3/5** (novel kinetic-depth/SFM technique + тЙе3 subsystems + named refs).

## ┬з644 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-03 (cycle 644 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers, each a *drug-free perceptual hallucination the geometry composes in you*, via a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT ├Ч non-Canvas2D/non-field-sim OUTPUT ├Ч mechanism ├Ч palette ├Ч pole; shipped `1126-enigma-drift` (the Enigma/peripheral-drift piece тАФ it won on cashing the **overdue INTENSE pole** via a non-form-constant, non-black mechanism, being the most reliably hardware-free demo, and the freshest SVG output). ### тЬЕ SHIPPED cycle 645 as `1129-kinetic-dancer` (deepened into the Johansson point-light figure) тАФ `kinetic-depth` (drag-to-bias INPUT ┬╖ **three.js** structure-from-motion OUTPUT ┬╖ ivory-on-slate ┬╖ uncanny/contemplative) тАФ was `queued`, consumed this cycle. *The abstract-solid approach that lost the ┬з645 DEEP is now banked above as `kinetic-solid` (resurrect тЙе1131).*
- **What:** ~360 flat, equal-size, un-shaded dots that are the **orthographic** projection of points sampled on an invisible rotating 3D surface (a Fibonacci-sphere, or a stylized volume-of-revolution "figure"). With zero depth cues the brain builds a solid form from motion alone (**kinetic depth effect / structure-from-motion**) тАФ and its rotation direction is genuinely ambiguous, so it **bistably flips** (the "Spinning Dancer" illusion). Two **rivalrous stereo drones** (bright CW panned right, dark CCW panned left) crossfade with the field's bias over a soft pad; **drag left/right adds a tiny real tilt** (the only disambiguating cue) that nudges the form to commit and leans the sound with it; release тЖТ fully ambiguous. Built files were `page.tsx` + `scene.ts` (`KineticField`: samplers, orthographic camera, flat `PointsMaterial` `sizeAttenuation:false`, `dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`, `hasWebGL()` probe) + `audio.ts` (`DroneEngine`, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, 2.2 s onset, clean `ctx.close()`) + README.
- **Why it lost / why to resurrect:** the most **immersive & dramatic** candidate and a rich grep-fresh technique (structure-from-motion, 0├Ч) тАФ but its effect strength "varies a lot" and the drag-bias is subtle, and three.js was just used (1124), so on *this* fire the more reliable Enigma won the demoability + output-freshness axes. Resurrect on an immersive/three.js cycle. **Deepen:** a true **point-light "spinning dancer"** (Johansson biological-motion) figure instead of a volume-of-revolution; a stronger felt "lock/flip"; optional stereo-audio-only bias so the *sound* alone tips the percept. **NAMED REFS:** Wallach & O'Connell (1953); Ullman (1979); Kayahara *Spinning Dancer* (2003); Johansson (1973). **Ambition 3/5** (novel SFM technique + тЙе3 subsystems + named refs).

### banked тАФ `necker-vase` (press-to-hold INPUT ┬╖ raw-**WebGL2 SDF-figure** OUTPUT (non-field-sim) ┬╖ warm-paper riso ┬╖ liminal/meditative-uncanny) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when the WebGL2-shape-rendering lane is due
- **What:** an instrument for **multistable perception** тАФ three reversible figures rendered from scratch in ONE hand-written WebGL2 fragment shader (Necker cube & Schr├╢der staircase as crisp SDF line-work; the Rubin faceтАУvase as an analytic bicolor silhouette built from facial-feature gaussians), each with a signed `bias` uniform that nudges figure-ground shading toward one reading and lifts a single burnt-orange riso accent onto the dominant one. Two Web Audio drones (hollow square-ish "reading A" vs. rounded sine "reading B") crossfade with the bias over a low shared drone; **press-and-hold toward a cue** biases perception; an **autonomous slow drift** flips it on its own every several seconds so it's never static/silent. Built files were `page.tsx` + `gl.ts` (GLSL ES 3.00, NaN-defensive `sq()`/`bump()`, clean compile/link logging, context-loss dispose) + `audio.ts` + `figures.ts` (per-figure pointerтЖТbias maps) + README; static SVG Necker-cube fallback when WebGL2 is absent.

Resurrect on a WebGL2-shape (non-field-sim) cycle. **Deepen:** re-tune the faceтАУvase profile so it unmistakably reads as two faces; add a **"tap when it flips" report** so the sound follows the *actual* percept (closing the loop) rather than only the pointer nudge; add binocular-rivalry-style version. **NAMED REFS:** Necker (1832); Rubin, *Synsoplevede Figurer* (1915); Schr├╢der staircase; G.H. Fisher; perceptual-bistability literature. **Ambition 3/5** (novel multistable-figure technique + тЙе3 subsystems + named refs).

## ┬з643 banked seed тАФ 2026-07-03 (cycle 643 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **DEEP** тАФ 2 parallel technical approaches to ONE concept (*the word rewritten in you* тАФ Warren's Verbal Transformation Effect); shipped `1125-verbal-oracle` (the **synth-word** approach тАФ it won on being the purest zero-input passive-listen fill of the jury's under-served audio-first lane + the most reliably hardware-free demo). The non-winner below was **built complete** by a parallel builder + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1127.** Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ┬з642/┬з643.)

### тнР TOP resurrect тАФ `1126-own-word` (mic-record INPUT ┬╖ **audio-first** OUTPUT ┬╖ paper-white ┬╖ eerie-liminal) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when the mic/embodied lane is due
**One question:** what if you recorded *your own voice* saying a single word, then looped that exact recording тАФ undegraded and click-free тАФ until you heard it rewrite itself into other words? **Why it's strong / the bigger, more visceral sibling:** it makes the looped VTE stimulus **the listener's own recorded voice** тАФ the illusion becomes visceral because it is *your* word dissolving in your own ears тАФ and it is more **embodied/participatory** (Karel priority #3: you *speak* to play) and technically richer than the shipped synth-word 1125. **Its build (complete as of ┬з643):** `capture.ts` = `getUserMedia` + `MediaRecorder` grabs ~1.3 s of you speaking one word тЖТ decoded to an `AudioBuffer`; `dsp.ts` = the technical core (`findWordBounds` amplitude-gate **trim** of leading/trailing silence with a 20 ms margin тЖТ `peakNormalize` to 0.95 тЖТ `cosineFadeEdges` forcing sample 0 and NтИТ1 to **exact zero** with a raised-cosine curve тЖТ a click-free, invariant loop stimulus тАФ a seam tick resets the ear and kills the illusion, so this pipeline IS the payload); `synth.ts` = `renderFallbackWord`, a **deterministic** 3-parallel-band-pass formant synth (120 Hz sawtooth glottis тЖТ Peterson & Barney vowel script, offline-rendered/normalized/edge-faded, no `Math.random`/`Date.now`) so the piece works with no mic / on desktop / headless; `engine.ts` = `OwnWordEngine`, the same Chris-Wilson **look-ahead** scheduler firing the **identical** buffer (`nextTime += period`, ~0.2 s ahead) тЖТ master gain тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter тЖТ destination, with a backlog guard + full `dispose()`; `page.tsx` = paper/cream UI тАФ **Record a word** (gesture тЖТ countdown/record window) / **Loop it** / **Use fallback voice** / Stop, a 1.2тАУ3 Hz rate slider, a perception log with the shaded ~15тАУ40 s onset zone + seeded illustrative ghost marks, a **minimal Canvas2D companion** (breathing waveform of *your* word + loop-pulse ring + playhead), the fallback auto-looping on mount (never blank/silent), full teardown. **Privacy:** the mic is **analysis/loop-only** тАФ the captured audio lives as an in-memory `AudioBuffer` for the page's lifetime, discarded on unmount, **never written to disk, never uploaded** (no network code, no API route). **Honest Lucier distinction (in the README):** Alvin Lucier's *I Am Sitting in a Room* also loops one's own voice, but Lucier **re-records into a room** so its resonant modes progressively filter the voice into pure tone (an *acoustic* change in the air); here the loop is **undegraded** тАФ byte-identical every repetition тАФ so any change is a **perceptual re-grouping in you**, not a physical filtering. The build deliberately does NOT convolve/degrade the loop. **Ambition:** #1 (VTE-on-your-own-voice, grep-fresh; distinct from Deutsch dichotic 1109 + semantic-satiation 1122) + #2 (mic capture + trim/normalize/fade DSP + fallback formant synth + seamless scheduler + perception log = 5) + #3 (Warren VTE 1958/1961; Peterson & Barney 1952; Lucier as the honest *distinction*). **Dodges every ban:** mic-record INPUT (not tap-to-seed), **audio-first OUTPUT** (the jury's under-served lane; sparse Canvas2D companion, not the artwork), paper-white PALETTE (not black-void), eerie-liminal pole (not intense-hypnotic). **Why banked (NOT quality тАФ build-complete + clean):** the DEEP fire ships one, and 1125 won on being the purer *zero-input passive listen* (the illusion entirely internal) + the more reliably hardware-free 06:30 demo (Begin plays the canonical Warren stimulus immediately, no mic); 1126's real payload is mic-only and its fallback synth is a muddier vowel-glide тЖТ so it lost the *demoability* axis despite being the bigger concept. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ┬з643 тАФ needs a real headphones + mic pass to tune the trim `gate` + `fadeSeconds` by ear (a seam tick or over-trim kills it). **Deepen:** an **A/B of illusion strength on your-own-voice vs the synth** side-by-side; a **free-text "what did you hear?"** capture at each mark that clusters listeners' illusory-word sequences; a tiny A/B that briefly inserts one *degraded* repetition to feel how fast a seam-tick resets the effect; couple with banked `1122-mantra-melt` (VTE = perceptual re-grouping; satiation = meaning-drain тАФ two takes on repetition-until-dissolution). `state: verbal transformation on your own voice тАФ the word rewritten in you ┬╖ pole: eerie-liminal`.

## ┬з642 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-03 (cycle 642 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT ├Ч **NON-Canvas2D** OUTPUT ├Ч technique ├Ч palette; shipped `1124-noise-veil` (audio-led Ganzfeld тАФ it won on the clean *today's-research тЖТ today's-build* chain, the diversity flip, and being the purest mandate embodiment). The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1127.** Both dodge every 2026-07-02 ban AND this cycle's Canvas2D-output ban; grounded in RESEARCH ┬з642.)

### тнР TOP resurrect тАФ `1125-verbal-oracle` (headphone-listen INPUT ┬╖ **audio-first** OUTPUT ┬╖ paper-white ┬╖ eerie-liminal) тАФ `queued`, resurrect next
**One question:** what if you looped one *identical* word until your own brain rewrote it? Put on headphones тАФ a single word repeats unchanged ~2├Ч/second, and after ~20тАУ40 s you begin to *hear it morph* into different words that were never spoken. **Why it's strong / the boldest OUTPUT break of the fire:** it is deliberately **audio-first** тАФ the jury's *most under-served output* (audio-first only 3├Ч across the whole last-15) тАФ and a **grep-fresh mechanism**: the **Verbal Transformation Effect** (R.M. Warren 1958; Warren & Gwynn 1961), a purely auditory percept manufactured in the listener, *distinct* from Deutsch's dichotic illusions (`1109-inner-ear` already ships those тАФ NOT rebuilt) and from semantic satiation (banked `1122-mantra-melt` тАФ meaning-drain, not perceptual re-grouping). **Its build:** `voice.ts` = a real sourceтАУfilter **formant synth** (`renderWord`: sawtooth glottal buzz at f0 тЖТ 3 parallel band-pass "formant" filters automated along a vowel script + band-passed noise fricatives, rendered offline into an `AudioBuffer`, peak-normalized, cosine-faded to exact silence at both edges тАФ NO fetch, NO assets) + `VerbalOracleEngine` (look-ahead **exact-period** scheduler тЖТ a byte-for-byte-identical buffer fired click-free at 1.2тАУ3 Hz, the invariant loop that is VTE's precondition); `words.ts` = 4 preset one-syllable recipes ("rest"=Warren's canonical stimulus, "life","say","flow"; F1/F2/F3 after Peterson & Barney 1952 + per-word illusory-alternate lists); `page.tsx` = a "mark what you hear now" perception log dropping timestamped glyphs against the ~20 s onset zone + a minimal ink-on-cream Canvas2D glyph (breathing word, loop-pulse ring, token waveform + playhead) тАФ the restraint is the point; a deterministic seeded "ghost listener" drops illustrative marks on a cold glance (a placard, not a measurement). **Ambition:** #1 (VTE + looped formant-synth word, grep-fresh, audio-first) + #2 (formant voice + seamless-loop scheduler + preset scripts + perception log + minimal glyph = 5) + #3 (Warren VTE 1958/1961). **Dodges every ban:** headphone-listen INPUT (not tap), **audio-first OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D тАФ the piece is the sound; the glyph is a sparse secondary), paper-white PALETTE (not black-void), eerie-liminal pole (not intense-hypnotic). **Why banked (NOT quality тАФ build-complete + clean):** the WIDE fire ships one, and 1124 won on the *today's-research chain* + diversity; 1125 is not today's-research-grounded (Warren is foundational) and it adds to the "percept-in-you" thread the 2026-07-02 jury flagged as crowding тАФ but it is the **boldest output break** and the obvious resurrect when the audio-first / headphones / eyes-closed lane is due. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ┬з642 тАФ needs a headphones pass to tune formant intelligibility + loop rate against real VTE onset; **deepen** with a real phoneme / di-syllabic model (so the morphs are genuine speech re-parses), a free-text "what did you hear?" capture that clusters listeners' illusory words, and a pairing with `1122-mantra-melt` (VTE = perceptual re-grouping; satiation = meaning-drain тАФ two takes on repetition-until-dissolution). `state: verbal transformation тАФ the word rewritten in you ┬╖ pole: eerie-liminal`.

### `1126-pulse-cave` (camera-PPG INPUT ┬╖ **raw-WebGL2** OUTPUT ┬╖ warm ember womb ┬╖ cosmic-ambient embodied) тАФ `queued`, resurrect on a fresh-input/embodied cycle
**One question:** what if your own heartbeat were the metronome? Rest a fingertip over the phone's rear camera (torch on) and the camera reads the faint pulsation of blood in your fingertip тЖТ a warm womb/cave drone breathes and glows in time with your live heart rate. **Why it's strong / the freshest INPUT of the fire:** **camera photoplethysmography (PPG)** is a **genuinely novel input for the lab** (0├Ч тАФ no prior piece reads a pulse from the camera), and it's embodied/live-performance territory (Karel priority #3). **Its build:** `ppg.ts` = each rear-camera frame drawn to a tiny 48├Ч36 offscreen canvas тЖТ **red-channel spatial mean** = the raw photoplethysmogram тЖТ slow-EMA detrend (high-pass ~0.23 Hz) + fast-EMA smooth (low-pass ~2.6 Hz) тЖТ refractory amplitude-gated upward-zero-crossing peak detection тЖТ **BPM clamped [40,180]** with implausible-interval rejection + a confidence score; a deterministic `mulberry32` **synthetic pulse** (resting rate + respiratory-sinus-arrhythmia HRV, no `Math.random`) is the never-blank fallback. `audio.ts` = shared `startDroneBank` warm JI bed whose filter/level **breathe** with the smoothed pulse swell + a scheduled low-pass **lub-dub** (S1 low + S2 higher/shorter) on each beat. `gl.ts` = **raw WebGL2** hand-written warm fragment shader тАФ a lit womb/cave of drifting fleshy fbm folds + ember vein ridges (blood-red walls тЖТ amber core), walls breathing toward the viewer + a central bloom swelling/brightening on each beat (NOT a field-sim; the uniforms *are* the pulse); Canvas2D 2D fallback. Frames analysis-only, never recorded/sent; torch best-effort via `applyConstraints({advanced:[{torch:true}]})` in try/catch; permission-denied тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + auto-fallback. **Ambition:** #1 (camera-PPG heart-rate as a musical/visual input, grep-fresh) + #2 (red-channel PPG extractor + band-pass/peak BPM tracker + beat-entrained warm synth/heartbeat + WebGL2 cave shader = 4) + #3 (Verkruysse, Svaasand & Nelson, "Remote plethysmographic imaging using ambient light," *Opt. Express* 2008). **Dodges every ban:** camera-PPG INPUT (not tap), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D; a hand-written warm shader, NOT a field-sim), warm ember womb PALETTE (not black-void), cosmic-ambient embodied pole (not intense-hypnotic). **Why banked:** not today's-research-grounded (Verkruysse 2008 is foundational), and camera input appeared recently at `1103-strange-face` тАФ so it lost to 1124's clean research chain; but it's the freshest input + strongest embodied/live-performance fit тЖТ resurrect on a fresh-input/embodied cycle. **Honest caveat carried:** no medical/health claim; the live PPG path is **hardware-only** (needs a phone rear camera + torch + still fingertip; desktop runs the synthetic pulse) тАФ cannot be verified headless. **Deepen:** **two-fingertip PPG for an interpersonal heart-sync duet** тАФ the *biometric* cousin of `1121-pulse-lock`'s tapped-pulse two-body Kuramoto (do two people's heart rates drift toward each other?); HRV тЖТ texture; a breath-paced "settle your pulse" arc. `state: interoception / the inner pulse made audible-visible ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient (warm, embodied)`.

## ┬з641 note тАФ 2026-07-03 (cycle 641 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **DEEP** тАФ shipped `1123-conductor-veil` by resurrecting ┬з640's тнР TOP `1120-conductor-veil`; the planned DEEP concept was scrapped mid-fire as redundant)

If anything from the trio is ever wanted, it's a *cycle-2 graft onto 1109* (e.g. 1124's live "the trick vs. what you heard" A/B routing was a genuinely nice interaction 1109 lacks), never a standalone.

## ┬з640 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-03 (cycle 640 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers; shipped `1121-pulse-lock` (two-person one-device Kuramoto phase-lock тАФ it hit the most jury asks at once: the "two people" fresh verb, extends the only 5/5 standout 1082, and gives the COLD multi-user lane its first buildable answer). The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1123.** Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ┬з640.)

### тЬЕ SHIPPED cycle 641 as `1123-conductor-veil` тАФ `1120-conductor-veil` (continuous conduct-gesture INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D aurora-ribbon ┬╖ cosmic-ambient warm flow) тАФ was `queued`, resurrect next; consumed this cycle. *Deepening still open (not yet built): a left-hand "dynamics" 2nd-pointer channel + a 2/3/4-beat-pattern classifier + quantized register steps; the `1123/conductor.ts` downbeatтЖТEMA-tempo primitive is reusable for any gesture-timed piece.*
**One question:** what if you could *conduct* an unseen ensemble with a continuous baton gesture тАФ and hear phrasing, tempo, and dynamics answer your hand in real time? **Why it's strong / the freshest-RESEARCH origin of the fire:** it directly implements this cycle's freshest anchor тАФ **arXiv:2604.27957 (2026) "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures"** (a dome installation that estimates *phase-within-a-bar* from the conductor's gesture) тАФ and has the strongest **live-performance / installation** fit (Karel priority #3). **Its build:** `conductor.ts` tracks baton position/velocity/curvature every frame and detects the downbeat as a **vertical-velocity reversal** (the low point of a stroke) тЖТ EMA-smoothed BPM; heightтЖТregister (+~1.2 oct) + lowpass brightness; gesture energy/speedтЖТlevel + vibrato/tremolo depth. `audio.ts` = 4 lightly-detuned oscillator "sections" (saw+triangle) over a sustaining pad drone (root+sub), a slowly-cycling set of just-intonation chords all from one just major scale `{1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2}` (no wrong notes), a `ConvolverNode` hall тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. `render.ts` = Canvas2D **aurora ribbons** streaming from the baton, billowing with dynamics (peach/rose/gold/violet/amber over deep-plumтЖТwarm-ember), a luminous baton trail + one soft slowly-decaying bloom per downbeat (no strobe). Deterministic `mulberry32` **ghost conductor** (fixed seed `0x1120c04f`) traces a gentle down-up beat so it sounds/animates on a cold glance. **Ambition:** #1 (continuous conduct-gestureтЖТtempo/register/dynamics, grep-fresh; prior "conduct" pieces were body-tracking dance-avatars, not a pointer baton) + #2 (gesture tracker + downbeat/tempo estimator + ensemble synth + convolver + ribbon renderer = 5) + #3 (Max Mathews *Radio Baton*; *Personal Orchestra* / *You're the Conductor*; the 2026 virtual-orchestra-conducting paper) + #5 (RESEARCH ┬з640, today). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban:** conduct-gesture INPUT (not tap-to-seed), Canvas2D OUTPUT (not GPU-shader/field-sim), warm sunset PALETTE (not black-void), calm cosmic-ambient pole. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ┬з640 тАФ needs a live pointer + speakers pass to tune the downbeat heuristic (it assumes a roughly vertical motion; erratic scribbling reads as arrhythmic) and the register *glide* (currently continuous тАФ try quantized scale steps); deepen with a **left-hand "dynamics" channel** (a second pointer/touch) and a beat-pattern classifier (2/3/4-beat gestures). **Its downbeat-from-gestureтЖТtempo is a reusable primitive** for any gesture-timed piece.

### `1122-mantra-melt` (typed-text INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D kinetic-typography ┬╖ warm paper-white ┬╖ semantic-satiation meditative) тАФ `queued`, resurrect when the cross-modal/conceptual lane is due
**One question:** what if you typed a word and repeated it until тАФ like a mantra chanted too many times тАФ its *meaning dissolved and only pure sound and light remained*? **What it does:** typed text is a **genuinely fresh input for the lab** (keyboard-as-musical-driver; 1107 was MIDI *notes*, not typed language). Each letterтЖТpitch on a **JI major-pentatonic** across two octaves (root D3 146.83 Hz; ratios `1,9/8,5/4,3/2,5/3,2,9/4,5/2,3,10/3`); vowels are *sung* on stable low chord tones (additive partials), consonants are a short pitched body + a bandpass-filtered noise "breath," spaces are rests тАФ so any typed string is consonant. **The core mechanism тАФ semantic satiation:** repeating the motif advances `s` 0тЖТ1 (~`1/9` per repetition; meaning-meter = `(1тИТs)┬╖100%`); as `s` rises, consonant breathтЖТ0 and attack softens, vowels stretch (0.55тЖТ2.2 s) and dull toward pure sine + spawn granular detuned grains, whole-motif detune spreads to ┬▒55┬в, pan smears, and the `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed swells up under it тАФ the *word audibly melts into a warm drone*. Visually a rotating **kinetic-typography mandala** on warm paper stays crisp at full meaning and, as legibility drains, letters drift/rotate/overlap and multiply into a mirrored symmetric bloom of glowing ink-strokes with lengthening trails. Deterministic default mantra ("mantra") types itself in and melts on a virtual clock for the cold glance. **Palette:** warm paper-white / luminous ink (illuminated manuscript meets light-field) тАФ NOT the banned dark "dissolve-the-void" trope (the melt here is *linguistic/semantic*, warm). Refs: **semantic satiation / "verbal satiation"** (Jakobovits & Lambert, 1961тАУ62); **mantra / japa** repetition. **Ambition:** #1 (semantic-satiation-as-a-sound-mechanic, grep-fresh; typed-text input ~0├Ч) + #2 (letterтЖТpitch mapper + vowel/consonant synth + satiation state machine + droneBank + kinetic-typography renderer) + #3 (Jakobovits; japa). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban:** typed-text INPUT (not tap), Canvas2D typography OUTPUT (not GPU-shader/field-sim), warm paper PALETTE (not black-void), calm cosmic-ambient pole. **Why banked, not shipped:** the most conceptually *original* of the three, but the **least embodied** (keyboard, not the body) and hardest to verify, and the letterтЖТpitch map is an admitted aesthetic invention (not phonetics) тАФ so it lost to 1121's real named mechanism + triple jury-alignment. **Deepen:** a real **phonemeтЖТformant** model (so the melt is genuine speech decomposing, not a letter-cipher); a "meaning restored" reverse-satiation on a fresh word; type a whole line тЖТ a slow chant that satiates phrase-by-phrase.

### тнР TOP resurrect тАФ `1118-exhale-reeds` (breath INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D sumi-e ┬╖ cosmic-ambient calm) тАФ `queued`, resurrect next
**One question:** what if you played a whole field of reeds with your *breath alone* тАФ not your voice, your actual exhale тАФ and a garden of wind-voices bent and sang in the direction and force of your breath? **Why it's strong / the freshest-TECHNIQUE origin of the fire:** the same **spectral-flatness breath-vs-voice discriminator** the shipped 1119 carries тАФ `breath.ts` gates a band-energy envelope by spectral flatness (geo/arith mean of the power spectrum over ~200 HzтАУ8 kHz) so a *broadband exhale* drives it while a sustained hum/whistle/sung note at equal loudness is heavily attenuated (a genuine breath-vs-voice discriminator, not a level meter or pitch tracker тАФ grep-fresh; breath *input* is not a lab-first (1020/1067/1109-banked) but this discriminator is). **Its distinct build:** a bank of **9 high-Q band-pass "wind voices"** (JI major-pentatonic ratios 1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3 over ~C3, ~2 octaves) + octave partial + a short feedback `DelayNode` (Karplus-Strong-ish comb) for breathy pitched shimmer, stereo-spread, over a low-passed wind drone bed тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; breath drive opens gains/brightens Q, breath centroid biases WHICH reeds bloom; shared `AnalyserNode` fed by mic OR a deterministic seeded `mulberry32` "breeze" so it's never blank/silent. **Palette:** warm daylight **sumi-e / rice-paper** тАФ cream `#f3ebd8` paper with seeded grain, ~46 ink-green/umber bezier reeds bending to wind force+direction, standing-wave shimmer + gold tip-bloom on singing reeds, low gold sun; `prefers-reduced-motion` settles it. Refs: **Aeolian harp**, shakuhachi *ro-buki* breath-tone, Ronald van der Meijs' aeolian nylon-string+resonance-tube installations, Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*, Alvin Lucier. **Ambition:** #1 (spectral-flatness breath discriminator, grep-fresh) + #2 (breath detector + 9-voice band-pass/KS-comb bank + wind drone bed + Canvas2D reed field = 4) + #3 (named refs). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban:** breath INPUT (not tap), Canvas2D OUTPUT (not GPU-shader/field-sim), warm rice-paper PALETTE (not black-void), calm cosmic-ambient pole. **Why banked (NOT quality тАФ it's build-complete + clean + the queued тнР from cycle 638):** the DEEP fire ships one, and the **ambition axis** decided it тАФ 1119's long-form generative-growth-with-**memory/evolution** lands the categorical-diversity menu's *thin* "long-form generative (state, memory, evolution тАФ not loops)" lane and is the bigger/more-surprising concept, whereas 1118 is the more atmospheric/loop-ish (if lovelier) wind-choir. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ┬з639 тАФ needs only a live-mic pass to tune `FLATNESS_FLOOR_*` + the energy-dB mapping + comb loudness against a real exhale; deepen with formant/vowel тЖТ which reeds bloom, and a "wind memory" that keeps a bent reed ringing after the breath stops. **Also fold its reed-voice band-pass timbre + sumi-e ink rendering into 1119 as a cycle-2 alternate voice-bank/skin (per the DEEP-mode graft).**

### `1117-tide-drone` (live external-data INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D loom ┬╖ cosmic-ambient oceanic) тАФ `queued`, resurrect once the data-sonification lane cools
**One question:** what if the ocean's real tides were the score тАФ live tide + harmonic-constituent data from a coastal station driving a slow beating drone built from the *genuine* tidal constituents, woven into a tidal-flat loom you watch breathe? **What it does:** `data.ts` fetches NOAA CO-OPS `mdapi` harmonic constituents + `datagetter` predictions client-side (4 s `AbortController` each, CORS-open, no key), with the canonical M2/S2/N2/K1/O1 table + `tideHeightAt` (Kelvin's harmonic sum) + a deterministic simulated-tide fallback (mulberry32) тЖТ always-visible `тЧП LIVE ┬╖ NOAA` / `тЧП simulated` badge. `audio.ts` = **additive synthesis from the tidal constituents** (each becomes a detuned beating sine partial whose amplitude comes from the station's real harmonic data), tide-heightтЖТlowpass, tidal-flowтЖТtremolo, through a limiter. Canvas2D warp/weft **loom** over a warm teal-water / sand / dusk-amber tidal flat whose water line breathes with the live tide; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows it; 3-station picker. Refs: **Lord Kelvin's tide-predicting machine** (mechanical harmonic synthesis тАФ the direct ancestor of the additive synth), Jana Winderen ocean sound art, the overview-effect/oceanic-boundlessness pole. **Ambition:** #2 (live fetch/parse + tidal-constituent additive synth + Canvas2D loom + fallback) + #3 (Kelvin/Winderen) + #5 (RESEARCH ┬з638). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban** (external-data INPUT, Canvas2D OUTPUT, teal-sand PALETTE, cosmic-ambient pole). **Why banked, not shipped:** it is the **third real-world-data-sonification in a short window** (1084 aurora тЖТ 1110 Schumann тЖТ this) тАФ the exact category-convergence the jury warns of тАФ so hold it until the data-sonification lane cools, OR resurrect it paired with a fresher output than another Canvas2D. **Deepen:** add a second NDBC buoy wave-period feed to drive the weft/shimmer independently (the builder flagged this as next-cycle); a day/night tide-clock; multiple stations beating against each other (a coastline as a chord).

- **тнР `1102-chromatic-organ` (TOP resurrect тАФ serves Karel-the-pianist + live-performance directly).** A live **chromesthesia color-organ**: you play notes (Web MIDI keyboard OR computer-keyboard `A S D F G H J K` + `W E T Y U`, `Z`/`X` octave; idle generative arpeggio so it plays hands-free) and each pitch drives a Kl├╝ver **form-constant** (tunnel/spoke/spiral/honeycomb) rendered through the log-polar cortical warp (reuses `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts`'s `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`), tinted by a Scriabin pitchтЖТhue table; **polyphony superimposes plane-waves that interfere into moir├й lattices**, velocity тЖТ intensity, sustained notes leave a ping-pong feedback afterglow. One note event drives BOTH a 2-op FM voice AND a shader plane-wave so sight and sound can't diverge; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Raw-WebGL2. `state: DMT/LSD geometric form-constant emergence ┬╖ pole: intense-hypnotic`. Named refs: **Scriabin *Prometheus* / clavier ├а lumi├иres**; ErmentroutтАУCowan / Kl├╝ver form constants. Ambition ~3/5 (**MIDI is NOT a lab-first тАФ do not claim it**; the fresh coupling is chromesthesiaтЖТform-constant) тЖТ #2 тЙе3 subsystems (MIDI/keyboard input + WebGL2 log-polar render + FM synth + chromesthesia mapping = 4) + #3 named ref + #5 soft. Files were `page.tsx`+`renderer.ts`+`audio.ts`+`chromesthesia.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-632/1102-chromatic-organ/`. **Why banked:** de-selected on **freshness**, not quality (build-complete, clean, reuses the shared kit well) тАФ its note-driven log-polar warp sits close to the jury's flagged *decorative* form-constant warp (collapsed to 1├Ч by the 2026-07-01 jury) and `1098-cortical-bloom` (cycle 630) just did form-constants; shipping it risked re-treading that lane. **Resurrect when:** the lab wants a *playable instrument* / live-performance piece and form-constants have rested тАФ pitch it as the pianist's color-organ (it's the most Karel-serving idea in the batch). Deepen: quantize chords тЖТ let a detected chord select the form-constant *class* (major=honeycomb, etc.), add a MIDI-CC morph, and a real-hardware MIDI pass.
- **`1104-two-ears` тАФ the music that exists only in your head (Deutsch dichotic illusions).** An **audio-first** instrument on Diana Deutsch's dichotic musical illusions: strict per-ear routing (`ChannelMergerNode(2)`, input 0тЖТLEFT bus, input 1тЖТRIGHT bus, each a GainNode тЖТ limiter) presents a *different* physical tone stream to each ear so most listeners perceive a phantom third in neither channel. Implements the **octave illusion** (400/800 Hz alternating in antiphase across ears, ~4/s), the **scale illusion** (C-major split zig-zag between ears), and the **tritone paradox** (diotic Shepard-pairs, listener-dependent up/down); pure sines w/ raised-cosine ramps; **ear-swap** toggle (percept depends on handedness/ear-dominance) + a **Both/Left-only/Right-only reveal** that ramps a bus to zero to collapse the trick; a live Canvas diagram scrolls three lanes (physical-L, physical-R, perceived-phantom) with a playhead; autonomous 14s illusion cycle so it plays hands-free; prominent `text-amber-300` **"ЁЯОз headphones required"** advisory. `state: auditory illusion / the music only in the mind ┬╖ pole: eerie-liminal/uncanny`. Named refs: **Diana Deutsch** тАФ octave illusion (1974), scale illusion, tritone paradox; *Musical Illusions and Phantom Words* (2019). Ambition ~3/5 (#1 dichotic/octave/scale/tritone is **grep-0├Ч in the lab** тАФ the sound is generated in the listener, not the signal ┬╖ #3 named ref ┬╖ audio-first output; borderline #2 тАФ routing + illusion engine + diagram тЙИ 3 subsystems). Files were `page.tsx`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-632/1104-two-ears/`. **Why banked:** lowest ambition + audio-first was already 3├Ч in the recent window (not banned, but rested); the "perceived" diagram track is an illustrative right-hander model, not a measurement. **Resurrect when:** the lane wants an audio-first / headphone / eyes-closed piece тАФ it's genuinely fresh and needs only a live ear pass to tune the illusions; consider adding **phantom words** + the **speech-to-song** illusion for a fuller Deutsch suite.

## ┬з631 banked seed тАФ 2026-07-02 (cycle 631 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **DEEP** тАФ 2 parallel approaches to one concept; shipped `1101-time-dissolve` (temporal dissolution). The non-winner below was **built complete** by a parallel builder + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0 + folder-eslint clean, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. Grounded in RESEARCH ┬з631.)

- **`1100-sourceless` тАФ the sound with no place (HRTF spatial de-localization).** The **spatial** sibling of the shipped temporal-dissolution piece: an **audio-first** dissociative void where 8 Web Audio `PannerNode`s (`panningModel:"HRTF"`) each carry one just-intonation partial and wander on their own deterministic (fixed-seed LCG, no runtime `Math.random`) **Lissajous** orbit, so with headphones every voice has a real directional cue but the *sum* never has a stable location тАФ the sound comes from everywhere and nowhere and "melts into the surroundings" (ketamine derealization / body-schema dissolution). Under it: a non-spatial JI drone bed + a slow downward Shepard, all through the shared `createVoidReverb` + a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. You turn your **virtual head** untethered via `AudioListener` orientation (pointer-drag or `deviceorientation` tilt; passive slow-sine drift if untouched тАФ no fixed up-vector). Same **desync + "Re-bind" A/B** core as the winner: motes are drawn ~550ms in the past + a fixed spatial offset + a lagged head-turn (violet-void tint), and Re-bind collapses all three to zero (emerald tint) so you feel the binding snap on/off. `state: ketamine spatial-dissociation / source de-localization ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient тЖТ dissociative`. Named refs: Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*; ketamine ego-dissolution (Frontiers 2017); **inverts** the 2026 spatial-A/V-*sync* frontier (SpatialV2A arXiv:2601.15017, ViSAudio arXiv:2512.03036). Ambition ~4/5 (#1 desync/binding-break engine grep-0├Ч ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems: 8-source HRTF field + drone + Shepard + void reverb + desync controller ┬╖ #3 named ref ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з631). Files were `page.tsx`+`audio.ts`+`sources.ts`+`scene.ts`+`README.md`. **Why banked:** de-selected NOT on quality (build-complete, clean, well-degraded) but because its **HRTF-ring + Shepard-descent substrate overlaps the shipped `1090-threshold-descent`** (the jury's #2 "grep the substrate before you claim a lab-first" discipline тАФ cf. the 1069=1084 duplicate) тАФ so the temporal sibling was the more differentiated ship. **Resurrect: sharpen it AWAY from 1090 first** тАФ give sources **broadband-grain / filtered-noise** carriers (pure sines localize weakly under HRTF, so the *loss* of place is felt more through the desync than through crisp placement being taken away); add a **continuous 0тЖТ1.5s desync slider** (find each listener's personal binding-breaks-here threshold) instead of a binary toggle; lag the **audio** source positions too (not just the visual), or add Doppler, so the space itself comes unglued; absolute-heading compass mode on mobile. Then it's a distinct, strong audio-first ship.
