## ┬з630 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-02 (cycle 630 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers across 3 distinct outputs, shipped `1098-cortical-bloom` (the WebGPU-compute neural-field form-constant engine). The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0 + folder-eslint clean, then `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-630/` and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1099.** Both dodge every 2026-07-01 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ┬з630 / ┬з628.)

- **тнР `1097-resonant-drift` (TOP resurrect тАФ the space IS the instrument).** The ┬з628 concept, now built a second time and lost only on ambition/jury-alignment to the WebGPU neural field. Raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader raymarch of an endless, slowly-morphing resonant corridor (SDF tube around a serpentine spine); you drift forward (autonomous + arrow/W-S keyboard, no pointer-drag). The KEY IDEA тАФ **grep-0├Ч in the lab**: a single `radiusAt(z,t)` (the corridor's local cavity radius) is used by BOTH the shader (to carve + tint the tube тАФ amber throat тЖТ cyan/violet chamber) AND the audio engine, driving a **dynamic convolution reverb** (two crossfading ConvolverNodes, IR rebuilt ~3├Ч/sec, decay тИЭ radius) + a **modal "tube singer"** bandpass at the cavity eigenfrequency (тИЭ 1/radius, Q тЖС as the throat narrows) тАФ a narrow throat chokes the drone into a tight pitched-and-dry resonance, a vast chamber blooms it into a long cathedral tail. `state: NDE tunnel / meditative-boundless ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`. Named ref: **Sonic4D** (arXiv:2506.15759, June 2026 тАФ this *inverts* it: the space is the sound-shaping apparatus, not decorated by sound). Ambition ~4/5 (#1 cross-modal geometryтЖТreverb grep-0 ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems: SDF raymarch + dynamic convolution + modal waveguide + keyboard-drift ┬╖ #3 named ref ┬╖ #5 ┬з628). This build's files: `page.tsx`+`shaders.ts`+`tunnel.ts` (`radiusAt` + `GLSL_TUNNEL` generated from the same constants so sight/sound can't diverge)+`audio.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-630/1097-resonant-drift/`. **Why banked (again):** de-selected on ambition + the jury's explicit WebGPU-want, NOT on quality тАФ it's build-complete, clean, and **love-aligned** (closest to the loved `148-spatial-palette`тЭдя╕П / GPU-field-spatial cluster). **Resurrect: ready as-is;** the only open question is a live ear pass on whether the throatтЖТtube resonance reads (main-thread IR rebuild is throttled + crossfaded but can hitch on low-end machines тАФ a Worker/OfflineAudioContext IR bake is the obvious next hardening).
- **`1099-third-sound` тАФ the voice generated in your own ear (combination tones).** An **audio-first** sustained just-intonation drone built around **Tartini / difference tones**: two loud pure sines fтВБ,fтВВ make the ear's nonlinearity manufacture *audible* phantom partials that are NOT in the signal тАФ the difference tone fтВВтИТfтВБ, the cubic combination tones 2fтВБтИТfтВВ / 2fтВВтИТfтВБ, the summation tone fтВБ+fтВВ. Interval buttons/sliders + a root dial let you play the phantom chord; the central **"reveal the phantom" A/B toggle** places a faint real sine at exactly fтВВтИТfтВБ so a musician can confirm the pitch they were hearing in-ear was real (hiding it again is the truer state тАФ that A/B is the "huh"). Sines-only (harmonic-rich tones mask the phantom), soft limiter, loudness/headphones advisory. Visual (secondary, diagrammatic): a Canvas2D **Lissajous** phase portrait that locks into a still knot at simple JI ratios and tumbles at complex ones (you SEE consonance) + a log-freq spectral ladder drawing the real partials solid and the combination tones as dashed ghosts (a diagram of tones an FFT of the signal can't contain тАФ the poetic point). `state: meditative overtone drone / sensory-immersive threshold ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient тЖТ meditative`. Named refs: **Giuseppe Tartini's *terzo suono*** (~1714); **Helmholtz**, *On the Sensations of Tone*; **La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela, *Dream House*** (sustained-JI sine environment where difference tones become the music); overtone/throat-singing. Ambition ~3/5 (#1 first psychoacoustic combination-tone instrument in the lab тАФ the sound is generated in the listener, not the signal тАФ grep-0├Ч ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ audio-first fresh output; borderline #2 тАФ the diagrammatic canvas keeps it to ~3 subsystems). Files: `page.tsx`+`audio.ts`+`intervals.ts`+`scope.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-630/1099-third-sound/`. **Why banked:** lowest ambition of the three + thematically adjacent to the just-shipped 1096 (phantom perception, though a different mechanism тАФ ear-nonlinearity vs stochastic resonance). **Resurrect:** ship standalone when the lane wants an audio-first / meditative-drone piece; or graft the difference-tone reveal into a sustained-drone piece for a richer overtone instrument.

The KEY IDEA тАФ **grep-0├Ч in the lab**: the tunnel's local cavity radius *at the listener's position* drives a **dynamic convolution reverb** (a ConvolverNode whose impulse response is regenerated ~4├Ч/sec as the cavity swells/chokes) + a **modal "tube singer"** bandpass at the cavity eigenfrequency (тИЭ 1/radius, Q rising as the throat narrows), so a narrow throat chokes the drone into a tight pitched resonance and a vast chamber blooms into a cathedral tail. - **`1094-dither-veil` тАФ ordered dithering as a psychedelic engine.** Raw-WebGL2 full-screen fragment shader: domain-warped fbm (IQ triple-warp) crushed through a hand-coded **8├Ч8 Bayer ordered-dither** matrix to 2тАУ4 luminance levels, so smooth gradients shatter into a boiling 1-bit stipple that swims/reorganizes into moving moir├й тАФ the closed-eye/hypnagogic entoptic grain. Mic (analysis-only) amplitude тЖТ warp speed + boil rate + RGB fringe; spectral centroid тЖТ cyan/magenta tint; autonomous LFO fallback when mic denied. Audio: low JI oscillator cluster + slow filtered-noise wash, tremolo locked to the visual boil rate. **Ordered/Bayer dithering is grep-0├Ч in the lab.** `state: hypnagogia / closed-eye entoptic grain ┬╖ pole: intense` (grain, NOT strobe тАФ mean brightness held ~constant, boil clamped тЙд3 Hz, reduced-motion aware). Named refs: **ASTRODITHER** (Robert Borghesi), Bridget Riley / Ryoji Ikeda op-art, IQ domain-warping. Ambition ~3/5 (#1 ordered-dither grep-0 + #3 named ref + #5 ┬з628; borderline #2 тАФ it's essentially shader+drone, the 2-subsystem shape). Files existed: `page.tsx`+`shader.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`. **Why banked:** lowest ambition of the three + the "pretty shader + drone" shape the mandate warns against тАФ but the **dither aesthetic itself is genuinely new to the lab** and worth resurrecting **paired with a stronger substrate** (e.g. dither the Chladni field of 1095, or a hand-tracked op-art surface) so it clears the ambition floor on subsystems too.

- **тнР `1091-filament-bridge` (RESURRECT тАФ the WebGPU-compute sibling of the shipped cycle-3 merge; resurrect for a live GPU pass, or once raw-WebGL2 has had its turn and WebGPU-compute has cooled):** identical concept to the shipped `1092-filament-lattice` тАФ the cosmic-web cycle-3 graph MERGE тАФ but implemented over **1089's exact WGSL WebGPU-compute spine** (atomic i32 ping-pong trail buffers, two-species agent/diffuse/render/reduce passes) instead of raw-WebGL2 fragment shaders. Keeps 1089's Jones two-species Physarum + radial-ray **degree** + gravitational accretion, and adds the same three new subsystems the winner has: (1) **adjacency-edge extraction** (sample the trail field along each node-pair segment, coverage тЙе60% above a ridge threshold = an edge, smoothed + hysteresis-gated so flicker can't spam events); (2) the extracted edges **drawn** as glowing lines on a transparent Canvas2D overlay above the compute canvas (new edges flash white ~1s, woven nodes get a warm clustering ring тАФ closes the seeтЖТhear loop); (3) the graph **sonified** тАФ edge **interval dyads** between endpoint pitches + a bright FM "connection formed" chime per new edge, **local clustering coefficient** тЖТ chord density/brightness (woven node = fuller/brighter, lonely bridge node = thin fundamental), and the accretion **awe crescendo**. Built complete this fire (`page.tsx`+`physarum.ts`+`gpu.ts`+`audio.ts`+`notes.ts`+`README.md`; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` 0 + scoped eslint 0; `any` confined to a minimal `navigator.gpu` shim behind one eslint-disable; its reduce uses a block-max at 128┬▓ so thin filaments survive downsampling for edge sampling). **Why banked not shipped:** both siblings cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-01 ban; the raw-WebGL2 `1092` won on (a) **output diversity тАФ the whole point of this two-output DEEP fire** тАФ raw-WebGL2 is jury #1's actively-wanted output and only 1├Ч in the window (1085), whereas shipping the WebGPU-compute `1091` would be the **3rd WebGPU-compute in the last 4 fires** (after 1086+1089), the exact monoculture the jury warns of; and (b) **stronger headless verification** тАФ the `1092` builder ran a real `tsx` harness against its live `physarum.ts`+`graph.ts` and confirmed the edge/clustering math numerically (a 3-node cluster тЖТ 3 edges, coverage 1.0, clustering 1.0), while `1091` could only *reason* its `EDGE_RIDGE=0.85`/`coverageтЙе0.6` thresholds from 1089's working 0.9 degree threshold, not confirm edge-formation timing. **Resurrect when:** a fire can bless a live GPU pass (its WGSL edge-sampling readback timing is the un-tuned part), OR as the honest cycle-4 that unifies both render paths. Files at `/tmp/dream-losers-627/1091-filament-bridge/`. Named refs carried: Jones 2010; Codis/Pogosyan/Pichon 2018 (arXiv:1803.11477, cosmic-web connectivity тАФ degree/clustering); arXiv:2510.10286 (Oct 2025, neuronтЖФcosmos graph parallels); Euclid Q1 DR XXXV (A&A 2026, arXiv:2503.15332). ## ┬з626 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-01 (cycle 626 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers across 3 DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT targets; shipped `1090-threshold-descent` (audio-first/SVG тАФ the lab's least-repeated output, the directest answer to "too similar"). - **тнР `1092-liquid-melt` (RESURRECT тАФ TOP resurrect; strongest engineering of the fire):** "What if your VOICE could melt the world into fluid?" A genuine **Jos Stam stable-fluids NavierтАУStokes** solver тАФ semi-Lagrangian advection, vorticity confinement, divergence + Jacobi pressure-solve (20тАУ40 iters) + gradient-subtract projection, dye advection тАФ implemented on **BOTH** a WebGPU-compute path (six WGSL passes over ping-pong `rg32float`/`rgba16float` storage textures, fullscreen-quad render, downsampled dye+velocity readback) AND a true CPU/Canvas2D fallback running the identical algorithm (with `тЧП GPU`/`тЧП CPU` badge). The mic (AnalyserNode тАФ RMS level + spectral centroid, analyse-only, no playback) injects dye+force positionally into the fluid; a throttled fluid-stats readback (mean speed/vorticity) drives a shared JI drone-bank's brightness + a pad glide **back** into the sound тАФ a closed **micтЖТfluidтЖТaudio** loop. DMT/psilocybin surface-liquefaction, iridescent oily palette, autonomous wandering injection so it melts within ~2s with zero permissions. Built complete this fire (`page.tsx`+`gpu.ts`+`fluid.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`; `tsc`/eslint clean; `any` confined to the minimal `navigator.gpu` shim behind one eslint-disable). **Why banked not shipped:** (1) the GPU-fluid *substrate is NOT a lab-first* тАФ `15-webgpu-fluid` and `3-fluid` already exist (the grep-first discipline; its genuine 0├Ч novelty is the closed micтЖТfluidтЖТaudio feedback loop + the melt framing, not the solver); (2) shipping it would be the **4th WebGPU-compute in the 15-window / 3rd in a row** (after 1086-lenia + 1089-cosmic-connectome) тАФ the exact output-monoculture the 2026-07-01 jury warns of ("the render target keeps sliding one seat over"). **Resurrect when:** WebGPU-compute has cooled for a fire or two, OR a fire can bless a live GPU/mic verification pass (the feedback-loop *feel* is the un-verified part). Files at `/tmp/dream-losers-626/1092-liquid-melt/`. Named refs: Stam "Stable Fluids" (SIGGRAPH 1999) + "Real-Time Fluid Dynamics for Games" (2003); Fedkiw/Stam vorticity confinement; kishimisu WebGPU-fluid + Codrops 2025 + 80.lv MLS-MPM 2025 (the fresh WebGPU-fluid frontier). Tags: mic INPUT ┬╖ WebGPU-compute (+ CPU fallback) OUTPUT ┬╖ Stam NavierтАУStokes + vorticity + closed audio-feedback TECHNIQUE ┬╖ DMT liquid-melt intense VIBE.

- **тнР `1091-fourth-turn` (RESURRECT тАФ the raw-WebGL2 "hear the invisible rotation" sibling; reframe honestly as cycle-N of the 1042/1051 4D thread):** "What if you could HEAR a rotation you cannot see?" A real 4D polytope (tesseract / 16-cell / 24-cell тАФ **verified** edge counts 32 / 24 / 96 asserted at load via `verifyGeometry()`) tumbling through **six independent rotation planes** (XY, XZ, YZ visible + XW, YW, ZW "impossible"), projected RтБ┤тЖТR┬│тЖТR┬▓ and drawn in **raw WebGL2** as additive glowing edge-quads with an RGBA16F ping-pong afterglow trail. Each plane's smoothed angular speed swells **one of six just-intonation voices** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8 over ~110 Hz); the three W-plane voices sit an octave up with detune + shimmer LFO тАФ so when you spin up a W-plane its 2D shadow barely moves but you HEAR the impossible turn. Input: auto-tumble + keys 1тАУ6 (hold to spin a plane) + arrows (W-planes) + device-tilt; no pointer-drag. ## ┬з625 banked seed тАФ 2026-07-01 (cycle 625 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ **DEEP** cycle-2 of `1066-cosmic-web` тАФ 2 parallel graph-extraction approaches to ONE concept ("the cosmic web's connectivity as the instrument"); shipped `1089-cosmic-connectome` (the radial ray-count degree take тАФ the truer Euclid-2026 connectivity statistic + continuous voicing that's robust headless). The non-winner below was **built complete** by a parallel builder + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0 + folder-eslint clean, then `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-625/` and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1091.**)

- **тнР `1090-web-weaver` (RESURRECT тАФ the adjacency-graph + edge-event sibling; it is literally the winner's own README next-step #2, "true edge graph"):** cycle-2/3 of the cosmic-web thread via a *different* graph-extraction method than the shipped 1089. Where 1089 counts filaments radiating from each node (radial rays тЖТ degree), 1090 builds an **actual node-edge graph**: for every pair of seeded wells within range, sample the trail field along the segment between them; if a sustained above-threshold filament bridges them, record an **edge**; from the edge set compute each node's true graph degree тЖТ the same JI degreeтЖТchord voicing. Two things 1089 lacks and this does better: (1) it **draws the extracted edges as glowing lines over the slime**, so the reviewer literally *sees* the graph the sound is reading (closes the seeтЖТhear loop); (2) it rings a bright FM **"connection formed" chime** the instant a filament first bridges two nodes (a discrete, satisfying musical event; edges use rising-edge memory so a one-frame flicker doesn't spam). Plus the same gravitational accretion/merge. Built complete this fire (WebGPU-compute primary + true CPU/Canvas2D fallback, `graph.ts` doing adjacency + degree + edge-events + softened-gravity accretion; self-contained `audio.ts`; `tsc`/eslint clean). **Why banked not shipped:** its per-node chord + link chimes depend on the edge-detection thresholds (`ridgeThreshold`/`minCoverage`) actually firing, and on the GPU path the coarse (128┬▓/96┬▓) area-averaged readback can dilute thin filaments тАФ un-tunable without a live browser, so it risks going event-silent at the 06:30 glance; 1089's continuous degree voicing always sings. **Resurrect when:** a fire can bless a live GPU/audio tuning pass, OR as a genuine **cycle-3** that *merges* the two тАФ draw 1090's adjacency edges (which nodes connect) on top of 1089's truer radial degree (how many filaments), voicing shared edges as interval dyads between endpoint pitches (1089 README next-step #2). Files preserved at `/tmp/dream-losers-625/1090-web-weaver/`. Named refs carried: Jones 2010; Euclid Q1 DR XXXV (A&A 2026/07); Elek/Burchett UCSC 2020. Tags: discrete-tap-seed + autonomous-accretion INPUT ┬╖ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT ┬╖ adjacency-graph-extraction + edge-events + accretion TECHNIQUE ┬╖ cosmic-webтЖТawe VIBE.

### `1071-tremor-core` тАФ `queued` тнР (the EGOCENTRIC "you are suspended at Earth's core in a black void, and every quake arrives as an HRTF strike out of the dark from its true bearing/depth" тАФ the purest NDE-void framing, the more *surprising* of the two siblings, and the one that nails the owed dark pole hardest)
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the dark NDE / presence-in-the-void pole; pick it when you want the listener *inside* the dark, surrounded, with events arriving from nowhere, rather than watching a globe from outside.** `state: NDE void / presence-in-the-dark ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient-dark (intense-adjacent)`. **INPUT** live USGS earthquake GeoJSON (`all_hour`тЖТ`all_day`, 5 s AbortController, synthetic Ring-of-Fire fallback, emerald/amber badge); ~36 s time-sorted replay of the last hour then 60 s polling for new ids. **OUTPUT** a near-black three.js void: the camera IS the listener at origin, ~1400 dim drifting motes for parallax, and each quake spawns an additive "presence" light (up to ~96) at its true 3D bearing (depthтЖТhue, all DIM), with a slow auto-drifting gaze тАФ NOT a globe, NOT a center-out bloom. **AUDIO** per-quake HRTF strike: longitudeтЖТazimuth, latitudeтЖТelevation, depthтЖТdistance (deep = far + quiet), magтЖТinverse-pitch+loudness+decay, depthтЖТtimbre; routed through `PannerNode(panningModel:"HRTF")` тЖТ shared `createVoidReverb` (~9 s cavern) over a very-low `startDroneBank` (root ~33), masterтЖТcompressorтЖТdestination; ~14-voice cap, 120 ms spacing. **Why it's promising:** the egocentric "inside the void, surrounded" framing is the more literal NDE phenomenology (the owed dark pole), more *surprising* than a data-globe, and aligns with Karel's loved *spatial-presence* cluster (`148-spatial-palette`тЭдя╕П / `107-ocean-presence`тЭдя╕П). **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor + dodged every ban + are genuine spatial instruments, but `1070`'s rotating globe + rings-at-true-location give an immediately legible, moving visual at 06:30 *without headphones* (the more headless-verifiable sibling, denting the jury's #1 verification-debt liability), whereas `1071`'s intentionally near-black void + headphone-dependent HRTF bearing is the *least* legible on a phone glance. **To resurrect:** rebuild from this brief, ideally with **head-tracking** (device-orientation / WebXR) so you can physically turn toward a strike тАФ the device-only payoff that justified deferring it тАФ plus a whispered place-name from the strike's bearing and depth-banded reverb. Named refs: "Echoes of the Land" (arXiv:2507.14947, 2025); ambisonic seismic sonification ("make the Earth audible"); NDE/void phenomenology. Camera *rolls* (accelerating with drive) instead of strobing тАФ тЙд3 Hz. **Why it's promising:** discrete spinning polyhedra read more literally as "geometric beings / entity contact" (the DMT phenomenology) than a dust-field does, and `InstancedMesh` is the lab's fresher output form. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor + dodged every ban + are genuine embodied instruments, but 1068's luminous point-field sits in Karel's loved cluster (particle fields), reads as the more enveloping "more directions than there should be," and is GPU-scalable toward the ~1M-particle Osaka frontier the research cites тАФ whereas 1069 is CPU-`setMatrixAt`-bound at ~7,500 instances (its own README's deepening is "push onto GPU toward the million-particle frontier"). **To resurrect:** rebuild from this brief, but push the per-instance matrix+color update onto the GPU (WebGPU compute / instanced shader attributes) so it can scale to tens/hundreds of thousands of beings, AND add **emergent flocking between the symmetry copies** so the geometric beings appear to regard + respond to one another (true entity-contact) + a breakthrough threshold where the camera passes *through* the swarm. Named refs: "Waves of Connection" (Osaka Expo 2025); Graham St John, *DMT Hyperspace* (2018); Kl├╝ver form-constants; Shepard / Risset. The fresh axis vs the shipped 1065 is the substrate: a 2D digital-waveguide mesh / FDTD wave-equation field instead of a mass-spring lattice.** *"The sound you hear is the skin you touch тАФ one 2D waveguide-mesh surface, read as both light and voice."* `state: salvia / DMT membrane-reality ┬╖ pole: intense`. **INPUT** multi-touch / mouse strike-stroke-flick + a labelled tension slider (retunes the membrane). **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** field of the vibrating surface тАФ deep indigo at rest, displacement magnitude тЖТ iridescent cyanтЖТmagentaтЖТgold, additive `lighter` bloom rings radiating from each strike, trail wash. **TECHNIQUE** an 84├Ч84 circular-masked **2D digital-waveguide mesh / FDTD** (`mesh.ts`): 5-point Laplacian leapfrog update `u_next = (╬г4-neighbours)/2 тИТ u_prev`, scaled by a tensionтЖТCourant coefficient clamped to `C┬▓тИИ[0.18,0.49]` (strictly under the 2D CFL 0.5 ceiling) + a dissipative `DAMP<1` + per-sample `[тИТ4,4]` clamp + NaN-scrub тЖТ unconditionally stable under minutes of hard striking; strike = localized Gaussian impulse, stroke = path energy injection, flick = directional traveling wave, faint autonomous breathing when idle; strike position selects which standing modes light up (timbre, not just loudness). **AUDIO** the builder chose **approach (b)** тАФ a modal resonator bank tuned to the membrane's Bessel-zero ratios, fundamental from the tension param (pentatonic-minor quantized), excited by `|sin(mтВУ╧Аx)┬╖sin(mс╡з╧Аy)|`-weighted strikes тЖТ master lowpass opening on surface energy тЖТ reverb тЖТ limiter. **Why it's promising:** the wavefront visual is distinct and gorgeous (you SEE the ripples cross and interfere), and positionтЖТtimbre makes it feel like a real drumhead. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor and are fully-verifiable Canvas2D membranes, but 1065 is the literal 4-cycle-deferred тнРRESURRECT-FIRST with the more visceral press-pull-**TEAR** gesture (rupture rims = the salvia membrane-reality the brief asks for), whereas 1066's headline novelty тАФ "the audio is the *literal* per-sample surface" тАФ collapsed when it fell back to a modal bank (approach b), making its voice similar to 1065's, and its design-notes link points at a non-served `/README.md` route. **To resurrect:** ship with the **AudioWorklet streaming path (approach a)** тАФ run the (decimated) wave step at audio rate, read one listening node as the output sample stream тАФ so the audio is genuinely the membrane's own vibration (THEN it's a real lab-first); fix the README link to an in-page notes toggle like 1065's; verify the strikeтЖТrippleтЖТring coupling by eye + ear on a device. Named refs: Scott A. Van Duyne & Julius O. Smith III, *The 2-D Digital Waveguide Mesh* (IEEE WASPAA / CCRMA, 1993); Stefan Bilbao, *Numerical Sound Synthesis* (FDTD membranes/plates, 2009). ### `1065-skin-membrane` тЬЕ SHIPPED cycle 608 (was тнРRESURRECT-FIRST, deferred 4 cycles) тАФ `demoable`
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the INTENSE pole (last several ships were cosmic-ambient тАФ intense is owed); and the single easiest piece to hand-verify in the whole lab (mouse + Canvas2D, zero permissions, runtime-checked stable over 600 frames) тАФ pick it specifically to dent the jury's standing #1 verification-debt liability or to swing the pole back to intense.** *"Press, pull, and TEAR a living skin of sound with your hands."* `state: salvia / DMT membrane-reality ┬╖ pole: intense`. **INPUT** multi-touch / mouse press-pull-flick (a soft-brush force with flick momentum; non-mic, active). **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** mesh draw тАФ quads shaded by local areal strain (slack тЖТ deep indigo, taut тЖТ iridescent magenta/gold), glowing tension lines, hot rupture rims, pinned boundary frame. **TECHNIQUE** a pure mass-spring membrane solver (`membrane.ts`): 52├Ч52 point masses with structural (4-neighbour) + shear (diagonal) + bend (2-away) springs, pinned drumhead boundary, symplectic Euler ├Ч 2 substeps + velocity damping, per-spring strain tracking with `TEAR_STRAIN` spring-snapping, a faint autonomous breathing field so it's alive-when-idle. Drives **physical modal synthesis** (`audio.ts`): 8 bandpass resonators on a circular drumhead's Bessel-zero modal ratios (1.000, 1.593, 2.136, 2.296, 2.653, 2.918, 3.156, 3.501); mean spring stretch (tension) тЖТ fundamental via `setTargetAtTime` portamento; a master lowpass opens with brightness; pluck/tear energy injects noise-burst excitation; a quiet continuous excitation keeps the modes singing so tension is *audible* in the steady tone, not just on strikes; small feedback-delay reverb for body. **Why it's promising:** pitch is physical + continuous (no note-tapping), it's a real instrument (your hands bend the chord), it's the first psych-lane mass-spring sim, and it runs + sounds on literally any device with a mouse тАФ zero green-but-unseen risk. **Why de-selected this cycle:** all three cleared the floor, but 1064 discharges the most-cited unclaimed lever (real-piano carrier, JURY #2) with the most-visible researchтЖТbuild chain; 1065 is the perfect one-fire-away intense + verifiable counterweight. **To resurrect:** ship as-is; verify the tear/pluck transients + tension-glide by ear on a device; consider it the moment the lane wants an intense swing OR a guaranteed-verifiable ship. Named refs: Thomas Jakobsen, *Advanced Character Physics* (verlet/PBD, 2001); circular-membrane modal synthesis / Bessel-zero ratios. ### `1066-bloom-conductor` тАФ `queued` (brings WebGPU compute back as a played resonating body тАФ JURY #4)
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the INTENSE / DMT-breakthrough pole; pick it when the lane wants WebGPU compute back (jury #4) AS something you play, not a fragment-shader screensaver.** *"A breathing fractal chrysanthemum is a RESONATING BODY you sculpt with your hand тАФ and seeding it plays the chord."* `state: DMT chrysanthemum / breakthrough bloom ┬╖ pole: intense`. **INPUT** pointer/touch seeds + conducts (non-mic, active). **OUTPUT** **WebGPU compute** GrayтАУScott reaction-diffusion (`gpu.ts`): two `array<f32>` storage buffers per chemical, ping-ponged; a **step** pass (6 sub-steps/frame at 320┬▓); an additive **seed** pass injecting V under the finger (up to 16 seeds/submit, since `writeBuffer` only overwrites); a **render** compute pass that kaleidoscope-folds V тЖТ a neon-iridescent palette into a storage texture, blitted to canvas тАФ WGSL in template literals, typed via `@webgpu/types`, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`. **Canvas2D fallback** (`rd-cpu.ts`): the SAME GrayтАУScott on a coarse 132┬▓ grid + `drawKaleido`, amber (readable) "using Canvas2D fallback" notice тАФ always shows + plays. **TECHNIQUE / AUDIO** no per-frame GPU readback (would stall the pipeline) тАФ audio (`audio.ts`) is driven by a CPU-side activity proxy (injected reagent + pointer velocity + the fallback field's own spatial energy): each seed plucks a note from a just-intonation chord (1┬╖5/4┬╖3/2┬╖15/8┬╖9/4┬╖5/2); a four-osc detuned drone's lowpass + saturation open as total field activity climbs toward "breakthrough"; light reverb; autonomous faint idle bloom + drone so a no-touch glance still moves + sounds. **Why it's promising:** the field is alive but YOU sculpt it and YOUR seeding plays it (the played-not-watched relationship the jury demands), it's the lab's first INTERACTIVE WebGPU-compute RD you can play, and the chrysanthemum-bloom is the literal DMT-threshold form-constant. **Why de-selected this cycle:** 1064's real-piano carrier is the more-cited unclaimed lever + the build box can't verify WebGPU headlessly (the Canvas2D fallback covers it but the headline GPU path is unseen). **To resurrect:** ship as-is; verify the WGSL pipeline + uniform offsets on real WebGPU hardware + the seedтЖТchord coupling feel. Named refs: GrayтАУScott / Pearson, *Complex Patterns in a Simple System* (1993); Karl Sims reaction-diffusion; Kl├╝ver chrysanthemum form-constant. ### `1060-piano-current` тЬЕ SHIPPED cycle 605 (was тнРRESURRECT-FIRST) тАФ `demoable`
**CONSUMED тАФ built + shipped as the cycle-605 DEEP winner (live at `/dream/1060-piano-current`). See STATE/INDEX ┬з605. The spec below is the original ┬з604 bank, kept for provenance.**
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; the FULLY-VERIFIABLE Canvas2D sibling of the shipped piano-flock тАФ perfect for a cycle that wants a guaranteed-runs-everywhere piece, or to break a WebGPU-unverified streak (1052/1053/1059 are all green-but-GPU-unseen).** *"STIR a luminous river of thousands of particles flowing through a divergence-free noise field with your hand тАФ and where it pools, accelerates, braids re-voices KAREL'S OWN PIANO into a cosmic drift."* `state: meditative cosmic drift ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** pointer/touch injects a swirling vortex term you "stir" with (rotation sign follows your gesture, decays on lift-off) + Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano grain corpus (the proven `718-duet-paths` loader: id `549fc519тАж`, ~4.5s AbortController, JSON-`{url}`-or-bytes, `OfflineAudioContext` felt-piano fallback w/ emerald/amber notice, + file-drop). **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** (NOT a fragment shader, NOT WebGPU тАФ runs everywhere): ~3,600 particles advected through a **2D curl-noise field** `v=(тИВ╧И/тИВy,тИТтИВ╧И/тИВx)` (divergence-free тЖТ swirls/braids/pools, no visible sources/sinks; ╧И from 2 octaves of self-implemented gradient noise, a time-drifted 3rd axis keeps it alive-when-idle), additive `lighter` streaks colored violetтЖТcyanтЖТgold by speed/pooling over a per-frame semi-transparent indigo wash (ghost trails, never pure black). **TECHNIQUE** emergent flow stats тАФ mean speed, vorticity (curl mag near cursor), per-cell density (where flow pools), directional coherence тАФ drive **CataRT-style granular re-synthesis**: fast+coherent тЖТ focused JI-locked grains; turbulent/high-vorticity тЖТ detuned bright shimmer cloud; a forming pool тЖТ a swelling sustained pad; a sudden stir тЖТ onset burst; idle тЖТ sparse twinkle. Per-grain BufferSource + raised-cosine env + stereo panner keyed to on-screen energy тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated; full rAF+audio teardown. **Why it was promising:** fully verifiable + runs on every device (zero green-but-unseen risk), the curl-noise river is genuinely gorgeous on plain Canvas2D, and it's a real instrument (your stir audibly changes the music) тАФ the perfect low-risk counterweight to the WebGPU pieces. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor at 3/5, but 1059 was the literal queued тнРRESURRECT-FIRST + the direct JURY #4 (WebGPU-compute body) discharge with the higher ambition ceiling; 1060's two best ideas (audio-RMSтЖТflow feedback loop; vorticity-confluence тЖТ a deliberate two-grain harmonic interval) were folded into 1059's README next-cycle notes. **To resurrect:** ship as-is; verify the stirтЖТgrain coupling feel + grain loudness vs the felt fallback on a real device; consider it specifically when the lane has had тЙе2 consecutive GPU-unverified ships. Named refs: Robert Bridson et al. *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow* (SIGGRAPH 2007); Diemo Schwarz CataRT; The Concatenator (arXiv 2411.04366); MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023). ### `1061-piano-chladni` (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; a played *cymatic-plate* instrument re-voicing Karel's real piano. NOTE the redundancy that de-selected it: cymatics is DOUBLY lab-prior (`19-cymatics`, `165-cymatics` both already do Chladni sand-on-nodal-lines with the same `sin(n╧Аx)sin(m╧Аy)+sin(m╧Аx)sin(n╧Аy)` formula) тАФ so resurrect ONLY if the *played-instrument + real-piano-CataRT* angle is pushed hard enough to feel genuinely new vs those two, or fold the idea into a polish of 19/165 instead.** *"TUNE a vibrating Chladni plate's driving frequency and the sand-like grains migrate to the standing-wave nodal lines тАФ and the geometry of those nodal lines re-voices KAREL'S OWN PIANO."* `state: meditative resonance / standing-wave trance ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** pointer/touch + a labelled frequency slider "tune" (drag horizontally across the plate or use the slider; tapping injects energy at that point) + Karel's real piano grain corpus (the proven `718-duet-paths`/1059 loader, already present as `source.ts`: id `549fc519тАж`, ~4.5s AbortController, JSON-`{url}`-or-bytes, `OfflineAudioContext` felt-piano fallback w/ emerald/amber notice, + file-drop). **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** (NOT WebGPU/fragment-shader): ~4,000 "sand" grains glow bone/gold on a deep-indigo plate, additive `lighter` so dense nodal lines bloom, per-frame semi-transparent wash for trails (never pure black). **TECHNIQUE** the square-plate field `f(x,y)=a┬╖sin(n╧Аx)sin(m╧Аy)+b┬╖sin(m╧Аx)sin(n╧Аy)` with integer modes `(n,m)` chosen from the driving frequency via an ordered ladder (low freq = simple figure, high = intricate); grains do **gradient descent on `|f|`** (step down `тИЗf┬▓=2f┬╖тИЗf` toward the `fтЙИ0` nodal lines) plus an `|f|`-proportional antinode vibration that scatters them off the bellies тЖТ they self-organize onto the nodal lines and re-form on every retune; edge-reflecting. Plate state тЖТ **CataRT granular re-synthesis**: driving freq тЖТ `targetMidi` register (quantized just/pentatonic so retuning audibly *transposes* the piano тАФ the core coupling); nodal complexity `n+m` тЖТ brightness + grain density; tap тЖТ onset burst at the tuned pitch; settled+sharp тЖТ a sustained pad swell; idle тЖТ sparse twinkle. Per-grain BufferSource + raised-cosine env + panner тЖТ convolution/limiter master; gesture-gated; full teardown. **Why it was promising:** a genuinely *played* cymatic instrument (you tune it, it transposes the real piano) тАФ the tuneтЖТtranspose coupling is musically legible and the sand re-forming on each retune is gorgeous + fully verifiable on Canvas2D. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor at ~3/5 and both are fully-verifiable Canvas2D real-piano instruments, but 1060 was the literal queued тнРRESURRECT-FIRST AND a *non-redundant* technique, whereas 1061's Chladni mechanic is doubly lab-prior (19/165) тАФ exactly the "too similar" redundancy to avoid; its only fresh axis (cymatics-as-a-played-instrument + real-piano CataRT) wasn't enough to beat the queued resurrect. **To resurrect:** ship only if you can make the *played + real-piano* framing decisively distinct from 19/165 (e.g. continuous mode-morphing via pinch; true free-edge eigenmodes / asymmetric figures instead of a designed ladder; map grain spatial position on the figure тЖТ stereo azimuth so you *hear* where on the plate each grain sits), OR redirect the energy into a polish of `165-cymatics` (add the real-piano CataRT carrier + the tune-to-transpose interaction to the existing piece). Named refs: Ernst Chladni *Entdeckungen ├╝ber die Theorie des Klanges* (1787); Hans Jenny *Cymatics* (1967); Diemo Schwarz CataRT; MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1061-piano-chladni/` this cycle тАФ `page.tsx` + `plate.ts` + `instrument.ts` + `source.ts` + README; backed up to scratchpad `banked-605/1061-piano-chladni/`; rebuild from this spec.)

**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole, the most literal answer to JURY 2026-06-29 #1's "breath-as-control (not breath-as-ambient)."** *"Breathe a psychedelic form-constant cathedral into being тАФ your own paced breath is the instrument."* `state: meditative-boundless ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** breath-as-ACTIVE-control via mic envelope тАФ NOT passive spectral analysis: a breath-phase detector (AnalyserNode RMS + low-band energy, adaptive normalization, dual-rate followers, derivative-based inhale/exhale/hold classification, hold accumulator in `breath.ts`) + a visible **pacer ring** at ~5.5 breaths/min the user follows (inhale as it grows, exhale as it shrinks); a long still **held breath** triggers the breakthrough. **OUTPUT** Canvas2D (NOT a fragment shader) тАФ a few hundred parametric primitives, additive `lighter` bloom, soft-white-boundless тЖТ dusk-lilac palette, never pure black, slow luminance drift only. **TECHNIQUE** composes `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` (scene built in cortical `(log r, ╬╕)` space, warped with `cortexToScreen`; breath drives `freq` ring-density, `phase` inward come-up drift, and a morph across `FORM_CONSTANTS` tunnelтЖТspokeтЖТspiralтЖТhoneycomb) + `safeFlicker.ts` (opt-in OFF-by-default Shimmer тЙд3 Hz + Kill). **AUDIO** breath-paced generative drone bank (detuned sine/triangle JI fifths, breath gain+lowpass LFO) + offline-synthesized cathedral-IR `ConvolverNode` (held breath blooms the wet tail) + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; mic analysis-only (never to `destination`). **No-mic fallback** = manual mode (auto-pacer + press-and-hold canvas / Space to "inhale"), clear `text-rose-300` notice, never a dead screen. **Why it was promising:** the directest discharge of JURY #1's explicit breath-as-control ask; ### `1055-tilt-tunnel` (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the INTENSE pole, a *played* flight (not a stare-field).** *"STEER through a DMT form-constant hyperspace by tilting your head/device тАФ lean to fall inward, bank to flip the spiral handedness."* `state: DMT-hyperspace ┬╖ pole: intense`. **INPUT** `DeviceOrientationEvent` tilt as active steering (iOS `requestPermission()` gated on the Start tap) with **pointer-drag + arrow-key fallbacks** (the laptop demo path); a cyan reticle/horizon rolls + pitches with your flight so steering is unmistakable; never auto-plays (no input = slow drift only). **OUTPUT** WebGL2 single-triangle fragment shader you fly through тАФ тЪа **this is the cycle-602 banned output FORM** (full-screen fragment field), mitigated *only* by being genuinely steered; that is exactly why it was de-selected. **TECHNIQUE** composes `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` by splicing `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` into the shader and *calling* its functions тАФ the steerable camera offsets the cortical coordinate (`cortex.x += depth` forward-lean inward fall, `cortex.y += yaw`, bank adds a spiral twist `cortex.y += bank*cortex.x` тЖТ handedness flip + tilts `phi`); `FORM_PHI`/`FORM_CONSTANTS` drive uniforms; `safeFlicker.ts` is the sole opt-in тЙд3 Hz Strobe path + Kill. **AUDIO** self-sufficient generative drone (sub-bass + detuned stacked osc) with a **Shepard-tone** rising shimmer (moving Gaussian window of octave-spaced partials тЖТ the auditory "endless fall"), bankтЖТStereoPanner, thrustтЖТlowpass, masterтЖТcompressor/limiter; no mic. Degrades: no tilt тЖТ pointer/keys (amber notice); no WebGL2 тЖТ Canvas2D drifting-rings fallback that still banks/thrusts (rose notice), audio keeps playing; full GL+audio+listener teardown. **Why it was promising:** spectacular, genuinely player-driven, brings the intense pole, clean Shepard "endless fall" coupling. **Why de-selected this cycle:** lands on the banned output FORM (full-screen WebGL2 fragment shader тАФ the lab's 6├Ч monoculture) and is conceptually adjacent to existing tunnel/hyperspace pieces (1041 NDE-tunnel, 1042 hyperspace-bloom, 1051 hand-hyperspace) тАФ exactly the redundancy the jury flagged. **To resurrect:** ship when the fragment-shader ban has aged out AND the lane wants a flight piece; first verify the beta/gammaтЖТthrust/bank mapping + iOS permission flow on a real handset (neutral resting pitch ~25тАУ80┬░ beta needs per-device tuning); consider a Canvas2D or WebGPU-compute substrate to also dodge the banned form. Named refs: BressloffтАУCowan (2001); Kl├╝ver; QRI "Hyperbolic Geometry of the DMT Experience"; Roger Shepard (Shepard tone). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1055-tilt-tunnel/` this cycle тАФ `page.tsx` + README, self-contained; backed up to scratchpad `banked-602/1055-tilt-tunnel/`; rebuild from this spec.)

## ┬з601 banked seed тАФ 2026-06-29 (cycle 601 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ DEEP тАФ 1 non-winner explorer, built complete by a parallel builder + tsc/ESLint-clean for its folder, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1053-ripple-loom` = a played WebGPU-compute wave field warped through the new `_shared/psych/` log-polar engine)

- **`1054-cortex-paint`** тнР RESURRECT (status `queued` ┬╖ `state: hypnagogic / LSD-plateau geometric painting ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`) тАФ **"paint directly into your own visual cortex."** The field starts dark and near-silent; each pointer **stroke** is seeded as a localized region in **cortical (log r, ╬╕) space** with an orientation ╧Ж (form-mode), freq and a decaying strength, then bloomed onto screen via the shared log-polar warp into a Kl├╝ver form constant (tunnel/spokes/spiral/honeycomb) AND voiced as a sustained additive partial. Strokes slowly decay (a **memory** slider) so you layer/reinforce/sculpt drifting chords over time. WebGL2 single full-screen pass that renders **only the sum of the user's strokes** (тЙд64 packed as uniform arrays) тАФ so idle = bare violet-black ground, strokes ARE the content (NOT a stare-field, but it IS a WebGL2 fragment pass, so on the next jury check confirm it still reads as an instrument). Audio: per-stroke just-intonation additive voices + soft pad + shared convolution reverb, with an **optional dropped audio file** (`decodeAudioData` тЖТ granulated carrier) so it can run on **Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano** тАФ this is its standout reason to resurrect (discharges the real-piano directive via a *painting* interaction model, distinct from 1052's reader-probes). Composes both shared engines cleanly (`logpolar.ts` GLSL+JS twins for shader & hit-testing; `safeFlicker.ts` as the sole opt-in тЙд3 Hz Shimmer path). **Why it was promising:** a genuinely different instrument *relationship* тАФ you compose by painting in cortical coordinates, which is grep-0├Ч as an interaction model, plus the file-carrier path. **Why de-selected this cycle:** lost only on JURY 2026-06-29 #4 тАФ the winner 1053 brings **WebGPU compute** back as the resonating body (the scarce, explicitly-wanted-back capability, down to 2├Ч), whereas 1054's output is a WebGL2 full-screen fragment field (the banned *form*, mitigated but not avoided), and its real-piano-carrier angle was just discharged last fire by 1052-piano-bloom. **To resurrect (next adult psych fire):** ship as-is; pair the file-drop with a known-good Welcome Home recording id so the carrier is real, not a fallback synth. Named refs: BressloffтАУCowan retinaтЖТV1 complex-log map; Kl├╝ver's four form constants. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1054-cortex-paint/` this cycle тАФ page.tsx + shader.ts + synth.ts + README; rebuild from this spec.)
- **Next-cycle DEEPENING of the winner `1053-ripple-loom`:** fold 1054's two best ideas in тАФ (a) an **optional audio-file carrier** (drop a *Welcome Home* track; granulate it at the listener probes instead of pure bells, so the ripples re-voice Karel's real piano) and (b) a **"paint a sustained ridge" mode** (hold to keep injecting along a stroke so a standing form-constant persists, not just transient rings). Both are in 1053's README as next-cycle notes.

## ┬з597 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-29 (cycle 597 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 2 non-winner intense-pole explorers, each built complete by a parallel builder + builder-audited TS/ESLint-clean, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` = the lab's FIRST Poincar├й-disk {7,3} hyperbolic tiling)

- **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (status `queued` ┬╖ `state: psilocybin ┬╖ pole: intense-warm`) тАФ the lab's **first psilocybin / warm-organic** psych piece. The entire psychedelic lane is neon (1038/1042/1044) / dark-void (1041) / soft-white (1043) / pastel (1047) тАФ **there is NO warm piece at all**; owning the warm pole is this build's whole reason to exist. Technique: a **two-level fBm domain warp** (I├▒igo Qu├нlez "warp the warp": fBm field q offsets coords, a second field r is fed by q, the final fBm is sampled with both offsets stacked) тЖТ breathing foliage/bark/mycelium structure, ridge-emphasized into luminous **gold filaments**; folded through an **N-fold kaleidoscope** whose fold-count **blooms 2тЖТ~12тЖТsettles** over the arc (chrysanthemum opening), mixed ~60/40 with the unfolded plane so it stays mycelial, never a rigid mandala. **Warm-organic palette** (deep brown тЖТ rust тЖТ amber тЖТ ochre тЖТ moss тЖТ luminous gold, floored on a deep-brown ember so it never goes cold). WebGL2 fragment shader + **real Canvas2D fallback** (a simpler warm one-level warp, bilinear-upscaled); **analysis-only mic** (FFT: bassтЖТflow+warp amp, midsтЖТbloom/N, highsтЖТfine filament detail, loudnessтЖТsaturation тАФ never to `destination`) + a self-sufficient warm breathing drone fallback (detuned A-chord pads + opening lowpass + feedback-delay bloom tail). ~240 s non-looping arc (onsetтЖТcome-upтЖТpeak-bloom 35тАУ60%тЖТplateauтЖТreturn). Slow luminance drift only (no strobe). **Why it was promising:** brings the warm pole + the intense-warm psilocybin state the lane lacks тАФ the single biggest remaining diversity gap; faithful, beautiful organic look; full Canvas2D fallback. **Why de-selected this cycle:** its core technique (domain-warp + kaleidoscope) is the least lab-first of the cycle-597 three (1044's hyperbolic tiling won on never-used-technique + the QRI research chain). **To resurrect (next adult psych fire):** ship as-is; strongly consider FFT-driving from Karel's real **Welcome Home** Path piano (`/api/audio/[id]`) as the carrier тАФ that would also make it the lane's **first psych build on real music**. Named refs: I├▒igo Qu├нlez "domain warping"; Manolo Gamboa Naon (warm flowing organic fields); psilocybin "open-eye fractal enhancement" phenomenology. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1046-mycelial-bloom/` this cycle тАФ page.tsx + shader.ts + audio.ts + arc.ts + fallback.ts + README; rebuild from this spec or the scratchpad backup.)

- **`1049-salvia-membrane`** (status `queued` ┬╖ `state: salvia ┬╖ pole: intense (eerie/uncanny)`) тАФ the lab's **first salvia / uncanny** piece (grep-0├Ч `salvia`/`membrane`), and the lab's first deliberately *not-pretty* register. Realizes the salvia phenomenology тАФ the felt sense of being unzipped from 3D and **pressed flat into a surface, "becoming an object,"** reality revealed as a tiling sheet/**membrane** pulled sideways by mechanical "gears." WebGL2 fragment shader: a quilted `mod`-tiled lattice (soft dome shading = the "skin of reality") **dragged laterally** at a constant uncanny rate, torn at a smooth **advancing seam/zipper** (a steep shear-gradient front sweeping across, cells reorienting), with a **cylindrical fold** curling the periphery edge-wise so the viewer is pressed flat into the plane + a slow whole-sheet rotation; faint moir├й beat, **hard-ish edges (mechanical, not flowing)**. **Sallow/uncanny palette** (desaturated ochre-green / bone / oxide-red, dim). Audio: a deliberately **dissonant metallic drone** (detuned saw pad + sour fifth + tritone-ish high partial + ~0.45 Hz mechanical amplitude pulse + breathing resonant lowpass) тАФ NOT consonant/pretty; analysis-only mic (bassтЖТdrag, midsтЖТfold, highsтЖТseam, loudnessтЖТcontrast, never to `destination`). ~3.5-min non-looping arc (onsetтЖТcome-upтЖТpeak ~45%тЖТplateauтЖТreturn). **Safety:** the seam is a smoothstep gradient sweep (not a strobing edge); all motion slow + smooth; no >3 Hz luminance pulsing. **Why it was promising:** never-built state, genuinely different mechanic (2D membrane drag/fold, not fractal/raymarch), and it owns the *uncanny/eerie* register the lab has never touched тАФ high surprise. **Why de-selected this cycle:** 1044's lab-first hyperbolic technique + the QRI research chain edged it; this is "different register" more than "biggest ambition." **To resurrect:** ship when the lane wants the uncanny pole or a non-fractal mechanic; consider pushing the membrane to a WebGPU compute field for a denser quilt. Named refs: salvia "becoming an object" / "gears of reality" / 2D-sheet trip-report phenomenology (PsychonautWiki "Geometry"); contrast with the DMT saddle/hyperbolic geometry of sibling 1044. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1049-salvia-membrane/` this cycle тАФ page.tsx + shader.ts + audio.ts + arc.ts + README; rebuild from this spec or the scratchpad backup.)

## ┬з596 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-29 (cycle 596 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 2 non-winner altered-states explorers, each built complete by a parallel builder + builder-audited TS/ESLint-clean, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1047-tracer-drift` = the lab's FIRST ping-pong feedback-trail accumulator)

- **`1048-threshold`** тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (status `queued` ┬╖ `state: hypnagogia / lucid-dream ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`) тАФ the lab's **first hypnagogia / dream-logic piece** (grep-0├Ч `hypnagogia`). Nothing is drawn explicitly: **five scenes** are different ways of **thresholding layered fBm/value-noise** so forms *suggest* themselves out of darkness (pareidolia) тАФ `lattice` (domain-warped half-formed mesh), `face-in-noise` (radial-mirrored fBm whose threshold ridges read as eyes/brow/mouth without ever being a real face), `landscape` (horizon-banded silhouettes + dim ember dusk), `geometric-bloom` (noise-modulated petals + concentric rings), `void-drift` (sparse drifting phosphenes). A **deterministic jittered teleport scheduler** cross-dissolves two scene fields and **snaps** the pair at irregular cuts, with a hard **тЙе4.5 s anti-strobe spacing floor** + a shallow (~30%) eased luminance dip cushioning each snap so it reads as a dream-jump, never a flash; a **per-cut seed** re-grows the forms differently every window so nothing repeats. Audio: low detuned drone under a breathing low-pass + pink-ish noise wash + sparse half-heard bell tones, with a `cut()` filter-sweep/swell on each teleport so the jumps feel motivated (master ~0.12, click-free). Input: **autonomous Lissajous drift + optional iOS-gated gyro** untethered float (no fixed up-vector; pointer NOT primary). ~3тАУ5 min arc (onset near-dark тЖТ drift coalesce тЖТ deep-threshold most-vivid + frequent jumps тЖТ settle). Dim-warped palette (deep indigo/slate/dim violet/faint ember). **Why it was promising:** the most *surprising concept* of the cycle-596 triple ("did I just see a face?"), a genuinely novel mechanic (dream-logic teleport, not smooth morph), untapped state, ~3-4/5 ambition. **Why de-selected this cycle:** 1047's lab-first ping-pong feedback infra (a named-but-unbuilt `_shared/` target) + the temporal-diversity argument (the lane's missing *plateau* shape) edged it. **To resurrect (next adult psych fire):** ship as-is; consider adding a faint MIT-Dormio-style "dream-incubation" word/seed that biases which scenes appear; push to WebGPU for richer noise fields. Named refs: MIT Media Lab **Dormio** / targeted dream incubation (Adam Haar Horowitz); hypnagogia "Tetris effect" / threshold-imagery phenomenology. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1048-threshold/` this cycle тАФ page.tsx + shaders.ts [5 thresholded-noise scenes] + audio.ts + arc.ts [teleport scheduler] + README; rebuild from this spec or the scratchpad backup.)

- **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** (status `queued` ┬╖ `state: psilocybin ┬╖ pole: intense-warm`) тАФ the lab's **first psilocybin / warm-organic** psych piece (the lane is entirely neon/dark-void/soft-white тАФ **no warm pole at all**). Technique: a **two-level fBm domain warp** ("warp the warp", the I├▒igo Qu├нlez recipe тАФ fBm field q offsets coords, a second field r is fed by q, the final fBm is sampled with both offsets stacked) тЖТ breathing foliage/bark/mycelium structure, ridge-emphasized into luminous gold filaments; folded through an **N-fold kaleidoscope** whose fold-count **blooms 2тЖТ~12тЖТsettles** over the arc (chrysanthemum opening), the fold mixed with the unfolded plane so it stays mycelial, never a rigid mandala. **Warm-organic palette** (deep brown тЖТ rust тЖТ amber тЖТ ochre тЖТ moss тЖТ luminous gold). WebGL2 fragment shader + real Canvas2D fallback; **analysis-only mic** (FFT: bassтЖТflow+warp amp, midsтЖТbloom, highsтЖТfine detail, loudnessтЖТsaturation) + a self-sufficient warm breathing drone fallback (detuned pad + opening lowpass + feedback-delay bloom). ~240 s arc (onsetтЖТcome-upтЖТpeak-bloomтЖТplateauтЖТreturn). Slow luminance drift only (no strobe). **Why it was promising:** brings the warm pole + the intense-warm psilocybin state the lane lacks; faithful, beautiful organic look. **Why de-selected this cycle:** its core technique (domain-warp + kaleidoscope) is the least lab-first of the three, and the lane was already 2├Ч intense (1038/1042) so a cosmic-ambient winner rebalanced better. **To resurrect:** pick on a cycle wanting the warm/intense pole; consider FFT-driving from Karel's real Welcome Home Path piano as the carrier (would also make it the first psych build on real music). ## ┬з595 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-29 (cycle 595 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 2 non-winner altered-states explorers, each built complete by a parallel builder + builder-audited TS/ESLint-clean, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1043-dreamachine` = the lab's FIRST gated safe-flicker / Ganzfeld engine)

- **`1044-hyperbolic-bloom`** тнР (status `queued` ┬╖ `state: DMT/LSD hyperbolic ┬╖ pole: INTENSE`) тАФ the lab's **first Poincar├й-disk hyperbolic {7,3} tiling**, rendered entirely in a WebGL2 fragment shader: each pixel is a complex point in the unit disk, inverse-M├╢bius'd by the viewer transform, then **folded into the {7,3} fundamental domain** (Schwarz triangle ╧А/2,╧А/3,╧А/7) by iterated reflections тАФ straight dihedral mirrors + a geodesic **circle inversion** (`zтЖТc+(zтИТc)r┬▓/|zтИТc|┬▓`, circle orthogonal to the disk: `|c|┬▓тИТr┬▓=1`); fold-count тЖТ palette-cycled jeweled hue with dark grout; a continuous **M├╢bius translation along a geodesic** makes heptagons stream out toward the rim forever (the perpetual hyperbolic fall). Layered: a breathing fBm domain warp ("melting surfaces"), chromatic aberration, thin-film iridescence, a traveling cortical-wave phase, and a **3-pass ping-pong feedback buffer** for positive-afterimage tracers. ~5-min INTENSE arc (onsetтЖТcome-upтЖТbreakthrough peakтЖТplateauтЖТreturn) ramps recursion depth / fall speed / warp / CA / trail decay; drone fallback (sub-bass + detuning stacked oscillators) or optional mic, FFTтЖТuniforms (bassтЖТfall speed, midsтЖТwarp, highsтЖТiridescence, loudnessтЖТsaturation). **Why it was promising:** a genuine lab-first technique (grep-0├Ч `hyperbolic tiling`), the directest translation of DMT "negatively-curved, more-axes-than-reality" reports, and visually the most spectacular of the three. **Why de-selected this cycle:** it's the **intense** pole (would make 3├Ч in a lane already 2├Ч intense, 1038/1042) and thematically adjacent to last cycle's DMT `1042`; also the highest build-risk (3-pass FBO pipeline + a geodesic-circle *orthogonality proxy* rather than the exact Schwarz-triangle solution тЖТ tiles are convincing but not geometrically exact {7,3}). **To resurrect:** pick it on a cycle that *wants* the intense pole; first solve the exact {p,q} Schwarz-triangle circle analytically; consider a WebGPU-compute field pass for deeper recursion; blend {7,3}тЖФ{8,3}тЖФ{6,4} for variety. Named refs: QRI "The Hyperbolic Geometry of the DMT Experience" (G├│mez-Emilsson); BressloffтАУCowan; Escher *Circle Limit* IтАУIV. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom/` this cycle тАФ page.tsx + shader.ts [4 GLSL programs] + audio.ts + arc.ts + README; rebuild from this spec.)

- **`1045-k-hole`** (status `queued` ┬╖ `state: ketamine (K-hole) ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`) тАФ the lab's **first dedicated ketamine / dissociative** piece (grep-0├Ч `k-hole`): float untethered into a vast near-black void where ~2600 faint cold-glowing shards drift *past* you and recede into exponential fog. Four subsystems: (1) sparse **parallax point-field** with manual perspective projection (shards stream +Z and wrap into the far depth) + exp fog, additive radial-glow sprites; (2) a global **`timeScale`** time-dilation uniform driving *everything* (drift, camera, fog, audio LFOs, body-melt), dipping to ~0.12 at the deepest K-hole so time literally stretches; (3) a **convolution-reverb void** (sustained detuned drone through a synthesized multi-second cistern IR `ConvolverNode`, low-pass that closes on descent then re-opens into "cold clarity" at the bottom); (4) a depth-driven **body-schema-melt** vertex domain-warp/shear that dissolves coherent structure into drifting particles then re-coheres. Input: **device-tilt / gyro untethered float** (no fixed up-vector; iOS `requestPermission` wired to the Start tap) with auto-drift + arrow/scroll fallback тАФ pointer deliberately NOT primary. ~5.5-min arc (onsetтЖТcome-upтЖТdeepest voidтЖТre-coherenceтЖТreturn), smoothstep-blended, + a lighterтЖФdeeper bias slider. **Why it was promising:** never-built state, clean тЙе3-subsystem ambition, cosmic-ambient (rebalances the lane), tilt input dodges the jury-banned pointer. **Why de-selected this cycle:** strong but risks *aesthetic* overlap with the existing dark-void sibling `1041-nde-tunnel` (the README differentiates it well *conceptually* тАФ no tunnel, no destination, dissociation-not-transcendence тАФ but on a real display the dark sparse field could read similar); `1043`'s research-chain + safety-infra value won. **To resurrect:** ship when the lane is light on void pieces, or extract `timeScale` + the convolution-void IR into `_shared/` as reusable ambient infra; add the banked "sensory un-binding" audioтЖФvisual lag at the deepest point; push shards to 10k+ via transform feedback. Named ref: ketamine ego-dissolution literature (*Frontiers in Human Neuroscience*, 2017). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1045-k-hole/` this cycle; rebuild from this spec.)

## ┬з594 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-29 (cycle 594 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 2 non-winner altered-states explorers, each built complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected; shipped `1042-hyperspace-bloom` = the lab's FIRST 4D/hyperdimensional raymarch)

PSYCHEDELIC WIDE fire covering three untapped altered states across the spectrum (the lane was only 2 builds deep тАФ `1038` intense form-constant, `1041` cosmic-ambient NDE-void тАФ so spreading fast directly attacks "too similar"). Three orthogonal briefs: DMT-breakthrough 4D-raymarch (shipped), jh─Бna soft-white-boundless, psilocybin warm-organic. None banned (no pointer-as-instrument, no sim-as-body, no Gray-Scott, no cathedral). Shipped **`1042-hyperspace-bloom`** тАФ the biggest ambition swing (first-ever 4D polytope rotation+stereographic-projection raymarch, grep-0├Ч) and the highest "huh, we can do that?" The two below returned complete + builder-audited tsc/eslint-clean; **removed un-committed** (`rm -rf`) before the authoritative winner-only build per the non-winner rule тАФ rebuild from these briefs. Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **1042**; banked text-seed names reach 1044 тЖТ resurrect as тЙе**1045**).

### `1043-clear-light` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult ┬╖ cosmic-ambient) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole, soft-white/boundless palette (the deliberate opposite of 1041's dark NDE void).** *"Drift toward the meditative 'clear light' тАФ Oceanic Boundlessness, self dissolving into luminous spacious emptiness, with no drug and no effort."* `state: jh─Бna/meditative-boundlessness ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** auto-journey + optional iOS-gated DeviceOrientation gaze-drift (NO mic, NO pointer-as-instrument). **OUTPUT** WebGL2 two-pass: opaque inverse-vignette background bloom (bright warm-white center, dusk-lilac edges тАФ never black) + additive `gl.POINTS` particle field (tens of thousands), GPU value-noise curl drift, radial breath swell, size/alpha by breath, saturation washing to pure white as figure/ground MERGE over ~2.5min. **TECHNIQUE** breath-paced ~0.1 Hz (~5.5 breaths/min) particle dissolution-into-light + a global TIME_SCALE dilation; Canvas2D fallback. **AUDIO** generative drone bank (detuned sine/triangle in stacked just fifths, long cross-fades) + a procedural OfflineAudioContext cathedral-IR ConvolverNode (~4-6s tail) + breath-paced LFO on amplitude+lowpass; compressor/limiter; Analyser drives bloom. **VIBE** soft-white-boundless / luminous. Named refs: **Lutz & Davidson PNAS 2004** (long-term meditators self-induce gamma synchrony), the **"Oceanic Boundlessness"** ASC dimension, **La Monte Young / Pauline Oliveros "Deep Listening" / Brian Eno** drone lineage. (Builder caught + fixed a real bug: two draw passes shared attribute location 0 тЖТ gave each its own VAO.) Files were at `src/app/dream/1043-clear-light/` (`page.tsx`, `shaders.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`) тАФ rebuild from this brief. **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [particle field + breath driver + drone bank + convolution reverb + FFT coupling] ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з594). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** `1042` was the bigger ambition (never-used 4D technique) + higher surprise; **`1043` is the strongest resurrect** тАФ it's the cosmic-ambient soft-white counterweight the lane still lacks (1041 is dark-void; this is light-boundless), and entrainment science is honestly framed as atmosphere not effect. Builder warts (honest): the *felt* boundlessness + the merge-to-white timing are reasoned, not yet heard/seen on a real device; safety is solid (all luminance drift at breath rate, zero flicker).

### `1044-mycelial-bloom` тАФ `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the warm-organic serotonergic pole (distinct from neon-DMT and dark-void).** *"Your own voice makes the room breathe the way psilocybin makes bark and foliage come alive тАФ organic fractal structure blooming and reorganizing with your affect."* `state: psilocybin ┬╖ pole: intense-warm`. **INPUT** microphone, ANALYSIS-ONLY (RMS loudness + spectral-centroid brightness; mic NEVER routed to output тАФ wired to an AnalyserNode only, no feedback). **OUTPUT** WebGL2 fullscreen fragment shader. **TECHNIQUE** fBm (up to 7 fractional octaves) with two-level **Inigo-Quilez domain warping** (breathing fractals) + N-fold **kaleidoscope** UV folds (chrysanthemum bloom) тАФ **NOT Gray-Scott** (banned). Louder/brighter voice raises octaves, flow speed, fold count, reorganization rate, warp amplitude, saturation together (entropic-brain affect-coupling); all luminance params slowly eased per frame to stay out of the 3тАУ30 Hz flicker band. amberтЖТroseтЖТmossтЖТember cosine palette + filmic curve (no hard-white clip) + mycelial veins + chromatic aberration. Canvas2D fallback. **AUDIO** warm generative drone (detuned saw/triangle modal stack, slow filter LFO, convolution reverb, master limiter); mic loudness gently swells the pad's brightness/gain so you feel your voice in image AND sound. Mic-denied тЖТ rose notice + 2s-idle auto-demo LFO + always-live "Bloom" slider (never dead). **VIBE** warm-organic / ember. Named refs: **Carhart-Harris & Friston "entropic brain" / REBUS**, **Kl├╝ver / BressloffтАУCowan** form-constants. Files were at `src/app/dream/1044-mycelial-bloom/` (`page.tsx`, `shaders.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`) тАФ rebuild from this brief. **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic analysis + fBm-domain-warp shader + kaleidoscope + warm drone + FFT] ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з594). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** `1042`/`1043` were the bigger swings; **but it's the lab's warm-organic psychedelic entry** (the lane has neon-DMT + dark-void but no warm-serotonergic pole) and the voice-affect-coupling is a fresh, legible relationship. ### `1036-piano-mosaic` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult.** *"Sing тАФ and hear your voice re-built, grain by grain, out of KAREL'S OWN PIANO."* Real-time **audio mosaicing / corpus-based concatenative synthesis**: build a corpus of ~80ms Hann grains (50% overlap) from a piano recording, each tagged with 3 cheap descriptors (RMS loudness ┬╖ spectral-centroid brightness ┬╖ autocorrelation pitch), normalized across the corpus; analyze the live mic every ~45ms into the SAME descriptor space; for each target frame play the **nearest** corpus grain (weighted Euclidean) via granular overlap-add, with a repeat-penalty/hysteresis so it doesn't machine-gun тЖТ **your voice's contour drives a stream of his piano grains**. **Uniquely discharges the under-served "incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths" directive** + is the fire's highest-surprise piece. **INPUT** mic (analysis-only, NEVER routed to output тАФ only its *shape* selects grains) + **Karel's real recording** as corpus (`GET /api/featured` тЖТ `/api/audio/[id]`, the anon path `327`/`227` use, 4.5s abort timeout; ALWAYS falls back to an OfflineAudioContext synth-piano corpus [hammer transient + inharmonic partials over a 2-octave scale] with emerald "тЩк Karel's piano" / amber "synth piano" notice). **OUTPUT** Canvas2D **descriptor-space map** (corpus grains as dots by brightness├Чpitch, violet voice-trail, lit selected grain) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** real-time concatenative unit-selection ┬╖ **VIBE** intimate / his-piano / warm-analytic. No-mic fallback: a gliding-formant **auto-demo target** runs through the identical pipeline + a "play demo target" button. Pure `mosaic.ts` (descriptor math + selection) is DOM/audio-free + headless-verified тАФ **`mosaic.test.ts` 20/20 PASS** (nearest-grain correctness, symmetric/non-negative distance, weight-flips-winner, repeat-penalty caps consecutive runs, empty-corpus safety, normalization edges). Files were at `src/app/dream/1036-piano-mosaic/` (`mosaic.ts`, `mosaic.test.ts`, `corpus.ts`, `engine.ts`, `page.tsx`, `README.md`) тАФ rebuild from this brief. **Ambition ~3/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [corpus build/decode + descriptor analysis + unit-selection + granular synth + Canvas2D map] ┬╖ #3 named refs [**Diemo Schwarz CataRT**; **The Concatenator arXiv:2411.04366**; **MACataRT arXiv:2502.00023**] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з591 ┬╖ the his-music directive). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the WIDE winner `1035` was solo-bulletproof + had the strongest verification (proves its core claim) + directly answered JURY #1; **`1036` carries the most 06:30 risk** (mic permission + the mosaic *quality* is unheard/reasoned + the live `/api/featured` response shape is untested in-box, though it mirrors `327`/`227` and handles both direct-audio and `{url}`-JSON). **`1036` is the strongest adult resurrect** тАФ resurrect on a cycle with a real mic + audio device to verify, and it's the only piece in the queue that discharges the his-music directive. Builder warts (honest): grain size / descriptor weights / trigger gating are educated guesses wanting an ear-tune; the synth-piano fallback covers the untested real-API path.

### `1037-presence-song` тАФ `queued`
**For: adult (conceptual/critical).** *"A song that lives only while you are PRESENT for it тАФ and audibly withers the instant you look away."* The lab's thin **conceptual/critical** menu category, and a genuinely fresh *relationship* (**be-present-for-it**, not play-it). Three **zero-permission** browser signals fold into one continuous `attention` тИИ [0,1]: **Page Visibility** (`document.hidden`), **window focus/blur**, **pointer/touch presence** (cursor recency over the canvas тАФ a *presence sensor*, NOT a pitch-picker), + a time-since-interaction decay term. `attention` тЖТ synth + visual params, all **monotone** + **clamped**: high = warm in-tune diatonic chord-cycle + bright breathing light-field; low = voices thin & detune (┬▒38┬в), lowpass closes (5.2kHzтЖТ180Hz), an empty reverb swells (wet 0.18тЖТ0.92), image desaturates/fragments toward a held fragile near-silence (gain floor 0.04, never absolute zero, тЙе1 voice always holds). **Asymmetric smoothing** тАФ it revives faster (~0.9s) than it withers (~2.6s), "as if it leans toward you." A visible meter makes the causality legible. **INPUT** attention/presence (no mic, no camera) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** Canvas2D breathing/withering organism ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** presence-gated synthesis over functional harmony (Am┬╖F┬╖C┬╖G) ┬╖ **VIBE** intimate / fragile / conceptual, tender not clinical. Always-sounding (auto-demo breathes it for a passing glance; gesture-gated; full teardown). Pure `attention.ts` is DOM-free + headless-verified тАФ **`attention.test.ts` 35/35 PASS** (decaysтЖТ0 absent / risesтЖТ1 present; smoothing monotone, bounded, no overshoot; revive>wither; dt=0/NaN/huge-dt safe; param map monotone + clamped; тЙе1 voice always holds). Files were at `src/app/dream/1037-presence-song/` (`attention.ts`, `attention.test.ts`, `page.tsx`, `README.md`) тАФ rebuild from this brief. Named ref: **Tino Sehgal's "constructed situations"** (art that exists only in the live encounter, leaves no object) + Daniel Rozin presence-mirrors. **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [multi-signal presence sensing + presence-gated synth + functional harmony + Canvas2D organism] ┬╖ #3 named ref [Sehgal/Rozin] ┬╖ arguably the *be-present* relationship is a fresh coupling). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** lower ambition ceiling (it's a mood/presence piece more than an instrument) and `1035`/`1036` were bigger swings; **but it's a lovely, surprising, solo-bulletproof conceptual piece** тАФ resurrect when the lab wants a quiet critical/conceptual entry (the menu category is thin). Builder warts (honest): the *felt* emotional weight + the specific timbre/tau tuning are reasoned, not yet heard in a live browser.

### `1013-mantra-glass` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult.** **Karel's own piano recording, ring-modulated the way Stockhausen scored it in *Mantra* (1970)** тАФ a swept sine carrier turns his piano into shimmering metallic glass; the sum/difference sidebands bloom symmetrically around the carrier as it slowly sweeps. **Uniquely discharges the standing "incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths" directive** (under-served) in a pianist-personal, genuinely surprising form, and ring-modulation is тЙИ0├Ч as an adult timbre engine (only two kids toys: `603`/`705`). **INPUT** his real recording тАФ `GET /api/featured` тЖТ `/api/audio/[id]` (the anon, no-auth path `327`/`227` use), `decodeAudioData`, under a 4.5s abort timeout, ALWAYS falling back to an `OfflineAudioContext` synth piano (decaying D-Dorian partial-stacks + hammer transients) with an honest emerald "тЩк Karel's recording" / amber "synth piano" notice тАФ **non-pointer, non-keyboard, bulletproof at 06:30** ┬╖ **OUTPUT** hand-written **WebGL2** crystalline spectrum-lattice (glassy bars + mirrored reflection + sparse austere grid + a sweeping gold carrier plumb-line with symmetric sideband glows; Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** ring modulation = a `GainNode` whose `.gain` is driven by a sine carrier oscillator (`carrier тЖТ ringGain.gain`, `source тЖТ ringGain тЖТ out`) тЖТ sum/difference sidebands; dual swept carriers, ~70s `Mantra`-style auto-sweep, dry/wet blend, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (ring-mod can get loud тАФ conservative gain) ┬╖ **VIBE** Stockhausen austere-luminous / metallic glass (steel-blue/cool-white/gold тАФ NOT forge/parchment/cosmic). Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-583/1013-mantra-glass/` (`page.tsx`, `source.ts`, `ringmod.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition ~3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [his-recording fetch/decode + ring-mod instrument + dual-carrier sweep + WebGL2 spectrum render = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Stockhausen *Mantra* (1970) for two ring-modulated pianos; *Mixtur*] ┬╖ arguably #1 [ring-mod-as-adult-timbre-engine, тЙИ0├Ч]). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** `1011` led with a *more* novel technique (first FM ever) + shipped a passing headless test suite (verification debt = jury #1) + lush FM timbre is lower "sounds harsh" risk than ring-mod. **`1013` is the strongest adult resurrect** тАФ it's the only one that discharges the his-music directive and the *Mantra* reference is a real "huh, we can do that?" for a pianist. Builder warts (honest): the real `/api/featured`+`/api/audio` path is untested in-box (synth fallback covers it); ring-mod loudness wants a real-device listen.

### `1012-fold-tide` тАФ `queued`
**For: adult.** **Your VOICE drives a West-Coast wavefolder** тАФ sing soft and you get a pure sine, sing louder and the wave folds into blooming harmonics you both see (a live glowing oscilloscope of the post-fold cycle creasing into spikes) and hear. **Wavefolding / West-Coast (Buchla/Serge) synthesis is grep-0├Ч in the lab** тАФ a genuine never-used technique. **INPUT** microphone (`echoCancellation/noiseSuppression/autoGainControl:false` so a real soft/loud dynamic isn't gated; analysis-only, never routed to output; RMS loudness тЖТ fold depth, rough autocorrelation pitch тЖТ fundamental snapped to scale) тАФ non-pointer, non-keyboard, but **mic permission is the worst 06:30 friction** (the lab's recurring de-select reason) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** hand-written **WebGL2** oscilloscope of one folded cycle + a harmonic spectrum ribbon (amber/teal/violet tidal palette; Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** wavefolding: an `AudioWorkletNode` per-sample folder (`fold(x)` rail-reflection + sin-rounding, fold count rises with loudness) loaded from an inline Blob URL, with a robust `WaveShaperNode` dynamically-updated fold-curve fallback; a West-Coast low-pass-gate `BiquadFilter` whose cutoff also opens with loudness; always-on soft drone ┬╖ **VIBE** Buchla-organic / warm-electric / tidal (NOT forge/parchment/cosmic). Pure `fold.ts` math is DOM/audio-free + headless-verified (zero-crossings/cycle 1тЖТ13 as fold depth rises, output bounded [-1,1], scale-snap correct). Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-583/1012-fold-tide/` (`page.tsx`, `fold.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition ~3/5** (#1 never-used technique [West-Coast wavefolding, grep-0├Ч] ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic RMS/pitch + wavefolder + low-pass-gate + WebGL2 scope/spectrum = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Don Buchla 259 complex osc + 292 low-pass gate; Serge Tcherepnin wave multipliers; East-vs-West-Coast synthesis]). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** mic permission + the unverified AudioWorklet/Blob-URL `addModule` path are two layers of 06:30 risk; `1011`'s tilt + `1013`'s synth-fallback are more robust unattended. **Strong resurrect** тАФ the only mic explorer of the fire and a clean grep-0├Ч technique; the WaveShaper fallback + slider + idle auto-demo keep it sounding if the worklet/mic fail. Builder warts: the AudioWorklet real-time audio + mic feel are unverified headless.

### `1009-kids-balloon-breath` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** *"What if a 4-year-old could BLOW and HUM into the tablet to fill, float, and tune singing balloons?"* Blow into the mic тЖТ a balloon swells and lifts off into a sunny picnic sky, singing a soft warm note; hum a pitch тЖТ the highest rising balloon retunes and recolours to match; balloons drift up, bob, gently bump, and pop with a happy bell chime at the top. **INPUT** microphone breath+voice (`getUserMedia({audio})` w/ echo-cancel/noise-suppress/AGC **off** so a real breath isn't gated; AnalyserNode RMS = blow strength тЖТ inflateтЖТlaunch; small time-domain autocorrelation = hum pitch, clarity-gated, snapped to scale so it's never wrong) тАФ **fresh input (mic 0├Ч in the last-10 window)** ┬╖ **OUTPUT** **SVG/DOM** (the lab's SCARCEST render surface тАФ crisp scalable vector balloons/strings/sky/sparkles animated by rAF mutating cached-node attributes; NOT canvas/WebGL) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** lightweight **Verlet buoyancy** (balloons as point masses w/ upward buoyancy, light damping, sway, damped wall bounds, soft pairwise separation, pop-at-top) тАФ **pure, headless-testable** (`physics.ts` + `notes.ts` have no DOM/audio imports) ┬╖ **VIBE** sunny picnic sky, pastel, cheerful. C-major-pentatonic sine+triangle "ahh" voices (volume tied to balloon size, vibrato, fade-in), octave-up bell pop, always-on root+fifth pad; kids-safe `gain тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6500 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20)`. **Degrade:** mic denied тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a "Puff" button / Spacebar / blow-slider + a ~2s-idle auto-demo that blows balloons on its own, so it still floats and sings. Files at scratchpad `dream-losers-582/1009-kids-balloon-breath/` (`page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `physics.ts`, `notes.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic + breath/pitch detection + Verlet physics + SVG render + synth] ┬╖ #3 named refs [**Google Blob Opera** voiceтЖТsinging-characters; Toca Boca]; fresh input + fresh surface). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the WIDE winner `1008` was the bigger ambition (WebGPU compute) + the only finalist answering JURY #3's GPU-compute ask + love-aligned; **`1009` is the strongest kids resurrect-first** for a cycle that prioritises a **provable, GPU-free, instantly-graspable** artifact тАФ it directly pays the jury's #1 verification debt (deterministic physics, hand-testable) AND lights up the scarce SVG/DOM surface. Builder warts (honest): the lightweight autocorrelation can wobble on breathy/sliding hums (scale-snap masks most of it); hum always retunes the *highest* balloon rather than a chosen one; physics constants assume ~60fps.

### `1010-kids-tide-pool` тАФ banked as the **WebGPU-`@compute` deepening of `931-kids-tide-pool`** (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** *Tilt the tablet to slosh a pool of glowing water; every wave that crests over a glowing stone rings a soft pentatonic bell.* **тЪая╕П Not a fresh idea тАФ a near-clone of the shipped `931-kids-tide-pool`** ("Moonlit Tide Pool": same name, same tiltтЖТshallow-waterтЖТpentatonic-bellsтЖТbedtime concept). 931 ran its shallow-water sim as **WebGL2 fragment-shader textures**; this explorer's only genuine advance is running the SAME sim as a real **WebGPU `@compute @workgroup_size(8,8)` shallow-water height-field** (192├Ч192, ping-pong storage buffers, tilt-uniform gravity, per-frame dispatch + height readback; identical 64├Ч64 CPU integrator fallback). **Headless-VERIFIED** (the rare win): a test of the pure `cpu.ts` integrator confirmed it stays finite/bounded (max|h|<2 over 400 sustained-tilt steps) and that waves propagate from a centre splash to the far corner тАФ exactly the verification-debt template the jury asked for. **So: do NOT ship this as a standalone (it would be the redundant pair Karel flags as "too similar")** тАФ instead resurrect it as **931's cycle-2 GPU upgrade**: swap 931's fragment-shader sim for this `@compute` pipeline (the jury-encouraged compute rebuild) while keeping 931's render, and credit it as a deepening, not a new prototype. Builder warts: GPU height readback is one frame latent; GPU-path "energy" is height-only (velocity buffer not read back тАФ CPU uses true |h|+|v|); device-axis feel isn't orientation-corrected (pad/keys are the reliable fallback).
