### `1007-modal-anvil-modal` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult.** The deterministic, **headless-VERIFIABLE** twin of `1006-modal-anvil` тАФ same dark-forge struck-metal-plate concept, but the body is a **non-linear modal-synthesis bank** instead of an FD sim, and it ships a live **Chladni nodal-line** visualisation so *the picture literally is the sound*. **The directest verification-debt payer (the jury's #1 standing liability across 5+ verdicts)** тАФ ship it on a cycle that prioritises a provable engine over the bigger GPU swing. **INPUT** pointer/touch strike (velocity = force; strike position тЖТ timbre) + ~2s-idle ghost-hammer auto-demo ┬╖ **OUTPUT** WebGL2 fragment-shader Chladni field (loudest 28 modes as a uniform array, `fwidth()` AA nodal lines, steelтЖТhot colouring; Canvas2D 96├Ч96 fallback) тАФ **NOTE for revival:** the brief's most-wanted path is WebGPU `@compute`; this build shipped WebGL2 fragment (an honest deviation) тАФ on revival, swap `makeRenderer` to a WebGPU compute field to ALSO clear jury #3 ┬╖ **TECH** non-linear modal synthesis: rectangular simply-supported Kirchhoff plate eigenfreqs `╧Й(m,n)=K┬╖((m/Lx)┬▓+(n/Ly)┬▓)` (inharmonic = metal), strike at (x,y) тЖТ modal gains тИЭ `sin(m╧Аx)┬╖sin(n╧Аy)┬╖force` (nodal-line strikes don't excite that mode тЖТ strike position is real timbral control), per-mode frequency-dependent decay `╧Д(╧Й)`, and the headline non-linearity `f_i(t)=f_i┬╖(1+╬▓_i┬╖a_i(t))` so loud=sharp and pitch glides down as the mode decays ┬╖ **VIBE** dark molten-forge (NOT parchment/cosmic). **Engine purity:** all physics in a pure dependency-free `modes.ts` (no audio/DOM) тЖТ unit-testable; the AudioWorklet does per-sample modal summation (osc-bank fallback), `gain 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7kHz тЖТ comp(тИТ12/16:1)`, soft-clip. **Verified numbers (computed from `modes.ts`):** Anvil I (Lx=1.0, Ly=0.72, K=471.93) тЖТ inharmonic 220/445.3/654.7/820.9/880.0 Hz; a force-1.0 centre strike droops the (1,1) fundamental ~232.5 Hz тЖТ 225.5 Hz over 3s (most of the bend in the first ~1.2s). Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-581/1007-modal-anvil-modal/` (`modes.ts`, `audio.ts` [inlined Blob-URL worklet + osc fallback], `render.ts` [WebGL2 Chladni + Canvas2D], `page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [pointer-strike + non-linear modal bank + Chladni field render + audio-amplitudeтЖТviz coupling] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Bilbao; **Chladni 1787**; KirchhoffтАУLove / von K├бrm├бn; arXiv:2603.10240; arXiv:2505.05940] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з581). #1 NOT cleanly claimed (modal synth has priors тАФ 970-tension-gong did non-linear modal on a single gong; the fresh axis is a full multi-mode plate + the matched Chladni render). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 1006 won on answering jury #3 (the scarce GPU-compute surface, retreated-from 4 cycles running) + being the bigger concept (GPU sim AS the body); 1007 renders WebGL2 fragment (no compute) so it doesn't move the GPU-compute needle, but it is the *stronger verification-debt answer* and a genuinely beautiful "see-the-sound" piece. **Cycle-2 graft (strongest path):** fuse 1007's Chladni nodal-line render onto 1006's GPU FD field (read the GPU displacement тЖТ draw zero-crossings) so the GPU plate ALSO shows its live standing-wave pattern тАФ best of both. Builder warts (honest): no audio/GPU run in-box тАФ the worklet pitch-glide smoothness + WebGL2 render are reasoned + math-checked, not heard/seen; the non-linearity is a per-mode `f┬╖(1+╬▓┬╖a)` approximation, not a full coupled von K├бrm├бn solver.

### `1004-kids-slinky-wave` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** The **WebGPU-compute** sibling of `1005-kids-singing-slinky`: identical toy (flick the rainbow slinky тЖТ a longitudinal compression pulse races down, reflects off both pinned ends, settles into a standing-wave mode you see + hear), but the mass-spring integration runs in a **genuine WGSL `@compute @workgroup_size(64)` pipeline** (`requestAdapter`/`createComputePipeline`, double-buffered ping-pong storage buffers for position/displacement/velocity, async one-frame-behind `mapAsync` readback for render+audio) at higher node count (NтЙИ192тАУ384), with a **CPU N=96 fallback driving the IDENTICAL render+audio path** when `navigator.gpu`/`requestAdapter()` is absent. **The bigger technical swing** тАФ directly rebuilds the scarce, jury-ENCOURAGED WebGPU-compute capability (JURY 2026-06-27 #3: "WebGPU compute collapsed 6├ЧтЖТ1├Ч; force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the instrument's resonating BODY"). **INPUT** touch/pointer flick + ~2s-idle auto-demo ┬╖ **OUTPUT** hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2 (own perspective/lookAt orbiting camera; glowing rainbow helix points displaced along the coil axis, compression brightens to white; over a dark playground grid; rose-300 WebGL notice fallback) ┬╖ **TECH** WebGPU-compute longitudinal mass-spring chain + mode-projection (`sin(n╧Аi/N)`, n=1..8) additive harmonic-series synthesis (the standing-wave modes ARE the sound) ┬╖ **VIBE** bright rainbow playground; D-major-pentatonic fundamental snap (no wrong notes), always-on drone, kids-safe `gain тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass ~6500 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`. Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-580/1004-kids-slinky-wave/` (`page.tsx`, `physics-gpu.ts` [real `@compute` WGSL, 6 GPU markers grep-verified], `render.ts`, `audio.ts`, `mat4.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [longitudinal compression-wave standing modes тАФ grep-0├Ч] ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [touch-flick + WebGPU mass-spring compute sim + mode-projection additive synth + true-3D WebGL2 render = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Bilbao _Numerical Sound Synthesis_; Physics Classroom slinky longitudinal demo; helical-spring modes]; #5 NOT claimed тАФ no last-7-days physical-modeling paper). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 1005 won on verification ease (runs everywhere with no adapter/permission friction; 1004's headline GPU path is unverifiable headless and degrades to CPU N=96 on the many phones without solid WebGPU, so in practice its 06:30 artifact is likely no better than 1005's). **1004 is the bigger ambition swing and the literal jury-encouraged GPU-compute rebuild** тАФ the strongest single resurrect. **Cycle-2 graft (strongest path):** once there's a real GPU+device to verify on, fold 1004's WGSL compute INTO 1005 as an optional GPU-accelerated high-node-count path (raise the 128-coil chain toward thousands for silkier standing waves), keeping 1005's CPU path as the guaranteed fallback. ### `1001-modal-anvil` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult.** Strike and bow a **dark luminous metal plate that is a real GPU-simulated resonating body** тАФ tap to strike, press-drag to bow; the plate's transverse vibration is a genuine `@compute @workgroup_size(8,8,1)` WGSL **explicit finite-difference leapfrog wave step on a 256├Ч256 grid** (three double-buffered storage buffers `prev`/`curr`/`next`, rotated per frame; a second WGSL render pipeline samples the field into a glowing Chladni surface тАФ antinode glow + thin nodal seams). The sound is **non-linear modal synthesis**: a 16-voice Web Audio bank tuned to inharmonic rectangular-plate ratios `(m┬▓+n┬▓/1.41┬▓)`, where each strike starts the partials **sharp and ramps them DOWN to rest pitch** (amplitudeтЖТpitch tension-modulation, higher modes bend more тАФ the signature "bloom" of struck bronze/metal), with strike-point mode-shape weighting `|sin(m╧Аu)┬╖sin(n╧Аv)|`, velocity-driven loudness, faster high-mode decay, and an always-on detuned shimmer drone. Three-tier fallback WebGPU тЖТ CPU 96┬▓ finite-difference + WebGL2 (R32F) тЖТ Canvas2D (`text-amber-300/95` notice); audio works on every path; a ghost-mallet auto-demo strikes drifting points after ~2.5s idle. **INPUT** touch/pointer strike+bow ┬╖ **OUTPUT** WebGPU compute + WebGPU/WebGL2 render (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ **TECH** explicit FD plate sim (GPU compute) + non-linear modal synthesis ┬╖ **VIBE** dark metal / Chladni. Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-579/1001-modal-anvil/` (`page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [touch + GPU-compute plate sim + non-linear modal synth + GPU render = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs [nlm arXiv:2603.10240; Chladni; the lab's praised `970-tension-gong` non-linear-modal lineage] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з579). **#1 NOT claimed** тАФ modal synthesis has lab priors (`970`); the win is the WebGPU-compute realization + GPU-plate scale. **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3 (scarce WebGPU-compute, sim-as-resonating-body) and the boldest technical swing, but `1002` won on verification ease (the live data is *proven*, no permission, no WGSL-compile risk on Karel's phone) тАФ and WebGPU-compute is no longer scarce (988+992 shipped it within 5 cycles). **Ship on a GPU-verifiable cycle.** **Honest wart (builder):** the audio is **decoupled from the GPU field** тАФ an analytic modal bank sharing the same mode formula + strike-point weighting, not a literal GPUтЖТCPU readback (a documented performance tradeoff; faithful in spirit + spatial response, not literally the sim's output). **Cycle-2 fix on revival:** close that loop with a periodic GPUтЖТCPU displacement readback at a few pickup points to *excite* the modal bank from the real field (the 988/995 sim-drives-audio pattern), and hand-verify the WGSL on real WebGPU hardware (adapter quirks, storage-buffer limits, the interleaved u32/f32 params layout reasoned-not-observed).

### `1003-voice-nebula` тАФ `queued`
**For: adult / meditative.** Sing/speak/hum and your **voice is scattered into a living nebula** тАФ a live 2048-pt FFT (`getFloatFrequencyData`) drives spectral particle emission (loud bins burst more particles, bin frequency тЖТ hue, spectral centroid тЖТ vertical drift) into a raw WebGL2 instanced point-sprite cloud (up to **24k** particles, ~6.2s lifetimes, swirl + buoyancy; Canvas2D `lighter` fallback), so a bright vowel scatters differently than a dark hum and the nebula is a slowly-accreting memory of what you sang. In parallel a time-domain tap fills a ~1.6s ring buffer; a look-ahead scheduler cuts ~160ms Hann-windowed grains every ~85ms and replays them through a **4-voice consonant granular re-pitch choir** (unison/fifth/octave/octave+fifth) with long fades тАФ a lingering self-harmonized choir that hangs after you stop. **Mic-safe:** raw mic тЖТ `inGain тЖТ analyser + grain tap` only (never to `destination`); the sole speaker connection is `limiter тЖР choirBus` (buffered grains only). No-mic falls back to a built-in formant vocal-pad driving the identical pipeline (`text-rose-300` notice); ~2.5s-idle auto-demo sings a phrase. **INPUT** mic voice ┬╖ **OUTPUT** raw WebGL2 particle nebula (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ **TECH** live FFT-driven granular synthesis + spectral particle emission ┬╖ **VIBE** cosmic nebula, incense, spectral, meditative. Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-579/1003-voice-nebula/` (`page.tsx` ~720 lines, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic FFT + granular re-pitch choir + spectral particle emission + WebGL2 nebula = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Roads *Microsound*; Xenakis grains; Barry Truax real-time granulation] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з579). **#1 NOT claimed** тАФ granular + audio-reactive particles have lab priors (`227-paths-granular`). **Why de-selected:** mic permission is the most awkward 06:30 phone check, and *every* gain/threshold/mapping is tuned-by-reasoning-only (highest verification risk of the three); mic is also the most-mined adult input historically. **Honest wart (builder):** the grain ring buffer is filled once per animation frame from the analyser (not an AudioWorklet) тЖТ not sample-accurate, can smear on fast speech. **On revival:** move grain capture to an AudioWorklet for sample-accurate buffering, and hand-tune loudness/density on a real device.

Adult DEEP fire answering **JURY 2026-06-27** provocation #2 (extend the only 5/5, `977-echo-room-gpu`, into a multi-cycle *spatial instrument you walk between rooms* тАФ "massively bigger") + #1 (retire the explainable-inverse formula тЖТ pure timbre / spatial presence) + #3 (force a real GPU path). ### `991-dream-rooms` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult / composers.** A song as a BUILDING you walk through: a **3├Ч3 grid of 9 keyed chambers** laid out by circle-of-fifths (horizontal = a fifth apart, sharing 6/7 tones) + relative-minor (vertical, sharing all tones), so ordinary walking produces musically sensible **modulations** тАФ crossing a doorway changes the key and a drone pad crossfades old-tonicтЖТnew-tonic, the crossfade time scaling with shared pivot-tone count, a lowpass bloom marking the modulation. Inside a chamber, fine position picks a real functional triad/7th (major I┬╖vi┬╖IV┬╖ii┬╖V┬╖iii / minor i┬╖VI┬╖iv┬╖ii┬░┬╖V┬╖III). **INPUT** body-pose (MediaPipe torso centroid) + pointer/touch fallback + ~1.5s-idle auto-demo (a wanderer crosses rooms, audibly modulating, recording a couple of ghosts) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** WebGPU particle field (WGSLтЖТWebGL2тЖТCanvas2D) + an always-visible Canvas2D **operator floor-plan map** (all 9 chambers + key labels + every ghost dot + you тАФ the installation/Tauri view) ┬╖ **TECH** modulation-by-walking + per-chamber functional harmony + a 6-ghost HRTF looper where each ghost lives in its home chamber and is muffled "through the walls" (per-voice lowpass ~520 Hz + lower gain) until you enter, then blooms ┬╖ **VIBE** warm chamber-glow per key (not parchment, not cosmic). Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-575/991-dream-rooms/` (`page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 4/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [pose/pointer + per-room functional harmony + HRTF ghost looper + WebGPU render + operator map = 5] ┬╖ #3 [La Monte Young _Dream House_ / Cardiff _Forty Part Motet_] ┬╖ #4 multi-cycle [977 thread] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з575). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 992 won on the purest-timbre fit to JURY #1 + lowest unheard-risk; **991 is the strongest *operator-map / discrete-rooms* swing** and the most literal "extend 977 into a room you walk between." **Cycle-2 fix on revival:** replace the simplified tonic-drone crossfade with true **voice-led pivot-chord re-spelling** (carry the shared chord, re-voice the rest) for a real modulation engine; merge as 992's discrete-rooms layer.

### `993-resonant-halls` тАФ `queued`
**For: adult.** The ROOM ITSELF as the instrument: a **cruciform cathedral** (apse ┬╖ nave ┬╖ 2 side chapels ┬╖ crypt) where each hall has its own **acoustics** тАФ a per-hall `ConvolverNode` whose impulse response is *procedurally synthesised in code* (exp-decay noise shaped by a spectral tilt + discrete early reflections, peak-normalised, `normalize=false`; ~5.8s dark apse тЖТ ~1.1s tight crypt) plus a parallel bank of 3тАУ4 peaking-biquad **room modes** tuned to each hall's eigenfrequencies тАФ so the same sung voice becomes a totally different sound as you cross a doorway (Gaussian-proximity acoustic crossfade). A 6-ghost HRTF looper sings from each ghost's home hall through *that hall's* reverb, muffled at distance, blooming when you enter. **INPUT** body-pose + pointer + auto-demo ┬╖ **OUTPUT** WebGPU particle field (тЖТWebGL2тЖТCanvas2D) + Canvas2D floor-plan operator map (halls + ghosts + live acoustic readout: decay time, modes) ┬╖ **TECH** procedural convolution-IR + modal room coloration as the playable substance тАФ the lab's **first room-acoustics-as-instrument** (a globally novel technique here) ┬╖ **VIBE** candlelit stone cathedral. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-575/993-resonant-halls/` (`page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 4/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [pose/pointer + procedural-IR convolution + modal banks + HRTF ghost looper + WebGPU render = 5] ┬╖ #3 [acoustic-digital-twin; Cardiff _Forty Part Motet_; Young _Dream House_] ┬╖ #4 multi-cycle ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з575). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the most novel technique of the three, but the **heaviest/riskiest unheard build** тАФ 5 parallel convolvers on the live voice (builder-flagged perf/balance risk) made it the wrong pick for a 06:30 first-listen given the standing verification debt. **On revival:** trim to lazy per-hall convolvers (only instantiate the active hall + neighbours), hand-verify the reverb balance on a real device; reusable as 992's per-room-acoustics layer.

### `989-kids-star-cloth` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** Tilt a tablet like a tray and roll a glowing moon-ball across a springy **trampoline of stars**; the stretching cloth rings like a soft drum. **The lab's only TRUE-3D scene-graph build** (jury: "true 3D scene-graph work is 0├Ч") and the most literal "the simulation IS the resonating body" of the three тАФ the cloth's physical vibration modes ARE the sound, the 960-cristal-friction gold standard applied to a kids toy. **INPUT** device-tilt (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS `requestPermission()` in Start; pointer drag-to-tilt + ~2s-idle auto-demo that drifts the ball in a slow circle) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** **WebGPU compute mass-spring cloth rendered in hand-written true-3D WebGL2** (perspective camera gently orbits, sheet visibly stretches toward/away; CPU-Verlet fallback, all in 3D) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** 28├Ч28 point-mass Provot cloth (structural+shear springs, Verlet/PBD, pinned corners) + ball collision тЖТ **membrane-mode synthesis** (dent depth bends the low fundamental down; ripple energy excites higher drum-skin modes; settle = sustained chord; bounce = soft bloom) ┬╖ **VIBE** indigo starry night, gold/white stars, glowing moon-ball тАФ calm bedtime (the CALM kids category the lab is thin on, JURY 2026-06-22 #4). Eb lullaby key, no wrong notes; kids-safe `gain 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6.5k тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, тЙе30ms attacks, always-on drone. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-574/989-kids-star-cloth/` (`page.tsx`, `cloth.ts`, `cloth-gpu.ts`, `render3d.ts`, `math3d.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [tilt-reader + WebGPU mass-spring cloth sim + membrane-mode synth + true-3D WebGL2 render = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Provot 1995 mass-spring cloth; Chladni/membrane modes; arXiv:2507.11794 WebGPU cloth] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з574). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 988 won on verification ease (touch beats tilt-permission for a 06:30 phone check) + hardest compute + love alignment. **989 is the bigger visual swing (the only true-3D) and the most literal resonating-body** тАФ the strongest single resurrect. **Cycle-2 graft:** raise the WebGPU cloth to higher resolution + add `990`'s boid-fireflies hovering ABOVE the cloth so a hard tilt scatters them; let two balls roll for two voices.

### `990-kids-firefly-flock` тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** HUM and a swarm of **tens of thousands of GPU-simulated fireflies** gathers to your voice and sings back. Largest GPU-compute count of the fire (~30k boids) with the cleanest design (async one-frame-behind readback so the GPU never stalls); freshest sensor (mic, 1├Ч). **INPUT** mic (live autocorrelation pitch + RMS, analysis-only, never stored/transmitted; ghost-hum auto-demo sweeps a pitch through the same pipeline if mic denied/idle) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** **WebGPU compute boids** (WGSL `@compute` Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion over double-buffered storage buffers + a voice-pitch gather force; instanced additive gold-green render; ~3.5k CPU-boids WebGL2 fallback) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** Reynolds boids тЖТ swarm mean-height = scale degree (C-major pentatonic, no wrong notes), swarm cohesion = choir lushness (tight=full chord, scattered=single tone), voice RMS = brightness/energy ┬╖ **VIBE** dusk meadow, green-blue twilight, warm gold-green firefly glints. Kids-safe `gain 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6.5k тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, тЙе30ms ramps, always-on drone, never silent. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-574/990-kids-firefly-flock/` (`page.tsx`, `boids-gpu.ts`, `gl-fallback.ts`, `pitch.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic pitch/RMS + WebGPU boids sim + flockтЖТchoir synth + instanced GPU render = 4] ┬╖ #3 named ref [Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds and Schools," SIGGRAPH 1987] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з574). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** mic-hum is the most awkward of the three for a 06:30 phone check (humming at a desk) though the ghost-hum auto-demo guarantees a sounding glance; 988's touch is the cleaner verification dent. **Strong resurrect** тАФ encourages vocalization (great for 4yo development) and the 30k-boid swarm is a reusable GPU asset (see 989's cycle-2 graft).

## ┬з572 banked seed тАФ 2026-06-27 (cycle 572 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ DEEP тАФ 1 non-winner approach, built complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected; shipped `984-kids-shake-bells`)

DEEP kids fire: ONE concept тАФ *SHAKE the tablet like a tray of magic handbells тЖТ real physically-modeled modal bells ring on a G-Mixolydian ladder* (resurrects the ┬з570 тнР banked `kids-shake-bells` seed; clears JURY 2026-06-26 #1 "no pentatonic crutch тАФ real mode/tension" via Mixolydian + #3 "force a non-pointer input" via off-glass accelerometer; dodges the at-cap diversity tags keyboard/MIDI-input and Canvas2D-output). Built via 2 interaction models. Shipped **`984-kids-shake-bells`** (discrete shake-ONSET тЖТ ladder climbs/descends, one shake = one clear bell тАФ the kid-legible, robust, easiest-to-verify version). The continuous-physics sibling below returned complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-572/`, then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from this brief. Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **984**, so resurrect as тЙе985).

### `985-kids-shake-mobile` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** The **continuous-physics** sibling of `984-kids-shake-bells`: instead of a discrete shake-onset triggering the next bell, the shake feeds ENERGY into a small **Verlet/simple-pendulum sim of ~8 hanging handbells on strings** тАФ the bells SWAY, and a bell rings when its **angular swing velocity peaks past a clapper threshold** near the bottom of its arc (or it **knock-collides** with a neighbor). So the music is *born from the simulated swing the child caused*, not from an input threshold тАФ a sweeping shake propagates a rising/falling **modal shimmer** as the swing travels down the mobile. **INPUT** device SHAKE (`DeviceMotionEvent`, gravity high-passed to linear accel тЖТ angular impulse; iOS `requestPermission()` in Start; тЙе176px SHAKE! button + pointer-drag + spacebar + ~3s-idle ghost auto-swayer fallbacks) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** raw-WebGL2 instanced additive-glow bells on faint swaying strings over a breathing blue-violet night (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** shakeтЖТenergyтЖТpendulum swing sim тЖТ ring-on-clapper-velocity-peak / neighbor-collision тЖТ real **modal bell synthesis** (inharmonic partials ~1/2/2.4/3/4.5, per-partial decays + detune beating; strike loudness=swing velocity) ┬╖ **VIBE** warm gold handbell mobile, calm night (off cosmic-glow). **Mode = G Mixolydian** (flat-7 FтЩо color, NOT pentatonic, NOT a functional cadence). Kids-safe `gain тЙд0.3 тЖТ lowpass 6500 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, always-on G2+D3 drone, тИЪ-voice norm, ~12-min goodnight fade. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-572/985-kids-shake-mobile/` (`page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `physics.ts`, `motion.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md`); exposed tuning constants `SHAKE_ENERGY_GAIN`/`CLAPPER_THRESHOLD`/`COLLISION_GAP`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [shake-reader + pendulum physics sim + modal bell synth + WebGL2 mobile render = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Orff Schulwerk; simple-pendulum `╬▒=-(g/L)sin╬╕`; Mixolydian modal color; Moving Mandala 2025] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з572). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 984 won on the KIDS bar тАФ discrete shakeтЖТringтЖТclimb gives a 4yo crisp *repeatable* causeтЖТeffect and is the most robust unheard ship (one shake = one clear bell), whereas 985's emergent clapper-ring timing is exactly what needs real-device tuning (builder flagged the velocity-peak debounce) and verification debt is the jury's #1 liability. **But 985 is the braver/bigger concept and the purer "the sound is born from your motion" embodiment.** **Cycle-2 graft (the strongest path):** fold 985's swing-physics BETWEEN 984's discrete bells тАФ the bells visibly SWAY between strikes and a hard shake sends a swing-wave down the ladder, marrying 984's legible onset with 985's emergent shimmer. Honest warts (builder): physics constants reasoned-not-device-measured; bell timbre not ear-verified; clapper velocity-peak heuristic is a stand-in for true clapper geometry.

## ┬з571 banked seed тАФ 2026-06-27 (cycle 571 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP тАФ 1 non-winner approach, built complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected; shipped `983-tension-journey`)

Built to demoable this fire, `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-571/`, then `rm -rf`'d un-committed per the orchestration no-half-built-folders rule. Clears the ambition floor (3/5), is sound-as-object + non-pointer (keyboard/Web-MIDI), and is the real-time *played* twin of the shipped autonomous engine. Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **983**, so resurrect as тЙе984).

- **982-tension-ribbon тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** тАФ the real-time *played* tonal-tension instrument. Play chords on the computer keyboard or a **Web-MIDI keyboard**; for each chord the engine computes Elaine Chew's three Spiral-Array tension measures (cloud diameter / cloud momentum / tensile strain on a real 3D helix) live and renders them as a flowing **raw-WebGL2 3D tension ribbon** (width=diameter, twist/displacement=momentum, heat-color indigoтЖТamberтЖТrose=strain) with labeled numeric meters; the synth foregrounds tension audibly (lowpass opens + triangleтЖТsawtooth partials + detune-cents roughness as tension climbs; warm/narrow on resolution). Chord palette includes a tense chromatic set (N6, Ger+6, Aug, dim7, tritone-sub, cluster) so you can build tension and slam it home; ~1s auto-demo rises and resolves; Canvas2D fallback. Builder-complete + tsc/eslint-clean. **Honest warts to fix on revival:** (1) **fixed C-major key тЖТ static tensile-strain anchor** (no key tracking) тАФ add a decaying running-CE key estimate so strain re-homes on modulation (the same fix 983 wants); (2) normalization divisors heuristic, not corpus-fitted; (3) pitch-class collapse (register/voice-leading ignored). **Cycle-2 graft (the strongest path):** fold 982's live 3D spiral-helix viz + Web-MIDI-played perturbation INTO the shipped **983-tension-journey** so you can *watch the engine compose AND grab the keyboard to bend the live tension target by hand* тАФ the autonomous journey and the played instrument become one piece. Refs: Chew *The Spiral Array* (2014); Herremans & Chew "Tension ribbons" (TENOR 2016); MorpheuS (IEEE TAC). RESEARCH ┬з571.

## ┬з570 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-27 (cycle 570 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 2 non-winner explorers, built complete + builder-reported tsc-clean, then de-selected; shipped `981-kids-happy-sad-tree`)

Both built to demoable in this fire, `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-570/`, then `rm -rf`'d un-committed per the orchestration no-half-built-folders rule. Each clears the ambition floor, uses **real (non-pentatonic) harmony**, and is a **non-pointer input** тЖТ all three explorers answered the same JURY #1+#3 pair three different ways (tap / shake / breath). Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **981**, so resurrect as тЙе982).

### `982-kids-shake-bells` тАФ `queued` (off-glass accelerometer; modal bell ladder)
**SHAKE the phone/tablet like a tambourine of magic handbells (accelerometer, fully off-glass) to ring bells tuned to a real G-Mixolydian ladder that climbs then descends with successive shakes.** Shake **intensity** тЖТ how many bells ring + burst brightness (gentle = 1тАУ2 soft tones; big = a full sparkling arpeggio). The mode is **G Mixolydian (G A B C D E FтЩо)** тАФ the lowered-7th FтЩо is the bright modal flavor; **NOT a IтАУIVтАУVтАУI cadence** (deliberately swapped off the cadence to dodge the rhyme with 957 VтЖТI / 974 V7тЖТI) and **NOT pentatonic**. Always-on soft G drone + fifth grounds it. INPUT `devicemotion` shake-onset: high-pass `accelerationIncludingGravity` (subtract a slow gravity LPF), jerk-magnitude threshold crossing w/ ~150ms refractory, peakтЖТintensity; iOS 13+ `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` fired synchronously in the Start tap; 176px round SHAKE! button + spacebar fallback + `text-rose-300` sensor-denied notice + ghost auto-shaker after ~3s idle. OUTPUT **raw WebGL2** point-sprite radial-glow bell field (warm gold over breathing blue-violet night) + Canvas2D fallback тАФ **NOT WebGPU** (shows fallback on most phones + unverifiable headless). Kids-safe `gain тЙд0.3 тЖТ lowpass ~6500 тЖТ comp`, ~15-min fade. Named refs: **Orff Schulwerk** body-percussion/handbell pedagogy + modal (Mixolydian) color vs functional cadence + 2026 embodied-music-education research. Files: `page.tsx` `audio.ts` (`BellEngine`) `motion.ts` (`ShakeOnset`) `gl.ts` (`BellFieldGL`/`BellField2D`) `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 device-SHAKE is a lab-rare input ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [shake-onset detector + modal walker + bell synth + WebGL2 field] ┬╖ #3 named ref). **Why banked (close):** the most embodied/off-glass of the three (directest JURY #3), but accelerometer **needs real-iPad threshold calibration** (builder: "reasoned-not-measured") + iOS permission, so it's **less self-verifiable on Karel's morning phone** than the winner тАФ and the jury's #1 liability this fortnight is verification debt. **Resurrect** on a kids fire where the recent ships are NOT camera/permission-heavy; the shake-onset + modal-walker are a clean reusable pair.

### `983-kids-breath-meadow` тАФ `queued` (mic breath-ENERGY, not pitch; Canvas2D)
**Blow / breathe into the mic to grow a singing meadow тАФ where breath ENERGY (a smoothed RMS envelope, explicitly NOT pitch) swells a real voice-led chord, and each new breath walks a functional progression forward.** The design point that separates it from the lab's many sing/hum pieces (969/972/924/891): **no pitch detection at all** тАФ sustained breath = a sustained chord that swells (more voices smoothstep in the harder you blow), and a **fresh onset after a >250ms quiet gap** steps a genuine diatonic **D-Lydian IтАУIIтАУviтАУIV** progression with portamento voice-leading. A flower blooms per breath (size = peak breath energy, color = chord root). INPUT `getUserMedia` тЖТ Analyser тЖТ time-domain RMS, one-pole smoothed to a 0..1 envelope; onset = rise above threshold after the quiet gate; mic gesture-gated, **analysed only (never routed to speakers тАФ no feedback)**; big "BREATHE" hold-button + spacebar-hold fallback + `text-rose-300` deny notice + ghost auto-breather after ~3s idle. OUTPUT **Canvas2D** organic daylight meadow (blooming flowers, swaying grass, pollen) тАФ deliberately off the over-used GPU-shader lane. Kids-safe chain + always-on pad + ~15-min fade. Named refs: breath-controlled wind instruments (EWI/shakuhachi: breath energy тЖТ dynamics) + Lydian "bright/dreamy" affect + breath/vocalization for 4yo language+music development. Files: `page.tsx` `audio.ts` `mic.ts` `README.md`. **Ambition 2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [breath-energy RMS detector + swelling voice-led chord engine + functional-progression walker + Canvas2D meadow] ┬╖ #3 named refs). **Why banked:** the freshest *concept* (breath-energy, not pitch тАФ a genuinely under-mined input channel) but mic permission + breath-onset thresholding is the **least reliable on first try** (builder flagged the companding is ear-tuned against synthetic input), and a minor wart (only the newest flower sizes to the live peak, so a rapid double-onset under-sizes the prior bloom). **Resurrect** on a fire that wants a calm mic piece; fix the per-flower peak-latching first, and consider a visible breath-meter so a child sees the swell building.

## ┬з569 banked seed тАФ 2026-06-27 (cycle 569 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP non-winner, fully built + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected)

### `980-counterpoint-loom` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
*"What if, the moment I play a melody, the lab wove 1тАУ3 more voices around it LIVE тАФ by the actual enforced rules of species counterpoint тАФ and I could watch each rule fire as it happens?"* A **real-time, deterministic, explainable contrapuntal accompanist** (the sibling to this cycle's winner `979-cantus-engine`; same "explainable inverse of the neural Bach-imitators" thesis, RESEARCH ┬з569 / arXiv 2606.13626, opposite interaction model тАФ *live accompanist* vs `979`'s *autonomous developer*). You play the cantus firmus (Web MIDI **or** computer keyboard `AтАУK`/`QтАУU`, two diatonic octaves; notes quantized to a selectable key/mode); a per-beat **beam search (width ~6)** weaves 1тАУ3 companion voices under **enforced Fux constraints тАФ 0 violations:** strong-beat consonance (P4 between upper voices = dissonant), no parallel/direct/hidden perfect fifths-octaves (perfects only by contrary/oblique motion), no voice crossing below the CF, 4th-species suspensions preparedтЖТtiedтЖТresolved-down-by-step. *Rewarded:* 3rds/6ths, contrary motion, stepwise lines, one climax/phrase, register-center. **True multi-part counterpoint тАФ joint scoring:** each new voice is scored against the CF **and** the companions already chosen for the same beat (full vertical sonority), not N independent duets. Species **1st** (solid), **2nd** (weak-beat passing), **4th** (suspensions) selectable. **INPUT** Web-MIDI+keyboard (non-pointer; revives the 1├Ч MIDI sensor per JURY 2026-06-26 #3) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** raw-WebGL2 woven-score on parchment-dark (amber CF + violet/sage/slate companions in register tiers, interval labels at the leading edge, thickened suspension links, **rose `тИе5 тЬЧ / тЖТ8 тЬЧ / P4 тЬЧ / TT тЬЧ / cross тЬЧ / diss тЬЧ` reject-flashes so the rules read sound-off**; Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ **TECH** real-time enforced species-counterpoint beam search ┬╖ **VIBE** woven manuscript/loom. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [MIDI/keyboard input + beam-search counterpoint engine + FM-triangle synth + WebGL2 loom render] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* 1725, Palestrina, Bach two-part inventions, arXiv 2606.13626] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з569). Self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-569/980-counterpoint-loom/` (`page.tsx`, `counterpoint.ts`, `audio.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md`). **Why banked (close):** both clear ambition + dodge every ban + are pure-music sound-as-object; `979` won on the "massively bigger" mandate тАФ a 5-min *self-developing* fugue with state/memory (minute 5 тЙа minute 1) lands the lab's thin **long-form-with-memory** menu category and is the тнР ┬з568-queued resurrect-first seed, whereas `980` is a per-beat reactive accompanist conceptually nearer the lab's existing call-and-response/canon pieces. **Why тнР resurrect-first AND the cycle-2 graft for 979:** `980`'s **enforced beam search + visible rule-rejection overlay directly fixes `979`'s #1 honest wart** (greedy, no-lookahead voice-leading). The clean cycle-2 deepening of the counterpoint thread = fold `980`'s enforced beam-search scorer + the `тИе5/8 тЬЧ` reject-flash overlay INTO `979`, so a composer can seed a subject live AND watch the development engine *reject* parallel-5/8 candidates as it scores тАФ turning `979`'s greedy scorer into `980`'s enforced search. Honest warts (builder): fixed-grid beat (not yet rhythm-/onset-aware); 2nd-species doesn't yet verify genuine passing tones; beam is per-voice-sequential not joint-all-voices; no melodic-leap-recovery / cadence formulas; WebGL2 path omits numeric interval labels (needs a glyph atlas тАФ present only in the Canvas2D path).

### `975-kids-tilt-hill` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** The **continuous tension-gradient** sibling of `974-kids-tilt-cadence`: instead of three discrete wells, ONE smooth glowing sunset hill where **harmonic tension = altitude**. The valley floor is Home (Tonic I); tilt makes a single warm orb CLIMB toward the Dominant 7th (the leading tone E + chordal 7th BтЩн audibly swell, detune, and beat harder as you climb), and releasing the tilt lets gravity slide the orb home тАФ the dominant tension resolving continuously on the way down (EтЖСF, BтЩнтЖУA) as one exhaled breath, with a warm bloom + chime on arrival. **INPUT** device TILT (`DeviceOrientation gamma` тЖТ sideways gravity drive; iOS `requestPermission()` in Start) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** Canvas2D additive warm-glow (amber/rose/gold sunset hill; orb core warm-amber at home тЖТ bright rose-white at V7) ┬╖ **TECHNIQUE** continuous 1-D harmonic-tension field тАФ tiltтЖТaltitudeтЖТa tension scalar `tтИИ[0,1]` cross-fades IтЖТii/IVтЖТV7 AND swells the two tension-defining tones in proportion to `t` (real voice-leading, NOT a chord swap; NOT pentatonic) ┬╖ **VIBE** warm sunset, calm, kids-safe (always-on tonic drone, ramped gains, low-pass, no sudden transients). **Degrade:** no sensor тЖТ horizontal slider + drag-the-orb + тЖРтЖТтЖСтЖУ/space all set the same `t`; ~3s-idle hands-free auto-demo runs a slow climb-to-V7-then-release arc; rose-300 sensor note. **Named refs:** Riemann functional harmony ┬╖ tonal-gravity / tension-as-altitude models ┬╖ BeSound ┬╖ CHI 2026 "From Movement to Sound and Back" (movement-based sonification). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [tilt physics + continuous functional-harmony field + synth + Canvas2D render] ┬╖ #3 named refs; #5 RESEARCH ┬з566). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 974 won on KIDS *legibility* тАФ three bold color-coded wells give a 4yo a clear target and a crisp repeatable magic moment (color is the kids language). **But 975 is the purer embodiment of this cycle's research dive** (CHI 2026 "movement carries a *quality*, not just a trigger") тАФ tilt here carries continuous tension, not a chord selection тАФ so it is the strongest next-cycle deepening / kids resurrect-first; a natural cycle-2 is to graft 975's continuous tension-trail BETWEEN 974's wells (the marble's harmonic "altitude" between basins becomes audible). Builder note: `gamma ┬▒35┬░` = full tilt wants real-device tuning. Folder had `page.tsx` + `physics.ts` + `audio.ts` + README.

Ambition 4/5 (#1 wave-terrain [grep-0├Ч] ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [keyboard/MIDI + orbit-sampler/morph + DFT-PeriodicWave synth + Canvas2D contour+scope render] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Mitsuhashi 1982; Borgonovo & Haus 1986; Roads *Microsound*; Scaler *Carbon Electra 2* May 28 2026; Conductive Labs *Terrain* 2025] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з565). **De-selected ONLY because** 973's WebGL2 3D landscape is the more *spectacular and surprising* realization of "the landscape IS the sound" (Karel's surprise priority) and the stronger non-cosmic register; 974 is the *more legible/provable* and *more bulletproof* one. **Resurrect FIRST** on the next adult cycle wanting a guaranteed-everywhere render, a phone/installation surface, or the directest "see the waveform you're carving" teaching view тАФ OR fold its provable side-by-side scope panel INTO 973 as a toggle. ### `971-kids-tilt-cadence` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**The one question:** *what if a 4-year-old could FEEL a real V7тЖТI cadence in their hands тАФ by TILTing the tablet to roll a glowing marble home through a tension-and-resolution landscape?* **Input = device TILT** (DeviceOrientation `beta`/`gamma` тЖТ gravity vector; non-pointer, off the banned drag-on-glass; iOS `requestPermission()` inside Start). **Output = WebGL2/Canvas2D additive glow**, warm meadow (NOT cosmic glow). **Technique = tilt rigid-body marble physics + Riemann functional-harmony TтАУSтАУDтАУT state machine** (a damped point-mass rolls into "bowl" wells; well transitions drive a chord machine). Three colored wells: **gold Home = Tonic (I)**, **green Away = Subdominant (IV)**, **orange Tense = Dominant (V7, with the leading tone)**. The magic moment: roll the marble from the orange Dominant well into the gold Tonic well тЖТ a real **V7тЖТI cadence** fires, sparks burst, flowers bloom тАФ *tension тЖТ home, learned in the hands*. Always-on tonic drone; kids-safe chain. **Degrade:** no sensor тЖТ pointer tilt-pad + arrow nudges + a hands-free auto-demo rolling a full TтЖТSтЖТDтЖТI loop within ~1 s. **Named refs:** Hugo Riemann functional harmony (the wells ARE T/S/D) ┬╖ Toca Boca tilt-toys ┬╖ BeSound (embodied music education for children). Ambition **2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [tilt-physics + functional state machine + synth + render] ┬╖ #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 972 won on real-harmony *depth* (it makes harmony FROM the child's actual voice; this has 3 fixed wells) + a recent-research anchor тАФ but tilt is fresh (jury at 3├Ч, not banned) and the *felt-cadence-in-your-hands* framing is the strongest kids hook banked; resurrect-first. Builder note: tilt sensitivity (`/35`) + `accel=1.9` need real-device tuning. Folder had `page.tsx` + `physics.ts` + `engine.ts` + README.

### `973-kids-step-parade` тАФ `queued`
**The one question:** *what if a child's whole-body DANCING drove the tempo and energy of a real chord-progression parade тАФ move a lot тЖТ the parade marches bright and fast, stand still тЖТ it slows to a gentle lullaby on home?* **Input = front CAMERA whole-body motion-energy** (frame-difference / optical-flow: downscale each frame to 64├Ч48, diff consecutive frames, sum |luminance change| тЖТ one smoothed scalar; NO ML model, robust across lighting; analysis-only, never recorded). The scarce camera/body sensor; off pointer-drag. **Output = WebGL2 fragment-shader parade** (four glowing creatures, one per chord). **Technique = camera optical-flow motion-energy тЖТ tempo/dynamics modulation of a fixed IтАУviтАУIVтАУV functional loop** (CтАУAmтАУFтАУG, the "four-chord song" / doo-wop changes тАФ recognizable real harmony, NOT pentatonic) on a lookahead Web Audio scheduler (energy тЖТ BPM 54тЖТ132, pad brightness, pluck density). The harmony is always correct; the child shapes its *energy* with their body. **Degrade:** no camera тЖТ тЙе96 px tap pad + slider feeding the same `inject()` energy + a hands-free auto-demo marching within ~1 s; no WebGL тЖТ notice, audio keeps playing. **Named refs:** BeSound (whole-body тЖТ harmony for children) ┬╖ Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (full-body camera, no wearables) ┬╖ "Moving Mandala" (2025, embodied MR synchrony in children). Ambition **2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [camera motion-energy + groove engine + harmony loop + WebGL2 render] ┬╖ #3 named refs). **Why de-selected:** strong embodied/diversity answer, but the child only modulates *energy* of a fixed loop тАФ 972 lets the child *generate* the harmony. ## ┬з563 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-26 (cycle 563 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE non-winners, both fully built + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean, then de-selected)

WIDE adult fire: 3 orthogonal explorers, each a **non-pointer input into a real physical-modeling instrument body** (answering JURY 2026-06-26 #2 "make the SOUND the resonating object, not a GPU-sim screensaver" + #3 "force a non-pointer input"; dodging every ban: pointer-drag-primary ┬╖ cosmic-glow ┬╖ GPU-sim-pulse-bell). Shipped **`970-tension-gong`** (keyboard/MIDI тЖТ non-linear modal struck-metal; lab-first technique + the only no-hardware-dependency build тЖТ the directest dent in the verification-debt liability). The two below returned complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs.

### `971-air-column` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adult / live-performance.** *"What if you could play a wind instrument with your breath and your hands in the air тАФ no contact, no mouse тАФ and the sound came from a REAL model of air resonating in a tube?"* A contactless **blown digital-waveguide flute**: the sound is neither oscillator nor sample but a **fractional-delay-line bore** carrying pressure waves up and down, reflecting sign-inverted + lowpassed at the open end (round-trip delay = pitch), driven by a **non-linear jet exciter** (jet-delay line + cubic `jet тИТ jet┬│` saturation + breath noise + vibrato) that makes the tube **self-oscillate** into a stable flute tone with no oscillator тАФ and **overblow up an octave** when breath pressure passes a threshold, exactly like a real flute jumps register. **The lab's FIRST blown air column** (every prior physical string is plucked Karplus тАФ never a blown waveguide w/ jet). **INPUT** = the **webcam**, hand-rolled optical flow (no MediaPipe/TF.js): each frame downsampled to a 32├Ч24 grid, frame-to-frame luminance diff summed тЖТ **motion energy = breath pressure**; horizontal **motion centroid = pitch** quantized to **D Dorian** across two octaves (move more = blow harder/overblow; move where = which note). Graceful: no camera тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + **keyboard fallback** (number row = notes, hold = breath, Space = blow harder/overblow) so a no-camera reviewer still hears it; no AudioWorklet тЖТ triangle-osc voice. **OUTPUT** Canvas2D (warm wooden pipe + standing-wave node pattern + schlieren mouth-turbulence + dim motion silhouette) ┬╖ **TECH** digital-waveguide air column + non-linear jet self-oscillation + hand-rolled optical flow ┬╖ **VIBE** warm wood/paper/reed-amber (off cosmic-glow). Refs: **Julius O. Smith III, *Physical Audio Signal Processing*** (waveguide flute/slide-flute/blown-bottle) ┬╖ **Perry R. Cook, *Real Sound Synthesis*** (STK flute/jet). Ambition 3/5 (#1 never-used technique [blown waveguide] ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [optical flow + waveguide DSP + jet + Canvas viz] ┬╖ #3 named refs). **De-selected ONLY because** 970 hit a tighter researchтЖТbuild chain (today's ┬з563 nlm paper) + zero hardware dependency (the verification-debt win Karel's jury keeps asking for), whereas 971's camera path can't be exercised in-box and self-oscillating jet models are notoriously finicky (risk it doesn't reliably sing). **Resurrect FIRST** on the next adult cycle тАФ it's *also* the camera-sensor revival the jury wanted (#3), and a contactless live-performance instrument; hand-verify the jet self-oscillation + overblow on a real device. Honest warts (builder): the jet stability is hand-tuned and untestable in-box; the on-screen standing wave is drawn from pitch+amplitude, not read from the delay buffer.

### `972-resonant-bodies` тАФ `queued`
**For: adult.** *"What if any sound you make тАФ a tap on your desk, a breath, a hiss, your voice тАФ could PLAY a physical object, ringing it like a struck bell, glass, or wooden gourd?"* A cross-modal **exciterтЖТresonator** instrument: the microphone is used **not** as a pitch source and **not** as a recorder but as the raw **excitation energy** driving a bank of tuned modal resonators. A sharp **tap** is a near-impulse тЖТ clean struck-bell attack; sustained **noise** (breath/hiss) re-excites the modes тЖТ a bowed/blown shimmer. Four bodies, each a real modal spectrum **also tuned to a just-intoned A-minor chord**: **bell metal** (clustered inharmonic, long ring) ┬╖ **wine glass** (one dominant near-sine + faint overtones тАФ why a rubbed glass sings) ┬╖ **wood gourd** (1:4:10 stretch, fast dry decay) ┬╖ **ceramic bowl** (bright mid cluster). The SAME tap rings each differently. **INPUT** = **mic-as-exciter** (primary, non-pitch-detection) + keyboard (`1тАУ4` body, `тЖСтЖУ`/`[]` transpose, `S` strike, Space mute) тАФ no pointer-drag. **TECH** AudioWorklet bank of high-Q Chamberlin SVF band-pass resonators (mic тЖТ worklet input тЖТ modes тЖТ sum); native `BiquadFilterNode` bandpass-bank fallback if no worklet ┬╖ **OUTPUT** Canvas2D (each resonator a ring/plate/bar pulsing with its live mode amplitude тАФ you see the object ring where you hear it) ┬╖ **VIBE** material/earthy (brass/glass-teal/wood/ceramic тАФ off cosmic-glow). **Feedback-safe:** `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (ratio 12, fast attack) + conservative gain + lowpass + headphones notice + instant Space-mute; no mic тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + built-in noise-burst Strike exciter so it still rings. Refs: **Andy Farnell, *Designing Sound*** (modal/resonator synthesis, exciterтАУresonator decomposition) ┬╖ Perry Cook modal shaker/resonator models. Ambition 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic capture + modal bank + material switching + viz] ┬╖ #3 named ref). **De-selected because** its core (a modal resonator/biquad-bandpass bank) is the closest of the three to ground the lab has covered (960-friction's modal body; prior filterbanks), and the micтЖТspeaker feedback path is a real hazard to ship unheard; 970 and 971 both offered a more clearly novel technique. **Resurrect** on a cycle wanting a tactile mic-as-instrument piece (the "play objects with any sound" idea is genuinely charming) тАФ best paired with a real-device hand-verify for the feedback safety. Honest warts (builder): modal frequencies are musically curated approximations, not measured impulse responses; feedback safety is reasoned, not bench-tested.

WIDE kids fire: 3 orthogonal explorers, each an **embodied non-pointer input** into **REAL functional harmony with felt tension/resolution** (dodging every JURY 2026-06-26 ban: pointer-drag-primary ┬╖ cosmic-glow ┬╖ pentatonic-no-wrong-notes ┬╖ GPU-sim-pulse-bell). ### `967-kids-home-hill` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** *"What if a 4-year-old could FEEL the pull of musical home тАФ tilt the tablet to roll a glowing firefly across a meadow, and real chords pull it back toward home the way gravity pulls a ball downhill?"* The directest build of the ┬з562 embodied-harmony research (Song Walker / kinetic tonal pedagogy): a **tonal-gravity field**. The meadow is divided into big soft regions = real C-major functions (**I=C/E/G home valley** with a constant gentle pull ┬╖ vi=A/C/E ┬╖ IV=F/A/C ┬╖ **V7=G/B/D/F = the uphill tension hill**, leading-tone B straining). Tilt rolls the firefly (velocity+friction physics); home-pull means whenever the child stops tilting it drifts back to HOME тАФ they *feel* music wanting to resolve. Sitting on the V builds an audible leading-tone tension (orange flicker, worried face, swelling B shimmer); tilting back lets it **swoop home and resolve** (C/E/G bell chimes, nest glows) тАФ an embodied, hands-caused VтЖТI a 4yo causes with no reading. **INPUT** device **tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS-gated behind Start; pointer-drag silent fallback w/ `text-rose-300` notice) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** Canvas2D (warm sunrise meadow тАФ bulletproof phone render + fresh surface) ┬╖ **TECH** functional-harmony **tonal-gravity field** + nearest-tone diatonic voice-leading + warm triangle/sine partial synth w/ portamento glide + low C2/G2 drone (never silent) ┬╖ **VIBE** warm storybook sunrise. Master gainтЙд0.28тЖТlowpass 7kтЖТcomp, 1/тИЪvoices norm; idle viтЖТIVтЖТVтЖТI auto-demo after ~3s; full teardown. Files built (839 lines): `page.tsx` (457) + `harmony.ts` (178: real functions + `tonalGravity` + `voiceLead` + `tension`) + `audio.ts` (204) + README. Refs: **Song Walker** (embodied harmony interaction) ┬╖ **AREmbody** (AR tonal-harmony app) ┬╖ **Fred Lerdahl, *Tonal Pitch Space*** (tonal gravity) ┬╖ Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading*. Ambition 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з562). **De-selected ONLY because** 969 hit a higher ambition (4/5, criterion #1 a never-used technique) with the rarer input (voice vs tilt тАФ tilt is already 3├Ч in the audit) and the more surprising concept; 967 is the *cleanest, lowest-risk, most-legible* embodied-harmony build and the directest realization of the research. **Resurrect FIRST** on the next kids cycle wanting a guaranteed-everywhere render + a calm physical toy, or fold its tonal-gravity field into an adult "walk-through harmony terrain." Honest warts (builder): real on-device tilt + the iOS permission prompt couldn't be exercised in-box; tilt mapping assumes a roughly portrait hold.

### `968-kids-shake-box` тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** *"What if winding a magic music box were how a child plays a real chord progression тАФ shake the tablet to crank it one chord forward through a genuine IтАУviтАУIVтАУVтАУI cadence, and the music swells with how hard you shake?"* A whole-body cadence sequencer: each **shake-burst** (accel тЙ│11 m/s┬▓, 300ms refractory) cranks a glowing music-box cylinder one notch and strikes the next chord; the progression loops **IтЖТviтЖТIVтЖТVтЖТI**, so repeated shaking walks a real cadence over and over (*home тЖТ wander тЖТ rising тЖТ **pullтАж** тЖТ **HOME!***). The **V is dramatized as tension** (shorter/tenser voicing, leaning white-hot pins) and the returning **I as a long octave-doubled bloom-and-settle** тАФ going-away-and-coming-home a 4yo plays with their body. Shake harder тЖТ more particles, brighter glow, fuller octave-doubled voicing; gentle тЖТ soft; stillness тЖТ tonic sustains over a soft drone. **INPUT** device **shake** (`DeviceMotionEvent`, iOS-gated behind Start; full-screen tap-pad fallback only, `text-rose-300` notice) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** raw-WebGL2 (hand-written fragment shader: turning 16-pin ring of light, per-pin flares, energy-driven warm particles; Canvas2D `drawFallback` if no WebGL2) ┬╖ **TECH** real IтАУviтАУIVтАУVтАУI cadence state machine + greedy nearest-tone diatonic voice-leading + struck-metal music-box synth (sine+triangle+inharmonic shimmer) w/ energyтЖТdynamics mapping ┬╖ **VIBE** warm golden toy-shop / music-box. Master gainтЙд0.28тЖТlowpass 7.5kтЖТcomp, тИЪ-voice norm; idle auto-demo cadence after 3s; full teardown. Files built (1197 lines): `page.tsx` (484) + `progression.ts` (153: cadence machine + `voiceLead` + tension/resolved flags) + `audio.ts` (301) + `gl.ts` (259, all GL nullables guarded) + README. Refs: music-box / barrel-organ mechanical-sequencer lineage ┬╖ Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading* ┬╖ the cadence as tonal music's fundamental tension-resolution gesture. Ambition 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з562). **De-selected because** 969 and 967 both edged it: 969 on input-rarity + ambition, 967 on render-bulletproofness for a phone-reviewed kids piece; the shake input is genuinely fresh (1├Ч in the audit) and worth resurrecting. **Resurrect** on a kids cycle wanting a physical/energetic toy or a WebGL2-glow surface. Honest warts (builder): shake threshold is hand-tuned (favors "always responds"), untestable in-box; the WebGL cylinder is a shader illusion, not true 3D.

## ┬з561 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-26 (cycle 561 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP non-winner, fully built + tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected)

DEEP adult fire: ONE concept тАФ a **true oscilloscope vector-synthesizer** where the glowing image you SEE and the stereo signal you HEAR are *literally one signal* (X=left, Y=right) тАФ built via 2 approaches. Shipped **`965-phosphor-draw`** (draw-your-own-shape; WebGL2 RGBA16F phosphor feedback; pitch via `playbackRate` so the looping buffer is never rebuilt тЖТ scope renders sample-for-sample exactly what plays, continuously). The twin below returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; **rm -rf'd before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed)** тАФ rebuild from this brief.

### `966-osci-solids` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued`
**For: adults.** The "massively bigger" sibling of `965-phosphor-draw`: instead of drawing a flat 2D shape, a **rotating 3D wireframe solid** (cube / tetra / octa / torus / trefoil knot / 3D star) is projected to 2D and traced as **one continuous pen-path**, then emitted as the stereo signal тАФ so you **literally HEAR a 3D object spinning** as you watch it draw itself on the green phosphor scope. Faces turning toward/away morph the timbre (sharp solids = bright/buzzy, torus/knot = rounder). Files built this fire (all tsc/eslint-clean): `page.tsx` (Start gate, pointer drag-rotate, solid picker, pitch/spin/perspective sliders, autoplay cube, teardown) + `geometry.ts` (the 6 solids as verts+edges + `buildStrokeOrder` greedy single-stroke Eulerian-ish walk) + `projection.ts` (hand-written 3├Ч3 Euler rotation + blendable perspective divide + arc-length resample to 1024-pt loop, no three.js) + `audio-engine.ts` (stereo `AudioBuffer` ch0=X/ch1=Y, `loop=true`, rebuilt ~25├Ч/s with crossfade between two looping sources, 18Hz DC-block, master peak 0.28) + `scope.ts` (Canvas2D phosphor: alpha-fade persistence + additive `lighter` glow + speed-modulated brightness + CRT grid) + README. Ambition 4/5 (#1 vector/oscilloscope synth as core [grep-0├Ч shipped] ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [3D projection + single-stroke ordering + stereo synth + phosphor render] ┬╖ #3 named refs [Hansi Raber OsciStudio/osci-render; Jerobeam Fenderson; Ryoji Ikeda data-cosm 2026; Lissajous 1857] ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з561). **De-selected ONLY because** 965 is (a) the more *interactive instrument* тАФ you DRAW, directly extending Karel's strongest loved cluster (`223-fourier-paint`тЭдя╕П, `153-paint-compose`тЭдя╕П, `100`/`152`/`158`/`160`тЭдя╕П), and (b) the *cleaner* realization of the "signal = image" thesis: 965's `playbackRate`-only pitch never rebuilds the buffer, so the scope is sample-for-sample identical to the audio *continuously*, whereas 966 rebuilds + crossfades ~25├Ч/s (the builder's own honest caveat: timbre updates in small steps on very fast manual spins), and (c) 965's WebGL2 float-feedback phosphor is a richer CRT glow than 966's Canvas2D. **Resurrect as the cycle-2 deepening of the oscilloscope thread** тАФ the natural "massively bigger" extension (add arbitrary 3D, or trace **Karel's initials / a piano** in 3D so it spins and sings; consider an AudioWorklet that rotates X/Y per-sample to kill the 25Hz stepping entirely). Honest wart: the greedy single-stroke walk leaves a few faint pen-lift lines on some solids (audible as faint clicks).

### `963-kids-coral-bloom` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** The IDENTICAL concept as the shipped `964-kids-coral-garden` тАФ tilt the tablet тЖТ a bioluminescent coral reef GROWS ITSELF via real **differential growth** and *sings the warm pentatonic melody its growing tip traces* тАФ but rendered on **raw WebGL2 additive-glow quads** (instanced glowing quads over an indigoтЖТvioletтЖТteal gradient with caustic shimmer; tips glow larger) instead of Canvas2D, for a **richer multi-layer bloom**. Same engine spec: per-node neighbor-attraction + O(n) **spatial-hash repulsion** + curvature smoothing + edge/curvature node-insertion + tip branching, ~2200-node cap; tilt (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS-gated) biases the growth/light vector, tap-to-seed garnish, pointer-drag + idle auto-demo fallbacks. ## ┬з557 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-26 (cycle 557 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE non-winners, BOTH fully built + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected)

WIDE adult fire: three explorers each answered **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** ("make real harmony the idea") via a *different mechanism + surface*. Shipped **`954-sync-bloom`** (emergent harmony from Kuramoto synchronization on raw-WebGPU compute тАФ the only candidate hitting JURY #1's scarce surface + the direct ┬з557 research chain). The two below returned complete and build-clean; **rm -rf'd before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed)** тАФ rebuild from these briefs. Both are strong stand-alone adult pieces.

- **`955-cadence-river` тнР (resurrect-first adult)** тАФ *"What if music could compose its own endless chorale?"* A **generative functional-harmony engine** (the lab's first): a weighted TтЖТPDтЖТDтЖТresolution state machine with four cadence types, **secondary dominants used as pivots** to modulate around the circle of fifths, and a key/Roman-numeral **memory** so it never loops тАФ a long-form stateful piece (different at min 6 than min 1). Realizes each chord as **SATB voice-leading** (nearest-tone motion + prepared/resolved suspensions + parallel-5/8 avoidance), voiced by warm additive organ + synth-convolution reverb (NOT granular). **INPUT** keyboard-nudge (autonomous + тЖСтЖУ bright/dark, тЖРтЖТ chromaticism, Space cadence-now, [ ] tempo) ┬╖ **OUTPUT** raw-WebGL2 four function-colored voice-ribbons flowing through pitch├Чtime (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ **TECH** functional-harmony grammar + voice-leading + modulation (long-form) ┬╖ **VIBE** warm cathedral-dusk. Refs: Aldwell & Schachter *Harmony and Voice Leading* ┬╖ Schoenberg *Theory of Harmony* ┬╖ Tymoczko *A Geometry of Music* (2011); the deliberate **non-ML counterpoint** to 2026 neural harmonizers (arXiv 2511.14600 / 2506.18143). Builder-verified: a 200-chord dry run made proper progressions, correctly-spelled secondaries, all 4 cadence types, suspensions resolving down by step, ~10 keys visited, bass never crossing soprano. Ambition 4/5 (#1 first functional-harmony grammar ┬╖ #2 тЙе4 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ long-form-commitment + #5 ┬з557). **Why banked, not shipped:** the most *on-mandate* harmony build and the directest "workspace for composers" answer, BUT it's the more *expected* answer to #2 (a generative chorale is a known idea) on the non-scarce WebGL2 surface, whereas 954 also cracks JURY #1's raw-WebGPU-compute gap with a more surprising concept. Honest wart (builder): voice-leading is greedy/heuristic (parallel check only bassтЖФsoprano) тАФ competent student chorale, not Bach. **Resurrect-first** on the next adult cycle wanting a warm, legible harmony piece, or as cycle-2 of a multi-cycle "the lab learns to compose" thread (add dual-Roman pivot analysis on-screen, 4тАУ3 suspension chains, a VтАУI pedal point, and snap the ribbon axis to the live key's scale degrees so a modulation visibly re-grids pitch space).

- **`956-counterpoint-weave`** тАФ *"What if you drew ONE melody and the music wove three more around it тАФ by the actual rules of species counterpoint?"* The lab's first **species-counterpoint** engine (harmony from the *horizontal* weave, the inverse of 955's vertical grammar). You draw a slow contour; it resamples to a diatonic **cantus firmus** and a **beam search** (width 6) generates 1тАУ3 companion voices under **Fux** rules тАФ *enforced* (verified node-side, 0 violations): strong-beat consonance (P4 treated as dissonance between voices), no parallel 5/8, perfect consonances by contrary/oblique motion only; *rewarded*: imperfect consonances, contrary motion, stepwise lines, single climax. Implements **1st species** solidly + **2nd** (passing tones, weak-beat dissonance) + **4th** (preparedтЖТtiedтЖТdissonantтЖТstep-resolved **suspensions**; 7 genuine ones on the demo CF). **INPUT** pointer-draw-contour ┬╖ **OUTPUT** Canvas2D woven luminous threads on a parchment/Bauhaus ground (colored strong-beat interval nodes, magenta suspension links, flashing `тИе5/8 тЬЧ` rejections тАФ the rules read sound-off) ┬╖ **TECH** generative species counterpoint + additive/subtractive synth ┬╖ **VIBE** Renaissance/Bauhaus weave. Refs: Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* (1725) ┬╖ Palestrina ┬╖ Bach two-part inventions. Ambition 3/5 (#1 first species-counterpoint ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs + #5 ┬з557). **Why banked:** the most *legible* and tactile of the three (you see the rules fire), BUT Canvas2D is the least-scarce surface and "draw a line тЖТ music" sits nearer existing draw-melody pieces; 954 was the scarcer-surface, higher-surprise pick. Honest wart (builder): companion voices are policed only against the CF, not each other (banding hides it, but it's not true 3-part counterpoint); minor-mode cadences stay modal (no raised leading tone). **Resurrect** on a kids OR adult cycle wanting a tactile theory-made-visible instrument, or deepen by making the beam search *joint across all voices* (score the full vertical sonority + inter-voice motion per bar) and add cadential leading-tone sharpening.

### `938-morphogenesis` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `queued` (WebGPU compute ┬╖ the SCARCEST GPU surface in the lab right now)
**For: adult / organic-morphogenetic.** Music from a **living chemical pattern**: a **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** Turing system breeds spots/stripes/labyrinths on the GPU (256┬▓, 8 sub-steps/frame, ping-pong storage); pointer-drag *drips reagent* to seed growth; the evolving **texture** of the field тАФ activity level, edge/turbulence energy, change-rate, and 4├Ч4 region activity тАФ is read back (async on WebGPU, sync on WebGL2 fallback, every 2nd/3rd frame), downsampled, and mapped to **granular-texture synthesis**: grain density, bandpass brightness, stereo pan over a dumb-pentatonic drone. **Primary path is a true WGSL `@compute` shader** (the scarcest GPU surface тАФ only 1├Ч/10 in the audit, vs three.js banned at 4├Ч and raw-WebGL2 warm at 3├Ч) with a genuine **same-equation raw-WebGL2 fragment ping-pong fallback** (no three.js, no Canvas2D). F/k presets switch regimes (spots / coral / labyrinth / mitosis) тАФ each *sounds* different because the texture statistics differ. Bioluminescent teal/violet substrate with glowing chemical fronts; Anadol-ish flowing pigment. **De-selected ONLY because** 939's space-weather concept out-surprised it on the Karel-facing axis this fire тАФ NOT on diversity (938 is actually the *cleanest* surface dodge) or quality. **938's value:** (a) it is the directest answer to JURY #1 ("GPU is the scarce surface тАФ swing to WebGPU compute"); (b) reaction-diffusion is near-lab-first (texture-as-music, not pitch); (c) clean types тАФ **no `@ts-nocheck` needed** (WebGPU resolves via `@webgpu/types`, same idiom as 932), so it's build-safe today. **Resurrect first on the next adult fire where a fresh GPU-compute surface is wanted.** Ambition 3/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [pointer-seed + WGSL/WebGL2 RD solver + GPU feature-readback + granular synth] + #3 named refs [Turing 1952 / Pearson 1993 / Codrops-Tympanus WebGPU RD 2024] + #5 dated RESEARCH ┬з549). Honest warts (builder-reported): feature-normalization constants (├Ч3.5/├Ч22/├Ч40) are hand-tuned and may want real-hardware balancing; the WebGPU readback path couldn't be exercised headless (logic verified by inspection). Files built this fire: page.tsx + README.

### `937-cathedral-phase` тАФ `queued` (raw-WebGL2 raymarched SDF ┬╖ keyboard ┬╖ the cleanest rhythm-not-pitch build)
**For: adult / ritual-sacred.** "What if a cathedral were a **rhythm machine**?" Five **Euclidean** rhythm voices (Bjorklund: E(3,8), E(5,8), E(7,16), E(4,9), E(2,5)) on a shared 6s base cycle, each striking one minor-pentatonic stone tone; each voice has a **per-voice tempo multiplier (0.85тАУ1.15)** so off-unison the patterns drift **out of phase** over tens of seconds and slowly re-converge тАФ **Steve Reich's *Piano Phase* process made architectural** тАФ then snap back to unison on `R`. INPUT: **computer keyboard** (1тАУ5 toggle voices, тЖР/тЖТ select a ring, тЖС/тЖУ or +/тИТ nudge phase, R/0 re-align, space transport) + pointer-click ring step-cells (cold input, off banned touch/tilt/mic/camera). OUTPUT: **raw-WebGL2 raymarched SDF vaulted nave** (domain-repeated columns/arches/groin-vault, soft shadows, warm candle-amber light bands that flare on each voice's onsets; no three.js/Canvas2D). All voices feed a **synthesized cathedral convolution reverb** (discrete early reflections + ~4.6s exponential noise tail) so the stone space rings. Deep stone-indigo + amber, reverent/hypnotic. Degrades to audio-only + amber notice if no WebGL2. **De-selected because** 939 (space weather) and 938 (WebGPU compute, scarcer surface) edged it on surprise and surface-freshness respectively тАФ but it is the *cleanest* JURY-#3 answer (music purely from rhythm/phasing/space, pitch held dumb) and the ritual/cathedral vibe is absent from the last 10. **Resurrect when raw-WebGL2 is cold and a ritual/rhythm piece is wanted.** Ambition 3/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [keyboard + Euclidean/Reich phasing engine + convolution-reverb space + WebGL2 raymarch render] + #3 named refs [Reich *Piano Phase* 1967 / Toussaint 2005 / Inigo Quilez raymarching] + #5 dated RESEARCH ┬з549). Honest wart (builder-reported): the SDF groin-vault is a smooth-min'd torus approximation тАФ "suggestive cathedral" more than architecturally precise. Files built this fire: page.tsx + euclid.ts (Bjorklund) + README.

DEEP cycle: ONE concept тАФ **"Resonant Field," a GPU spatial-timbre room** (mic тЖТ timbre-only features [RMS, spectral centroid, flatness, flux, 8-band silhouette; **zero pitch**] тЖТ a GPU light-field whose *form* IS your timbre + a spatial-granular re-synth of your own captured sound, each grain HRTF-panned in 3D by its timbre + a deliberately-dumb fixed drone bed; music from **timbre ├Ч space, not pitch theory**) тАФ fielded as **3 parallel GPU render approaches** that share the same `audio.ts` (HRTF per-grain spatial granular + drone + synthetic auto-demo) and the same `features.ts` (pitch-free extractor), differing only in renderer. Anchored on RESEARCH ┬з539 (Delta Sound Labs XStream, NAMM 25 Jan 2026 тАФ spatial *live* granular; this piece **inverts** it: placement automatic & timbre-driven, not knob-driven). Shipped **`909-resonant-field-volume`** (three.js raymarched volumetric nebula тАФ the most robust GPU path: a fullscreen fragment raymarch runs on ANY WebGL, so it actually GPU-renders on Karel's 06:30 phone where the other two would likely hit a degrade path). Both siblings below returned **complete + self-reported ESLint/tsc-clean** (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs + 909's shared `audio.ts`/`features.ts`.

- **`908-resonant-field-compute` тнР (RESURRECT-FIRST тАФ the frontier render: a hand-written WebGPU **WGSL compute shader** advecting 120k particles through a curl-noise flow field, additive point-sprite render, `FieldMemory` accretion/relaxation, Canvas2D fallback ~2,600 particles).** Same concept, GPU-compute instead of raymarch. **De-selected ONLY on robustness for the hands-off glance** тАФ WebGPU is still absent on many phones/browsers, so the 06:30 review would most likely see its *Canvas2D* fallback, not the WGSL field (the GPU win wouldn't land); also it captures via the **deprecated ScriptProcessor** (swap to an AudioWorklet on resurrect) and WebGPU-compute has lab priors (15/16/327 тЖТ not a clean ambition-#1). Genuinely the most *advanced* version on a WebGPU desktop тАФ resurrect on a desktop-install/Tauri window, or once WebGPU phone support clears, with the ScriptProcessorтЖТAudioWorklet fix. Files built this fire: page.tsx + audio.ts + features.ts + field.ts (WGSL compute+render + Canvas2D fallback) + README. Repo had a shared `webgpu.d.ts` so WebGPU types came free.
- **`910-resonant-field-flow` (bank тАФ three.js **GPGPU ping-pong float-RT flow field**: ~147k additive points advected by simplex curl-noise in a sim fragment shader, positions read in the vertex shader; memory accumulator; auto-orbit camera; Canvas2D fallback).** Same concept, a "river of light" points cloud instead of a volume. **De-selected on robustness + diversity** тАФ it depends on **float render-target support** (more failure surface than 909's pure raymarch; probes float/half-float but the fallback is the likely phone path), and three.js-points is closer to the lab's existing particle-field heritage than 909's raymarched *volume* (the fresher surface тАФ the banked-but-never-shipped ┬з531 `889` raymarch register). Per-grain `PannerNode` CPU cost flagged for low-end phones (grain-rate cap is the knob). Resurrect when a GPGPU/points register is wanted, or fold its curl-noise sim into a future flow piece. Files built this fire: page.tsx + audio.ts + features.ts + scene.ts (GPGPU + Canvas2D fallback) + README.

## ┬з538 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-24 (cycle 538 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE non-winners, fully built then de-selected)

Both were built to demoable + self-reported clean in the cycle-538 fan-out, de-selected only because `907-kids-stomp-garden` (the cleaner rhythm-not-pitch answer to JURY 2026-06-24 + the direct developmental-rhythm research chain) won. The code was NOT committed; resurrect from these specs.

### `905-kids-water-bowl` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** Hum/sing тЖТ live pitch + loudness drive **Faraday-style standing waves** on a glowing three.js water surface (a high-res circular mesh displaced by a sum of cosine radial standing-wave terms; pitch тЖТ number of concentric rings/mode, loudness тЖТ amplitude, pitch тЖТ warmтЖФcool color). The pattern you see *is* the sound you make. Soft "singing-bowl" drone whose brightness tracks pitch; permanent idle micro-ripple so it's never still; synthetic swept-voice auto-demo when mic denied. INPUT mic-hum ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js (GPU) ┬╖ TECH Faraday/cymatic surface displacement ┬╖ VIBE calm/luminous/water. Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Faraday 1831/Chladni; #1 does NOT hold тАФ cymatics already built in 19/165). Dodges all JURY 2026-06-24 bans (GPU, mic-not-touch, no pitch-theory *engine*). **Deepening (from ┬з536/┬з538):** real Bessel `J_n(k┬╖r)` eigenmodes; caustic light cast beneath the bowl; two-voice duet тЖТ interfering/beating ring sets. Strongest because mic-hum needs no motion sensor тЖТ bulletproof at the 06:30 glance.

### `906-kids-tilt-fireflies` тАФ `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** Tilt the iPad тЖТ `DeviceOrientationEvent` becomes a gravity vector; a swarm of ~hundreds of glowing three.js firefly particles drifts "downhill," and where the swarm **clumps** (spatial-grid density) or **bumps a flower node**, it emits a soft capped mallet "bloom" тАФ so *the rhythm of the music is the rhythm of your tilting*. Five flowers = a few fixed warm timbres (no scale/harmony engine); swarm speed тЖТ shimmer-pad brightness. Pointer-drag fallback + orbiting auto-demo when no sensor. INPUT device-tilt ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js GPU particles ┬╖ TECH gravity/Boids swarm densityтЖТrhythm ┬╖ VIBE night/fireflies/playful. Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Reynolds *Boids* 1986). Dodges all bans. **Deepening:** flower light-ripple on bump (visual rhythm reads sound-off); add Boids cohesion тЖТ swirling rivers; long calm/busy periods grow flowers/fireflies (slow texture evolution). Resurrect on a kids cycle once tilt/motion input has cooled.

## ┬з537 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 537 (ADULT ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ 2 seeds

Cycle 537 shipped `902-harmonic-mirror` (MIDI/keyboard ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ just-intonation chord-completion тАФ the directest answer to today's RESEARCH ┬з537 dive on real-time humanтАУAI co-performance, and the first build in 6 windows to cite a dated finding *in its own README*, fixing JURY #5). The two non-winning explorers, both built complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean, `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs:

- **`903-living-stave` тнР (RESURRECT-FIRST тАФ owns the 0├Ч SVG output lane, the single most-named scarce surface in the lab; JURY 2026-06-23 #1).** "Your playing writes itself into a living score": mic тЖТ live **monophonic transcription** onto a self-drawing **SVG** treble staff тАФ each new note inks a paper-white notehead at the right pitch height (stem, ledger lines, тЩп glyphs), the ribbon auto-scrolls leftward with an edge fade, a violet playhead marks "now" with a faint un-snapped pitch dot so you see yourself drift. Pitch = **NSDF/autocorrelation** (McLeod & Wyvill 2005, RMS-gated, clamped ~70тАУ1000 Hz, parabolic-interpolated); a stateful `NoteTracker` does **onset gating** (snapped-semitone change OR amplitude re-attack OR pitch-out-of-silence, behind a ~110 ms refractory) so one sustained note = one notehead, not 60/sec. Mic-denied/silent тЖТ a **ghost-performer** folk tune draws + sounds the staff on load. Echo voice connects mic-independently to destination (no feedback into analysis). **Subsystems тЙе3** (mic capture + NSDF pitch + onset tracking + SVG notation engine = 4). Refs: **Jan├б─Нek *n├бp─Ыvky mluvy*** + **LilyPond engraving** + **McLeod & Wyvill NSDF**. Files built this fire: page.tsx + pitch.ts + audio.ts + README. **Resurrect on any cold-SVG window** (it IS the SVG-lane answer); re-verify on a real breathy voice: the semitone snap + clarity gate trade sensitivity for stability (octave errors / between-pitch flicker possible), rhythm is order-of-arrival not true note-value, monophonic only.

- **`904-tide-organ` (bank тАФ strong dataтЖТSTRUCTURE piece, de-selected ONLY because `898-tremor-score` [cycle 535] just shipped external-dataтЖТstructure; resurrect once the data lane has cooled, or fold the Zadar/tide framing into a fresh data axis).** "The sea plays an organ": live **NOAA CO-OPS** tide data decides the FORM of a slow organ piece тАФ **phase**тЖТwhich register of pipes is active, **height**тЖТhow many voices + brightness, **rate-of-change**тЖТhow fast voices enter/leave тАФ over a fixed consonant **Lydian rank across ~4 octaves** so it's always in tune; the sea writes the arrangement, never the tuning (directly answers JURY 2026-06-23 #3 "map data to structure, not detune"). Two client-side NOAA calls (`water_level` latest + hourly `predictions`); on ANY failure тЖТ silent **synthetic semidiurnal sinusoid** (~12.42 h M2, ~90├Ч accelerated clock so the form moves within a minute), emerald `live:<station>` vs amber `modeling the tide`. **three.js** glowing pipe field (coolтЖТamberтЖТwhite, swelling pipes, breathing sea plane; Canvas2D fallback). 3 preset stations (SF 9414290, The Battery 8518750, Seattle 9447130). **Subsystems тЙе3** (NOAA fetch+parse+synthetic fallback + additive organ synth + long-form arc clock + three.js field = 4). Ref: **Zadar Sea Organ (Nikola Ba┼бi─З, 2005)** + SF Wave Organ + Annea Lockwood. Files built this fire: page.tsx + tide.ts + audio.ts + scene.ts + canvas-fallback.ts + README. **Resurrect when the external-data lane is cold AND a maritime/architectural register is wanted;** note three.js is "approaching cap" per recent JURYs тАФ the dataтЖТstructure mapping is the fresh part, not the renderer.
