## ┬з536 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 536 (KIDS ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ 2 seeds

WIDE kids cycle: 3 orthogonal **"physical-phenomenon made visible + audible"** explorers, each a grep-verified-novel technique on a different non-WebGL2 surface (Canvas2D / SVG / three.js). Shipped **`899-kids-moire-beats`** (touch ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ moir├й=visible acoustic beating; anchored RESEARCH ┬з536; the lab's first moir├й piece). Both siblings below returned **complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean** (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs. **Both are net-new lab capabilities / techniques (ambition #1) тАФ sequenced, not lost.**

- **`900-kids-rope-singer` тнР (RESURRECT-FIRST тАФ owns the 0├Ч SVG lane JURY keeps naming as starved, and a grep-verified-novel technique: catenary).** "A hanging rope you play with your hands": a single rope hangs in a **catenary** curve drawn entirely as an SVG `<path>` (Catmull-Rom тЖТ B├йzier) over a warm wooden scene. Two touch moves: **(1) hang beads** тАФ tap below the rope to drop a glowing bead; each adds mass so the rope **sags deeper тЖТ sounds lower** (`sagFor` тЖТ `pitchFor`, snapped to a warm C-pentatonic ladder so every pluck is consonant; tap a bead to pull it off); **(2) pluck** тАФ drag the rope sideways and release for a damped-spring twang whose visible swing tracks the additive plucked-string envelope (triangle fundamental + 2 decaying partials, 12 ms attack). Always-on root+fifth drone (тЙд 0.26, 6 kHz lowpass), 2s-idle auto-demo hangs/drops/plucks on its own, `text-rose-300` notice + live visuals on Web-Audio failure, full teardown. **Subsystems тЙе3** (touch hit-testing + catenary-sag sim + plucked-string synth + SVG render). Refs: the **catenary / Galileo's hanging chain** ┬╖ the **monochord** (string length/tension тЖТ pitch). Files built this fire: page.tsx + README. **Resurrect on a kids cycle wanting the SVG lane;** re-verify: the sag is a weight-skewed parabola stand-in (not exact catenary math), and the snapped-pentatonic ladder is a mild safe-scale lean тАФ could let bigger sags reach a real low note off the ladder.
- **`901-kids-water-bowl` (bank тАФ a grep-verified-novel technique [Faraday waves, 0├Ч] and the lab's first three.js *fluid-surface cymatics*).** "Hum to the water and see the note's shape": a glowing 3D bowl (three.js `MeshPhysicalMaterial` transmission/clearcoat, glowing torus rim, slow auto-orbit) whose 200├Ч200 displaced `PlaneGeometry` surface ripples by a stack of **Faraday standing-wave modes** `z = ╬г Aс╡в┬╖cos(kс╡в┬╖r┬╖╧А)┬╖cos(mс╡в┬╖╬╕)┬╖cos(╧Й┬╖t)` тАФ low hum тЖТ a few big concentric rings, high hum тЖТ fine petals/cells, louder тЖТ taller/brighter. A ~40-line RMS-gated **autocorrelation pitch detector** drives mode count; two capped/lowpassed sines sing a soft harmonic back (mic тЖТ AnalyserNode ONLY, no feedback). **Crucial fallback for the silent 06:30 glance:** mic-denied OR ~2s-silent тЖТ an auto-demo sweeps G3тЖТD5 blooming the water through cymatic figures while the bowl sings (alive within ~1s); real humming takes over. `text-rose-300` on no-WebGL / no-mic; full teardown (dispose geometry/material/renderer, stop tracks). **Subsystems тЙе3** (mic + pitch-detection + Faraday-mode displacement + three.js fluid render). Refs: **Michael Faraday** *On a Peculiar Class of Acoustical Figures* (1831) ┬╖ **Hans Jenny** cymatics ┬╖ **Ernst Chladni**. Files built this fire: page.tsx + README. **Resurrect when a calm/luminous mic-driven kids piece is wanted;** note three.js is "approaching cap" per JURY (use sparingly), and the technique is cymatics-adjacent (`cymatic` is 5├Ч in the lab) тАФ the *fluid-surface Faraday* framing + mic-pitch coupling is the fresh part, lean into that vs. the older plate-cymatics pieces.

## ┬з535 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 535 (ADULT ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ 2 seeds

WIDE adult cycle: 3 orthogonal explorers, each on non-banned tags (`banned=[touch, raw-WebGL2]`). Shipped **`898-tremor-score`** (external-data ┬╖ SVG ┬╖ earthquake catalogue тЖТ musical STRUCTURE; anchored RESEARCH ┬з535 / OpenSeisML arXiv 2605.20539, May 2026; directly answers JURY #3 dataтЖТstructure-not-detune + lands criterion #5). Both siblings below returned **complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean** (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs. **Both are net-new lab capabilities (ambition #1) тАФ they are sequenced, not lost.**

- **`899-harmonic-mirror` тнР (RESURRECT-FIRST тАФ the lab's FIRST Web MIDI integration; a capability milestone, and deeply on-mission since Resonance is *the personal audio workspace for pianists/composers* and Karel likely plays a MIDI controller).** "Your keyboard's shadow": Web MIDI (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`) tracks held notes; YOU play them as warm detuned-saw voices; a **MIRROR** infers the implied chord (template match against maj/min/sus/bare-fifth/cluster тАФ a slice of Riemann functional harmony) and adds **1тАУ2 NEW voices that complete a consonant chord, tuned in JUST INTONATION** relative to the inferred root (small-integer ratios 5/4, 6/5, 3/2, 2/1 тАФ Partch/Johnston lineage) so they beat-lessly lock; the mirror voices **glide-retune** as the root shifts. Visual = Canvas2D circle-of-fifths constellation: held = bright nodes, mirror = softer halos joined by luminous completion lines + ratio labels + large chord name, all amplitude-pulsing at 60 fps. **Subsystems тЙе3** (MIDI input + harmonic analysis + JI synth + Canvas2D viz). **First-class no-hardware fallback** (the demo path, since most reviewers + a 06:30 phone have no MIDI): a clickable white/black-key on-screen piano + computer-keyboard map `a w s e d f t g y h u j k` тЖТ C..C drives the identical pipeline; any MIDI error тЖТ `text-rose-300` pointing at it. Files built this fire: page.tsx + audio.ts (`MirrorEngine`) + harmony.ts (`analyse`/`mirrorVoices`/`jiFreq`) + README (cites Partch/Johnston, Riemann, RESEARCH anchor arXiv 2604.07612 Apr 2026 real-time humanтАУAI co-performance). **Resurrect on an adult cycle, ideally when Karel can review at a desk with a controller;** rough edges to re-verify: chord inference is template-based (dense/extended chords fall to a "cluster" heuristic), on-screen piano spans a single octave, and the JI glide voicing wants a real-ear pass.
- **`900-flow-grains` (bank тАФ the lab's FIRST optical-flow input + FIRST cameraтЖТgranular instrument; the biggest novelty leap of the cycle, deferred only for a perf pass).** "Your gesture is granular texture": camera (`getUserMedia`) тЖТ coarse **dense optical flow** (gradient / Lucas-Kanade-lite on a downsampled ~80├Ч60 frame) feeds ONE shared flow field into BOTH (1) a **three.js Points** field whose particles advect along the local flow vectors, colored by speed, and (2) a **granular synthesizer** over an in-browser-synthesized warm partials-pad `AudioBuffer` (no external file) тАФ total flow energyтЖТgrain density (still = sparse, motion = a shower of grains), flow positionтЖТgrain read-position + pan, flow velocityтЖТplaybackRate pitch-scatter; grains тЖТ master тЖТ ConvolverNode reverb тЖТ limiter. Camera-denied тЖТ an **auto-driving synthetic swirling blob** keeps audio + visuals alive; errors тЖТ `text-rose-300`. Privacy: video never leaves the browser. Ref: **TouchDesigner opticalFlow TOP + ParticlesGPU (Derivative / Matthew Ragan)** + **AudioFlow (Kihs)** тАФ the flowтЖТparticles & flowтЖТgranular paradigm ported GPUтЖТbrowser (three.js + Web Audio). Files built this fire: page.tsx + flow.ts (`computeSyntheticFlow` + LK-lite) + audio.ts (granular scheduler, Hann grains) + README. **Subsystems тЙе3** (camera + optical-flow + granular synth + three.js viz). **Resurrect when a camera/organic/TouchDesigner register is wanted;** the known cost is ~9k CPU-integrated particles + per-frame flow + grains (capped 14/frame to protect the audio thread) and LK-lite flow gets noisy on low-contrast scenes тАФ wants a perf/threshold pass and ideally a real-device test before shipping.

## ┬з534 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 534 (KIDS ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ 2 seeds

WIDE kids cycle: 3 orthogonal **template-breakers** (JURY 2026-06-23 #4 тАФ wrong choice persists & must be *earned* back, no auto-resolve), each on a different non-WebGL2 surface (Canvas2D / SVG / WebGPU). Shipped **`897-kids-balance-band`** (touch ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ 2D rigid-lever torque тЖФ consonance; research-anchored RESEARCH ┬з534 / PMC11336827 + PMC12605063). Both siblings below returned **complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean** (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs.

- **`898-kids-echo-keeper` тнР (RESURRECT-FIRST тАФ owns the SVG output lane, which is ~0├Ч/15 and JURY-named as scarce; the strongest pure-diversity bank).** "Echo Keeper": a child sings into a cave; a note **consonant** with the held drone echoes back warmly and fades, but a **clash** (m2/tritone) gets STUCK тАФ it loops back as a persistent grumbly tone and tightens a visible **SVG trefoil knot** that does *not* fade on its own. Each stuck echo has an "answer note" (m2-aboveтЖТresolves down to root; tritoneтЖТresolves to the third); when the child **sings that answer** (held ~320 ms dwell) the matching knot **unties** and the echo melts. A small state machine *remembers* stuck echoes across time (real memory, no per-frame reset). Subsystems тЙе3: hand-rolled NSDF/autocorrelation pitch-detect (RMS-gated, scale-snapped) + delay/echo-loop memory + consonance-resolution logic + animated SVG cave/ripples/knots. Anti-feedback by construction (micтЖТanalyser only, neverтЖТdestination). Full mic-free path: ghost-singer auto-demo (clashтЖТknotтЖТanswerтЖТuntie ~1тАУ2 s, loops) + a row of тЙе68 px press-and-hold tap-note buttons driving the identical pipeline. **Resurrect on any cycle wanting SVG, mic/voice, or a "the wrong note persists" register;** needs a real-device pass to tune the autocorrelation snap tolerance (0.7 st) and `MIN_RMS` (0.012) against a young, breathy voice. Built complete this fire (page.tsx + README).
- **`899-kids-candle-choir` (bank тАФ WebGPU is 3├Ч/15, under cap but not as scarce as SVG; resurrect when a warm/ritual WebGPU kids piece is wanted).** "Candle Choir": a row/arc of 7 candle-creatures (C-major core + FтЩп/B tensions) each singing a sustained degree; a **dissonant** tap **blows out** the conflicting candle тАФ dark, silent, and it **stays out** (a real audible/visible gap, no auto-relight/timer). To relight a dark candle the child taps a still-lit candle a **consonant interval away** тАФ its flame leans over and relights it; relight all тЖТ a full warm bloom. Subsystems тЙе3: touch + interval-class consonance engine + flame extinguish/relight state machine + **WebGPU** WGSL instanced additive-glow flames/embers, with a **Canvas2D fallback** running the identical instance data and full mechanic (deliberately NOT WebGL2, which is banned). Self-demo loops at start/idle. Note vs `868-kids-monster-keys`: monster-keys *spawns* a creature on a clash; this *removes* a voice (a gap, not an addition) тАФ a distinct consequence, but the closest relative in the lab, so resurrect only if the "blow-out/relight" gesture reads as meaningfully different on device. Built complete this fire (page.tsx + README). Risk to re-verify: WebGPU pipeline used local `any`-typed handles + numeric `usage` literals (no `@webgpu/types`) тАФ confirm it draws in a real WebGPU browser; Canvas2D fallback is the likely CI/render path.

## ┬з533 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 533 (ADULT ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ 2 seeds

WIDE adult cycle: 3 orthogonal non-WebGL2 explorers on the thinnest renderer lanes (audio-only 0├Ч, Canvas2D scarce, SVG scarce). Shipped **`896-tonnetz-loom`** (SVG ┬╖ neo-Riemannian Tonnetz, anchored on the freshest cite of the cycle, RESEARCH ┬з533 / arXiv 2606.11246, Jun 2026). Both siblings below returned **complete + self-reported lint-clean** (READMEs written); backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-533/` and `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs.

- **`894-room-raga` тнР (RESURRECT-FIRST adult тАФ it owns the lab's single thinnest output lane, audio-only = 0├Ч/15, the exact lane JURY 2026-06-23 named as scarce-and-rewarded).** "The room tunes the instrument": mic listens to the *ambient* sound of the visitor's space (autocorrelation pitch detection, RMS-gated, clamped 55тАУ660 Hz, smoothed), treats the found dominant pitch as the TONIC, and grows a slow just-intonation drone-raga upward from it тАФ voices on pure JI ratios (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2/1) entering/leaving on a long-form `stepState` clock (sparseтЖТfullтЖТthinning; minute 3 тЙа minute 0), through a procedural-IR ConvolverNode reverb + feedback delay + limiter; if the room's pitch shifts the whole drone glides to re-center (the space can re-tune it mid-piece). Visual is deliberately ONE breathing CSS radial-gradient div (no canvas/WebGL) тАФ hue = found pitch-class, breath = amplitude тАФ so audio carries it. Silent/no-mic fallback = a "seed a tonic" button + slider (always sounds). Subsystems тЙе4 (mic FFT + pitch detection + JI generative engine + reverb/delay bus + long-form clock). Ref: **Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*; La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela *Dream House*.** Built complete this fire (5 files: page.tsx + pitch.ts + audio.ts + raga.ts + README). **Resurrect on any cycle that wants the audio-only lane or a deep-listening register;** needs a real-device pass to tune autocorrelation RMS/clarity thresholds (0.006 / 0.02) on a quiet ambient room.
- **`895-recurrence-room` (bank LOWER priority тАФ overlaps existing `777-song-architecture`, which already computes a chroma SSM, so it does NOT clear ambition #1).** "See the shape of a song": decode a piano track (probes Karel's `/api/audio/[id]` 1..13, else file-drop, else a synthesized A┬╖B┬╖A demo phrase so it works offline), extract 12-bin L2-normalized chroma per frame (hand-written radix-2 FFT, Hann window), build the N├ЧN (~220) cosine self-similarity matrix, render it as a Canvas2D darkтЖТvioletтЖТamber heat-lattice where off-diagonal stripes = the song's repeats; playhead sweeps the diagonal in sync, click any cell to A/B-loop the two similar moments. Subsystems тЙе4 (decode + chroma + SSM + Canvas2D render + seek/loop). Ref: **Foote 1999 "Visualizing Music and Audio using Self-Similarity"; M├╝ller *FMP*.** Anchor: RESEARCH ┬з533 / arXiv 2603.27218 (SSM structure-eval, Mar 2026). Built complete this fire. **Only resurrect with a fresh differentiator** vs `777` тАФ e.g. cross-recording SSM (compare two of his takes), or a *novelty curve* / structure-segmentation layer that 777 lacks; bare re-render is the re-tread JURY warns against.

## ┬з532 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 532 (KIDS ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ 2 seeds

WIDE cycle: 3 orthogonal kids explorers (distinct INPUT ├Ч OUTPUT ├Ч TECHNIQUE ├Ч VIBE, none on a banned tag). Shipped **`891-kids-sing-a-path`** (mic/voice тЖТ SVG тЖТ real-time pitch-contour тЖТ storybook; research-anchored on RESEARCH ┬з532 / PESTO). Both siblings below returned **complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean** (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs.

- **`893-kids-listening-jar` тнР (the lab's first deliberate AUDIO-LED kids piece тАФ RESURRECT on an audio-only/non-screen cycle; OUTPUT audio-only = 0├Ч/10, the single thinnest lane).** A calm "listening jar" you tilt + shake: a warm pentatonic pad ensemble panned across stereo via `StereoPannerNode` (tilt moves the listening position so sound drifts around the child), generated convolution reverb + feedback delay for space, a slow `stepState()` clock that evolves density/voicing/pan-drift over ~60тАУ90s (genuinely different at minute 2 than minute 0), shake тЖТ soft rain/bell grains, master limiter; the visual is *intentionally* one big breathing radial glow (DOM/CSS, no canvas/three.js) so the **audio carries the experience**. Full on-screen tilt-pad + shake-button fallback (works with zero sensors), iOS `requestPermission` narrow-typed (no `any`). Subsystems = spatial generative engine + evolving state + tilt/shake sensors + minimal breathing visual (тЙе3). Ref: **Pauline Oliveros тАФ Deep Listening** + the "shell-to-your-ear / shake-the-jar" sensory motif. **De-selected on legibility for the morning glance** тАФ an audio-led piece's payoff needs sound/headphones, where a silent 06:30 phone glance reads it as "one glow"; it is the boldest of the three and squarely fills the screen-bias menu lane. Resurrect deliberately on an audio-only cycle. Rebuildable from this brief.

- **`892-kids-glass-rain` (three.js 3D buoyancy + glass-harmonica modal bells тАФ RESURRECT when a GPU/three.js surface is scarce).** A serene underwater tank of ~11 glowing translucent 3D drops a child taps (three.js `Raycaster` pick) to ring **glass-harmonica chimes** (struck-bell modal synth: bank of near-harmonic, slightly inharmonic decaying sine partials, velocity тЖТ loudness+brightness, soft attack/long bell decay, master limiter, faint underwater pad). Drops bob with a **damped buoyancy spring** + water drag + soft pairwise repulsion (clamped semi-implicit Euler, no explosions); drop-drop collisions above a velocity threshold ring quietly. Builder proactively swapped `MeshPhysicalMaterial.transmission` (an extra full-scene pass/frame) for a transparent `MeshStandardMaterial` + additive rim/halo, pixel-ratio capped at 2, `powerPreference:"low-power"` тАФ phone-cost-aware. WebGL-unavailable fallback тЖТ audio-only pentatonic auto-mode + visible rose notice; ~0.4s auto welcome chord. Subsystems = three.js scene + buoyancy physics + raycast tap + modal synth (тЙе4). Ref: **glass harmonica / Benjamin Franklin's armonica** + Archimedes buoyancy. **De-selected on diversity + heritage** тАФ modal/struck synthesis is already heavy in the lab (284/286/478/655/803/886) and three.js is 2├Ч/10 (the freshest legit GPU surface, but SVG was the scarcer 1├Ч this fire); the 3D aquarium is genuinely lovely on a real device. Resurrect on a three.js-scarce window. Rebuildable from this brief.

## ┬з531 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 531 (ADULT ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ 2 seeds

DEEP cycle: one concept тАФ **`884`/`888-living-reverie`, a 10-minute long-form generative reverie on Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano with a two-tier memory engine** (local pitch-cell bank for continuity + global irreversible `age`/section state machine for the arc тАФ RESEARCH ┬з531 / arXiv 2603.21282) тАФ fielded as 3 parallel approaches that share the SAME engine and differ only in **visual language for the arc** (deliberately non-particle, to dodge the `859-paths-compute-bloom` overlap the seed flagged). Shipped `888-living-reverie` (three.js displaced membrane тАФ the fresh three.js surface 2├Ч/10 vs Canvas2D's near-cap 3├Ч; robust vertex displacement; dodges the raw-WebGL2 ban AND the 859 particle field). Both siblings returned **complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean**; `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) тАФ rebuild from these briefs + 888's shared engine. This is a **multi-cycle commitment**: 888 is cycle 1 (skeleton + working engine + one visual); the two below + the engine deepening are the backlog (see 888's README "Multi-cycle commitment" section).

- **`889-living-reverie-volumetric` тнР (three.js raymarched volumetric nebula тАФ RESURRECT as an optional runtime "volumetric" render mode, or on a desktop-GPU-targeted window).** The SAME two-tier engine, rendered as a raymarched FBM nebula on an orthographic fullscreen quad (`ShaderMaterial`, тЙд22 raymarch steps, 4-octave FBM, pixel-ratio clamped 1.75 for mobile headroom): arc reads as thin drifting wisps тЖТ warm bloom from within тЖТ thick luminous turbulence тЖТ cooling fade-to-black; uniforms `uAge`/`uSection`/`uLevel`/`uTime` + palette lerp (indigoтЖТamber/roseтЖТviolet), pointer parallax, full `disposables`+`forceContextLoss()` teardown. Built complete this fire, self-reported clean. **De-selected ONLY on robustness** тАФ a 22-step raymarch is the heaviest fragment workload of the three and the likeliest to chug/drain battery on Karel's 06:30 phone, where 888's vertex-displaced mesh is cheap and reliable. Genuinely the most *cinematic* version on a real GPU тАФ resurrect as a toggle inside 888 or on a desktop-install window. Rebuildable from this brief + 888's `engine.ts`/`audio.ts`.

- **`890-living-reverie-ink` (Canvas2D ink-in-water chroma strata тАФ RESURRECT as 888's WebGL-unavailable visual fallback, or on a cold-Canvas2D window).** The SAME engine on pure Canvas2D (zero GPU, zero permissions тАФ the most bulletproof render): accumulating translucent ink-in-water strata with a feedback smear, per-note blooms positioned by pitch, explicit palette repaint across the arc (indigoтЖТamber/roseтЖТviolet), density/motion rising to a mid-arc peak then thinning in `dissolving`; dt-scaled + RMS-smoothed for smooth (non-flickery) motion. Built complete this fire, self-reported clean. **De-selected on diversity** тАФ Canvas2D is 3├Ч/10 (shipping it would hit the 4├Ч ban threshold) and three.js is the fresher surface. Its real value is as **888's fallback render path** so the piece always has a living visual when WebGL is absent тАФ fold it in next. Rebuildable from this brief + 888's `engine.ts`/`audio.ts`. (Honest wart noted by its builder: phrase scheduling via `setTimeout` keyed off the audio clock, not sample-accurate тАФ same caveat as 888; fix in the shared engine deepening.)

## ┬з530 тАФ banked explorers from cycle 530 (KIDS ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ 2 seeds

DEEP cycle: one concept тАФ **a kids "marble music machine" where collision timbre is set by the surface MATERIAL** (material-based modal impact synthesis, RESEARCH ┬з530) тАФ fielded as 3 parallel approaches. Shipped `886-kids-marble-music` (Canvas2D side-view, tap+tilt). The two siblings, banked:

- **`885-kids-marble-music-3d` тнР (three.js 3D-gravity twin тАФ RESURRECT when a GPU surface is scarce / non-WebGL2 ban lifts).** A three.js 3D tray: real gravity vector from device tilt rolls glowing marbles around five tuned material objects (wood block, glass bell + dome, metal chime, drum pad) in 3D; per-collision flash synced to the modal hit; the same material-modal synth as 886 (banks of decaying sine modes, metal 1/2.76/5.40/8.93, drum membrane 1/1.59/2.14/2.30, velocity тЖТ loudness+brightness), C-major-pentatonic pitches, mud-patch stakes. **Was built complete this fire** (990-line page.tsx + README, self-reported clean) тАФ de-selected ONLY on diversity: three.js is a GPU surface (2├Ч/10) and the jury asked for "deliberately non-WebGL2" builds, where 886's Canvas2D is the scarce/freshest surface and needs no WebGL or DeviceOrientation permission (more robust for the unattended 06:30 glance). The 3D immersion is genuinely better on a real iPad тАФ resurrect on a window where three.js/WebGPU is under-represented. Rebuildable from this seed + the 886 synth.

- **`887-kids-marble-build` (Canvas2D "build-your-own machine" тАФ the constructive/programmable angle).** Child drags material blocks (wood ramp, glass bell, metal bar, drum pad) from a tray onto a board, then drops marbles that play whatever track they built; pitch by the block's vertical position (higher = higher, snapped to pentatonic), material sets timbre; an auto-rain mode plays it hands-free. The Wintergatan "program the machine" + Toy Theater "Music Marbles move-the-pegs" (web, March 2026) interaction тАФ a 4yo composes spatially with no notation, no two layouts alike. **Builder died on a stream-idle timeout this fire (no folder produced)** тАФ pure seed, rebuildable. Strong because it adds genuine *agency/authorship* (the kid builds the instrument) on top of the material-modal engine; resurrect on a Canvas2D-scarce kids window, ideally folding in 886's working `synth.ts`/`physics.ts` as the engine.

### `882-prosody-score` тАФ `queued` тнР (SVG ┬╖ keyboard ┬╖ text-prosodyтЖТfunctional-cadence тАФ RESURRECT when SVG is cold AND the keyboard input is wanted; freshest surface + coldest input in the lab)
*Type a sentence and your prosody composes a real phrase: inter-keystroke interval тЖТ rhythm, word length тЖТ a sine-arch melodic contour, character тЖТ diatonic scale degree (vowels=chord tones, consonants=passing), and **punctuation тЖТ functional cadence** (comma=half-cadence/тЖТV, period/!/?=authentic/тЖТI the satisfying landing, space=breath, capital=fresh phrase) over a wandering IтАУviтАУIVтАУiiтАУV harmony quantized to C major. Writing becomes scoring.* INPUT keyboard/typing (тЙИ0├Ч in the lab тАФ the coldest input) ┬╖ OUTPUT **inline SVG** (animated self-drawing staff/ribbon: glowing note glyphs at pitch height, violet cadence barlines, auto-scroll w/ edge fade, faint libretto beneath; refs+rAF, no per-frame React) ┬╖ TECH deterministic text-prosodyтЖТfunctional-harmony engine (`prosody.ts` `step()`) ┬╖ VIBE literary, ink-on-dark, intimate. Audio: warm FM-Rhodes melody + sustained triad pad following the chord; master тЖТ ConvolverNode reverb тЖТ DynamicsCompressor тЖТ out; gesture-gated. ~2s-idle **ghost-writer** types a poetry line through the identical pipeline (stops on first real key). Files (built, removed): `page.tsx` + `prosody.ts` + `audio.ts` + `score-svg.tsx` + `README.md`. Refs: **Leo┼б Jan├б─Нek *n├бp─Ыvky mluvy* (speech-melody)** (inverted: textтЖТmelody) + **RESEARCH ┬з529 (2026-06-23)**. Ambition 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [keystroke-timing analyzer + cadence/harmony engine + Web-Audio piano+pad + self-drawing SVG notation] + #3 named ref + #5 README citation). **Why banked, not shipped:** genuinely elegant + the freshest surface (SVG) + coldest input (keyboard) тАФ de-selected ONLY because **880 (last cycle) was also SVG**, so shipping it repeats the surface back-to-back, where 883's Canvas2D rotates it; and 883's silence-inversion is the higher-surprise concept this fire. Honest wart: word-length contour is computed from a running char counter (can't see a word's full length until it ends), so the "ease back down" lands cleanly only on the ghost-writer + on words typed without mid-word pauses. **Resurrect FIRST among adult seeds** on a cold-SVG window тАФ it's the directest answer to JURY #1's "SVG is 0тАУ1├Ч, build the scarce surface."

### `884-living-reverie` тАФ `SHIPPED as 888-living-reverie` (cycle 531, DEEP) тАФ consumed
*This seed was the resurrect target for cycle 531's DEEP long-form adult fire. Shipped as `888-living-reverie` (the seed's own slug `884` was already a banked SEED name, so the winner was numbered 888; siblings 889/890 banked below in ┬з531). The original seed text is retained for the record:*

*Karel's own recorded "Welcome Home" piano becomes a 10-minute LIVING reverie тАФ genuinely different at minute 8 than minute 1 тАФ a generative engine with **memory** that re-voices/transposes/re-orchestrates his motifs across an irreversible arc (sparse тЖТ blooming тЖТ dense тЖТ dissolving), never looping.* INPUT **audio-file** (his real recording streamed via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81`; ~350ms non-zero analyser health-check тЖТ **emerald "playing Karel's piano"** else **amber "generative piano тАФ live recording unavailable"**; built-in generative-piano fallback needs ZERO network) ┬╖ OUTPUT **three.js v0.182** (~9k additive-glow `THREE.Points` w/ baked radial sprite that accretesтЖТdisperses + re-palettes across the arc; drag-orbit; full dispose + `forceContextLoss()`) ┬╖ TECH a memory bank of **scale-degree pitch-cells** (chroma-folded from his live audio in recording mode) + a four-section state machine + a global irreversible **`age`** walking a modulating modal journey (ionianтЖТlydianтЖТmixolydianтЖТdorianтЖТaeolian) with creeping tonic; FM-piano + detuned-saw pad + granular shimmer, all pitch-quantized ┬╖ VIBE cinematic, deep, long-form ambient. Master тЖТ synthesized-impulse ConvolverNode reverb тЖТ DynamicsCompressor тЖТ out; low-key HUD (`m:ss / 10:00` + section + mode + age% + bar) makes the arc legible; sounding+moving within ~1.5s on the fallback. Files (built, removed): `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `engine.ts` + `scene.ts` + `README.md`. Refs: **Brian Eno** generative (*Music for Airports*, *Reflection*) + **Karel's "Welcome Home" Paths** as seed + **RESEARCH ┬з529 (2026-06-23)**. Ambition **3тАУ4/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #4 multi-cycle long-form commitment + #3 named refs + #5 README citation) тАФ the highest-ambition explorer this fire. **Love/directive aligned:** executes TWO standing Karel directives at once тАФ the **thin long-form-generative menu lane** (state/memory/evolution, 5min+) AND **"incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths."** **Why banked, not shipped:** the most ambitious build, BUT (a) its additive-particle three.js field is the **register closest to existing `859-paths-compute-bloom`** (Anadol-lineage, his piano тЖТ particles) тАФ a mild "too-similar" exposure on the OUTPUT side, where 883 has none; (b) highest runtime risk (GPU + a runtime CORS fetch of his recording, both fall back but the headline "his real piano" may degrade to the amber fallback on the review device). **Resurrect FIRST on a dedicated DEEP long-form adult cycle** тАФ it IS the long-form skeleton; deepen the seedтЖТchroma-memory hand-over (currently restarts the motif scheduler rather than carrying exact phrase state тАФ musically seamless through the shared reverb bus but a cruder memory transfer) and consider a non-particle visual to dodge the 859 overlap.

### `879-kids-grumble-garden` тАФ `queued` тнР (Canvas2D grumble-spread garden тАФ a SECOND full template-break; resurrect when Canvas2D is scarce)
*Tap a dark warm night-garden to plant glowing flowers that sing a C-major-pentatonic note; ~1 tap in 5 lands a clashing note and a dark buzzing **grumble-weed** sprouts there and slowly **spreads to its neighbours** (a real diffusion growth sim), droning a spicy beating cluster that does **NOT** auto-resolve. To earn the calm the child taps **on and around** the weed to "water" it тАФ each watering pushes the grumble value down until the patch re-blooms into a flower with a sweet chime.* INPUT touch ┬╖ OUTPUT **Canvas2D** (no WebGL/WebGPU/three.js) ┬╖ TECH 14├Ч10-grid grumble-spread diffusion sim (`stepGarden`: each bud's `grumble` value diffuses to its 4 neighbours/tick; self-decay deliberately tiny `-0.012/s` so a weed left alone keeps spreading тАФ only watering removes it) + interval/consonance engine + Web Audio (sweet bell chimes + a persistent beating grumble voice per weed, root+m2+tritone saw cluster capped 0.12, own 1600Hz lowpass) ┬╖ VIBE living night-garden with real stakes. Kids-safe `master тЙд0.3 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp`, grumble capped *below* chime peak (0.12 vs 0.16) + extra lowpass so it's a *gentle* spicy buzz, never louder/harsher; always-on C3+G3 pad; ~1.4s hands-free auto-demo plays plantтЖТgrumble-spreadтЖТwater-to-rebloom then stops on first tap; full teardown. Files (built, removed): `page.tsx` 373 + `audio.ts` 215 + `garden.ts` 207 + `render.ts` 184 + `README.md` 71. Refs: **RESEARCH ┬з528 / PMC11336827** (the dissonance must be a LARGE unmistakable contrast) + Toca Boca Band tension-and-release. Ambition 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems + #3 + #5 README-citation). **Why banked, not shipped:** genuinely strong and a clean template-break (the weed truly persists with no auto-resolve), BUT (a) **Canvas2D was just shipped 877** (last cycle) and (b) the **garden/growth vibe is thick in the lab** (248-kids-stir-garden, 322-kids-voice-garden, 799-kids-sing-garden) тАФ the "too similar" risk. **Resurrect** on a cold-Canvas2D kids window; consider a fresh vibe re-skin (not a garden) to dodge the growth-garden cluster while keeping the grumble-spread mechanic.

### `881-kids-thunder-marbles` тАФ `queued` (three.js tilt-marbles тАФ **LOVE-ALIGNED**, resurrect when three.js/tilt are scarce)
*Tilt a glowing 3D bowl to roll luminous marbles that ring floating bells (roll velocity тЖТ brightness/volume, C-major-pentatonic music box); slam two together with violent shaking and one **cracks into a persistent storm-marble** that rumbles a low beating dissonant drone and rolls emitting sour notes тАФ calmed only by the child rolling it **slowly** into the bowl's center **cradle** to rest, which heals it back with a rising chime.* INPUT **tilt** (DeviceOrientation, iOS `requestPermission` inside the Start tap) + pointer-drag fallback ┬╖ OUTPUT **three.js** (additive-glow marbles + emissive bowl/rim + floating bell ring + cradle marker) ┬╖ TECH custom rigid-sphere-in-bowl integrator (curvature restoring force + tilt downhill push + rolling friction + rim bounce + marbleтАУmarble impulse) + collision-relative-velocityтЖТaudio + a storm/heal state machine (per-marble storm flag, calm timer, dedicated beating-drone voice; `HARD_HIT` trips the crack, `CALM_SPEED`+`CALM_HOLD` in the cradle heals тАФ **no timer auto-rescue**) ┬╖ VIBE playful warm slightly-stormy night-bowl. Kids-safe `master 0.22 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp`, always-on pad, storm rumble a clearly dissonant ~6Hz beating LOW drone but *quieter* than the bells; ~1тАУ2s hands-free auto-demo rings bellsтЖТcracks a storm-marbleтЖТguides it to the cradle to heal then stops on first tilt/drag; all three.js geometries/materials tracked in a `disposables` array + `renderer.dispose()` + listeners removed + storm voices stopped + `audioCtx.close()` on unmount. Files (built, removed): `page.tsx` 901 + `README.md` 53. Refs: **cross-modal child movementтЖТsound mapping PMC5104747** [foundational] + the **marble-run / kinetic-toy lineage** + **RESEARCH ┬з528 / PMC11336827**. **Love signal:** **169-kids-marble-runтЭдя╕П + 83-kids-tilt-rainтЭдя╕П** тАФ squarely a loved direction. **Why banked, not shipped:** strong and love-aligned, BUT (a) **three.js is 2├Ч/10 where the winner's SVG is 0├Ч** (the freshest surface won on diversity), and (b) it needs **WebGL + a DeviceOrientation permission prompt** тЖТ more failure surface for an unattended 06:30 glance than the winner's zero-permission SVG. **Resurrect FIRST among kids seeds** on the next kids night where three.js/tilt are scarce тАФ it's the directest love-aligned pick.

### `875-kids-shell-creature` тАФ tilt morphs a glowing sea-creature through the **Gielis superformula** (status: built complete, self-reported tsc/eslint clean, banked тАФ тнР strong, NEVER-USED technique)
- **The question:** "What if a 4-year-old gently TILTS a tablet and a glowing sea-creature slowly MORPHS through living shapes тАФ round jellyfish, soft starfish, curling shell, blooming flower тАФ each shape humming its own warm chord, a calm lullaby you steer by rocking?"
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + superformula.ts + gl.ts + audio.ts + README).** INPUT tilt (DeviceOrientation beta/gamma тЖТ superformula `(m,n1,n2,n3)`) + pointer-drag + ~1.5s-idle auto-drift, all feeding ONE steering vector (EMA-smoothed). TECHNIQUE the **real Gielis Superformula** (2003) `r(╧Ж)=(|cos(m╧Ж/4)/a|^n2+|sin(m╧Ж/4)/b|^n3)^(тИТ1/n1)` тАФ steering blends params across jellyfishтЖТstarfishтЖТshellтЖТflower, so the morph is formula-driven not hand-drawn. OUTPUT hand-written **WebGL2 / GLSL ES 3.00** additive-glow `gl.POINTS` ring (dim inner membrane pass + bright rim pass) over near-black; breathing wobble + hue drift keep it alive when still. AUDIO each shape тЖТ an always-consonant chord color over a warm pad (round=maj6 / starfish=add9 / shell=sus2 / flower=maj7), `setTargetAtTime`-glide only (no retrigger clicks); kids-safe `master 0.26 тЖТ lowpass тЙд6500 тЖТ comp(тИТ10,20:1)`, analyser off master. iOS gate (AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the тЙе72px Start tap). Degrades: no tilt/desktop/denied тЖТ drag + auto-drift + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 тЖТ notice, audio survives.
- **Named ref:** **Johan Gielis, *The Superformula* (Amer. J. Botany, 2003).** **Ambition 3/5** (#1 superformula never-used in the lab [grep 0 folders/0 readmes] ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [tilt + superformula geometry + chord synth + WebGL2 render] ┬╖ #3 named ref).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** genuinely strong + a clean never-used technique, BUT the *musical* interaction тАФ "tilt тЖТ an always-consonant chord morphs" тАФ is exactly the **JURY 2026-06-22 banned "drag-one-thing тЖТ always-consonant chord morphs" kids template** (5├Ч; cosmetic agency, no harmonic stakes). The superformula is a beautiful *visual* wrapper on a rut the jury named. **Resurrect** when that template is cold AND give the morph a real consequence (a region where the chord goes genuinely spicy and the child must steer *back* to resolve тАФ fold in 868/849's freedom-to-be-wrong mechanic), OR ship it purely as a calm visual-morph toy on a window where cosmetic-consonance is acceptable. The superformula geometry engine itself is reusable for an adult shape-morph piece with real harmonic stakes.

### `876-kids-shadow-zoo` тАФ whole-body camera **frame-diff motion** тЖТ **WebGL2** glowing creature zoo (status: built complete, self-reported tsc 0 / eslint 0, banked тАФ supersedes the three.js ┬з524 `867` seed)
- **The question:** "What if a 4-year-old could wave their WHOLE BODY in front of the tablet and conjure a zoo of glowing creatures that bloom and sing wherever they move тАФ no screen to touch, just dance?" (A flailing toddler is the ideal user; there is no pose to hit.)
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + vision.ts + audio.ts + gl.ts + README) тАФ the clean WebGL2 re-skin of the ┬з524 `867` three.js seed.** INPUT front-camera **frame-differencing** (32├Ч24 offscreen 2D grab тЖТ Rec.601 luminance diff тЖТ coarse 16├Ч12 mirrored motion-energy grid, fast-attack/slow-decay IIR; NO MediaPipe/ML/landmarks, analysis-only, frames discarded). Hot cells bloom ~2400 additive `gl.POINTS` creatures over a 700-pt breathing starfield + probabilistically fire warm **C-pentatonic** notes (no wrong notes); total motion opens master lowpass + brightens; 4 vertical zones = 4 timbres/hues (amber/gold/violet/teal). OUTPUT raw **WebGL2 / GLSL ES 3.00** (NOT three.js тАФ this is the renderer fix vs `867`). Kids-safe `master 0.26 тЖТ lowpass тЙд6500 тЖТ comp(тИТ10,20:1)`, always-on detuned pad, analyser off master. iOS gate (AudioContext + `getUserMedia` in the тЙе72px Start tap, mirrored). Degrades: camera denied/absent тЖТ synthetic figure-8 `stepSynthetic` auto-demo through the IDENTICAL pipeline (blooms + sings within ~1s) + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 тЖТ notice, pad + auto-melody keep playing. Full teardown.
- **Named refs:** **Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1975)** ┬╖ **Daniel Rozin** mirrors. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs). Love-aligned: camera/body kids loves `104-kids-mirror-draw`тЭдя╕П, `234-kids-hand-creature`тЭдя╕П. **Honest limit (README):** frame-diff reads *change* not *presence* тАФ a perfectly still child fades (by design, to encourage movement); a busy moving background adds noise.
- **Why banked, not shipped:** solid + joyful, and now a clean non-three.js implementation (resolves the ┬з524 three.js-renderer objection), BUT (a) the bodyтЖТ**safe-pentatonic** mapping is the exact "*if you have a body, do something a touchscreen can't*" critique the jury leveled at `811` тАФ the most ambitious *input* on the safest possible *musical idea*; (b) camera input was 2├Ч in the last 10 shipped. **Resurrect** on a cold-camera window AND give the body a consequence a touchscreen can't (e.g. limb *speed/direction* тЖТ real harmonic motion, or a two-body sync mode per RESEARCH ┬з524's Moving-Mandala synchrony study тАФ the cold multi-user/social menu). This WebGL2 build now supersedes the ┬з524 `867-kids-shadow-zoo` three.js seed as the canonical version.

## ┬з524 тАФ 2026-06-23 (cycle 524 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ two banked explorers

Cycle 524 ran a KIDS **WIDE** fire тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers, each on a DIFFERENT GPU surface (Canvas2D HARD-banned by JURY 2026-06-22), DIFFERENT input, technique, and vibe. **Winner shipped = `868-kids-monster-keys`** (every chromatic note plays; a large-contrast clash spawns a friendly wobble-monster you CALM by resolving тАФ the directest answer to the jury's #1 unfilled kids ask, provocation #3 "freedom-to-be-WRONG, commit to it fully"; raw-WebGL2 = the scarcest GPU surface, so shipping it kept three.js AND WebGPU off the 4├Ч ban threshold). Both explorers below returned complete + verified clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route; their one `getContext("2d")` each is a NON-viz radial glow-sprite/texture use). Loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-524/`; both folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed).

### `867-kids-shadow-zoo` тАФ whole-body camera **frame-diff motion** тЖТ three.js glowing creature zoo (status: built complete + verified clean, banked тАФ **TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** "What if a 4-year-old could conduct a whole ZOO of glowing singing creatures with their WHOLE BODY тАФ just by moving in front of the camera, no precise gestures, no landmarks?" A flailing toddler is the ideal user; there is no pose to hit.
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + vision.ts + audio.ts + scene.ts + README).** INPUT front-camera **frame-differencing** тАФ 32├Ч24 offscreen canvas, per-cell abs luminance diff between frames, IIR-smoothed to a coarse 16├Ч12 motion-energy grid, mirrored (NO MediaPipe, NO landmarks, NO ML, analysis-only, never recorded/transmitted). Hot cells bloom ~2400 additive `THREE.Points` creatures over a breathing starfield + probabilistically fire warm **C-major pentatonic** notes (no wrong notes тАФ freeform joy); total motion opens a master lowpass + brightens; 4 vertical zones = 4 timbres/hues (amber/gold/violet/teal). OUTPUT **three.js v0.182**, baked radial glow sprite. Kids-safe `master тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass тЙд6.5k тЖТ comp(тИТ10,20:1)`, always-on detuned-sine pad, analyser off master only. iOS gate (AudioContext + getUserMedia in the тЙе72px Start tap). **Degrades:** camera denied/absent тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a synthetic figure-8 motion-blob auto-demo through the IDENTICAL pipeline (creatures bloom + sing within ~1s, zero camera); no WebGL тЖТ notice, pad + auto-melody keep playing. Full teardown (rAF + `track.stop()` + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`).
- **Named refs:** **Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1975)** ┬╖ **Daniel Rozin** mirror works. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [camera frame-diff + motionтЖТspawn/harmony engine + three.js glow render + ambient pad = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs). Love-aligned: camera/body kids loves `104-kids-mirror-draw`тЭдя╕П, `234-kids-hand-creature`тЭдя╕П.
- **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **diversity** тАФ three.js is 3├Ч/10, so shipping it would hit the **4├Ч audit-ban threshold**, where the winner's raw-WebGL2 is the scarcest GPU surface (2├Ч); (b) it stays in the freeform-pentatonic "no-wrong-notes" register the lab is thick on, where 868 commits to the jury's actually-unfilled freedom-to-be-WRONG ask; (c) camera-dependent (the winner needs zero hardware for the 06:30 glance). Genuinely fresh (whole-body, landmark-free) and the directest embodied/"do something a touchscreen can't" answer тЖТ **resurrect FIRST on the kids lane** when three.js isn't over-represented (or re-skin to WebGL2/WebGPU). Ships clean as-is. Code in `/tmp/dream-losers-524/867-kids-shadow-zoo/`.

### `870-kids-ripple-pond` тАФ tap тЖТ **WebGPU height-field** ripples whose edge-reflections re-ring chimes (status: built complete + verified clean, banked)
- **The question:** "What if a 4-year-old could drop stones into a calm glowing pond at bedtime тАФ each splash spreads real ripples that bounce off the edges, and every reflection rings a soft chime тАФ an endless, low-stakes, calming pond of light and sound?"
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + gpu.ts + gl.ts + audio.ts + README).** INPUT single-tap. OUTPUT **WebGPU `@compute`** 2D wave height-field тАФ triple-buffer ping-pong storage buffers run `next = (2┬╖cur тИТ prev + c┬▓┬╖laplacian)┬╖damping` with reflecting (Neumann) edges on a 256├Ч256 lattice; a splat compute pass on each tap; a pickup-sampling compute pass reads 6 fixed "lily-pad" points back to the CPU, and a sharp swing at a pickup re-triggers a soft chime (pitch тЖР pickup height within a warm A2тАУC4 pentatonic, no wrong notes) тАФ so the longer ripples bounce, the more the pond keeps singing. Render = height+gradient тЖТ dusk-blueтЖТvioletтЖТsoft-gold caustics. Kids-safe `master 0.24 тЖТ lowpass 5.2k тЖТ comp(тИТ10,20:1)`, тЙе50ms attacks, always-on breathing drone. iOS gate. **Degrades:** no WebGPU тЖТ a hand-written **WebGL2** ping-pong float-FBO version of the SAME physics + `readPixels` pickups (audio keeps playing); no WebGL2 тЖТ notice, audio still runs; untouched ~1.5s тЖТ stones auto-drop (ripples + chimes within ~1s). Full teardown (`GPUDevice.destroy()` / `WEBGL_lose_context` + buffers freed + `audioCtx.close()`).
- **Named refs:** KIDS.md **"puddle-jumper"** seed ┬╖ love-aligned **`133-kids-ripple-pond`**тЭдя╕П (this one runs a real GPU height-field, not analytic rings) ┬╖ **Brian Eno** ambient. Honest ambition **2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [tap + GPU wave-height-field sim + pickup-readbackтЖТchime scheduler + WebGPU render + drone = 5] ┬╖ #3 named refs) тАФ explicitly NOT claiming "first wave-equation" (`827-waveguide-mesh` already runs FDTD).
- **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **diversity / monoculture guard** тАФ WebGPU is 3├Ч/10 across 859/866/869, so shipping a 4th WebGPU piece in 4 cycles is the renderer-monoculture the jury warns against; (b) the **calm bedtime register was JUST shipped last cycle** (`866-kids-rainstick-sky`, JURY #4), so it's the freshly-satisfied ask, where 868 fills the still-open #3. The GPU wave-physics is genuine and now device-real on iPadOS (RESEARCH ┬з524: Safari 26 WebGPU) тЖТ **resurrect** when WebGPU is scarce again and a calm piece is wanted; or fold into a longer generative pond. Code in `/tmp/dream-losers-524/870-kids-ripple-pond/`.

### `870-live-accompanist` тАФ a generative jazz trio that LISTENS and follows you in real time (status: built complete + verified clean [eslint 0/0, tsc 0], banked тАФ **TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** "What if a pianist could play, and a generative jazz trio LISTENED and followed in real time тАФ a walking bass and soft comping that track your tempo, your chord, and your phrasing, instead of a fixed backing track?" The directest answer to Karel's standing **journey-engine-alternatives** ask (a jazz-responsive arc) + **live-performance fitness** (#3 of "what Karel cares about most").
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + analysis.ts + audio.ts + midi.ts + scene.ts + README).** INPUT **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`, built-in DOM `MIDIAccess`/`MIDIMessageEvent` types тАФ no `any`/no dep) with an on-screen clickable keyboard + a mic autocorrelation pitch detector as fallbacks. `analysis.ts` (`NoteAnalyzer`): a decaying 12-bin **chroma** + a **maj/min/dom7/min7 chord-template matcher** over all 12 roots, plus a median-folded **tempo** estimate (60тАУ200 BPM, smoothed) from inter-onset intervals. `audio.ts` (`AccompanimentEngine`): a Web-Audio **FM Rhodes** comping voice, a round **walking bass**, brushed-noise drums, on a **look-ahead 8th-note sequencer** that reads the live detected `{root, quality, bpm}` each step so the trio re-voices within a beat or two of your change; master тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` тЖТ limiter. OUTPUT **three.js (v0.182)** intimate club scene: 3 additive-glow presences, a **12-pitch-class ring** that lights to the detected chord, an amber beat pulse, bass-note floor ripples, drag-orbit (hand-rolled glow sprite from a tiny offscreen Canvas2D texture тАФ permitted non-viz use). **Degrades:** no MIDI тЖТ on-screen keys + mic; **auto-demo** = a "ghost pianist" loops a iiтАУVтАУI in F through the IDENTICAL detectтЖТaccompanyтЖТscene pipeline so the trio audibly follows within ~1.5s, zero hardware; no WebGL тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps playing. Full teardown (rAF + osc stop + `audioCtx.close()` + mic stop + three.js dispose/`forceContextLoss()` + MIDI listener removal).
- **Named refs:** *Music Minus One* / reactive-accompaniment tradition ┬╖ **Antescofo / IRCAM score-following** (real-time musician-following). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [MIDI/mic input + tempo+chord detection + generative accompaniment engine + three.js scene = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs; arguably #1 тАФ first reactive-accompaniment/score-following-lite in the lab, claimed soft).
- **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **diversity** тАФ three.js is 3├Ч/10, so shipping it would hit the **4├Ч audit-ban threshold** (where 864тЖТ863's curation already turned on this exact axis), and the mic-fallback input touches the over-rep touch+mic 8├Ч; the winner's WebGPU is the scarcest surface and pose is the coldest input. (b) Builder-flagged perceptual risk: detection from sparse single-note input is tuned to feel like a *human follower* (re-voices in a beat or two), which could read as "sluggish" to a reviewer expecting instant snapping. Genuinely strong and the directest live-performance-fitness / jazz-responsive answer the lab has тЖТ **resurrect FIRST on the adult lane** when three.js isn't over-represented (or re-skin the viz to WebGPU/WebGL2 to dodge the three.js cap). Brief + code in `/tmp/dream-losers-523/870-live-accompanist/`.

### `871-solar-wind-aurora` тАФ the live solar wind plays a sonified aurora; geomagnetic storms intensify it (status: built complete + verified clean [eslint 0/0, tsc 0], banked)
- **The question:** "What if the live solar wind streaming past Earth right now played an aurora тАФ the real, current space-weather data turned into a shimmering drone-scape and a curtain of light, with geomagnetic storms audibly intensifying it?"
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + spaceweather.ts + audio.ts + gpu.ts + webgl-fallback.ts + README).** INPUT **live NOAA SWPC** (keyless + CORS): `solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json` (speed/density/temp), `solar-wind/mag-1-day.json` (Bz), `noaa-planetary-k-index.json` (Kp) тАФ `AbortController` + 6s timeout, header-name-based defensive parsing (typed `string`/`number`, fill-value filtering, most-recent valid sample), re-poll. `deriveSignals` maps wind-speedтЖТshimmer energy/tempo, densityтЖТdrone thickness/loudness, Bz/KpтЖТan `activity` signal that intensifies everything. `audio.ts`: a detuned-overtone cold-bright pad (activity-gated partials) + density-driven sub + wind/activity-rated bell shimmers; master тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` тЖТ tanh `WaveShaper` limiter тЖТ 5s fade; analyser taps master as a dead-end. OUTPUT **WGSL `@compute`** integrating ~60k particles into folding **aurora curtains** (ripple speed/amplitude тЖР wind+activity) + additive glow point-quads, cold-greenтЖТtealтЖТvioletтЖТmagenta as activity rises. **Degrades:** fetch fail/blocked тЖТ a `makeSyntheticSample` evolving space-weather model drives the SAME pipeline within ~1s + an amber/`text-rose-300` "(simulated тАФ live feed unavailable)" badge; no WebGPU тЖТ notice + a hand-written **WebGL2** aurora on the identical mapping (audio keeps playing); neither тЖТ audio still plays. Full teardown (rAF + abort fetch + clear poll + osc stop + `audioCtx.close()` + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context`).
- **Named refs:** **Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics* / *data-verse*** (data-as-music/image) ┬╖ **NOAA SWPC** real-time feeds ┬╖ the aurora borealis. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [live NOAA fetch+parse + sonification engine + WGSL compute aurora + synthetic fallback = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs).
- **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **too-similar guard** тАФ `864-marine-gamelan` (the LAST adult build) was already real-world-data-sonification-with-consequence; shipping 871 would be back-to-back data-sonification, the exact "too similar in design and theme" trap Karel and the jury hammer. (b) The winner answers the lab's loudest *unaddressed* adult ask (jury #2 spatial-audio room, still 0├Ч) which 871 does not. Fresh data source (space weather, grep-0├Ч) + the scarcest renderer (WebGPU) make it a strong standalone тЖТ **resurrect** on a later adult cycle once data-sonification has cooled (e.g. тЙе3 adult cycles after 864), or fold the aurora curtains into a long-form generative space-weather piece (a quiet-sun тЖТ storm тЖТ recovery arc over a real 24h compressed to minutes тАФ also fills the thin long-form-generative menu). Brief + code in `/tmp/dream-losers-523/871-solar-wind-aurora/`.

### `867-kids-shadow-zoo` тАФ whole-body camera **motion-energy** тЖТ three.js glowing creatures (status: built complete + verified clean, banked тАФ **TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** "What if a 4-year-old could conduct a zoo of glowing singing creatures with their WHOLE BODY тАФ just by moving in front of the camera, no precise gestures, no landmarks?" A flailing toddler is the ideal user; there is no pose to hit.
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + README).** Front camera sampled into a **32├Ч24 offscreen buffer**, **frame-differenced** into a coarse motion-energy grid (NO MediaPipe / NO landmarks тАФ deliberately robust + light). Hot cells bloom ~2600 additive-glow **`THREE.Points`** creatures over a breathing starfield and probabilistically fire warm **C-major pentatonic** notes; total motion opens a lowpass + brightens the chord. Kids-safe `master 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6.2k тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, тЙе55ms attacks, always-on detuned-sine ambient pad, analyser off master only. iOS gate (AudioContext + `getUserMedia` in the тЙе72px Start tap, `facingMode:"user"`, mirrored). Full teardown (rAF + `track.stop()` + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **Degrades:** camera denied/absent тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + an **auto-demo synthetic motion-blob sweeps a figure-8** so creatures bloom + sing within ~1s; never a dead screen.
- **Named ref:** **Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1975)** тАФ the foundational full-body camera-interaction artwork (silhouette/motion тЖТ responsive graphics+sound); optionally **Daniel Rozin** mirrors. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [camera motion-energy field + motionтЖТspawn/harmony engine + three.js additive-glow point render + ambient bed = 4] ┬╖ #3 Krueger).
- **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **diversity** тАФ three.js would go 3├ЧтЖТ4├Ч (over-rep) this window, where 866's WebGPU is the scarcest surface; (b) **runtime risk** тАФ camera-dependent (the winner needed none for a no-hardware 06:30 glance). Genuinely fresh (whole-body, landmark-free) and the directest answer to the jury's standing embodied/"do something a touchscreen can't" ask. **Resurrect FIRST on the kids lane** when three.js isn't over-represented and a camera piece is wanted тАФ ships clean as-is.

### `868-kids-monster-keys` тАФ every chromatic note plays; **dissonance is a friendly wobble-monster you CALM** (status: built complete + verified clean [eslint 0/0, tsc 0], banked)
- **The question:** "What if a 4-year-old had the freedom to play a genuinely WRONG (dissonant) note тАФ and dissonance was a friendly wobbly monster they could *calm* by resolving it, instead of a forbidden mistake?" The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #3** ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG тАФ dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence; `841`'s 'spicy = a creature's mood' gestures at this, commit to it fully").
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + audio.ts + harmony.ts + README).** Every chromatic note sounds; each note is a glowing creature. A clashing interval (m2 / tritone) spawns a gentle **wobble-monster** тАФ soft sawtooth + a **+6-cent beating partner** + a slow shimmer LFO (wobble/beating, NEVER louder/harsher); the child **calms it by adding a consonant note** (3rd/5th) тЖТ it settles into a happy creature with a soft reward bloom (real tensionтЖТresolution, zero fail state). **`harmony.ts`** scores spice from clashing interval classes + computes which consonant note resolves the chord. **Input: Web MIDI** (feature-detected `requestMIDIAccess`, native `MIDIAccess` types тАФ no `any`) **+ a big тЙе84px on-screen colored creature-key row** as the always-available primary. **Output: three.js** additive-glow creatures (consonant = round/steady; monster = soft shivering spikes + beating shimmer). Kids-safe `master тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6.2k тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, always-on pad, analyser off master only. **Degrades:** ~0.7s **auto-demo plays the full spawn-a-monster-then-resolve-it arc** unattended; `text-rose-300` fallback if WebGL unavailable.
- **Named refs:** consonanceтЖТdissonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** (resolving dissonance builds a child's confidence) ┬╖ **Toca Band** relational-character model. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе5 subsystems [MIDI + on-screen keys + interval-analysis monster/resolve engine + three.js creatures + ambient bed] ┬╖ #3 tension-and-release pedagogy).
- **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **diversity** тАФ three.js over-rep (would be 4├Ч) vs the winner's scarce WebGPU; (b) the harmony-agency template is the most-trodden kids register (the jury flagged 841 as the *third* "stack/shape intervals" piece) тАФ 866's calm-shake answers a register the lab is actually *missing*. BUT 868 genuinely fulfils the jury's "commit to freedom-to-be-wrong fully" ask better than anything shipped тЖТ **resurrect SOON** for the #3 thread (note: pair the on-screen keys as the primary since most kids lack MIDI; consider a non-three.js GPU re-skin if three.js is hot).

## ┬з521 тАФ 2026-06-23 (cycle 521 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ one banked sibling

Cycle 521 ran an adult **DEEP** fire resurrecting the тнР top adult RESURRECT-FIRST `860-marine-gamelan` (IDEAS ┬з519): ONE concept тАФ *the live ocean plays a bronze gamelan, rough seas DETUNE the metal, with the two README-queued deepenings (groove-quantize + dual-sea crossfade)* тАФ built via two GPU-surface approaches. **Winner shipped = `864-marine-gamelan`** (hand-written WebGL2 caustic shader тАФ the faithful resurrect surface). The sibling below returned complete + verified clean (eslint 0, tsc 0); removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-521/`. (Note: 860's original banked slug is now SHIPPED as 864 тАФ drop 860 from the adult resurrect list; 861-flow-veil still banked.)

### `865-tide-gamelan` тАФ the SAME concept as a **three.js** 3D ocean+gong scene (status: built complete + eslint/tsc-clean, banked тАФ **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** identical to 864 тАФ the live, real state of the world's oceans plays a bronze gamelan and rough seas DETUNE the metal тАФ but rendered as a **3D scene you orbit** rather than a flat caustic shader, so the swell is a literal undulating sea-surface you look across.
- **Built this fire (page.tsx + marine.ts + audio.ts + scene.ts + README).** Same data + audio spine as 864 (keyless client-side Open-Meteo Marine fetch, 4 presets, synthetic fallback; modal physical-modeling bronze synth, slendro/pel├╢g, the `roughness`тЖТdensity/register/Q/┬▒35┬в-detune consequence, periodтЖТtempo, directionтЖТpan, swellтЖТdrone; both deepenings тАФ groove-quantize toggle + dual-sea equal-power crossfade). **Differentiator (`scene.ts`, three.js v0.182):** a CPU-displaced **sum-of-sines ocean PlaneGeometry** (amplitudeтЖРswell+roughness, speedтЖРperiod, driftтЖРdirection) under a floating **6├Ч4 emissive bronze gong-field** (additive-halo metallic discs that bob/tilt with the mesh and bloom on strike), drag-orbit + gentle auto-rotate; heavier seas rock the whole field + tilt the horizon. Full dispose (geometries/materials, `renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`), `ctx.close()`, abort fetch, clear intervals, panic mute, analyser tap never routed.
- **Named refs:** gamelan slendro/pel├╢g ┬╖ **Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*** ┬╖ **Bob Sturm *Music from the Ocean***. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [live fetch + state-machine + fallback ┬╖ modal bronze synth w/ groove scheduler ┬╖ dual-sea crossfade ┬╖ three.js displaced-mesh + gong-field scene = 4тАУ5] ┬╖ #3 named refs).
- **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **runtime risk** тАФ builder-flagged 80├Ч80 CPU vertex displacement + per-strike node graphs may want a lower segment count / strike cap on weak mobile, vs 864's pure-GPU fragment shader; (b) the strikeтЖФgong mapping is **approximate** (keys wrap into a 24-gong field тАФ conveys activity, not strict 1:1), vs 864's tight audio-led bloom; (c) the resurrect target (860) was always the WebGL2-caustic build, so 864 is the *faithful* "develop what you have" answer the jury asked for. 865 is genuinely distinct (a 3D sea you orbit, not a flat shader) and worth shipping. **Resurrect FIRST on the adult lane** тАФ apply a lower mesh segment count (e.g. 48├Ч48) + a per-frame strike cap first, then it ships clean; ideal for a cycle wanting a three.js 3D adult piece (note three.js is 3├Ч/10).
