## ┬з520 тАФ 2026-06-23 (cycle 520 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ one banked sibling

Cycle 520 ran a kids **DEEP** fire resurrecting the тнР top kids RESURRECT-FIRST `855-kids-solfege-signs` (IDEAS ┬з518): ONE concept тАФ *make the Curwen/Kod├бly solf├иge hand-signs in the air тЖТ a choir sings the matching scale degree, build a tune by changing hand shapes* тАФ built via two rendering approaches. **Winner shipped = `862-kids-solfege-signs`** (three.js additive-glow choir-orbs тАФ the scarcer GPU surface). The sibling below returned complete + verified clean (eslint 0, tsc 0); removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-520/`. (Note: 855's original banked slug is now SHIPPED as 862 тАФ drop 855 from the kids resurrect list.)

### `863-kids-solfege-choir` тАФ the SAME concept as a raw-WebGL2 GLSL **"ladder of light"** (status: built complete + eslint/tsc-clean, banked тАФ **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** identical to 862 тАФ a 4yo SINGS a melody with their bare hand via the Curwen/Kod├бly solf├иge hand-signs, and the choir sings the scale degree back тАФ but rendered as a vertical **staircase of light** rather than a choir of orbs, so the music's *pitch height* is literally legible in space.
- **Mechanic:** reuses the exact same pipeline тАФ front-camera **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import, pinned `tasks-vision@0.10.14`, analysis-only) тЖТ a geometric **7-sign classifier** (per-finger extended/curled booleans + hand orientation тЖТ do/re/mi/fa/sol/la/ti) with a ~250ms dwell + hand-height тЖТ octave/brightness, the **~2s-stillness Kod├бly echo** replaying the last ~6 notes, and the kids-safe choir (`master тЙд0.28 тЖТ lowpass 6500 тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`, always-on open-fifth drone, no wrong notes). **Render: raw WebGL2** тАФ a hand-written vertex+fragment GLSL fullscreen-quad shader draws **7 luminous rungs bottomтЖТtop = doтЖТti** (matching the pitch height **Kod├бly added to Curwen's signs** тАФ do low, la high), the actively-signed rung blooms a soft radial glow, height-shift brightens the whole ladder, perpetual shimmer keeps it breathing; a tiny Canvas2D HUD draws the live hand skeleton (the only 2D). Ghost-hand auto-demo (do-re-mi-sol-mi-do) + тЙе72px tap-sign buttons on the same pipeline; full WebGL2 teardown (`WEBGL_lose_context` + delete programs/buffers/VAOs). INPUT MediaPipe hands ┬╖ OUTPUT raw WebGL2 ┬╖ TECHNIQUE solf├иge-sign classification тЖТ ladder-of-light choir + call-response ┬╖ VIBE warm-luminous kids. Refs: **John Curwen 1870** ┬╖ **Zolt├бn Kod├бly** (vertical pitch-height) ┬╖ **arXiv 2604.27957, April 2026** (conducting-gesture recognition). Ambition #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (named refs).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** a clean, genuinely good build whose vertical-ladder rendering is arguably the *smarter* conceptual mapping (Kod├бly's pitch-height made literal) тАФ de-selected purely on **diversity**: raw-WebGL2 is **4├Ч in the last 10 shipped** (856, 853, 847, 834), AT the diversity-audit тЙе4 ban threshold, whereas the winner's three.js is the scarcer GPU surface (2├Ч). The winner also edges it on kid-appeal (press-and-hold tap-sign sustain vs 863's 520ms-tap; characterful orbs over an abstract ladder for a 4yo). **Resurrect first next kids cycle** where raw-WebGL2 isn't over-represented тАФ or fold the ladder in as a "staircase mode" toggle of a unified solf├иge piece. Caveat: real-hand sign-classification accuracy + the CDN/WASM MediaPipe load are build/lint-verified, not camera-verified (no camera in sandbox); the classifier favours distinct shapes over clinical accuracy. Brief + code in `/tmp/dream-losers-520/863-kids-solfege-choir/`.

## ┬з518 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 518 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ two banked explorers

Cycle 518 ran a kids **WIDE** fire: three orthogonal explorers, each a GPU surface (Canvas2D HARD-banned) on a *starved* embodied input that dodges the over-rep touch/mic (8├Ч) and the just-used MediaPipe-hands (853)/tilt (849). Research-anchored to embodied music pedagogy (Dalcroze/Orff/Curwen-Kod├бly) + the June-2026 WebGPU audio-reactive wave. **Winner shipped = `856-kids-rumble-band`** (gamepad dual-stick conduct + beat-synced controller rumble; raw WebGL2 тАФ the cross-modal/haptic cold menu, off camera entirely тЖТ most bulletproof for a no-hardware 06:30 glance, and avoids a 4th MediaPipe-hands build in a row). The two below returned complete + verified clean (tsc/eslint 0); removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Briefs preserved here; loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-518/`.

### `855-kids-solfege-signs` тАФ make the Curwen/Kod├бly **solf├иge hand-signs** in the air тЖТ a choir sings the matching scale degree (status: built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, banked тАФ **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** a 4yo SINGS A MELODY with their bare hand тАФ making the classic solf├иge hand-signs (fist = do, flat hand = fa, point up = tiтАж) тАФ and a choir of glowing creatures sings the matching note back, building a little tune by changing hand shapes. Real music pedagogy, not just "wave your hand."
- **Mechanic:** front-camera **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN, analysis-only) тЖТ a geometric 7-sign Curwen/Kod├бly classifier (do/re/mi/fa/sol/la/ti from finger-extended booleans + hand orientation) with a ~250ms dwell so a held shape rings ONE clean note; hand height = octave/brightness, openness = vibrato; after ~2s stillness the choir replays the last ~6 signed notes (Kod├бly/Orff echo). Kids-safe chain (master тЙд0.28 тЖТ lowpass тЙд7k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1), always-on open-fifth drone, no wrong notes. **Output: three.js** choir of 7 additive-glow creature-orbs (active sign blooms); small Canvas2D HUD only for the hand-skeleton overlay (primary surface is WebGL). Ghost-hand auto-demo + тЙе64px tap-sign fallback on camera-deny. INPUT MediaPipe hands ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js ┬╖ TECHNIQUE solf├иge-hand-sign classification тЖТ scale-degree choir + call-response ┬╖ VIBE warm wondrous. Refs: **John Curwen 1870 / Zolt├бn Kod├бly method**; **CHI "Music Corner" 2024** (gesture rhythm game inspired by solf├иge hand-signs). Ambition #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (named refs).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** the most *pedagogically substantive* explorer (teaches real solf├иge) and genuinely strong тАФ de-selected ONLY to avoid a **4th MediaPipe-hands build right after 853** (cycle 517 shipped bare-hand conducting; 731-star-reach/444-aurora-hands/851-banked also hands), exactly the "too similar in design and theme" trap the jury hammers. **Resurrect first next kids cycle** where hands isn't freshly over-used тАФ it's the embodied build with the deepest learning payload. Caveat: real-hand sign-classification accuracy + the CDN/WASM MediaPipe load are build/lint-verified, not runtime-verified (no camera in sandbox); `mi`/`sol`/`la` are the most orientation-dependent signs. Brief + code in `/tmp/dream-losers-518/855-kids-solfege-signs/`.

### `857-kids-color-wand` тАФ wave any bright colored toy/scarf тЖТ a glowing comet that sings (status: built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, banked)
- **The question:** a 4yo grabs any brightly-colored object, waves it in front of the tablet, and it becomes a magic wand тАФ a comet of light that trails across the screen and SINGS; the wand's COLOR chooses the instrument, its HEIGHT chooses the note.
- **Mechanic:** `getUserMedia` тЖТ 160├Ч120 offscreen canvas тЖТ RGBтЖТHSV тЖТ 12-bin hue histogram + weighted-centroid to find the largest bright/saturated blob (the physical object; analysis-only, never stored). HueтЖТtimbre (red bell / blue flute / green pluck / yellow music-box), heightтЖТC-pentatonic pitch, speedтЖТloudness + comet length; ~2s stillness тЖТ soft melodic echo. **Output: WebGPU** (compute advection of ~24k particles + instanced additive glow, WGSL, hand-rolled local type shim so it compiles with no `@webgpu/types` dep) with a **genuinely functional raw-WebGL2 fallback** (same mapping) тАФ never Canvas2D-primary. Ghost-wand auto-demo + pointer/swatch fallback on camera-deny. INPUT camera color-blob (NOT landmarks, NOT optical-flow) ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGPU (+WebGL2 fallback) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE color-object tracking тЖТ hue=timbre/height=pitch comet ┬╖ VIBE dreamy luminous. Refs: 2026 WebGPU audio-reactive particle work; Newton/Scriabin colorтЖТtimbre; Daniel Rozin camera mirrors; tangible "wave an object." Ambition #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (named refs).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** brings the freshest GPU surface (WebGPU, 0├Ч in the last 15) and the June-2026 research hook тАФ de-selected on **runtime risk**: the WebGPU path is unverified on real hardware (likely falls to the WebGL2 path on Karel's review device), color-blob tracking is finicky on busy/colorful backgrounds + low light, and it's camera-dependent (the winner needs no camera at all). **Resurrect** when WebGPU can be hardware-verified, or ship as the WebGL2 version and treat WebGPU as a progressive enhancement. Brief + code in `/tmp/dream-losers-518/857-kids-color-wand/`.

## ┬з517 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 517 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ two banked explorers

Cycle 517 ran an adult **DEEP** fire: ONE concept тАФ *"The Motet Room": navigate/sculpt a FIXED constellation of HRTF-spatialized choir voices with your body* (the Janet Cardiff *Forty Part Motet* inversion; differs from `677-presence-field`, which attaches a voice to each body joint тАФ here voices are pinned and the body moves the listener/sculpts the field) тАФ attacked via 3 parallel approaches at three body granularities, each on a different GPU surface. **Winner shipped = `853-motet-room-reach`** (two-hand conducting; raw WebGL2 тАФ scarcest GPU surface + richest agency via persistent re-sculpting). The two below returned complete + verified clean; removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Briefs preserved here.

### `852-motet-room-walk` тАФ physically WALK the listener through a fixed oval of voices (status: built complete + tsc/lint-clean, banked тАФ **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** the literal Janet Cardiff gallery experience тАФ step left and the soprano corner blooms in your left ear; lean/step toward the camera and you move *deeper* into a fixed oval of ~22 sustained choir voices that never move; you do.
- **Mechanic:** **MediaPipe PoseLandmarker** (CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import, pinned `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.21`, never bundled) тЖТ hip/torso-centre x тЖТ listener **X**; shoulder-width depth proxy тЖТ listener **Z**; EMA-smoothed. ~22 voices each a formant cluster (fund+5th+oct+formant partial) on its own fixed `PannerNode` (`HRTF`); only `listener.positionX/Y/Z` moves via `setTargetAtTime`. **three.js** room: fog, floor grid, one additive-halo orb per voice in an oval, each pulsing with its own analyser amplitude; first-person camera follows the listener. Auto-demo (figure-eight walk) + pointer-drag fallback. INPUT body-pose camera ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js ┬╖ TECHNIQUE HRTF nav through fixed field ┬╖ VIBE installation/sacred-ambient. Refs: Cardiff & Bures Miller *The Forty Part Motet* (2001). Ambition #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (named ref).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** the most *legible* "I move through a fixed field" and the truest Cardiff homage тАФ de-selected purely on **diversity**: three.js is already 2├Ч in the last 15 (846, 849-ish/805) whereas the winner's raw WebGL2 is the scarcer surface (1├Ч), and the winner's two-hand persistent re-sculpting has more *agency-with-consequence* (the jury's core ask). **Resurrect first next adult fire** where three.js isn't over-represented тАФ or fold into a single "Motet Room" with a walk/reach/lean mode toggle (multi-cycle DEEP). Caveat: pose path + CDN model fetch + three.js render are build/lint-verified, not runtime-verified (no camera/GPU in sandbox). Deepen: replace synth voices with looped choir-vowel samples (true Tallis colour); `UnrealBloomPass` + floor reflections; full listener orientation (turn shoulders тЖТ rotate facing); face-scale depth instead of shoulder-width.

### `854-motet-room-lean` тАФ head-tracked binaural: turn your head, the choir stays world-anchored (status: built complete + tsc/lint-clean, banked)
- **The question:** the purest, most minimal Motet Room тАФ a fixed choir of 16 voices anchored in the real room; the only instrument is your own head. Turn to face the tenors and they come to the front of your hearing; the field stays put in world space while you turn (true head-tracked binaural / Apple Spatial Audio).
- **Mechanic:** **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker** (`outputFacialTransformationMatrixes:true`) тЖТ yaw/pitch/roll from the 4├Ч4 matrix (landmark-derived yaw fallback) + face-centre/eye-distance тЖТ small listener translation; drives `listener.positionX/Y/Z` + `forwardX/Y/Z` + `upX/Y/Z` via `setTargetAtTime`. 16 SATB voices (detuned saws тЖТ per-part formant bandpass тЖТ lowpass) each on a fixed `HRTF` panner; the same pose vectors drive the **three.js** camera so picture and sound rotate together; orbs colour-coded by part. Auto-demo (slow head pan) + pointer fallback; "headphones recommended" hint. INPUT head/face camera ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js ┬╖ TECHNIQUE head-tracked HRTF binaural ┬╖ VIBE meditative installation. Refs: Cardiff *Forty Part Motet*; Apple Spatial Audio head-tracking; **RESEARCH ┬з517** (browser facial-tracking binaural). Ambition #2 + #3 (+#5 ties to ┬з517).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** conceptually the most elegant and the directest realization of ┬з517's research hook тАФ de-selected on (a) three.js again (diversity), and (b) "lean" is the least visually *active* of the three for a no-camera morning glance (a slow head-pan auto-demo vs. the winner's two visibly gesturing hands). **Resurrect** as the head-tracked-binaural reference piece, or as the "lean" mode of a unified Motet Room. Caveat: live FaceLandmarker matrixтЖТyaw sign/scale tuning is the one thing needing a real webcam + ear; auto-demo/pointer paths deterministic. Deepen: convolution reverb keyed to a chapel impulse (Cardiff's was a chapel); per-listener HRTF selection; drive real *Spem in Alium* part-entrances so turning to a section catches its line at the right moment.

## ┬з516 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 516 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ two banked explorers

Cycle 516 ran a kids **WIDE** fire: three orthogonal explorers, each implementing JURY 2026-06-22 #3 (freedom to be WRONG тАФ dissonance reachable AND resolvable) through a DIFFERENT starved embodied input, all on GPU surfaces (Canvas2D hard-banned). **Winner shipped = `849-kids-star-bowl`** (tilt тЖТ roll stars to a dissonant rim тЖТ tilt home to resolve; three.js; calm night-blue тАФ uniquely hit BOTH jury kids asks: #3 freedom-to-be-wrong AND #4 the regressed calm register). The two below returned complete + verified clean (eslint --max-warnings=0, tsc 0); removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs in `/tmp/dream-losers-516/`.

### `851-kids-hand-choir` тАФ bare-hand conducting: spread hands = tension, together = resolution (status: built complete + lint/tsc-clean, banked тАФ **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** a 4yo conducts a choir of glowing lights with their *bare hands in the air* тАФ hands close тЖТ warm consonant chord; spread wide тЖТ the top voice glides up through tritone/maj-7th tension (gentle beating + shimmer); bring hands home тЖТ resolves. Hand height тЖТ register. One hand: open fingers = tension, fist = resolve.
- **Mechanic:** **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import, pinned `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14`, analysis-only, never bundled/stored) тЖТ hand-distance тЖТ 3-voice consonanceтЖФdissonance engine with `setTargetAtTime` glide-resolution тЖТ kid-safe polyphonic synth (master 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6.5k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1) тЖТ **raw WebGL2** additive glow field. Ghost-hands auto-demo on camera-deny. INPUT off-glass MediaPipe hands ┬╖ OUTPUT raw WebGL2 ┬╖ TECHNIQUE hand-distanceтЖТharmony-tension ┬╖ VIBE warm wondrous glow. Refs: tension-release pedagogy (MasterClass/mapflc), MediaPipe HandLandmarker, L├йon Theremin (pitch-by-hand-distance in empty air). Ambition #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (named refs).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** genuinely strong and the directest answer to the jury's standing "if you have a body, do something a touchscreen can't" ask (body/hands starved, last meaningful use 811/731). De-selected this cycle on (a) the winner uniquely also hits #4 calm, and (b) MediaPipe pose/hands was used recently (811 cycle-502, 731), whereas tilt is colder. **Resurrect first next kids cycle** тАФ it's the embodied build the jury most wants. Caveat: real-hand path + CDN model fetch are build/lint-verified, not runtime-verified (no camera in sandbox). Brief saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-516/851-kids-hand-choir/`.

### `850-kids-monster-keys` тАФ every chromatic note plays; dissonance is a friendly wobble-monster you calm (status: built complete + lint/tsc-clean, banked)
- **The question:** a piano with NO safe-scale snapping тАФ a 4yo can hit a genuinely "wrong"/dissonant note on purpose, watch a googly wobble-monster spring up and shiver (soft beating + shimmer, never harsh), then find the calm note that settles it into a happy glowing creature. The *purest* freedom-to-be-wrong: real chromatic freedom, not a pre-vetted field.
- **Mechanic:** **Web MIDI** (`requestMIDIAccess()`) primary input (big on-screen chromatic key row fallback тАФ touch) тЖТ live interval classifier vs a held C3 root тЖТ polyphonic synth (master 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6.5k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1, 6-voice cap) with glide-to-consonance resolution тЖТ **raw WebGL2** additive monster point-sprites with procedural googly-eye/mouth fragment shader + ping-pong RGBA16F bloom trail. INPUT Web MIDI (+ touch fallback) ┬╖ OUTPUT raw WebGL2 ┬╖ TECHNIQUE chromatic-free-playтЖТlive-consonance-classificationтЖТcreature-mood ┬╖ VIBE bright playful daylight monsters. Refs: tension-release pedagogy, Toca Band interaction model, Web MIDI API. Ambition #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (named refs).
- **Why banked, not shipped:** excellent and the most literal #3 ("every note plays"), but (a) it's the deliberately bright/active explorer and this cycle the jury also begged for a CALM kids piece (#4) which only the winner delivers; (b) most kids lack a MIDI keyboard so the realistic primary input is the touch fallback тАФ landing on the over-represented touch input тАФ whereas tilt/hands are starved. Resurrect on a cycle where bright-active is fine and pair the MIDI path with a non-touch fallback. Brief saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-516/850-kids-monster-keys/`.

## ┬з515 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 515 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ one banked sibling

Cycle 515 ran an adult **DEEP** fire: one concept тАФ **Feedback Ecology II**, cycle-2 of `820`, the network's topology evolving itself (Lorenz drift + Hebbian rewiring) on a GPU surface тАФ built via two parallel rendering approaches. **Winner shipped = `847-feedback-ecology-ii`** (raw WebGL2 + ping-pong FBO feedback trails). The sibling below returned complete + verified clean; removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Rebuild from the brief.

### `848-feedback-ecology-ii` тАФ the SAME concept as a luminous orbiting **three.js** 3D graph (status: built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, banked тАФ **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** identical to 847 тАФ the 820 resonator network drives its own topology (chaotic-attractor coupling drift + Hebbian edges) as a long-form no-input instrument тАФ but rendered as a glowing **3D** graph rather than a flat 2D field, to read the topology change *in space*.
- **Mechanic:** reuses 820's ear-safe audio engine + the same Lorenz (╧Г=10/╧Б=28/╬▓=8/3) global modulation (xтЖТcoupling, yтЖТself-feedback, zтЖТdetune/Q) + Hebbian edge plasticity. **Render:** emissive spheres on a tilted 3D ring (brightness/scale тИЭ energy, 820's per-node hues) with additive halo shells; a single additive `THREE.LineSegments` whose per-vertex color/opacity тИЭ live Hebbian weight ├Ч signal flow (watch links strengthen/fade); a slowly **orbiting camera** so it reads as a living object; a faint Lorenz `THREE.Line` "weather" trail + Lorenz-driven scene fog/background hue; a live drift readout. Used the **additive-halo bloom fallback** (no `UnrealBloomPass`) for build robustness. INPUT no-input/self-oscillating ┬╖ OUTPUT three.js 3D graph ┬╖ TECHNIQUE Lorenz drift + Hebbian self-rewiring ┬╖ VIBE dynamical-system / luminous-orbiting.
- **Why banked, not shipped:** a clean, genuinely good build тАФ de-selected purely on **diversity + ambition**, not quality. three.js is 2├Ч in the last 15 shipped (846, 805) whereas 847's raw WebGL2 is the scarcer GPU surface (1├Ч), and 847's **ping-pong FBO feedback-trail** is a more substantive and *thematically apt* GPU technique for a feedback instrument (luminous decaying energy trails = the David-Tudor ecosystem look). **Resurrect first next adult cycle** where three.js isn't over-represented тАФ or fold its 3D-orbit camera + sphere layout into 847 as a "3D mode" toggle (cycle-3 deepening of the 820 thread). Ambition: #4 (multi-cycle, 820 thread) + #1 (chaotic-attractor self-rewiring topology) + #3 (Lorenz 1963; adaptive pulse-coupled networks; Tudor/Nakamura). Brief saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-515/848-feedback-ecology-ii/`.

## ┬з512 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 512 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ two banked explorers

Cycle 512 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out: 3 ways to give a 4-year-old **harmonic agency without a pre-approved scale** (JURY 2026-06-21 #4), each via a DIFFERENT input. Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з512 today тАФ the **Tonnetz** "consonance = compact closed shape, dissonance = dangly bits" framing + child-harmony-education work. **Winner shipped = `841-kids-hum-stack`** (mic/voice тАФ build the chord upward from the child's own sung pitch; the cleanest dodge of the touch over-rep the audit bans). Both non-winners returned complete + with READMEs; removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `839-kids-chord-garden` тАФ a kids **Tonnetz** lattice: plant flower-notes; a triad is a closed glowing triangle, far-apart notes sprout a wiggly creature (status: built complete, banked тАФ **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** тнР)
- **The question:** what if a 4yo could *shape harmony* by planting glowing flowers on a pitch garden, and dissonance became a playful wiggly creature instead of a "wrong" note?
- **Mechanic:** the play surface is a **Tonnetz** triangular pitch lattice (row = perfect fifth +7; up-right diagonal = major third +4; up-left = minor third +3) тАФ so **any three mutually-adjacent nodes are a real consonant triad.** Tap buds to plant 2тАУ4 sustained in-tune flower-voices that layer into a chord over an always-on pad. **Consonance reads as a CLOSED SHAPE** (compact triad тЖТ petals open, warm amber glow fills the triangle, golden cords join the notes); **dissonance reads as DANGLY BITS** (far-apart notes sprout a friendly googly-eyed wiggly creature that hums a gentle detuned shimmer тАФ playful, never a fail). `ЁЯМмя╕П New` reseeds; 3 magic-seed preset-triad buttons for instant delight. INPUT touch/drag ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D (warm organic) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE Tonnetz lattice + consonance-as-closed-shape geometry ┬╖ PALETTE warm garden.
- **Why banked, not shipped:** the most *elegant* legibility of harmony in the fan-out, BUT touch-primary (the input the diversity audit bans at 5├Ч) and the Tonnetz already exists adult-side (`797-tonnetz-walk`). 841 (voice) was the cleaner diversity dodge. **Resurrect first next kids cycle** тАФ it's the strongest standalone idea, just needs a cycle where touch isn't over-represented (or re-skin the input to drag-on-a-lattice that doesn't count as the over-rep'd tap-target pattern). Ambition: #3 named-ref (Tonnetz/Euler/neo-Riemannian) + soft #5 (RESEARCH ┬з512).

### `840-kids-harmony-sea` тАФ tilt a boat across a circle-of-fifths ├Ч chord-color plane; calm vs choppy water shows consonance (status: built complete, banked)
- **The question:** what if a 4yo could *steer a boat through harmony* by tilting the iPad тАФ calm consonant waters vs choppy playful "spicy" waters?
- **Mechanic:** tilt (DeviceOrientation, drag fallback) sails a boat over a 2-D harmonic plane тАФ **X = circle of fifths** (root motion, bass pad glides by portamento), **Y = chord color** (major тЖТ minor тЖТ add9 тЖТ sus/cluster). Consonance is legible in the **water**: glassy/glowing/calm in consonant regions, choppy/sparkly + a beating detune in tense ones тАФ exciting, not a fail. 3 islands anchor pretty chords with a chime. Always-on sea-pad drone. INPUT tilt (+drag) ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D procedural water ┬╖ TECHNIQUE 2-D harmonic-field navigation ┬╖ PALETTE ocean.
- **Why banked:** conceptually overlaps `828-kids-feelings-sun` (a 2-D field тЖТ chord-morph already shipped) and tilt was just used in `805`. Build-verified clean by its own builder (lint 0, tsc 0). Resurrect only if a future cycle wants the *body-steered* harmonic-field specifically (it's the most physical of the three).

## ┬з511 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 511 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ two banked explorers

Cycle 511 ran an adult **WIDE** fan-out (deliberate alternation off the ┬з510 DEEP; 3 orthogonal explorers directly attack the "too similar" mandate). All three rest his recording and dodge the answering-agent thread (JURY 2026-06-21 #1) and the touch-input over-rep (5├Ч in the last 10). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з511 today тАФ **Skylight** (viral June-2026 ADS-B ceiling projector тАФ the sky made *visible* but never *heard*) + **"Quasiperiodic Music"** (arXiv 2009.04667). **Winner shipped = `837-quasicrystal`** (de Bruijn pentagrid тЖТ Penrose aperiodic tiling тЖТ never-repeating self-similar long-form score; the highest-ambition, highest-surprise, grep-0├Ч lab-first). Both non-winners built complete + clean + build-verified (tsc 0, eslint 0); folders saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-511/` then removed before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `836-flightpaths` тАФ the live ADS-B sky over a city, SUNG: each real aircraft a sustained spatial voice (status: built complete, banked тАФ top adult RESURRECT-FIRST)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx ~450 lines + audio/render/sim/geo/types modules + README; tsc 0 / eslint 0).** A Canvas2D clinical radar (range rings, heading grid, altitude-shaded blips, 60s fading trails, callsign + FL labels, Ikeda data-instrument palette) over a polyphonic Web Audio engine: every aircraft tracked in a 250 km box around a hub (LHR/JFK/HND/DXB presets) = one sustained voice with a real lifecycle (fade-in on entry, glide while tracked, fade-out on exit). **Mapping:** altitude тЖТ pitch on an A-Dorian just-intonation lattice ┬╖ ground speed тЖТ filter brightness/partials ┬╖ compass bearing тЖТ stereo pan (`StereoPannerNode`) ┬╖ vertical rate тЖТ vibrato/glide ┬╖ traffic density тЖТ harmonic richness + a sub-drone bed. **Data:** client-side `fetch` to `api.airplanes.live/v2/point/{lat}/{lon}/{nm}` polled ~8s (no api route тЖТ no guard); on ANY failure (CORS/offline/rate/auth) it falls back seamlessly to a **16-aircraft simulated traffic field** running the identical pipeline + an amber "simulated sky" badge тАФ fully demoable with no network. Animates a sky on load; gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + abort fetch + nodes + `audioCtx.close()`). **Named ref:** **Skylight** (Tom's Hardware, June 2026 тАФ the viral ADS-B *visual* projector this piece SONIFIES, the un-done step) + airplanes.live + Andrea Polli airspace-sonification lineage. **Ambition #1+#2** тАФ #1 first aircraft/ADS-B/transit data source in the lab (grep-0├Ч: NOAA space-weather / USGS seismic / Wikimedia / Open-Meteo are owned; aircraft never) ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems (live ADS-B poll/parse + per-aircraft spatial-panned polyphonic synth w/ lifecycle + densityтЖТharmony engine + Canvas2D radar = 4). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-21 #3** ("music *about* something other than music" тАФ real-world-data sonification, a cold register). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** the concept's whole thesis is *realness*, and the live feed will often be CORS/network-blocked тЖТ most visitors see the (well-built) simulated sky, softening "real aircraft" to "plausible flight sim." **Resurrect FIRST next adult cycle** тАФ it's a genuine real-world-data lab-first; clean next step = verify the airplanes.live CORS/feed actually returns in-browser (if blocked, swap to an alternate CORS-friendly ADS-B mirror or a tiny same-origin proxy under a guarded api route), then ship; deepening = HRTF `PannerNode` for true overhead spatialization + a "follow one flight" focus mode.

### `838-hocket-loom` тАФ play ONE live line; the instrument shatters it across an interlocking ensemble (hocket / kotekan / phase) (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + engine/synth/loom-viz modules + README; tsc 0 / eslint 0).** A live-performance instrument: play via **Web MIDI** (auto-detect, "MIDI connected тЬУ" / amber "no MIDI тАФ use your keyboard") or a **computer-keyboard piano row** (AтАУL chromatic from C4), and every note is distributed in real time across 2тАУ6 distinct FM/physical-model timbres (marimba/metallophone/plucked/flute/tabla/vibes) by a **`HocketEngine`** with three interlock modes: **hocket** (medieval round-robin тАФ consecutive notes hop voices), **kotekan** (Balinese polos/sangsih тАФ two parts fill each other's gaps into a continuous stream), **phase** (Reich canonic drift). Density + BPM-grid controls; a **canvas voice-loom** (N color-coded scrolling lanes, glowing pitch-mapped onset pills, primary vs echo opacity, playhead) makes the braided interlocking legible; an idle тЙе2s **seed melody** auto-plays through the same engine so it's never silent, yielding the moment you play. Master `gain тЖТ lowpass тЖТ DynamicsCompressor`; gesture-gated; full teardown (rAF + key listeners + MIDI release + nodes + `audioCtx.close()`). **Named refs:** medieval hocket (Ars Nova / Notre-Dame) ┬╖ Balinese kotekan ┬╖ Steve Reich phase. **Ambition #1+#2+#3** тАФ #1 first dedicated hocket/kotekan engine (grep: only an incidental "kotekan" mention in `426-euclid-engine` README, no engine) ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems (Web MIDI + keyboard input + real-time hocket distribution engine + 6-timbre ensemble synth + canvas loom viz = 4) ┬╖ #3 named refs. MIDI input is starved (1├Ч in last 10). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** canon/echo/interlock is the lab's most-trodden thematic ground (`302-mirror-canon-round`, `375-tempo-canon`, `559-kids-clap-canon`, `298-kids-echo-friend`, etc.) тАФ lowest surprise of the three even though the hocket *mechanism* is new. **Resurrect when** a live-performance / MIDI cycle is wanted (Karel priority #3); clean next step = make the kotekan interlock *quantize to a shared pulse* so polos/sangsih genuinely lock (currently echo-offset), and add a "freeze loop" so a played phrase becomes a sustained interlocking ostinato you solo over.

## ┬з510 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 510 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ DEEP) тАФ one banked sibling

Cycle 510 ran a kids **DEEP** fire on ONE concept тАФ *the color you MIX is the chord you HEAR* тАФ via two physically-opposite color models, both raw WebGL2 with GPU `readPixels` so the heard chord exactly equals the seen color. Winner shipped = **`834-kids-paint-mixer`** (subtractive **Kubelka-Munk pigment** mixing тАФ blue+yellow=green like real paint, a lab-first; resurrects the ┬з508 тнР `829-kids-color-blend` and upgrades it from approximate RGB blend тЖТ physically-correct pigment optics + real pixel-readback). The sibling below built complete + clean and was de-selected on novelty (additive RGB light mixing is the *ordinary* mix; the pigment one is the lab-first + the fresher surprise). Saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-510/`, removed before the authoritative build (not committed). Rebuild from the brief below.

### `835-kids-light-mixer` тАФ mix beams of colored LIGHT (red+green=yellow, all=white) and the glow you make IS the chord (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx 846 lines + README; builder reports red+greenтЖТyellow / allтЖТwhite verified in-shader, readPixelsтЖТHSVтЖТgliding chord, kids-safe chain).** A **raw WebGL2** GLSL ES 3.00 additive-light field: 3 big glowing orbs (warm gold-red ┬╖ green ┬╖ blue-violet) drag over a near-black procedural starfield; a single full-screen fragment shader accumulates each light additively (`core exp(-d┬▓/r┬▓k) + halo + domain-warped bloom`) with a Reinhard tone-map that preserves hue ratios тАФ so overlaps ADD like stage spotlights (gold+greenтЖТyellow, all threeтЖТbrilliant white). Each ~40 ms frame `readPixels` a 16├Ч16 block under the active light тЖТ HSV тЖТ `applyColorHarmony`: hueтЖТchord quality over a fixed C+G drone (warmтЖТmajor/add9, greenтЖТsus, blueтЖТminor, violetтЖТmaj7), brightness (light pile-upтЖТwhiter pixelтЖТhigher value)тЖТa shimmer C4 octave layer when all three overlap; all glides via `setTargetAtTime` (TC 0.06), drones fade in ~1.2s, no retriggering. Kids-safe `masterGain 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7 kHz тЖТ DynamicsCompressor(тИТ10/20:1)`; iOS gesture-gated; тЙе64px targets; auto-drift after ~1.5s idle; WebGL2-null тЖТ CSS `mix-blend-mode:screen` fallback + `text-rose-300` notice; full GL/audio teardown. **Named refs:** Newton 7-colorтЖФ7-note ┬╖ Scriabin *clavier ├а lumi├иres* ┬╖ additive (RGB-light) color theory (the deliberate contrast to 834's subtractive paint). **Ambition ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [touch drag + additive-light GLSL field + readPixels colorтЖТchord synth + WebGL2 render = 4] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** additive RGB light mixing is the *physically ordinary* mix (and the original 829 framing) тАФ 834's Kubelka-Munk *pigment* mixing is the genuine lab-first, more kid-native (a 4-year-old knows finger-paint, not stage lighting), and the directer embodiment of the ┬з510 research. **Resurrect when** the kids lane wants the cold WebGL2 surface and a light-mixing (vs paint) color piece, or as the "light room" companion to 834's "paint room"; clean next step = let the child *toggle* paintтЖФlight mode to feel the difference (blue+yellow=green vs blue+yellow=gray), which is itself a tiny color-science lesson.

## ┬з502 (Cycle 502 тАФ kids WIDE fire, 3 orthogonal explorers, 2 banked)

Cycle 502 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out (deliberate alternation off the DEEP 501; JURY 2026-06-20 kids guidance is *spread*-shaped). Three orthogonal explorers, each clearing the ambition floor via DIFFERENT input ├Ч output ├Ч technique, all off every current ban (touch-primary / Canvas2D-primary / his-recording-conductor / bright-active-kids) AND off the three.js 3├Ч-in-a-row monoculture (799тЖТ803тЖТ805). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з502 today тАФ **┬бOtro!** (IAIA Digital Dome premiere Apr-2026, real-time movementтЖТsonification) + **Frid et al.** (children movement-sonification, Frontiers 2016). **Winner shipped = `811-kids-body-ribbons`** (full-body UPIC тЖТ glowing SVG ribbons; the jury-#4 most-starved body-input pick on the jury-#1 starved SVG surface). Both non-winners were built to demoable and self-reported clean; folders saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-502/` then removed before the authoritative build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `812-kids-breath-bubbles` тАФ blow softly into the tablet and grow a slow drifting cloud of glowing bubbles that chime as they rise and pop (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** The mic reads **breath ENERGY only** (RMS off an `AnalyserNode.getByteTimeDomainData()`, analysis-only тАФ never pitch/speech/recognition, never wired to output, frames discarded, nothing recorded/sent). A soft blow spawns glowing bubbles; **harder blow = bigger, lower-toned** (warm amber/rose, rises slow); soft blow = small/bright/rises fast; they drift up and sway, and on reaching the top (or a big gust) **pop with a soft C-major-pentatonic sine-bell chime** (+ 2nd-harmonic shimmer, 1тАУ3s tail) тАФ accreting into a calm rising cloud over minutes, long-form, never a hard loop. **Bonus realized:** a multi-pop (3+ together) **harmonizes into a chord** so the cloud *sings*, not just chimes. **Output: raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00)** additive `gl.POINTS` glow-sprites (iq soft exponential falloff + faint rim, `SRC_ALPHA, ONE`) over a dim warm-dusk gradient тАФ the iPad-reliable scarce renderer (last WebGL2 ship was `788`, cycle 494; off the three.js streak AND the banned Canvas2D). Synth only (rests his recording). Kid-safe `gain 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, always-on C3тАУG3тАУC4 pad, soft attacks/long decays, тЙе64px Start, iOS AudioContext+getUserMedia (EC/NS/AGC off) both in the first tap, full teardown (rAF + mic tracks + nodes + `audioCtx.close()` + delete GL program/buffer/VAO + lose-context). Degrades: mic denied тЖТ a **ghost-breath auto-demo** spawns+pops hands-free within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 тЖТ Canvas2D bubble field that still drifts+chimes. Refs: **Toshio Iwai** (Electroplankton) ┬╖ breath/wind-controller lineage (EWI) ┬╖ **Inigo Quilez** (additive glow). Ambition ~2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [breath-RMS analysis + particle spawn/growth physics + WebGL2 render + pop-chime synth] + #3 refs). **Why banked not shipped:** honest self-framing тАФ blow-to-bubbles is a familiar toy form, and `811` better serves the jury's #4 body-input gap + #5 build-on-your-own-research. **Resurrect when** a breath/vocalization piece is wanted on a cold mic window; clean next step = let bubble *clusters* sustain a held chord while aloft, not only on pop.

### `813-kids-sky-lullaby` тАФ the REAL sky right now (sun, clouds, moon phase) sings a 4-year-old a slow dusk lullaby they stir with a tilt (status: queued тАФ тЪая╕П finish a coordinate-space pass first)
**The brief that was built and banked.** The child's **live local sky** from **Open-Meteo** (free/no-key/CORS; `current=temperature_2m,cloud_cover,is_day,weather_code` + `daily=sunrise,sunset`; coords from `navigator.geolocation`, London silent default) is the **composer**: `is_day`+time тЖТ key & register (day = warm major celesta; dusk/night = soft suspended pads, octave-down), `cloud_cover` тЖТ note density, `temperature` тЖТ timbral warmth (sineтЖТtriangle), **computed moon phase** (synodic approximation from the date) тЖТ a slow shimmering high voice (bright near full, near-silent at new). A **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** plays a sparse pentatonic ostinato that **mutates/re-seeds every ~45тАУ90s** (Eno, never an exact loop); the child **tilts** a glowing star-cursor across the sky (drag fallback) and where it rests adds a key-snapped twinkle. **Output: inline SVG/DOM** (deep-blueтЖТvioletтЖТgold gradients, blurred moon/cloud/star shapes; rAF repaint) тАФ the renderer the lab is genuinely scarce on (off the three.js streak AND banned Canvas2D). Kid-safe `gain тЙд0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, soft attacks / 2тАУ4s releases, always-on C2+G2+C3 drone bed, тЙе64px Start, iOS AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both in the first tap, full teardown (scheduler/rAF/nodes/`audioCtx.close()`/abort fetch). Degrades: geo denied тЖТ default city; fetch/CORS fail тЖТ baked "example sky" + `text-rose-300` notice while audio plays hands-free within ~2s. Refs: **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports* / *Reflection*) ┬╖ **Andrea Polli** + **Natalie Miebach** (weather/data sonification) ┬╖ **Open-Meteo**. (This is the ┬з500-banked `806-kids-sky-lullaby` renumbered + rebuilt; differentiated from `575-kids-sky-song`'s bright weather toy тАФ this is its quiet, dusk-calm, moon-aware, tilt-stirred, generative twin.) Ambition ~2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [live API + generative scheduler + SVG render + synth] + #3 refs + soft-#5 RESEARCH ┬з502). **Why banked not shipped:** `811` was the jury-pointed pick (body 4├ЧтЖТ0├Ч + the unbuilt full-body UPIC); ALSO this build's agent was killed **mid-fix on a known SVG coordinate-space bug** (moon/cursor positions mixing pixel coords with the `viewBox 0 0 100 100` SVG-unit space) тАФ **resurrect requires finishing that coordinate pass + a browser check** before it can ship clean. Otherwise the most robust banked seed (always sounds + animates on Start regardless of geo/network).

## ┬з501 (Cycle 501 тАФ adult DEEP fire, ONE concept ├Ч 3 resonator engines, 2 banked)

Cycle 501 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out тАФ ONE concept (*play or sing into your mic and exactly the right strings ring back: a bank of ~88 tuned strings that vibrate **sympathetically** to your live spectrum, the way a grand piano's strings hum when you hold the sustain pedal*), attacked via **3 resonator engines**. The realization of the standing adult RESURRECT-FIRST `798-sympathetic-strings`. Renderer-diverse on purpose тАФ all three are **SVG/DOM** (the jury-starved 1├Ч surface), dodging the new **three.js 3├Ч-in-a-row monoculture** (799тЖТ803тЖТ805 тАФ flagged in MORNING) and the banned Canvas2D. Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з501 today тАФ **Electronic Audio Experiments *Prismatic Wall*** (sympathetic string resonator, tuned-delay-line Karplus-Strong, Jan-2026 reviews; 4 interval-spacing modes) + arXiv *Dialogue in Resonance* (May-2026) + *Interactive Neural Resonators*; refs **Karplus-Strong/JaffeтАУSmith** (CMJ 1983), sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore, Henry Cowell string-piano. **Winner `808-sympathetic-strings`** (real Karplus-Strong tuned-delay-line bank in a Blob-URL AudioWorklet тАФ the literal Prismatic-Wall model; FFT per-string excitation scaling, sustain-pedal feedback physics 0.92тЖФ0.997, ghost exciter, click-to-pluck, levelтЖТSVG glow, full teardown; the only candidate implementing the named reference's delay-line model rather than a bandpass/comb approximation, and the most distinct from `803`'s modal-bandpass banks). Both losers demoable + self-reported clean; folders saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-501/` and `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (not committed). **Max committed folder after this fire is `808`** (banked names below renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`809-sympathetic-modes`** (banked, IDEAS ┬з501). *Same concept via an **FFT harmonic-gated high-Q BiquadFilter bandpass resonator bank** (61тАУ88 strings; per-string gate opens when live FFT energy sits at the string's pitch+harmonics, slow release = sympathetic tail).* INPUT mic/click/ghost ┬╖ OUTPUT SVG ┬╖ TECH FFT-gated bandpass bank + sustain release physics ┬╖ VIBE dark/nocturnal/contemplative. Built clean at 809 (`page.tsx` 503 + `audio.ts` 455 + README; self-reported demoable). **Why it lost:** the bandpass-resonator-bank DSP **rhymes with `803-body-chimes`** (cycle 499, damped-sine modal bandpass banks) тАФ two cycles apart, the "too similar" risk; and it's a *bandpass approximation* of sympathetic strings, where the winner is the literal tuned-delay-line model. **Resurrect when:** a cycle wants the most CPU-frugal (no worklet) sympathetic engine, or to A/B the harmonic-gating legibility against 808's continuous excitation. Honest 3/5 (#2 + #3 + soft #5).
- **`810-sympathetic-comb`** (banked, IDEAS ┬з501). *Same concept via a **native feedback-COMB-filter bank** (DelayNode `delayTime = 1/freq` + feedback GainNode + one-pole lowpass damping per loop; ~48 combs, all-native, no worklet тАФ prioritizes robustness).* INPUT mic/click/ghost ┬╖ OUTPUT SVG ┬╖ TECH feedback-comb bank + per-comb AnalyserNode energy tap ┬╖ VIBE nocturnal shimmer. Built clean at 810 (`page.tsx` 643 + `audio.ts` 540 + README; self-reported demoable). **Why it lost:** the all-native comb approach is the most robust but the *least* faithful to the Prismatic-Wall tuned-delay-line model (a comb rings at `1/delay` but lacks KS's loop-filter string timbre); lost on concept-fidelity, not quality. **Resurrect when:** a worklet-free fallback build is wanted, or to compare comb vs KS string color. Honest 3/5 (#2 + #3 + soft #5). **Banked idea worth folding into 808 next cycle:** its per-comb AnalyserNode energy tap is a cleaner per-string level source than 808's worklet `postMessage` levels.

## ┬з499 (Cycle 499 тАФ adult DEEP fire, ONE concept ├Ч 3 synthesis methods, 2 banked)

Cycle 499 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out тАФ ONE concept (*your whole moving body plays an invisible, room-sized **physical-modeling instrument**: the front camera projects your limbs into a 3D field of suspended resonators, and on spatial collision they EXCITE real physical-modeling synthesis that rings and slowly accretes into a room-drone different at minute 5 than minute 1*), attacked via **3 synthesis methods**. The literal **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body/camera went **4├ЧтЖТ0├Ч** тАФ the single most-starved input, off every over-represented tag at once) + **#2** (the depth ceiling collapsed 4тЖТ1 тАФ build a real long-form ceiling build) + **#3** (rests his recording) + **#1** (off the 10├Ч-banned Canvas2D тАФ onto three.js). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з499 today тАФ **CHI-2026 "From Movement to Sound and Back"** + the **MediaPipe-gestureтЖТsound framework** (arXiv 2504.19460), with **Vrengt** (NIME body-machine instrument) + **Cadoz/ACROE CORDIS-ANIMA** physical modeling as the technique spine. All three project wrists/head/ankles as exciters, render a dark volumetric installation room in three.js, accrete a multi-minute resonant bed, and degrade to a ghost body. **Winner `803-body-chimes`** (modal struck-bell/bar/bowl room тАФ the most complete ceiling build [sympathetic mode-bed + struck-body memory + root-drift], the most robust unattended [standard BiquadFilter banks, no fragile worklet], the richest installation visuals, and the freshest lab concept). Both losers were demoable + verified clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule (loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-499/` this fire, not committed). **Max committed folder after this fire is `803`** (banked names `802`/`804` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`802-body-aviary`** тнР **RESURRECT FIRST (adult).** *Your whole body plays an invisible room-sized instrument of PLUCKED STRINGS тАФ each limb sweeping through a 3D forest of ~28 suspended strings, plucking the ones it crosses, which ring with real Karplus-Strong physical modeling.* Front camera тЖТ MediaPipe Pose; 5 exciters (wrists/head/ankles, projected with real MediaPipe `z` depth) collide (proximity + per-string refractory) with a golden-angle 3D string forest tuned to a 7-note just-intonation field (`1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8` over A 110 Hz, 4 octaves); each pluck = **genuine Karplus-Strong** in a single **AudioWorklet built from a Blob URL** (delay line `L = sampleRate/freq`, band-limited noise burst, one-pole lowpass loop filter тЖТ fed back just under 1; limb speed тЖТ amplitude + loop brightness; 16-voice steal). **Long-form accretion:** a very-high-Q sympathetic bed whose gain rises with cumulative pluck activity and leaks over minutes (decay `0.99997`/sample) + a `RootDrift` slow random walk that re-tunes the whole forest every 18тАУ40 s тАФ minute 5 fuller than minute 1. INPUT = body/camera ┬╖ OUTPUT = three.js (dark violetтЖТamber volumetric forest, glowing strings that wobble as they ring, additive exciter orbs, breathing camera) ┬╖ TECH = Karplus-Strong plucked-string physical modeling + 3D spatial collision ┬╖ VIBE = adult/installation/nocturnal. Ghost-body fallback within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; iOS gesture-gated; full teardown. Built clean at `src/app/dream/802-body-aviary/` (`page.tsx` ~632 lines + `audio.ts` [KS AudioWorklet engine] + `forest.ts` + `pose.ts` + README; self-reported **tsc 0 + ESLint 0/0**, "тЬУ Compiled successfully"). Refs: **Vrengt** (NIME/arXiv:2010.03779) ┬╖ **Karplus-Strong / Jaffe-Smith** (CMJ 1983) ┬╖ Laetitia Sonami / Atau Tanaka. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ┬з499). **Why it lost (a close call):** the highest-tech synthesis of the three (real KS in a worklet тАФ arguably the strongest "never-used technique" claim) and the most iconic physical-modeling voice, but the **Blob-URL AudioWorklet adds the most runtime fragility on an unattended straight-to-prod cycle** (a worklet-load failure = silence), and KS-pluck softly rhymes with `105-pluck-field` (mic-onset Karplus). **RESURRECT FIRST on the adult lane** тАФ ship it the moment a worklet slot is wanted; it's the highest-ceiling synthesis pick. (Note: this builder ran `npm install` and dirtied `package-lock.json` тАФ restored before commit; on resurrect, don't let the builder touch the lockfile.)

- **`804-body-veil`** (adult, banked). *Your whole body is inside ONE enormous SYMPATHETIC RESONATOR тАФ a veil of ~44 high-Q bandpass "strings" tuned to a single just-intonation chord (over A1 55 Hz, 4 octaves) that fills the room тАФ and every limb-motion brushes filtered-noise excitation into the strings nearest it (Gaussian distance ├Ч speed), which keep ringing and decaying after you pass (sympathetic sustain). It's always consonant (one chord) and enveloping тАФ "like running your hands across a giant open piano with the sustain pedal down."* **Long-form accretion (4 real processes):** master-lowpass brightness opens ~700 HzтЖТ5.9 kHz over ~4 min; reverb wash grows over ~5 min; a wandering active-register band migrates the most-alive part of the veil; a drifting root glides a slow **IтЖТIIтЖТIV** (`1тЖТ9/8тЖТ4/3`) every ~3 min тАФ minute 5 тЙа minute 1. INPUT = body/camera ┬╖ OUTPUT = three.js (hanging curtain of glowing filaments that brighten/shiver with ring energy, aurora brush-orbs trailing wakes, violet-teal enveloping fog, slow camera breath) ┬╖ TECH = sympathetic-resonance physical modeling (high-Q bandpass bank brushed spatially; excitation NEVER fed by output тАФ no feedback) ┬╖ VIBE = adult/installation/enveloping aurora. Seed drone so it's alive immediately; ghost-body fallback + `text-rose-300` notice; iOS gesture-gated; full teardown. Built clean at `src/app/dream/804-body-veil/` (`page.tsx` + `synth.ts` + `veil.ts` + `pose.ts` + README; self-reported **tsc --noEmit + eslint clean**). Refs: **Vrengt** (NIME/arXiv:2010.03779) ┬╖ **sympathetic strings** (grand-piano sustain pedal / sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore) ┬╖ **├Йliane Radigue / Alvin Lucier** room-resonance drones. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ┬з499). **Why it lost:** the most beautiful and enveloping as an ambient *room*, but its **brush proximity is computed in the 2D veil-plane only** (filament depth is visual-only) тАФ the weakest "body-EXCITES-a-3D-instrument" claim of the trio тАФ and the sympathetic-string concept overlaps the banked **`798-sympathetic-strings`** (┬з497, singтЖТsympathetic strings). **Resurrect** with **true 3D brush proximity** (project the veil's z-stagger into the distance test so depth actually matters), and lean the differentiator away from 798 (798 is voice-excited; 804 is body-brushed). Or fold its 4-process long-form accretion arc into `803`/`802` as a deepening.

## ┬з498 (Cycle 498 тАФ kids DEEP fire, ONE concept ├Ч 3 growth grammars, 2 banked)

Cycle 498 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out тАФ ONE concept (*a 4-year-old SINGS a 3D garden into being and the garden sings their melody back; the inverse of Mort Garson's Plantasia*), attacked via 3 different **growth grammars**, ship the strongest. Deliberate alternation off two straight WIDE fires (496/497); the JURY 2026-06-20 #2 ceiling-collapse (4тЖТ1) called for depth, and the sing-garden is the kids-depth pick (long-form stateful, accreting). All three are **three.js** (off the 10├Ч-banned Canvas2D), **mic/voice** (off banned touch), **calm daylight** (the reintroduced "middle"), and rest his recording тАФ clearing every ban. Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з498 today тАФ the negative-result gap (voiceтЖТL-system growth is web-0├Ч / grep-0├Ч) + Plantasia inverted. **Winner `799-kids-sing-garden`** (the only one with an actual L-system grammar тАФ the literal named reference and the lab-first technique; richest + long-form stateful + ESLint 0/0). Both losers were demoable + self-reported ESLint-clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-498/` this fire, not committed). **Max committed folder after this fire is `799`** (the prior banked `794-kids-sing-garden` resurrected тЖТ 799). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`800-kids-sing-meadow`** тнР **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *Sing a meadow of flowers into bloom тАФ one flower per note on a golden-angle spiral тАФ and the meadow sings your melody back, lighting each flower in turn.* Mic тЖТ autocorrelation pitch (Chris Wilson ACF) + RMS; **each sung note plants ONE flower** at the next **phyllotaxis** position (H. Vogel sunflower model: `╬╕ = n├Ч137.508┬░`, `r тИЭ тИЪn`, never colliding) тАФ pitch (octave-collapsed тЖТ C-major-pentatonic, never wrong) тЖТ flower **hue** (low warm rose/gold тЖТ high cool sky) + petal count/stem height, loudness тЖТ flower **size** + glow + bloom speed, a held note тЖТ taller stem/bigger blossom; flowers **accumulate over minutes** (fuller meadow at minute 5; gentle per-flower wind sway keeps it alive). On ~1s silence, the meadow replays the contour on a soft mallet/bell voice (sine + shimmer), each corresponding flower's emissive center spiking 1.25тАУ3├Ч in sequence. INPUT = mic/voice ┬╖ OUTPUT = **three.js** WebGL ┬╖ TECH = voiceтЖТphyllotaxis bloom + melody-memory call-response ┬╖ VIBE = calm warm daylight meadow. Kid-safe `master 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad; analyser never wired to output; iOS gesture-gated; ghost-hum fallback on mic-deny + `text-rose-600` notice; full teardown. Built clean (two independent realizations this fire тАФ page ~300тАУ394 lines + `audio.ts` + `phyllotaxis.ts` + README; self-reported ESLint 0/0 + tsc clean), then removed. Refs: **phyllotaxis / golden angle (H. Vogel 1979 sunflower model)** ┬╖ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** ┬╖ Chris Wilson autocorrelation ┬╖ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. Ambition honest **2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [voice pitch/RMS analysis + phyllotaxis three.js bloom + melody call-response sequencer] + #3 named refs). **Why it lost (the closest call):** the **clearest one-flower-per-note cause-effect** and the most *legible* for a 4yo (the strongest pure-delight runner-up) тАФ but the winner implements a real generative **grammar** (the named L-system reference) where the meadow only borrows the golden-angle *placement* of pre-made shapes. **RESURRECT FIRST on the kids lane** тАФ it diversifies off 799's branching grammar and is the most immediately readable of the trio.

- **`801-kids-sing-grove`** (kids, banked). *Sing a swaying grove of glowing reeds into being тАФ each note a tall reed тАФ and the wind sings your melody back, bending and lighting each reed in turn (an aeolian wind-harp inversion).* Mic тЖТ autocorrelation pitch + RMS; each note grows ONE **reed** (tall tapered blade) on a golden-angle spiral via three.js **InstancedMesh** (hundreds stay cheap on a tablet) тАФ pitch тЖТ reed **height** + hue (low warm тЖТ high cool), loudness тЖТ **thickness** + glow + sway amplitude. A global **wind** (layered sines 0.23/0.57/1.1 Hz with per-reed phase offsets) bends every reed continuously so the grove **ripples and is never static** (its best, distinctive idea). On ~1s silence, the grove replays the contour on a mallet/bell voice (sine + inharmonic partials ├Ч2.756/├Ч5.404), each corresponding reed flashing warm-white + tilting in sequence тАФ "the wind plays your melody back." INPUT = mic/voice ┬╖ OUTPUT = **three.js** WebGL (InstancedMesh) ┬╖ TECH = voiceтЖТinstanced reed-field growth + continuous wind-sway + melody call-response ┬╖ VIBE = calm warm daylight grove. Kid-safe chain + optional very-low filtered-noise wind bed; analyser never wired to output; ghost-hum fallback + `text-rose-600` notice; full teardown. Built clean (page ~385 lines + `audio.ts` + `reeds.ts` + README; self-reported ESLint 0/0), then removed. Refs: **wind-played reeds / aeolian instruments (wind-harp lineage)** ┬╖ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** ┬╖ Chris Wilson autocorrelation ┬╖ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. Ambition honest **2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why it lost:** the continuous wind-sway "never static" motion is genuinely lovely and the InstancedMesh scaling is the most performant of the trio, but the "growth" is reed-per-note (like the meadow, no generative grammar) and the aeolian reference is the loosest. **Resurrect** as its own piece, OR **fold the continuous-wind-sway motion into 799's next cycle** so the L-system garden breathes in a breeze.

Sing тЖТ octave/fifth/overtone-matched strings shimmer; whistle тЖТ a near-pure single string; speak тЖТ a soft noisy cluster. INPUT = mic/voice (off banned touch; keyboard/clickable-pad fallback) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **SVG** 88-string field (off banned Canvas2D-primary) тАФ each string a shimmering vertical standing-wave whose amplitude tracks its ring, faint violet harmonic-link arcs ┬╖ TECH = partial-detection тЖТ harmonic-gated sympathetic modal/bandpass resonance ┬╖ VIBE = intimate / nocturnal / grand-piano-at-night. Anti-feedback: analyser NEVER fed by synth output + per-string refractory window + modest master gain + master lowpass; mic-deny тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + clickable-pad/computer-keyboard fallback so it's never silent. Built clean at `src/app/dream/798-sympathetic-strings/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` (`ResonanceEngine`) + `strings.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported tsc-strict + eslint zero issues), then removed. Refs: **sympathetic strings тАФ sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore** ┬╖ **Henry Cowell *string piano*** ┬╖ sustain-pedal physics. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic FFT partial-detection + sympathetic-selection matcher + 88-string resonant synth + SVG field] + #3 named refs). **Why it lost (a close call):** piano-native + the directest **live-performance fit** (Karel priority #3) and a beautiful concept, but the winner is far more robust unattended (797 needs no mic permission to sing) and 798 carries a faint rhyme with the listening-machine / `105-pluck-field` (mic-onset) family. **RESURRECT FIRST on the adult lane** тАФ ship it as-is; it's the piano-native depth pick.

- **`796-aeolian-sky`** (adult, banked тАФ тЪая╕П MUST re-spec renderer to WebGL2 before shipping). *The live weather where you are, played as a wind-harp тАФ the real wind, right now, sung.* `navigator.geolocation` (4s timeout тЖТ SF default) тЖТ **Open-Meteo** live `wind_speed/direction/gusts/temperature` (free, no key, CORS тАФ direct client fetch, no API route, no guard) тЖТ an **aeolian harp**: a shared filtered-noise source exciting **7 high-Q (Q 24тАУ55) bandpass "strings"** tuned to a just-intonation chord over ~F3, master lowpass + ConvolverNode reverb. Mappings: wind speed тЖТ excitation amplitude + overtone bloom; gusts тЖТ slow LFO swells; direction тЖТ stereo pan/tilt; temperature тЖТ brightness (lowpass cutoff); heavily smoothed for long-form calm; re-fetch every ~3 min so it drifts. Robust: geolocation-deny тЖТ default city; fetch-fail тЖТ built-in **synthetic slow-random-walk wind** so it's never silent (amber `text-amber-300/95` "simulated wind" note). INPUT = live-external-data/weather (off banned touch & off his-recording) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **wind field** (тЪая╕П builder shipped **Canvas2D as PRIMARY** тАФ the brief allowed it only as a WebGL2 *fallback*; this is why it **lost this cycle: Canvas2D-primary is the JURY headline ban**) ┬╖ TECH = aeolian resonant-bandpass synthesis + data-sonification ┬╖ VIBE = calm / elemental / contemplative. Built clean at `src/app/dream/796-aeolian-sky/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` (`AeolianHarp`) + `field.ts` + `weather.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported tsc-strict + eslint clean), then removed. Refs: **Aeolian harp** (ancient wind-played strings) ┬╖ **Tonkin Liu *Singing Ringing Tree*** (2006, Burnley UK). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [geolocation+API + windтЖТsynth mapping + resonant synth + field render] + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ┬з497 data-sonification-2026). **Why it lost тАФ diversity ban, not quality:** a strong, Exploratorium-adjacent data-sonification piece, but it self-disqualified by rendering on **Canvas2D-primary** (the 10├Ч-monoculture the jury banned this cycle). **Resurrect by re-specing the visual to a real WebGL2 advection/streamline pass** (a GPU wind field, the renderer the brief actually called for) тАФ then it clears every ban and ships.

## ┬з495 (Cycle 495 тАФ adult DEEP fire, "give 770's gap-agent a long-form MOTIF MEMORY," 2 banked approaches)

Cycle 495 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out тАФ ONE concept (*give `770-answering-room`'s memoryless gap-agent a **long-form motif memory**: harvest the motifs of his real "Welcome Home" recording into a growing vocabulary and develop/quote them back, so the duet at minute 5 тЙа minute 1*), attacked via 3 memory mechanisms. The literal **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** (the depth ceiling collapsed **4тЖТ1** тАФ "RETURN AND EXTEND a gem to a real 4/5; `770` is the obvious target тАФ let the agent ACCRETE a motif over minutes") + **#1** (off the 10├Ч Canvas2D-primary monoculture тАФ stays audio-forward, "spread don't flip") + **#3** (his recording stays the whole soloist but used a *genuinely-new way* тАФ a self-organizing memory, not a conductor/follower/analyzer). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з495 today тАФ **LiveBand** (arXiv 2606.03803, **June 2026, <30d** тАФ causal past-only live accompaniment), **MusicSwarm** (Buehler, Apr-2026), **MASOM** (Variable Markov Models + sound memory), **Lewis *Voyager***. **Winner `792-answering-swarm`** (stigmergic swarm тАФ the highest-ambition 4/5 ceiling build + the most surprising concept). All three copied 770's `audio.ts` loader verbatim + reused its listener/agent; both losers were demoable + self-reported clean, folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule. **Max committed folder after this fire is `792`** (banked names `790`/`791` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`790-answering-memory`** тнР **RESURRECT FIRST (adult).** *The SYMBOLIC MOTIF BANK approach тАФ the most musically **legible** of the three.* His recording is the soloist (770 loader); the listener's onset + phrase-gap detection segments his playing into **motifs** (relative-interval contour + coarse rhythm + register), banked (cap 16, least-recently-developed eviction, per-motif "times developed" count). When the agent answers (in his gaps, and in a longer **trading-fours** turn), it picks a banked motif and applies a **classical thematic-development transform** chosen round-robin тАФ **transpose** into his current key / **inversion** / **retrograde** / **augmentation** / **diminution** / **fragmentation** тАФ voiced through 770's soft FM bell, so it literally **quotes his earlier phrases, developed**. Memory shown as a minimal **SVG motif-shelf**: one tiny contour-polyline glyph per banked motif, the one being developed glows (warmer with reuse), plus "memory: N motifs ┬╖ developing: <transform>". INPUT = his-recording ┬╖ OUTPUT = audio-forward + minimal canvas/SVG ┬╖ TECH = symbolic motif bank + classical development ┬╖ VIBE = warm-hearth adult-meditative. Built clean at `src/app/dream/790-answering-memory/` (`audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `memory.ts` + `agent.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`; self-reported clean, manual lint/type discipline тАФ env had no node_modules at build time), then removed. Refs: George Lewis *Voyager*; classical thematic development; anchors LiveBand (June-2026) + MusicSwarm (Apr-2026). Ambition honest ~2/5 (#3 named + #4 multi-cycle). **Why it lost (a close call):** the most legible "oh, it's playing my phrase upside-down" and the clearest causeтЖТeffect, but it reached lower on the **ambition axis the jury flagged as collapsing** than the swarm's lab-first stigmergy. **RESURRECT FIRST on the adult lane** тАФ it's the safe, legible, genuinely-musical pick; ship it as its own prototype or fold its classical-transform vocabulary into `792` as a "develop the consolidated theme" operator.

- **`791-answering-markov`** (adult, banked тАФ **lower priority, overlaps `778`**). *The VARIABLE-ORDER MARKOV STYLE MODEL approach (MASOM/EMI).* His recording is the soloist; each onset becomes a **token** (pitch-class + coarse interval + duration bucket) feeding an **orders-1..3 Markov model built live** тАФ a contextтЖТnext-token table that **grows denser every minute**; answers (gaps + trading-fours) are generated by **sampling** the model (highest matching order, backing off when unseen), snapped to his current key, voiced through the FM bell, so it improvises "in his idiom" and sharpens as the model accretes. Memory shown as a live **SVG transition-ring** (12 pitch-class nodes, learned edges thickening/brightening, active context node glows) + a climbing "model: N states ┬╖ M transitions ┬╖ answering from order K" readout. INPUT = his-recording ┬╖ OUTPUT = SVG/DOM ┬╖ TECH = variable-order Markov style model ┬╖ VIBE = warm-hearth adult-meditative. Built clean at `src/app/dream/791-answering-markov/` (`audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `markov.ts` + `agent.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`; self-reported clean), then removed. Refs: **MASOM** (Tatar & Pasquier), Cope *EMI*, Lewis *Voyager*; anchors LiveBand + MusicSwarm. **Why it lost тАФ diversity, not quality:** it was beautifully built, but it **collides hard with `778-markov-mirror`** shipped just two cycles ago (cycle 493: variable-order Markov + live SVG transition graph + Cope EMI) тАФ a near-twin is exactly the "too similar" trap the jury warns against. Its only fresh angle is *his recording as the learned input* (778 learns a live keyboard). **Resurrect only if** that distinction is made central, or merge it into `778` as the long-queued "bind 778 to his Welcome Home note-stream" variant (still open from MORNING ┬з494) rather than a standalone ship.

## ┬з494 (Cycle 494 тАФ kids DEEP fire, "the whole body read as a continuous UPIC pitch-field," 2 banked approaches)

Cycle 494 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out тАФ ONE concept (*a 4-year-old's whole moving body, seen by the front camera [MediaPipe Pose, 33 landmarks], is read as a **continuous** UPIC pitch-field: each tracked limb [wrists/head/ankles] drives ONE **continuously-glided sung voice** whose pitch is its height, snapped to C-major pentatonic so nothing is ever wrong, and the dance accumulates a glowing score over minutes*), attacked via 3 renderers. The literal **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body/camera went 4├ЧтЖТ0├Ч тАФ the single most-starved input, off every over-represented tag at once) + **#5** (build the full-body version of `781`'s UPIC, named in the verdict as "sitting unbuilt in your own research log") + **#1** (off the banned Canvas2D-primary, onto starved surfaces). Crucially **NOT 419-kids-body-band** (bodyтЖТ*drums*) nor the `287`/`302`/`234` bodyтЖТharmony-mirror: this is a *continuous sung* mapping, a fresh use of the tracker. Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з494 (the **CHI 2026** "Designing Interactive Movement Sonification for Hip-Hop Dance" + the **┬бOtro!** IAIA Digital Dome premiere, Apr 2026 тАФ "the body becomes the instrument"). **Winner `788-kids-body-glow`** (raw WebGL2 GLSL feedback-field тАФ warm-daylight painterly UPIC, the highest-ambition build + the scarce-shader the concept genuinely demands + Canvas2D/ghost fallbacks). Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule. **Max committed folder after this fire is `788`** (the banked names `782`/`783` from ┬з492, `785`/`786` from ┬з493, and these two `787`/`789` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`789-kids-body-ribbons`** тнР **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *The whole-body UPIC on the lab's scarcest, most iPad-bulletproof surface тАФ **SVG/DOM** (1├Ч in the window, jury-named starved).* Front camera тЖТ MediaPipe Pose; each of 5 limbs (wrists/head/ankles) draws a **continuous glowing SVG polyline ribbon** (bounded ~120 pts, decimated, oldest segments fade тЖТ self-limiting) and sings ONE continuous portamento voice (`osc.frequency.setTargetAtTime`, pitch = height, C-major-pentatonic C3тАУA5, never wrong); arms-spread widens the chord (subtle detune), overall motion brightens the sky + a sparkle voice. Warm **cut-paper daylight** sky + rolling hills (the "middle" vibe тАФ bright but gentle, off both bright-active and dark-glow). INPUT = body/camera (off the banned touch) ┬╖ OUTPUT = SVG/DOM (off the banned Canvas2D-primary; the scarcest renderer) ┬╖ TECH = continuous body-UPIC sung-pitch-field ┬╖ VIBE = warm cut-paper daylight. Kid-safe `master тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass тЙд7500 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad; **ghost-body fallback** (`makeGhostBody(t)`) keeps ribbons drawing + the choir singing hands-free within ~2s on camera-deny/MediaPipe-fail + a `text-rose-300` notice; SVG itself always renders (no renderer fallback needed). Built clean at `src/app/dream/789-kids-body-ribbons/` (`page.tsx` + `pose.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint clean + filtered tsc clean), then removed. Refs: Xenakis **UPIC** (1977) ┬╖ MediaPipe Pose ┬╖ CHI 2026 movement-sonification. Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [pose + continuous pentatonic choir + SVG ribbon render + accumulation] + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ┬з494). **Why it lost (a close call):** the most **robust + legible** of the three (SVG always paints, no WebGL dep тАФ the safest unattended kids glance) and the literal jury-#1 starved surface, but the winner reached higher on the ambition axis the jury flagged as collapsing (4тЖТ1). One easy polish on resurrect: the header `text-white/95` over the cream sky is low-contrast тАФ darken the header text or add a scrim. **RESURRECT FIRST on the kids lane** тАФ it's the safe, charming, scarce-renderer pick.

- **`787-kids-body-aura`** (kids, banked). *The whole-body UPIC as a **three.js** 3D choir of light.* Front camera тЖТ MediaPipe Pose; voice-orbs (additive `THREE.Points`) at head/hands/feet over a glowing **skeleton-of-light**, two hand **light-ribbon trails**, and an **accumulating fading chord-cloud** (1400-pt budget, alpha-decayed тЖТ minute 5 fuller than minute 1 = long-form stateful); each of 5 parts a continuous portamento pentatonic voice (height = pitch), arm-spread widens the chord, motion pulses the orbs. INPUT = body/camera ┬╖ OUTPUT = three.js 3D geometry ┬╖ TECH = continuous body-UPIC sung-field ┬╖ VIBE = **dusk-into-dawn** night-glow. Kid-safe `master тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass тЙд7500 тЖТ comp`; always-on C2+G2 pad; **ghost-body is the DEFAULT** until camera+landmarker both succeed (so it dances + sings within ~2s with no permission), and audio continues (motion estimated from raw body deltas) even if WebGL throws; full three.js teardown (`dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). Built clean at `src/app/dream/787-kids-body-aura/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `pose.ts` + `README.md`), then removed. Refs: Xenakis UPIC (1977) ┬╖ MediaPipe Pose ┬╖ CHI 2026 movement-sonification. Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ┬з494). **Why it lost:** the richest "wow," but (a) three.js is the *warmest* of the allowed renderers (2├Ч in the window тАФ 766/767), and (b) its **dusk/night palette leans into the dark-glow register the jury explicitly said NOT to flip back to** (the ask was the bright-but-gentle middle, which the winner's warm daylight hits and this doesn't). Fix the palette to warm daylight on resurrect and it's a strong bright three.js kids slot. NOTE the design-notes link points at `README.md` as a route (likely 404 in Next) тАФ swap to a scroll-to-`#notes` like the other two on resurrect.

## ┬з489 (Cycle 489 тАФ adult DEEP fire, "a live music agent that accompanies HIS recording," 2 banked approaches)

Cycle 489 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out тАФ ONE concept (*Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano plays WHOLE as the soloist; a real-time machine "live music agent" listens тАФ chroma+onset score-following his playing тАФ and accompanies it, NOT by granulating his audio but as a SECOND synthesized voice*), attacked via 3 technical approaches. The literal **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a new way тАФ let its structure conduct a generative system; remix his phrasing, NOT his grains") + **#2** (a no-GPU-shader, audio-forward register the lab is thin on). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ┬з489 (the 2026 "live music agents" register тАФ CHI 2026 *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*; Raphael *Music Plus One*; Lewis *Voyager*), whose negative-result grep proved every prior lab listen-piece (`138`, `414`, `496`, `718`) tracks **live mic** or is an ensemble you conduct тАФ **none accompanies his actual recording as a live soloist.** **Winner `770-answering-room`** (audio-forward / eyes-closed register тАФ his recording the soloist, a warm pad voices the detected chord under him, a sparse FM-bell answers only in his phrase-gaps; minimal hearth-lit Canvas "him / the answer" duet visual). Picked for renderer diversity (the cleanest possible тАФ audio-forward, the literal JURY #2 ask; both Canvas2D and SVG/DOM are at 3├Ч and one ship from the audit ban), robustness (no WebGL dep, always-sound synth fallback), and the strongest gate story. Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` before the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (compile/type/lint clean, zero mentions of 770; static-gen blocked by the container's ~4096-fd EMFILE тАФ the standing environmental failure). **Max committed folder after this fire is `770`** (the banked kids names `768`/`769` from ┬з488 were SKIPPED to avoid collision per the ┬з487 precedent тАФ they renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`771-conducted-companion`** тнР (banked, **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)** when a three.js slot is wanted). *His recording plays as the soloist; the same machine listener tracks its chord+phrasing; and YOU conduct the agent's RESPONSE тАФ dragging a baton on a true three.js geometry stage (floor + soloist plinth/icosphere + capsule voice-columns + a 120-instance mote ring + draggable octahedron baton + lights; geometry, no shader field, no addons), where the baton's position leans the agent toward consonanceтЖФtension, sparseтЖФdense, lowтЖФhigh register, brightтЖФdark.* INPUT = his recording + pointer-drag conducting (no mic/camera) ┬╖ OUTPUT = three.js 3D stage ┬╖ TECH = real-time chroma+onset listener тЖТ a conductable generative ensemble ┬╖ VIBE = warm, focused, performative (a conductor's podium). Auto-drift so it's never a dead stage; WebGL-fail тЖТ friendly notice + audio still plays; synth fallback. Built clean at `src/app/dream/771-conducted-companion/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `agent.ts` + `scene.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint exit 0 + tsc clean), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/`. Refs: CHI 2026 live-music-agents, Lewis *Voyager*, Raphael *Music Plus One*. Ambition honest 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ┬з489). **Why it lost (only the renderer + robustness):** three.js is the *warming* renderer (2├Ч and flagged) and adds a WebGL dependency the audio-forward winner avoids on an unattended straight-to-prod cycle; it also softly echoes `496-voyager-room`'s "conduct an ensemble." A genuinely bigger/more-interactive piece тАФ resurrect the moment a three.js adult slot is the diversity pick.

- **`772-reharmonized`** (banked). *A machine agent listens to his recording as it plays and RE-HARMONIZES it in real time тАФ laying a fresh generative chord progression underneath his melody (jazz reharmonization: tritone sub, relative maj/min, secondary dominants, chromatic mediants, modal interchange тЩнVI/iv, iiтАУV insertion, lydian тЩп11 / min9 recolor, half-diminished borrow), with melody-fit filtering so substitutions stay consonant with his actual notes тАФ visualized as a warm Canvas2D "score river" where each chord scrolls past a now-line labeled `His тЖТ Agent` (e.g. `C тЖТ EтЩнmaj7`) + the move name.* INPUT = his recording (no mic/camera) ┬╖ OUTPUT = Canvas2D harmonic-ribbon ┬╖ TECH = real-time chroma/onset тЖТ generative chord-substitution engine (3 moods: Lush / Bittersweet / Bold; an adventurousness slider) ┬╖ VIBE = warm, jazzy, late-night тАФ a **jazz-responsive alternate arc** (Karel cares #4). Rhodes-ish detuned-triangle bed + soft walking bass under his piano; synth fallback. Built clean at `src/app/dream/772-reharmonized/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `reharm.ts` + `draw.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported tsc + eslint clean), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/`. Refs: CHI 2026 live-music-agents, the jazz reharmonization tradition, Raphael *Music Plus One*. Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs; arguably #5). **Why it lost:** the most *musically distinct* of the three (the jazz-reharm arc is genuinely fresh for the lab) but **Canvas2D is at 3├Ч тАФ shipping it tips Canvas2D into the тЙе4 audit ban**, while the winner's audio-forward register dodged the renderer watch entirely. **Resurrect the moment Canvas2D ages out of the 10-window** тАФ it's a strong, surprising jazz piece. Note frame-local chord picks can jump on dense passages (mitigated by a 1.6s min-hold + melody-fit filter); next-cycle work = bar-tracking + look-ahead voice-leading.
