## ┬з488 (Cycle 488 тАФ kids WIDE fire, "the bright/joyful/active middle," 2 banked explorers)

Cycle 488 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out тАФ three bright/joyful/active explorers (JURY 2026-06-19 #4: the un-built "active middle" тАФ exuberant without silly, bright without dark-glow), each off every JURY ban (grain-cloud TECH ┬╖ GPU-shader-field OUTPUT ┬╖ mic-hum INPUT ┬╖ dark-glow VIBE), differentiated by INPUT ├Ч renderer ├Ч interaction. **Winner `767-kids-kite-flyer`** (three.js ┬╖ tilt-to-fly-a-singing-kite) тАФ picked for renderer diversity (three.js is the only safe surface: SVG/DOM and Canvas2D are both at 3├Ч, one ship from the audit ban; GPU-shader-field jury-banned), highest surprise / "massively bigger" (a flyable 3D sky, the only fresh non-resurrect concept), the literal JURY #4 bullseye, and a robust pointer-drag + ghost-breeze fallback. Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` before the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (compile/type/lint clean, zero issues / zero mentions of 767; static-gen blocked by the container's ~4096-fd EMFILE тАФ the standing environmental failure). **Max committed folder after this fire is `767`.** Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`769-kids-flower-duet`** тнР **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *Two kids (or parent + kid) plant a sunny flower meadow TOGETHER with two fingers at once тАФ every flower sings, and any two flowers ALWAYS harmonize, so playing together always sounds beautiful.* INPUT = **multi-touch** (each finger tracked by `pointerId`, live per-finger rings so two kids see each other's hands) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** (bright meadow: smiling sun, drifting clouds, butterflies, rolling green ground, springy multi-petal flowers, sparkles, rainbow bridges) ┬╖ TECH = each touch plants a flower that grows + rings a soft 2-partial FM bell; **every pitch snapped to a 3-octave C-major-pentatonic so any combination from either player is always consonant** ("no wrong chord together"); flower color = pitch; two touches close in time+space тЖТ a rainbow bridge + sparkle + a soft consonant 2-note "together" reward chord ┬╖ VIBE = bright sunny meadow. Kid-safe `master тЙд0.3 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`; always-on warm pad; ~8-voice cap + refractory; ~3s-idle ghost-hand auto-plants a pentatonic phrase. Built clean at `src/app/dream/769-kids-flower-duet/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint+full-project tsc exit 0), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` per the orchestration rule тАФ rebuild from this spec. Refs: early-childhood social-bonding / group-synchrony / joint-attention music research ┬╖ Toca Boca / Sago Mini cooperative play ┬╖ Toca Band "no wrong note." Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [multi-touch `pointerId` + Canvas2D meadow + pentatonic-harmonizer synth + ghost auto-demo] + #3 named refs; the **social/two-player** layer is the differentiator + fills the KIDS.md social gap). **Why it lost (only the renderer):** the most robust piece of the fire (pure Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL тАФ works on literally any device) and fills a real named design gap, but its tapтЖТflowerтЖТpentatonic core is the lab's single most-worn kids pattern AND **Canvas2D is warming to 3├Ч** (a 4th hits the audit ban), while the winner's three.js was the only renderer that dodged the warming watch. **The moment Canvas2D ages out of the 10-window, this is the pick** тАФ robust, social, bright. (This is the ┬з486 `763-kids-flower-duet` seed, re-banked at a fresh number тАФ still un-built, still resurrect-first on the kids lane.)

- **`768-kids-balloon-band`** (kids, banked тАФ **now with the Canvas2D fallback it needed**). *Press-and-hold to INFLATE a balloon whose pitch glides UP as it grows тАФ let go, and the balloons float up and stack into a happy consonant pentatonic chord you can POP.* INPUT = **touch / press-and-hold** (pointer events; hold to inflate, release to let go, tap a floating balloon to pop) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **three.js** (real 3D balloon meshes тАФ squashed `SphereGeometry` + glossy `MeshStandardMaterial` under hemisphere + directional sunlight, sun disc, drifting clouds, confetti; geometry, NOT a shader) **with a real Canvas2D billboard fallback** (`fallback.ts` тАФ same balloons/inflate/pop/confetti + the SAME audio engine; a WebGL failure is no longer a dead piece тАФ this fixes the ┬з486 hold-back) ┬╖ TECH = **sizeтЖТpitch glissando** (a held balloon's growing radius glides its pitch up E3тЖТE5), release snaps to C-major-pentatonic + sustains, released voices accrete into a consonant stacked sky-chord, tap = soft band-passed-noise pop + tiny up-sine + confetti; 7-voice cap ┬╖ VIBE = bright blue-sky daylight, fat glossy candy balloons, exuberant. Kid-safe `master тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`; always-on C3+G3 breathing pad; ~3s-idle ghost-hand inflates/releases/pops hands-free; full three.js teardown (`renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). Built clean at `src/app/dream/768-kids-balloon-band/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `scene.ts` + `fallback.ts` + `types.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint + full-project tsc exit 0), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` per the orchestration rule тАФ rebuild from this spec. Refs: inflating-balloon-glissando pitch metaphor ┬╖ Toca Band / Sago Mini "no wrong note" ┬╖ consonant-chord accretion. Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why it lost:** a lovely bright/exuberant toy and now robust (the Canvas2D fallback the ┬з486 version lacked is built), but three.js is this fire's *winner* renderer (the slot was taken by the fresher tilt-flight concept) and press-and-hold-to-inflate is closer to the lab's worn tap-to-spawn family than the kite's embodied tilt-flight. **Resurrect** when a bright three.js kids slot is wanted (the fallback requirement from ┬з486 is now satisfied). (This is the ┬з486 `762-kids-balloon-band` seed, re-banked at a fresh number with the fallback fix done.)

## ┬з487 (Cycle 487 тАФ adult DEEP fire, "the sky conducts his real piano," 2 banked sibling renderers)

Cycle 487 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out: ONE concept тАФ *the sky conducts a long-form, never-repeating arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real Welcome Home piano; minute 5 тЙа minute 1; daylight palette; zero required interaction* тАФ the resurrect-first `758-sky-almanac`, attacked via **3 distinct renderers** (SVG / Canvas2D / three.js). The build sharpened the novelty claim: `347-the-place` already scores the **local sky тЖТ synthesized** sound, so the honest lab-first is celestial position conducting his **real recorded piano phrases** (the literal JURY 2026-06-19 #1: "remix his phrasing, not his grains; let its structure conduct a generative system") AND a return-and-deepen of `347` (JURY #3 depth). All three played his recording as whole continuous REGIONS (`bufferSource.start(when,offset,duration)` + equal-power crossfades), NOT grains; all daylight-into-night; all off every JURY ban. **Winner `766-sky-orrery`** (three.js 3D dome) тАФ the only renderer in the trio that dodges the warming SVG-3├Ч / Canvas2D-3├Ч audit watch (last 10: SVG/DOM 748/752/761 = 3├Ч, Canvas2D 754/755/760 = 3├Ч тАФ both at the тЙе4 threshold; three.js 741 = 1├ЧтЖТ2├Ч safe), the highest ambition (Atlas Eclipticalis made literal тАФ each above-horizon body is its own phrase-voice), the biggest concept, with a working Canvas2D fallback. Both losers demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` before the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (compile/type/lint clean, zero issues in 766; static-gen blocked by the container's ~4096-fd EMFILE тАФ the standing environmental failure). **Max committed folder after this fire is `766`.** Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`764-sky-almanac`** тнР **RESURRECT FIRST (adult).** *The canonical `758` realization: an inline **SVG sun-arc orrery dial** тАФ horizon line, dashed sun-arc, sun glyph at real computed altitude/azimuth, clipped-crescent moon at real phase, almanac graticule, phrase-onset rings; sky-gradient background gold-noon тЖТ rose-dusk тЖТ indigo-night тЖТ pale-dawn.* INPUT = live wall-clock + optional geolocation (zero required interaction; no mic/camera) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **inline SVG/DOM only** (no canvas/WebGL/WebGPU) ┬╖ TECH = local solar/lunar math (`solar.ts`, copied from `347-the-place/astronomy.ts`) тЖТ self-rescheduling phrase scheduler of whole regions of his real recording; **sun altitude тЖТ lowpass brightness + register/octave, daylight fraction тЖТ voice density/overlap, moon phase тЖТ reverb wash + detune drift** ┬╖ VIBE = diurnal/almanac/daylight. Built files (clean, removed): `page.tsx` (SVG dial + Live/Explore-time toggle + hour slider + labels + Start gesture + SF-fallback notice + full teardown) ┬╖ `solar.ts` (declination + equation-of-time + hour-angle alt/az, synodic moon phase, `dateAtHour` scrub, `daylightFraction`/`moodLabel`/`moonName`) ┬╖ `audio.ts` (verbatim `fetchPianoBuffer` + 16s OfflineAudioContext fallback w/ 4 sub-phrases + `segmentPhrases` energy-dip split + self-rescheduling region scheduler w/ equal-power crossfade + master chain + convolver reverb send) ┬╖ `palette.ts` (pure daylight palette interp). Refs: Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* ┬╖ Finer *Longplayer* ┬╖ John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen* ┬╖ the farmer's-almanac tradition. Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5 (#1 first celestial-conducting of his real recording [347 did synthesis] ┬╖ #2 тЙе4 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з485/┬з487). **Why it lost (a hair):** the most robust zero-interaction glance and the most faithful seed, but **SVG/DOM is warming to 3├Ч** in the window (a 4th would hit the audit ban), so the three.js sibling was the cleaner diversity pick this fire. **Resurrect FIRST** the moment SVG/DOM ages out тАФ this is the safest, calmest unattended daylight glance in the bank.

- **`765-sky-spectra`** тАФ `queued` (the painterly **sky-COLOR-conducts** sibling тАФ resurrect when Canvas2D ages out, or for a more abstract/atmospheric adult slot). *What if the COLOR of the sky right now conducted his piano? тАФ a Rayleigh/Mie atmospheric-scattering approximation computes the real sky color for the current sun elevation (dawn rose тЖТ noon blue тЖТ dusk amber тЖТ night indigo), and that breathing **color** field conducts the arrangement.* INPUT = live wall-clock + optional geolocation ┬╖ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** full-bleed painterly horizonтЖТzenith gradient (drifting luminance bands, azimuth/elevation sun-glow bloom, soft onset brightening, vignette тАФ NOT a fragment-shader field) ┬╖ TECH = `sky.ts` (solar math copied from 347 + a hand-tuned Rayleigh/Mie palette тЖТ zenith+horizon colors + 3 scalar conductors: **luminance тЖТ density/register, hue тЖТ harmonic tilt [playback-rate detune], twilight saturation тЖТ reverb depth**) тЖТ same whole-region phrase scheduler of his recording ┬╖ VIBE = diurnal/painterly/luminous daylight. Built files (clean, removed): `page.tsx` (Start + geo + Live/Explore toggle + 24h slider + time/elevation/mood/zenith-horizon swatch labels + design-notes + teardown) ┬╖ `sky.ts` ┬╖ `audio.ts` (verbatim loader + offline fallback + segmentation + `SkyArrangement` scheduler + master chain + reverb) ┬╖ `skyField.ts` (Canvas2D field). Refs: Preetham / Ho┼бek-Wilkie sky models ┬╖ Olafur Eliasson *Your atmospheric colour atlas* ┬╖ Finer *Longplayer* ┬╖ Turner's skies. Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems + #3 named refs; soft #1 тАФ sky-color-as-conductor is a fresh mapping). **Why it lost:** arguably the most beautiful unattended glance, but Canvas2D is **also warming to 3├Ч** (a 4th hits the audit ban), and a breathing color-gradient field risks reading as "just a gradient" vs the orrery's literal sky-as-score. **Resurrect when** Canvas2D rotates out or a painterly/atmospheric register is wanted; consider merging its color-conductor into `764`'s SVG dial (sky color tints the dial AND drives harmony).

## ┬з486 (Cycle 486 тАФ kids WIDE fire, 2 banked explorers)

- **`763-kids-flower-duet`** тнР **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *Two kids (or parent + kid) plant a sunny flower meadow TOGETHER with two fingers at once тАФ every flower sings, and any two flowers ALWAYS harmonize, so playing together always sounds beautiful.* INPUT = **multi-touch** (each finger tracked by `pointerId`, plants its own flower, live finger-rings so two kids see each other) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** (bright meadow: smiling sun, clouds, growing flowers, butterflies, rainbow bridges) ┬╖ TECH = each touch plants a flower that grows + rings a soft marimba/bell note; **every pitch snapped to a 3-octave C-major-pentatonic so any combination from either player is always consonant** ("no wrong chord together"); flower color = pitch; two touches close together тЖТ a rainbow bridge + sparkle-chord reward ┬╖ VIBE = bright sunny meadow. **Why it's the resurrect-first:** it fills the explicit **KIDS.md social-bonding / two-player gap** (the highest-value kids interaction in the design research тАФ joint attention, turn-taking) AND it is **the most robust piece of the fire** тАФ pure Canvas2D, *no sensor / no permission / no WebGL dependency at all*, works on literally any device including Karel's 06:30 review phone; degrades to perfect solo single-touch + a ~3s ghost-hand two-flower auto-chord. Self-reported tsc + eslint clean (separate `audio.ts` engine module). Refs: social-bonding/group-synchrony early-childhood-music research ┬╖ Toca Boca / Sago Mini cooperative play ┬╖ Toca Band "no wrong note." Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs; the social/multi-touch layer is the differentiator). **Only lost** because (a) its core *tapтЖТflowerтЖТsings-pentatonic* is the lab's single most-worn kids pattern (211/236/205/188тАж), and (b) Canvas2D is warming to 3тАУ4├Ч while the winner's SVG/DOM + tilt was the fresher diversity pick. The moment Canvas2D ages out of the window, this is the pick тАФ robust, social, bright. Built clean at `src/app/dream/763-kids-flower-duet/` then `rm -rf`'d per the orchestration rule (seed is text, never a half-built folder); rebuild from this spec.

- **`762-kids-balloon-band`** (kids, banked). *Press-and-hold to INFLATE a balloon whose pitch glides UP as it grows тАФ let go, and the balloons float up and stack into a happy consonant chord you can POP.* INPUT = **touch / press-and-hold** (pointer events; hold to inflate, release to let go, tap a floating balloon to pop) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **three.js** (real 3D balloon meshes тАФ squashed `SphereGeometry` + `MeshStandardMaterial` under hemisphere+directional sunlight, sun disc, drifting cloud groups; **geometry, NOT a fullscreen shader**) ┬╖ TECH = **sizeтЖТpitch** (a held balloon's growing radius glides its pitch upward across E3тЖТE5, the inflating-balloon glissando), release snaps to C-major-pentatonic + sustains, released voices accrete into a consonant stacked sky-chord, tap = soft "pop" (band-passed noise blip + tiny up-sine) + confetti, voice fades; 7-voice cap ┬╖ VIBE = bright blue-sky daylight, fat glossy candy balloons, exuberant. Kid-safe `master 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`; always-on C3+G3 pad; ~3s ghost auto-demo inflates/releases/pops hands-free; full three.js teardown (`renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). Refs: inflating-balloon-glissando pitch metaphor ┬╖ Toca Band / Sago Mini ┬╖ consonant-chord accretion. Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Lost on robustness:** its WebGL-failure path currently only surfaces a `text-rose-300` notice тАФ **NO working fallback** (dead piece if WebGL fails on the review device), and three.js is warming (2├Ч recent). **Resurrect requirement: add a real Canvas2D billboard fallback** (inflate + pop + sound with no WebGL) BEFORE shipping; then it's a lovely bright/joyful piece. Built at `src/app/dream/762-kids-balloon-band/` then `rm -rf`'d per the orchestration rule; rebuild from this spec + the fallback fix.

altitudeтЖТwarm-goldтЖТindigo palette) + `audio.ts` (verbatim `fetchPianoBuffer` loader + `renderFallbackBuffer` ~16s warm detuned-piano lyrical phrase + `buildPhraseRegions` evenly-spaced continuous regions; a self-rescheduling **phrase scheduler** playing `bufferSource.start(when, offset, duration)` тАФ NOT granular; sun altitude тЖТ lowpass brightness/register, daylight fraction тЖТ density/tempo, moon phase тЖТ reverb wash + slow detune drift). **Tags:** clock + optional-geolocation INPUT (auto-evolving, zero required interaction) ┬╖ SVG sun-arc-orrery OUTPUT (no shader) ┬╖ local-astronomical-computation тЖТ whole-phrase scheduling of his real recording, long-form/stateful/non-looping TECH ┬╖ diurnal/almanac/DAYLIGHT VIBE (the directest anti-dark-glow). **Named refs:** John Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* ┬╖ Jem Finer *Longplayer* ┬╖ the almanac tradition. **Why it lost (a hair):** the highest ambition floor and the best *unattended* glance, but it is a *third* his-piano-phrase ship (after `748-duet-follower` + the related banked `750`) right when the jury's loudest complaint is the his-piano monoculture тАФ so `760` (free of his piano entirely) was the bolder diversity move. **Resurrect FIRST** for the next adult slot once the his-piano cluster ages out, or merge its astronomy engine into any long-form piece. ## ┬з480 тАФ 2026-06-19 ┬╖ kids WIDE fire (3 divergent explorers, each a different scarce-renderer ├Ч off-glass input ├Ч technique ├Ч non-silly palette тАФ the textbook attack on JURY 2026-06-18 #2 "spread the kids register, stop running one template") тАФ winner `747-kids-inkblot-bloom` (WebGPU Gray-Scott inkblot from a child's hum); **2 banked seeds**

### `748-kids-aurora-silk` тАФ `queued` тнР RESURRECT FIRST (the iOS-bulletproof first-cloth-sim sibling тАФ resurrect for the next kids slot; needs NO camera/mic permission and three.js/WebGL is the safest iOS renderer). **A 4-year-old TILTS the tablet and a glowing 3D silk veil of aurora light billows, folds, and SINGS like wind through cloth.** The lab's **first true mass-spring CLOTH** (a structured 28├Ч40 grid with structural+shear+bend distance constraints; soft-body `451` exists but never a cloth sheet). Tilt тЖТ a wind force; the cloth's mean speed swells a soft just-intoned pad and travelling folds pluck a sparse aeolian harp; auto-breeze after ~1.8s of no tilt so it stays alive hands-free; always-on drone. ## ┬з472 тАФ 2026-06-18 ┬╖ kids WIDE fire (3 divergent explorers, each on a DIFFERENT scarce non-Canvas2D renderer ├Ч different off-glass input ├Ч different non-silly vibe, none a loop/groove тАФ the textbook attack on JURY 2026-06-18's kids bans [Canvas2D 9├Ч ┬╖ loop-groove 5├Ч ┬╖ touch 5├Ч ┬╖ silly 6├Ч] + #1 "give a kid the scarce renderer" + #2 "texture/cause-effect, not a groove; vary the register") тАФ winner `727-kids-color-hunt`; **2 banked seeds**

Research path (a+c): RESEARCH ┬з472 found the live-2026 GPU-particle creative-coding frontier is **almost entirely adult/installation** тАФ the scarce renderers are essentially never aimed at a 4-year-old, so JURY #1 ("give a kid the scarce renderer") is a genuinely unoccupied corner; the two off-glass seeds were consumed from IDEAS ┬з470 (born of RESEARCH ┬з470's iOS-WebGPU-26 finding). **Winner: `727-kids-color-hunt`** тАФ point at the room's colors, paint music with what you see (camera-color тЖТ WebGPU bloom тЖТ cross-modal chord тЖТ wonder); the most surprising + scarcest renderer + furthest from the banned silly pole. Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc+eslint; `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build. тЪая╕П The authoritative `npm run build` compiled/typed/linted clean but couldn't run static generation тАФ the container's anomalous **4096 fd limit** killed the worker spawn (`EMFILE`); proven environmental (pristine main fails identically тАФ see STATE.md cycle 472). **Max committed folder after this fire is `727`.** Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

### `726-kids-star-scoop` тАФ `queued` тнР RESURRECT FIRST (the embodied/off-glass kids swing). **Reach UP into a deep 3D night sky with your bare hands and scoop handfuls of glowing stars that chime тАФ no screen to touch, just hands in the air.** MediaPipe **Hand tracking** (front camera, analysis-only, `webpackIgnore` CDN dynamic import, zero npm deps) maps each hand into a **three.js** `THREE.Points` starfield (~2,400 additive glow sprites + `FogExp2`). Close a hand тЖТ nearest stars gather to the palm, each ringing one soft pentatonic bell voice (nothing ever "wrong"); open wide тЖТ they spill in a shimmering glissando arc; hands high = brighter/higher register, low = warm/low. No beat, no loop, no groove тАФ an **awe/wonder** piece. Built demoable this fire (self-reported clean tsc+eslint): `page.tsx` (Start-gated camera + HandLandmarker, gesture edge-detection, ghost auto-demo with two virtual hands on camera-deny/idle, full teardown) + `scene.ts` (2,400-star sim with gather/push/spring physics behind a common `StarRenderer` interface тАФ three.js primary + inline Canvas2D glow-dot fallback) + `audio.ts` (always-on open-fifth drone + pooled FM-ish pentatonic bells, `scoop()` chord cluster + `spill()` rising glissando, kids-safe `gain 0.3 тЖТ lowpass 7.5k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`) + README. **Tags:** MediaPipe-hands camera INPUT (embodied, off-glass) ┬╖ three.js 3D-points OUTPUT ┬╖ gesture-driven particle-gathering + spatial chord-voicing TECH ┬╖ awe/wonder VIBE. **Named refs:** MediaPipe Hands ┬╖ *Journey* (thatgamecompany, wordless awe) ┬╖ Refik Anadol (luminous point-fields). **Why it lost:** (a) MediaPipe Hands already exists in the lab (`524-kids-hand-firebird`) so it's weaker on technique-#1; (b) three.js is warming (3├Ч) where the winner's WebGPU is scarcest; (c) it carries **two** CDN deps (three.js + MediaPipe) vs the winner's zero. **Resurrect first** for an embodied/off-glass kids slot тАФ it's the directest "get the kids side off the glass." Honest 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + three.js 3D point-field + spatial bell-cluster audio engine] + #3 named refs).

### `725-kids-aurora-sail` тАФ `queued` (the bulletproof iOS-safe WebGL2 sibling тАФ iOS HAS WebGL2; zero CDN). **Tilt the tablet like a steering tray to sail a tiny glowing boat across a living aurora sea тАФ and the shimmering light bands SING as the boat drifts through them.** A full-screen **raw WebGL2 GLSL fragment-shader aurora** (domain-warped fbm ribbons, slow drift, IQ "warp" lineage, water reflection + boat halo); **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS permission in the Start tap; pointer-drag fallback) steers the boat. The boat "reads" the brightness under it each frame via a **faithful JS replica of the shader's exact fbm field** тЖТ maps brightness to register in consonant **D-Dorian** (nothing wrong), speed тЖТ note density, calm dark water тЖТ a low warm drone. No beat, no loop, no groove тАФ a calm **dreamy sailing** texture. Built demoable this fire (self-reported clean tsc+eslint): `page.tsx` (WebGL2 aurora shader + Canvas2D aurora-band fallback, tilt + pointer steering, idle ghost Lissajous auto-demo, full teardown) + `aurora-field.ts` (JS mirror of the GLSL field) + `audio.ts` (master 0.3 тЖТ lowpass 7.5k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1, always-on "sea hush" bed, D-root drone + D-Dorian brightness/speed triggering) + README. **Tags:** device-tilt INPUT (off banned touch-primary) ┬╖ raw-WebGL2 GLSL OUTPUT (off banned Canvas2D-primary + three.js) ┬╖ shader-brightness-field-reading тЖТ modal sonification TECH (NOT a groove) ┬╖ dreamy/calm/awe VIBE. **Named refs:** Inigo Quilez "warp"/fbm ┬╖ real-time aurora GLSL sims ┬╖ *Journey* (calm wordless sailing). **Why it lost:** lowest ambition of the three (honest 2/5 тАФ tilt + GLSL worlds have lab precedent, e.g. `575`) and the comfortable median the mandate warns against; but it's the **most bulletproof iOS-safe glance** (iOS has WebGL2 reliably; no camera/CDN/GPU-compute risk). **Resurrect when** the kids side wants a calm contemplative tilt piece or when WebGPU/MediaPipe are too fragile for the target device. Honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [WebGL2 fbm aurora shader + tilt/pointer steering + brightness-driven modal audio] + #3 named refs).

## ┬з471 тАФ 2026-06-18 ┬╖ adult DEEP fire ("Presence Bloom II тАФ the room remembers his piano" тАФ ONE concept, 3 bodyтЖТgrain mapping/temporal models; the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-18 #3 "stop banking ceilings and walking away тАФ push 710 to a cycle-2, reward depth over breadth" + #5 "use his real music, it's in only 1 of the last 15" + #1 "ban Canvas2D, use the scarce WebGPU stack") тАФ winner `724-presence-drift`; **2 banked seeds**

All three reuse 710's proven stack + 720's verbatim real-recording grain loader (`PIANO_RECORDING_ID = "549fc519-тАж"`, `fetchPianoBuffer` 4s-abort, `renderFallbackBuffer`); all three dodge every JURY 2026-06-18 ban (WebGPU output not Canvas2D-primary, body-pose input not touch, concatenative-grains not loop-groove, meditative-adult not silly). **Winner: `724-presence-drift`** тАФ the deepest extension: keeps 710's exact reachтЖТdwellтЖТflick placement gesture (so it's unmistakably a cycle-2) AND adds a genuinely new axis neither 710 nor 720 had тАФ per-voice **moving read-heads** so the spatial chord re-voices itself over minutes (long-form/state/evolution), the richest use of his actual performance. ### `722-presence-paths` тАФ `queued` тнР RESURRECT FIRST (the most faithful cycle-2 + the cleanest "reach into his recording with your body"; the diversity sibling for an adult night that wants *navigation* over *evolution*). **Reach a hand to a point in the air, dwell ~0.65s, flick тАФ and leave a grain of Karel's REAL piano singing there in 3D; hand HEIGHT picks brightness (high=treble, low=warm), reach OPENNESS picks how deep into his performance the grain is drawn from тАФ build a spatial chord by navigating the descriptor map of his own playing with your body.** Built files (self-reported clean tsc+eslint; in `/tmp/dream-losers/`): `page.tsx` (470 lines), `audio.ts` (664 lines тАФ 720's verbatim loader + corpus + new `PathsAudio` engine: each persistent HRTF voice softly re-triggers Hann grains selected by descriptor-space reach via `selectNearest`), `render.ts` (WebGPU storm + Canvas2D fallback, palette warmed amber), `pose.ts` (710's, + `reach`=wrist-distance-from-torso-centre), `README.md`. **Tags:** webcam full-body pose INPUT (reach/dwell/flick + reach-openness; ghost-body fallback) ┬╖ WebGPU compute storm + HRTF-binaural grain chorus OUTPUT (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ CataRT descriptor-space (time├Чbrightness) grain navigation TECH ┬╖ cosmic/meditative VIBE. **Named refs:** Diemo Schwarz CataRT ┬╖ HRTF/binaural PannerNode ┬╖ Refik Anadol (GPU particle data-architecture). **Why it lost:** the descriptor-space navigation-of-his-recording is essentially `720-paths-grainfield`'s core idea (720 already flies a cursor through a time├Чbrightness grain map of the same recording) тАФ so it's the *least new musical idea* of the three; 724 adds an axis 720 never had. **Resurrect FIRST** for an adult slot wanting the embodied version of 720, or merge its descriptor-space reach mapping INTO 724 (place a voice by reaching to a brightness/time, *then* let it drift). attractors carry `bright` so dark grains read violet, bright attacks flare rose-gold), `pose.ts` (710's, continuous conductor-features instead of gesture detection), `README.md`. **Tags:** webcam full-body pose INPUT reduced to *continuous* conductor signals (energy/lean/per-side activity/reach; NO discrete gesture) ┬╖ WebGPU storm + continuous HRTF grain-tide OUTPUT (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ motion-energy тЖТ corpus grain selection (CataRT by [time├Чbrightness├Чenergy]) TECH ┬╖ cosmic/immersive-meditative VIBE. **Named refs:** Diemo Schwarz CataRT ┬╖ HRTF/binaural PannerNode. **Why it lost:** dropping 710's signature "leave a persistent voice" placement gesture makes it read as a *sibling concept* rather than a cycle-2 *deepening* of 710 (and the jury's binding ask was "push 710 to a cycle-2"); the energyтЖТgrain-density conductor mapping is also the most well-trodden of the three. **Why resurrect тнР:** it's the most installation/room-scale of the three and the boldest interaction departure тАФ **lead a future adult fire framed as "stand in a room of his piano and conduct it"** (Tauri/installation candidate, deepen with a second body and projection per JURY #3's literal "real-room install, projection, a second body"). ### `714-kids-feed-monster` тАФ `queued` (genuinely funny + a fresh *framing* of the loop-stacker as FEEDING). **Drag silly foods into a hungry googly monster's mouth тАФ it CHOMPS them in rhythm and BURPS a bubbly note, and the more you feed it the groovier the beat gets.** Built files (self-reported clean; removed): `page.tsx` (5 draggable foods [ЁЯНй round kick ┬╖ ЁЯНМ boing pluck ┬╖ ЁЯМ╢я╕П spicy hat + comic red-shiver ┬╖ ЁЯзБ bell ding ┬╖ ЁЯНж brr tremolo], each on its own 16-step pattern; drop-in-mouth toggles that food's looping layer into a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** [25ms tick / 120ms ahead / 100 BPM] over an always-on soft shaker pulse; squash-stretch jaw synced to chomps + belly that grows + comic descending **BURP** w/ bubble particles, more frequent the more it's eaten; belly-tap spits a layer out [no penalty]; instant <50ms chomp blip on feed; safe chain `master(0.28)тЖТlowpass(7500)тЖТcomp(тИТ10/20:1)`; 2.5s-idle ghost-hand auto-demo) + `README.md`. **Tags:** touch-drag (object-to-target as the sequencer-trigger) INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D googly-monster OUTPUT ┬╖ "feeding as a step-sequencer" loop-stacking groove TECH ┬╖ silly hungry-monster VIBE (laugh-first). **Why it lost:** its underlying mechanic (Incredibox look-ahead loop-stacking) is the EXACT thing `702`/`711`/`696` already shipped тАФ lowest diversity of the three despite the charming feeding framing. **Refs:** Toca Kitchen ┬╖ Incredibox/Sprunki ┬╖ Cookie Monster/Pou. **Resurrect when** the kids side has been off loop-stackers for several cycles and wants a warm character toy; deepen with more foods, a "too-full" comic hiccup mode, and foods that change the monster's color/shape.

answer with COMPLEMENTARY register + INVERTED contour + density-matched + consonant chord-tone landing, via a weighted Markov-ish step-walk тАФ an answer, never an echo]; **ducking turn-taking** [strike mid-shadow тЖТ it yields]; ### `703-kids-boing-zoo` тАФ `queued` тнР (the most BULLETPROOF + outright funny тАФ RESURRECT FIRST when a fresh-input kids slot opens; zero deps, zero GPU surface, no permission gate that can deny). **Tilt the iPad тЖТ a zoo of 8 fat googly jelly animals tumbles, piles, and BONKS, and every bonk honks a silly note** тАФ a tumbling pile becomes emergent slapstick rhythm, never a chord. Each animal owns one fixed pitch (G3 C4 D4 E4 G4 A4 C5 D5); a hard collision or fast wall-smack honks *that* animal's note + squash-stretches it. Tilt harder тЖТ faster tumbling тЖТ busier groove. Built files (clean by builder inspection; removed): `page.tsx` + `README.md`. **Technique:** hand-rolled plain-TS **2D physics** (circular bodies, gravity-from-tilt via DeviceOrientation beta/gamma, wall bounce w/ restitution, O(n┬▓) pairwise impulse resolution, n=8 = cheap); **collision-velocity тЖТ sound** with impact speed **clamped** (`MAX_BONK_SPEED`, never harsh) + **debounced ~80ms per body & per pair** (a resting pile never machine-guns); Web Audio bonk = triangle pitch-swoop + FM wobble + band-passed noise thock; master `0.3 тЖТ lowpass(2.6kHz) тЖТ compressor`; Canvas2D squash-&-stretch blobs w/ googly eyes that flick toward velocity. Fallback: iOS `requestPermission()` tilt, Android auto-listen, **mouse/touch "tip-the-box + flick"** on desktop/denied, + 2.5s idle auto-demo gravity wobble; full teardown. Refs: **Toca Boca** (no-fail no-words play); cartoon **"Boing!" Foley**; the **2D physics-sandbox lineage** (Crayon Physics / Powder Game). **Why it lost:** physics + tilt are *trodden* lab tags (286-kids-jelly-choir, 303-kids-wind-harp, 603-kids-yell-blob; tilt is a familiar input) and it misses the jury's loudest ask (multi-user), so it's a lower-novelty *machine* than the multi-user winner. **Why resurrect тнР:** it is the **most bulletproof glance of the three** (no network, no GPU, no camera/permission that can fail тАФ works for *any* reviewer on *any* device including desktop via the drag fallback) and the most reliably *funny*; ship it the moment a low-risk silly-kids slot is wanted, or when the winner needs a no-permission sibling. ### `704-kids-funny-face-party` тАФ `queued` (the directest EMBODIED / off-glass camera piece тАФ resurrect for a body-input kids slot; revives the freeze-dance register). **Your own silly faces and wiggles drive a goofy cartoon creature in a FREEZE-DANCE party** тАФ front camera (on-device only) тЖТ the googly creature mirrors & exaggerates every bob/wiggle, the silly groove gets busier the more you move, a big move / open mouth fires WHOOP/raspberry/boing, and every 8тАУ12s the music shouts **FREEZE!** and cuts: hold still тЖТ confetti + happy chime; keep wiggling тЖТ goofy wobble + giggle. A real game *and* a joke, never a cadence. Built files (clean by builder inspection; removed): `page.tsx` + `README.md`. **Technique:** **no MediaPipe / no deps** тАФ self-rolled: hidden `<video>` тЖТ tiny **32├Ч24 offscreen canvas** тЖТ per-pixel luma **frame-difference** = motion energy (0тАУ1) + a weighted motion **centroid** (drives googly-eye gaze) + a **center-region** sum approximating "big move / open-mouth" (the gag trigger, armed/re-armed so one big move = one gag); cheap, inside rAF, <100ms. Web Audio look-ahead scheduler runs a ~100 BPM silly loop whose shaker/blip density scales with motion + **drives a grooveтЖТfreezeтЖТresult state machine**; master `lowpass тЖТ compressor тЖТ 0.3`. Fallback: camera denied/unsupported тЖТ an auto-dancing **ghost** synthesizes its own motion + performs the freeze-dance itself (also nudges after 2.5s idle); mic never used; privacy stated with a ЁЯУ╖ icon, denied message in `text-rose-300`. Refs: Apple **Photo Booth / Animoji**; classic **freeze-dance** party games; **Daniel Rozin's interactive mirrors**. **Why it lost:** camera-motion тЖТ character is a *recently-trodden* input (677-presence-field, 690-kids-weather-hands, 652-kids-dance-band) тАФ less of a novel *machine* than a multi-user first, and the "open mouth" cue is approximated by center-region activity rather than true mouth detection (honest, but soft). **Why resurrect:** it is the directest **off-glass / embodied-body** answer (JURY's standing "get off the glass") and the **freeze-dance game loop is a genuinely fresh mechanic** the lab hasn't built тАФ the comedy payload is the freeze, not the mirror; resurrect when a body-input kids slot is open and 677/690 have cooled. Honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [camera-motion analysis + creature renderer + groove scheduler + freeze game state machine] + #3 named refs). ## ┬з457 тАФ 2026-06-17 ┬╖ adult DEEP fire (one concept тАФ *a shared multi-participant groove room: networked control-signals, local synthesis, one shared clock* тАФ 3 interaction models; the lab's return to MULTI-USER, the JURY 2026-06-17 most-starved register [0├Ч in the last 15], with GROOVE not a cadence) тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 457 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out: ONE concept тАФ a serverless same-origin `BroadcastChannel` groove room where clients broadcast only lightweight *control signals* (presence, a shared beat-zero epoch, conflict-free last-write-wins edits) and **synthesize all audio locally**, phase-locked to one shared clock (the 2026 collaborative-web-music principle, RESEARCH ┬з457) тАФ attacked via 3 interaction models. Directly answers JURY 2026-06-17 #3 (multi-user, the genuinely unbuilt register) + #1/#5 (groove/rhythm/play, NOT another tension-resolution cadence). All three are Canvas2D, multi-user, groove-first, and clear an honest **2/5** floor (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs; #1 not claimed тАФ BroadcastChannel exists in 319/334/341). **Winner: `694-pulse-ring`** (shared rotating clock тЖТ emergent group polyrhythm via per-player subdivisions; the freshest *machine*, the purest multi-user payoff, the directest "groove not cadence," bulletproof Canvas2D). Both losers were demoable + clean-by-inspection for their folders; `rm -rf`'d only after the winner's authoritative `npm run build` passed (exit 0, 494/494). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 694**:

### `693-ensemble-floor` тАФ `queued` тнР (the most LEGIBLE / crowd-pleasing multi-user piece тАФ RESURRECT FIRST when an accessible "band room" co-play is wanted). A collaborative **16-step drum machine** as a lit dance floor: 5 instrument lanes (Kick, Snare, Hat, Bass, Chord-Stab) on one shared step-grid at 110 BPM in A-minor/dorian. Each participant **claims a lane** (tap a lane header тЖТ it takes their color; can't steal a human-owned lane) and everyone toggles a **shared groove**; all clients hear the same combined beat, locally synthesized, phase-locked to one broadcast `performance.now` epoch. CRDT-lite grid (per-(lane,step) last-write-wins timestamps); late joiners request + merge full state. Solo тЖТ bots claim empty lanes after 3s with tasteful patterns (amber "ЁЯдЦ session players"), retire when a real peer is heard (emerald "ЁЯСе N players"); 2.5s-idle auto-demo builds the groove. Canvas2D lit pulse-grid with sweeping playhead + trigger flashes, one rAF loop, full teardown. Refs: **The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers** ("send data, not audio"); **Toshio Iwai's Tenori-on** (the lit grid-instrument). **Why it lost:** a step-sequencer is the most *familiar* form of the three (lower surprise, against the jury's "the median has gone comfortable"), and its independent lanes are less of an *emergent* collective than 694's polyrhythm. **Why resurrect тнР:** it's the most immediately readable "everyone makes the groove together," the friendliest first multi-user piece to put in front of someone, AND the cleanest base to layer a real **WebRTC/WebSocket cross-device** transport onto (the control-signal design ports directly). Honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [4: BroadcastChannel sync + shared-epoch scheduler + 5-voice synth + Canvas2D grid] + #3 named refs). Tags: multi-participant/lane-claim INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ shared-clock step-sequencer groove TECH ┬╖ band-room/dance-floor VIBE. Pure Web Audio + Canvas2D + same-origin BroadcastChannel (no network/api/guard тАФ runs forever via auto-demo).

### `695-trade-fours` тАФ `queued` (the accumulating LOOP-STATION jam тАФ love-aligned to `172-loop-station`тЭдя╕П). A shared always-on group **groove** (kick/snare/hat + walking-ish bass) runs at 100 BPM for everyone; the **solo spotlight** rotates round-robin through the roster **every 4 bars** (jazz "trading fours"). Whoever holds it plays an A-dorian riff (pads or keys AтАУK); their 4-bar riff is **captured and folded into a shared arrangement** that every client keeps hearing on later passes тАФ so the piece **accumulates** into a full collective jam (loop-station, made multiplayer). Networked-control (spotlight handoffs + captured note-lists + shared epoch over `BroadcastChannel`); solo тЖТ 1тАУ2 bot session players join the rotation + auto-play your turns on idle. Canvas2D jam-room: player orbs around a ring, the travelling spotlight beam + bar-countdown, drifting note-trails for the accumulating arrangement, a solo-pad strip. Refs: jazz **"trading fours"**; the **loop-station / live-looping tradition** (Reggie Watts / KT Tunstall). **Why it lost:** the most complex/fragile of the three (riff capture + replay across bars, ~970 lines), and its *turn-taking* mechanic already exists in the lab at `334-kids-pass-the-song` (sequential, not the simultaneous-emergent collective the multi-user register most wants to showcase). **Why resurrect:** the **accumulation/long-form** angle is genuinely under-served (the arrangement is *different* at minute 5 than minute 1 тАФ a multi-user long-form piece) and it's the directest extension of Karel's loved `172-loop-station`; resurrect by leaning hard on the accumulation/arrangement-grows angle (and a fresh framing) to dodge the `334` turn-taking overlap. Honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [4: BroadcastChannel relay + shared-transport scheduler + groove+lead synth + Canvas2D stage] + #3 named refs). Tags: multi-participant/spotlight-relay INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ rotating-spotlight + captured-riff-accumulation TECH ┬╖ jam-room/loop-station VIBE.

## ┬з456 тАФ 2026-06-17 ┬╖ kids WIDE fire (3 divergent explorers, each a *real non-pentatonic harmonic event* via different input ├Ч output ├Ч technique ├Ч vibe; one fully off-glass) тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 456 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out: 3 distinct harmonic-event briefs, deliberately spread across tags so none repeated the rolling-10. Research-led by RESEARCH ┬з456 (embodied music-cognition; three.js-2026 velocity-feedback; RoboJam/ToCoPlay collaboration). **Winner: `690-kids-weather-hands`** (off-glass, eyes-off, tilt+motion+mic energy тЖТ continuous majorтЖФminor **mode-morph**; the only off-glass candidate тЖТ lands JURY 2026-06-16 #2 AND #1 at once). Both losers were demoable + ESLint/tsc-clean for their folders; `rm -rf`'d only after the winner's authoritative `npm run build` passed (exit 0). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 690**:

### `691-kids-sky-steps` тАФ `queued` тнР (the cleanest **on-glass modulation** piece тАФ RESURRECT FIRST for an on-glass kids harmonic-event slot). A glowing cloud-staircase rising into a night sky; every tap climbs one step AND the sustained drone chord (root+fifth+third+octave) **modulates up a perfect fifth around the circle of fifths** via a common-tone glide тАФ the harmonic *floor* shifts under the child (JURY #1's exact "a drone that shifts under them"). The climb is **Shepard-tone-tempered** (each voice a 7-octave bell-weighted stack with a wrapped fractional-octave offset `+7/12 mod 1`) so the key rises *endlessly* while register stays child-safe. Raw **WebGL2** fragment shader (night sky + stars + aurora + perspective staircase, hue driven by circle-of-fifths position) + Canvas2D fallback. Refs: Shepard/Risset endless-glissando; circle of fifths as a map of nearby keys. **Why it lost:** on-glass (the winner had to be the off-glass one to move the 13/15 screen metric) + Shepard tones already exist in the lab (132/40/187/313). **Why resurrect тнР:** it's the directest, most child-perceptible "the whole world travels to a new key" тАФ a clean modulation lesson with a genuinely clever endless-ascent. WebGL2 is the coldest GPU renderer (last 675 @ 450). Pure Web Audio + WebGL2 + Canvas2D fallback (no network/key тАФ runs forever via auto-climb).

### `692-kids-two-friends` тАФ `queued` (the **collaborative / social** harmonic event тАФ two-finger multi-touch, two players). Two glowing creatures (amber left, cyan right); each player drags one up/down to pick a note on a 2-octave C-major scale; the **real interval** between them is scored consonant (unison/3rd/4th/5th/6th/octave тЖТ warm glow + a catenary "hold-hands" light bridge) vs. dissonant (2nd/tritone/7th тЖТ shimmer/wobble), and on a dissonance the piece **holds the tension ~1.1s then performs an actual voice-leading resolution** (`resolveStep` nudges the nearer voice one scale-step, preferring upper-voice-down тАФ the classic suspension gesture) into a consonant lock. three.js (orbs + additive halos + light bridge) + Canvas2D fallback; solo degrade = a free auto-partner. Refs: RoboJam (Martin et al.); ToCoPlay; group-synchrony / joint-attention in early-childhood music. **Why it lost:** on-glass + the most crowded space of the three тАФ two-player kids pieces already exist (154-clap-back, 156-star-connect, 341-star-pair, 489-pond-pair, 508-accord-call) and tensionтЖТresolution overlaps 669-hum-answer + 272-tune-purr. **Why resurrect:** "harmony as a thing two people MAKE together" is a genuinely under-served *social* register; resurrect by leaning harder on the **group-synchrony timing** angle (shared pulse, turn-taking) rather than just interval-scoring, to clear the crowded "two-voice resolution" space. three.js (used 677/689 adult тАФ re-audit on revival).

### `688-spectral-seance` тАФ `SHIPPED` тЬЕ as **`704-spectral-seance`** (cycle 461, 2026-06-17) тАФ the audioтЖТimageтЖТ**audio** *return trip* was resurrected off Canvas2D onto a raw **WebGL2** raster/scan-line output (dodging the jury's Canvas2D ban exactly as this seed prescribed), re-sonifying each dreamed image column-by-column through a 48-osc bank. Refs: Ryoji Ikeda data-spectacle + the image-as-spectrogram lineage (Xenakis **UPIC**, Metasynth, **ANS synthesizer**). **Why it lost:** **Canvas2D output** (jury-banned 4├Ч + just-used in 454) and a mic caveat (the shared mic hook doesn't expose raw PCM, so mic biases the descriptor rather than being the literal captured waveform). **Why resurrect:** the audioтЖТimageтЖТaudio *return trip* is the most original idea in the batch and a true cross-modal-translation menu hit; **resurrect off Canvas2D** (re-skin onto a WebGL grain/raster output to dodge the ban) and wire literal mic PCM via a dedicated AudioWorklet/ScriptProcessor capture. Guarded flux route + deterministic procedural-image fallback re-sonified identically (closed loop runs with zero network).

### `681-kids-every-note` тАФ `queued` тнР the FRESHEST-CONCEPT resurrect (the directest answer to JURY #1's spirit "let a kid meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary") тАФ touch 12 chromatic petals тЖТ real-time REHARMONIZATION / chord-chasing тЖТ raw **WebGL2** aurora garden ┬╖ kids / luminous-wonder.
The deliberate **INVERSE of the pentatonic "no-wrong-notes" crutch**: instead of *restricting* the child to five safe pads, give the **full chromatic palette** (12 petals, тЙе64px) and let the **harmony chase the note** so any note becomes consonant тАФ play a "wrong" note and the world blooms a new color to embrace it. Built files (all clean, removed): `page.tsx` (12-petal ring + auto-demo that taps a phrase including deliberate out-of-key notes + WebGL2 canvas + Canvas2D fallback + live chord readout + full unmount cleanup) + `harmony.ts` (the engine: 10-chord lush candidate palette тАФ diatonic I/ii/iii/IV/V/vi `Cmaj9тАжAm9` **plus borrowed colors** тЩнVI AтЩнmaj7, тЩнVII BтЩнmaj9, V/V D7, chromatic-mediant EтЩнmaj7; `scoreFit` [chord-tone > 9/13 extension > тЩн9-clash penalty], `voiceLeadCost` [greedy nearest-tone], `pickReharmonization` [fit-dominant, voice-leading tie-break]) + `audio.ts` (4 gliding pad voices + bell on top, master тЙд0.36 тЖТ lowpass 7k тЖТ comp) + `gl.ts` (GLSL ES 3.00 aurora that re-tints to the chord hue + blooms a ring per tap, extra shimmer on borrowed chords, `WEBGL_lose_context` dispose) + `README.md`. **Why banked, not shipped:** it is the freshest *concept* and the directest jury-#1-spirit hit, BUT (1) it is **on-glass** while 680 lands the jury's never-moved off-glass ask; (2) its renderer **WebGL2 is HOT** (658/659/675 all WebGL2 in the recent window) where 680's inline-SVG is the scarcest + has zero GPU failure surface; (3) the reharmonization *payload* is subtler for a 4yo than 680's felt closure (per ┬з452 developmental anchor). **Why resurrect FIRST** when an on-glass kids harmonic-event fire is wanted тАФ but **re-audit the renderer on revival** (re-skin to inline-SVG or three.js to dodge the hot WebGL2 count, which would also lift its diversity score). Honest ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [chromatic touch ┬╖ reharmonization engine ┬╖ WebGL2 garden ┬╖ gliding synth = 4] + #3 named refs [FlowComposer reharmonization; *consonance is contextual*]; **#1 NOT claimed** тАФ the lab already uses "reharmonization" in `637-slow-burn`; the fresh axis is *child-driven chord-chasing that embraces chromatic notes*). Tags: chromatic-touch INPUT ┬╖ WebGL2 OUTPUT ┬╖ real-time-reharmonization/chord-chasing TECH ┬╖ luminous-wonder VIBE.

### `682-kids-two-moons` тАФ `queued` (the 6+/FAMILY-tier flagship тАФ tilt a moon between two suns тЖТ continuous majorтЖФminor MODE-GLIDE via a cents-glided third тЖТ **three.js** cosmic scene ┬╖ kids 6+ / cosmic-awe). Realizes the ┬з450 banked `674-kids-two-moons` (upgrades ┬з448 `668-two-suns` / ┬з446 `663-two-suns`).
Tilt to drift a moon between a warm GOLD sun (MAJOR) and a cool BLUE sun (MINOR); root+fifth stay pinned while the **THIRD glides continuously by cents** (+400┬в тЖТ the un-fretboardable neutral ~+350┬в "blue third" тЖТ +300┬в) via `frequency.setTargetAtTime` (0.12s), with coupled secondary cues (filter opens/dims, tempo nudges) + a morphing parallel sixth тАФ so the child hears the single note that turns happy into sad, continuously not as a switch. Built files (clean тАФ full-repo `tsc` + `next lint` zero errors, removed): `page.tsx` (three.js scene: two breathing emissive suns w/ halos, drifting moon that tints toward the nearer sun, 1,400-pt starfield, sky-color lerp; tilt + drag + тЖР/тЖТ fallbacks; hands-free auto-demo sine-drift; full rAF/listener/`renderer.dispose()`/geometry+material/audio cleanup) + `README.md`. **Why banked, not shipped:** (1) **6+/family tier, not the 4yo core** тАФ the major/minorтЖТemotion mapping lands reliably ~age 7 (per ┬з448/┬з450/┬з452 anchor), so its payload is shakier for the kids-default audience 680 serves; (2) renderer **three.js was just used last cycle** (677-presence-field) тАФ shipping it back-to-back works against renderer rotation; (3) it is the third "two-suns/moons mode-morph" bank (663тЖТ668тЖТ674тЖТ682) without yet finding its ship slot. **Why resurrect:** the cleanest **opener of a deliberate Kids-6+/family tier** (where mode reads), or fold the cents-glided third into an adult piece; its strong next-cycle hook: let the mode-glide drive a real *modulation* (the whole key, not just the third, shifts at the extremes) so it reads as travel between two worlds. Honest ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [tilt ┬╖ cents-glide mode engine ┬╖ tempo-coupled detuned synth ┬╖ three.js scene = 4] + #3 named refs [third-as-affective-pivot; the neutral/"blue" ~350┬в third; Deryck Cooke *The Language of Music*]). Tags: tilt INPUT ┬╖ three.js OUTPUT ┬╖ continuous-mode-glide TECH ┬╖ cosmic-awe / 6+-family VIBE.

## ┬з451 тАФ 2026-06-17 ┬╖ adult DEEP fire (one concept тАФ body-PRESENCE тЖТ SPATIAL-AUDIO room тАФ three body-sensing approaches; realizes the long-banked `442-body-orchestra`, lands the jury's #1 standing untouched ask "embodied-spatial / room-presence") тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 451 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out: ONE concept (spatialization-as-instrument тАФ *where your body is becomes where the sound is*, via per-voice HRTF `PannerNode`s around one `AudioListener`) attacked by three different body-sensing techniques. Lead = the jury's single biggest untouched first, named across THREE consecutive juries (depth-camera / room-presence / projection installation тАФ "zero embodied-spatial builds still"), bent by RESEARCH ┬з451 (spatialization itself raises felt presence тАФ arXiv:2601.22082; poseтЖТspatial-sound тАФ "Sounding Bodies" 2311.06285). **Winner: `677-presence-field`** (MediaPipe Pose skeleton тЖТ three.js luminous-body room; each joint drives a voice placed at its 3D position тАФ the most literal installation-room realization, scarcest renderer [three.js 0├Ч in last 10], glance path is MediaPipe-independent [idle preview + auto-demo run a synthetic body]). The two losing explorers were demoable + each self-reported clean isolated `tsc`/ESLint; folders removed only after the winner's authoritative `npm run build` passed. Resurrect by re-spawning the brief; renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 677**:

### `678-presence-flow` тАФ `queued` тнР the BULLETPROOF resurrect (the no-dependency twin: webcam **frame-differencing** motion-field тЖТ spatial HRTF ensemble ┬╖ raw **WebGL2** aura ┬╖ adult meditative/Anadol). Built files: `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` (6 D-Dorian HRTF voices, Dm9тЖТGmaj9тЖТEm11тЖТDadd9, master тЙд0.34 тЖТ comp + convolution reverb) + `motion.ts` (64├Ч48 frame-diff: global presence + centroid + per-voice column energy, no ML) + `render.ts` (WebGL2 violetтЖТgold aura + Canvas2D fallback) + `README.md`. *Why banked, not shipped:* it shares 677's exact concept (spatial ensemble) but its INPUT (camera frame-diff) has a recent precedent (`652-kids-dance-band`) and its renderer (WebGL2) is hotter than 677's three.js; 677 reads more spectacularly as an *installation*. *Why resurrect FIRST:* it is the **zero-CDN, zero-dependency** version тАФ no MediaPipe load risk at all тАФ so it is the safest spatial-presence ship when robustness is the priority, and the cleanest cycle-2 base for the spatial-room thread. Refs: arXiv:2601.22082 ┬╖ Krueger *Videoplace* (1974) ┬╖ Anadol.

### `679-presence-veil` тАФ `queued` (the ENVELOPMENT take тАФ **MediaPipe selfie-segmentation** silhouette MASS [not joints]: closeness/coverage widens the per-voice azimuth fan from a frontal arc toward a full surround RING, so *approaching the camera wraps the ensemble around you* ┬╖ raw **WebGL2** luminous-veil shader sculpted by the mask ┬╖ adult ethereal/enveloping). Built files: `page.tsx` + `presence.ts` (centroid/coverage/spread/motion from a 64├Ч48 mask + breathing-ghost auto-demo) + `segment.ts` (ImageSegmenter via CDN `/* webpackIgnore */` dynamic import тАФ build never resolves the URL) + `audio.ts` (6 D-Dorian/Lydian HRTF voices, coverageтЖТangular wrap+distance+reverb, master тЙд0.34) + `gl.ts` (R8-mask veil shader + Canvas2D fallback) + `README.md`. *Why banked:* the most conceptually distinct (envelopment-by-mass, not joint-placement) but the subtlest to feel тАФ coverageтЖТsurround-radius is a quieter payload than 677's spread-your-arms-and-the-voice-flies-there, and like 677 it carries the MediaPipe-CDN load path. *Why resurrect:* the lab's purest "your presence becomes an enveloping field" тАФ strongest paired with headphones; the natural sibling/cycle-2 if the spatial-room thread wants *envelopment* rather than *placement*. Refs: arXiv:2601.22082 ┬╖ arXiv:2412.05486 (online spatial sonification, 360┬░ field) ┬╖ Anadol.

## ┬з449 тАФ 2026-06-16 ┬╖ adult WIDE fire (3 orthogonal explorers across under-built adult registers, all dodging the JURY 2026-06-16 bans) тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 449 ran an adult **WIDE** fan-out across three orthogonal under-built adult registers, each a different input ├Ч output ├Ч technique ├Ч vibe, none touching a banned tag (no pentatonic, no Canvas2D, no scheduler-bed-as-only-idea, no warm-cozy, none the frozen groove/EDM). Lead = JURY #5's explicitly-named open register, **tender/intimate**. **Winner: `671-glasswork`** (the realization of the long-banked `660-glasswork` tender seed тАФ a generative glass music-box driven by real exhaustive nearest-tone voice-leading, inline-SVG; the directest hit on the jury's named adult ask AND the most bulletproof glance candidate [pure SVG + Web Audio, zero GPU/sensor/network surface]). The two losing explorers, both demoable + each self-reporting clean isolated `tsc`/ESLint, moved to `/tmp` and removed only after the winner's authoritative `npm run build` passed; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 671**:

### `672-cinema-swell` тАФ `queued` (a CINEMATIC orchestral-swell instrument тАФ hold chords тЖТ film-score string divisi blooms ┬╖ MIDI + computer-keyboard + on-screen keys ┬╖ **three.js** ┬╖ cinematic-narrative / Zimmer-Richter)
The **directest fill of the cinematic / narrative journey-engine register** Karel names in his care #4 ("EDM build-and-drop, ritual, jazz responsive, **cinematic narrative** тАж as alternate arcs") and a clean companion to the tender winner. You HOLD chords (MIDI keyboard via Web MIDI, or `a w s e d f t g y h u j k o l p ;` on the computer keyboard, or an on-screen mini-keyboard) and a full film-score string section blooms around them in real time тАФ it RESPONDS, it is not a fixed look-ahead bed. **Rule-based responsive orchestration** (`orchestra.ts тЖТ setChord`): the held chord is spread into **divisi** across three register groups тАФ celli (low + octave-down doubling), violas (mid inner triad + octave doubling), violins (high top voice + octave-up sheen) тАФ re-arranged on every chord change; each group is detuned-saw bowed-string voices through a lowpass with ensemble vibrato. **Swell:** the longer you hold, the louder/brighter the section grows (crescendo env), softly releasing on lift. A slow drifting **tension curve** (over ~30тАУ60 s, nudged up by dense/dissonant chords, down by consonant rest) adds a low ostinato/heartbeat pulse and brightens the top when high, so the piece has a felt narrative arc ("different at minute 2"). **Output: three.js** pooled concert-hall stage тАФ three banks of emissive columns (warmтЖТcool by register) whose height/brightness/glow track each section's live swell, tension tinting the whole stage, a heartbeat floor-disc flash, slow camera drift, full `dispose()`. **Auto-demo:** if no input within ~2 s, a **ghost conductor** plays a slow Richter-ish progression so the stage is fully alive hands-off; real input takes over seamlessly. Master ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (master 0.36). Graceful: no Web MIDI (Safari) тЖТ amber notice + working keys; no WebGL тЖТ rose notice (audio + keys still play). No API route, no guard, no new deps (`three` already in package.json). Named refs: **Hans Zimmer** (cumulative orchestral swells) ┬╖ **Max Richter** (*On the Nature of Daylight* тАФ string voicing) ┬╖ **J├│hann J├│hannsson** (slow cinematic builds); technique anchor: orchestral **divisi** + crescendo-as-expression. **Ambition honest ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [MIDI+keyboard input handler ┬╖ rule-based divisi orchestration engine ┬╖ swell + tension-curve state machine ┬╖ three.js stage = 4] + #3 named refs; **#1 NOT claimed** тАФ Web MIDI already exists in the lab [`291-harmonograph`], the fresh move is the responsive cinematic-orchestration instrument). **Why it lost (lane-leverage, not quality тАФ it was a strong, build-clean candidate):** the binding jury directive THIS cycle is #5's explicitly-named **tender/intimate** register (671 hits it dead-on), and the jury also froze groove/EDM-adjacent energy for a week тАФ cinematic is the lower-leverage swing here and three.js is the hotter renderer vs. 671's scarce inline-SVG. **Resurrect** as the lead of a cinematic/journey-engine-alternative adult fire (it IS the cinematic-narrative arc Karel keeps asking for), or as the orchestral companion in a "registers" suite; its strong next-cycle hook: let the tension curve drive a real harmonic *modulation* (key changes at arc peaks) so the narrative has acts, not just dynamics. Builder reported `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint clean in isolation; full working code is a fast re-spawn.

### `673-kepler-chimes` тАФ `queued` (the literal MUSIC OF THE SPHERES тАФ orbital mean-motion resonance тЖТ audible consonant polyrhythm that LOCKS ┬╖ tilt + tap/arrow fallback ┬╖ raw **WebGL2** ┬╖ cosmic-Kepler awe)
The **awe/cosmic reach** of this fire and the most *surprising* concept тАФ a star with orbiting planets where each planet chimes once per orbit and the orbital **periods snap toward small-integer mean-motion resonance** (2:1, 3:2, 4:3, 5:3 тАФ the Laplace chain that locks the real TRAPPIST-1 system), so **stable orbital resonance becomes an audible, consonant polyrhythm you HEAR slide from phasing into a locked groove.** Deliberately NOT the chaotic three-body problem (that's `432-three-body`) тАФ this is about *stable consonance*. **Orbital integrator** (`orbits.ts`): circular orbits tied by Kepler's third law (`T┬▓ тИЭ a┬│`, inner = faster/higher), a chime when phase crosses the +x perihelion gate. **Resonance-snap engine:** each non-anchor planet's period is exponentially pulled toward `anchorPeriod ├Ч ratio` toward the nearest small-integer ratio, with a per-planet badge flipping `тЧЛ` (drifting) тЖТ `тЧП` (in resonance) тАФ you watch AND hear the lock. With 3тАУ5 planets the combined chime pattern is a long, slowly-phasing polyrhythm realigning only after the LCM of the periods (genuinely different at minute 2). **Synth** (`synth.ts`): always-on detuned star drone + breathing LFO; a 4-partial bell chime per planet, pitch from its just-intonation resonance ratio, register from orbital period, panned by screen-x; master ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (0.34). **Output: raw WebGL2 / GLSL ES 3.00** (`gl.ts`): fullscreen `gl_VertexID` starfield, additive orbit trails/bodies/flares/rings, a drone-pulsing central star, full GL teardown. **Input:** device tilt (beta/gamma nudge the newest planet up/down the chain; iOS `requestPermission()` in-gesture) with **tap-to-add-planet-at-radius + arrow/drag fallback** so it's fully playable with no tilt. **Auto-demo:** seeds 3 planets in a TRAPPIST-like chain, slightly detuned so they audibly slide into lock over the first seconds тАФ alive at a glance with zero hardware. No API route, no guard, no new deps. Named refs: **Johannes Kepler**, *Harmonices Mundi* (1619 тАФ the harmony of the spheres) ┬╖ **Matt Russo / System Sounds** TRAPPIST-1 sonification (the 8:5:3 mean-motion chain as rhythm/pitch) ┬╖ mean-motion orbital resonance. **Ambition honest ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [orbital integrator ┬╖ resonance-snap polyrhythm engine ┬╖ consonance-mapped bell synth + drone ┬╖ raw-WebGL2 renderer = 4] + #3 named refs; **#1 NOT claimed** тАФ orbital/n-body visuals exist [`432-three-body`, `308-orbit-choir`]; the fresh move is STABLE resonance-chain тЖТ consonant polyrhythm + tilt input). **Why it lost (lane-leverage + glance-verifiability, not quality):** the binding directive is #5's tender register (671), and 673 is the riskier glance candidate (raw WebGL2 + tilt + the resonance-lock is a by-ear effect hard to verify in a silent sandbox), where 671 is the lowest-risk pure-SVG piece; cosmic/orbital is also partly-trodden territory. **Resurrect** when an awe/cosmic register is wanted or as the headline of a "sonify a physical system" fire тАФ it's genuinely fresh and beautiful; its strong next-cycle hook: let tilt/drag actually *break* a resonance (push past `тЧП` back to `тЧЛ`) so the player can hear the polyrhythm dissolve into chaos and re-lock тАФ making the lock/unlock the playable instrument. Builder reported `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint clean in isolation; full working code is a fast re-spawn.

None pentatonic-snap, none Canvas2D, none warm-cozy, one fully off-glass. **Winner: `669-kids-hum-answer`** (off-the-glass / audio-first тАФ the directest hit on the jury's loudest standing directive "get a builder off the glass; the kids side has never shipped one" + the тнР PRIORITY banked-seed flag from ┬з446; and on the firmest developmental ground per RESEARCH ┬з448 тАФ children perceive tonal *closure/its denial* emotionally before mode). The two losing explorers, both demoable + each self-reporting clean isolated `tsc`/ESLint, moved to `/tmp` and removed only after the winner's authoritative `npm run build` passed; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 669**:

### `668-kids-two-suns` тАФ `queued` (continuous majorтЖФminor MODE MORPH via a cents-glided third ┬╖ tilt + drag ┬╖ **three.js** ┬╖ cosmic-dramatic)
*Tilt a pale moon between a warm gold sun (MAJOR) and a cool blue sun (MINOR); root+fifth stay pinned while the **third glides continuously by cents** тАФ +400┬в тЖТ the neutral "blue third" ~+350┬в (a note no piano can play) тЖТ +300┬в тАФ so the child hears the ONE note that bends happy into sad. Tempo-coupled (gold faster/brighter, blue slower/dimmer) so it works for a pre-mode-literate kid.* Built clean + demoable: raw three.js scene (two breathing/glowing suns, drifting moon, 1400-pt starfield, sky-color lerp), `frequency.setTargetAtTime(...,0.04)` continuous third-glide over a detuned pad, tilt (iOS-permission-in-gesture) + auto drag fallback + 1.5s no-event probe + `text-rose-300` note, ~5s idle auto-demo, safe master chain. **Why banked, not shipped:** the strongest *renderer-diversity* candidate (three.js, off banned Canvas2D) and a genuinely fresh continuous-third-glide technique тАФ but lost to 669 on two counts: (1) the off-glass directive is the jury's single loudest *unaddressed* kids ask and 669 is the only off-glass sibling; (2) RESEARCH ┬з448 тАФ the "happyтЖФsad mode flip" premise is developmentally shaky for the 4yo target (modeтЖТemotion mapping doesn't land reliably until ~7; tempo and *change* do). **Resurrect:** the fastest "continuous mode-morph" resurrect, ideally re-pitched as an **older-kid / family** piece (the age where mode reads), or fold the cents-glided third into an adult piece. This upgrades ┬з446's banked 663-two-suns (SVG) to three.js. Tags: tilt INPUT ┬╖ three.js OUTPUT ┬╖ continuous-mode-morph TECH ┬╖ cosmic-dramatic VIBE.

### `670-kids-drone-cave` тАФ `queued` (SHIFTING DRONE / moving pedal-point ┬╖ gamepad + keyboard ┬╖ **WebGL2** ┬╖ mysterious-discovery)
*Guide a glowing firefly through a luminous cave; ring a small FIXED set of crystal bells while a sustained tanpura-style drone (root+fifth) slowly **glides its root** room to room тАФ A тЖТ F тЖТ C тЖТ E тЖТ home (iтАУтЩнVIтАУтЩнIIIтАУV). The same bells sound bright over home, warm over F, open over C, genuinely tense over E, then resolve тАФ the child discovers "the floor note changes the feeling," even though their own notes never changed. Harmony is relational to the bass.* Built clean + demoable: hand-rolled WebGL2 fbm cave shader (mood uniform lerps cyan/goldтЖФviolet/indigo with the harmony), two-osc drone with `exponentialRampToValueAtTime` ~3.2s root glides, Gamepad API + arrow/WASD fallback + `gamepadconnected` live-switch, ~5s idle auto-demo, safe master chain. **Why banked, not shipped:** a genuinely fresh harmonic mechanism for the lab (moving pedal-point) and a strong mysterious register тАФ but lost on (1) renderer: WebGL2 is over-represented (4├Ч in the jury's last-15), while 669's audio-first is the rarest/best-rated output; (2) the off-glass directive again favored 669; (3) gamepad-fly-through-musical-space overlaps shipped 636-star-pilot. **Resurrect:** ship next kids cycle when WebGL2 is cold and a screen-render is wanted; the drone-walk is worth keeping тАФ consider re-skinning to three.js or pairing the moving-pedal engine with a different input. *A child hums one note, closes their eyes, and an unseen choir answers тАФ leaning on a tense held note (the 4th), then stepping DOWN to resolve it (the major 3rd, the sigh of release).* The fire's **off-the-glass builder** (JURY 2026-06-16 #2 тАФ "get at least one builder off the glass; 13 of 15 are screens"): near-black screen, ONE breathing radial glow that pulses with the post-limiter amplitude (hue shifts violetтЖТblue tenseтЖТresolved), works fully eyes-closed. ## ┬з445 тАФ 2026-06-16 ┬╖ adult WIDE fire (3 orthogonal explorers across genuinely-open adult registers) тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 445 ran an adult **WIDE** fan-out across three under-built adult registers, each a different no-banned-tag input ├Ч output ├Ч technique ├Ч vibe, bent toward the RESEARCH ┬з445 "continuous, live-steered, never-landing causal stream" frame (Lyria RealTime / LiveBand arXiv 2606.03803, June 2026). **Winner: `659-pulse-cathedral`** (the jury's most-named missing adult register тАФ *ecstatic/euphoric* тАФ finally **shipped**: an EDM build-and-drop journey-engine arc with an audible+visible sidechain pump and a Shepard-folded forever-climbing bass; the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 "build the missing middle тАФ ecstatic/danceable" AND Karel's explicit care #4 "EDM build-and-drop as an alternate journey arc"). The two losing explorers, both demoable + each self-reporting clean `tsc --noEmit` + `eslint` in isolation, `rm -rf`'d AFTER all three builders' completion notifications confirmed; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 659**:

### `660-glasswork` тАФ `queued` (the TENDER / wistful 3am music-box ┬╖ inline-SVG ┬╖ adult / intimate-melancholy)
The lab's tender-register fill, and the strongest single resurrect for an adult fire that wants intimacy over energy (the jury named *tender* as part of the unbuilt missing middle alongside ecstatic). A slow generative celesta/glass piece in **D Dorian** (rare Lydian #11 tint): the next chord is a tension/resolution-weighted random walk (never a fixed loop, ~6тАУ10s/chord); on each change every voice moves to the **nearest** chord tone (real voice-leading, doubling-penalized) so the pad audibly glides; a never-repeating melody is weighted over chord tones + Dorian passing tones with a per-phrase sine register-arch and woven-in rests. Voices (all synth, no samples): FM music-box bell (fast attack/long decay) ┬╖ glassy triangle pad ┬╖ soft sub ┬╖ synthetic-impulse ConvolverNode reverb + filtered feedback-delay shimmer. **Inline-SVG** renderer (the scarce renderer): a constellation of soft glowing nodes (`<radialGradient>` + `<feGaussianBlur>`) that bloom on each note, faint threads tracing voice-leading between sounding chord tones; React redraw throttled ~26fps, most state in refs. Pointer bends it (up тЖТ brighter/higher register, right тЖТ busier), click "drops a stone" pulling harmony toward rest; idle ~1.4s тЖТ autonomous. `page.tsx`(443) + `theory.ts`(chords/voiceLead/melody palette) + `compose.ts`(look-ahead grid + melody) + `synth.ts` + `README.md`. Named refs: **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports*, *Reflection*) ┬╖ **Harold Budd** ┬╖ **Erik Satie** (*Gymnop├йdies*). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems тЖТ 5 [harmony walk ┬╖ voice-leading ┬╖ melody+scheduler ┬╖ 4-voice synth+reverb ┬╖ SVG] + #3 named refs; **no #1** [generative-ambient voice-leading is worked territory], no #5). **WHY IT LOST (lane-leverage, not quality тАФ it was a bulletproof, beautiful candidate):** the ecstatic winner fills a register that is **0├Ч shipped** on the adult side and answers a *second* standing Karel directive (EDM journey arc), where tender тАФ though genuinely missing тАФ is the lower-leverage swing and the lower ambition (2/5, no #1); 660 also flirts with cozy-adjacency (mitigated by framing as melancholy, not warm). **Resurrect** as the tender-register fire, or as the intimate companion in a "registers of the missing middle" suite. The full SVG build is a fast re-spawn.

### `661-murmur-engine` тАФ `queued` (boids murmuration AS the music тАФ emergence-as-composition ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ adult / awe-organic dusk-ambient)
The lab's emergence-sonification reach: a self-organizing **boids** flock (~320 agents, Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion, O(n) via a uniform spatial-hash grid, fixed-60Hz sim decoupled from render) whose **aggregate statistics ARE the score** тАФ centroid height тЖТ pitch register, mean scatter/speed тЖТ swell, the **alignment order parameter** `|тЯи─етЯй|`тИИ[0,1] тЖТ harmonic consonance/chorus stability, local density/cohesion тЖТ chord voicing richness тАФ low-pass smoothed so the music never jitters; 5 detuned-saw choir-ish pad voices in a consonant D-dorian/pentatonic scale + soft sine flutter-grains on scatter/regroup events; genuinely different at minute 3 than minute 0 (the flock is). Pointer = a diving hawk (repulsion тЖТ dramatic scatter-and-regroup). **Canvas2D** dusk-gradient sky (tinted by flock height) + additive `lighter` light-trail flock over a low-alpha persistence wash + predator glow. `page.tsx`(377) + `boids.ts`(sim + `computeStats`) + `synth.ts` + `README.md`. Named refs: **Craig Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds and Schools" (SIGGRAPH 1987)** ┬╖ **Vicsek et al. 1995** (order-parameter / collective-motion phase transition). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems тЖТ 4 [boids sim ┬╖ flock-analysis ┬╖ generative synth ┬╖ Canvas2D] + #3 named refs; **no #1** [`537-kids-sky-murmuration` + `8-particle-life` already in the corpus тАФ flocking is not lab-first], no #5). **WHY IT LOST:** (1) **renderer** тАФ Canvas2D is HOT (3├Ч in the rolling-10: 636/640/652); shipping it pushes the screen-renderer monoculture the jury warns about to 4├Ч, where the winner's WebGL2 is the *scarcest* screen renderer; (2) **lowest novelty** тАФ emergence-as-music + boids are both already in the corpus, so no #1; (3) lower-leverage register (awe-ambient) vs. the winner's 0├Ч-shipped ecstatic. **Resurrect** with a **scarce renderer** (WebGL2 GPU instancing for 5тАУ10k agents, or SVG) and a sharper sonification (e.g. the order-parameter driving a real phase-transition in the arrangement тАФ flock "boils" тЖТ the music breaks), which would lift it toward a #1. The Canvas2D build is a fast re-spawn.

## ┬з444 тАФ 2026-06-16 ┬╖ kids DEEP fire (one concept тАФ his-real-piano garden тАФ via 2 interaction models) тАФ 1 banked seed

Cycle 444 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out: ONE ambitious concept (the lab's FIRST kids piece built on Karel's REAL recorded piano тАФ granular-resynthesized, body-steered by tilt, pentatonic-quantized so no wrong notes) attacked via two **interaction models**. **Winner: `658-kids-piano-garden`** (tilt rolls a glowing seed; where it dwells his piano BLOOMS into a persistent singing flower тЖТ the garden grows, genuine long-form state). The losing approach, demoable + hand-verified (no node_modules in its sandbox), `rm -rf`'d AFTER both builders' completion notifications confirmed; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 658** (note `656` deliberately left FREE for a ┬з443 banked-seed [653/654] revival):

### `657-kids-piano-garden` тАФ `queued` (tilt = a WIND that scatters Karel's REAL recorded piano into a swarm of singing FIREFLIES ┬╖ WebGL2 point-field ┬╖ kids / luminous-joyful)
The **bulletproof, instantly-joyful momentary-instrument register** of the his-real-piano concept, and the fastest single resurrect for a kids fire that wants pure delight over accumulation. Same core as the winner тАФ loads Karel's *Welcome Home* recording via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-тАж` route (`audio.ts` verbatim, synth fallback) and **granular-resynthesizes** it with every grain `playbackRate`-quantized to a ┬▒2-octave C-major pentatonic (no wrong notes), тЙд25-voice cap, kid-safe `master тЙд0.5 тЖТ lowpass тЙд7.4k тЖТ comp` chain тАФ but the **interaction is tilt-as-WIND, not a rolled seed**: vertical tilt (beta) тЖТ brightness/register, horizontal tilt (gamma) тЖТ stereo pan + the **wind direction of a flow field**; grain **density + spread scale with tilt magnitude** (level = sparse gentle motes, big tilt = a joyful dense swarm). Each grain onset spawns a glowing **firefly mote** (тЙд520) in a **WebGL2 additive point-sprite field** (Canvas2D fallback) that drifts on the tilt-driven wind, flares at onset, fades over its life. DeviceOrientation + iOS-gesture unlock, drag + arrow-key fallbacks (`text-rose-300` notice), ~2.5 s idle auto-demo "breeze", ~12-min lullaby fade. `page.tsx` (714, single-file) + `audio.ts` (verbatim) + `README.md`. Named refs: Curtis Roads *Microsound* ┬╖ Xenakis ┬╖ Eno ┬╖ Karel's *Welcome Home*; love-aligned `227-paths-granular`тЭдя╕П + the `262-aurora`тЭдя╕П/`130`тЭдя╕П/`236`тЭдя╕П particle/swarm lane. Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5 (**#1** first kids piece on his real recording [shared with the winner] + **#2** 4 subsystems [loader ┬╖ granular engine ┬╖ tilt + flow field + fallbacks ┬╖ WebGL2 point-field] + **#3** named refs). **WHY IT LOST (lane-value, not quality тАФ it was the bulletproof candidate):** it is a *momentary* instrument тАФ motes fade and nothing accumulates тАФ where the winner's **persistent singing flowers** give the garden genuine multi-minute state/evolution (the quality the jury praised in `624`), a stronger #2 and the bigger concept; the winner's modular engine/renderer split is also cleaner, and 657 has a dead `padGain` bus (wired to master with no source тАФ harmless since grains always spawn, but a loose end). **Resurrect** as a kids fire when pure momentary delight beats accumulation, or as the WIND sibling of a his-music-for-kids suite; the full single-file build is a fast re-spawn.
