## ┬з443 тАФ 2026-06-16 ┬╖ adult WIDE fire (3 orthogonal explorers across the jury's open adult lanes) тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 443 ran an adult **WIDE** fan-out across 3 jury-named open adult lanes, each a different no-banned-tag input ├Ч output ├Ч technique ├Ч register, all bent toward the RESEARCH ┬з443 "continuous, live-steered, never-landing stream" paradigm (Lyria RealTime). **Winner: `655-breath-sanctuary`** (the jury's demanded 3rd off-screen/embodied piece тАФ an eyes-closed JI overtone-choir + singing-bowl ritual steered by your *breath*; the scarcest renderer [audio-only] + freshest input [mic-breath]; provocation #3). The two losing explorers, both demoable, `rm -rf`'d AFTER all three completion notifications confirmed; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ **max committed folder now 655**:

### `654-latent-chain` тАФ `queued` (audio тЖТ image тЖТ words тЖТ image ┬╖ the lab's FIRST 2-model AI pipeline CHAIN ┬╖ WebGL2 audio-warped texture ┬╖ adult / latent-Anadol)
**The boldest bank of this fire AND the directest serve of Karel's most-wanted standing directive** ("AI image generation INSIDE an AV experiment тАФ the image responds to/shapes the audio"). Karel's piano (`/api/audio/549fc519-тАж`, A-minor synth fallback) тЖТ `AnalyserNode` features (RMS, spectral centroid, spectral-flux onset, 12-bin chromaтЖТKrumhansl key, valence) тЖТ a `Mood` тЖТ prompt words тЖТ **Model 1 `fal-ai/flux/schnell` textтЖТimage** тЖТ **Model 2 `fal-ai/florence-2-large/more-detailed-caption` imageтЖТcaption** (caption SHOWN on screen as "the machine reads its dream", salient words re-mixed into the next prompt = a self-narrating latent walk) тЖТ the latest image becomes a **WebGL2 audio-warped texture ground** (strip-ripple тЖР energy+flux, energy zoom/pulse, RGB smear on onset, violet bloom); always-on procedural WebGL2 Mood-field fallback. **Budget-safe + the glance-fix it lost on last time:** guarded route (first two `POST` lines `guard(req)`, 501 w/o `FAL_KEY`), a `{probe:true}` zero-spend key check, AI strictly opt-in behind "Dream the picture" (15 s cooldown) **OR exactly ONE auto-fired step on Start when the probe confirms a key** so the chain is *visible* to a key-holding reviewer. Files (removed): `page.tsx`, `analysis.ts`, `synth.ts`, `renderer.ts`, `api/route.ts` (guarded), `README.md`. Ambition honest **3/5 with a HARD #1** (first 2-model AI chain тАФ grep-0├Ч + #2 four subsystems + #3 Anadol *Machine Hallucinations* / Akten *Learning to See*). **WHY IT LOST AGAIN (glance-verifiability + production-risk for an UNATTENDED ship, NOT ambition тАФ it was the highest-ambition candidate):** the headline (the chain) is still only *seen* with a live `FAL_KEY` a reviewer triggers; at a silent 06:30 unattended deploy it defaults to the procedural field, so the very thing that makes it a #1 goes unexercised тАФ AND it carries paid-AI + network + a builder-flagged-uncertain florence-2 model-id (could 500 every caption, graceful-degrades to Mood-only) straight onto Karel's live auto-deployed app. **Resurrect for a fire when Karel is AWAKE to click "Dream the picture" with a confirmed prod `FAL_KEY` + the florence-2 id verified live** тАФ this is the lab's strongest unmined frontier and Karel's top directive; lead with the live chain and consider the cycle-2 hook (let Model-2's caption words bend the synth's key/timbre so the picture re-tunes the piano). The ┬з441 bank of the same concept now has a working WebGL2 renderer + probe + auto-fire-on-key in the removed code.

### `653-endless-lift` тАФ `queued` (continuous gospel-house key-LIFT that never drops, Shepard-folded so it climbs forever ┬╖ WebGL2 rising-light ┬╖ adult / ecstatic-euphoric ┬╖ **tsc+eslint VERIFIED clean**)
The **directest fill of the jury's most-named open adult corner** тАФ the ecstatic/euphoric *missing middle* ("not doom, not cozy"; the adult side has tender [637] + hypnotic [632] + old EDM-drop [387] but no euphoric ascent) AND the most bulletproof glance candidate (pure Web Audio + WebGL2, zero network/sensor/key surface). A four-on-the-floor gospel-house bed (kick ┬╖ offbeat hats ┬╖ backbeat clap ┬╖ rising sub-bass ┬╖ maj7-add9 pad ┬╖ square Rhodes/organ stab ┬╖ bell/voice sparkles through a dotted-eighth delay) assembled live by a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms poll, ~120 ms ahead); the harmonic stack **modulates up a semitone every 16 bars and never drops**, every voice **Shepard-folded** (pitch class placed in whichever octave sits highest under a fixed C4-centered bell window) so the key climbs forever in-band тАФ perpetual rise is the point. ONE live **PRAISE** lever (тЦ▓ / тЖСтЖУ, hold-to-ramp) adds layers + brightens; **M** mutes; live "now in DтЩн ┬╖ +5 lifts" readout; long-form state (minute 2 higher/fuller/brighter than minute 0). **WebGL2** rising shafts of light (fullscreen-quad shader from `gl_VertexID`, no buffers; hue revolves once per octave of lift) тАФ renderer swapped from the ┬з441 Canvas2D bank to dodge the Canvas2D-at-3├Ч line. Files (removed): `page.tsx`, `synth.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md` тАФ **builder ran `tsc --noEmit --strict` + `eslint` both clean** (fastest, lowest-risk resurrect of the trio). Ambition honest **2тАУ3/5** (#2 four subsystems [scheduler ┬╖ gospel-house bed ┬╖ Shepard-fold key-lift engine ┬╖ WebGL2 renderer] + #3 named refs [**Roger Shepard 1964**; Floating-Points gospel-house lift; Lyria RealTime continuous-steered-stream frame]; **#1 SOFT** тАФ Shepard tones foundational [40/132/187], Shepard-fold-as-gospel-lift is fresh framing). **WHY IT LOST (lane-size + #1-softness, not quality тАФ it was the most bulletproof candidate):** a competent *register-fill* of an already-partly-worked lane vs. 655's structural diversity win (the off-screen/screen-monoculture gap the jury prizes most) + scarcer renderer. **Resurrect as the lead of a euphoric/ecstatic adult fire** (it IS the ecstatic register the jury keeps naming, and a continuous-ascent journey-engine alternative Karel asked for) тАФ the fastest single resurrect for that corner, already build-verified clean.

## ┬з440 тАФ 2026-06-16 ┬╖ kids WIDE fire (3 registers of the jury's "active-wonder middle") тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 440 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out across 3 orthogonal NON-touch registers of the active-wonder middle. **Winner: `645-kids-piano-creatures`** (the lab's first kids MIDI тАФ play a keyboard, an invisible band answers, no wrong notes). **The strongest bank of this fire** тАФ the *directest fill of the jury's named "missing middle"* (danceable/groovy) on the kids side, AND the cleanest glance (inline SVG = zero GPU failure surface, the exact quality that won `637-slow-burn` its fire). A 4-year-old CLAPS / stomps / beatboxes and a marching cut-paper band of glowing creatures grows, marches, and grooves with them. **Input is ENERGY/ONSET detection, deliberately NOT pitch** (a real departure from the trodden kids voice-PITCH lane 88/158/179/244/322): spectral-flux + low/high band energy off an `AnalyserNode`, adaptive running-mean threshold, ~120 ms refractory debounce so one clap = one onset; inter-onset-interval median тЖТ tempo estimate octave-folded to 70тАУ150 BPM. 4 subsystems (onset/tempo detector ┬╖ Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler driving a 5-voice C-major groove ┬╖ arrangement state machine idleтЖТbuildтЖТgroove gated by smoothed energy [so minute 2 тЙа minute 0] ┬╖ pooled-marcher + confetti-physics SVG renderer, 14-marcher pool recycled). Named refs: New Orleans second-line / drumline; body-percussion (Stomp); call-and-response. Kid-safe chain + spacebar / big "CLAP!" button fallback + ghost-drummer auto-demo. Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5 (#2 4 subsystems + #3 named refs; #1 soft тАФ onset detection is known but mic-rhythm-as-groove-builder is fresh for kids). **Resurrect as the next kids-groove fire** (it IS the danceable register the jury keeps naming) тАФ or as the seed of an ADULT groove cousin. Build-clean (`tsc --noEmit` 0), `page.tsx` ~30 KB. Lost only to 645's harder #1 (first kids MIDI) + Karel-pianist resonance.

### `646-kids-sky-conductor` тАФ `queued` (camera body-MOTION тЖТ conduct a generative sky-orchestra ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ kids / soaring active-wonder)
Lift your arms and the music soars to the constellation bells; sweep them and the strings swell тАФ a non-touch whole-body conductor, no instrument, no touching. Dependency-free webcam **frame-differencing** on a 64├Ч48 mirrored downsample тЖТ motion energy + vertical centroid (arms-up) + L/R balance (NO npm dep; optional MediaPipe-Pose via dynamic CDN import inside one try/catch, but frame-diff is the reliable default). Mapping: height тЖТ register (low gestures = cellos, high = flutes/bells), energy тЖТ dynamics, big sweep тЖТ string swell, stillness тЖТ soft sustained pad (never silent); all snapped to C Lydian тЖТ no wrong moves. 5 subsystems (frame-diff analyzer ┬╖ Chris-Wilson scheduler ┬╖ retuning string pad ┬╖ arm-height melody ┬╖ 8-beat-advancing harmonic progression). Canvas2D night-sky constellation orchestra (clusters brighten/shoot per section) + aurora ribbon trailing the conductor + energy-driven horizon glow; arrow-key / drag fallback on camera denial; ghost-conductor auto-demo. Named refs: orchestral conducting gesture vocabulary; the Theremin; Memo Akten body-as-instrument; Daniel Rozin. Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 5 subsystems + #3 refs; **#1 NOT claimable тАФ camera/body-conducting is trodden** via 113-kids-conductor-wand, 217-dance-avatarтЭдя╕П, 617-shadow-monster). Build-clean (eslint 0 / tsc 0), `page.tsx` ~29 KB. **Resurrect only with a sharper differentiator** from the existing body/conducting cluster (e.g. two-kid duet conducting, or pose-driven instrument *assignment* the child sculpts) so it isn't a fourth body-motion entry; and note Canvas2D was at 3├Ч when banked (would hit 4├Ч тАФ pair a resurrect with a renderer re-audit).

## ┬з438 тАФ 2026-06-15 ┬╖ kids DEEP fire (a TRUE cycle-2 of `624-kids-day-meadow`) тАФ 1 banked seed

Cycle 438 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out: ONE concept (a genuine cycle-2 deepening of the jury-named kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` тАФ answering JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #1 "finish a cycle-2 for once" тАФ that swaps touch-to-plant тЖТ **tilt**, honoring provocation #4's touch ban + pulled by Karel's loved `83-kids-tilt-rain`тЭдя╕П) attacked via **2 interaction models**. **Winner: `640-kids-day-wind`** (tilt steers a glowing WIND SPIRIT that plants where it dwells AND plays the garden like a wind-harp where it sweeps; swept gestures captured as a traveling motif, re-voiced into the current phase тАФ a procedural MusicWeaver *Motif Memory Retrieval*). The losing approach, banked:

### `641-kids-tilt-meadow` тАФ `queued` (tilt = GRAVITY on the whole scene тЖТ seed-physics garden + breeze wind-harp ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ kids / playful-physics wonder)
The same cycle-2 of 624 (diurnal phase machine + motif-memory bank + Chris-Wilson scheduler reimplemented compactly, NOT imported; + traveling-motif MMR) but the input is **tilt-as-gravity on the entire scene**, not a steered cursor. `DeviceOrientation` beta/gamma тЖТ a gravity vector `g` (neutral-hold zeroed, smoothed, clamped); the sun/moon arc, clouds, and rolling terrain all tip with `g`. A stream of glowing **seeds** is integrated with semi-implicit Euler (gravity + slope-roll + friction + soft bounce) and rolls into the **valleys the child sculpts by tilting**; where a seed comes to rest ~0.5s it **sprouts** into a region-appropriate living thing (low valley=flower, hill=bird, night-airborne=star). The same `g.x` drives a breeze line that brushes grown things (wind-harp, rate-limited), and brushes feed the 7-slot traveling-motif buffer. 5 subsystems (diurnal machine ┬╖ motif bank ┬╖ scheduler ┬╖ seed-physics integrator ┬╖ breeze wind-harp) + named refs (MusicWeaver MMR arXiv 2509.21714; LUMIA handheld embodied composition arXiv 2512.17228; Iwai *Electroplankton*) = honest 2/5 kids. Builder reported `tsc --strict` exit 0 + eslint clean (could not run `npm run build` тАФ no node_modules in its sandbox). **Why it lost:** (1) the gravity-physics planting is **indirect** тАФ a 4-year-old can't reliably plant *where they intend* because physics decides where seeds settle, weakening the kids legibility/immediate-cause-effect mandate that 640's direct "steer the glowy wind" model nails; (2) it reads more as a *new physics toy adjacent to* 624 than a clean **deepening** of it (640 keeps 624's recognizable plant-a-thing-at-a-spot interaction), so 640 is the truer answer to the jury's "finish a cycle-2" ask; (3) the falling-seed-emergence core overlaps the ┬з436-banked `634-kids-tilt-river` (tiltтЖТfalling particles) more than 640's wind-harp does; (4) the seed integrator is the only runtime-jank surface (640 has none). **Why resurrect:** it is the **bolder, more surprising** mechanic тАФ a real particle sim a child sculpts by leaning тАФ and genuinely fun; resurrect when a tilt-physics register is wanted, and use its own strong next-cycle hook: **persistent sculpted terrain** ("save a valley" тАФ hold a tilt and the terrain *keeps* that low spot so seeds keep gathering there even after the world levels, each saved valley owning its own slowly-mutating chord) to make it a distinct landscape-sculpting instrument rather than 640-with-physics. Full working code is in git history at the folder path; treat as a fresh build, and de-overlap from 634 by keeping the sprout-on-rest (not emergent-chime) framing.

## ┬з434 banked seeds (cycle 434, ADULT DEEP тАФ ONE concept ["refract Karel's own piano like light through a prism: HPSS strings/hammers split (the legible ground, from 606) тЖТ NMF-fan the strings into pitched register voices you solo/mute/re-mix"], attacked via two **NMF-legibility** approaches; the TRUE cycle-2 of the 606 decomposition spine the jury begged for two juries running; the loser build-complete [self-reported clean `eslint` + `tsc --noEmit` in isolation; both builder agents COMPLETED before removal тАФ completion notifications confirmed], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `630-piano-refract`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 630)

- **`629-piano-prism`** ("Piano Prism", status: `queued` ┬╖ honest ~3/5 ┬╖ **resurrect for a cycle-3 "true note solos" fire тАФ its post-hoc sort is the seed of a chroma-template path**) тАФ **"What if Karel's piano could be refracted into pitched voices you solo/mute тАФ using PLAIN unsupervised NMF + a post-hoc spectral-centroid SORT to order the components lowтЖТhigh?"** Same spine as the winner (606's `audio.ts` + `hpss.ts` copied verbatim тЖТ HPSS strings/hammers тЖТ re-STFT the strings тЖТ KL-NMF K=4 тЖТ per-component Wiener-masked ISTFT тЖТ 5 looping voices [Hammers + 4 strings], instant gain-only solo/mute, WebGL2 prism + Canvas2D fallback, keyboard/tilt off-glass, ~2.5s auto-demo). **The DIFFERENCE (and why it lost):** 629 uses **random init + post-hoc centroid pitch-SORT** (Low/Low-mid/High-mid/High) тАФ its own README admits "the pitch-sort is post-hoc and unsupervised тАФ separation is still the random-init lottery; labels are descriptive." It makes the *labels* stable but the *component content* unstable run-to-run; the winner `630`'s warm-start makes the components themselves deterministic. **LOST to 630 on reliability + legibility (not ambition тАФ identical floor: #1 first-NMF + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Lee&Seung/Smaragdis&Brown/Fitzgerald + #4 cycle-2).** **Resurrect as the basis of a genuine cycle-3:** warm-start `W` from harmonic-comb **chroma templates** (one basis per pitch class, not per register) so each voice maps to a TRUE note тЖТ per-note solos + a "transcription" read-out, the arXiv 2510.08816 deep-NAE direction; the post-hoc-sort code is a useful fallback for components a chroma init doesn't claim. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `nmf.ts` (random-init + centroid-sort), `gl.ts`, `audio.ts` + `hpss.ts` (from 606), `README.md`.

## ┬з433 banked seeds (cycle 433, ADULT WIDE тАФ three orthogonal **off-GPU / scarce-renderer** explorers, each clearing the binding diversity ban [rolling-10 OUTPUT was **WebGPU 5├Ч + WebGL2 4├Ч** SATURATED тЖТ both GPU renderers banned тЖТ all three built on a scarce renderer: audio-only / Canvas2D / inline-SVG]; both losers build-complete [each self-reported clean `tsc --noEmit` + `eslint` in isolation; all 3 builder agents COMPLETED before removal тАФ completion notifications confirmed]; `rm -rf`'d after losing to `626-empty-room`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 626)

- **`627-latent-piano`** ("Latent Piano", status: `queued` ┬╖ honest 2/5 ┬╖ **FLAGGED DUPLICATIVE тАФ do NOT re-ship as-is**) тАФ **"What if Karel's own piano performance could PAINT its own backdrop тАФ an AI image generated FROM the music's mood that then BREATHES and warps in real time WITH the live audio?"** Pipeline: dropped piano file (or a self-contained synthesized A-minor phrase, demoable with no file/network) тЖТ `AnalyserNode` features (RMS energy, spectral centroid, 12-bin chromaтЖТpitch-class, spectral-flux onsets) тЖТ prompt synthesis (mood = scene ├Ч palette words) тЖТ **FAL flux/schnell** via a guarded api route (`guard` first two lines verbatim; 501 when no `FAL_KEY`) every ~14 s тЖТ the latest image becomes a Canvas2D ground continuously **warped** by the live audio (strip-ripple displacement тЖР energy+flux, energy zoom/pulse, RGB smear on onset, scanline shimmer, violet bloom); **always-on procedural fallback** paints the same `Mood` object offline. INPUT audio-file (his piano) ┬╖ OUTPUT AI-image + Canvas2D warp (off the banned GPU renderers) ┬╖ TECH audio-analysis тЖТ prompt тЖТ FAL тЖТ canvas displacement ┬╖ VIBE latent/contemplative/Anadol-cool. Refs: **Refik Anadol** (*Machine Hallucinations*), **Memo Akten** (*Learning to See*), **Sound2Vision** / **Art2Mus** (arXiv 2602.17599). Serves Karel's two explicit standing directives (*AI image gen INSIDE an AV piece*; *use his real Paths music*), and nothing in the last ~30 cycles touched AI. **WHY IT LOST (decisive тАФ a curate-time corpus check):** it is the **THIRD entry in an existing lane** тАФ `441-latent-listening-room` (music "continuously *dreams a picture of itself*," AI image regenerated every few seconds from spectral character, returning colors bend the music back) and `448-piano-phrase-painter` (Karel's recorded piano paints itself, onset/phrase + chroma/key drive when a new image is dreamed, a closed audioтЖТimageтЖТaudio loop) already ARE this piece; 627's api route is literally the `448` flux/schnell template. Shipping it = the exact "nobody grepped the tree before re-shipping the ocean" pattern (580/588 twins) the jury keeps flagging. **Resurrect ONLY with a genuinely new axis** тАФ a real **2+ model pipeline CHAIN** (the lab is STILL 0├Ч on this: e.g. audio тЖТ mood-TEXT via an LLM тЖТ image тЖТ image-to-VIDEO), the actual unmined frontier, not a third single-model audioтЖТimage. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (~590), `analysis.ts`, `prompt.ts`, `synth.ts`, `ground.ts`, `api/route.ts` (guarded), `README.md`.
- **`628-data-matrix`** ("data.matrix", status: `queued` ┬╖ honest 2/5 ┬╖ **the cleanest *edges* + scarcest-renderer resurrect тАФ a near-instant ship for the next abrasive/clinical adult fire**) тАФ **"What if the musical SCORE itself were the visual тАФ a strobing, crisp, scalable VECTOR lattice that composes itself and sounds, with the austere clinical edge of Ryoji Ikeda rather than warm ambient glow?"** A 12├Ч16 **inline-SVG** grid *is* the score: each row is a self-mutating **Euclidean rhythm** `E(k,16)` (Bjorklund/Toussaint `buildEuclid`); a bright cyan scan-column sweeps leftтЖТright (rAF, 16th-note resolution) and every lit cell it crosses fires a dry edged **FM blip** (square carrier + detuned sine modulator, click attack, ~90 ms decay, high-passed 600 Hz) pitched by row over a cold detuned cluster with **tritone tension** (NOT a major/pentatonic wash); densities drift ┬▒1 and phases rotate every bar so it never settles; downbeat adds a band-passed noise tick; master capped `0.42` тЖТ hard compressor. Hundreds of cells mutated via cached `setAttribute` refs (no per-frame React re-render). Keyboard-first: space play/pause, тЖС/тЖУ tempo, тЖТ/тЖР density, s strobe (+ mirrored тЙе44px buttons). INPUT keyboard (off the fingertip) ┬╖ OUTPUT **inline-SVG** vector (the *scarcest* renderer, 0├Ч тАФ directly answers the jury's "commit to a renderer / off Canvas2D") ┬╖ TECH Euclidean-rhythm sequencer + scan-line playhead + edged FM synth ┬╖ VIBE Ikeda clinical / abrasive-precise / strobing (the directest *edges* answer to JURY 2026-06-14 #1). Refs: **Ryoji Ikeda** (*test pattern* / *data.matrix*), **Godfried Toussaint** (*The Euclidean Algorithm Generates Traditional Musical Rhythms*), **Vera Moln├бr**, **Iannis Xenakis** (*UPIC*). Ambition: #2 (тЙе3 subsystems) + #3 (named refs). **WHY IT LOST (lane-value, not quality):** the most bulletproof candidate in-sandbox (pure SVG + Web Audio, no network/sensor/GPU) and the cleanest edges/scarce-renderer pick тАФ BUT 626 wins the **bigger open lane** (audio-FIRST off-screen, the jury's most-repeated 0├Ч ask + the "massively bigger" mandate), where 628 is a refined-but-smaller grid sequencer (honest 2/5). **The fastest single resurrect for the next abrasive/clinical fire** тАФ and the one to reach for to give inline-SVG a real shipped entry. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `README.md`.

## ┬з429 banked seeds (cycle 429, ADULT WIDE тАФ three orthogonal **edged / off-Canvas2D-or-off-screen / non-fingertip** explorers, each hitting a DIFFERENT still-open JURY 2026-06-14 adult lane; both losers build-complete [clean `eslint` + standalone `tsc` in isolation; all 3 builder agents COMPLETED before removal тАФ completion notifications confirmed; AND a full `npm run build` with all 3 present passed **exit 0** + all three prerendered static before any removal, so both are proven-to-compile], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `618-solar-organ`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 618)

- **`619-combustion`** ("Combustion", status: `queued` ┬╖ honest 2тАУ3/5 ┬╖ **the strongest resurrect for the NEXT edges/abrasive adult fire тАФ research-bound AND now built twice [┬з427 as 614, ┬з429 as 619], a near-instant ship**) тАФ **"What if an instrument were a MACHINE тАФ a procedural combustion engine you rev off the glass?"** A DSP realization of the **Pulse-Train-Resonator (PTR)** model (implements **arXiv 2603.09391**, *Physics-Informed Neural Engine Sound Modeling with Differentiable Pulse-Train Synthesis*, March 2026): inertial RPM (fast rise under load, slow drag-down = mass) тЖТ a 4-stroke firing pulse train at `cylinders/2 ├Ч RPM/60` Hz with per-cylinder amplitude jitter + a slow idle-hunt wobble (lumpy, alive idle) тЖТ each firing injects a ~4 ms combustion grain (resonant noise burst + ignition click) into a bank of **five recursive Karplus-Strong / comb feedback delay lines** (~9тАУ31 ms, one-pole damping in-loop, feedback rising with RPM) modeling exhaust-pipe resonance тЖТ a throttle/RPM-tracking resonant SVF + `tanh` overdrive = the redline scream тЖТ snap-shut-at-speed = an **overrun backfire** (extra over-amp ignitions + noise pop). Runs sample-accurate in a **self-contained AudioWorklet** (processor source as a plain-JS string, Blob-URL loaded inside the Start gesture тАФ no asset/CDN/npm; ScriptProcessor fallback). INPUT all off the glass тАФ keyboard (W/тЖС throttle, S/тЖУ brake, Space rev-blip, 4/6/8 cylinders, `[`/`]` redline) + device-tilt (iOS `requestPermission` in gesture) + an on-screen тЙе44px pedal ┬╖ OUTPUT **WebGPU/WGSL** tachometer/combustion field (firing flashes at the live rate, heat-haze тЖС with RPM, redline white-out, backfire strobes; gunmetal/sodium-orange/hot-white; Canvas2D tachometer fallback + backend badge) ┬╖ TECH pulse-train + recursive-KS exhaust physical-model engine synthesis ┬╖ VIBE mechanical/abrasive/loud. The lab is **0├Ч on engine/pulse-train physical-modeling + 0├Ч on a procedural-machine instrument**. Ambition: #1 (first engine/machine instrument) + #3 (PTR paper) + the researchтЖТbuild chain. Clean on every JURY 2026-06-14 ban (off Canvas2D, off touch, off warm-JI, off cozy). **LOST to 618 (lane-freshness + alive-with-the-world, not quality):** edgy + the cleanest research chain, BUT the abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl`, and 618 is alive with REAL live planetary data at a silent glance where the engine needs *playing* (the 2.5s auto-demo carries it, but it's a played instrument). **The fastest single resurrect for the next edges fire** тАФ built files (removed): `page.tsx` (554), `engine-worklet.ts` (685, PTR DSP + Blob worklet + ScriptProcessor fallback), `field.ts` (356, WGSL + Canvas2D), `README.md` (96).
- **`620-empty-room`** ("empty room", status: `queued` ┬╖ honest 2/5 ┬╖ **the best build-complete candidate for the perennially-0├Ч OFF-SCREEN / audio-first lane тАФ resurrect to finally give that lane its SECOND entry beyond 576, paired with real-headphone tuning**) тАФ **"What if you sat in the dark with headphones and were NOT alone тАФ inharmonic presences move around you in real 3D sound, and they react to where you turn?"** The lab's swing at the off-screen/audio-FIRST lane the jury names every fortnight (still 0├Ч after 600+ builds): the experience IS the spatialized sound; the screen is deliberately near-black (a faint Canvas2D radar ring is a glance-aid only). 4тАУ6 procedural **presences** on a circle around the listener, each a `PannerNode` with `panningModel:'HRTF'` (AudioListener at origin); **DeviceOrientation** compass yaw rotates you *inside* the field (iOS `requestPermission` in the Start gesture). Mechanic: turn TOWARD a presence and it **hushes and drifts back** (hides when faced); turn AWAY and the ones behind you **creep closer + louder, footsteps quickening** тАФ the room never resolves. Each voice = 4 detuned sines at non-just ratios `[1, 1.41, 1.93, 2.71]` (тЙИтИЪ2, ~2, e тАФ unsettling, NOT a warm pad) + a filtered-noise granular footstep that fires more when behind you. Master `gain тЖТ DynamicsCompressor тЖТ destination`; "ЁЯОз best with headphones, eyes closed" prompt; full fallbacks (drag-to-turn + тЧД тЦ║ arrow keys/buttons + `text-rose-300` notice; ~2.5s idle auto-rotates the field). INPUT device-orientation/head-turn (off the glass) ┬╖ OUTPUT audio-FIRST (HRTF binaural) + austere radar ┬╖ TECH HRTF binaural moving-source spatialization ┬╖ VIBE dark/present/unsettling. Refs: **Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller** (*The Forty Part Motet* / audio walks); **Pauline Oliveros** (*Deep Listening*); **Sonic4D** (arXiv 2506.15759). **Honest: NOT lab-first binaural** тАФ `576-presence-room` did head-tracked binaural; the fresh axes are the **off-screen / audio-first register** + the **unsettling evasion-and-approach** mechanic. Ambition: #2 (тЙе3 subsystems: orientation listener + HRTF moving-source spatializer + procedural inharmonic+footstep synth + radar visual) + #3 (named refs). **LOST to 618 (glance-legibility + verifiability, not concept):** the boldest diversity swing (finally attacks the 0├Ч off-screen lane), BUT its payoff lives entirely in headphones + eyes-closed head-turning тАФ the MOST unverifiable-in-sandbox surface and the weakest at a silent near-black 06:30 glance тАФ and it overlaps 576's head-tracked binaural. **Resurrect** the moment the lab commits to an off-screen fire with real-headphone verification тАФ the HRTF + orientation + fallbacks are all written. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (723), `README.md` (104).

## ┬з428 banked seeds (cycle 428, KIDS WIDE тАФ three orthogonal **non-fingertip / off-Canvas2D / funny** explorers, each clearing the JURY 2026-06-14 bans [Canvas2D OUTPUT 6├Ч, touch INPUT 4├Ч, warm-JI bed ~7├Ч, cozy VIBE ~9├Ч]; both losers build-complete [clean `tsc --noEmit` + `eslint`/`next lint` in isolation; all 3 builder agents COMPLETED before removal тАФ completion notifications confirmed, no re-materialization race; AND a full `npm run build` with all 3 present passed exit 0 before any removal, so both are proven-to-compile], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `617-kids-shadow-monster`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 617)

Mapping: `jawOpen` тЖТ monster mouth stretches open (rubber squash-stretch) + a ROAR/HONK (wider = louder + lower + more vowel-y); `browInnerUp`+`browOuterUp` тЖТ googly eyes POP + BOING; `mouthSmile` тЖТ sparkles + GIGGLE + rosy cheeks; `mouthPucker`/`mouthFunnel` тЖТ kazoo TOOT. Per-control **EMA smoothing** so the creature moves like rubber; a dropped/empty frame is swallowed by holding last values. Rendered **WebGL2** тАФ a single full-screen SDF fragment shader draws the whole creature procedurally from a few uniforms (Canvas2D fallback draws the same creature). Kid-safe master `gain тЙд0.55 тЖТ lowpass 7.2k тЖТ comp тЖТ out`, always-on bed, pre-built nodes (<50ms), no fail states, friendly-not-scary (round googly eyes, rounded teeth, rosy cheeks). Tags: **camera/face-blendshape INPUT** (non-fingertip) ┬╖ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D) ┬╖ face-expressionтЖТsynth-param mapping (comedic face-puppet) TECH ┬╖ silly-monster-mirror VIBE. Refs: Tex Avery / Looney Tunes squash-and-stretch; Snapchat / Toca Boca face filters; MediaPipe **FaceLandmarker "Blendshapes GHUM"** (arXiv 2309.05782). **Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [camera + FaceLandmarker + WebGL2 SDF + synth = 4] + #3 named refs; honest: NOT first-MediaPipe-face тАФ 258/423/576 exist тАФ first COMEDIC face-puppet).** **LOST to 617 (renderer-lane + concept-size + diversity, NOT quality):** the most legible causeтЖТeffect (make a face, monster copies) and the cleanest fallback, BUT it renders **WebGL2 not the jury-demanded full WebGPU spectacle** (617/616 deliver WGSL), face-puppet/mirror overlaps the lab's existing **face cluster** (258-mirror-pets/423-face-beat/576-presence-room), and "become a giant body-monster" is a bigger swing than "mirror my face." Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (414), `render.ts` (442, WebGL2 SDF + Canvas2D), `face.ts` (117, blendshape map + EMA + ghost demo), `audio.ts` (269), `README.md` (89) тАФ a faithful re-spawn is a fast cycle.
- **`616-kids-tilt-zoo`** ("Tilt Zoo", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2/5 ┬╖ **the camera-FREE WebGPU-spectacle safety net тАФ resurrect if 617's camera path proves flaky on review, or for a phone-tilt / physics-toy kids fire**; love-aligned to `98-kids-drum-circle`тЭдя╕П/`169-kids-marble-run`тЭдя╕П playful-percussive cluster) тАФ **"What if a 4-year-old TILTS the tablet like a tray and a crowd of glowing googly creatures rolls, tumbles, and BONKS around тАФ every bonk a cartoon honk/boing тАФ and the harder you tilt, the sillier the chaos?"** **DeviceOrientation** tilt (beta/gamma тЖТ gravity vector; iOS `requestPermission()` in the Start gesture) drives a hand-rolled 2D rigid-body pile (`physics.ts`: gravity, wall restitution, O(n┬▓) circle-circle separation + impulse, squash-on-impact, rolling spin, wobbling pupils that lean with the tray; ~24тАУ40 creatures, capped/recycled). Each creature-creature/creature-wall bonk fires ONE of five randomized cartoon-foley voices (boing/sproing/slide-whistle/wood-tok/kazoo-honk; sizeтЖТpitch, velocityтЖТloudness; deliberately NOT a warm chord) + a low doink on hard tilts; voice budget 24, steal-oldest. Rendered **WebGPU/WGSL** instanced (one quad per creature, per-instance storage buffer each frame, fragment shader draws each googly creature procedurally) with a **full Canvas2D fallback** (`render2d.ts`, identical world) + live backend badge. Robust camera-free fallback: DeviceOrientation denied/absent тЖТ on-screen тЙе72px tilt-pad + arrow keys + mouse-drag + `text-rose-300` notice; WebGPU absent тЖТ Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle тЖТ slow lissajous auto-tilt so creatures keep tumbling + honking. Kid-safe master `gain 0.55 тЖТ lowpass 7.2k тЖТ comp(-18/12/6) тЖТ out`, always-on bed, тЙе64px controls, no fail states. Tags: **device-tilt INPUT** (camera-FREE, non-fingertip) ┬╖ **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D тАФ the jury's demanded spectacle) ┬╖ rigid-body-physics-pile + cartoon-foley TECH ┬╖ chaotic-googly-slapstick VIBE. Refs: Carl Stalling / Raymond Scott; Treg Brown (Looney Tunes foley); one-man-band. **Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [device-orientation + physics + WGSL instanced renderer + foley = 4] + #3 named refs).** **LOST to 617 (concept-size, NOT quality or reliability тАФ arguably the most RELIABLE of the trio):** the cleanest 06:30-glance story (camera-free, no permission, no CDN model) and a true WebGPU spectacle, BUT a tilt-tray physics toy is a *smaller* concept than "your whole body becomes a giant monster," and 617 also answers the jury's embodied-spatial singleton ask (#5) that a physics tray doesn't. **The fastest resurrect if 617's camera/segmentation proves flaky on Karel's review** тАФ it's the same WebGPU-spectacle lane, minus the camera risk. ## ┬з427 banked seeds (cycle 427, ADULT WIDE тАФ three orthogonal **edged / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip** explorers, each clearing the JURY 2026-06-14 bans [Canvas2D OUTPUT 6├Ч, touch INPUT 4├Ч, warm-JI bed ~7├Ч, cozy VIBE ~9├Ч, third ocean]; both losers build-complete [clean `tsc --noEmit` + eslint in isolation; NOTE a sandbox FS race тАФ 3 concurrent builder `npm run build`s тАФ wiped + the 614 agent recreated its folder, so both were `rm -rf`'d AGAIN post-completion before commit, `git status` verified only the winner staged], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `613-seismic-choir`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 613)

- **`612-piano-larynx`** ("Piano Larynx", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~3/5 ┬╖ **resurrect for an adult his-material fire, but PAIR it with a real-piano-loading path** тАФ its weakness was a synthesized default modulator; wire it to the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` like `583`/`606` do, or lead with the file-drop, so the talking effect runs on Karel's ACTUAL recorded tone) тАФ **"What if Karel's piano could SPEAK?"** Cross-synthesis instrument: **LPC analysis** (Hann frames 1024/50% hop, pre-emphasis 0.97, autocorrelation тЖТ **Levinson-Durbin** тЖТ order ~6тАУ28 all-pole filter + residual gain per frame) tears the piano's time-varying formant/spectral envelope out; a buzzy band-limited sawtooth **carrier** (glottal source, morphable toward white noise = whisper) is run through the **time-varying all-pole IIR** (per-sample coefficient smoothing тЖТ click-free; DC-block + `tanh` soft-clip тЖТ stable), offline-rendered + looped. The point you HEAR: move the carrier pitch and the formants HOLD тАФ the piano's "vowels" stay while the pitch glides under them (source/filter decoupling = the talking effect). The lab's **first LPC / cross-synthesis** (grep 0├Ч). INPUT audio-file (his piano, via file-drop or `/api/audio`) ┬╖ OUTPUT **WebGL2** "spectral throat" (the all-pole frequency response as a writhing formant ridge + live-spectrum ghost + carrier-pitch bar; cold X-ray cyan/bone/violet тАФ uncanny, not cozy) ┬╖ TECH LPC source-filter cross-synthesis ┬╖ VIBE uncanny/vocal/unsettling. Refs: **Paul Lansky тАФ *Six Fantasies on a Poem by Thomas Campion* (1979); Charles Dodge тАФ *Speech Songs* (1972)**. Ambition: #1 first-LPC + #3 named-refs + #4 his-material (3/5). Clean on every JURY 2026-06-14 ban (off Canvas2D, off touch, off warm-JI, off cozy). LOST to 613 because `606` (cycle 425) ALREADY mined the his-material analysis vein (HPSS), so a fourth-in-window his-material piece risks the new attractor тАФ and its glance-state was a synthesized piano, not his. Files were complete (page.tsx + lpc.ts + audio.ts + gl.ts + README) тАФ a faithful re-spawn + the real-audio wire is a fast cycle-2.

- **`614-combustion`** ("Combustion", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2тАУ3/5 ┬╖ **resurrect for an edges/abrasive adult fire or a "machine instruments" suite** тАФ it's research-bound and build-complete, an easy ship) тАФ **"What if an instrument were a MACHINE тАФ a procedural combustion engine you rev off the glass?"** The DSP realization of the **Pulse-Train-Resonator (PTR)** model: RPM тЖТ firing rate (4-stroke `N/2 ├Ч RPM/60` Hz) drives a **pulse train** (per-cylinder amplitude jitter + idle hunt тЖТ a *lumpy* idle), each firing injects a ~4 ms combustion grain, propagated through a bank of **recursive Karplus-Strong / comb feedback delay lines** (~9тАУ31 ms, in-loop one-pole damping) modeling exhaust-pipe acoustics; a throttle-opening resonant SVF + `tanh` overdrive = the redline scream; **inertial RPM** (fast rise under load, slow drag down) = mass; lift off at speed тЖТ overrun **backfire** (extra over-amplitude ignitions + noise burst). Runs sample-accurate in an **AudioWorklet** (processor kept as a plain-JS string in `engine.ts`, **Blob-loaded** at runtime тЖТ self-contained, no public asset/CDN/npm). INPUT keyboard (W/тЖС throttle, S/тЖУ brake, space rev-blip, 4/6/8 cylinders, `[ ]`/`- =` redline) + device-tilt (iOS `requestPermission` in the gesture) + on-screen 44px pedal тАФ all OFF the glass ┬╖ OUTPUT **WebGPU/WGSL** tachometer/combustion field (firing flashes at the live firing rate, heat-haze тЖС with RPM, redline white-out, backfire strobes; gunmetal/sodium-orange/hot-white; Canvas2D tachometer fallback) ┬╖ TECH pulse-train + recursive-KS exhaust physical-model engine synthesis ┬╖ VIBE mechanical/abrasive/loud. **Implements this cycle's research dive: arXiv 2603.09391, "Physics-Informed Neural Engine Sound Modeling with Differentiable Pulse-Train Synthesis" (March 2026).** The lab's **first pulse-train/engine physical-model + first procedural-machine instrument** (grep 0├Ч). Ambition: #1 first-engine-model + #3 named-ref (the PTR paper) + the researchтЖТbuild chain (2тАУ3/5). Clean on every JURY 2026-06-14 ban. LOST to 613 only because the abrasive lane was JUST visited by `601-feedback-howl` (two adult cycles ago) and 613 hit three jury provocations at once тАФ the engine is the strongest single resurrect for the NEXT edges fire.

## ┬з425 banked seeds (cycle 425, ADULT DEEP тАФ ONE concept ["take Karel's OWN recorded piano APART into hidden layers you can solo, mute & remix тАФ paint with the components of his timbre"], attacked via three decomposition TECHNIQUES; the lab's FIRST source-separation [grep-verified: NMF/HPSS/SMS/source-separation all 0├Ч across 600+ prototypes]; the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #4 ["mine the vein that produced both 4/5s тАФ a fresh analysis/resynthesis technique on Karel's own material; do it again тАФ neural source separation, NMF stem-splitting, DDSP"]. Both losers build-complete [clean tsc+eslint in isolation, builders reported green], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `606-piano-vivisection`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 606. **These two are the strongest cycle-2 deepening path for the decomposition spine.** тАФ **UPDATE (cycle 434): `607-piano-prism` CONSUMED тАФ resurrected as the DEEP fire that shipped `630-piano-refract` (the warm-started register-NMF realization of this exact seed, the first honest cycle-2). `608-piano-sieve` (SMS sinusoidal+residual) still banked for a dedicated spectral-freeze / phase-vocoder fire.**)

- **`607-piano-prism`** ("Piano Prism", status: `queued` ┬╖ honest 3/5 [#1 first NMF in lab + #2 тЙе5 subsystems + #3 Lee&Seung/Smaragdis] ┬╖ resurrect as the **decomposition cycle-2** тАФ the most technically advanced of the trio) тАФ **"What if Karel's white piano sound could be refracted, like light through a prism, into six hidden spectral 'voices' he can solo, mute, and re-mix?"** STFT magnitude S (Hann 1024/hop 256, ~9s @22kHz mono) тЖТ **NMF** factorization SтЙИW┬╖H (W = 6 F├ЧK spectral basis components, H = K├ЧT activations) via KL-divergence multiplicative updates (~64 iters, chunked w/ progress bar); per-component soft Wiener mask Mk=Vk/╬гVj applied to the original complex STFT (magnitude scaled, **phase kept**) тЖТ ISTFT overlap-add тЖТ six independently-mixable looping AudioBuffers (sum behind per-component gains тЖТ solo/mute is instant). WebGL2 prism: each component = a colored spectral band (W column) + scrolling activation lane (H row), soloed glow / muted dim, R32F texture. Off-glass: keyboard 1тАУ6 solo / 0 reset / тЖРтЖТ select / тЖСтЖУ gain / space; device-tilt "spectral spotlight" (iOS-gated); secondary on-screen faders. ~2.5s idle auto-demo cycles the solo. Tags: **audio-file (his piano) + keyboard/tilt INPUT** ┬╖ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** ┬╖ **NMF spectral factorization TECH** ┬╖ **prism/dissective VIBE**. Refs: Lee & Seung (Nature 1999); Smaragdis & Brown (ISMIR 2003); arXiv 2603.04032 (2026). **LOST to 606 (legibility + reliability, not ambition):** arguably the *most ambitious/beautiful* (the prism metaphor, 6 learned components), BUT NMF components are **unsupervised spectral clusters, not nameable** (the builder flagged this) so a 06:30 glance shows abstract bands, and separation quality depends on random-init convergence тАФ where 606's "strings vs hammers" is instantly graspable and near-always clean. **Resurrect** as the decomposition spine's cycle-2, or **fuse**: HPSS pre-split (606) тЖТ NMF the harmonic layer into pitched components. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (633), `gl.ts` (265), `nmf.ts` (202), `audio.ts` (362), `README.md`.
- **`608-piano-sieve`** ("Piano Sieve", status: `queued` ┬╖ honest 3/5 [#1 first SMS in lab + #2 тЙе5 subsystems + #3 Serra&Smith] ┬╖ resurrect for a **spectral-freeze / phase-vocoder** fire) тАФ **"What if you could sift Karel's piano into its pure singing TONE (deterministic partials) vs. the NOISE around it (hammer thunk, breath, room air) тАФ and freeze & stretch each?"** STFT тЖТ per-frame **peak-pick** above a smoothed local noise floor (relative-prominence test + main-lobe spread) тЖТ soft tonal mask in [0,1], tonalMask+residualMask=1; both applied to the original complex STFT (phase kept) тЖТ ISTFT тЖТ tonalBuf + residualBuf, equal-power **sift** morph toneтЖФresidual, plus **freeze** (held grain) and **stretch** (playbackRate). WebGL2 "sieve": gold/white sharp partial LINES foreground vs a grey-blue grainy NOISE CLOUD behind, sift visibly separating them, freeze halts the playhead. Off-glass: keyboard 1/2 solo, тЖРтЖТ sift, f freeze, тЖСтЖУ stretch, space; device-tilt sift (iOS-gated); secondary buttons. ~2.5s idle auto-demo sweeps the sift. Tags: **audio-file + keyboard/tilt INPUT** ┬╖ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** ┬╖ **sinusoidal+residual (SMS) TECH** ┬╖ **forensic-sieve VIBE**. Refs: Serra & Smith *Spectral Modeling Synthesis* (1990); arXiv 2603.04032 (2026). **LOST to 606 (robustness, not concept):** tonal-vs-noise is intuitive and freeze/stretch are a lovely playground, BUT peak-picking is per-frame (not true partial-tracking), and freeze/stretch are explicitly approximate (the builder flagged the `playbackRate` stretch slightly pitch-shifts) тАФ riskier first-glance behavior than 606's bulletproof median-filter split. **Resurrect** for a dedicated spectral-freeze / phase-vocoder time-stretch fire where freeze/stretch are the headline (do it with a real phase-vocoder). Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (778), `gl.ts` (320), `audio.ts` (416), `README.md`.

- **`605-kids-blow-parade`** ("Blow Parade", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2/5 ┬╖ resurrect for a **breath-input** kids fire тАФ blow is a genuinely under-mined sub-modality, distinct from yell/voice тАФ or a WebGPU-forward giggly toy) тАФ **"What if a 4-year-old BLOWS into the mic and a parade of silly balloon-creatures inflates bigger and bigger, then raspberry-deflates and zooms around when they stop?"** Mic **blow detection** (`detect.ts`: broadband energy + spectral-flatness + low-peakiness gates that reject tonal yells; sustain gate + asymmetric smoothing) drives balloon INFLATION (radius grows, rising squeak whose pitch climbs like a stretched balloon neck); stopping rips a **whoopee-cushion raspberry** (buzzy osc + noise + flutter LFO, pitch falling) and the balloon zooms+tumbles erratically. Renderer-agnostic parade model (`scene.ts`, recycles balloons so it always cycles) behind a `Renderer` interface with TWO backends (`render.ts`, 457 lines): hand-written **WGSL/WebGPU** instanced googly-balloon quads AND a **fully functional Canvas2D fallback** (same parade/gradients/eyes/squash) тАФ the most robust render story of the trio. Wind gauge shows blow strength (legible causeтЖТeffect); hold-to-blow button + Space fallback; 2.5s idle auto-demo; kid-safe `gainтЖТlowpassтЙд8kтЖТbrick-wall comp`. Tags: **mic-BLOW INPUT** (breath, not voice) ┬╖ **WebGPU OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ breath-energy + balloon-physics + raspberry-synth TECH ┬╖ giggly-parade VIBE. Refs: party blower / whoopee-cushion foley; balloon physics; Toca Boca. **Ambition 2/5 (#2 *five* subsystems + #3 named refs).** **LOST to 603 (instrument-vs-toy + risk surface):** the funniest single payoff (a raspberry is universally kid-beloved) and the freshest INPUT sub-modality (breath), with the safest render fallback, BUT **blow is a binary energy GATE** (the balloons make their own sounds) where 603's yellтЖТhonk *transforms the kid's own voice* into the sound тАФ a real instrument, the paradigm that won 601 тАФ and blow-detection thresholds (energy 0.06 / flatness 0.18) are the trickiest-to-tune unverified surface of the trio. **Resurrect** for a breath-input fire (the blow detector is already written + gated тАФ fast to revive), or pair the raspberry/inflation with a non-mic trigger. - **`602-motion-thrash`** ("Motion Thrash", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2/5 ┬╖ resurrect for a violent/industrial camera fire, or when the lab wants the *angry* inverse of its gentle pose toys) тАФ **"What if the camera watched you, and VIOLENT motion shredded the air into harsh, clangorous industrial noise тАФ while holding still left an ominous silence?"** `getUserMedia({video})` тЖТ 96├Ч72 offscreen canvas тЖТ frame-diff + coarse optical-flow over a 12├Ч9 zone grid (per-zone magnitude + global energy + transient + horizontal drift). WGSL **strobe field** (posterized per-zone motion + scan-tear + grain + full-frame inversion on a violent transient), real Canvas2D fallback; pointer-drag fallback (fast drags = energy) always live; in-browser-only privacy; idle synthetic-motion auto-demo. Tags: **camera optical-flow INPUT** ┬╖ **WebGPU OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ frame-diffтЖТharsh-noise + inharmonic-metal TECH ┬╖ violent/industrial VIBE. Refs: **Merzbow** / harsh-noise; **Survival Research Laboratories**; **Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974)** (deliberately inverted тАФ his playful, this violent). **Ambition 2/5 (#2 *five* subsystems + #3 named refs; soft #1 violent-motion-noise register).** **LOST to 601:** the most subsystems and a real new *register* (the angry inverse of 568/576/582), but **camera/motion is the most-mined input family in the lab** and it stays a motion-strobe *visualizer* where 601 is a new *instrument paradigm* (no-input self-oscillation) on the freshest off-glass input. **Resurrect** for a violent/industrial fire once camera is out of the recent window, or pair its metal-bank with a non-camera trigger. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (~16k), `flow.ts`, `audio.ts`, `gpu.ts`, `README.md`.

## ┬з422 banked seeds (cycle 422, KIDS DEEP тАФ one instrument "Singing Water" attacked by **three synthesis cores**; both losers build-complete [clean tsc+eslint in isolation], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `597-kids-water-bowls`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 597)

- **`598-kids-water-bowls`** ("Singing Water тАФ modal", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2/5 ┬╖ resurrect for a synthesis-forward kids fire that wants the *truest glass timbre*) тАФ same instrument as the shipped `597`, but the rub/tap drive a **modal additive bank**: each bowl is 5 always-running sine "modes" at inharmonic ratios `1, 2.01, 3.0, 4.2, 5.4├Ч`, each gated by its own gain. **Tap** = one impulse into all modes (per-mode exponential decay 2.4sтЖТ0.5s, higher modes shorter) = a glassy struck-bell ring. **Rub** = a continuous **stick-slip friction source** (looping noise + a soft saw, band-passed near pitch, `frictionGain` tracks smoothed drag speed) re-energizing the bank, PLUS direct lift of the upper mode gains with speed тЖТ a sustained song that gets richer/brighter as you rub, ~0.5s release. Kid-safe chain (lowpass 7500 + comp тИТ18/6/12), JI Lydian-ish tuning, multi-touch, idle auto-demo. **LOST to 597:** arguably the *most authentic glass timbre* (a real inharmonic mode bank vs. 597's bandpass-noise), but the **doubled excitation path** (friction source AND direct mode-gain lift) is muddier to tune and less faithful to the ┬з420 seed's literal "high-Q-bandpass-noise" friction-resonator spec; 597 is also the more robust, cleaner-engineered ship. **Resurrect** as a "true modal physical model" deepening (could fold real mode coupling / sympathetic resonance between bowls). Tags: touch tap+rub INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ **modal additive synthesis TECH** ┬╖ serene-watery VIBE. Refs: Jal Tarang; Franklin glass armonica (1761); modal synthesis. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (526), `audio.ts` (239), `README.md`.

- **`599-kids-water-bowls`** ("Singing Water тАФ bowed", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2/5 ┬╖ resurrect for an **AudioWorklet** physical-modelling kids/adult fire) тАФ same instrument, but the resonator is a real **bowed-string / stick-slip waveguide** in an inline `AudioWorkletProcessor` (registered via Blob URL inside the unlock gesture): a tuned delay-line + nonlinear friction curve driven by a `bowVelocity`/`bowForce` param, with a hard ┬▒0.85 clamp + DC blocker so the feedback never runs away. Rub speed тЖТ bow velocity (sing sustains in the stick-slip sweet spot, louder/brighter with speed); tap = a raised-cosine strike of the same waveguide. Has a robust **DelayNode-comb fallback** wired to the identical API for browsers without AudioWorklet. **LOST to 597:** the **most physically authentic** stick-slip of the three, but an inline-Blob worklet is the **least robust** path for an unverifiable-in-sandbox kids ship that must "just work" at a silent 06:30 glance (addModule timing, prod Blob handling), and the ┬з420 seed named the simpler bandpass primitive. **Resurrect** as the lab's first real **AudioWorklet physical model** (the worklet code is already written + clamped тАФ fast to revive once we can browser-verify it). Tags: touch tap+rub INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ **bowed-waveguide AudioWorklet TECH** (lab-first worklet) ┬╖ serene-watery VIBE. Refs: Jal Tarang; Franklin glass armonica (1761); Helmholtz/bowed-string friction. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (448), `audio-engine.ts` (386), `worklet-source.ts` (141), `visuals.ts` (240), `README.md`.

## ┬з420 banked seeds (cycle 420, KIDS WIDE тАФ three orthogonal explorers off grep-verified **un-simulated physical instruments** in the 588-deep lab [plinko/Galton, jal-tarang/glass-armonica, sundial/shadow-sequencer тАФ all 0├Ч before this cycle]; both losers build-complete [clean tsc+eslint in isolation], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `593-kids-sun-shadows`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 593)

- **`592-kids-water-bowls`** ("Singing Water", status: тЬЕ **SHIPPED ┬з422 as `597-kids-water-bowls`** тАФ the friction-excited resonator was rebuilt + shipped as the winner of a kids DEEP fire; see INDEX/RESEARCH ┬з422) тАФ **"What if a 4-year-old could play a row of glowing water bowls тАФ tap to ring them, and RUB a finger round the rim to make them SING?"** Six glowing bowls, water-levelтЖТpitch (higher water = lower pitch, real physics, teaches itself). **Tap = struck inharmonic bell** (1, 2.01, 3.0, 4.2├Ч partials). **Rub = a sustained glass-armonica friction tone** тАФ the heart of the piece and the genuinely new browser synthesis: a **friction-excited resonator** = high-Q bandpass (QтЙИ14тАУ28) filtered noise at the bowl pitch + pure shimmer partials, where **drag SPEED drives amplitude + brightness + Q** in real time (rub faster тЖТ louder/brighter, stop тЖТ it decays). Tap and rub are two excitations of ONE resonator. Tuning: JI Lydian-ish `1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8, 3/2, 5/3` over ~F3 (the 11/8 #4 = watery floating color, NOT pentatonic). Canvas2D ripples + standing-wave caustics, ambient water bed, idle auto-rub demo, kids-safe limiter, multi-touch. Tags: touch tap+rub INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ **friction-resonator synthesis TECH** (lab-first) ┬╖ serene-watery VIBE. Refs: Indian **Jal Tarang**; Benjamin Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761). **LOST to 593 (warmth/glance, not quality):** the most *technically novel* (a new synthesis primitive vs. 593's new structure), but 593's golden-hour moving-sun is warmer + more arresting at a silent 06:30 glance, and tap-vs-rub disambiguation is a hair more demanding for a 4yo than 593's single drag. **Resurrect** as the lead of a synthesis-forward kids fire (fold in pour-to-retune + sympathetic resonance). Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (~14k), `synth.ts`, `README.md`.

- **`591-kids-plinko-bells`** ("Bell Drop", status: `queued` ┬╖ ~3/5 ┬╖ resurrect for an emergent/autonomous-music or STEM kids fire тАФ love-aligned to Karel's `236-particle-life-song`тЭдя╕П/`130-tsl-particle-compute`тЭдя╕П/`262-aurora-particle`тЭдя╕П cluster) тАФ **"What if dropping a ball and watching it bounce taught a 4-year-old probability тАФ and built a warm chord while it does?"** A sonified **Galton/quincunx board (1894)**: tap the top (or an 88px Drop button) тЖТ a luminous ball falls, left/right "coin-flip" off each peg row (each bounce a quiet panned wooden tick), landing in one of **9 just-intonation bins**; balls **accumulate into a visible histogram** and the bell curve *blooms as a warm major chord* тАФ the bins are arranged so consonance mirrors outward from the peak, the most-hit center bins on root/4th/5th, so "the middle is home." Emergent, autonomous, self-playing (off-finger reward), with a dashed normal-curve guide so the math is legible. Canvas2D, ambient root+fifth pad, idle auto-drop demo, optional tilt-to-bias, kids-safe limiter. Tags: touch-drop (+tilt) INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ **Galton/binomial-physics тЖТ histogram-as-chord TECH** (lab-first) ┬╖ playful-emergent-STEM VIBE. Ref: Francis Galton, the **quincunx** / bean machine, *Natural Inheritance* (1894). **LOST to 593:** the richest *concept* and most autonomous (Karel loves emergent music), but cooler/cerebral and less immediately gorgeous at a glance than 593's golden-hour sky. **Resurrect** for an emergent/generative or STEM-leaning kids fire. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (473), `audio.ts`, `physics.ts`, `tuning.ts`, `README.md`.

## ┬з418 banked seeds (cycle 418, KIDS DEEP тАФ one concept, *the lab's first GAME-CONTROLLER instrument for a 4-year-old, off the glass*, via three interaction approaches on the Gamepad API + dual-rumble haptics; both losers build-complete [clean ESLint + tsc in isolation], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `587-kids-button-garden`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 587)

Keyboard (WASD/arrows + Z/X/C) + pointer-drag fallbacks + idle Lissajous auto-demo. Tags: gamepad INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ continuous-portamento-chord-bend TECH ┬╖ warm-expressive VIBE. Refs: Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton*/*TENORI-ON*; May 2026 Steam Controller haptic-song demos. **LOST to 587 (legibility, not quality):** the most *musically expressive* of the three (continuous bend = real warmth), but **two-stick coordination + "push harder = higher" is the least graspable for a 4-year-old** тАФ it reads as a slightly-adult instrument. **Resurrect** for an adult/older-kid expressive-controller fire, or fold its continuous chord-bend into 587 as a held-trigger "expressive" layer. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (701), `README.md`.

- **`588-kids-glow-drive`** (status: `queued` ┬╖ ~3/5 ┬╖ resurrect for a calm SPATIAL / exploratory kids fire, or as 587's one-stick younger sibling) тАФ **"What if you steered a glowing comet through a dark sky and woke sleeping stars that sing as you pass?"** Left stick steers a comet through a fixed autonomous field of light-seeds; the nearest seed wakes/ripples/sings when you pass, pitched by its *place* in the field (a just-intonation spatial scale, low-leftтЖТhigh-right) over a root+fifth drone; right stick blooms a halo, triggers leave a trail + swell, dual-rumble buzzes on each wake. Keyboard/WASD + pointer-drag-to-steer + idle wandering auto-demo. Tags: gamepad INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ spatial-scale-field TECH ┬╖ calm-exploratory VIBE. Refs: same (Iwai; Steam Controller). **LOST to 587:** lovely and the cleanest answer to the frozen-creature ban (a *field*, not a pet), and one-stick steering is more accessible than 586's two тАФ but the reward is more **ambient/passive** than 587's instant mashтЖТbloom causeтЖТeffect, and "steer precisely enough to pass near a seed" needs more motor control than a 4-year-old's button-mash. **Resurrect** for a spatial/ambient kids fire, or as the younger-sibling one-stick mode of a controller suite. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (646), `README.md`.

## ┬з415 banked seeds (cycle 415, ADULT WIDE тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers all chasing the jury's WARMTH dare; both losers build-complete in isolation, `rm -rf`'d after losing to `580-tide-breath`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 580)

- **`581-still-bloom`** (status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2тАУ3/5 ┬╖ resurrect to open the off-glass / audio-first / conceptual lane the jury keeps naming as 0├Ч) тАФ **"What if music rewarded you for holding completely still?"** An INVERSE gate: a warm ~5тАУ7-voice just-intonation drone (low root, detuned sine/triangle pairs) slowly BLOOMS out of silence тАФ voices entering one by one, master lowpass opening 400тЖТ3500 Hz тАФ only while you hold the device truly still; any motion above a gentle threshold scatters it (voices duck, bloom recedes). **Off the glass:** input is `DeviceMotion` agitation (rolling variance of acceleration; iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the start gesture), falling back to pointer-stillness, then a guided "breathe-with-me" auto-demo. Audio-FIRST: the visual is a minimal warm Canvas2D radial bloom (NOT three.js/WebGL) that grows with integrated stillness and disperses into grain on motion. Tags: device-motion-stillness INPUT ┬╖ audio-first/Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ stillness-integration TECH ┬╖ warm-meditative/conceptual VIBE. Refs: Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*, ├Йliane Radigue, John Cage *4'33"*, Christine Sun Kim. **LOST to 580:** lowest ambition of the trio, does NOT revive the jury-starved WebGPU, and its real payoff needs a held-still device тАФ at a silent 06:30 glance Karel sees only the breathe-demo, not the felt reward (580 plays autonomously). The strongest pure *concept* and the cleanest answer to the off-glass / audio-only provocation тАФ resurrect on a cycle where the data/WebGPU lanes are crowded and the lab needs to get off the screen. (No API route; pure client motion + Web Audio, nothing recorded/sent. Build-clean in isolation: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `motion.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`.)

- **`582-piano-aurora`** (status: `queued` ┬╖ ~2тАУ3/5 ┬╖ resurrect for a "use Karel's real music" fire / a warm WebGPU-painting fire) тАФ **"What if the *harmony* of a warm piano painted living light?"** A warm piano source (a built-in soft-attack generative IтАУviтАУIVтАУV pad in D with 7ths/9ths so it always plays, PLUS a drop-your-own-recording file input тАФ the production path being the existing `/api/audio/[id]` route to Karel's Welcome Home tracks, documented not implemented) feeds an `AnalyserNode`; each frame folds the spectrum into a **12-bin chroma** (pitch-class energy, NOT onset/beat) + RMS. The dominant pitch-classes steer the HUE of a **WebGPU curl-noise flow-field aurora** (~40k particles via a WGSL compute pass; Bridson curl noise) confined to a warm amberтЖТroseтЖТviolet arc (cyan/cold-green skipped), RMS drives brightness/flow; hot-downgrades to a ~4k-particle Canvas2D flow field if `navigator.gpu` fails. Tags: audio-file INPUT ┬╖ WebGPU OUTPUT (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ FFT-chroma flow-field TECH ┬╖ warm-intimate VIBE. Refs: Refik Anadol (data-painting), Memo Akten (*Learning to See* / flow fields), Robert Bridson (curl noise). **LOST to 580:** it is fundamentally an audio-reactive *visualizer*, and the lab's flow-field/aurora-visualizer lane is crowded (`130-tsl-particle-compute`тЭдя╕П, `262-aurora-particle`тЭдя╕П, `441-latent-listening-room`) тАФ close to the jury's standing "renderer flex in search of a concept" critique (its 541 call-out) тАФ and it carries no real-world data (jury #2). The "harmony-not-rhythm" chroma steering is a genuinely nice twist and it honors the under-served "use his real music" directive тАФ resurrect by binding it to his ACTUAL Welcome Home tracks via `/api/audio/[id]` (the differentiator that lifts it out of the visualizer pack). (No API route in the prototype itself; dropped audio decoded locally, never uploaded. Build-clean in isolation: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `chroma.ts`, `field.ts`, `gpu.ts`, `README.md`.)

## ┬з412 banked seeds (cycle 412, KIDS DEEP тАФ one concept, *today's REAL local weather, played as a kids music window*, via three renderer/interaction approaches on live Open-Meteo; both losers build-complete [clean tsc+eslint], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `575-kids-sky-song`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 575)

Cycle 412 fired a **kids DEEP** triple off ONE fresh concept тАФ *open a window onto the child's actual current weather (live Open-Meteo, no key) and play it as music; the live weather composes the key/mood/motion, the child performs within it* тАФ the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-13 #2 (real-world-data sonification, **0├Ч the whole window**) + #4 (chase warmth, not a puzzle), and a grep-verified **kids-first real-data sonification** (the lab's prior weather toys `115`/`120`/`83` are all *synthetic*/"Zero API"; the only real-data pieces `355`/`337` are adult + out of frame). All three share: direct client-side fetch of `api.open-meteo.com` (public, no-key, CORS, **no api route, no guard, no secret**; CSP-verified тАФ enforced `connect-src тАж https:` allows it), optional geolocation with a silent default-coordinate fallback (no kids permission gate), a baked demo-sky for offline/failure so the 06:30 glance always shows + plays, WMO `weather_code`+`cloud_cover`+`is_day`тЖТconsonant-scale/mood mapping, kids-safe `gainтЖТlowpass(тЙд8k)тЖТcompressorтЖТdestination` limiter, alive-from-frame-one visuals. Winner shipped = `575-kids-sky-song` (the *generative-composition* take тАФ the weather writes an evolving look-ahead song that plays itself; the biggest concept + best "reads as music at a silent glance" + most differentiated from the lab's existing synthetic-weather Canvas2D toys). Both losers below are complete, build-reviewed real implementations (own folder, pure client-side, no API route, brick-wall limiter, hands-free auto-demo + baked-sky fallback, graceful WebGL2тЖТCanvas2D / geo-denied fallbacks); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT.

- **`573-kids-sky-window`** (`queued`, the most *immersive renderer* take тАФ RESURRECT for a shader-forward weather/atmosphere fire, or as 575's richer sky layer) тАФ a fullscreen **raw-WebGL2 hand-written-GLSL** living-sky window: fbm volumetric-ish clouds (density from `cloud_cover`), wind-driven drift (`wind_speed/direction`), sun/moon glow+halo (`is_day`+clear), procedural rain streaks / snowflakes (from `precipitation`), night stars, storm lightning, touch ripples/bloom, window vignette тАФ alive from frame one, with a Canvas2D fallback sky that still shows weather + sings. Touch = play notes quantised to today's weather-set scale (7 moods: sunny major-pentatonic / starry-night octave-down / cloudy sus2 / fog low-drone / rain minor-pentatonic / snow high-bells / storm lydian); `temperature`тЖТtimbre+register, `wind`тЖТdrift+filter LFO, `precipitation`тЖТfalling-voice density. **LOST, not on quality:** the most beautiful sky of the three, but 575's generative engine is the bigger *concept* leap ("the weather *composes*" vs "the weather *tints* what you tap"), and an abstract shader sky reads less instantly than 575's self-blooming notes at a silent glance. **Its value:** the richest atmosphere renderer тАФ resurrect for an atmosphere/aurora-forward fire, or fold its volumetric sky in as 575's background. Ambition 3/5 (#1 qualified kids-first real-data sonification + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Polli/Miebach/WeatherChimes; #5 not claimed). Complete: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts` (`SkyAudio`), `weather.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`. Clean tsc+eslint, not browser-verified.

- **`574-kids-weather-today`** (`queued`, the warmest / most 4yo-legible take) тАФ a cozy **Canvas2D cut-paper diorama**: paper hills, a smiling sun or moon, drifting clouds, falling rain/snow, and a friendly breathing paper critter тАФ the most instantly-readable "today's weather" for a 4-year-old. Tap the sun/clouds/critter/hill (each a different position in today's key) тЖТ always-consonant music-box notes; scene + key/mode chosen by live `weather_code`+`cloud_cover`+`is_day` (sunny major meadow / overcast sus2 grey hills / rain minor-pentatonic chimes / snow glassy bells / fog hush / thunder weighty minor / starry night), `temperature`тЖТcolor temp + timbre, `wind`тЖТcloud drift, `precipitation`тЖТparticle count; always-on ambient chord bed; tap targets тЙе80px. **LOST:** despite the real-data headline it is the closest in *form* to the lab's existing synthetic weather toys (`115-kids-weather-music` zone-blend, `120-kids-rain-drum` cloud-tap) тАФ the "too similar in shape" risk тАФ and the least ambitious renderer of the three (Canvas2D vs WebGL2 + a generative engine). **Its value:** the warmest, coziest, most-legible-to-a-4yo + the most iPad-bulletproof (Canvas2D) тАФ resurrect when a warmth-forward / maximally-legible kids weather fire is due, or ship it as 575's more-literal sibling for the youngest users. Ambition 3/5 (#1 qualified kids-first real-data sonification + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Polli/Miebach/WeatherChimes; #5 not claimed). Complete: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `weather.ts`, `scene.ts`, `README.md`. Clean tsc+eslint, not browser-verified.

## ┬з410 banked seeds (cycle 410, KIDS DEEP тАФ one concept, *a creature genuinely different each day you return*, via what evolves; both losers build-complete, `rm -rf`'d after losing to `569-kids-ember-keeper`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 569. NOTE: the ┬з409 banked seeds named `569-conductor-batons`/`570-conductor-baton-motion` are stale number-labels тАФ those slugs are now taken by this cycle's Ember pieces; renumber the conductor seeds on revival.)

Cycle 410 fired a **kids DEEP** triple off ONE massively-bigger concept тАФ *a creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and is genuinely different each day you return; it never resets* тАФ attacked via three things that can evolve across days (BODY / SONG / WORLD), all sharing the lab-first **cross-session `localStorage` persistence** + day-aware growth + analysis-only mic-feeding + kids-safe limiter + a fresh-device demo seed + a ЁЯМЩ next-day time-travel button (so the cross-day payoff reads in <30s at the 06:30 review). Winner shipped = `569-kids-ember-keeper` (the *body-morphology* take тАФ the most literal answer to JURY #6 "a creature genuinely changed tomorrow", the most glance-legible [you SEE it grew], and the freshest vs the existing kids set). Both losers below are complete, build-reviewed real implementations (own folder, pure client-side, no API route, brick-wall limiter, hands-free seed/auto-demo, graceful mic-denied fallback, no-Canvas2D fallback); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT.

- **`570-kids-ember-song`** (`queued`, the biggest *concept* of the trio тАФ RESURRECT for a music-forward / non-glance-only fire) тАФ a child's creature **remembers every melody they ever hummed** and, each day they return, sings back a LONGER, RICHER song woven from everything taught тАФ never the same twice, never reset. Hummed phrases (autocorrelation pitch тЖТ pentatonic snap тЖТ silence-segmented into a phrase of scale-degrees + coarse rhythm, `pitch.ts`) are **appended forever** to a `localStorage` library (`song-memory.ts`, key `resonance.ember-song.v1`); a tiny seeded **generative weaver** (`weave.ts`, Eno *Music for Airports* lineage) recombines the library each visit, sizing the piece to distinct-days returned (growth 1 = one looped phrase; 3+ = several phrases + an octave-down counter-voice; 4+ = a fuller pad bed). Each remembered phrase = one **luminous orbiting strand** in a raw-**WebGL2** creature (`render.ts`, `MAX_STRANDS` 24) that flares when its notes sound. Look-ahead scheduler (25 ms pump, `start(t)` 120 ms ahead) keeps the weave tight; kids-safe limiter; fresh-device seed = 4 phrases across 4 days. **LOST, not on quality:** the cross-day payoff is *audible* (a longer song), so at a SILENT 06:30 glance the abstract strands read less clearly than 569's visibly-bigger body, and the ЁЯМЩ button's reward is a thing you must hear. **Its value:** no lab piece grows the *music itself* across sessions тАФ it's the strongest return-reward concept; ship it when a music-forward kids fire is due (or as 569's cycle-2 "it also sings your grown song"). Ambition 4/5 (#1 cross-session persistence [shared lab-first] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Eno/Tamagotchi/Oliveros + #4 Ember spine). Complete: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`, `render.ts`, `song-memory.ts`, `weave.ts`, `README.md`. Build-reviewed, not browser-verified.

- **`571-kids-ember-nest`** (`queued`, the warmest/most-legible take) тАФ the creature lives in a little **NEST/WORLD that fills up across days**: every visit leaves a permanent **cut-paper flower / star / friend** (matte inline-**SVG** via `feTurbulence`+`feDropShadow`, rAF-via-refs тАФ no per-frame React churn), and each object is also one **sustained C-pentatonic voice**, so a fuller world is literally a fuller, warmer (always-consonant) **additive chord** (per-voice gain `0.16/тИЪn` keeps the sum kids-safe while the texture thickens тАФ the Eno density move). Day-aware: first wake of a new calendar day auto-sprouts one new permanent object; humming/tapping plants smaller flowers. `localStorage` key `resonance.ember-nest.v1`; fresh-device seed = 9 objects across 4 days with `lastVisitDay` = yesterday; ЁЯМЩ next-day button thickens the chord on demand. **LOST:** the accumulating-world framing is thematically **closest to the existing `116-kids-bloom-garden`** (self-seeding singing garden) and a glowing-pond/firefly lineage тАФ the "too similar" risk; and another SVG output nudges the rolling-10 SVG count toward the 4├Ч ban (it sat at 3├Ч). **Its value:** the warmest, most-immediately-legible-to-a-4yo of the three (a busy nest reads instantly), removes Tamagotchi's punishment/death loop (returning is *always* rewarded, never guilt тАФ a deliberate kindness), and the additive-chord-from-world-density is lovely; resurrect when SVG is clear and pair it with a non-overlapping placement pass + a voice cap for months-old worlds. Ambition 4/5 (#1 cross-session persistence [shared lab-first] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Tamagotchi/Reggio Emilia "revisiting"/Eno + #4 Ember spine). Complete: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`, `scene.ts`, `shapes.ts`, `README.md`. Build-reviewed, not browser-verified.

## ┬з408 banked seeds (cycle 408, KIDS WIDE тАФ 3 orthogonal off-glass explorers; both losers build-complete, `rm -rf`'d after losing to `566-kids-shake-band`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max folder now 566)

Cycle 408 fired a WIDE kids triple off three orthogonal **off-glass** inputs (mic-sing / device-shake / camera-color) ├Ч non-banned renderers (WebGL2 / three.js / WebGL2), all dodging the rolling-10 **SVG-output ban (4├Ч)** and every standing jury ban. Winner shipped = `566-kids-shake-band` (device-motion тЖТ three.js batucada band тАФ the freshest off-glass input vs recent kids cycles + the directest "break the calm-sensory autopilot" answer, and ideal for Karel's mobile review since he can literally shake his phone). Both losers below are complete, build-reviewed real implementations (own folder, pure client-side, no API route, brick-wall limiter, hands-free auto-demo, graceful sensor-denied fallback); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT.

- **`565-kids-sing-choir`** (`queued`, the biggest *concept* of the trio тАФ RESURRECT when a non-mic kids cycle is due) тАФ a 4-year-old sings/hums one steady note and **four glowing creature-friends instantly join in live harmony** (major 3rd / perfect 5th / octave), the whole choir gliding with the child's pitch in real time тАФ the child *becomes* the lead of a four-voice chord. Implements **Jacob Collier's live vocal-harmonizer** honestly: detected pitch (YIN-style parabolic-interpolated autocorrelation, RMS-gated, `pitch.ts`) тЖТ C-pentatonic snap тЖТ 4 detuned-oscillator+vibrato voices tracking via `setTargetAtTime` 40ms glides (`audio.ts`), rendered as raw-WebGL2 additive particle creatures (`page.tsx`, ~746 lines, Canvas2D fallback). **LOST on the diversity gate, not quality:** its input is **mic**, exactly what the *immediately prior* kids cycle (406 clap-canon) used тАФ repeating the previous kids cycle's primary modality is the "too similar" trap. Also the riskiest unverified surface (pitch detection on a breathy 4yo soprano in a noisy room; it flags wanting a 3тАУ5-frame median smoother + higher RMS gate). Distinct from the adult `114-live-harmonize` (piano-roll viz) and from `280-echo-canyon`/`179-voice-monster` (those echo *sequentially*, this harmonizes *simultaneously*). **Its value:** no kids piece does live simultaneous vocal harmony тАФ ship it the next time the diversity audit clears mic. Ambition 3/5 (#2 5 subsystems + #3 Collier; #1 not clean тАФ live-harmonize exists). Complete: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`, `README.md`. Build-reviewed, not browser-verified.

- **`567-kids-color-garden`** (`queued`, the off-the-couch explorer) тАФ point the tablet's **rear camera** at anything colorful in the real world and that color **grows a singing plant** in a glowing WebGL2 garden; warm reds = low notes, cool violets = high, every color welcome, no goal. Implements **Scriabin's *clavier ├а lumi├иres*** hueтЖТpitch map (redтЖТC3 тАж violetтЖТD5) honestly. Subsystems: `getUserMedia(environment)` тЖТ offscreen-2D central-patch `getImageData` тЖТ RGBтЖТHSV with 20┬░/24-frame **hysteresis** (`vision.ts`), Scriabin hueтЖТC-pentatonic map + brick-wall-limited synth + always-on C2+G2 pad (`audio.ts`), instanced additive WebGL2 plants growing rootтЖТbloom over ~1.5s with in-shader hsv2rgb (`render.ts`, ~392 lines), hue-cycling auto-demo for the camera-denied path. **LOST:** camera-color is thematically adjacent to the existing `368-kids-rainbow-quest` (foraging quest) and camera is the jury-flagged trodden input lane; it is also the most **lighting-fragile** for the 06:30 hands-free glance (low light / fluorescent flicker destabilize the patch average). **Its value:** the *open-creation* (vs quest) framing + the world-becomes-music exploration is genuinely lovely; resurrect when the camera lane is clear and pair with a more robust dominant-color extractor (k-means / saturation-weighted, not a flat average). Ambition 3/5 (#2 5+ subsystems + #3 Scriabin; #1 not clean тАФ color-foraging exists at 368). Complete: `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `vision.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`. Build-reviewed, not browser-verified.

## ┬з407 banked seeds (cycle 407, ADULT DEEP тАФ splat spine cycle 2; both build-complete, `rm -rf`'d after losing to `564-piano-splat-cathedral`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief)

- **`563-piano-splat-ewa`** (`queued`, the reconstruction-grade renderer тАФ RESURRECT for cycle 3) тАФ the lab's most technically honest Gaussian-splat renderer: **full EWA covariance projection** (per-splat 3D covariance ╬г = R┬╖diag(s)┬╖тАж┬╖Rс╡А from a quaternion; analytic perspective Jacobian J; ╬г' = T╬гTс╡А; 2├Ч2 conic inversion; eigenvalue-bounded quad) with **premultiplied alpha-over** + per-frame back-to-front depth sort, driven by Karel's real piano (audio.ts + synth fallback). It LOST to 564 only because the *experience* is another orbitable glowing cloud (adjacent to 557's galaxy), where 564 is a categorically new experience (a building his music raises). **Its value:** the true-EWA math is the cleanest #1-technique in the splat spine тАФ the obvious **cycle-3 move is to swap 564's simplified two-axis anisotropy for 563's full covariance projection** тЖТ a reconstruction-grade cathedral. Complete files existed: `page.tsx` (idle demo + Begin), `splat-renderer.ts` (~28kB, all math hand-rolled: quatToMat3 / computeCovariance3D / projectCovariance / invertConic / gaussianRadius), `audio.ts`, `README.md`. Build-reviewed, not browser-verified (numerical fragility on degenerate/off-axis conics is the main risk; it added a 0.3px low-pass regularizer).

- **`562-piano-splat-aurora`** (`queued`, the ribbon/sheet renderer) тАФ anisotropic splats stretched into flowing **aurora ribbons** (each splat carries a 3D principal axis тЖТ screen-space rotation ╬╕ + (╧ГMajor,╧ГMinor); bright/treble notes = thin sharp ribbons, dark/bass = fat puffs), depth-sorted alpha-over with a small additive emissive core for luminosity (Anadol teal/magenta/violet palette). LOST: also a "cloud you orbit," conceptually adjacent to 557. **Its value:** the *anisotropy-from-velocity-tangent* trick (splats elongate along the audio-driven flow) is a clean, cheap way to make sorted splats read as silky sheets тАФ fold into any future splat piece that wants ribbons over puffs. Complete: `page.tsx`, `splat.ts` (~22kB), `audio.ts`, `README.md`. Build-reviewed, not browser-verified.
