### Banked ┬з406 (WIDE **kids** non-winners тАФ TEXT seeds, folders removed; renumber on revival, max folder now 559):
Cycle 406 fired a WIDE kids triple off three orthogonal **off-glass** inputs (mic / camera / shake) ├Ч three different renderers (SVG / three.js / Canvas2D), all dodging the rolling-10 finger-on-glass ban. Winner shipped = `559-kids-clap-canon` (micтЖТSVG, Steve Reich phasing тАФ the jury #4 "time-tension piece, but for children" answer). Both losers below are complete, build-reviewed real implementations (own folder, pure client-side, no API route, brick-wall limiter, hands-free auto-demo, graceful sensor-denied fallback); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT.

- **`560-kids-shadow-band`** (camera silhouette, NO ML тЖТ three.js particle creature тЖТ zone-gated pentatonic band) тАФ `queued`. **What if a 4-year-old's SHADOW became a glowing creature, and dancing through the air played a band тАФ no controller, no reading, just their silhouette of light?** INPUT camera frame-differencing (no MediaPipe/TF тАФ `getUserMedia`тЖТ96├Ч72 offscreen canvasтЖТ24├Ч18 motion-energy grid vs captured background + prev frame, IIR-smoothed) ┬╖ OUTPUT **three.js** ~4,096 additive THREE.Points blending toward active grid cells (a luminous "moving aura," not a sharp outline тАФ correct for frame-diff) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE optical-motion-energyтЖТ3 vertical instrument zones (left bells / center warm-pad / right marimba, rate-limited, motionтЖТgain+brightness) ┬╖ VIBE embodied/awe/your-body-becomes-light. Master `gainтЖТlowpass8kтЖТDynamicsCompressor(тИТ10/20:1)`; synthetic Lissajous-blob auto-demo runs with zero permission, hands off to real camera, resumes after 4 s still; `text-rose-300` camera-denied + pointer fallback. Named refs **Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974)**, **Daniel Rozin** mirror works. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [no-ML silhouette + zone synth + three.js creature + auto-demo = 4] + #3 named refs; #1 contestable тАФ camera-bodyтЖТinstrument is the most-used kids lane [537/545/554/258/423/419/268/295], the fresh element is the no-ML frame-diff silhouette-as-particle-creature, discounts cleanly; #5 not claimed). Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (565), `audio.ts` (191), `vision.ts` (149), `README.md`. **Why it didn't win (cycle 406):** the most embodied/"wow", but the **most redundant input lane** for the kids set (camera-bodyтЖТsound has the most siblings) AND the **most fragile for the 06:30 hands-free glance** тАФ frame-differencing is lighting-sensitive (fixed `MOTION_THRESHOLD=18` floods on variable light; needs adaptive calibration) and needs a lit room + camera grant, where the winner's SVG needs neither. **Resurrect** when the camera/body lane is scarce again, or pair the no-ML silhouette with adaptive-threshold calibration; a strong "body becomes light" register if Karel wants embodied.
- **`561-kids-rainmaker`** (device SHAKE / `devicemotion` accelerometer тЖТ granular percussion тЖТ Canvas2D storm) тАФ `queued`. **What if a 4-year-old could SHAKE the tablet like a rainstick to summon a storm тАФ gentle shake = drizzle, hard shake = downpour + thunder + lightning?** INPUT **`devicemotion`** linear-acceleration magnitude (NOT tilt/orientation тАФ raw shake energy, `тИЪ(ax┬▓+ay┬▓+az┬▓)` capped 30 m/s┬▓, EMA ╬▒=0.18 тЖТ 0тАУ1 intensity; iOS 13+ `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` in the Start gesture; desktop pointer-shake / mash-button fallback) ┬╖ OUTPUT **Canvas2D** pooled rain streaks (density тИЭ intensity┬▓, ~7┬░ angle) + landing splashes + jagged lightning bolt with white-flash decay + breathing cloud + 8-dot intensity HUD ┬╖ TECHNIQUE **Xenakis stochastic grain cloud** тАФ per-frame Poisson spawn N grains тИЭ intensity┬▓ (triangle osc, C-pentatonic C4тАУA5, 8 ms attack / 80тАУ230 ms decay, 40-voice pool via counter + `osc.onended`), high-intensity Poisson check fires thunder (180тАУ400 Hz noise, 2.8 s) ┬╖ VIBE weather/dynamic-sensory (RESPONDS to vigor тАФ not a static glow toy). Master `grainsтЖТgainтЖТlowpass9kтЖТDynamicsCompressor(тИТ10/20:1)`; sine-envelope auto-demo storm (6 s period) from frame one, hands off to real shake >0.05; `text-rose-300` denied notice. The `intensity┬▓` quadratic knee makes the drizzleтЖТdownpour transition feel like *summoning* (~40% shake = storm). Named ref **Iannis Xenakis тАФ stochastic granular clouds** (*Achorripsis* 1957 / *Analogique B* 1959; shake magnitude = the Poisson ╬╗ rate). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [devicemotion shake + granular engine + Canvas2D storm + auto-demo = 4] + #3 named ref Xenakis; #1 not claimed тАФ granular + accelerometer both have priors; #5 not claimed). Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (447), `audio.ts`, `drawRain.ts`, `README.md`. **Why it didn't win (cycle 406):** the most robust voice-pooling + a clean Xenakis bind, and shake is a genuinely fresh off-glass input (distinct from 553's tilt/orientation), but the **least conceptually surprising** of the three тАФ "shake тЖТ weather texture" reads as a sensory toy where the winner's Reich-phasing-for-kids is a genuinely novel idea AND answers a named jury provocation. **Resurrect** when a shake/percussion input is wanted, or fold the granular grain-cloud engine into a richer weather-composition piece (steer rain *type* by tilt while shake sets density).

## SPINE: Xenharmonic Drone (started Cycle 403 тАФ the jury 2026-06-12's named 4/5 chase: "538 capped at 3 only because it's a one-off тАФ make it a spine and it's the first 4")
**The thread:** *the just-intonation / BohlenтАУPierce harmonic lattice stops being something you TAP and becomes a living place тАФ a self-drifting La Monte Young "Dream House" drone that wanders the Tonnetz via the comma pump and never returns home.* Extends `538-xenharmonic-lattice` (cycle 1, a static SVG Tonnetz you click). **Cycle 2 (403, SHIPPED):** `552-dream-house` тАФ a fully **autonomous long-form (>5 min, ~14-min arc) generative drone pilgrimage**: a walker steps the lattice every 4тАУ8 s biased to unvisited nodes, sustaining the nearest 2тАУ6 nodes as a slow-crossfading pure-ratio chord; an 8-phase arc (gatheringтЖТascendingтЖТfloweringтЖТtritaveтЖТradianceтЖТdissolvingтЖТrecedingтЖТstillness) drives density (2тЖФ6 voices), a drifting master lowpass (700тЖФ4800 Hz), a ┬▒0.4-octave register breath, and a 4-stop tuning migration (5-JIтЖТBтАУPтЖТ19-EDOтЖТback); the syntonic comma (81/80) guarantees the pitch never recloses; SVG Tonnetz with a glowing comet-trail + accumulating visited-ghost dots makes the journey visible; HUD shows elapsed/phase. Zero permission, runs itself (ideal 06:30 glance); tap = optional "exhale" to bloom a fresh region. Master `gain тЖТ drifting lowpass тЖТ DynamicsCompressor(20:1, тИТ10 dBFS) тЖТ destination`; per-voice gain `0.55/voiceCount`, 8-voice hard cap. Ambition **3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [walker + crossfading drone synth + long-form arc engine + SVG render = 4] + #3 named refs [La Monte Young & Zazeela *Dream House* / ├Йliane Radigue / Euler Tonnetz / BohlenтАУPierce / Partch / syntonic comma] + #4 spine cycle 2 тАФ the jury's exact ask). **#1 the contestable case** тАФ *first deliberate long-form (>5min) stateful evolving piece* is a counts-as-#1 in the manual, but 514/526 are arguably already long-form autonomous, so it discounts to 3/5 honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** тАФ arxiv cs.SD June 5тАУ12 2026 had zero JI/microtonal/pitch papers (still server-ML); said plainly. **No API route** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; no mic/camera/network/secrets). **Cycle 3 (planned):** fold in the banked steering layers below so the pilgrimage is *steerable but still autonomous by default* (grab-the-wheel), and/or bind a genuinely <14-day xenharmonic/JI finding for the long-missing #5.

### Banked ┬з403 (DEEP non-winners тАФ TEXT seeds, folders removed; renumber on revival, max folder now 552):
- **`550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage`** (VOICE-steered) тАФ `queued`. Same autonomous drone-pilgrimage core, plus a "ЁЯОд Sing to steer" layer: `getUserMedia` тЖТ `AnalyserNode` тЖТ autocorrelation pitch detector; the sung pitch pulls the walker toward the nearest JI node so you can *lead* the pilgrimage by gliding your voice, releasing back to free drift on silence. INPUT voice/mic (off-glass) ┬╖ OUTPUT SVG Tonnetz + comet-trail ┬╖ TECHNIQUE pitch-detectionтЖТlattice-pull + sustained pure-ratio drone ┬╖ VIBE tune-yourself-into-the-drift. *Promising:* the most *musical/embodied* of the three тАФ "tune your own voice into pure ratios" is a lovely cross-modal hook; the right cycle-3 grab-the-wheel layer to port onto 552. *Caveat that lost it:* the builder honestly flagged the autocorrelation detector as basic (octave-confusion + noise-floor issues on a real voice), so the steering is the least reliable; and 552's pure-autonomous form is more glance-robust + the cleaner long-form #1-attempt. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (837 lines), `audio.ts`, `tuning.ts`, `README.md`.
- **`551-tilt-pilgrimage`** (TILT-steered) тАФ `queued`. Same core, plus "ЁЯУ▒ Tilt to wander": `DeviceOrientationEvent` (with the iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` flow) maps `gamma`тЖТfifths-axis bias and `beta`тЖТthirds-axis bias so you *lean your body through* the lattice; a draggable on-screen tilt-pad is the desktop/no-sensor fallback; held level it free-drifts. INPUT device-tilt (off-glass) + pad fallback ┬╖ OUTPUT SVG Tonnetz + comet-trail + a level/horizon indicator ┬╖ TECHNIQUE orientationтЖТlattice-drift-bias + sustained pure-ratio drone ┬╖ VIBE lean-into-the-harmony. *Promising:* the most *physical* embodiment (you tilt through fifths and thirds); the desktop tilt-pad makes it laptop-usable too тАФ a strong second cycle-3 steering axis alongside 550's voice. *Caveat that lost it:* tilt needs the iOS permission dance + a real device to shine (Karel's 06:30 glance would mostly see the pad/autonomous), and it's a steering layer on the same core rather than a bigger swing than 552's long-form arc. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (775 lines), `audio.ts`, `tuning.ts`, `README.md`.

## SPINE: The Living Earth (started Cycle 373 тАФ a SECOND live multi-cycle spine, jury 2026-06-09's "restart a multi-cycle commitment" + "extend 437's live-data lineage, nobody is")
**The thread:** *play the living Earth from a live planetary data stream, tuned to a non-Western / expressive system, on a luminous data-world.* Extends `437-wiki-pulse` (the lab's only live-external-data piece тАФ jury called it "the freshest concept" and flagged it unextended) from human-activity into the **geophysical/planetary** domain, and breaks the recent adult **latent-image monoculture** (AI-image OUT was count-banned at 4├Ч). Born from RESEARCH ┬з373 (real-time stream sonification is going *infinite/fatigue-resistant* [arXiv 2605.21874, May 21 2026] and *non-Western-tuned* [arXiv 2602.14560, gamelan, Feb 2026]). **Cycle 1 (373, SHIPPED):** `463-terra-gamelan` тАФ USGS live earthquakes тЖТ **gamelan-slendro/pelog-tuned** bell-globe (three.js Earth; depthтЖТpitch, magтЖТloudness, lonтЖТpan; 24h stateful accumulation + an energy-driven drone bed). Ambition 3/5 (#2+#3+#4). **Cycle 2 (375, SHIPPED):** `471-helios-orbit` тАФ NOAA **live space-weather** (solar-wind plasma + IMF Bz + planetary Kp) conducts an **EDM build-and-drop** seen from orbit: a geomagnetic storm is the DROP (sub-bass + 4-on-the-floor kick + harmony **resolves minorтЖТmajor** + auroral ovals igniting around the IGRF poles + magnetosphere bloom), on a dark Earth that carries forward `463`'s Fibonacci-dot-globe. Ambition **4/5** (#2+#3+#4+#5 тАФ the EDM arc cites the ┬з373 arXiv 2605.21874 anchor, within 14 days). Won a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; the two non-winners (`469-helios-aurora` fbm sky-curtain, `470-helios-raymarch` volumetric raymarch) were **deliberately NOT banked** тАФ a grep-audit found they duplicate the register of the loved `262-aurora-particle`тЭдя╕П (whose own banked siblings are `aurora-raymarch`/`aurora-drone-field`); `471`'s orbital globe was the one approach distinct from 262 AND the one that continues this spine. *(The ┬з373 banked `464-helios-aurora`/`465-terra-pulse` EDM siblings are now **superseded** by `471` тАФ same concept, shipped; leave as historical, do not resurrect as-is.)* **Cycle 3 (planned):** add a second live planetary layer (space weather тКХ seismic on ONE Earth) and polish; OR a genuinely-fresh space-weather angle 262 does NOT cover тАФ sonify the **far-upstream CME forecast** (arXiv 2508.13892, Solar Orbiter predicts a storm hours ahead) so the music *anticipates* a drop before it reaches Earth. **No API route needed** anywhere in this spine тАФ all sources are public CORS-enabled, read-only, no auth, no secrets; each piece has a synthetic fallback so it demos with no network.

## SPINE: The Resonant Room (started Cycle 377 тАФ the adult #4 spine; explored across temperatures)
**The thread:** *a sympathetic resonant room тАФ an instrument played INTO a tuned acoustic space that rings back тАФ explored from warm to cold.* **Cycle 1 (377, SHIPPED):** `475-resonant-room` тАФ Karel's *Welcome Home* piano into a **key-tuned N=8 Householder-matrix Feedback Delay Network** (Jot / StautnerтАУPuckette) that rings IN KEY and **resolves to the tonic on release** (the warm partner). **Cycle 2 (379, SHIPPED):** `483-two-rooms-apart` тАФ the *opposite temperature*: a **live-MIDI**-played room split into **two coupled resonator banks tuned a tritone apart** that beat against each other (no tonic, suspended dissonance), with a **real-time PlompтАУLevelt/Sethares roughness** readout; **resolution is the player's act** тАФ drag detuneтЖТunison and the beating fuses. Ambition **4/5** (#1 first-Web-MIDI-INPUT + #2 + #3 + #4; #5 not claimed тАФ refs foundational). Won a DEEP 3-way fire; the jury (2026-06-10) explicitly asked to *deepen a spine* (not grab a 5th DSP primitive) тАФ this is an *extension*, one room тЖТ two. **Cycle 3 (381, SHIPPED):** `486-third-room` тАФ adds a THIRD room a **just-fifth (702 ┬в = 3:2)** above Room A (its partials lock onto A's, so AтЖФC is consonant) as a **bridge**: blend C in, find the **pivot note** where all three rooms momentarily agree, then collapse the tritone тАФ *negotiate* the dissonance to rest rather than just collapsing it. Folds in BOTH banked cycle-3 ideas at once тАФ the **steepest-descent pivot-note suggestion engine** (from `481`, glows the notes that most lower three-room roughness) AND the **WebGPU compute vorticity field** (from `482`, the starved renderer; roughness тЖТ per-room vorticity, Canvas2D fallback) тАФ plus the new third-room mechanic (implements `483`'s own documented cycle-3 idea). Ambition **4/5** (#2 5 subsystems + #3 refs + #4 spine cycle 3 тАФ the truest *extension*: oneтЖТtwoтЖТthree rooms; #1/#5 honestly not claimed). Hits jury (2026-06-10) #1 (tension resolved *through action*) + #2 (deepen, don't grab a primitive) + #3 (ban three.js, pick the starved WebGPU). Won a DEEP 3-way fire (resolution-mechanic axis). **Cycle 4 (planned, pre-scoped from this fire's banked siblings):** (a) port `485`'s **whisper panel** тАФ a fixed "Notes that ease the tension тЖТ" list with predicted %-improvement + a derived gradient arrow on the detune slider (the most legible 06:30 read); (b) add `487`'s **roughness landscape + shared-control "descend toward rest" autopilot** as a second resolution axis (feel the slope of the tritoneтЖТfifth negotiation; keep it opt-in/overridable so it never becomes a pre-baked release). **No API route** тАФ pure client-side Web Audio + Web MIDI + WebGPU/Canvas2D; no secrets.

### Banked ┬з381 (DEEP non-winners тАФ TEXT seeds, folders removed; renumber on revival, max folder now 486):

The two cycle-2 tritone rooms unchanged, but the centerpiece is the cleanest realization of the steepest-descent *partner*: for every candidate pitch C3тАУC6 it analytically estimates the marginal PlompтАУLevelt roughness if that note were added, ranks by most-negative delta, and renders the top 3 as emerald keyboard glows + a live "Notes that ease the tension тЖТ" panel with predicted %-improvement; a finite-difference detune gradient (derived, not hardcoded) drives a direction arrow on the slider. INPUT live-MIDI/on-screen/QWERTY ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGPU compute vorticity field (curl-noise, ~4000 particles, Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE two-room roughness + steepest-descent note suggestion ┬╖ VIBE cold tension you resolve by following a whisper. *Promising:* the most legible hint UX of the fire тАФ the explicit named-notes panel reads instantly at a 06:30 phone glance; port it onto `486` as cycle 4. *Caveat that lost it:* the smallest conceptual step (a hint layer bolted onto the existing two rooms) vs. `486`'s structural third-room extension. INPUT live-MIDI/on-screen/QWERTY + the landscape ball ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGPU compute vorticity field (Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE two-room roughness + visible gradient-descent landscape + note hints ┬╖ VIBE feel-the-slope-home. *Promising:* makes the steepest-descent idea *playable* and tangible тАФ add it to `486` as a second resolution axis (feel the tritoneтЖТfifth negotiation's slope). *Caveat that lost it:* the auto-descent risks reading as a pre-baked release (the jury's #1 explicitly wants the *listener* to resolve through action), and the landscape-vs-detune curve leans clinical/Ikeda; keep any port opt-in + overridable. ## SPINE: The Wave Field (kids) (started Cycle 378 тАФ a kids #4 spine paralleling the adult Resonant Room; physical-modeled acoustic fields you tap, see, AND hear)
**The thread:** *a real solved 2-D wave field (FDTD digital-waveguide mesh, Van DuyneтАУSmith ICMC 1993) is the instrument тАФ the audio and the visual are the same field тАФ grown across cycles from one pond to many coupled ponds.* **Cycle 1 (378, SHIPPED):** `478-kids-wave-pond` тАФ tap ONE luminous pond, watch real waves spread/reflect/interfere, hear that solved field (three.js render; FDTD AudioWorklet). **Cycle 2 (382, SHIPPED):** `489-kids-pond-pair` тАФ the jury (2026-06-10 #2) named extension: **TWO coupled wave fields** joined by a sympathetic channel (`K=0.08` always-on whisper: a ripple in pond A excites pond B), plus a tangible floating **lily pad carrier** that bobs on the waves, drifts to the channel, and physically *carries energy across* to ring the other pond тАФ a visible sound-messenger for a 4yo. Dual pentatonic registers (A low C3-pentatonic, B high C4-pentatonic) тЖТ always harmonize. Renderer moved OFF the jury-banned three.js тЖТ **Canvas2D** (dodges three.js + the WebGL2 4├Ч count-ban). Ambition 3/5 (#2 two FDTD solvers + cross-pond coupling + carrier physics + pickup synth тЙе3 ┬╖ #3 Van DuyneтАУSmith 1993 + sympathetic coupling ┬╖ #4 spine cycle 2 тАФ an *extension*, not a 5th primitive; #1/#5 honestly not claimed). Won a DEEP 3-builder fire (coupling-mechanic axis). **Cycle 3 (planned, pre-scoped from this fire's banks):** add `488`'s child-controllable coupling vine and/or its WebGPU-compute FDTD path; lean into `487`'s explicit cooperative two-kids framing.

Same two coupled FDTD ponds, but the **coupling constant K (0тАУ0.25) is a draggable glowing vine/bridge** the child pulls wide (a splash floods across) or pinches shut (each pond sings alone) тАФ the *coupling itself* is the mechanic. Renderer = **WebGPU compute** FDTD (WGSL storage-buffer ping-pong, `@workgroup_size(8,8)`) with a CPU **Canvas2D fallback** (identical sim). INPUT multi-touch + draggable bridge ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGPU compute (Canvas2D fallback) тАФ the lab's starved GPU-compute lane ┬╖ TECHNIQUE two coupled FDTD fields + child-set sympathetic coupling ┬╖ VIBE warm coupled water you tune. *Promising:* the sharpest answer to "the coupling is the mechanic you play" + the starved-renderer diversity prize. *Caveat that lost it:* a coupling-strength slider is abstract for a 4yo (vs. 489's concrete visible carrier), WebGPU likely falls back to Canvas2D on Karel's review phone anyway, and the GPU path has a documented half-step coupling lag; 486 also just refreshed WebGPU (no longer 0├Ч). Two coupled FDTD ponds joined by a fixed glowing channel (`K=0.12`); a splash in A visibly/audibly wakes B; explicit **"two kids each claim a pond"** cooperative framing (the KIDS.md social-bonding gap). Dual-palette `ImageData` Canvas2D render (pond A navyтЖТcyan, pond B violetтЖТrose); channel strip brightens with cross-edge energy. INPUT multi-touch (two hands) ┬╖ OUTPUT Canvas2D ImageData height-map ┬╖ TECHNIQUE two coupled FDTD fields + fixed sympathetic channel ┬╖ VIBE warm cooperative water. *Promising:* the cleanest, lowest-risk cooperative two-player realization + a tidy dual-palette renderer. *Caveat that lost it:* the coupling is fixed (nothing to play with) тЖТ lowest surprise of the three; 489's carrier object and 488's draggable vine both give the child more to *do*. Didn't win: the "sing onto the target line" mechanic is well-trodden, and child-voice pitch tracking is the least-certain subsystem [breathy/uncertain 4yo intonation vs CMND<0.20 + 46ms buffer latency]. **Strong bank тАФ the lab's purest embodied-voice kids toy** [the jury's "sing, don't poke"]; resurrect by de-risking child-voice [lower CMND threshold, shorter buffer] and adding cubic-bezier contour + a delay reverb.)*

## SPINE: The Latent Piano Room (started Cycle 367 тАФ the jury's #1 ask, restarting the dead-since-414 multi-cycle axis)
**The thread:** run the closed audioтЖТimageтЖТaudio loop (born in loved `441-latent-listening-room`) on Karel's **actual recorded piano**, deepening over multiple cycles. **Cycle 1 (367, SHIPPED):** `448-piano-phrase-painter` тАФ musical-structure listening (onset/phrase/chroma/dynamics) drives *when & what* is dreamed; image color bends the real playback back. **Cycle 2 (369, SHIPPED):** `454-piano-caption-loom` тАФ the single template-prompt is replaced by an **iterative multi-agent caption refinement loom**: specialist proposers (scene/palette/motion/style) draft a caption, a **Critic agent** scores it against the music's valence-arousal target and the proposers **revise** over 3 visible rounds (DraftтЖТRevisedтЖТFinal, confidence rising, changed words highlighted) тАФ the prompt visibly *improves* before the image regenerates. Realizes arXiv 2512.23320 (music-derived captions + VA emotion) + the iterative-refinement loop of T2I-Copilot/ImAgent (RESEARCH ┬з369), and mirrors the lab's own plannerтЖТbuildersтЖТcritic orchestration. **Cycle 3 (371, SHIPPED):** `457-piano-image-duet` тАФ the *other* half of the loop finally closes: the dreamed image no longer only *filters* the piano, it **re-composes** it. A glowing scan-line sweeps the dreamed image leftтЖТright reading it as a **spectral score** (image-as-spectrogram): each column's vertical brightness profile drives a 24-partial additive bank, YтЖТfrequency **quantized to the detected key** (always consonant/warm тАФ resolves on purpose), brightnessтЖТamplitude, producing a shimmer-choir voice that **duets** Karel's real piano. Realizes **Art2Mus** (arXiv 2602.17599, Feb 2026 тАФ direct visualтЖТmusic conditioning, no imageтЖТtext; RESEARCH ┬з371) in the **Xenakis UPIC / MetaSynth** image-as-score lineage. The scan-line makes "the image is singing the piano" *visible* тАФ the spine's legible/instructional lane. **Cycle 4 (planned, ~373):** resurrect a sibling below (the **improviser** counter-melody or the **granular cloud**), or fold them into 457 so the duet has melody + texture + spectral layers; and/or fold in `452`'s visible council HUD / `453`'s affect-atlas as a viz layer. **Open dependency:** a real **Welcome Home** track ID (the runtime `journey_paths` IDs aren't in the static repo тАФ `448`/`454` default to the Ghost recording `549fc519тАж`); the same ask blocks `424-welcome-erosion`. Karel: paste a WH recording ID and the spine runs on the album.

## Banked from Cycle 372 (WIDE **kids** fire тАФ three genuinely-unrelated grep-clean fresh registers, the named tool against the jury's "learned to go deep, forgot how to go weird"; winner shipped = `460-kids-ball-pit` [the lab's FIRST many-body collision physics]. Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations [own folder, pure client-side, no API route, no `_shared` imports, brick-wall limiter, 4-s hands-free auto-demo, WebGL fallback notice]; folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. **Numbered as built (461/462) тАФ renumber on revival; max folder now 460.**)

### `461-kids-storm-conductor` тАФ tap the storm sky and a **branching bolt of lightning SINGS as it cracks**. INPUT touch (tap / hold-to-grow / drag) ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGL2 additive-bloom line-tree (over a Canvas2D star/cloud backdrop) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE **fractal lightning via recursive random-midpoint-displacement** (`buildBolt()`: subdivide cloudтЖТtap segment, jitter midpoints тКе by length├ЧroughnessтЙИ0.45, recurse depth 4тАУ7; spawn 3тАУ8 forks from interior points; two-layer white-hot-core + soft-blue-glow render) ┬╖ VIBE dramatic-but-warm storm. Audio: main channel a band-passed sawtooth gliss 180тЖТ2000 Hz ("crack"), each branch **tip** a staggered FM bell on a D-major JI hexachord (D E FтЩп A B CтЩп тАФ multiple taps = consonant stacked chords), warm low-passed-noise thunder ~120 ms later, continuous pink-noise + 38 Hz sub storm bed. Refs **Drilian "How to generate shockingly good 2D lightning effects"** (midpoint-displacement) + **Prusinkiewicz & Lindenmayer, *The Algorithmic Beauty of Plants* (1990)** (L-system branching). *(banked sibling тАФ ambition ~3/5 [#1 fractal-lightning is a grep-clean lab-first viz technique + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named-ref]. Didn't win: lightning effects are well-trodden creative-coding ground [lower surprise than a singing collision-pit], and it flags a real 06:30 risk тАФ `gl.lineWidth` is clamped to 1 px on many GPU drivers, so the bolts can render thin; resurrect by switching to triangle-strip quads for the channel so width is driver-independent. Near-ship; the dramatic-weather lane.)*

### `462-kids-gear-garden` тАФ spin one cog and a **garden of meshing gears turns; the gear tooth-RATIOS ARE the harmony**. INPUT circular touch-drag (spin) + tap-to-add-gear ┬╖ OUTPUT WebGL procedural cogwheels (`geargl.ts`, GLSL ES 1.00, WebGL1/2-compatible) + Canvas2D glow/label overlay ┬╖ TECHNIQUE **meshing gear-train kinematic solver** (BFS from driver, ╧Й_child = тИТ╧Й_parent ├Ч teeth_parent/teeth_child, exponential angular friction) where **integer tooth ratios map directly to just-intonation frequency ratios** (24:16 = 3:2 fifth, 8:16 = 1:2 octave, 20:16 = 5:4 third); spin faster тЖТ lowpass cutoff rises тЖТ brighter chord. Per-gear triangle-osc + lowpass, Karplus-ish pluck on add, soft C2-E2-G2 drone so it's never silent, master compressor/limiter. Refs **Harry Partch *Genesis of a Music*** (small-integer ratios = consonance) + mechanical **music-box/barrel-organ** lineage + **Antikythera mechanism** (gears as ratio machines). *(banked sibling тАФ ambition ~2тАУ3/5 [#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named-ref; #1 gear-ratio-as-harmony is a fresh framing but gears-as-instrument isn't a cleanly-novel primitive]. Didn't win: the most *contemplative* of the three [risk of reading as a quiet drone vs. the jury's loud/weird ask], and the "ratio = interval" payload is the subtlest to feel at age 4. The single most beautiful CONCEPT of the fire тАФ the machine's structure literally IS the chord; resurrect as an adult/all-ages piece where the ratio-harmony pedagogy can breathe, or pair with a visible ratio-readout. Near-ship.)*

## Banked from Cycle 371 (DEEP **adult** fire тАФ Latent Piano Room CYCLE 3, one concept *let the dreamed image **re-compose** the piano, not just filter it*, three imageтЖТmusic recomposition attacks; winner shipped = `457-piano-image-duet` [image-as-spectrogram additive resynthesis]. ### `458-piano-image-improviser` тАФ the dreamed image **improvises a counter-melody**: `extractImageFeatures()` downsamples the image to 16├Ч12 тЖТ k-means-ish hue buckets тЖТ diatonic scale degrees (in the detected key), brightness-gradient тЖТ melodic contour, local-variance/edge-density тЖТ note density/rhythm; a plucked triangle voice (8тАУ12 dB under the piano) improvises in-key, synced to phrase boundaries, with Markov anti-repetition and **always resolves to tonic on the final note**. HUD: 4├Ч3 region markers pulse when their note fires + a piano-roll ribbon. Refs **Art2Mus** (direct visualтЖТmusic) + **David Cope EMI** / Markov improv. *(banked sibling тАФ the most "agentic" take, the most on-brand for Karel's managed-agent-design work; folds naturally with `454`'s loom for cycle 4. ~1246-line page + 532-line improv.ts, build-reviewed. Risk to verify on real hardware: a counter-melody over expressive piano can clash rhythmically even in-key тАФ tune density/timing on real ears.)*

### `459-piano-image-grains` тАФ the dreamed image becomes a **granular synthesis cloud**: every sampled pixel is a grain seed тАФ xтЖТstereo pan, yтЖТpitch quantized to the detected key, hueтЖТwaveform timbre (warm huesтЖТsine, coolтЖТtriangle), brightnessтЖТgrain gain; a lookahead scheduler (100ms horizon, тЙд24 concurrent grains, Hann-window envelopes, limiter) layers a shimmering textural cloud whose character *is the image's character* over Karel's piano, density tracking RMS. Glowing grain particles drawn at the exact sampled image positions. Refs **Art2Mus** + **Curtis Roads** *Microsound* / **Xenakis** stochastic grain clouds. *(banked sibling тАФ the most texturally beautiful / atmospheric; the textural cycle-4 candidate. ~927-line page + 353-line grains.ts, build-reviewed. Risk to verify: grain-cloud reads as ambience more than a legible compositional act, and тЙд24-grain scheduling perf on a low-end phone.)*

## Banked from Cycle 369 (DEEP **adult** fire тАФ one concept *a multi-agent caption pipeline composes, from Karel's real piano, the caption a latent image is dreamed from*, three technical attacks; winner shipped = `454-piano-caption-loom` [iterative proposeтЖТcritiqueтЖТrevise]. Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations [each ~2150тАУ2220 lines, correct guarded FAL route, real-audio default]; folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. **Numbered as built (452/453) тАФ renumber on revival; max folder now 454.**)

### `452-piano-agent-council` тАФ the VISIBLE multi-agent studio: a council of specialist agents each propose a caption clause and a Director weights+merges them, live on screen *(banked sibling тАФ the most legible "agentic studio" take; the strongest cycle-3 VIZ layer + the most on-brand for Karel's managed-agent-design work)*
Same real-piano chain as `454` (`<audio crossOrigin>` default `/api/audio/549fc519тАж`, file-drop, warm CтАУAmтАУFтАУG7тАУCmaj9 resolving synth fallback тЖТ `createMediaElementSource` тЖТ AnalyserNode 2048 тЖТ reverb/compressor/master). `council.ts` (336 ln): five deterministic agents тАФ **Scene** (locale from onset-density+energy+phrase), **Palette** (color from modality/consonance/dominant-pc), **Motion** (turbulence from RMS+onset-rate/arousal), **Style** (Anadol/Akten base + Russell-quadrant emotion modifier), and a **Director** that computes valence (modality+consonance) ├Ч arousal (RMS+onset-density), places the music in Russell's circumplex (serene/joyous/tense/melancholic), and **weights** the merge (Palette up when valence is decisive, Motion up when arousal is high). The visible centerpiece: a labeled **card per agent** that lights up and shows its proposed clause + a **Russell circumplex dial** with a moving valence-arousal dot + the Director's caption assembling clause-by-clause. Image at phrase boundaries / onset clusters (тЙе7s, тЙд1 in flight); imageтЖТaudio loopback (brightnessтЖТlowpass+shimmer, warmthтЖТreverb); 501тЖТsynthesized plasma/blob/particle field, council stays live, amber "no image key" badge. Built files: `page.tsx` (1079), `council.ts` (336), `analysis.ts` (243), `field.ts` (278), `synth.ts` (180), guarded `api/route.ts` (28), `README.md` (97). Refs: arXiv 2512.23320 ┬╖ T2I-Copilot 2507.20536 ┬╖ ImAgent 2511.11483 ┬╖ Russell 1980 ┬╖ Anadol/Akten ┬╖ Bello 2005. Ambition: #2 (тЙе3 subsystems) + #3 (named) + #4 (spine cycle-2 alt). **Why it lost:** its council is a **one-shot** weighted merge тАФ closer to splitting `448`'s template across agents than adding a new *capability*; `454`'s self-critiquing refinement loop is the genuinely new mechanic (and the jury explicitly penalizes re-presenting an existing mechanic). **Why resurrect:** it is the **most legible at a 06:30 phone glance** ("oh, agents are writing the prompt together") and the **most directly on-brand for Karel's oCFO agentic-design competency** тАФ the literal plannerтЖТspecialistsтЖТdirector studio made visible. **Cycle-3 fold-in:** use 452's agent-card + circumplex-dial HUD as the visible layer ON the 454 loom (show WHICH agent proposed each clause AND watch it get critiqued).

### `453-piano-affect-atlas` тАФ the EMOTION-CARTOGRAPHY take: the music's live valence-arousal coordinate is a glowing comet tracing the Russell circumplex, and the dreamed image is the "view from" that emotional point *(banked sibling тАФ the cleanest VIZ-diversity dodge; the emotional-arc view)*
Same real-piano chain + analysis as `454`/`452`. Separate `affect.ts` (127 ln) computes smoothed valence (modality+consonance) and arousal (RMS+onset-density) тИИ[-1,1]; `council.ts` (199 ln) runs specialist proposers whose **weights are set by the affect coordinate's quadrant** (near serene тЖТ palette warm-soft + motion sparse; near tense тЖТ motion-dominant turbulence) тЖТ one emotion-aligned caption. The centerpiece: a 2D **valence├Чarousal ATLAS** (four soft-zoned/labeled quadrants) with the music's current emotion as a glowing **comet + fading trail**, so you literally watch the *performance's emotional arc* over time; the dreamed image is the "view from" the current coordinate, regenerating on phrase boundary OR quadrant-crossing. ImageтЖТaudio loopback + 501тЖТsynthesized field as the siblings. Built files: `page.tsx` (1112), `affect.ts` (127), `council.ts` (199), `analysis.ts` (250), `field.ts` (320), `synth.ts` (183), guarded `api/route.ts` (28). **NOTE: its `README.md` was left EMPTY by the builder (0 bytes)** тАФ a deliverable miss; the code is complete and build-reviewed, but a revival must write the README. Refs (intended): Russell 1980 ┬╖ arXiv 2512.23320 ┬╖ T2I-Copilot/ImAgent ┬╖ Anadol/Akten ┬╖ Bello 2005. Ambition: #2 + #3 + #4 (spine cycle-2 alt). **Why it lost:** the affect-atlas is more a **HUD than a new capability** (the agents still one-shot a caption), and the empty README broke the exit contract; `454`'s iterative critique is the stronger mechanic. **Why resurrect:** the affect-comet is the most **visually distinct / fresh-modality** of the three (emotion as a place you move through) and the natural cycle-3 alternate VIZ тАФ pair the comet-on-circumplex with the 454 loom so you see BOTH where the music *is* emotionally AND the caption sharpening toward it. **Fix-first on revival:** write the README.

## Banked from Cycle 367 (DEEP **adult** fire тАФ one concept *a latent room that dreams Karel's real recorded piano, audioтЖТimageтЖТaudio*, three technical attacks; winner shipped = `448-piano-phrase-painter` [musically-aware phrase/harmony-driven]. Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations; folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. **Numbered as built (447/449) тАФ renumber on revival; max folder now 448.**)

### `447-piano-latent-room` тАФ the FAITHFUL port: 441's exact spectralтЖТpromptтЖТimageтЖТaudio loop, now on Karel's real recording *(banked sibling тАФ the safest 06:30 read + the cleanest spine foundation)*
`<audio crossOrigin="anonymous">` (default `/api/audio/549fc519тАж`, or file-drop, or 12-TET synth fallback that resolves) тЖТ `createMediaElementSource` тЖТ AnalyserNode тЖТ lowpassтЖТshimmerтЖТreverbтЖТcompressorтЖТmaster. Every frame: RMS energy (8 log bands) + spectral centroid + 12-bin chromagram тЖТ dominant pitch-class (exp-smoothed). Every ~6.5 s: centroidтЖТpalette / energyтЖТdensity / pitch-classтЖТhue over the Anadol base style тЖТ guarded FAL `flux/schnell` (тЙд1 in flight, тЙе7 s apart) тЖТ ~2.5 s cross-fade + Ken-Burns + vignette. Loop-back: 8├Ч6 `getImageData` avg color тЖТ brightness opens lowpass + shimmer, warmth lengthens reverb тАФ on the real playback. CORS-taint guard: analyser all-zero >2.5 s тЖТ auto-swap to synth + amber status. Built files: `page.tsx` (728), `audio.ts` (458), `field.ts` (259), guarded `api/route.ts`. Refs: Anadol *Unsupervised*/*Machine Hallucinations* ┬╖ Akten *Learning to See*. Ambition: #4 (spine cycle-1 alt) + #2 (тЙе3 subsystems) + #3 (named refs). **Why it lost:** it is the *least differentiated from `441`* тАФ re-presents the existing mechanic on a new source, which the jury explicitly penalizes тАФ though it is the safest hands-free read. **Why resurrect:** the cleanest, most reliable spine foundation; ship it if a cycle wants the rock-solid real-audio loop with no analysis risk. **Next-cycle deepening:** it IS the spine's stable base тАФ layer the cycle-2 multi-agent captioning onto this if `448`'s onset-timed regeneration proves too eager/sparse on real piano.

### `449-piano-latent-grains` тАФ the AGGRESSIVE loop-back: the dreamed image RE-COMPOSES the piano as granular re-synthesis *(banked sibling тАФ the strongest cycle-3 deepening candidate)*
A `GranularEngine` schedules Hann-windowed grains (тЙд24 voices тЖТ DynamicsCompressor) off the **decoded** piano buffer (default `/api/audio/549fc519тАж` тЖТ fetch signed URL тЖТ `decodeAudioData`; or file-drop; or an `OfflineAudioContext`-rendered CтЖТAmтЖТFтЖТGтЖТC resolving phrase). The image *re-composes the grains*: **brightness тЖТ grain density + read-head scatter**, **warmth тЖТ pitch-spread (┬▒semitones) + reverb wet**, **texture/variance тЖТ grain-duration jitter** тАФ so a bright busy image scatters the piano into a shimmering detuned cloud, a dark calm image lets it settle back toward the original. AnalyserNode on the grain output drives the ~6 s prompt; full-bleed canvas cross-fades the FAL image with grain motes (pitch-class-colored) drifting over it, or a local latent field when no key. Built files: `page.tsx` (916), `granular.ts` (334), guarded `api/route.ts`. Refs: Curtis Roads *Microsound* (2001) ┬╖ Anadol *Machine Hallucinations* ┬╖ rides loved `227-paths-granular`тЭдя╕П + `323-latent-condensation`тЭдя╕П. Ambition: #4 (spine cycle-1 alt) + #2 + #3. **Why it lost:** graining a *real* recording is the highest browser-verification risk (mush/artifact danger) for a build-only sandbox тАФ but on pure surprise it was the closest contender. **Why resurrect:** it is the literal answer to the spine's cycle-3 goal тАФ the image *reshapes* the music, not just filters it; fold its granular loop-back into the spine once `448`'s base is browser-verified. **Next-cycle deepening:** add a transient-preserving grain mode so attacks survive, and let onset/phrase detection (from `448`) gate grain bursts to musical events.

## Banked from Cycle 366 (DEEP **kids** fire тАФ one concept *a child paints a living singing GALAXY of light by moving in front of the camera*, three technical attacks; winner shipped = `444-kids-aurora-hands` [bare-hands WebGPU-compute galaxy]. Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations; folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. **Numbered 445/446 to avoid colliding with the now-shipped 444 тАФ renumber on revival; max folder now 444.**)

### `445-kids-light-river` тАФ paint a glowing, singing river of light with ANY whole-body motion тАФ no model, no WebGPU, the most robust take *(banked sibling тАФ the resilient maximum-06:30-reliability ship)*
Model-free **optical flow**: the webcam is downscaled to a 64├Ч48 grid, per-cell `|frame_t тИТ frame_{t-1}|` gives a motion-magnitude field (noise gate 0.04 + trailing-glow decay 0.82 so a quick wave leaves a streak), which **advects a 40 000-particle WebGL2 ping-pong-FBO** aurora (GLSL update pass pushes velocity by the local motion gradient тАФ coarse Lucas-Kanade/Horn-Schunck via neighbour-texel differencing; bloom + additive composite for the glow). Audio = continuous C-major-pentatonic chord-cloud (16 voices, left-of-frameтЖТlower+left-pan / rightтЖТhigher+right-pan via StereoPanner, motion energyтЖТdensity+brightness, 7-min root drift, 22s filter LFO, never-silent bed, тИТ6dB/20:1 limiter, master 0.20). Ghost-fallback: 3 Lissajous "ghost hands" inject motion so the galaxy+music are alive with no camera; deniedтЖТghost continues with a `text-rose-300` notice. **No MediaPipe, no WebGPU, no network, no API route** тАФ the safest 06:30 phone read (widely-supported WebGL2). Refs: TouchDesigner optical-flow ("the machine perceives *that* something moves", derivative.ca 2026) ┬╖ Memo Akten *Learning to See* ┬╖ Refik Anadol particle-flow ┬╖ Jos Stam *Stable Fluids* (advection). Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3-subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why it lost:** WebGL2 (3├Ч recent) + optical flow (already in `221`/`295`) are the least-diverse/novel of the three, and "waveтЖТlight streams" is the least surprising vs. 444's gather/scatter-a-galaxy. **Why resurrect:** it is the most robust/reliable kids motion piece the lab has тАФ ship it when a cycle wants maximum delivery reliability or when WebGPU/camera-model risk is unacceptable. **Next-cycle deepening:** try a true GPU optical-flow pass (Lucas-Kanade in a fragment shader) and a directional (not just magnitude) field so strokes have flow direction.

### `446-kids-star-swarm` тАФ your whole BODY becomes a constellation: wave your arms and swarms of glowing singing stars stream off your hands, head and feet *(banked sibling тАФ the next kids body-spatial ship, essentially ready)*
**MediaPipe PoseLandmarker** (lite, CDN-loaded) tracks 11 joints (wrists/elbows/shoulders/hips/ankles/head); each joint is an attractor/emitter for a shared ~29 000-star **three.js `THREE.Points`** cloud (AdditiveBlending, per-vertex color, `DynamicDrawUsage`, orthographic camera so screen-x maps directly). A moving joint surges its swarm bright and streams it outward; at rest stars orbit and drift back. Audio = always-on D-pentatonic pad (root/fifth/octave drifting D2тЖТE2тЖТF#2тЖТA2 over ~6min) + per-joint sustained voices (head=high B3тАУD5, feet=low D2тАУE2 тАФ BANDIMAL "big move=big low sound"), StereoPanner by joint screen-x, ~4-min filter LFO, тИТ6dB/20:1 limiter, master тЙд0.25, 13-min goodnight fade. Ghost-dancer fallback (a procedurally-dancing stick figure of attractors) runs the full swarm+audio with no camera / if the model fails within 4s; `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route** (only the MediaPipe CDN). Refs: MediaPipe PoseLandmarker / BlazePose (Bazarevsky CVPR 2020) ┬╖ MediaPipeтЖТNVIDIA-Flex interactive-particle (derivative.ca 2025тАУ26) ┬╖ Memo Akten/Refik Anadol body-particle flow ┬╖ BANDIMAL (Yatatoy 2017). Ambition 2/5 (#2 + #3). **Why it lost:** three.js OUTPUT is 3├Ч recent (less diverse than 444's WebGPU 0├Ч) and PoseLandmarker-for-kids was just used (`419`); the whole-body register is lovely but less "massively bigger" than the 60k GPU galaxy. **Why resurrect:** the purest whole-body embodied kids instrument тАФ every joint simultaneously an emitter AND a voice; ship it on a kids cycle when three.js isn't over-represented. **Next-cycle deepening:** add gentle constellation-line connectors between a child's own joints (legible "you are the constellation") and a phone-speaker check on the per-joint StereoPanner spread.

### `443-the-vanishing` тАФ a 10-voice ensemble that can only survive your full attention: every time you look away (switch tabs / blur the window / mouse leaves the page / 20s idle) it **permanently loses one voice it can never get back**, moving only toward silence *(banked sibling тАФ the purest "go-weird" answer to the jury's sharpest critique; the next adult "weird" ship, essentially ready as-is)*
- **Tags** (a genuinely never-used input): INPUT = **visitor attention / presence** (`document.visibilitychange` + `window` blur/focus + `pointerleave` + ~20s idle timer тАФ never used as an instrument in any prior lab piece) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **spare clinical Canvas2D** (luminous ring-glyphs that breathe with amplitude; on death a 3.5s fracture animation + a permanent dashed-ring "scar" with an ├Ч; a fading center pulse + connection web) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = **irreversible state-erosion / entropy** (kill order ornamentтЖТroots: overtone тЖТ choirs тЖТ shimmer тЖТ arp тЖТ pulse тЖТ shadow тЖТ octave тЖТ fifth тЖТ ground; survivors grow more exposed) ┬╖ VIBE = conceptual / critical / melancholy (the deliberate break from the consonant-resolving rut; expressive 12-TET C-minor, never JI-as-subject).
- **Opening state plays the full ensemble** so a passive 06:30 glance hears the complete piece and the concept reveals itself the instant they switch tabs; "Begin again" fully resets (a new session тАФ the loss was real, but you can start over). Built files: `page.tsx` (550), `audio.ts` (622), `scene.ts` (340). **Refs:** Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969, erosion-as-process) ┬╖ Ryoji Ikeda (clinical data aesthetics) ┬╖ Tehching Hsieh (duration art that costs real time) ┬╖ John Cage (attention IS the score).
- **Why it didn't win:** only because `441` answers a *direct standing Karel directive* (AI-image-in-AV) and the recent window already broke the consonance rut (422/432/437); on pure surprise this was the closest contender. **Resurrect first** for the next adult cycle that wants the jury-#2 "refuses-to-resolve" piece. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 attention-input + erosion engine + Canvas2D scar-renderer + 4 event-listener subsystems ┬╖ #3 named conceptual lineage). Hand-written GLSL 300 es vertex+fragment pipeline (W3C Rz┬╖Rx┬╖Ry orientation тЖТ `u_view` matrix; 3-layer additive Gaussian glow: core + halo + bloom + aim sparkle-ring; `gl.ONE,gl.ONE` blending; ~500-point starfield + 20 singing stars). Same gyro magic-window + `StereoPannerNode` spatial audio + pentatonic + auto-pan + iOS permission + drag fallback as `438`, but a deeper/more-nebula atmospheric look from the raw shaders. Ambition 2/5 (#2 + #3). **Resurrect** when the kids lane wants raw-WebGL2 renderer diversity and a moodier night than three.js sprites give; slightly higher build risk (shader compile / OEM gyro-frame quirks). Build-reviewed (tsc + ESLint clean), zero deps, no API route.

## Banked from Cycle 362 (WIDE **kids** fire тАФ *three genuinely different NON-percussion kids registers*, breaking the recent kids-percussion rut (419 pose-beat / 423 face-beat / 426 euclid / 429 noise-foley were all rhythm). The grep audit this fire killed three would-be #1 claims (fluid, shadow, hand-tracking all already in the lab тАФ the lab is technique-saturated at 432 prototypes), so all three briefs cleared the floor honestly at **2/5** (#2 тЙе3-subsystems + #3 named-ref) and competed on register-breadth + 06:30 phone read. Winner shipped = `433-kids-fluid-paint` (real Stam Navier-Stokes GPU fluid finger-paint, WebGL2 тАФ liquid-dreamy, rides loved `84-wave-fluid`тЭдя╕П + the most-loved paint lineage). Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations (tsc + ESLint clean тАФ 434: 778+64 lines, 435: 1089 lines incl. real HandLandmarker; folder-isolated); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. **Renderer note for revival: Canvas2D is over-represented and three.js/WebGL2 are the cleaner kids lanes; renumber on revival, max folder now 433.**)

### `434-kids-lantern-sky` тАФ tap to launch glowing paper lanterns into a 3D night sky you LOOK AROUND inside, each singing from its own place in true HRTF binaural space *(banked sibling тАФ the cosmic-wonder / 3D-spatial register; the headphone piece)*
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all bans): INPUT = **touch + device-gyro** (tilt to look around; drag fallback) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **three.js** (the freshest renderer lane, 1├Ч recent) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = **true 3D HRTF spatial audio** (`PannerNode` `panningModel:"HRTF"` + `AudioListener` orientation re-derived from the camera quaternion **every frame**, so turning your head genuinely moves the choir around you) ┬╖ VIBE = cosmic/calm/wonder.
- **The mechanic:** night-sky dome (350-point starfield, additive moon halo, warm horizon torus). Camera **rotates only, no translation** (non-nauseating). Tap тЖТ a warm glowing lantern (cylinder body + additive glow-sphere) rises with sinusoidal sway, singing a sustained slow-attack voice (G-major-pentatonic, color=pitch, any combination consonant) positioned at its 3D world coords via its own `PannerNode`; up to ~10тАУ12 coexist, old ones fade high up. Always-on open-fifth ambient pad; `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (тИТ8 dB / 16:1) тЖТ master 0.22 (safe ears). iOS: `AudioContext` + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` inside the Begin tap; auto-demo launches a lantern every ~1.5 s + slow-pans the camera hands-free after 1.8 s. Full three.js disposal + listener teardown. Built files: `page.tsx` (778), `README.md` (64). **Refs:** Web Audio `PannerNode` HRTF / Google Resonance Audio lineage ┬╖ sky-lantern / Yi Peng (Khom Loi) festival image.
- **Why it didn't win:** the most genuinely *spatial* of the three and a clean three.js dodge, BUT its core payoff тАФ the **binaural HRTF field** тАФ is **largely lost on phone speakers** at the 06:30 review (the README admits this; needs headphones), and it's the closest neighbour to an existing piece (`238-kids-tilt-world` already does tilt + 3D + panned audio; the differentiator here is HRTF-vs-StereoPanner, a real but headphone-dependent upgrade). **Revive:** the **headphone/installation** spatial piece, or as the explicit cycle-2 over `238` (the HRTF-tracks-camera engine IS the upgrade); pair with a visual payoff that also reads on phone speakers (e.g. lanterns visibly swirl past as you turn) so it isn't headphone-gated. Reconstructable from this spec. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3-subsystems ┬╖ #3 named).

### `435-kids-air-ribbon` тАФ paint music in the AIR: wave a hand at the camera, a glowing light-ribbon trails your fingertip and SINGS a sustained song (friendly theremin) *(banked sibling тАФ the magical-flowing / sustained-melodic-camera register; the inverse of the recent face/pose BEATS)*
- **Tags:** INPUT = **camera / MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (index-fingertip, analysis-only тАФ never recorded/stored/uploaded) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** (additive-glow trailing ribbon + sparkle particles + dim mirrored backdrop) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = **hand-landmark тЖТ continuous air-theremin** (fingertip Y тЖТ pitch snapped to C-major-pentatonic with 60 ms `setTargetAtTime` portamento GLIDE тАФ sustained/singing, NOT discrete hits; X тЖТ `StereoPannerNode`; hand openness тЖТ timbre/volume) ┬╖ VIBE = magical/flowing/dreamy.
- **The mechanic:** HandLandmarker via `webpackIgnore` CDN dynamic import (zero npm dep), `detectForVideo`, fingertip drives a fading glow-ribbon (hue=pitch, violetтЖТcyan) with a bright Gaussian head + gravity sparkles. 3-osc voice (triangle + sine octave + sine fifth) тЖТ voice gain тЖТ panner тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` (тИТ8 dB / 16:1) тЖТ master 0.22; always-on C3 ambient pad (never silent). **Three-tier always-demoable fallback** (the strength): camera denied / CDN fail тЖТ scripted figure-8 "ghost hand" melody loop immediately; no hand within 2.5 s тЖТ ghost auto-kicks alongside the live feed; pointer/drag fallback always playable on a laptop. Full camera + landmarker + audio teardown. Built files: `page.tsx` (604), `audio.ts` (220), `hand.ts` (142), `README.md` (123). **Refs:** L├йon Theremin (1928) gestural-pitch instrument ┬╖ Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1975) camera-as-instrument ┬╖ MediaPipe HandLandmarker (Google).
- **Why it didn't win:** a genuinely fresh **register** (sustained melodic air-painting тАФ the melodic *inverse* of the recent face/pose percussion) and a superb always-demoable ghost fallback, BUT (a) **camera INPUT** was just used back-to-back-ish in the recent kids ships (`419`/`423`) so reviving it again leans on the camera lane the lab is resting, and (b) **Canvas2D OUTPUT** is over-represented (3├Ч in the last-10, would tip to 4├Ч), where the winner's WebGL2 is the cleaner dodge. **Revive:** the next time the camera lane is fresh and Canvas2D isn't over-represented тАФ it's the strongest *melodic* (vs percussive) camera-kids piece banked; or port the ribbon to WebGL2/three.js for renderer diversity. Reconstructable from this spec. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3-subsystems ┬╖ #3 named).

## Banked from Cycle 361 (WIDE adult fire тАФ *three genuinely unrelated go-weird directions*, one per renderer lane, against the jury's "the lab learned to go deep and forgot how to go weird." Winner shipped = `432-three-body` (N-body gravity sim тЖТ sound, Canvas2D тАФ grep-verified lab-first technique, the most elegant "refuses to resolve"). Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations (tsc + ESLint clean, ~670/841 lines, folder-isolated); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. Both are strong ADULT resurrections тАФ they deliberately diversify OUTPUT (three.js, raw-WebGL2) and INPUT (external-data, keyboard) away from the winner.)

### `430-wiki-pulse` тАФ the LIVE Wikimedia recent-changes firehose sonified: every edit on Earth, right now, bots vs humans *(banked sibling тАФ the real-world-data + "music about something other than music" take; the freshest data SOURCE the lab has)*
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all bans): INPUT = **external SSE data** (Wikimedia EventStreams, public/keyless/CORS, client-side `EventSource` тАФ NO api route, no guard) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **three.js** (rising glowing nodes, additive bloom) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = real-time event-stream sonification ┬╖ VIBE = restless/global/never-resolving.
- **The mechanic:** connects to `https://stream.wikimedia.org/v2/stream/recentchange`, keeps `type==="edit"||"new"`, reads `wiki`/`bot`/`user`/`length.{old,new}` тЖТ `delta`. **delta** (log-scaled) drives amplitude/duration/base-freq (big additions bloom deep & swelling, tiny edits soft high ticks; sign changes timbre тАФ deletions glide down with a gritty high-passed breath); **bot vs human тЖТ two distinct timbres** (bots dry/mechanical/quantized square blips; humans warm/breathy/resonant triangle-through-moving-LPF + noise breath тАФ "you can hear the machines vs the people," the emotional core); **wiki/language тЖТ stereo pan** (westтЖТeast spread + micro-detune); always-on detuned-sine bed; master `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + voice cap. Each edit also spawns a rising three.js sphere (size = log|delta|, humans warm / bots cool, x = pan). **Reliability:** a single Begin gesture creates/resumes the AudioContext (iOS); a **deterministic seeded synthetic firehose** drives the EXACT same pipeline if no live event arrives within ~2.5s (amber "offline demo" notice тЖТ green "тЧП live" when real events flow), so it always comes alive hands-free in ~2s. Built files: `page.tsx` (~670), `README.md`. **Refs:** **Hatnote *Listen to Wikipedia*** (LaPorte & Hashemi, 2013 тАФ the canonical Wikipedia-edit sonification; this is a darker, non-consonant, three.js take) + **Wikimedia EventStreams**.
- **Why it didn't win:** the highest-*concept* surprise of the slate and the most direct answer to the jury's #4 ("zero real-world-data sonification in 15 cycles тАФ sonify an external API, it breaks the mic rut AND the consonance rut in one fire"), BUT data-sonification is **explicitly NOT a lab-first** (`314-solar-wind` / `337`/`418-seismic` already did it тАФ corrected IDEAS ┬з359), so it tops out at **ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3-subsystems: EventSource ingest + Web-Audio synth + three.js render ┬╖ #3 named-ref) where `432` clears 3/5 with a grep-verified #1. **Revive:** the obvious next **real-world-data ship** тАФ it's the freshest data SOURCE the lab has (not seismic/solar) and breaks the mic+consonance ruts together; **fix-first:** add per-region timbre color (currently language is pan-only) and orchestrate dense bursts instead of thinning at the voice cap. Reconstructable from this spec.

### `431-test-signal` тАФ clinical Ikeda / Alva-Noto GLITCH-WALL instrument, raw-WebGL2 data-card *(banked sibling тАФ the purest clinical refuse-to-resolve swing; jury #2)*
- **Tags:** INPUT = **keyboard/touch** (toggle + sculpt channels) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **raw WebGL2** (hand-written GLSL monochrome test-card) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = sine-sweep + look-ahead impulse-grid + bit-crush glitch (no scale) ┬╖ VIBE = clinical/abrasive/unresolved.
- **The mechanic:** three independent signal channels, nothing pitched to a scale. **SWEEP** (key 1) тАФ a continuous log-glide sine (top capped 9 kHz, amplitude rolled off as freq climbs) + gliding sub. **IMPULSE** (key 2) тАФ band-passed filtered-noise clicks scheduled with a Web-Audio **look-ahead scheduler** (Chris Wilson "Two Clocks", 25ms tick / 100ms ahead), `RATE`/`DENS` controls, no pitch. **GLITCH** (key 3) тАФ bit-crush via quantizing `WaveShaperNode` + sample-hold playbackRate + stutter gate, `RATE`/`BRGHT`. All тЖТ master gain тЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (тИТ6 dB / ratio 20) тЖТ analyser тЖТ out. Raw-WebGL2 GLSL data-card: sweep-tracking scan line, density-shifting barcode field, impulse-strobed columns (localized + soft, **no full-screen strobe**), glitch displacement/block-noise, a live oscilloscope trace of the master output; `prefers-reduced-motion` тЖТ `u_calm` dampens everything. **Reliability:** Begin creates/resumes the ctx in-gesture (iOS), then auto-sequences SWEEPтЖТIMPULSEтЖТGLITCH (~0.3/2.1/4.2s) hands-free, then fully interactive (cards тЙе44px + keys). Built files: `page.tsx` (~841), `README.md`. **Refs:** **Ryoji Ikeda** (*test pattern* / *dataplex* / *data.matrix*) + **Alva Noto / Carsten Nicolai** (*Xerrox*, clicks-and-glitch).
- **Why it didn't win:** a genuine, safety-serious commitment to the Ikeda/Alva-Noto idiom (un-snapped glide, real look-ahead scheduler, dependency-free bit-crush, GLSL data-card driven by live audio state) тАФ but **ambition 2/5** (#2 + #3; refuse-to-resolve is the *framing*, not a novel technique) and the lab already swung at refuse-to-resolve twice recently (`357-shatter`, `422`), so it's the second piece at the same mandate rather than a new capability. **Revive:** ship next time the adult lane wants the *pure clinical* register on its own renderer (raw-WebGL2, distinct from 357's DOM/CSS and 422's grid); **deepen-first:** make the impulse grid a programmable pattern sequencer and the glitch channel player-triggerable as discrete one-shots (both self-flagged) to push it from "ambient generator" to "instrument." Reconstructable from this spec.

## Banked from Cycle 360 (DEEP kids fire тАФ *finger-paint where the brush's TEXTURE is its SOUND, noise not notes*. Winner shipped = `429-kids-texture-paint-tap` (impulse+resonator foley, Canvas2D, discrete crunch/pop/tap/scratch/splash тАФ the lab's first pure-NOISE kids instrument by touch, jury #1 for kids). Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations (~900тАУ1300 lines, folder-isolated, ESLint-discipline followed); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. Shared thesis: every kids sound toy maps to pentatonic PITCH; these make the whole palette NOISE/TIMBRE. **Renderer note for revival: Canvas2D is now 4├Ч in the trailing window тЖТ 428 (WebGL2) is the cleaner lane; renumber on revival, max folder now 429.**)

### `428-kids-texture-paint-morph` тАФ subtractive noise-morph on a raw-WebGL2 painterly canvas *(banked sibling тАФ the BEAUTIFUL take + the obvious cycle-2 deepening)*
- **Concept:** same toy as 429 (paint a texture, hear it) but the sound is **continuous subtractive synthesis** тАФ an always-running noise bed (white + brown) sculpted live by resonant biquad filters: finger X тЖТ filter centre/brightness, Y тЖТ Q/resonance, drag-speed тЖТ energy. Textures: ЁЯМмя╕П Wind (bandpass-swept brown noise) ┬╖ ЁЯТз Water (resonant bubbling) ┬╖ ЁЯПЬя╕П Sand (narrow high hiss) ┬╖ ЁЯФе Fire (low noise + irregular crackle bursts) ┬╖ тЪб Fizz (wide bright noise + fast tremolo).
- **Render:** **raw WebGL2** (hand-rolled, no three.js) тАФ 3 shader programs + **ping-pong FBO accumulation** so strokes glow and accrete; per-texture procedural appearance (fbm gradients, ripple rings, grain stipple, turbulent fire, sparkle hash). The most visually striking candidate of the fire тАФ a glowing accreting paint canvas, the strongest pull on Karel's loved-paint lineage.
- **Why it didn't win:** continuous morph is less kid-legible than 429's discrete one-dab-one-sound; it uses 3 sub-audible LFO oscillators (marginally less "pure noise" for a zero-pitch-thesis piece); and the 3-program FBO pipeline is the highest perf/build risk on low-end phones.
- **Resurrect as:** the **cycle-2 visual deepening** тАФ port 429's discrete foley *voices* onto 428's WebGL2 painterly accumulation canvas тЖТ a noise-paint that both *crunches satisfyingly* AND *looks gorgeous*. Best kids renderer move while Canvas2D is over-represented. Refs: K├╢hler bouba/kiki 1929 ┬╖ Farnell *Designing Sound* 2010 ┬╖ Kandinsky synesthesia. Touch IN ┬╖ raw-WebGL2 OUT ┬╖ subtractive-noise TECH ┬╖ kids non-tuned VIBE.

### `427-kids-texture-paint-grains` тАФ granular-noise foley brush, Canvas2D *(banked sibling тАФ the granular-texture take)*
- **Concept:** same toy; sound = **granular synthesis of NOISE** via a Web-Audio look-ahead grain scheduler. While the finger moves, a stream of tiny windowed filtered-noise grains plays; drag speed + texture control grain **density / size / brightness / spread**: Sand = dense tiny dry grains ┬╖ Silk = sparse long soft low-passed grains ┬╖ Sparkle = very short bright high grains ┬╖ Rumble = larger low-passed grains ┬╖ Fizz = rapid medium grains. 0 oscillators (genuinely pitch-less). Canvas2D strokes.
- **Why it didn't win:** solid but not the standout on any axis тАФ granular-continuous like 428 but less visually rich; Canvas2D like 429 but less legible than discrete events.
- **Resurrect as:** the granular-texture variant, or fold its grain engine into 428's WebGL2 canvas as a "soft/continuous" mode alongside 429's discrete "dab" voices. Refs: Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001 (granular) ┬╖ Farnell 2010 ┬╖ K├╢hler 1929. Touch IN ┬╖ Canvas2D OUT ┬╖ granular-noise TECH ┬╖ kids non-tuned VIBE.

## Banked from Cycle 359 (WIDE adult fire тАФ *three ways to leave the consonant monastery*, three emotional registers, one per clean lane. Winner shipped = `426-euclid-engine` (adult Euclidean polyrhythm + Reich phasing on **three.js** тАФ the freshest renderer lane, 0├Ч recent тАФ pure percussion / zero tuning, jury #1 for adults). Both siblings are complete, **build-reviewed** (substantial real implementations, ~900тАУ1100 lines each; folder-isolated, ESLint-discipline followed) demoable builds тАФ folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. Shared thesis (jury 2026-06-08 #1+#2): ~13/15 recent pieces resolve to calm consonance; these three each refuse it differently. **Also corrected this fire (RESEARCH ┬з359): real-world-data sonification is NOT a lab-first and is saturated** тАФ `314-solar-wind` already fetches live NOAA SWPC, so the banked `421-solar-drone` would DUPLICATE it; and `9-reaction-diffusion` already exists. Don't revive those as "firsts.")

### `424-welcome-erosion` тАФ Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano, long-form 5-min generative EROSION (a piece about forgetting) *(banked sibling тАФ the intimate register + the vehicle for Karel's actual music)*
- **Question:** "What if a warm intimate piano phrase were played once, then over five minutes slowly eroded through self-feedback + granular decay until it can never return home?"
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all bans): INPUT = **audio-file** (Karel's tracks via the existing `/api/audio/{id}` door + a synth-phrase fallback; NO mic/camera) ┬╖ OUTPUT = Canvas2D (memory-strip + grain motes + fraying waveform) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = **long-form stateful granular/spectral erosion** (monotonic, one-way) ┬╖ VIBE = intimate/decaying/unresolved.
- **The mechanic:** a pure `computeErosion(elapsed)` drives a monotonic trajectory over ~5 min тАФ grain density 12тЖТ1.5/s, grain dur 80тЖТ850 ms, pitch spread 0.05тЖТ~7 st, position jitter 1%тЖТ90%, amplitude 100%тЖТ20%, reverb send 28%тЖТ95%, LPF 7 kHzтЖТ380 Hz тАФ so phrases thin, smear, detune and fragment into a resonant wash that never cadences back. Web-Audio look-ahead grain scheduler (25 ms tick / 120 ms ahead), `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter, 5-phase HUD label (intactтЖТfrayingтЖТdissolvingтЖТerodingтЖТforgotten) + a falling "memory remaining" bar. Auto-erodes the synth phrase ~2 s after Begin (hands-free). Built files: `page.tsx` (~1105), `README.md`. **Refs:** William Basinski *Disintegration Loops* ┬╖ Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* ┬╖ Roads *Microsound*.
- **Why it didn't win:** the strongest fit for Karel's STANDING #1 directive (use his real music) and the most poignant, but (a) it defaults to a **synth** phrase at 06:30 unless Karel pastes a recording ID, so it doesn't actually *showcase* his music hands-free; (b) Canvas2D is 2├Ч in the last-10 (allowed but not the freshest lane the way 426's three.js is); (c) the erosion is granular-adjacent to 422's shatter (distinct тАФ 5-min stateful vs 10-s freeze тАФ but the same neighbourhood). **Revive:** the ship that finally puts a real Welcome-Home track on screen (hand it a known recording ID), or fold its erosion engine onto 422's material. Reconstructable from this spec. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3-subsystems ┬╖ #3 named).

### `425-test-signal` тАФ clinical Ikeda / Alva-Noto GLITCH-WALL, WebGL2 test-card *(banked sibling тАФ the purest *refuse-to-resolve* / "go weird" swing; jury #2)*
- **Question:** "What does a piece that was NEVER consonant sound like тАФ a self-mutating wall of sine-grids, impulse clicks and band-noise in Ikeda's cold register?"
- **Tags:** INPUT = **generative** (no device; optional density/intensity sliders) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **raw WebGL2** scanline/datamosh test-card ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = **glitch-DSP** (clocked impulse trains + inharmonic sine pings + filtered-noise bursts + a mutation engine that re-rolls the grid) ┬╖ VIBE = clinical/abrasive/monochrome/unresolved.
- **The mechanic:** a look-ahead scheduler (25 ms / 100 ms ahead) across 4 layers тАФ HF sine pings at 8 mutually-inharmonic freqs (6317тАУ13711 Hz), 1тАУ7 ms impulse clicks, 5 sub pulses at irrational ratios (37.13тАУ91.53 Hz, no implied root), and an LFO-swept band-noise тАФ with a mutation event every 5тАУ12 s re-randomizing densities/BPF within clinical bounds so it permanently drifts and never locks. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall (тИТ8 dB, 20:1). Auto-starts ~2 s after load (with a "TAP TO START" overlay if the AudioContext is gesture-gated); WebGL2 fails тЖТ DOM fallback meter. Built files: `page.tsx` (~908), `README.md`. **Refs:** Ryoji Ikeda *test pattern* / *datamatics* ┬╖ Carsten Nicolai / Alva Noto. **This finally realizes the ┬з356 banked "test-pattern" Ikeda counter-piece idea.**
- **Why it didn't win:** the purest answer to the jury's #2 (abrasive / never-consonant тАФ the boldest "go weird"), but (a) a wall of 6тАУ14 kHz pings + sharp clicks is a real **06:30-on-phone-speakers fatigue risk** (could read as "annoying" not "compelling" at the review moment); (b) WebGL2 was just used by 423 (1├Ч), where 426's three.js is the cleaner renderer dodge; (c) builder-flagged node-churn at max density on low-end mobile. **Revive:** ship on a fire where a harsh-HF clinical piece fits the review context, or as the desktop/headphone Ikeda reference; pair the mutation engine with a non-mic input. Reconstructable from this spec. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3-subsystems ┬╖ #3 named).

## Banked from Cycle 357 (WIDE adult fire тАФ three *refuse-to-resolve* explorers, one per clean output lane after the diversity audit banned BOTH Canvas2D (5├Ч) and SVG (4├Ч) on top of the jury's mic/Kuramoto/just-intonation bans, leaving only WebGPU / DOM-CSS / audio-only. Winner shipped = `422-shatter-piano` (DOM/CSS granular spectral-freeze that takes a consonant phrase and denies its resolution). Both siblings are complete, **build-verified** (tsc + ESLint clean, project-wide tsc 0 errors) demoable builds тАФ folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. Shared thesis (jury 2026-06-08 #2): ~13 of 15 recent pieces resolve to calm consonance and there is no Ikeda/Akten counter-piece тАФ all three of these *refuse to resolve*. Also logged this fire: **WebGPU compute is NOT a lab-first** тАФ it already shipped in `16-particle-life-gpu`/`55-webgpu-audio-fx`/`130-tsl-particle-compute`тЭдя╕П; the jury/STATE "biggest unclaimed first" framing was wrong (see RESEARCH ┬з357).)

### `420-slime-static` тАФ WebGPU compute physarum slime-mold, sonified as an abrasive non-resolving ROAR *(banked sibling тАФ the biggest GPU swing)*
- **Question:** "What if a living slime-mold network simulated entirely on the GPU were not calm and beautiful but a roaring, ever-shifting wall of sound that refuses to resolve?"
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all bans): INPUT = generative (no mic/camera) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **WebGPU** (3 `@compute` WGSL pipelines + render pass; CPU/Canvas2D fallback) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = physarum agent sim (senseтЖТrotateтЖТmoveтЖТdepositтЖТdiffuse/decay) ┬╖ VIBE = abrasive/industrial/non-resolving (Ikeda/Akten energy).
- **The mechanic:** 262,144 agents in a storage buffer; per-frame agent-step (`atomicAdd` pheromone deposit) тЖТ diffuse+decay ping-pong on a 1024┬▓ trail тЖТ a non-blocking async readback (~12 Hz, staging buffer, never stalls the GPU) extracts density / agitation (variance) / center-of-mass-pan. Those drive 5 sawtooth oscillators at **prime-ratio inharmonic frequencies** (83.2/137.7/211.3/307.1/431.9 Hz), each ring-modulated by an irrational-ratio LFO, + a Q-swept bandpass noise bed + a stochastic 3тАУ8-bit bitcrush waveshaper + irregular burst gating тЖТ DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter. Nothing ever tunes to a scale or settles. Built files: `page.tsx` (~1178 lines, all self-contained), `README.md`.
- **Why it didn't win:** the flashiest technical swing, but (a) **WebGPU compute is no longer a lab-first** (corrected this fire), so the headline ambition deflated; (b) its GPU path most likely shows the smaller CPU/Canvas2D fallback on Karel's 06:30 review device; (c) physarum is an **emergence-sim** тАФ the jury flagged the emergence-sim *reflex* (#6). **Revive:** the lab's reference abrasive-GPU piece, or a desktop-WebGPU-confirmed fire; reuse its physarum compute as a sonification substrate for other inputs. Reconstructable from this spec.

### `421-solar-drone` тАФ live NOAA solar-wind sonification, audio-only / off-screen *(banked sibling тАФ the real-world-data + off-screen take; the natural data-lane cycle-2 to 418-seismic-pulse)*
- **Question:** "What does the live solar wind hitting Earth's magnetosphere sound like тАФ as an eyes-closed drone that, because the data never stops or repeats, can never resolve?"
- **Tags:** INPUT = **external data API** (NOAA SWPC, public/keyless/CORS) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **audio-only / minimal-DOM** (near-black + breathing dot + big numeric readouts; the off-screen lane) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = real-world-data audification (raw тЖТ synth params, no scale) ┬╖ VIBE = cosmic/vast/unresolved.
- **The mechanic:** fetches plasma-1-day (speed/density/temp) + mag-1-day (Bz/Bt) + planetary-K-index JSON (5s AbortController, falls back to a deterministic 144-row G1тАУG2-storm offline sample with an amber notice). Walks the 24h series in ~75s, looping but live-different each session. **SpeedтЖТraw-Hz fundamental** (no scale), densityтЖТpartial richness + noise, temperatureтЖТfilter brightness, **Bz(┬▒)тЖТdetuning/beat-width that swings with magnetic polarity**, KpтЖТagitation + crackle-burst rate. Partials at 1├Ч/2.0├Ч/3.07├Ч/4.13├Ч (irrational) so no two ever land on a shared harmonic node; 1/23 Hz irrational stereo LFO; DynamicsCompressor limiter. Built files: `page.tsx` (~436), `synth.ts` (~357), `data.ts` (~111), `sample.ts` (~154), `README.md`. **Refs:** NOAA SWPC DSCOVR/ACE тЖТ IMAP I-ALiRT 2026 transition (RESEARCH ┬з357, current this month) ┬╖ NASA space-weather sonification heritage (R. Alexander/Goddard) ┬╖ Ikeda *data-cosm*.
- **Why it didn't win:** the strongest **jury-data-lane** fit (extends the loved 418 real-data lane + off-screen + refuses to resolve), but (a) a near-black audio-only screen is the riskiest 06:30 read (the breathing dot + readouts hedge it, but `422`'s legible phraseтЖТdenied arc reads instantly), and (b) real-world-data is no longer a lab-first (418 claimed it). **Revive:** the obvious **cycle-2 of the real-world-data lane** (pair with 418-seismic тАФ earth tremor + sky weather), or fold a minimal aurora-curtain visual onto it. Reconstructable from this spec.
