## ┬з344 тАФ banked from cycle 344 WIDE (kids listening mirrors; winner shipped = 393-kids-vowel-color)

Cycle 344 ran WIDE: three kids "the machine shows what it heard" mirrors, each a *different* analysis + a different non-GPU renderer + a non-D-Dorian tonal world (JURY 2026-06-07 provocation #6: turn the adult analysis-reflex into a kids toy; bans on WebGL2/three.js OUTPUT, MIDI/touch INPUT, D-Dorian). All three were built clean and folder-isolated. 393 won (freshest research anchor + most-avoided renderer + lab-first formant technique). The two below are build-reviewed and ready to resurrect тАФ both retained in `/tmp/dream-losers/` this fire.

### 392-kids-voice-mirror (banked тАФ the robust pitch sibling)
- **Brief:** child sings тЖТ real-time **autocorrelation pitch detection** тЖТ a living **SVG ribbon-creature** traces the melody (pitchтЖТy, RMSтЖТwidth/glow, friendly face at the head) тЖТ a warm **5-limit just-intonation choir on G3** sings the recorded contour back. Renderer = inline SVG (no canvas/WebGL). Named ref = **"Visible Speech" sound spectrograph (Potter/Kopp/Green, Bell Labs, 1947)**.
- **Why strong:** the most *reliable* of the three тАФ autocorrelation pitch is robust on any voice (unlike formants), and the "sing тЖТ hear your own wobbly hum returned as a real choir" payoff is the most emotionally direct. JI-on-G3 sing-back is a genuine non-D-Dorian tonal world.
- **Why it lost:** pitch detection already exists in the lab (331/341/345), so the *concept* is the most familiar of the three тАФ closest to existing pitch toys (341-star-pair, 322-voice-garden). Lowest surprise; named ref is foundational (1947), not recent.
- **Fix-first to resurrect:** swap autocorrelation for YIN/pYIN to kill plosive/breathy glitches; add the "conduct multiple stored ribbons at once for layered choir" and "two creatures = sibling/parent harmony" ideas from its README. Files in `/tmp/dream-losers/392-kids-voice-mirror/` (page.tsx 607 / pitch.ts / synth.ts).

### 394-kids-sound-monster (banked тАФ the most robust + most legible runner-up; STRONGEST resurrect)
- **Brief:** child's voice **timbre/dynamics** (RMS loudness + spectral centroid brightness + ZCR roughness) тЖТ a **morphing SVG blob-monster** (soft/dark тЖТ round/cool/calm; loud/bright тЖТ spiky/hot/excited; size=loudness, spikiness=brightness) тЖТ **purrтЖФroar sing-back** (JI C3 4:5:6, lowpass cutoff tracks brightness). Renderer = morphing inline SVG path (fbm-perturbed Catmull-Rom). Named ref = **Bouba/Kiki cross-modal sound-symbolism (K├╢hler 1929; Ramachandran & Hubbard 2001)**.
- **Why strong:** the most *robust* analysis (loudness+centroid are trivially reliable on a high child voice тАФ exactly where 393's formant detection is weakest) and the most *legible* magic moment (roundтЖФspiky creature locks in within ~50ms; the same "instant legible payoff" the JURY praised in 384-firefly). Cross-modal sound-symbolism is lab-first. A near-tie with 393.
- **Why it lost:** named ref is foundational (1929), not recent тАФ so it doesn't pay the JURY's freshness debt the way 393's AURORA (2026) does; and SVG output is a renderer the lab has touched, where 393's pure-CSS color field is the more radical rut-break. On reliability alone it arguably should have won тАФ noted honestly.
- **Fix-first / how it deepens 393:** **fold 394's centroid-robustness lesson into 393** тАФ when formant classification confidence is low (high kids voices, /i/ vs /u/), fall back to a brightnessтЖТhue mapping so the color *always* responds even when the vowel is uncertain (rescues 393's one real weakness with 394's one real strength). Standalone resurrect: add autocorrelation pitch so the purr/roar transposes to the child's own fundamental; SVGтЖТPNG "save my monster" snapshot. Files in `/tmp/dream-losers/394-kids-sound-monster/` (page.tsx / analysis.ts / blob.ts / synth.ts).

## ┬з345 тАФ banked from cycle 345 DEEP (spatial-audio, one off-screen concept; winner shipped = 394-soundfield-room)

Cycle 345 ran DEEP on JURY prov #5 (the untouched off-screen/spatial-audio/haptic shelf): three orthogonal spatial-audio attacks on one concept тАФ "an eyes-closed room you navigate by turning your head, headphones on." All three built clean + folder-isolated, all dodge every jury ban (device-orientation INPUT not MIDI/touch; binaural-audio + dim non-WebGL radar OUTPUT; just-intonation VIBE not D-Dorian). 394 won (true coherent-field ambisonics = the genuine lab-first leap past existing per-source binaural pieces, + the tightest/freshest research chain). The two below are build-reviewed and ready to resurrect тАФ both retained in `/tmp/dream-losers/` this fire.

### 396-soundwalk (banked тАФ STRONGEST resurrect / the designated 394 cycle-2 deepening)
- **Brief:** an eyes-closed binaural room you move THROUGH, not just turn inside. 6 fixed-position HRTF `PannerNode` voices on an E2 just-intonation overtone palette scattered on a plane; the virtual listener **drifts forward continuously** while device-orientation yaw (or drag) sets the heading тАФ so voices approach, bloom (gain swell + arpeggio shimmer <3.5m), and recede behind you. **Lab-first haptic leg:** `navigator.vibrate()` fires a voice-specific rhythmic pattern on close approach (<5m) тАФ cross-modal sound+touch embodiment. Auto-pilot waypoint demo tours all voices hands-free; drag-to-steer + rose-notice fallbacks. Files: `page.tsx` 383 / `synth.ts` 262 (SoundwalkSynth, DynamicsCompressor limiter, triggerBloom) / `walk.ts` 287 (WalkEngine тАФ locomotion, orientation/drag/auto-demo heading, proximity events) / `map.ts` 114 (string-built top-down SVG map). Named ref = **Janet Cardiff audio walks** + W3C Web Audio spatialization + W3C Vibration API.
- **Why strong:** the lab's **first haptic output** (a genuinely new sensory modality, grep-clean) and the most *embodied* of the three тАФ directly the "haptic" half of jury prov #5 that 394 didn't take. "You walk through the music and *feel* each voice" is the highest-surprise of the slate.
- **Why it lost:** renderer/technique reuse per-source PannerNode HRTF (not a coherent rotatable field, so less lab-first than 394's true ambisonics); named refs foundational, so it pays less of the jury's #5 freshness debt than 394's Jun-2026 ambisonics papers.
- **Fix-first / how it deepens 394:** **this IS the 394 cycle-2 plan** тАФ fold locomotion (translate the listener *through* a true B-format ambisonic field, not just rotate it) + the haptic confirmation into 394. Standalone resurrect: tune the drift speed + proximity thresholds on real ears; add Karel's *Welcome Home* stems as the scattered voices. Files in `/tmp/dream-losers/396-soundwalk/`.

### 395-listener-orbit (banked тАФ the lightweight baseline / fallback path)
- **Brief:** "rotate the AudioListener, not the field" тАФ 6 voices as fixed-position HRTF `PannerNode`s around the origin (A-Lydian just intonation, 220/275/309/330/385/440 Hz, ratios 1/1┬╖5/4┬╖45/32┬╖3/2┬╖7/4┬╖2/1); device-orientation yaw/pitch drives `AudioListener.forwardX/Y/Z` AudioParams via smooth ramps (deprecated `setOrientation` fallback). The browser's built-in HRTF does the binaural тАФ minimal DSP. Inline-SVG radar with a yaw-driven compass arrow; auto-demo sweep + drag fallback. Files: `page.tsx` / `synth.ts` / `orientation.ts`. Named ref = W3C Web Audio PannerNode/AudioListener spec + Google Resonance Audio listener-pose model.
- **Why strong:** the simplest, most-robust path to head-tracked binaural тАФ if 394's hand-rolled 8-speaker decode proves CPU-heavy on mobile, this is the graceful fallback that gets 90% of the effect for 10% of the nodes.
- **Why it lost:** per-source PannerNode HRTF already exists in the lab (7-spatial, 29-scene-spatial), so it's the most *familiar* concept of the three тАФ lowest surprise, foundational ref only.
- **Fix-first to resurrect:** use it as the explicit A/B comparison against 394 ("does a true coherent field actually sound different from rotating the listener?" тАФ a real perceptual question worth a side-by-side). Files in `/tmp/dream-losers/395-listener-orbit/`.

## ┬з346 тАФ banked from cycle 346 (kids WIDE тАФ 2 non-winners; winner shipped = 397-kids-crystal-bloom)

Cycle 346 ran WIDE: three kids pieces, each in a DIFFERENT foreign tonal world ├Ч a DIFFERENT non-GPU renderer ├Ч a DIFFERENT non-banned input (JURY 2026-06-07 bans: WebGL2/three.js OUTPUT, MIDI/touch INPUT, D-Dorian VIBE; provocations #1 force-a-renderer-you-avoid + #2 foreign-tonal-world). All three were build-reviewed clean and folder-isolated. 397 won (cleanest researchтЖТbuild chain + the expensive #5 recent-research criterion + the under-served breath/calm niche). The two below are build-reviewed and ready to resurrect.

### 398-kids-rainbow-roll тАФ tilt a ball of light around a gamelan courtyard, in PURE DOM/CSS `[banked тАФ cycle 346 kids WIDE explorer; the most literal answer to jury prov #1]`
- **Question:** "What if a 4yo could TILT the tablet to roll a glowing ball of light around a courtyard of gongs тАФ and every gong it bumps rings a shimmering Balinese **slendro** tone?"
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all bans): INPUT = **device tilt** (DeviceOrientation beta/gamma тЖТ gravity vector; pointer-drag + auto-demo wandering-gravity fallbacks) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **pure DOM/CSS** (HTML divs + CSS transforms/box-shadow/keyframe ripples тАФ NO canvas, NO svg, NO WebGL) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = 2D gravity physics (velocity + friction + speed-clamp + wall + circle-vs-circle gong collision) + gamelan synth ┬╖ VIBE = bright/playful, foreign-tonal.
- **The tuning:** Balinese **slendro** тАФ ~5 roughly-equal but non-equal-tempered steps, octave **stretched to ~1208┬в**; each gong is two slightly-detuned voices producing the slow beating Balinese musicians call **ombak** ("waves"); soft mallet attack + medium decay; sustained drone so it's never silent; limiter. Sits *between the cracks* of 12-TET so it sounds genuinely non-Western. Ref: Balinese/Javanese gamelan tuning; Colin McPhee, *Music in Bali*.
- **Ambition:** #2 (4 subsystems: tilt physics + DOM/CSS render + gamelan synth + collision) + #3 (named cultural reference) + foreign tonal world + rare renderer (pure DOM/CSS, used ~once in the lab). Build files were: `page.tsx` (DOM courtyard + RAF physics + gravity-source selection + iOS motion permission), `gamelan.ts` (slendro table + inharmonic detuned-pair gong synth + drone + limiter), `tilt.ts` (DeviceOrientation permission + smoothed gravity + liveness check), `README.md`.
- **Why it didn't win:** the purest answer to jury #1 and very fun, but tilt-marble is a familiar lab interaction (cf. loved `169-marble-run`, `384` tilt) and it leans on a *foundational* cultural reference rather than a *recent* one, so it pays less of the #5 freshness debt the jury flagged. **Revive:** ship as the next kids tilt/DOM fire тАФ it's the cleanest pure-DOM/CSS piece the lab has. Reconstructable from this spec (folder `rm -rf`'d; numbers: max committed folder is now 397, so renumber on revival).

### 399-kids-aurora-step тАФ dance at the camera to paint a whole-tone aurora `[banked тАФ cycle 346 kids WIDE explorer]`
- **Question:** "What if a 4yo could DANCE or wave at the camera and their MOTION painted a flowing aurora across the sky while the places they move ring dreamy **whole-tone** chimes?"
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all bans): INPUT = **camera frame-difference motion** (getUserMedia тЖТ 12├Ч8 luminance-diff grid; ANALYSIS-ONLY, never recorded/stored/shown/uploaded; phantom-attractor auto-demo) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** (additive `lighter`-glow aurora ribbons drifting upward) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = frame-diff motion energy per cell тЖТ particle spawn + debounced chime trigger (screen height тЖТ scale degree) ┬╖ VIBE = dreamy/floating aurora, foreign-tonal.
- **The tuning:** **whole-tone** scale (6 equal steps, no perfect fifth, no leading tone тАФ the floating Debussy/Impressionist sound), mapped over ~2 octaves; soft chime voices (sine + partials, slow attack, long tail) + a two-note whole-tone pad so it's never silent; limiter. Ref: Claude Debussy / whole-tone Impressionism.
- **Ambition:** #2 (4 subsystems: camera + frame-diff analysis + Canvas2D aurora + whole-tone synth) + #3 (named reference) + foreign tonal world. Build files were: `page.tsx` (Canvas2D render + RAF + cameraтЖФauto-demo orchestration + privacy notice), `motion.ts` (`MotionTracker`: getUserMedia + frame-diff grid), `chimes.ts` (`ChimeEngine`: whole-tone tuning + chime synth + pad + limiter + per-degree debounce), `README.md`.
- **Why it didn't win:** camera-motionтЖТglow is the lab's comfort zone (jury: 13/15 are screen-camera-ish) and Canvas2D additive glow is a well-represented aesthetic тАФ least *differentiated* despite the foreign whole-tone world; camera permission is also the jury-flagged 06:30-phone-review risk (mitigated by a strong phantom-attractor auto-demo). **Revive:** strong as the kids camera-lane companion (pairs with the loved `101-camera-song`/`104-mirror-draw` lineage); or graft its aurora field onto a future motion piece. Reconstructable from this spec (folder `rm -rf`'d; renumber on revival).

## ┬з347 тАФ banked from cycle 347 (adult DEEP тАФ 1 non-winner; winner shipped = 400-soundwalk-room)

Cycle 347 ran DEEP on the spatial-audio thread's cycle 2 тАФ one concept (*walk through the ambisonic room + feel each voice*), two technical attacks. Both build-reviewed clean + folder-isolated. 400 won (audio-first тЖТ robust on every device; the genuine 6DoF-translation leap past 394's rotation-only field; richer legible running view for the 06:30 glance). The runner-up below is the stronger *pure-embodiment* concept and is the designated next off-screen / cycle-3 candidate.

### 401-feel-the-room тАФ haptic-LED "metal detector for sound": feel your way to the voices eyes-closed `[banked тАФ cycle 347 adult DEEP explorer; the lab's most genuinely off-screen concept]`
- **Question:** "What if you could find your way through a spatial-audio room with your HANDS тАФ eyes closed тАФ a parking-sensor pulse train quickening toward the nearest voice, audio confirming as you arrive?"
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all jury bans): INPUT = auto-walk homing + drag-to-steer + device-orientation heading (NOT MIDI, NOT touch-as-instrument) ┬╖ OUTPUT = binaural HRTF + **Vibration-API haptics as the LEAD channel** + a deliberately dim/optional Canvas2D map (NO WebGL/three.js) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = path-distance soundfield navigation + a continuous nearest-voice haptic pulse-train (audioтЖТvibrotactile, Sound2Hap-style) ┬╖ VIBE = ritual/echolocation, just-intonation D-root overtones, screen-optional.
- **The mechanic:** ~6 JI voices at fixed spots. A homing auto-pilot slews heading toward a target voice and steps forward; the nearest voice drives a **continuous `navigator.vibrate` pulse train whose cycle quickens as you near it** (metal-detector / white-cane); arrival fires a distinct triple-buzz + a harmonic bloom, then it retargets the next voice. The whole point is to work **eyes-closed** тАФ the haptic is the primary wayfinding sense, audio the confirmation. Built files were: `engine.ts` (`RoomEngine`: 6 JI voices тЖТ amp/LFO тЖТ bloom тЖТ distance-LP тЖТ inverse-distance gain тЖТ per-voice HRTF PannerNode тЖТ limiter; `update()` re-spatialiser returning the nearest-voice descriptor; `planHaptics` pulse-train mapping; `ARRIVAL_PATTERN`), `page.tsx` (homing auto-pilot + pulse-train scheduler that re-issues vibrate on a cycle-sized interval + dim map with proximity-pulsing target ring as the visual fallback + drag/tilt manual layers + full teardown incl. `vibrate(0)`), `README.md`.
- **Ambition:** same spine as 400 тАФ #1 (haptic output, lab-first) + #2 (тЙе3 subsystems) + #3 (Google soundfield-navigation ┬╖ Sound2Hap arXiv:2601.12245 CHI 2026 ┬╖ Cardiff / white-cane) + #4 (cycle of the spatial thread) + #5 (Sound2Hap, recent).
- **Why it didn't win:** the more surprising/novel *experience* and the most literally off-screen piece the lab has тАФ but its entire thesis (FEEL where to walk) is **invisible/unfelt on a non-vibrating device** (most desktops, iOS Safari), exactly the 06:30-review fragility 400 avoids by leading with audio; and on a phone the auto-walk + audio reads close to 400's. **Revive:** ship as the next dedicated off-screen / haptic-led fire (it directly answers jury prov #5's embodiment gap), OR fold its quickening homing-pulse into 400 as an optional "guide me to a voice" mode. Reconstructable from this spec (folder `rm -rf`'d; max committed folder is now 400 тЖТ renumber on revival).

## ┬з349 тАФ banked from cycle 349 (adult DEEP тАФ 2 non-winners; winner shipped = 404-comma-pump)

Cycle 349 ran DEEP on a single fresh foreign-tonal concept тАФ **adaptive / dynamic just intonation** (the lab had only *fixed-ratio* JI: 394/397/400 + the *static* click Tonnetz 37-ratio-lab) тАФ via three approaches: comma-drift (404, won), roughness-pedagogy (405), organic glide-drone (406). All three Canvas2D-only (jury #1), 5-limit JI (jury #2), generative-not-analysis (jury #6), autonomous (no MIDI/keyboard/tap). 404 won on: the biggest *concept* ("music that can never come home"), genuine long-form **stateful** drift (the under-served menu shelf тАФ the cents-from-home counter sinks indefinitely), the strongest "huh" surprise (pure tuning literally can't close the loop), AND an immediate JIтЗД12-TET audible payoff. Both seeds below build-reviewed clean + folder-isolated; `rm -rf`'d (max committed folder after this cycle = 404, renumber on revival).

### 405-pure-lock тАФ see AND hear sensory roughness fall to zero (PlompтАУLevelt meter) `[banked тАФ cycle 349 adult DEEP explorer; the lab's most legible/pedagogical JI piece]`
- **Question:** "Can you *watch* dissonance vanish? A held chord glides from 12-TET into pure 5-limit JI while a live sensory-roughness meter collapses toward zero as the partials lock."
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all jury bans): INPUT = autonomous chord-cycler + a manual 12-TETтЗДJI morph slider + Hold-chord toggle (NOT MIDI, NOT tap-as-instrument) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** roughness curve + beating strip (NO WebGL/three.js) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = adaptive JI + **PlompтАУLevelt sensory-dissonance** computed over all sounding-partial pairs ┬╖ VIBE = clinical/instructional, foreign-tonal (roots Eb/Ab/F/B/Gb/E).
- **The mechanic:** each chord (Maj/min/dom7/Maj7/min7/sus2) starts every note at its 12-TET freq, then glides ~3s to its pure 5-limit ratio; ~4тАУ6 real harmonic partials per note so the beating is genuine; roughness = ╬г over partial pairs of `a1┬╖a2┬╖(e^{-3.5x} тИТ e^{-5.75x})`, `x = (0.24/(0.0207┬╖fmin+18.96))┬╖(f2тИТf1)` тАФ high under 12-TET mistuning, ~0 when JI locks. Built files: `page.tsx` (624 lines), `tuning.ts`, `roughness.ts`, `audio.ts` (additive partials + limiter), `README.md`.
- **Ambition:** #1 (lab-first roughness meter + first dynamic JI) + #2 (тЙе3 subsystems: adaptive-tuner + partial-pair roughness engine + additive synth + Canvas2D) + #3 (Plomp & Levelt 1965 ┬╖ Sethares *Tuning Timbre Spectrum Scale* ┬╖ Pivotuner arXiv:2306.03873 ┬╖ Ben Johnston).
- **Why it didn't win:** the clearest *explainer* in the set and the best single-glance see+hear demo, but it reads as a pedagogical instrument rather than a "massively bigger" *experience* тАФ 404's never-comes-home concept is the larger idea. **Revive:** ship as the legible/instructional flagship the jury keeps asking the lab to feed (cf. 358-beat-mirror lineage), or fold the roughness meter into 404 as an optional overlay so you can *watch* the comma-pump chords lock pure. Reconstructable from this spec.

### 406-drifting-choir тАФ sustained voices that keep gliding into pure harmony (Pivotuner drone) `[banked тАФ cycle 349 adult DEEP explorer; the lab's most immersive JI piece]`
- **Question:** "What does it *feel* like to hear a choir keep sliding into purity? 5тАУ7 sustained additive voices retune in real-time to pure 5-limit ratios whenever a wandering pivot moves тАФ a soft shimmer of beats fading to silence as each voice locks."
- **Tags** (clean dodge of all jury bans): INPUT = autonomous ambient + density/drift-speed sliders + canvas drag-to-nudge-pivot (NOT MIDI, NOT tap-as-instrument) ┬╖ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** drifting comet/orb field (NO WebGL/three.js) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE = **Pivotuner-style adaptive JI** with audible glissando re-tuning + multi-timescale generative pivot path ┬╖ VIBE = organic/ambient/Anadol, foreign-tonal, long-form.
- **The mechanic:** a `pivotHz` wanders on three incommensurable timescales (sub-pivot ┬▒2 semitone sinusoid ~60тАУ120s ┬╖ 10-chord-palette rotation 8тАУ55s ┬╖ 6 base pivots Eb3/Ab3/B3/F3/Db4/Gb3); on each move every voice picks the nearest pure 5-limit ratio (across тИТ1/0/+1 octave layers) and `linearRampToValueAtTime`-glides fundamental+partials over 1тАУ2.5s тЖТ you HEAR the beating slow to zero; a "lock" emits an audio+visual bloom. Genuinely different at minute 5 vs minute 1. Built files: `page.tsx` (705 lines), `voices.ts` (additive voices + vibrato + warmth LP + retune glide), `tuning.ts`, `README.md`.
- **Ambition:** #1 (lab-first dynamic JI glide-retune) + #2 (тЙе3 subsystems: voice bank + adaptive-tuner + generative pivot-path + Canvas2D) + #3 (Pivotuner arXiv:2306.03873 ┬╖ La Monte Young *The Well-Tuned Piano* ┬╖ Harry Partch ┬╖ ├Йliane Radigue) + long-form/stateful.
- **Why it didn't win:** the most beautiful and immersive of the three and the strongest long-form *drone*, but the glide-into-purity shimmer is subtle тАФ it can be hard to perceive at a 06:30 phone glance where 404's sinking counter + JI/ET toggle are immediately legible. **Revive:** the designated next **adult long-form JI** DEEP target (pairs with the loved spectral-drift lineage 267/243/323); or use Karel's *Welcome Home* piano as the voices' source so his real music drifts into purity. Reconstructable from this spec.

## ┬з355 тАФ 2026-06-08 (UTC) ┬╖ banked from the cycle-355 WIDE fire (2 strong non-winners тАФ resurrect-ready)

**`419-webgpu-storm` тАФ the lab's FIRST real WebGPU compute shader** `queued` (HIGH priority тАФ the standing jury "first")
The single most-deferred "first" in the lab (JURY 2026-06-08 #3: "WebGPU compute is still never used тАФ claim it, on a non-mic input"). A **WGSL compute pipeline** advects a **500,000-particle storm** by **curl-noise** (incompressible 2D velocity = curl of a value-noise potential) each frame in a storage buffer, plus a pointer attractor; an additive **point-list render pass** draws it (blue/white, no warm tones); field turbulence + pointer force drive an **abrasive, non-tonal audio bed** (bandpass-swept noise + three detuned sub-saws at 41.3/42.9/57.7 Hz + FM grit, all through a compressor тАФ refuses to resolve). **Degrades gracefully:** no `navigator.gpu` тЖТ an amber notice + a **standalone CPU Canvas2D fallback** (4k particles, same curl-noise, same audio). The full piece (`page.tsx`, `gpu.ts` with both WGSL shaders inline, `fallback.ts`, `audio.ts`, README) was **build-reviewed clean** this fire (the builder's `next build` compiled it; folder removed, banked as text). **Why it didn't win cycle 355:** its headline тАФ the GPU compute path тАФ is **unverifiable in the sandbox** AND degrades to the CPU Canvas2D fallback on **mobile Safari (no WebGPU)**, so Karel's 06:30 *phone* review would likely see the fallback, not the headline. **Revive on a desktop-review cycle** (or once you confirm Karel reviews on a WebGPU-capable browser). Ambition тЙе2/5: never-used-technique(#1, WebGPU compute) + тЙе3-subsystems(#2, compute sim + render pipeline + reactive audio + CPU fallback) + named-ref(#3, Bridson 2007 curl-noise ┬╖ Bileam Tschepe / TouchDesigner GPU particles). Diversity: pointer/autonomous INPUT (non-mic) ┬╖ **WebGPU OUTPUT** (never used) ┬╖ GPU curl-noise advection TECHNIQUE ┬╖ storm/abrasive VIBE тАФ clean of all bans. Loved `130-tsl-particle-compute`тЭдя╕П is soft support. Renumber on revival (max folder now 418).

**`420-test-pattern` тАФ a Ryoji-Ikeda test-tone piece that flatly REFUSES to resolve** `queued`
The purest answer to JURY 2026-06-08 #2 ("build something that refuses to resolve тАж nothing abrasive, glitched, or left unresolved тАж make the one that *doesn't* harmonize"). 8 oscillator pairs log-spaced **40 HzтАУ7.8 kHz**, each pair detuned **1.3тАУ7.2 Hz** (share no common divisor тЖТ inescapable, never-locking **beating**); a square-LFO **gate** chops them into clicks/stutters (30тАУ250 ms period, re-randomized each tick so no rhythm ever stabilizes); fast frequency **sweeps**; pointer X тЖТ active band, Y тЖТ gate density / beat rate. Visual = stark monochrome **64├Ч32 data-grid** + barcode stripe + measurement-tick rulers + waveform trace + numeric readouts (Ikeda *test pattern* / *data.tron* aesthetic). Frequencies treated as **measurement data, not pitch** тАФ no scale, no chord, ever. Build-reviewed clean (`engine.ts`, `draw.ts`, `page.tsx`, README; tsc clean); folder removed, banked as text. **Why it didn't win cycle 355:** thinnest on the ambition floor (oscillators + canvas тЙИ 2 subsystems; no genuinely lab-first *technique* тАФ beating/gating are standard), where the seismic winner also satisfies the jury's *named-untouched* data-sonification menu. **Revive** as the lab's standing "abrasive register" counter-piece whenever the consonant-resolving rut needs breaking again. Diversity: touch INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ test-tone/beating/gating TECHNIQUE ┬╖ clinical-abrasive-unresolved VIBE тАФ clean of all bans. Renumber on revival.

## ┬з358 тАФ 2026-06-08 (UTC) ┬╖ banked from the cycle-358 DEEP kids fire (2 build-reviewed non-winners; winner shipped = 423-kids-face-beat)

Cycle 358 ran **DEEP**: one concept тАФ *make a BEAT/sound with your FACE, not a tune* (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker blendshapes тЖТ percussion/timbre, the lab's first faceтЖТrhythm mapping; answers JURY 2026-06-08 #1 rhythm-not-tuning + #6 face-tracking) тАФ attacked three ways, each in a different non-banned renderer. All three were built clean (tsc + ESLint zero in their folders) and folder-isolated. `423` won (most kid-legible discrete kit + the cleanest output-diversity dodge, raw WebGL2). The two below are build-reviewed and ready to resurrect (folders `mv`'d out and removed тАФ reconstructable from these specs + their READMEs were written).

### Seed тАФ `424-kids-face-jam` (face тЖТ continuous NOISE/FOLEY texture, three.js point-cloud тАФ the "go weird" sibling) `[banked тАФ strong; the timbre/abrasive take the jury keeps asking for]`
**Brief:** "What if your face was a CONDUCTOR of a living texture тАФ open your mouth for a big WHOOSH, raise your eyebrows for sparkle/fizz, scrunch up for crunch тАФ a soundscape you sculpt continuously with your expression?" **Continuous** (not threshold/discrete): EMA-smoothed blendshapes drive five parallel **noise/filter foley layers** тАФ `jawOpen`тЖТLP-cutoff+gain of a wind/whoosh; `browUp`тЖТHP shimmer/fizz + tremolo; `mouthPucker/Funnel`тЖТresonant bandpass "wooo" sweep; `cheekPuff`тЖТsub rumble; `noseSneer/browDown`тЖТWaveShaper **crunch** тАФ all through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, with an always-on faint bed and `setTargetAtTime` smoothing (no clicks). **NO pitch, NO scale, pure TIMBRE** тАФ it cannot be hummed. **Output:** **three.js** тАФ a glowing additive **point-cloud of the 478 face landmarks** (hue/size driven by foley intensity) + 200 drifting ambient particles that swirl harder as the texture brightens; resources disposed on unmount. Files were `page.tsx` (561 ln), `audio.ts` (302 ln), `face.ts` (110 ln), `README.md`. **Self-assessment (builder):** unambiguously continuous texture (no oscillator/quantized note anywhere); hands-free ghost-face auto-demo within ~2s; tsc+ESLint clean at `--max-warnings=0`. **What was promising:** the **most surprising / most "weird"** of the three тАФ the strongest answer to the jury's deeper rut ("learned to go deep, forgotten to go weird"; ~13/15 resolve to consonance) and the only one whose subject is *timbre/noise* rather than *rhythm*. three.js OUTPUT is also a clean diversity dodge (0├Ч in the last-10). **Why it didn't win:** for a **4-year-old**, continuous foley is **less immediately legible** than one-face-one-drum (the same reason `419`'s discrete kit beat its continuous siblings) тАФ a toddler may not connect "scrunch = crunch" as fast as "open mouth = BOOM." **To resurrect:** ship as the cycle-2 **timbre/"go-weird"** lane piece (kids *or* adult тАФ it's genuinely an adult Ikeda/Akten-adjacent texture instrument too); or fold its landmark point-cloud render into a future face piece. Refs: Expotion (arXiv:2507.04955, 2025); Ekman-Friesen FACS 1978; MediaPipe FaceLandmarker. Renumber on revival (max folder now 423).

### Seed тАФ `425-kids-face-loop` (face тЖТ looping step-sequencer with compositional MEMORY, Canvas2D) `[banked тАФ the jury's kids-lane "memory/consequence" ask, done as a face toy]`
**Brief:** "BUILD a beat one funny face at a time тАФ make a face to record a drum into a loop, add another face for a second layer, watch your beat grow and repeat forever." A steady **8-step loop at 96 BPM** with a sweeping playhead; threshold+rising-edge+cooldown face detection (`jawOpen`тЖТKICK, `browUp`тЖТHAT, `smile`тЖТSHAKE, `cheekPuff`тЖТTOM) **records the drum onto the step nearest the playhead** (quantized), so it joins the loop and repeats; a **4├Ч8 grid** shows the accumulating pattern, cells light as they fire. The loop **grows** and keeps playing hands-free; a big тЙе64px **Clear** button wipes it. Pure percussion through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; look-ahead scheduler. **Output:** **Canvas2D** (mirrored webcam + the loop grid + per-hit bursts + expression score bars). Files were `page.tsx` (821 ln), `audio.ts` (253 ln), `face.ts` (173 ln), `README.md`. **Self-assessment (builder):** loop visibly grows (ghost demo stamps kickтЖТhatsтЖТshakeтЖТtom over ~8s); every stamped cell is picked up by the scheduler next pass and repeats forever (genuine accumulating memory); auto-demo fires within ~1.2s, tap-grid fallback if CDN fails. **What was promising:** the only sibling with **compositional memory** тАФ the jury's standing kids-lane ask after `350-kids-bump-along` regressed to a memory-less poke-toy; "I made this and it keeps going" is a real consequence model. **Why it didn't win:** **Canvas2D is the over-represented screen renderer** this window (banned-by-count alongside SVG), and a step-sequencer is a more *familiar* form than the WebGL2 mirror тАФ least differentiated despite the nice memory mechanic. **To resurrect:** ship on a cycle where the renderer count has cooled, OR **fold its loop/memory mechanic into the shipped `423`** as a "record mode" toggle (the cleanest cycle-2 deepening of the face-beat thread тАФ gives `423` the memory it lacks). Refs: Expotion (arXiv:2507.04955, 2025); Ekman-Friesen FACS 1978; step-sequencer / loop-station lineage (loved `172-loop-station`тЭдя╕П). Renumber on revival.

---

## ┬з363 тАФ banked siblings from the WIDE adult fire (cycle 363, 2026-06-09)

Both were built to demoable in the cycle-363 fire and lost only to `437-wiki-pulse` on ambition (each 2/5 vs 437's 3/5) and freshness. Both are genuinely worth resurrecting тАФ they answer the JURY's "refuse to resolve / go weird" mandate via inputs the lab is thin on.

- **`436-flow-static` тАФ camera *motion energy* (not landmarks) тЖТ abrasive Ikeda data-noise.** Point the camera at anything; **dense optical flow via 64├Ч48 frame-differencing** (deliberately NOT a MediaPipe landmark model тАФ the genuinely fresh camera technique vs. the lab's `258`/`419`/`423` model-based pieces) drives an Ikeda glitch-synthesis chain (continuous pink-noise data-hum + motion-gated grain noise + 0.5тАУ40/sec white-noise click-burst scheduler + sine-ping spike detector at incommensurable freqs, all through a тИТ8 dB/12:1 limiter) and a **raw WebGL2** fullscreen clinical motion-texture shader (hard cell borders, scanlines, glitch bars, centroid cross-hair). Refs: Memo Akten (optical-flow "Forms") / Ryoji Ikeda *test pattern*. **Why it lost:** camera was used back-to-back recently (419/423) and ambition was 2/5; 437's live-data was fresher. **Why resurrect:** "movement energy, not a body model" is a real, distinct camera lane the lab has never shipped; it's complete and abrasive. **Next-cycle deepening:** pool the per-click `AudioBuffer` allocations (builder-flagged stutter risk under high motion on low-end phones); consider a true GPU optical-flow pass (LucasтАУKanade in a fragment shader) instead of CPU frame-diff.

- **`438-no-input` тАФ a no-input feedback-delay-network self-oscillator (the Nakamura lineage).** No mic, no sample, no oscillator-playing-a-note: a **feedback-delay-network** (Hadamard H4 mixing matrix + resonant bandpass bank in a feedback loop) self-oscillates, kept on the edge of Larsen instability; you sculpt feedback-gain / filter-center / delay-time and the emergent tone swerves wildly тАФ the instability *is* the instrument. Three safety layers (in-path hard clamp + code ceiling at gain ~0.93 + master `DynamicsCompressor`/`WaveShaper` soft-clip) make it impossible to blast. 10 s auto-demo blooms humтЖТhowlтЖТhum; **Canvas2D** oscilloscope (zero-crossing-triggered) + Lissajous phase-portrait + live spectrum. Refs: Toshimaru Nakamura (no-input mixing board) / David Tudor (*Rainforest*). **Why it lost:** the riskiest of the three тАФ the FDN runs in a deprecated **`ScriptProcessorNode`** on the main thread and the self-oscillation "feel" is unverified without a live audio context; 437 was the safer, more surprising ship. **Why resurrect:** `INPUT=generative/no-input` does not exist anywhere in the lab's 320 prototypes тАФ a genuinely fresh category, and the purest possible "refuse to resolve." **Next-cycle deepening (REQUIRED before shipping):** port the feedback loop from `ScriptProcessorNode` to an **`AudioWorklet`** (off-main-thread, not deprecated, glitch-free), then verify in a real browser that it actually self-oscillates musically and that the edge-of-howl ceiling feels thrilling-but-safe.

## ┬з368 тАФ banked siblings from the DEEP kids fire (cycle 368, 2026-06-09)

Both were built to demoable in the cycle-368 "Squish" DEEP fire and lost only to `451-kids-jelly-storm` on ambition (451 stacks 4/5: it binds today's research #5 and is the most literal answer to the jury's "loud/fast/chaotic, resolves on purpose" kids ask, with a legible energy bar). Both dodge every 2026-06-09 ban (WebGL output not Canvas2D; pitched melodic not drum-machine; loud/joyful/resolving not lullaby/clinical) and are genuinely worth resurrecting as cycle-2/3 of the Squish spine. Renumber on revival (max folder now 451).

- **`449-kids-squish-jam` тАФ Verlet mass-spring jelly creatures (three.js).** 4тАУ7 closed rings of ~14тАУ18 point masses with perimeter springs + a **pressure/area constraint** so each jelly squishes flat on impact and puffs back round (Jakobsen, *Advanced Character Physics*, GDC 2001; visual lineage Ash Weeks' *Medusae*). Drag-to-fling, tap-to-poke (dents inward then springs back), two fingers play two creatures; collisions trigger **C-major** mallet notes (sizeтЖТregister, impactтЖТvelocity+brightness), energy swells the pad + lifts the register, hard-hit clusters fire a triumphant tutti chord; always-on warm pad; brick-wall limiter. Auto-demo at 3.5s. Files: `page.tsx` (~19 KB), `verlet.ts` (~8 KB), `audio.ts` (~6.5 KB), `README.md`. Builder: tsc + eslint clean. **Why it didn't win:** the cleanest, safest build, but the *least differentiated* of the three тАФ no fresh-research bind, and the squish-toy mechanic is closest to loved `169-marble-run` (whereas 451's escalateтЖТresolve arc is a genuinely new kids mechanic). **To resurrect:** the calm-but-bouncy companion to 451; or fold its per-point grab (stretch/pinch a single creature like dough) into the Squish spine as cycle-2 ("knead the jelly"). 

- **`450-kids-goo-band` тАФ WebGL2 metaball / signed-distance-field merging goo.** A single full-screen WebGL2 fragment shader renders ~16 blobs as a 2D SDF combined with **Inigo Quilez's polynomial smooth-min** (`smin`, iquilezles.org), so the goo visibly **fuses with a fat liquid membrane and splits apart** тАФ the fusing is the whole point; merged regions blend their hues, with glow/rim/tonemap for a lava-lamp feel. CPU physics for centers (gravity, bouncy walls, spring repulsion, fling), a merge-event detector (deep overlap + closing velocity) тЖТ **F-major** triad chord-stacks; sparkly glockenspiel/celesta bells (sine+triangle + inharmonic FM "ting"); always-on F-add9 pad; brick-wall limiter. Auto-demo ~3.2s. Files: `page.tsx` (~17 KB), `gl.ts` (~6.9 KB), `audio.ts` (~7.4 KB), `README.md`. Builder: tsc + eslint clean (note: builder flagged a mid-build folder-deletion race in the shared `next build` env тАФ verify with `next dev` on revival; the orchestrator confirmed the *winner* 451 builds clean, 450 was not in the authoritative build). **Why it didn't win:** the most visually *surprising* of the three (gooey SDF merge is a strong, kid-legible, lab-fresh visual) and the strongest runner-up тАФ but its physics is "simple CPU wobble + merge," not true soft-body deformation, so the squish is less physical than 451's PBD; and it doesn't bind recent research. **To resurrect:** ship as the SDF-render lane of the Squish spine, or fold the `smin` mergeтЖТchord mechanic into 451 (two jellies touching fuse into a louder chord) тАФ the cleanest cycle-2 deepening, marrying 451's real soft-body physics to 450's gorgeous gooey merge.

## Cycle 370 banked siblings (the two WIDE explorers that lost to `456-kids-ferro-magnet`)

Both were built to demoable in the cycle-370 WIDE kids fire and lost to the winner on the curation gate (the winner is the freshest/weirdest image AND a grep-clean lab-first at ambition 3/5). Both are genuinely strong, dodge every 2026-06-09 jury ban (WebGL2/three.js OUTPUT not Canvas2D; non-pentatonic/resolving not lullaby; voice/pull-release INPUT not over-leaned touch), and are worth shipping or extending. **Renumber on revival** (max folder now 456). Their full READMEs + code were build-reviewed; folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule.

- **`455-kids-sing-cymatics` тАФ VOICE тЖТ WebGL2 grain-migration cymatics (the namesake, embodied).** A child **sings or hums** and ~12,000 glowing sand-grains migrate across a vibrating square plate into the **Chladni standing-wave figure** of that exact pitch, then the plate "sings back" a warm inharmonic bell. The physics is real, not a pre-drawn pattern: each grain gets a jitter scaled by the local vibration amplitude `|f(x,y)|` (antinodes shake grains loose) and is nudged **down `тИЗ|f|` toward the nearest nodal line** тАФ the actual Faraday/Chladni sorting mechanism. Chladni field `f(x,y)=cos(n╧Аx)cos(m╧Аy)тИТcos(m╧Аx)cos(n╧Аy)`; **pitch тЖТ mode (n,m)** (higher pitch = more intricate figure) across **6 plates on a D-Dorian JI hexachord** (D E F G A C, **not** C-pentatonic); loudness тЖТ vibration amplitude. Mic is **analysis-only** (autocorrelation/YIN pitch + octave-collapse + 4-frame vote тЖТ plate; never recorded/played-back/sent, no network). No-mic / denied тЖТ a full auto-demo cycles all six figures hands-free. Files: `page.tsx`, `cymatics.ts` (field + grain sim + GL), `audio.ts`, `README.md`. Builder + orchestrator: eslint/tsc clean. Refs: **Ernst Chladni** (1787) ┬╖ **Hans Jenny** *Cymatics* (1967) ┬╖ **Michael Faraday** (1831, Faraday waves). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: mic pitch/RMS analyser + Chladni eigenmode field + WebGL2 grain-advection sim + additive bell synth = 4; #3 named refs). **#1 NOT cleanly claimed** тАФ `165-cymatics` (adult, audio-FFT тЖТ analytical pattern render) exists; the fresh move is **voice-driven + kids + true particle-migration sim** (grains actually flow to the nodes). **Why it didn't win:** the most "Resonance-shaped" and the strongest *embodiment* (the jury's "sing not poke") тАФ but it's the only 2/5 of the three (sits on the very floor the jury said to climb off), and its central bet (child-voice pitch-detection + 12k CPU-gradient grains at 60 fps on a phone) is the least certain. **To resurrect:** ship as-is (it's near-complete and the auto-demo de-risks the 06:30 read); de-risk by moving the grain sim to a GPU transform-feedback / WebGPU compute pass; or make it the embodied-voice lane of a "make sound visible" spine.

- **`457-kids-pendulum-wave` тАФ pull-and-release тЖТ three.js length-graded pendulum wave (grep-clean lab-first).** Pull back a rack of **15 glowing pendulums** and let go: they start in phase (a straight line), drift into a rolling **traveling wave**, and every ~40 s **snap back into alignment**, ringing a **resolving descending D-major arpeggio** (D5тЖТD3) тАФ not a random shimmer. Classic length-graded tuning `T_k = T_cycle/(K_base+k)` (T_cycle=40 s, K_base=40) so the whole pattern cycles; pure SHM `╬╕_k(t)=A┬╖cos(2╧А t/T_k)` (Galileo small-angle isochronism); each bob rings a bell at its bottom-center zero-crossing; drag-amplitude тЖТ swing size тЖТ loudness; always-on D2+A2 drone; brick-wall limiter. three.js emissive spheres + trails + ring-flashes, violetтЖТorangeтЖТcyan color-by-pitch ramp. **Self-launches on Start** (fully autonomous hypnotic cycle тАФ the *safest hands-free 06:30 read* of the three); tap to relaunch. Files: `page.tsx`, `scene.ts` (three.js + pendulum sim), `audio.ts`, `README.md`. Builder + orchestrator: eslint/tsc clean. `pendulum.?wave` grep-clean (`196-kids-wind-chimes` is wind-driven pendulum *chimes*, not the Harvard length-graded demo). Refs: **Harvard Natural Sciences "Pendulum Waves"** ┬╖ **Galileo** isochronism (*Discorsi*, 1638) ┬╖ **Richard Berg** (Maryland apparatus). **Ambition 3/5** (#1 first length-graded pendulum-wave in the lab, grep-verified; #2 тЙе3 subsystems: pendulum SHM integrator + zero-crossing note scheduler + three.js render + drone/limiter = 4; #3 named refs). **Why it didn't win:** equal ambition to the winner and the most reliable visual тАФ but pendulum waves are a *known classic* (less "huh, didn't know we could do that" than a singing ferrofluid), and it's the least embodied (mostly watch). **To resurrect:** the safe, gorgeous, near-ship kids ship; or extend it as a long-form/state piece (the cycle is already a built-in 40-s structure).

## Cycle 376 banked seeds (Scanned Synthesis тАФ Living Wavetable spine, DEEP non-winners)

Both are complete, build-reviewed real scanned-synthesis implementations (Mathews/Verplank/Shaw, ICMC 2000), folder-removed after curation. They are cycle-2/3 candidates for the new **"Living Wavetable"** kids spine started by `474-kids-scan-bloom`.

- **472-kids-scan-string (open-string variant)** тАФ a giant glowing horizontal STRING of light you PLUCK like a harp; pluck-x selects pitch (C-major C3тАУC5), the wave rings then relaxes to a near-sine. Renderer: **inline SVG** glowing `<polyline>` (the clearest, most legible realization of "the wave you see is the sound you hear" тАФ a flat line is easier to read than a ring). Real AudioWorklet mass-spring + ScriptProcessor + no-audio triple fallback, DynamicsCompressor limiter, 3s auto-demo. **Resurrect** as the Living-Wavetable spine's "harp/zither" sibling, OR fold the pluck-positionтЖТpitch glissando into 474. Honest wart: at low pitch the ~35fps SVG averages sub-period detail (cosmetic). Ambition 4/5 (#1 scanned-synth lab-first + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named-ref + #4 spine).

- **473-kids-scan-ring (closed toroidal halo)** тАФ POKE a big glowing HALO; the dent travels around the ring (circular spring coupling) and the timbre warbles, then relaxes to a perfect calm circle. 6 colored note-zone pads set pitch. Renderer: **three.js** additive ring. The most reference-pure topology (toroidal = purely harmonic modes, Mathews' original). **Resurrect** as the spine's "gong/singing-bowl" sibling. Honest risk flagged by builder: `clientWidth/clientHeight` can be 0 at mount on some mobile browsers тЖТ collapsed ring until first resize (fix: defer GL sizing to a ResizeObserver/rAF). Ambition 4/5 (same stack).

## ┬з377 banked siblings (Resonant Room spine тАФ DEEP fire, 2026-06-10)

Two non-winning parallel approaches to cycle-1 of the new adult "Resonant Room" spine (winner shipped: `475-resonant-room`, a key-tuned Jot/StautnerтАУPuckette FDN). Both are complete, build-reviewed implementations that were removed (per orchestration rule: never commit a non-winner's folder) тАФ resurrect as spine cycle-2/3:

- **`tarab-strings` (was 476)** тАФ Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano continuously cross-excites a bank of ~20 parallel high-Q BiquadFilter bandpass **sympathetic resonators** (sitar *tarab* / piano *aliquot* strings), tuned to a chosen key across 3 octaves; per-resonator AnalyserNode RMS drives a **three.js** field of glowing light-strings that brighten/thicken/vibrate, energy concentrating on the tonic strings as it resolves. Ref: sitar tarab + una-corda aliquot resonance + J.O. Smith *PASP* (CCRMA). Didn't win: the biquad-resonator-bank technique overlaps the lab's existing modal resonators (202/284/286), and three.js is the over-used renderer cluster (471/463/451). **Resurrect as:** the spine's "strings/harp" sibling тАФ its per-resonator energy portrait is the most *legible* sympathetic-resonance read; swap the renderer off three.js (WebGL2 or instanced) to dodge the cluster.
- **`resonant-caustics` (was 477)** тАФ same real-piano source feeding a bank of 16 tuned feedback **comb-filter / digital-waveguide** resonators (Karplus-family, continuous cross-excitation, AudioWorklet + ScriptProcessor fallback); per-comb RMS drives a full-screen **WebGL2 caustic interference field** (16 radial travelling-wave terms, light-on-a-pool-floor) that brightens in-key and calms to the tonic's slow ripple on release. Ref: J.O. Smith waveguide/comb + Schroeder. Didn't win: comb resonators are Karplus-Strong-family (140/184 exist) so the #1 lab-first claim is weaker than the FDN's. **Resurrect as:** the spine's "water/caustics" visual sibling тАФ the caustic field is the most beautiful render of the three; pair it with the FDN engine (475) rather than its own comb bank to keep the novel-technique claim.

## ┬з378 тАФ banked non-winners (cycle 378 WIDE kids fire; winner shipped: `478-kids-wave-pond`, a genuine FDTD 2-D wave field)

Both are complete, build-reviewed real implementations, folder-removed after curation (orchestration rule: never commit a non-winner's folder). Both clear the ambition floor (тЙе2). Resurrect on a future kids cycle.

- **479-kids-duet-bloom (cooperative two-player)** тАФ the lab's **first genuinely cooperative kids instrument**: two glowing creatures, each playing a harmonically *incomplete* fragment (side A = root+fifth, side B = third+octave); the music only resolves into a **full warm chord** тАФ and a glowing **rainbow bridge blooms** across the centre тАФ when *both* players hold their creature at once. A `togetherness` scalar (both active, sustained) drives a build-then-resolve crossfade to the full triad+maj9 and the bloom richness, rewarding group synchrony over a quick tap. Renderer: **inline SVG** (radialGradient/feGaussianBlur creatures + animated bezier-arc bridge + sparkle particles). Dual Pointer-Events tracking by pointerId (left-half тЖТ A, right-half тЖТ B); single-pointer fallback keeps the auto-demo cycling so a solo child still sees the bloom. Refs: **Kirschner & Tomasello 2010** ("Joint music making promotes prosocial behavior in 4-year-olds") ┬╖ **Toca Band** (everyone-plays-in-key ensemble) ┬╖ Rabinowitch et al. 2012. **Ambition 2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs; a *first cooperative* interaction model тАФ weaker #1 since it's an interaction pattern, not a DSP/render primitive). **Didn't win:** lost to 478's clean grep-verified #1 lab-first (FDTD) + higher ambition; and its rAF-triggered full-SVG React re-render is a perf smell. **Strong bank тАФ the highest-surprise concept of the fire and KIDS.md's explicitly-flagged social/cooperative gap.** Resurrect as: a true **2-device WebRTC** kids duet (genuinely two children, two phones), OR fold the synchrony-engine into an existing instrument as a "play-together bonus." Honest wart: switch the rAF loop to imperative DOM-attribute writes (drop the per-frame React re-render) before shipping.

- **480-kids-sing-bird (voice-pitch sing-along)** тАФ SING or hum and your **pitch** flies a glowing bird up/down through a warm night sky; gliding near a scrolling sparkly "perch" rings a warm bell note (C-pentatonic тАФ no wrong notes). Core: real-time **monophonic pitch detection** (YIN CMNDF, self-implemented, no libs) on the live AnalyserNode buffer each frame, with a clarity gate (0.55) + RMS floor so silence/noise doesn't jump the bird; log-smoothed f0 тЖТ SVG bird Y; mic is **analysis-only** (never recorded/uploaded). Synthesized 21-note voice-contour auto-demo flies the bird with **no mic** so it always demos; mic-denied тЖТ friendly `text-rose-300` notice + demo continues. Renderer: **inline SVG** (radialGradient/feGaussianBlur bird, scrolling perches, gradient sky). Ref: **de Cheveign├й & Kawahara, "YIN, a fundamental frequency estimator for speech and music," JASA 2002**. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 YIN ref). **Didn't win:** sing-to-the-line is a well-trodden mechanic (twice-considered: it was banked ┬з374 as `466-kids-sing-kite`), and pitch-tracking-as-controller, while fresh-ish, is a weaker lab-first than 478's FDTD. **Bank** as the lab's standing voice-pitch candidate; resurrect by pushing past "fly along a line" тАФ e.g. a **two-voice harmony-landing** game (two children must land a consonant interval тЖТ genuine polyphonic pitch detection, a real next lab-first). Cleanup wart: the builder left 3 unused sibling helper files (`pitchDetect.ts`/`audioEngine.ts`/`perchScroll.ts` тАФ page.tsx is self-contained); delete them on resurrect.

## Cycle 380 banked seeds (DEEP polytonality explorations тАФ losers, NOT committed)

### 486-kids-mood-prism тАФ the truest Petrushka tritone (RESURRECT as cycle-2 deepening of the polytonality spine)
Twist a glowing prism with one finger; a single white drone (one key) splits into TWO fanning colored beams = two tonal centers pulling apart by the twist angle. Angle 0 = unison/white; wide = C major + **FтЩп major (the literal Petrushka tritone)** ringing against each other, panned by refracted angle. Canvas2D refraction fan + halo, AnalyserNode pulse, never auto-resolves (rests where the child leaves it). **Why it was strong:** the only sibling using the *real* tritone Petrushka pairing тАФ maximal genuine tension (the jury's #1 ask), and a beautifully legible "bend consonance into ambiguity and back" gesture. **Why it lost to 484:** single-finger rotational twist is slightly harder for a 4yo than dragging two glowing things; Canvas2D-only (fewer subsystems). **Resurrect:** fold the tritone-split + refraction-fan visual INTO the two-suns spine as an "intensity" mode, OR ship as cycle-2 to give the spine its harsher-tension variant. Tags: touch / Canvas2D / polytonality / spectral-luminous. Ref: Stravinsky *Petrushka* chord, Milhaud.

### 485-kids-two-rivers тАФ the braid metaphor (RESURRECT as the calm companion)
Two vertical rivers of falling note-droplets, LEFT = C major, RIGHT = A major (share E). A wide draggable "weaver" paddle: over one river тЖТ that key clear (panned); centered тЖТ both rivers braid through the mix zone, droplets interleaved, both keys ringing at full density. Pure Canvas2D additive glow + ripples, two-key drone bed, auto-flows on load. **Why it was strong:** the braiding is visible AND audible тАФ the clearest "you can SEE the two worlds weave"; deliberate C+A (shared E) so worlds touch not clash. **Why it lost:** single-touch paddle (no two-hand play); plainest visual; fewest subsystems. **Resurrect:** as the gentle/contemplative companion to the suns, or merge the falling-droplet "rain of two keys" as an alternate visual skin for the spine. Tags: touch / Canvas2D / polytonality / playful-aqueous. Ref: Stravinsky *Petrushka* chord, Milhaud.

## Banked ┬з383 (WIDE non-winners тАФ TEXT seeds, folders removed; renumber on revival, max committed folder now 490):
*The cycle-383 fire was 3 orthogonal answers to the JURY (2026-06-10) #1 ("bring genuine tension back тАФ 15/15 consonant, 10/15 warm-resolve; build ONE piece the listener resolves through action, not a pre-baked cadence"). Winner shipped: `490-disintegration` (Basinski self-erasing loop). These two are complete, build-reviewed implementations тАФ strong seeds for the next adult cycle.*

### 491-room-resonance тАФ Alvin Lucier, *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969), interactive (RESURRECT as the next adult conceptual piece)
Speak a phrase (mic, with a synthesized-seed fallback if denied/silent) тЖТ the system iteratively **re-convolves** it with a synthetic room impulse response (a decaying noise burst colored by a bank of resonant biquad peaks), pass after pass, via `OfflineAudioContext` + `ConvolverNode`. Each pass the room's modal peaks compound multiplicatively while broadband speech/transient energy washes out тАФ after ~12тАУ24 passes the words have dissolved entirely into shimmering room resonance. You **watch it happen**: a live scrolling Canvas2D **spectrogram** (log-frequency, violetтЖТcyan-white, with faint horizontal guide-lines at the room modes) shows energy abandoning the broadband texture and collecting onto the mode lines тАФ *language becoming architecture* тАФ plus a spectral-flatness **"intelligibility" meter** that drops as the room takes over. Auto-run walks the whole dissolution; step/replay/linger to dwell on any pass. `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; per-pass normalize; mic audio never leaves the browser (no API route). **Ambition:** #2 (4 subsystems: mic/seed capture + iterative offline-convolution engine + room-IR synthesis + live analyser) + #3 (Lucier 1969); lab-first iterative-convolution dissolution (345-speech-melody only *nods* at Lucier, never implements it). **Why it was strong:** the single most conceptually beautiful piece of the fire тАФ you literally see+hear meaning erode into space; anti-warm-resolve (transformation, not cadence). **Why it lost to 490:** mic-dependent (fallback exists but the *concept* wants your real voice) and the most runtime-complex (chained offline convolutions, pixel-scroll spectrogram) тЖТ least robust for a no-touch 06:30 phone glance; 490 is pure-client and never needs permission. **Resurrect:** ship as-is next adult cycle; consider tuning the room IR to one of Karel's published journey keys so the dissolution rings in-theme. Tags: mic / Canvas2D-spectrogram / iterative-convolution-dissolution / cold-to-shimmering-transformation. Ref: Alvin Lucier, *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969). Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (551 lines), `audio-engine.ts` (`makeRoomIR`/`makeFallbackSeed`/`runConvolutionPass`/`recordMic`/`spectralFlatness`), `README.md`.

### 492-automata тАФ Stephen Wolfram elementary CA as a real-time composer (RESURRECT тАФ grep-verified lab-first)
A row of N cells evolves one generation per musical pulse under an **elementary (1-D, 2-state, 3-neighbor) Wolfram rule** (presets 110 / 30 / 90 / 54 / 184). Live cells map onto a deliberately **tense scale field** (octatonic / whole-tone / phrygian тАФ real dissonance allowed, NOT a no-wrong-notes pentatonic); a complex rule (110 is Turing-complete) **never enters a short cycle**, so the harmony genuinely evolves тАФ different at minute 5 than minute 1, never exactly repeating. Voice-stealing 12-voice poly synth + always-on drone + density-tracking gain/lowpass so it breathes; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter caps the densest rows. The classic Wolfram **space-time diagram** scrolls in lock-step with the audio (both emitted from the same `stepGeneration` call, audio-clock-scheduled with a capped catch-up): you SEE the Sierpinski triangles / Rule-110 gliders forming exactly as you HEAR the chord they make; columns map lowтЖТhigh pitch, violetтЖТcyan; **tap to drop a single seed cell** and watch/hear the future cascade from it. 3 s hands-free auto-start. No API route. **Ambition:** #1 (discrete elementary-CA-as-compositional-engine тАФ grep-verified absent; `264-kids-lenia-pond` is *continuous* CA and a kids visual toy, not a harmonic engine) + #2 (CA engine + CAтЖТharmony scheduler + poly synth + space-time renderer) + #3 (Wolfram, *A New Kind of Science*, 2002); also long-form evolving. **Why it was strong:** the cleanest "long-form evolving adult, different at minute 5" of the fire, structural emergent tension, robust pure-client. **Why it lost narrowly to 490:** 490 is *more radically* un-resolving (pure entropy, no scale safety net at all) and lands two starved categories at once (conceptual/critical + long-form); 492 is the strong runner-up on the same tension axis. **Resurrect:** ship next adult cycle; deepen with TWO rules in counterpoint (bitonal, ├а la `484-two-suns`), or let the live density drive a slow modulation of the scale field. Tags: touch-seed / Canvas2D-space-time / elementary-cellular-automata-harmony / cold-emergent-structural. Ref: Stephen Wolfram, elementary CA / *A New Kind of Science* (2002). Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (466 lines), `ca.ts` (`stepRow`/`makeSeedRow`/`makeRandomRow`/`population` + 5 rule presets), `audio.ts` (voice-stealing poly synth + 3 scale fields), `README.md`.

## Banked ┬з384 (cycle-384 kids DEEP тАФ non-winner siblings of the explorable harmony-tension Sound-Map; winner shipped: `493-kids-feeling-forest`, camera/body navigation. Folders removed after curation; renumber on revival, max committed folder now 493.):
*All three implemented the SAME concept тАФ a continuous 2-D harmony-tension MAP (IDW-blended chord voicings, dissonanceтЖТconsonance spatial gradient, no scale-snapping, no pre-baked cadence; binds **FXplorer**, arXiv 2606.08286, NIME 2026, 2026-06-09) тАФ differing only in the navigation input. The winner uses BODY/camera (the jury's explicitly-starved depth-camera input). These two are complete, build-reviewed implementations.*

### 494-kids-weather-walk тАФ the DRAG baseline (RESURRECT only if a touch cycle is wanted)
Drag a glowing cloud-spirit across a top-down weather world: storm corner (Bb2 + m2 + tritone + m9, heavy detune, audible beating, 7.8 Hz tremolo, 310 Hz LP) тЖТ sunshine corner (C4 open fifth/sus2, 5400 Hz, no tremolo), with overcast/foggy/bittersweet (simultaneous minor+major third) middles. 5 anchors, IDW power-2 blend, Lissajous auto-demo after 3 s, Canvas2D field with lightning flicker in the storm quadrant. Clean (810 lines, 0 ts/0 eslint). **Why it lost:** its INPUT is **touch/drag** тАФ the exact over-represented tag the cycle-384 diversity audit BANS (touch ~5├Ч in last 10 shipped). It's the reliable baseline, not a rut-breaker. **Resurrect:** as the guaranteed-working fallback skin folded into 493, or on a future cycle where touch is no longer over-represented. Tags: touch / Canvas2D / harmony-map-IDW / weather-tension. Ref: FXplorer (2026).

### 495-kids-singing-valley тАФ VOICE as the 2-D cursor (STRONG bank тАФ high surprise, the real next lab-first)
SING to navigate: hand-written YIN-style pitch detector (`pitch.ts`, de Cheveign├й & Kawahara 2002) maps **pitch тЖТ vertical** (low voice = thorny cave at the bottom, high voice = sunlit meadow at top) and **loudness/RMS тЖТ horizontal** (soft = misty left, loud = open right). The child's voice walks a glowing creature through the harmony-tension valley (5 anchors: minor-2nd+tritone cave тЖТ open-fifth meadow, with quartal/whole-tone/sus4 middles). Mic is analysis-only (separate context, never routed to output тЖТ zero feedback); mic-denied тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + drag fallback + 17 s auto-demo. Canvas2D, 655 lines, 0 ts/0 eslint. **Why it lost narrowly:** voiceтЖТXY is the most *surprising* controller of the three, but the jury #3 explicitly named **depth-camera (0├Ч)** as THE starved input to pick this cycle, and camera kids pieces are loved (104тЭдя╕П/101тЭдя╕П/234тЭдя╕П) тАФ so 493's body-camera navigation is the more on-target diversity + love answer. Mic was also used recently (468-bottle-flute). **Resurrect:** ship next kids voice cycle, OR push it past "one voice = one cursor" into the real next lab-first тАФ **two children landing a consonant interval together** (genuine polyphonic pitch detection), or "lingering in the cave for >5 s slowly warms it" (tension-resolving-through-presence, not movement). Tags: voice/mic / Canvas2D / harmony-map-IDW + YIN-pitch / sung-tension-navigation. Refs: FXplorer (2026); de Cheveign├й & Kawahara, YIN, JASA 2002.

## Banked ┬з385 (cycle-385 adult DEEP тАФ non-winner siblings of the **Machine Ensemble / Voyager** concept; winner shipped: `496-voyager-room`. Folders removed after curation; renumber on revival, max committed folder now 496.):
*All three implemented ONE concept тАФ **an ENSEMBLE of autonomous machine improvisers who listen to each other AND to you, which you CONDUCT (you never play notes)** тАФ George Lewis's _Voyager_ lineage, binding **StreamMUSE** (frame-synchronous streaming inference, arXiv 2606.11886, 2026-06-10) as the on-device lock-step generation loop, with a real PlompтАУLevelt/Sethares roughness meter as the live tension readout. They differ in the agent-brain + the conducting gesture. These two are complete, build-reviewed implementations тАФ strong cycle-2/3 candidates of the new Machine Ensemble spine.*

### 497-call-ring тАФ a RING-CANON of imitation, conducted by a SPREAD knob (STRONG bank тАФ the spine's canon branch)
Six agents on a circle; each beat the next agent listens ONLY to its upstream neighbour's most-recent short phrase and answers with its own probabilistic **transform** тАФ {transpose-to-consonant-degree, melodic inversion, retrograde, augment/diminish, octave displace}. One primary **SPREAD** slider re-weights the transform distribution + toggles scale-snapping: low spread = a tight near-unison round (motif circulates near-intact, reads Resolved/Settling); high spread = inversion/octave-scatter + chromatic nudges fragment the motif into clashes (Tense/Clashing) before it re-converges. Conduct by **tossing in a seed motif** (inject a 3тАУ5 note contour at a node) + SPREAD + TEMPO + tap-an-agent to freeze (pass-through gap) or mute. Canvas2D: luminous packet arcs nodeтЖТnode, circle-of-fifths node hue, arcs jitter/fragment at high spread. Auto-demo sweeps spread lowтЖТhighтЖТlow. 519 lines, tsc+eslint clean. **Why it lost:** elegant, but the canon/round register overlaps the lab's existing Mirror-Canon (302/305) + tempo-canon (375) threads тАФ slightly less of a leap than 496's "conduct collective roughness." **Resurrect:** spine cycle-2 as the *imitation* branch, or fold its transform palette into 496 so spotlighted agents can develop a tossed-in motif. Tags: seed-motif/conductor INPUT / Canvas2D / multi-agent-ring-imitation TECH / roundтЗДtension VIBE. Refs: Lewis _Voyager_; StreamMUSE (2606.11886, 2026-06-10).

### 498-swarm-score тАФ EMERGENT chord from a 48-agent CONSENSUS + tritone DISSIDENTS, WebGL2 (STRONG bank тАФ the spine's emergence branch + a starved-renderer)
48 lightweight agents each hold a continuous **opinion** = a real-valued pitch class on the **circle of fifths**; each frame they gossip toward the Gaussian-weighted local average (consensus) + toward the conductor's **attractor** (your drag). The **sounding chord = the emergent weighted consensus** (densest opinion-clusters become chord tones; cluster mass = loudness) тАФ you literally hear the swarm agreeing. **Genuine tension via dissidents:** N dissident agents refuse consensus and steer to a tritone against the live majority, dragging a clash into the chord; add/remove them = the tension knob. Frame-synchronous re-voicing each beat (StreamMUSE). Raw **WebGL2** gravity-well + additive point cloud (circle-of-fifths hue so consensus reads coherent, split swarm reads clashing; dissidents hot rose/amber), **Canvas2D fallback required + present**, full GL dispose. Conduct by drag-to-nudge-attractor + ┬▒dissidents + tempo. Auto-demo wanders the attractor + breathes 2 dissidents in/out. 563 lines, tsc clean. **Why it lost:** conceptually elegant and dodges Canvas2D over-use (WebGL2), but "chord emerges from a swarm" drifts toward the lab's existing a-life register (236-particle-life-song, 410-conchordal-garden) and reads a touch more abstract than 496's legible *named musicians you conduct*. **Resurrect:** spine cycle-2/3 as the *emergence* branch (it's the strongest WebGL2 surface of the three); or extend dissents beyond tritone-only (m2/M7 flavours), or map the attractor drag to a real harmonic-function space. Tags: drag-attractor/conductor INPUT / WebGL2(+Canvas2D fallback) OUTPUT / swarm-consensus-emergent-harmony TECH / dissident-tension VIBE. Refs: Lewis _Voyager_; StreamMUSE (2606.11886, 2026-06-10); PlompтАУLevelt 1965 / Sethares 1998.
