## Banked ┬з386 (cycle-386 kids WIDE fire тАФ non-winner siblings; winner shipped: `500-kids-aurora-tilt`. Folders removed after curation per orchestration rule; renumber on revival, max committed folder now 500.):
*Three orthogonal kids explorers, each clearing the ambition floor via DIFFERENT tags (none touching the cycle's banned tags: touch INPUT, Canvas2D + three.js OUTPUT, physics-sim/DSP-first/AI/real-piano TECH, warm-resolve VIBE). Each carries genuine player-shaped tension. Both below are complete, build-reviewed real implementations.*

### 499-kids-sky-bells тАФ the REAL sky, singing (STRONG bank тАФ the highest-surprise concept of the fire; ship next ALL-AGES / adult real-world-data cycle)
On Start, fetches **live current weather** for the child's geolocation from **Open-Meteo** (no API key, CORS-enabled; falls back to San Francisco if location denied, and to a synthesized default-weather object if the fetch fails тАФ always sings). Maps the live data to a warm always-on generative soundscape rendered as a glowing **WebGL2** sky field: **temperature тЖТ key/register** (cold C-minor-pent/low тЖТ warm AтАУD-major-pent/high), **wind тЖТ arpeggio/shimmer density**, **cloud cover тЖТ pad lowpass** (clear bright ~2600 Hz тЖТ overcast muffled ~900 Hz), **precipitation тЖТ soft rain-bell chime rate**, **is_day тЖТ gold-day vs indigo-night palette + pad gain**. Re-polls every 60 s so it drifts with the real sky; tap the sky / weather-friend orbs (тЙе64 px) to add the child's own in-key bell. DynamicsCompressor limiter + 9 kHz lowpass (kids-safe). Files (removed): `page.tsx` (353 lines), `audio.ts`, `weather.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md`. Ref: **Gregory Kramer (ed.), *Auditory Display: Sonification, Audification, and Auditory Interfaces* (1994)** + aeolian/wind-harp tradition. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: live weather API + sonification engine + WebGL2 sky renderer + tap interaction; #3 named ref). Tags: **live-weather-API + tap INPUT (real-world-data тАФ the starved menu category the jury flagged untouched all window) / WebGL2 OUTPUT / data-sonification TECH / living-real-sky VIBE** тАФ fully orthogonal to everything recent. **Why it lost (narrowly):** the highest *surprise* of the fire ("the real sky singing" тАФ a genuine "huh") and it lands a starved menu category, BUT its tension is **observational/passive** (the weather is what it is; tapping adds notes but doesn't *resolve* tension), which is weaker on the jury's #1 "tension resolved **through action**"; and weather-sonification is abstract for a *4-year-old* (it's really an all-ages/adult ambient piece). **Resurrect:** ship next adult/all-ages cycle as the lab's real **real-world-data sonification** entry тАФ it's the strongest seed of the fire. Consider tuning the scale to one of Karel's published journey keys, or adding satellite/ISS-pass or tide data as alternate "what's happening right now" sources. Honest warts: Open-Meteo CORS + geolocation not browser-verified in sandbox (fallback covers both); WebGL2 not GPU-verified.

### 501-kids-hum-garden тАФ bloom by HOLDING STEADY, not by hitting a note (STRONG bank тАФ the freshest *resolution mechanic* of the fire)
Hum into the mic to grow a glowing **inline-SVG** flower; **any pitch is welcome (no wrong notes)** тАФ what blooms it is **steadiness**, not target-hitting. A self-coded **YIN-style CMND pitch detector** (de Cheveign├й & Kawahara 2002; RMS gate + clarity gate тЙе0.55 + parabolic interp) plus a rolling-variance **pitch-stability** metric: a wobbly/nervous hum keeps the plant a quivering thorny bud on a tense beating cluster (root + detuned maj-2 + min-7); a **steady sustained hum (~1.5тАУ3 s)** glides the harmony open into a warm root+maj3+P5 bloom, petals open, sparkles burst. Pitch sets hue (low = warm amber, high = cool violet), snapped to C-pentatonic. Mic is **analysis-only** (connected to the AnalyserNode only, never to output тЖТ zero feedback, never recorded/uploaded). Mic-denied тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a synthesized **demo-hum state machine** (wobbleтЖТsteadyтЖТrest) that blooms hands-free; the demo also runs on load before the child sings. DynamicsCompressor limiter + 9 kHz lowpass. SVG attributes written imperatively via refs in the rAF loop (no per-frame React re-render). Files (removed): `page.tsx` (826 lines), `README.md` (self-contained). Ref: **de Cheveign├й & Kawahara, "YIN," JASA 2002**. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: mic/pitch+stability detection + warm bloom synth + SVG garden + demo-hum fallback; #3 named ref). Tags: **voice/mic INPUT (fresh, not in last 10) / SVG OUTPUT (0├Ч in last 10 тАФ the cleanest output-dodge of the fire) / pitch-STABILITY-as-resolution TECH (steadiness, not target-hitting тАФ genuinely novel) / tension-resolved-by-calm-steady-presence VIBE**. **Why it lost (narrowly):** the "calm presence blooms it" mechanic is the **freshest resolution idea of the fire** and pedagogically lovely, BUT it's the largest/most-complex build (826 lines), the voice-garden register is somewhat trodden (`322-kids-voice-garden`, `158-hum-paint`), and **YIN on a real 4-year-old's high/breathy voice (200тАУ800 Hz) is unverified** тАФ a genuine demo-reliability risk vs. 500's permission-free auto-demo. **Resurrect:** next kids voice cycle; tune the RMS/clarity gates to child-voice ranges first, swap the SVG sparkle DOM-churn for a pooled-node approach, and consider pushing past one-voice into **two children landing a consonant interval together** (the standing voice lab-first), or **dwell-warms-the-cave** presence-resolution folded into the Sound-Map spine (493). Also a natural home for the banked **ParaBridge prosody-mood** seed (RESEARCH ┬з386) тАФ let the *feeling* in the voice, not just steadiness, shape the bloom.

### 503-atmosphere-front тАФ the planet's weather as roiling volumetric storm-fronts (STRONG bank тАФ DEEP cycle-387 runner-up; the most *literal/cinematic* read of the atmosphere concept)
DEEP sibling of the shipped `502-atmosphere-veil` (Living Earth spine cycle 3). Same spine: one batched **Open-Meteo** request for 12 globe-spanning cities, polled every 75 s; per-city instability = high wind + low/**falling** surface pressure + high cloud; a global tension scalar drives a sustained just-intonation drone that detunes into beating intervals + tension tones (m2/tritone/b9) as the real sky destabilizes and leads back toward open fifths/octaves **only when the data calms** (asymmetric ~6 s glide, no timer); drifting tonal center = long-form memory. **Its distinctive output:** a raw **WebGL2** raymarched, fbm domain-warped **volumetric cloud field** тАФ calm = luminous dawn cirrus, storm = dark roiling cumulonimbus with electric-violet edges and **lightning flashes on sharp tension rises** (a real dramaturgical transient). Files (removed): `page.tsx` (359), `audio.ts`, `weather.ts`, `shader.ts`, `README.md`. Ref: **├Йliane Radigue** (sustained beating drones) + raymarched-volumetrics tradition. Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: live-data + drone synth + volumetric raymarch + long-form memory; #4 spine cycle 3). Tags: **live-weather-API INPUT / WebGL2-raymarch-volumetric OUTPUT / data-sonification+spectral-tension TECH / sustained-unresolved-atmospheric VIBE.** **Why it lost (narrowly to 502):** the volumetric clouds are the most *evocative* read of "atmosphere," BUT the **diversity audit** decided it тАФ the 2026-06-10 jury flagged raw-WebGL2 as over-represented (4├Ч) while WebGPU is starved (1├Ч), so 502's WebGPU-compute particle field is the cleaner diversity pick AND the more ambitious renderer. **Resurrect:** ship as an alternate "weather mood" or fold the lightning-on-rise transient + volumetric look into a future spine cycle; or pair the two (particles + volumetric) once WebGPU is proven on Karel's device.

### 504-atmosphere-isobar тАФ the weather as a precise isobar/pressure-field instrument (bank тАФ DEEP cycle-387 also-ran; the Ikeda/data-grid read)
DEEP sibling of `502-atmosphere-veil`. Same Living-Earth-cycle-3 spine + Open-Meteo data + sustained-tension drone (open fifths at rest тЖТ beating + m2/tritone/b9 as the real field destabilizes, relaxing only when gradients flatten). **Its distinctive idea:** interpolate the 12 city pressures into a smooth **pressure FIELD** (inverse-distance weighting on an equirectangular projection), take the **gradient magnitude** as local tension тАФ **tight isobars = a storm = dissonance**, even parallel isobars = calm тАФ and render marching-squares **contour bands + sheared streamlines** in a clean Ikeda-ish data-grid aesthetic; storm longitude pans the audio. Files (removed): `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `weather.ts`, `field.ts`, `README.md`. Ref: **Ryoji Ikeda** (data aesthetics) + **├Йliane Radigue** (drone). Ambition 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems; #4 spine cycle 3). Tags: **live-weather-API INPUT / Canvas2D-data-grid OUTPUT / pressure-gradient-as-tension TECH / clinical-geometric VIBE.** **Why it lost:** the pressure-gradient-as-tension mapping is the most *rigorous* of the fire (gradient magnitude is a genuine physical instability proxy), BUT it rendered in **Canvas2D** тАФ a banned over-represented output (4├Ч last-10) тАФ so it failed the diversity gate that 502 cleared cleanly; and the builder noted real worldwide pressure spreads are gentler than the demo, so live tension may read low. **Resurrect:** re-skin the isobar/streamline field as a **WebGL2** line instrument (dodges the Canvas2D ban), and keep the inverse-distance pressure-FIELD + gradient-magnitude tension math тАФ it's the most defensible dataтЖТtension mapping the spine has and would make a strong standalone "weather as an instrument you read."

## Banked ┬з388 (cycle-388 kids DEEP fire тАФ "Together" concept, three synchrony approaches; winner shipped: `505-kids-pulse-bridge`. Folders removed after curation per orchestration rule; renumber on revival, max committed folder now 505.):

### 506-kids-orbit-meet тАФ two children SPIN moons into the same swing; resolution by CONTINUOUS motion-phase sync (STRONG bank тАФ the spine's continuous-motion branch)
DEEP sibling of the shipped `505-kids-pulse-bridge`. Same "Together" concept (interpersonal synchrony gates the harmonic resolution тАФ apart = gentle unresolved tension, locked = warm bloom; the resolution is *earned*, never a pre-baked cadence), but the input is **continuous circular drag** instead of discrete taps: each child drags one glowing moon (gold / violet) around a shared centre; each moon is a phase oscillator ╬╕; a **Kuramoto order parameter** r = |┬╜(e^{i╬╕тВБ}+e^{i╬╕тВВ})| + a velocity-match term, asymmetrically smoothed (fast lock ╬▒=0.06, slow drift ╬▒=0.02), drives two pentatonic sine voices that voice-lead (`setTargetAtTime`) from a wobbling beating cloud toward an open-fifth/major resolution as the orbits entrain; trails braid into a blooming **mandala** at the centre on lock. Canvas2D; DynamicsCompressor + тЙд9 kHz lowpass; ambient pad bed; Pointer-Events `pointerId` multitouch; 32 s auto-demo sweeps phase diff ╧АтЖТ0тЖТ╧А hands-free. Files (removed): `page.tsx` (806 lines), `README.md`. Refs: **The Moving Mandala** (Carreras et al., *IJCHP* 2025тАУ26) + **"Finding Our Tempo," TEI 2026**. **Ambition 4/5** (same as winner: #1 interpersonal-synchrony-gates-resolution lab-first + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #4 "Together" spine). Tags: **two-child-continuous-drag INPUT (fresh) / Canvas2D OUTPUT / Kuramoto-motion-phase-sync TECH / prosocial-tension-resolved-by-spinning-together VIBE.** **Why it lost (narrowly to 505):** the *most beautiful* visual of the fire (braided orbital trails тЖТ mandala) and arguably the more embodied/Reggio reading, BUT the builder itself flagged the core risk тАФ **whether a real 4-year-old can sustain a smooth circular drag** (fine-motor-hard; tapping a beat is far more natural for the age) тАФ making 505's discrete tap the more demo-reliable realization of the same concept. **Resurrect:** "Together" spine cycle 2; first replace circular drag with a simpler to-and-fro / back-and-forth swing (the builder's own suggested fix), low-pass the drag velocity to de-noise the phase estimate, and consider it as the **older-kids / all-ages** member of the spine where sustained circular motion is achievable. The mandala-bloom renderer is worth keeping verbatim.

### 507-kids-hum-meet тАФ hum to MEET a drifting partner-tone and HOLD together; resolution by vocal-pitch-lock sync, in SVG (bank тАФ the spine's voice branch + the cleanest output-dodge)
DEEP sibling of `505-kids-pulse-bridge`. Same "Together" concept via **vocal synchrony**: a synthesized "ghost friend" orb hums a slow C-pentatonic tone that drifts between pitches; the child hums back and a self-coded **child-voice-tuned YIN** (de Cheveign├й & Kawahara 2002 тАФ difference fn тЖТ CMNDF тЖТ 0.12 abs-threshold тЖТ parabolic interp; RMS gate 0.008, clarity gate <0.5, 180тАУ900 Hz range, 2048-sample window) detects their pitch; a **synchrony index** scores consonance (11 intervals, 55-cent tolerance) ├Ч a **hold/togetherness timer** (тЙе~1.5 s consonant together) and voice-leads a beating cluster тЖТ root+M3+P5 bloom as they meet and hold; an **inline-SVG** flower (0├Ч output in last 10 тАФ cleanest diversity dodge of the fire) opens its petals on lock. Mic **analysis-only** (AnalyserNode only, never to output, never recorded). Mic-denied/unsupported тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a ~14 s synthesized demo-hum state machine (wobbleтЖТapproachтЖТlockтЖТbloomтЖТrest) that also runs on load pre-permission, so it always blooms hands-free. Files (removed): `page.tsx` (685), `yin.ts` (120), `README.md`. Refs: **YIN (JASA 2002)** + **Moving Mandala** + **TEI 2026**. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #4 spine). Tags: **voice/mic INPUT (fresh) / SVG OUTPUT (0├Ч last-10 тАФ best dodge) / YIN-pitch-lock-sync TECH / prosocial-tension-resolved-by-singing-together VIBE.** **Why it lost:** best *output diversity* (SVG) of the fire and folds in the ┬з386 banked `501-kids-hum-garden` voice work, BUT (a) the partner is a **virtual ghost, not a second real child** тАФ the weakest fit to the genuine *two-children-together* prosocial concept the research is about, and (b) **YIN on a real 4-year-old's high/breathy voice remains unverified** (demo is the safety net, but it's a real 06:30 demo-reliability risk vs. 505's deterministic permission-free auto-demo). **Resurrect:** the true two-child voice lab-first still wants **two real children landing a consonant interval together** тАФ the one-mic-can't-separate-two-voices problem is the open challenge (try stereo-mic spatial separation, or a turn-taking call-and-response so only one sings at a time); failing that, ship this virtual-partner version as a solo **all-ages** voice-meditation where the unverified-child-voice risk is lower. The child-voice-tuned `yin.ts` is reusable across the lab.

## ┬з389 тАФ banked seeds from the WIDE adult fire (cycle 389, 2026-06-11)

Cycle 389 ran WIDE with three orthogonal adult explorers, each hitting a *different* jury-named starved menu category. Shipped `508-accord-call` (WebRTC P2P, multi-user category). The other two are complete, build-reviewed implementations that were `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build тАФ resurrect from these specs.

### 509-spectral-loom тАФ `queued` (MIDI + long-form-evolving-adult category)
**What if every note you play on a MIDI keyboard wove into a slowly-souring harmonic memory you must keep tending тАФ a living tapestry that drifts toward dissonance unless you actively resolve it?** Live-performance ADULT long-form instrument. **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`) + on-screen piano + computer-keyboard + auto-arpeggiator fallbacks (all route one note-trigger path). **Harmonic-memory engine** (`memory.ts`): each note deposits a decaying set of partials (fundamental + 7 overtones) into a ~128-thread buffer with ~20тАУ40 s time-constants, so you hear the *accumulation* of recent playing; a slow detuning accumulator sours the field whenever it's dissonant (PlompтАУLevelt roughness over up to 48 partials), and consonant intervals voice-lead it back; tonal center wanders so minute 8 тЙа minute 1, never loops. **WebGPU** renderer (`gpu.ts`): a full-screen WGSL pass over a thread storage-buffer тАФ Gaussian thread cross-sections, goldтЖТred per-partial dissonance color, turbulence on sour threads, shimmer on consonant; Canvas2D fallback if `navigator.gpu` absent. Ref: **G├йrard Grisey, *Partiels* (1975)** (consonanceтЖФdissonance as a continuous spectral axis). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems + #3 Grisey). **Why it didn't win:** lower ambition than 508 (no clean #1 тАФ Web MIDI is used in the lab: 365/391/483/486), and its WebGPU output duplicates the most recent adult build (502). **Why promising:** the long-form-evolving-adult + MIDI/OSC menu categories are both jury-named-starved; the harmonic-memory "tend the tapestry" mechanic is a genuinely fresh tension model. **Resurrect** on a non-WebGPU-recent cycle, or re-skin the renderer to SVG/strings to dodge the 502 output overlap. (Built clean: page 620 / audio 156 / memory 190 / roughness 88 / gpu 237 lines, tsc+eslint 0/0.)

### 510-the-withholding тАФ `queued` (conceptual/critical + non-screen category)
**What if a piece refused to resolve until you set the phone down and gave it your stillness тАФ a sound you can only hear bloom by doing nothing and waiting in quiet?** Conceptual/critical ADULT piece; subject is patience and the *cost* of resolution. A sustained 4тАУ3 suspension enriched with a tritone (45/32) + m7 colour breathes and will NOT resolve on a timer or a tap. It resolves only on **sustained stillness** detected two ways fused: **mic RMS** (`getUserMedia`, AnalyserNode-only, never recorded/sent тАФ quiet < 0.012) AND **device stillness** (`deviceorientation`/`devicemotion` angular velocity < 0.8 deg/s). ~50 s of stillness+quiet тЖТ an irreversible, once-only bloom; motion/noise makes it recede. **Non-screen-dominant output** (the starved modality, 0├Ч): near-black, ONE thin breathing arc of light encoding tension via width/glow, one `font-serif` state-line ("be stillтАж" тЖТ "almostтАж" тЖТ "here."). Fallbacks: mic-denied тЖТ motion+patience; motion-absent тЖТ patience (no-touch timer); plus a labeled 20 s-idle auto-demo of one full withholdтЖТresolveтЖТreset cycle so a hands-free glance hears both states. Refs: **John Cage *4тА▓33тА│* (1952)** ┬╖ **Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969)** ┬╖ **├Йliane Radigue** (sustained-tone patience). **Ambition 2тАУ3/5** (#1 stillness-as-input / resolution-gated-by-detected-stillness тАФ arguable lab-first cross-modal technique; #3 named refs; could be #4 a "Stillness" spine cycle 1). **Why it didn't win:** opens a NEW spine rather than deepening one (jury provocation #2 favors deepening), and its #1-technique claim is more arguable than 508's unambiguous WebRTC lab-first. **Why promising:** the purest answer to the jury's #1 (genuine withheld suspension, resolution earned not consumed) and it hits TWO untouched-all-window menu categories at once (conceptual/critical + non-screen). **Strong future ship** тАФ the boldest "massively bigger concept" of the fire on the conceptual axis. (Built clean: page 445 / audio / stillness / draw + README, the builder's own tsc+eslint clean.)

---

## Cycle 390 тАФ banked siblings (DEEP "vanish into your shadow" kids fire, comb-filter / phase-cancellation)

Cycle 390 ran DEEP: one concept тАФ *make a sound vanish into its own shadow* via **comb-filter / phase-cancellation** (the lab's first; the JURY 2026-06-11 provocation-#1 primitive that's "tension you can't hear beating") тАФ three approaches by input. Shipped `513-kids-shadow-still` (camera-motion vs stillness). The other two are complete, build-reviewed implementations `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build тАФ resurrect from these specs.

### 511-kids-ghost-bell тАФ `queued` (tilt input ┬╖ richest visuals ┬╖ needs one physics fix)
**What if a 4-year-old could tilt a tablet to slide a bell's ghost-twin toward it тАФ and discover that doubling a sound can make it vanish?** A glowing bell rings a soft C-major chime; a translucent ghost-twin slides with **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent` + pointer-drag fallback, no permissions needed for drag). Distance bellтЖФghost = comb **delay**; a 32-bar SVG comb-spectrum strip bites into notches as it hollows; sparkle particles eject from the bell rim when full. SVG only; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + 9 kHz lowpass; 7 s auto-demo. Refs: **Alvin Lucier** interference works; flanging/comb DSP (Julius O. Smith CCRMA). **Ambition ~3/5** (#1 comb-filter lab-first shared with 513 + #2 subsystems + #3 Lucier). **Why it didn't win:** its headline mapping (*ghost overlaps bell тЖТ cancel*) is physically backwards for the fundamental тАФ at delayтЖТ0 the copies are **in phase** and the fundamental is *reinforced*, not cancelled (deepest null is at delay тЙИ 1/(2┬╖fтВА) тЙИ 1.9 ms for 261 Hz, a *middle* tilt, not overlap); the builder honestly flagged this. Tilt INPUT is also over-used (276/500). **Why promising:** the richest, most playful visuals of the fire (two bells + sparkles + comb teeth) and the most robust permission-free input. **Resurrect with the fix:** remap so the **mid-tilt** position lands on 1/(2┬╖fтВА) (or sweep the bell's pitch so the current overlap really is the null), then it's the strongest tilt sibling. (Built clean: page 670 lines, builder's own tsc+eslint clean.)

### 512-kids-echo-shadow тАФ `queued` (voice input ┬╖ most magical premise ┬╖ headphone-only)
**What if a child could hum a note and watch their own voice get swallowed by its own shadow?** The child's live **mic** voice is run through a comb filter (dry + delayed copy); as they **sustain**, the delay ramps toward the anti-phase point (╧Д = 1/2fтВА) and the voice thins to a ghostly whistle while an SVG "cyan ribbon" (voice) and "purple shadow ribbon" (echo) converge and a 320-step comb-teeth path deepens its notches. SVG only; limiter + 9 kHz lowpass + тЙд0.42 master; 7 s sawtooth auto-demo (no mic needed). Refs: **Alvin Lucier** *I Am Sitting in a Room* (the canonical "recirculate a voice until interference reshapes it" тАФ this is the single-pass child version); **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening*. **Ambition ~3/5** (#1 comb lab-first + #2 + #3). **Why it didn't win:** **headphone-only** тАФ on a tablet's open speaker the wet output feeds back into the mic and howls, making it a poor hands-free 06:30 phone demo; and the "vanish" depends on detecting the child's actual hum pitch. **Why promising:** the most *magical* premise of the three (your own voice erasing itself) and the purest Lucier homage. **Resurrect for a headphone/installation context** (museum kiosk, or an adult "Deep Listening" version where the howl caveat is acceptable), or pair with a known internal carrier tone the child sings *over* so fтВА is fixed. (Built clean: page 770 lines, builder's own tsc+eslint clean; carries the feedback-howl caveat in its README.)

## ┬з391 тАФ banked from the cycle-391 ADULT WIDE fire (2 non-winner explorers)

Cycle 391 ran WIDE: theme тАФ *one presence, never resolves, tension NOT on Canvas2D* (JURY 2026-06-11's headline). Shipped `514-polytempo-loom` (irrational-ratio polytempo lattice, SVG, Nancarrow тАФ tension in TIME). The other two are complete, build-reviewed implementations `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build тАФ resurrect from these specs.

### 516-slow-presence тАФ `queued` (THE STRONGEST SEED ┬╖ WebGPU long-form ┬╖ the lab's best #4+#5 5/5 shot)
**What if a single living field evolved continuously for 5+ minutes with MEMORY тАФ never looping, never returning, different at minute 5 than at second 30 тАФ its sound and image two faces of ONE slowly-mutating presence you sit with, not a puzzle you solve?** A real **WebGPU compute** Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field (512┬▓, ping-pong `rgba16float` storage textures, 8 WGSL steps/frame, full-screen-triangle render pass, near-blackтЖТindigoтЖТtealтЖТgold palette). The feed `f` and kill `k` rates drift along **two independent non-repeating 7-irrational-harmonic LFOs over a 420 s base period**, so the field traverses the Gray-Scott zoo (solitonsтЖТmitosisтЖТlabyrinthsтЖТcoral) at geologic pace тАФ it has memory, it can't return to its seed. A consonant **Lydian drone** (no cadence) mirrors the SAME two LFO functions (filter cutoff + osc mix updated ~4├Ч/s тАФ NO GPU readback, cheap). `navigator.gpu` absent тЖТ SVG/DOM drifting-radial fallback (**not** Canvas2D); audio always runs. `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; AudioContext in the Begin gesture. Refs: **Brian Eno** *Ambient 1: Music for Airports* (1978); **Refik Anadol** *Machine Hallucinations*; **Pearson 1993** (Gray-Scott, Science 261). **Ambition ~3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: compute sim + render + audio-mirror + drift engine = 4 ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #4 multi-cycle long-form spine, cycle 1). **Why it didn't win:** its tension is *entropy / non-repetition*, not the jury's headline untouched **tension** primitive (TIME/TUNING), and WebGPU is the riskiest demo surface (iOS WebGPU still uneven). **Why it's the strongest seed:** it is LITERALLY the `490-disintegration` successor the JURY asked for (#2 "490 should have had children") on the jury-blessed WebGPU lane (#3, "extend the 2 WebGPU pieces") тАФ and the lab's best path to the elusive **#4+#5 5/5**: ship it cycle 1, then cycle 2 binds a fresh <14-day reaction-diffusion / generative paper. **Resurrect as the next DEEP build.** (Built clean: 858-line page, builder's own `tsc --noEmit` + eslint clean; `/// <reference types="@webgpu/types" />`.)

### 515-two-tempos-one-body тАФ `queued` (the audio/haptic-only screen-test lane)
**What if a piece had almost NO screen тАФ a single presence you inhabit with eyes closed, the tension being two slowly-drifting tempi you sense in TWO senses at once: one pulse in your EARS, a different pulse in your HAND?** Cross-modal polytempo: a warm consonant drone (A2 + E3 + A3) with a soft **audio** swell at period A=1.20 s, and `navigator.vibrate(38)` **haptic** pulses at period B=A/тИЪ2тЙИ0.85 s тАФ irrational ratio, the heard and the felt tempo drift forever and never realign. Near-black screen = two faint CSS `radial-gradient` breathing rings (no canvas/WebGL visualizer тАФ deliberately anti-screen) + "Close your eyes. One pulse is in your ears, one is in your hand." Vibration API absent (iOS/desktop) тЖТ amber notice + the inner emerald ring carries tempo B visually; audio always works. Self-correcting setTimeout chain for haptics (200 ms cooldown, vibrate(0) on stop). Refs: **Conlon Nancarrow** (polytempo) + **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening* / **La Monte Young** (attention as the instrument). **Ambition ~2/5** (#1 cross-modal haptic-as-a-tempo-channel тАФ distinct from `400-soundwalk-room`'s haptic-as-proximity, though haptics aren't strictly lab-first ┬╖ #3 named refs). **Why it didn't win:** haptics already exist (400) so #1 is shakier, and on Karel's likely-iOS review phone the full *felt* effect degrades to two glow rings (a visual, not the cross-modal bet). **Why promising:** the genuine audio/haptic-only lane the JURY explicitly dared (#3 "take the 0├Ч lane: an audio-only / haptic-only piece") тАФ the lab's purest test of its screen bias. **Resurrect for an Android-targeted or installation (chair-transducer / wristband-haptic) context** where the felt tempo is guaranteed. (Built clean: 339-line page, builder-reported clean.)

Both share the winner's spine: mic-RMS hum input (no pitch matching), monotonic memory, two banks of incommensurate-LFO drift (╧А/e/тИЪ2/╧Ж over ~4тАУ6 min so minute 5 тЙа second 30, never loops), a never-silent warm pentatonic/just-intonation lullaby pad that never cadences, soft bell on each hum, always-on auto-demo, AudioContext-in-gesture, DynamicsCompressor + тЙд8 kHz lowpass.

### 517-kids-glow-friend тАФ `queued` (the iOS-safe companion ┬╖ three.js)
**Same concept, rendered as a soft glowing 3D blob-creature in three.js** тАФ a core displaced sphere with emissive `MeshStandardMaterial`, inner+outer additive-blending halo spheres, three orbiting satellite metaball-lobes, and `THREE.Points` **petal particles** that orbit the body, one per remembered hum (the creature literally accretes a halo of everything the child gave it). Color, scale, glow, orbit radii driven by the evolution state + live mic energy. Refs: teamLab *Sketch Aquarium* ┬╖ Eno *Music for Airports* ┬╖ Tamagotchi. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 4 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #4 Companion/Presence spine cycle 1). **Why it didn't win:** equal ambition to 518 but lost on the JURY 2026-06-11 #3 steer ("extend the WebGPU pieces" тАФ 518 is the jury-named lane); three.js at 2├Ч is genuinely under-represented and clean on diversity. **Why it's the strongest of the two banks:** it is the **most legibly "a friend" for a 4-year-old** (an actual cuddly glowing being with a halo of petals, vs. an abstract RD field) AND the **safest renderer on iOS/iPad** тАФ where 518 falls back to a flat CSS ember, 517 runs the full 3D creature. **Resurrect for an iOS-targeted kids context, or as the spine's cycle-2 if 518's WebGPU proves too iOS-fragile in review.** (Built clean: 258-line page + `creature.ts` 352 + `memory.ts` 151 + `audio.ts` 292; builder-reported clean. Two minor edges: two rAF loops could be unified; the "metaball" look is orbiting lobes, not a true isosurface тАФ a vertex-displacement pass would deepen it. Bump the corner `text-white/40` notes link to `/55+` on resurrection per typography rule.)

### 519-kids-quiet-bloom тАФ `queued` (the growing-seedling companion ┬╖ SVG)
**Same concept, rendered as a growing organism in inline SVG** тАФ a slowly-branching luminous seedling/coral via a **space-colonization / differential-growth** algorithm: new nodes spawn from leaf nodes, stepping in a direction biased by incommensurate irrational-frequency LFOs (no shared rational period тЖТ never cycles back), capped at тЙд300 `<circle>`/`<line>` nodes with `feGaussianBlur` glow, attributes updated directly per-rAF (no React re-render). Growth is **monotonic тАФ nodes are NEVER pruned**, so the organism carries every tendril it ever grew; a 32-note bell ring-buffer re-plays as a slowly-thickening lullaby ostinato. Refs: teamLab *Future Park* ┬╖ Eno *Music for Airports* ┬╖ Runions (2007) space-colonization. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 4 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #4 spine cycle 1). **Why it didn't win:** purely a **diversity** call тАФ SVG output is now 3├Ч (`508`/`513`/`514`); shipping it would make SVG 4├Ч = the new monoculture the JURY just warned about ("Canvas2D is the new three.js"). Quality was not the issue. **Why promising:** the "growing plant you tend by humming" metaphor is arguably the most *legible* "alive" of the three for a 4yo, and the never-prune growth is the cleanest embodiment of "carries everything you gave it." **Resurrect once SVG is no longer over-represented** (e.g. after a few WebGPU/three.js/audio-only cycles), or as the spine's cycle-2 "draw-then-grow" (child sketches a seed, it grows from there teamLab-style). (Built clean: 384-line page + `growth.ts` + `audio.ts`; builder-reported clean. Edge: RMS sensitivity `*12` tuned for typical mic gain; auto-demo covers quiet rooms.)

## ┬з393 тАФ banked from the cycle-393 ADULT WIDE fire (2 non-winner explorers)

Cycle 393 ran WIDE: THREE orthogonal "one presence / never resolves" adult concepts, each dodging every JURY 2026-06-11 banned tag via a different input├Чoutput├Чtechnique. Shipped `520-singing-dune` (WebGPU MLS-MPM granular dune). The other two are complete, build-reviewed implementations `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build тАФ resurrect from these specs.

### 521-overpass тАФ `queued` (real-world-data ┬╖ three.js ┬╖ the cleanest resurrect)
**What if you could hear ONE distant presence pass overhead тАФ a real satellite, live тАФ rising from silence as it climbs over your horizon, peaking at zenith, fading as it sets, and silent between passes?** Live ISS position from `wheretheiss.at` (lat/lon/altitude/velocity/visibility, polled ~5 s); optional `navigator.geolocation` тЖТ topocentric elevation/azimuth of the satellite over the observer. ONE solo JI voice (A3 root + 3:2 fifth + octave bell partial): elevationтЖТsquared gain curve (silent below horizon, swelling to zenith), rangeтЖТlowpass cutoff (300тАУ4000 Hz), line-of-sight radial velocityтЖТ┬▒35-cent Doppler detune, sunlitтЖТbright bell / eclipsedтЖТmuffled shadow hush. **three.js** dark sky-dome: 800 twinkling stars, a horizon ring with compass ticks, ONE warm-white spark with an additive glow sprite + a fading trail arc; camera drifts to follow. **Synthetic-orbit fallback** (deterministic ~4-min rise/transit/set loop) runs on load and on any fetch/CORS failure, with an honest `LIVE тЖФ SIMULATED` pill + telemetry HUD. No harmonic progression; the ground track precesses so no two passes are identical тАФ never resolves. `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; no API route (public read-only fetch, no secret). Refs: **Trevor Paglen** *Orbital Reflector* (a single satellite as a contemplative sky-presence) ┬╖ the amateur satellite-listening tradition (SatNOGS / heavens-above). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: live-data engine + orbital-geometry sonification + three.js render; #3 named refs). **Why it didn't win:** strong and genuinely fresh (real-world-data + three.js + one-presence тАФ all clean, dodges every ban), but lower ambition than 520 (no lab-first technique тАФ external-API sonification exists at 437/471/502) and its headline live-API/CORS is the riskiest demo surface (the synthetic fallback covers it). **Why it's the strongest of the two banks:** the cleanest *real-world-data, one-presence* seed available тАФ a beautiful, contemplative, genuinely-new-feeling piece. **Resurrect** as the next real-world-data cycle, or fold into the Living Earth spine as its "look UP" chapter (orbital, after earthquakes/space-weather/atmosphere). Could deepen with TLE-based orbit propagation (predict the *next* real pass time + count-down) for a true "wait for the sky" piece. (Built clean: `page.tsx` 328 + `orbit.ts` 263 + `sky.ts` 272 + `audio.ts` 191 + README; builder-reported clean.)

### 522-chladni-voice тАФ `queued` BUT note overlap (Chladni point-cloud ┬╖ three.js)
**What if your sustained voice became a single vibrating Chladni plate тАФ tens of thousands of sand grains migrating to the nodal lines of the pitch you hold тАФ so the tuning of your tone becomes a geometric figure that forms and dissolves but never holds still?** Hum/sing тЖТ hand-written **YIN** pitch detector тЖТ mode numbers (n,m) for a square-plate standing wave `S(x,y)=cos(n╧Аx)cos(m╧Аy)тИТcos(m╧Аx)cos(n╧Аy)`; 60k **three.js `Points`** grains do gradient descent on |S| toward the nodal lines, with antinode jitter; higher pitchтЖТhigher modeтЖТfiner figure; as pitch glides the figure reorganizes (mode-blended). A 5-partial plate tone + octave-below sympathetic drone sings even with no mic (auto-glide demo + slider/keyboard fallback); `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; mic is local-analysis only. Tension lives in TUNING, not roughness. Refs: **Ernst Chladni** *Klangfiguren* (1787) ┬╖ **Hans Jenny** *Cymatics* (1967) ┬╖ **Faraday** waves (1831). **Ambition ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: YIN pitch + Chladni field + point-cloud render; #3 named refs). **тЪая╕П Why it didn't win тАФ and why this seed carries a warning:** the builder claimed "first Chladni sim in this lab," but a curation grep found **`19-cymatics` AND `165-cymatics` already simulate sand settling into Chladni nodal lines** тАФ so the headline novelty is **false**; mic-input + a 60k GPU point-count are incremental re-skins of an existing concept. This is exactly the "too similar" trap the JURY keeps flagging; the WIDE fan-out catching it is the process working. **Do NOT resurrect as a fresh Chladni piece.** Resurrect ONLY as an *explicit, acknowledged* deepening of `19`/`165` тАФ e.g. a true 3D vibrating membrane (z-displacement + real eigenmodes), Faraday-wave fluid surface, or a polyphonic/chord-driven multi-mode superposition that 19/165 never did. (Built clean: `page.tsx` + `plate.ts` 10.8 kB + `pitch.ts` 5.4 kB + `audio.ts` + README; builder-reported clean.)

## ┬з394 тАФ banked from the cycle-394 KIDS DEEP fire (2 non-winner explorers)

Cycle 394 ran DEEP: ONE concept тАФ *your hand becomes a little singing creature (MediaPipe Hands, 21-landmark tracking); open the hand тЖТ it blooms and SINGS, close тЖТ it gathers and goes quiet; wrist height тЖТ pentatonic pitch; nothing is ever wrong* тАФ attacked via THREE renderers. Shipped `524-kids-hand-firebird` (raw WebGL2 GPU-particle light-creature). The other two are complete, build-reviewed implementations `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build тАФ resurrect from these specs. All three share: MediaPipe Hands via CDN dynamic ESM import (the `493`/`444` pattern тАФ `@mediapipe/tasks-vision`, `HandLandmarker`, model `hand_landmarker.task`, GPU delegate, VIDEO mode, mirror-x); openness = avg fingertip distance from palm normalized by hand span; a scripted **virtual-hand auto-demo** that sings on load before any camera permission (and on camera-denied / MediaPipe-fail); AudioContext-in-gesture (iOS unlock); `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (тИТ6 dB / 20:1) + тЙд8 kHz lowpass; always-on ambient pad; no API route, no guard, no npm deps. The diversity gate was decided on OUTPUT renderer (WebGL2 was the scarcest in the rolling-10 at 1├Ч; Canvas2D and SVG were both already 3├Ч тЖТ either would hit 4├Ч), so 524 won the renderer slot and these two lost on diversity, not concept quality.

### 523-kids-hand-puppet тАФ `queued` (the most-legible-for-a-4yo ┬╖ Canvas2D shadow-puppet)
**Same concept, rendered as a warm Canvas2D shadow-theatre DOG** rigged to the hand skeleton: thumb = lower jaw (swings open with openness тЖТ the dog "sings"/barks a note), fingers = ears that flare with finger spread, a wagging tail that speeds up while singing, a warm amber eye. Wrist Y (mirrored, up=higher) тЖТ C-major pentatonic; finger spread тЖТ lowpass cutoff (brighter timbre). Triangle fundamental + sine overtones; C3+G3 ambient pad. Refs: MediaPipe Hands (arXiv 2006.10214) ┬╖ shadow puppetry (wayang kulit / Lotte Reiniger). **Ambition 3/5** (#1 lab-first MediaPipe Hands ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs). **Why it didn't win:** Canvas2D was already 3├Ч in the rolling-10 тЖТ shipping it = 4├Ч (the JURY's "Canvas2D is the new three.js" trap), and a Canvas2D dog is the least "massively bigger" of the three renderers. **Why it's the strongest bank for a literal 4yo:** it is the **most legibly-a-creature** тАФ "my hand is a puppy that sings when I open it" reads in one second, where the firebird is more abstract; and Canvas2D is the **most permission/hardware-robust** render (no WebGL2/GPU dependency). **Resurrect** when Canvas2D is no longer over-represented, or for a low-end-device / maximum-legibility kids context. (Built clean: `page.tsx` 836 lines + README; builder-reported clean. Two edges flagged by the builder: the `computeSpread` angular formula may invert on some hand orientations тАФ swap to `maxSpan/╧А` if spread feels backward; openness thresholds are tuned for an adult hand and may need lowering for small hands.)

### 525-kids-hand-choir тАФ `queued` (the cleverest concept ┬╖ SVG five-fingertip choir)
**Same hand-tracking input, but each of the 5 fingertips becomes its own glowing singer sprite** (a friendly cut-paper orb with eyes that widen and a mouth that opens), connected by a shimmering harmony web of bezier threads. **Spread the fingers wide тЖТ the five voices fan OUT into a full five-part pentatonic chord** (ratio-tuned 1, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 9/4 over a root); **close the hand тЖТ all five slide to UNISON** (a warm hug, sprites cuddle, hearts appear). Wrist height тЖТ root register (C3тЖТC5, exponential); per-finger height nudges its own voice ┬▒2% within the scale. Always-on 3-voice pad (C3/G3/E3); five voices kept low-gain to avoid clipping the limiter. **Inline SVG** render. Refs: MediaPipe Hands (arXiv 2006.10214) ┬╖ Imogen Heap *Mi.Mu* gloves (hand-as-ensemble) ┬╖ SVG cut-paper character lineage. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 lab-first MediaPipe Hands ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems: hand-landmark + 5-voice chord engine + SVG choir + auto-demo ┬╖ #3 named refs). **Why it didn't win:** SVG was already 3├Ч in the rolling-10 тЖТ shipping it = 4├Ч (the new monoculture the JURY warned of), AND the builder self-flagged a perf edge тАФ it drives the SVG via a `setSvgFrame` counter state so React reconciles the **full SVG tree at ~60fps**, which may drop to ~30fps on low-end phones (still smooth via lerp, but not free). **Why it's the cleverest bank:** "hand = a five-part choir you conduct, spread for chord / close for a hug" is arguably the most *musical-pedagogically rich* of the three (open chord тЖФ unison is a real harmonic lesson a 4yo feels in their fingers). **Resurrect** when SVG is under-represented, **switching to ref-based direct SVG-attribute mutation** (per-`<circle>`/`<line>` refs updated in the rAF loop, no React re-render) to erase the perf edge. (Built clean: `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + README; builder self-built `тЬУ Compiled successfully`, 4.97 kB route, zero TS/ESLint issues.)

INPUT **keyboard/text** (the starved input lane) ┬╖ OUTPUT **SVG** animated score (staff, per-character glyphs, sweeping playhead) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE a deterministic **letterтЖТpitch+duration musical cipher** (D-Lydian, 26 letters across D3тАУA6; vowels=triangle/held at resonant scale degrees, consonants=sine/crisp; punctuationтЖТdynamics: `.`=fermata, `!`=sforzando, `?`=+1 semitone rising inflection, capitals=accent) + a 25 ms lookahead performance scheduler + a continuous D-Lydian drone pad ┬╖ VIBE playful-literary, ink-on-luminous-parchment. **Named ref:** Olivier Messiaen's *langage communicable* (M├йditations, 1969 тАФ an actual letterтЖТpitch+duration alphabet) + the musical-cryptogram tradition (B-A-C-H, Schumann ABEGG, Shostakovich DSCH). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named ref; no clean #1 тАФ textтЖТmusic is adjacent to `119-poem-fluid`, so it doesn't claim a lab-first primitive). *Promising:* the most delightful of the three and the only one on the genuinely starved keyboard-text input; arbitrary prose sounds *intentional* because everything quantizes to Lydian. *Why it lost:* lowest ambition (2/5 vs the winner's 3/5), and "type-to-make-music" is a smaller swing than a whole generative jazz combo. **Resurrect** as a clean SVG/text piece when the text-input lane is wanted, or DEEP it with word-level phrase grammar + a second cipher mode. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (714 lines), `audio.ts` (251), `cipher.ts` (234), `README.md`.

- **`528-market-veil`** (live markets тЖТ an evolving ambient drone) тАФ `queued, with a caveat`. INPUT **live crypto-market data** (Binance public 24hr ticker BTC/ETH/SOL, Coinbase spot fallback, polled 15 s, direct client fetch тАФ no API route/secret) + a robust synthetic random-walk fallback ┬╖ OUTPUT **WebGL2** domain-warped fBm "veil" shader (cool indigo calm тЖТ amber greed тЖТ violet/crimson fear) ┬╖ TECHNIQUE data-sonification (24h %changeтЖТinterval width/momentum, rolling volatilityтЖТ┬▒18┬в beating + tremolo + turbulence, a "fear index"тЖТminor-2nd/tritone/тЩн9 fear-chord fading in quadratically), one sustained JI voice per instrument ┬╖ VIBE documentary, anxious-calm, observational, never resolving on a timer. **Named ref:** Brian Eno *Music for Airports* (long-form no-cadence) + Andrea Polli / Carla Scaletti (data sonification). **Ambition 3/5** (#1 lab-first finance/market piece + #2 + #3). **CAVEAT тАФ why it lost (honest):** its "live-data sustained-drone that tracks one aggregate scalar" concept тАФ *and even its `-veil` name* тАФ **overlaps `502-atmosphere-veil`** (cycle 387, live-weatherтЖТsustained-tension WebGPU drone), the exact "too similar" trap the jury keeps flagging; and **Binance geo-blocks US**, so for Karel (US) it would almost certainly run **SIMULATED**, undercutting the "live markets" headline (the synthetic fallback keeps it alive but the promise degrades). **Resurrect only as an explicitly-different angle** from 502 (e.g. a *discrete* market event-sequencer / order-book rhythm piece, not another aggregate drone) and swap Binance for a US-CORS-reachable source. ## Banked ┬з396 (cycle 396 KIDS DEEP non-winners тАФ TEXT seeds, folders removed; renumber on revival, max committed folder now 529)
Cycle 396 went DEEP on ONE kids concept тАФ *a 4-year-old draws a simple doodle; it is recognized, comes alive, and sings* тАФ attacked via THREE technical approaches. Winner shipped: `529-kids-doodle-choir` (TF.js DoodleNet тЖТ 8 storybook archetypes, Canvas2D). The two banked here are complete, build-reviewed implementations `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build. All three share: a big finger-drawing canvas; a classifierтЖТarchetype map; per-archetype animation + a warm C-pentatonic motif (so a "misread" is still delightful); a scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** that draws + recognizes + sings on load with ZERO interaction and even if no model loads (it bypasses the classifier and drives the archetype pipeline directly); AudioContext-in-gesture (iOS unlock); master `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (тИТ6 dB / 20:1) + тЙд8 kHz lowpass; no API route, no guard, no npm deps (TF.js, where used, via CDN dynamic import тАФ the `493`/MediaPipe pattern). The diversity gate decided on TECHNIQUE/CONCEPT, not build quality.

### 530-kids-sketch-garden тАФ `queued` (the bulletproof offline version ┬╖ WebGL2 glowing creatures)
**Same draw-it-comes-alive magic, but recognized by SHAPE alone тАФ no neural net, no network.** A fully-local **hand-coded geometric classifier** (closedness, aspect ratio, path wiggliness, corner/direction-change count, convex-hull roundness, stroke count тЖТ 6 archetypes) decides what the doodle is; the drawing then transforms into a **WebGL2 additive-blended particle creature** (600 points seeded along the drawn path: a bloom radiates, a tree floats up, a bird flutters, a wave drifts, a critter scuttles, a star pulses) that sings its motif and joins a luminous night-garden choir. Canvas2D glow fallback if WebGL2 is absent. **Named refs:** Jono Brandel & Lullatone *Patatap* (instant playful shapeтЖТsound) + the **$1 Unistroke Recognizer** (Wobbrock et al.) geometric-gesture lineage. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: geometric classifier + WebGL2 particle renderer + Web-Audio garden choir + auto-demo; #3 named refs тАФ **no clean #1**: geometric/feature analysis is adjacent to existing pieces, and it deliberately forgoes the TF.js lab-first). *Why it didn't win:* this was the DEEP cycle whose entire ambition story is the **TF.js lab-first** тАФ 530 is the approach that gives that up, so it clears the floor at only 2/5 while 529/531 hit 3/5. *Why it's a strong bank:* it is the **most robust** (zero network/model dependency тАФ it can NEVER fall to a fallback because it has no model to lose) and has the **most beautiful renderer** (WebGL2 additive glow vs 529's Canvas2D). **Resurrect** as a guaranteed-offline / low-connectivity skin of 529, OR тАФ best тАФ fold its WebGL2 glowing-particle creatures into 529 as the winner's render upgrade (529's Canvas2D storybook + 530's glow = the ideal merge). Builder-reported: zero TS/ESLint errors across all five files. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (574), `gl.ts`, `audio.ts`, `classify.ts`, `README.md`.

### 531-kids-drawing-band тАФ `queued, with a diversity caveat` (the most musical ┬╖ TF.js + tempo-locked groove)
**Same DoodleNet recognition, but every doodle JOINS A BAND** тАФ each recognized drawing becomes one looping voice in a shared 96-BPM groove (critterтЖТsoft kick, sunтЖТwarm pad, birdтЖТhigh sparkle, fishтЖТbubbly bass, tree/flowerтЖТpluck arp, star/cloudтЖТhi-hat shimmer), all quantized to one "Tale of Two Clocks" lookahead scheduler (25 ms interval, 120 ms horizon, single shared `originTime` so there's zero per-voice drift). More doodles = a richer little song; the auto-demo "draws" 5 doodles over ~10 s into a full looping groove. C-pentatonic so every layer fits. **Named refs:** Quick, Draw! (Jongejan, Ha, et al.) + DoodleNet (yining1023) + C. Roberts "A Tale of Two Clocks." **Ambition 3/5** (#1 TF.js lab-first + #2 тЙе3 subsystems: DoodleNet classifier + groove scheduler + per-role synth voices + Canvas2D band = 4 + #3 named refs) тАФ **tied with the winner on ambition.** *Why it didn't win (diversity, not quality):* its "build a band / loop station" CONCEPT lands squarely in the lab's **most-saturated kids lane** тАФ `98-kids-drum-circle`, `35/121/172-loop-station`, `147-kids-beat-pulse`, `150-kids-beat-builder`, `358-beat-mirror`, `423-kids-face-beat` and more тАФ exactly the "too similar in design and theme" trap Karel/the jury keep flagging; 529's "your drawings come alive and sing" is the fresher framing and the more direct fit to Karel's *loved* draw/paint pieces (the recognition is the novelty, so spend it on the less-worn lane). *Why it's the strongest musical bank:* it is genuinely the most **musically satisfying** of the three тАФ a real song builds, not just simultaneous motifs тАФ and its tempo-locked groove engine is reusable. **Resurrect** on a cycle when the kids groove/loop lane is NOT over-represented, or fold its shared-scheduler quantization into 529 so the choir's motifs lock to a gentle pulse instead of free intervals. Builder-reported: two clean `npm run build` runs, ESLint + TS clean. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (582), `audio.ts` (322), `classify.ts` (290), `README.md`.

## ┬з397 тАФ banked from the cycle-397 ADULT WIDE fire (2 non-winner explorers; winner shipped = `532-vocoder-veil`, the lab's first channel vocoder)

Cycle 397 ran WIDE with three orthogonal adult explorers on three non-saturated renderers (WebGL2 / three.js / audio-first), each clearing the ambition floor and dodging the rolling-10 banned "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE + the 4├Ч renderer trap (Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG all at 3├Ч). Shipped `532-vocoder-veil` (channel vocoder, Karel's real piano as carrier тАФ the cleanest lab-first + the standing his-real-music directive). The other two are complete, build-reviewed implementations `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build тАФ resurrect from these specs.

### 533-hollow тАФ `queued` (the cleanest sculptural resurrect ┬╖ three.js ┬╖ comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension)
**What if the music lived in the SILENCE you carve тАФ tension made not by adding dissonance but by SUBTRACTING, hollowing a sustained tone until the gaps between the teeth become the melody?** A rich detuned-saw/triangle/noise drone (E2 ~82 Hz, many partials) passed through **two stacked feedforward comb filters** (`y[n] = 0.5┬╖x[n] + 0.5┬╖(тИТg)┬╖x[nтИТD]`); the combs carve a harmonic ladder of **destructive-interference notches** at `f_k=(2kтИТ1)/(2D)`. A 2-D field maps **x = comb delay (notch pitch, 0.3тЖТ22 ms log)** ├Ч **y = feedback depth (notch depth, 0.05тЖТ0.88, hard-clamped so it can never self-oscillate)**; a second comb at an irrational тЙИ1.42 delay ratio (notch grids never align) produces compound cancellations that collapse whole spectral regions to near-silence. **three.js** subdivided cylindrical shell whose vertices displace **inward** at the analytic notch frequencies (confirmed against a live FFT) and swell where the spectrum survives тАФ the carving is literally visible. A Lissajous **auto-carve** path sweeps the field on load (тЙИ16 s/cycle) so it sounds + morphs hands-free; touch takes over, 4 s idle resumes. Canvas2D notch-spectrum fallback. There is **no resolve button** тАФ the tension is permanent and structural. **Named refs:** Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969); Maryanne Amacher (*Music for Sound-Joined Rooms*); the phaser/flanger comb lineage. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 *scoped* тАФ comb-filter cancellation as the *compositional center* is lab-first, though the DSP primitive appears elsewhere as FX/flute-model; +#2 тЙе3 subsystems: rich drone synth + two-comb cancellation engine + analytic-notchтЖТmesh displacement + FFT + auto-carve; +#3 named refs). **Why it didn't win:** ties 532 on ambition, but its #1 is the *scoped* one where 532's vocoder is a clean verified 0├Ч, and 532 fulfills the standing his-real-music directive 533 doesn't. **Why it's a strong bank:** the most *sculptural* of the three тАФ the three.js carving glances beautifully тАФ and a real answer to the jury's standing "put tension in a never-touched primitive" provocation. Resurrect as a psychoacoustic-tension spine (pair with 534). Builder flagged the displacement is conservatively tuned (0.42 inward max, to avoid open-cylinder normal artifacts); a subdivided torus/sphere would carve more viscerally. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (535), `audio.ts` (258), `README.md` (166).

### 534-third-ear тАФ `queued` (the highest-surprise concept ┬╖ audio-first ┬╖ combination/difference Tartini tones)
**What if the melody you hear isn't actually being played тАФ what if it only exists inside your own ear, conjured by two pure tones your ear can't help but combine?** Two pure `'sine'` oscillators at fтВБ (~600 Hz fixed) and fтВВ; because human hearing is a **nonlinear transducer**, the ear manufactures **combination / difference / Tartini tones** that are not present in the air тАФ the difference tone (fтВВтИТfтВБ), the often-stronger cubic difference tone (2fтВБтИТfтВВ), the sum tone. By sliding fтВВ so that (fтВВтИТfтВБ) traces a **just-intonation pentatonic phrase** (CтЖТEтЖТDтЖТCтЖТGтЖТAтЖТGтЖТEтЖТDтЖТC, root тЙИ130 Hz), a third melody emerges *from nowhere*. **Audio-first / minimal Canvas2D** (the jury's under-tested non-screen lane): near-black field, an amber orb (fтВБ), a teal orb (fтВВ), and a faint pulsing violet **ghost** orb where the difference tone "lives" тАФ plus a dim second ghost for the cubic. Drag the orbs to explore; 5 s idle resumes the auto-demo. An honest **"phantom only / reinforced" toggle**: by default a low (тЙИ18%) reinforcement oscillator at fтВВтИТfтВБ guarantees the melody is audible on phone speakers; "phantom only" removes it so on good headphones at volume *your own ear* makes the tune тАФ the gap between the two modes IS the demonstration. **Named refs:** Giuseppe Tartini *il terzo suono* (1714, used it as a violin tuning aid); Maryanne Amacher *Third Ear Music* / "additional tones"; Vincenzo Galilei; Jean-Philippe Rameau *G├йn├йration harmonique* (1737). **Ambition 2/5** (#1 clean lab-first тАФ combination/difference tones grep-verified 0├Ч; +#3 named refs; #2 NOT cleanly claimed тАФ fewest subsystems: a few oscillators + a difference-tone sequencer + a deliberately spare visual). **Why it didn't win:** the most *surprising* idea of the three, but (a) lowest ambition (2/5), (b) audio-first so the 06:30 phone GLANCE is weak, and (c) the acoustic effect is admittedly unreliable on the very phone speakers Karel reviews on (the reinforcement crutch saves audibility but undercuts the magic). **Why it's a strong bank:** the highest-*surprise* concept the lab has queued тАФ the listener's body is part of the instrument. **Resurrect** for a headphone/all-ages listening cycle, or pair with 533 as the psychoacoustic-tension spine. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (422), `audio.ts` (214), `README.md` (109).

### 535-kids-starling-choir тАФ `queued` (the GPU-scale technical resurrect of the "living flock that sings" spine ┬╖ raw WebGL2 ┬╖ kids 4+)
**What if a murmuration of thousands of glowing birds of light flew with REAL emergent flocking, and the flock itself sang as the child shepherds it?** Cycle 398's DEEP sibling that attacked the singing-murmuration concept via **raw WebGL2 transform feedback** (vs the shipped 537's three.js). ~2,500 agents in ping-pong VBOs (interleaved `vec2 pos, vec2 vel`); each frame an update vertex shader applies Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion (sampling ~30 neighbours from a packed **RGBA32F** texture) and writes new state via `gl.beginTransformFeedback`; the render pass draws additive-blended point-sprite glow; a CPU shadow copy is read back async via `getBufferSubData` (`PIXEL_PACK_BUFFER`) every ~200 ms to compute audio state without stalling the GPU. Flock state тЖТ harmony exactly as 537 (cohesionтЖТrichness, centroid-heightтЖТpentatonic register, up to 4 quadrant clusters тЖТ 4 sustained pentatonic voices that split/merge audibly, turbulenceтЖТtremolo+noise wash). CPU-boids/Canvas2D fallback (700 agents) when WebGL2/transform-feedback is absent. Ghost-shepherd auto-demo splits the flock every ~8тАУ14 s. **Named refs:** Reynolds SIGGRAPH 1987; Cavagna et al. *Scale-free correlations in starling flocks* PNAS 2010; W.D. Hamilton *Geometry for the Selfish Herd* 1971. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе5 subsystems + #3 named refs + #4 spine cycle 1). **Why it didn't win:** the most ambitious *technically* (a true GPU flocking sim), but it self-flags genuine iOS-Safari fragility (`texStorage2D RGBA32F` neighbour texture + `PIXEL_PACK_BUFFER`/`getBufferSubData` readback) on the very iPad Karel reviews on, and WebGL2 is 2├ЧтЖТ3├Ч in the rolling-10 where three.js (537) is 0├Ч. **Resurrect** when we want the flock to climb to 5тАУ10k birds тАФ the GPU path is the only way to scale past ~700 CPU agents. Built files (removed): `boids.ts` (918), `page.tsx` (306), `audio.ts` (244), `README.md`.

### 536-kids-lantern-shoal тАФ `queued` (the best-legibility resurrect / character-art donor for 537 ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ kids 4+)
**What if a shoal of big, friendly glowing lantern-fish swam together with real flocking, each fish a little FRIEND with eyes and a tail of light тАФ and the shoal sang as a 4-year-old herds it?** Cycle 398's DEEP sibling тАФ the same singing-murmuration concept on **Canvas2D** with **rich per-creature character** (radial-gradient glow bodies, simple eyes, dot/bezier tails, additive `'lighter'` glow), ~380 fish so each reads as an individual. Spatial-hash boids (Reynolds; 80 px cells; velocity clamp 40тАУ180 px/s; boundary repulsion); touch lure (single + two-finger split) + optional device-tilt "current." Shoal state тЖТ harmony as 537 (cohesionтЖТwarmth, centroid-YтЖТregister, up to 3 k-means clusters тЖТ sustained pentatonic voices, speedтЖТtremolo). Ghost-lure auto-demo splits the shoal every ~8 s. **Named refs:** Reynolds SIGGRAPH 1987; Reynolds GDC 1999 *Steering Behaviors*; Partridge 1982 *The structure and function of fish schools*. **Ambition 3/5** (#2+#3+#4). **Why it didn't win тАФ diversity, not quality:** the **best literal-4yo legibility** of the three (you can see individual friends moving together), but Canvas2D was already 3├Ч in the rolling-10 and shipping it would push Canvas2D to **4├Ч** тАФ the monoculture trap. **Resurrect** when Canvas2D is scarce again, OR fold its character-art (eyes/tails) into 537's `THREE.Points` so the murmuration's birds read as individuals. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (575), `shoal.ts` (311), `audio.ts` (226), `README.md`.

### 539-tremor-globe тАФ `queued` (banked WIDE non-winner, cycle 399 ┬╖ live USGS earthquake sonification ┬╖ three.js globe ┬╖ adult)
**What if Resonance made music about the living Earth тАФ sonifying real, live earthquakes so you inhabit one planetary presence that never stops trembling?** Fetches the public CORS-open **USGS real-time GeoJSON feed** (`.../summary/all_day.geojson`, no key, re-polled ~90s) + a 20-quake embedded fallback. Each quake тЖТ an audio event: **magnitudeтЖТpitch+loudness+duration** (M0тЙИ420 Hz bell тЖТ M8тЙИ28 Hz groan), **depthтЖТlowpass timbre**, **longitudeтЖТstereo pan**; a stochastic wave-scheduler fires 3тАУ8 events every ~18 s over an 8 s window with downward pitch-glide, over a 16 Hz sub-bass drone that breathes with the dataset's mean magnitude. three.js Fibonacci dot-sphere globe auto-rotates; markers flare in sync. Voice pool capped at 8. **Named refs:** USGS feeds; Andrea Polli *Atmospherics/Weather Works*; Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology*; Carla Scaletti. **Why it didn't win (cycle 399):** its ambition-#1 claim ("first real external-API sonification") is **false** тАФ the lab already has `233-earth-pulse`, `314-solar-wind`, `437-wiki-pulse`, `463-terra-gamelan`, and `337-seismic-globe` (a near-direct sibling) тАФ so it falls to #2+#3=2/5 and is the most *redundant* of the three explorers. Competently built (1,135 lines, 4 subsystems, build-clean in isolation). **Resurrect** only if it differentiates hard from 337/233 тАФ e.g. drop the globe entirely for a non-screen audio-only Earth-drone, or sonify a feed the lab hasn't (live lightning/Blitzortung, ISS pass, ocean-buoy wave-height). Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (323), `audio.ts` (263), `globe.ts` (298), `quakes.ts` (112), `README.md`.

### 540-slime-cantor тАФ `queued` (banked WIDE non-winner, cycle 399 ┬╖ WebGPU Physarum transport network ┬╖ adult)
**What if Resonance grew a single living organism тАФ a Physarum slime-mold transport network on the GPU тАФ and the shape of the network it builds IS the evolving voice?** Jeff Jones (2010) agent sense-steer-deposit + diffuse-decay on WebGPU compute (WebGL2 / CPU-Canvas2D fallback); field statistics (coverageтЖТbrightness, connectednessтЖТconsonance, turbulenceтЖТtremolo) drive a long-form never-resolving drone; pointer = food-source attractor. **Named refs:** Jeff Jones *Artificial Life* 2010; Sage Jenson (mxsage) "38"/Physarum; Toshiyuki Nakagaki (Nature 2000); Refik Anadol. **Why it didn't win (cycle 399):** (1) its ambition-#1 ("first physarum / raw-GPU compute") is **false** тАФ `327-physarum-choir` already exists (plus WebGPU at 486/518/520), so physarum is not lab-first; (2) at curation time it *looked* incomplete (only `audio.ts` + `sim.ts` written) тАФ **corrected post-commit:** a second, very slow 540 builder (~34 min) actually finished it fully (`page.tsx` 213 / `sim.ts` 935 / `audio.ts` 199 / `README.md` 172) with all three GPU paths (WGSL 65k agents / WebGL2 16k / CPU 3k), so it was *late*, not broken тАФ but the false #1 stands regardless; (3) its late-finishing agent kept re-materializing its folder *after* every removal (incl. after the commit) and broke the first authoritative build (its triple-slash `webgpu.d.ts` path-reference fails ESLint) тАФ a worse repeat of the cycle-398 race. **Resurrect** only with a *differentiated* angle vs 327 (e.g. two organisms competing for one food field = back toward "two parties", or physarum solving a maze shaped by the live audio spectrum) AND `TaskStop` the agent before removing its folder. Built files (removed): full `page.tsx`/`sim.ts`/`audio.ts`/`README.md`.

### 542-kids-liquid-light-gl тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 400 ┬╖ WebGL2 ping-pong stable-fluids ┬╖ kids 4+)
**Same "singing liquid light" concept as the shipped `541-kids-liquid-light`, but on WebGL2 instead of WebGPU.** A full Jos Stam (SIGGRAPH 1999) stable-fluids solver implemented in **WebGL2 fragment shaders with ping-pong half-float FBOs**: splat тЖТ curl тЖТ **vorticity confinement** тЖТ divergence тЖТ 24-iter Jacobi pressure тЖТ gradient-subtract тЖТ velocity & dye advection тЖТ luminous tone-mapped display with cheap bloom. Same kids-safe pentatonic sonification (swirlтЖТbrightness, heightтЖТregister, C3тАУC5, always-on pad, тИТ6 dB/20:1 limiter), throttled (~15 Hz) `gl.readPixels` energy sampling (NOT per-frame), ghost-finger auto-demo, Canvas2D "lite fluid" fallback, `text-rose-300` notice. **Why it didn't win (cycle 400):** lost purely on the **diversity audit** тАФ WebGL2 is at 2├Ч in the kids rolling-10 (524/500) and Canvas2D-class renderers are crowding toward 4├Ч, while WebGPU was 0├Ч; the winner's WebGPU path is the harder diversification. It is complete + clean (`page.tsx` 332, `fluid-gl.ts` w/ vorticity, `fallback.ts`, `audio.ts`, README). **Resurrect** as the **iPad-reliable production path** if Karel reports the WebGPU `541` doesn't run on his device тАФ WebGL2 is far more uniformly supported on iOS Safari than WebGPU. `CURL_AMT`/dissipation/splat-radius are eyeballed and want a real-GPU tuning pass. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `fluid-gl.ts`, `fallback.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

### 543-kids-liquid-light-flow тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 400 ┬╖ Canvas2D particle-advection ┬╖ kids 4+)
**The most-compatible "singing liquid light" approach: no GPU shaders at all.** A coarse **56├Ч56 velocity grid** the finger stirs (impulse splats + diffuse + decay) carrying a slow ambient **curl-noise** (Bridson et al. 2007) so the pool always swirls on its own, advecting **~6500 glowing dye particles** rendered additively (`globalCompositeOperation = "lighter"`) over a low-alpha dark fade-trail тЖТ ink-in-water tails, not dots. Same kids-safe pentatonic sonification + always-on pad + ghost-finger auto-demo; tuned for тЙе30 fps on older iPads (particle count is the obvious knob). **Why it didn't win (cycle 400):** lost as **essentially the winner's own Canvas2D fallback** promoted to a standalone piece тАФ and Canvas2D is trending toward 4├Ч in the kids window. It is the best legibility/compatibility option and genuinely reads as flowing liquid. **Resurrect** if a future cycle wants a *zero-GPU* guaranteed-everywhere kids fluid, or fold its 56├Ч56-grid + 6500-particle tuning into `541`'s fallback to upgrade the lite path. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `flow.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

### 544-conductors-canon тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 401 ┬╖ MediaPipe Hands two-hand conducting тЖТ SVG scrolling loom ┬╖ adults / polytempo)
**The literal "conduct the loom with your two hands."** Cycle 2 of `514-polytempo-loom` via MediaPipe Hands: each hand is one conductor тАФ its vertical wrist/fingertip trajectory is read for "visual beats" (downward velocity-reversal at the ictus, ┬▒0.04 normalized-Y threshold), inter-beat intervals (0.35тАУ1.55 s = 40тАУ170 BPM) averaged over 3тАУ5 beats and smoothed (╧Д=1.5 s, never quantized). Left hand тЖТ voices 0тАУ1 (├Ч1, ├Ч1/тИЪ2), right hand тЖТ voices 2тАУ4 (├Ч1, ├Ч1/╧Ж, ├Ч╧Ж/2) тЖТ a conducted 5-voice Nancarrow canon on the same "Tale of Two Clocks" lookahead engine + D-pentatonic bell timbre + тИТ12 dBFS brick-wall limiter as the winner. Renders in **514's exact SVG scrolling loom** (5 color-coded lanes, marks scroll at 58 px/s, NOW line at 22%, glow on fire, direct-DOM mutation тАФ zero React re-renders) so it reads instantly as "514, but now I conduct it." Ghost conductors (72 & 72тИЪ2 BPM) drive it from frame one; resume after 4 s of no hands. MediaPipe via `webpackIgnore` CDN dynamic import (`@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14`, no npm dep); careful self-report (helpers non-`use*`, the two MediaPipe `any` casts `eslint-disable`'d, exhaustive-deps obeyed). Files (removed): `page.tsx` (1081), `README.md` (169). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 + #3 Nancarrow/SMT + #4 514 cycle 2; #1 contestable тАФ MediaPipe Hands used at 524, beat detection at 106/147). **Why it didn't win (cycle 401):** diversity audit тАФ SVG is already 3├Ч in the jury rolling-15 (508/514/538), so shipping it would push SVG to **4├Ч = newly over-represented**, the exact renderer-monoculture the jury is fighting; the winner's three.js (1├Ч) lowers concentration instead. **Resurrect FIRST** if Karel wants the literal two-hand conducting, or if the winner's three.js / no-ML motionтЖТtempo underperforms on his device тАФ this is near-shippable and its hand-beat detection is likely more responsive than autocorrelation-on-optical-flow. Unverified: the ┬▒0.04 beat threshold wants real-gesture tuning; left/right hand assignment uses an x-position heuristic (mirrored feeds can invert).

### 546-clock-canon тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 401 ┬╖ MediaPipe Pose full-body two-arm conducting тЖТ SVG orbital phase-clock ┬╖ adults / polytempo)
**Your whole body conducts the canon, and you watch it as orbiting clock-hands that sweep and NEVER realign.** Cycle 2 of `514-polytempo-loom` via MediaPipe Pose (full-body, works at a distance, dance-like): left wrist (landmark 15) vs right wrist (16) vertical beat тЖТ two conducted tempi (same visual-beat ictus detection + smoothing as 544), driving the same 5-voice "Tale of Two Clocks" Nancarrow engine. The distinguishing move is a **fresh visual idiom** (not 514's scrolling loom): each voice is a **dot orbiting a circle** at angular velocity = its tempo (one revolution per beat); incommensurable rates mean the dots sweep and never realign тАФ the *visual proof of the math* тАФ with fading trails, a glow/pulse as each dot crosses 12 o'clock, and a **phase-proximity chord** that brightens between two dots when they near-align (a near-miss, NOT a downbeat тАФ implements 514's own "phase proximity heatmap" cycle-2 hook). Ghost arms (72 & 72тИЪ2 BPM) sweep from frame one; resume after 4 s of no body. MediaPipe Pose via `webpackIgnore` CDN import (`pose_landmarker_lite`, no npm dep). Complete (`page.tsx` ~39.5 KB, `README.md` ~6.8 KB; its builder's "completed" notification arrived before the files flushed тАФ a delayed-write race, handled). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 + #3 Nancarrow/SMT + #4 514 cycle 2; #1 contestable тАФ Pose used at 493). **Why it didn't win (cycle 401):** same SVG-would-hit-4├Ч diversity reason as 544, AND full-body Pose is the least reliable of the three at the 06:30 phone-glance distance (the winner's no-ML room-motion needs no body in frame). **Resurrect** for the **orbital-clock visual itself** тАФ the clock-hands-that-never-realign is arguably the most legible single image of "incommensurable tempi" in the whole spine; fold it into 545/544 as an alternate view, or ship it when SVG is scarce again. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `README.md`.

## SPINE: Companion / Presence тАФ kids (518-living-ember cycle 1; the "Songkeeper" family, cycle 402)
**The thread:** *a kids creature that is a RELATIONSHIP, not a toy тАФ it remembers what the child gave it and is demonstrably different on return.* Jury 2026-06-12 provocation #6 named `518-kids-living-ember` (the one kids piece with real long-form memory) as the thing to extend: "a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow," not another 90-second glow toy. **Cycle 2 (402, SHIPPED):** `549-kids-song-friend` тАФ the creature remembers musical *content* (actual sung pentatonic melodies via forgiving autocorrelation + babble-note fallback), persists them across **calendar days** in localStorage, and its **SVG body is literally drawn from the melodic contours** (each song = a petal tracing its pitches; the friend has a face that sings) тАФ transcends 322-kids-voice-garden (a timer-aged plant) by changing because of *what was sung*, not a clock. Won a kids DEEP 3-approach fire. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: pitch + cross-day memory + recall-synth + SVG render ┬╖ #3 named refs: Tamagotchi/Maita-Bandai 1996, Eno ┬╖ #4 spine cycle 2; honest #1 case for "melodic-content cross-day memory recalled as woven counterpoint," discounted because localStorage-persistence itself isn't lab-first). **Diversity** clean on every jury ban (voice INPUT not finger-on-glass ┬╖ SVG OUTPUT not Canvas2D/WebGPU ┬╖ pitch-recall TECH not GPU-physics-sim ┬╖ companion VIBE not calm-sensory-kids). **Cycle 3 (planned):** the two banked siblings below are the obvious next renderers; OR deepen recall тАФ let the creature *combine* taught melodies into a genuinely new song it "composes" overnight, or give it a simple call-and-response game ("sing the part it forgot").

### Banked ┬з402 (DEEP non-winners тАФ TEXT seeds, folders removed; renumber on revival, max folder now 549):
- **`547-kids-songkeeper`** (three.js orbiting-strand creature) тАФ `queued`. Same "remembers your songs across days, sings them back woven" concept, rendered as a **three.js glowing creature where each remembered song is an orbiting strand whose shape traces that song's pitch contour**; richest "alive" feel of the three, polished YIN-style detector, a "forget everything" reset + "pretend it's tomorrow" demo, CSS-fallback creature. *Promising:* the most beautiful idle presence; resurrect when three.js is scarce (it had just shipped at 545, so a 2nd consecutive three.js worked against diversity here). *Caveat that lost it:* "song тЖТ orbiting strand" is more abstract / less legible for a 4-year-old than 549's petals-with-a-face, and three.js was 2-in-a-row. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (620), `creature.ts`, `audio.ts`, `memory.ts`, `pitch.ts`, `README.md`.
- **`548-kids-songbloom`** (raw WebGL2 bioluminescent shader) тАФ `queued`. Same concept, but the memory is compressed into shader-seed uniforms (arms/branch/hue/twist/richness/pitchField[8]) that **grow a domain-warped bioluminescent deep-sea creature in a GLSL ES 3.00 fragment shader**, live-pulsed by RMS/pitch; first-strong-peak autocorrelation (octave-error-resistant), DOM-fallback creature. *Promising:* the lab's freshest *generative-shader-from-persistent-memory* idea тАФ bank as the cycle-3 renderer upgrade if a child's unique song-history-as-a-unique-glowing-organism is wanted. *Caveat that lost it:* memoryтЖТuniform-hash is the *least legible* "you can see your own songs" of the three (no face/character; a 4-year-old can't read the connection), and a full-screen shader reads less as a companion. Built files (removed): `page.tsx` (451), `gl.ts`, `audio.ts`, `memory.ts`, `README.md`.

## ┬з405 тАФ 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬╖ banked non-winners from the adult DEEP "first Gaussian-splat" fire (cycle 405)

Cycle 405 ran DEEP: ONE massive concept тАФ **the lab's first Gaussian-splatting renderer, sculpted by Karel's real Welcome Home piano** тАФ via three parallel WebGL2 approaches. Shipped `557-piano-splat-galaxy`. The other two are complete, build-reviewed, and ready to resurrect:

- **`556-piano-splat-spectrogram`** (`queued`) тАФ Karel's piano becomes a navigable 3D **spectrogram solid**: X = 96 log-spaced frequency bands, Z = scrolling time-history slices, Y/brightness/size = amplitude; ~7,680 additive Gaussian splats you orbit through. The most *legible/analytical* of the three (you literally see the spectrum as a turnable sculpture). Resurrect as the "teaching/analysis" variant, or fuse its time-axis scrolling into a future score-following splat piece. Files were complete (page.tsx 339, splat.ts 342, audio.ts 262, README 81) before removal тАФ rebuild from this spec.

- **`558-piano-splat-body`** (`queued`) тАФ Karel's piano given a **body of light**: ~20k Gaussian splats over a parametric Fibonacci-sphere "torso," deformed in the **vertex shader** by 24 FFT band-lobes (bass = global breathing, mids = spherical-harmonic lobes, highs = shimmer, onset = expanding shockwave ring). The most *conceptually ambitious* and the tightest bind to the genuinely-fresh **DNE├ЧGracia 4DGS performance of Amy May (2026)** тАФ "a musician as a streamable volumetric splat scene." Didn't win because it's conceptually adjacent to the existing `283-piano-isosurface` ("piano deforms a breathing 3D volume") тАФ the novelty was mostly the splat *technique*, not the behavior. **Strong cycle-2 path:** load a REAL captured `.splat`/4DGS scene (the actual browser-splatting wave) instead of a procedural torso, so it becomes a true radiance-field performer, not a procedural blob. The elegant ~27-floats/frame vertex-shader displacement is worth keeping.

**Splat spine (multi-cycle, #4):** 557 opens the lab's Gaussian-splat lane. Cycle 2 = load a real captured `.splat` scene + depth-sorted alpha compositing (true 3DGS, not just additive billboards); cycle 3 = a 4D (animated) splat performance synced to his music, ├а la the Amy May piece. Bank 556/558 as the alternate renderers for that spine.

## ┬з409 тАФ banked non-winners from the adult DEEP "embodied polytempo" fire (cycle 409, 2026-06-13)

Cycle 409 fired a **DEEP** triple on ONE concept тАФ *cycle 2 of the `514-polytempo-loom` spine made EMBODIED: the human's gestures set two incommensurable tempi (snapped to the nearest of тИЪ2 / ╧Ж / e├╖2 / ╧А├╖2), so the two consonant voices drift through every phase relationship and can NEVER share a downbeat* тАФ the jury's exact #1+#4 ask (chase a 4/5; build the SECOND time-tension piece, embodied). Three input/embodiment approaches ├Ч non-SVG renderers (SVG output was the rolling-10 ban at 4├Ч). Winner shipped = **`568-conductor-hands`** (camera MediaPipe-Hands тЖТ three.js phase-space тАФ the directest literal answer to jury #4 "two gestures set incommensurable tempi": each hand conducts a voice; the freshest off-glass input vs the last 4 cycles; the most embodied/surprising). Both losers below are complete, build-reviewed real implementations (own folder, pure client-side, no API route, brick-wall limiter, hands-free silent auto-demo, graceful degradation); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. Renumber on revival; max committed folder now **568**.

- **`569-conductor-batons` (tap-tempo, raw WebGL2 тАФ the cleanest + most legible).** Two big multitouch thumb pads; tap each rhythmically тЖТ median-of-3 inter-tap interval sets that voice's tempo; voice B snaps to the nearest irrational ratio vs A. A **scrolling Nancarrow player-piano-roll** in a hand-written GLSL fullscreen fragment shader: two lanes drop a bright mark per scheduled beat, scrolling left at constant px/sec, the two columns **fanning apart forever** + a faint moir├й interference band between lanes so the drift reads at a glance. "Tale of Two Clocks" dual look-ahead schedulers, limiter master chain, frame-one silent auto-demo at e├╖2. **Why it lost (not quality):** finger-on-glass is the jury's flagged default-reflex lane, and tap-tempo is the least *embodied* of the three (vs jury #4's "embodied gestures"). **Why resurrect:** lowest-risk + most portable (no camera/sensor), and the literal scrolling-piano-roll is the MOST legible visualization of incommensurability in the trio тАФ **a strong cycle-3 viz to borrow into 568** (swap/augment 568's abstract Lissajous ribbon for a scrolling roll), or ship standalone when finger-input clears the diversity audit. `page.tsx` ~22kB, `render.ts` (GLSL roll) + `audio.ts` complete.
- **`570-conductor-baton-motion` (DeviceMotion baton, three.js).** Wave the phone like a baton; `accelerationIncludingGravity` magnitude тЖТ high-pass + adaptive-threshold peak detector (180 ms debounce, median-of-3) extracts the conductor's pulse (voice A); voice B locked to base ├Ч a user-selectable irrational (╧Ж default). Two glowing batons swing at the two periods tracing a **never-closing Lissajous/rose** in three.js; iOS `requestPermission()` fired synchronously in the Start click; tap-tempo fallback on desktop. **Why it lost (not quality):** device-motion repeats the *immediately prior* cycle's input modality (`566-kids-shake-band`, cycle 408) тАФ the "too similar" cross-cycle trap; also tilt was recent (553/500). **Why resurrect:** the most phone-native of the three тАФ Karel can literally wave his phone to conduct тАФ so revive when device-motion is clear of the recent window, or as the mobile companion mode to 568. `page.tsx` ~18kB, `render.ts` (fixed a ring-buffer trail bug) + `motion.ts` + `audio.ts` complete.
