## ┬з411 тАФ 2026-06-13 (UTC) ┬╖ banked non-winners from the adult WIDE fire (cycle 411)

Cycle 411 ran **WIDE**: three orthogonal adult explorers, each clearing the ambition floor via different tags, none using the rolling-10-banned three.js OUTPUT (4├Ч) or the standing JURY 2026-06-12 bans. Shipped `570-spoken-spell` (live speech recognition тЖТ SVG word-river тЖТ accreting linguistic canon; the directest answer to jury #2 "find sound in language, not a simulated physical field"). The other two are complete, build-reviewed real implementations (own folder, pure client-side, no API route, graceful degradation, hands-free auto-demo); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. Renumber on revival; **max committed folder now 570.**

### 571-the-withholding тАФ `queued` (banked WIDE non-winner, cycle 411 ┬╖ mic-silence inverse-gate ┬╖ minimal SVG ┬╖ adult / conceptual-critical)
**What if there were a piece of music you could only hear by GIVING SOMETHING UP тАФ a composition that exists only inside your restraint, playing only while the room stays silent and withdrawing the instant you make a sound?** The ordinary listener relationship (press play, receive) is inverted: the visitor must continuously *earn* the sound by withholding speech/movement/coughs. Mic `AnalyserNode` RMS read as an **inverse gate**: below a quiet threshold a 0..1 "depth" state integrates UP and the drone reveals more voices one by one (root тЖТ fifth тЖТ octave тЖТ third тЖТ upper partials, just-intonation above A2/110 Hz, multi-second `setTargetAtTime` swells); any sound above threshold makes depth DECAY and the upper voices fade тАФ so the piece is audibly different after ~60s of sustained silence than at second 5. Minimal SVG: a single slowly-breathing aura that brightens as the music is "received" and contracts on interruption, a depth bar, voice indicators, and a kind `text-white/75` "you made a sound тАФ it withdrew" notice for unmistakable cause/effect. Master `gain тЖТ lowpass тЖТ DynamicsCompressor тЖТ destination`, quiet + warm. Mic-denied OR noisy-room тЖТ an **"imagine the silence"** button raises depth on a slow timer so the full reveal still plays in a ~20s glance. **Named refs:** John Cage *4'33"* (1952); Christine Sun Kim (sound/silence and the cost of access); Manfred Werder / Wandelweiser (extreme quiet as material); Jem Finer *Longplayer* (patience as medium). **Ambition 2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: inverse mic-gate + stateful integrating reveal + JI drone synth + SVG render; #3 named refs above; **#1 contestable** тАФ a *conceptual/critical* category the lab has barely touched, but localStorage/state isn't a novel *technique*). **Why it didn't win (cycle 411):** the **strongest pure concept** of the three and the cleanest fill for the genuinely-missing conceptual/critical lane the jury's menu keeps daring (#3 non-screen-ish, #2 silence-not-physical-field) тАФ but its payoff requires either a quiet room or pressing the demo button, making it the **least glance-legible** at a 06:30 silent phone review, where 570's auto-demo simply speaks-and-sings itself. **Resurrect FIRST** when a WIDE cycle wants the conceptual lane and language/voice is crowded тАФ it is near-shippable. Self-flagged rough edges: `setTargetAtTime` called every RAF frame (throttle to ~100ms); breathing animation drives off `performance.now()` so it drifts vs the audio envelope (aesthetically OK, not intentional). Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

### 572-orrery-tunings тАФ `queued` (banked WIDE non-winner, cycle 411 ┬╖ device-orientation gyro ┬╖ raw WebGL2 aurora shader ┬╖ adult / meditative-spatial)
**What if you held your phone up and slowly turned and tilted through the room to tune into invisible "stations" of a just-intonation harmonic sky тАФ so navigating PHYSICAL space (where you point) navigates HARMONIC space (which pure-ratio chord you hear)?** `DeviceOrientationEvent` (alpha/beta/gamma; iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) places 7 just-intonation stations (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8) at specific compass headings + tilts across the celestial sphere; the current heading/tilt picks a **great-circle inverse-distance-weighted blend** of the nearest stations тЖТ a smoothly crossfaded just chord (root osc + partial bank at EXACT rational ratios, `setTargetAtTime` ~0.3тАУ0.6s crossfades). Holding still near a station тЖТ a clean beating-free pure chord + a "Lock %" climbs to 100; between stations тЖТ a richer tense blend. **Raw hand-written WebGL2 GLSL ES 3.00** fullscreen-triangle aurora whose brightest warped region tracks the tuned-in direction; compass-rose SVG HUD + station/ratio readout. Fallbacks: desktop pointer-drag "look around"; no-input auto-demo pans through all 7 stations; WebGL2-absent тЖТ `text-rose-300` + CSS-gradient that still shifts hue with heading. **Named refs:** La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela *Dream House* (a sustained-JI environment you move through); Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*; Maryanne Amacher (sound that changes as you move your head); Harry Partch / Ben Johnston (JI ratio lattices). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: orientation input + JI oscillator bank + IDW field math + WebGL2 shader; #3 named refs above; **no clean #1** тАФ gyro [238/253/308/тАж], JI synthesis, and "a sound-room you move through" [394-soundfield-room/400-soundwalk-room/441/475/486/496/552] are all well-trodden in the lab). **Why it didn't win (cycle 411):** the **lowest ambition + most conceptually redundant** of the three (it's a navigable variant of the many soundfield/tilt/JI-room pieces), and the builder self-flags a **6-octave FBM domain-warp evaluated 2├Ч for warp + 2├Ч for the curtain** that "may drop frames on older iPads" тАФ the exact device Karel reviews on. **Resurrect** only with a hard differentiator: derive the station headings from a *principled projection of the 5-limit lattice onto the sphere* (not artistic placement), and a much lighter shader (single-octave warp / precomputed gradient). Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `field.ts`, `README.md`.

Shipped **`576-presence-room`** (webcam head-pose тЖТ Web Audio `AudioListener` тЖТ HRTF JI Dream-House field; the lab's first head-tracked binaural / first embodied-spatial piece тАФ the directest answer to the jury's twice-repeated "zero embodied-spatial" gap). The other two are complete, build-reviewed real implementations (own folder, pure client-side, no API route, graceful degradation, hands-free auto-demo); folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked here as ready-to-resurrect TEXT. Renumber on revival; **max committed folder now 576.**

### 578-magnetosphere тАФ `queued` (banked WIDE non-winner, cycle 413 ┬╖ live NOAA space-weather data ┬╖ WebGPU compute aurora ┬╖ adult / awe-contemplative) тАФ **RESURRECT FIRST (next non-adjacent-to-data adult cycle)**
**What if you could hear the Earth's invisible magnetic weather right now тАФ the LIVE solar wind and planetary K-index turned into a warm, slowly-shifting choir, so a quiet sky sings calm and a geomagnetic storm makes it shimmer and swell?** Direct client-side `fetch()` of three CORS-open, no-key NOAA SWPC endpoints тАФ planetary K-index (`services.swpc.noaa.gov/products/noaa-planetary-k-index.json`), solar-wind plasma (speed/density, `.../solar-wind/plasma-2-hour.json`), solar-wind mag (Bz/Bt, `.../solar-wind/mag-2-hour.json`) тАФ newest-valid-row parsed, per-field **baked fallback** so it always plays (the 412 pattern: no route, no secret). Mapping: **Kp**тЖТmode/tension (0тАУ2 calm ionian тЖТ 3тАУ4 lydian shimmer тЖТ 5+ storm adds a faint minor-second beating layer), **wind speed**тЖТostinato tempo/density, **density**тЖТpartial count/timbre, **Bz** (southward = storm-driver)тЖТdrone root warmth. A warm additive glass-bell/choir ostinato on a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** with Eno-style recombination (minute 5 тЙа minute 1); master ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Visual: **WebGPU compute** aurora (20k particles advanced in a WGSL compute pass, instanced additive splat render; data-driven hue/turbulence/flow), with a **fully-functional Canvas2D curtain fallback** when `navigator.gpu` is absent. Live HUD shows the real Kp / wind / Bz + timestamp + a LIVE-vs-sample badge; auto-fetches + auto-plays a gentle demo on load (one tap to unlock audio) тАФ the **best phone-glance** of the three. **Named refs:** Andrea Polli (*Sonic Antarctica* / space-weather sonification); Semiconductor (*Brilliant Noise* тАФ raw solar data); Brian Eno (generative recombination); NASA/CARISMA sonification lineage. **Ambition 3тАУ4/5** (#1 first live geomagnetic/space-weather sonification AND a WebGPU-compute generative-data piece; #2 тЙе3 subsystems: multi-endpoint live fetch + look-ahead scheduler synth + WebGPU compute aurora; #3 named refs; #5 ties WebGPU's now-cross-browser-shipped status, Safari 26 / Firefox 141). **Why it didn't win (cycle 413):** the **highest raw ambition + best glance**, and it would **revive WebGPU** (jury-starved at 1├Ч, explicitly wanted back) тАФ but its input modality (real-world-data API тЖТ generative music) **repeats the immediately prior cycle's `575-kids-sky-song`** (weatherтЖТgenerative), the cross-cycle "too similar" trap. **Resurrect FIRST** on the next adult cycle that is NOT adjacent to a data-sonification ship тАФ it directly serves jury #5 (WebGPU) + the standing data-sonification menu, in a different register (invisible magnetosphere, adult, WebGPU) from 575. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `data.ts`, `audio.ts`, `gpu.ts`, `README.md`.

### 577-still-bloom тАФ `queued` (banked WIDE non-winner, cycle 413 ┬╖ device-motion stillness ┬╖ audio-first + minimal Canvas2D ┬╖ adult / warm-meditative)
**What if music only blooms when you go STILL тАФ hold yourself (and your phone) calm and a warm drone slowly unfolds voice by voice; move and it gently recedes тАФ so the piece rewards stillness, not action?** A "stillness depth" in [0,1] integrates UP when `DeviceMotionEvent.accelerationIncludingGravity` jitter (high-passed magnitude variance) is low and DECAYS on movement (desktop fallback: pointer-speed proxy). Depth crossings reveal an additive **just-intonation drone** voice-by-voice over a warm A2/110 Hz root (1/1 тЖТ 2/1 тЖТ 3/2 тЖТ 5/4 тЖТ 9/8 тЖТ 5/2 тЖТ 15/8), each with multi-second `setTargetAtTime` swells (throttled ~90ms тАФ fixes 571's per-frame bug) + per-voice/filter drift LFOs so it never loops and is audibly fuller after 60s than at second 5. **Audio-first** (the 0├Ч off-glass lane): only a minimal **Canvas2D** breathing warm aura + voice ring + depth bar. Master `gain тЖТ lowpass тЖТ DynamicsCompressor тЖТ destination`, quiet + warm. iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` fired synchronously in the Start tap; denied/unavailable тЖТ pointer-stillness; neither тЖТ an "imagine you're still" auto-demo blooms within ~25s and cancels on real input. **Named refs:** ├Йliane Radigue (*Trilogie de la Mort* тАФ extremely slow drone drift); Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*; La Monte Young (sustained tones). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: motion-stillness sensing + stateful integrating gate + long-form JI additive synth + Canvas2D aura; #3 named refs; no clean #1 тАФ stillness-as-input is conceptual, not a novel *technique*). **Why it didn't win (cycle 413):** the **warmest + cleanest fill for the off-glass / audio-only lane** the jury keeps daring (#1 "spend a cycle off the glass entirely"), but the **lowest ambition** of the three and conceptually adjacent to banked **`571-the-withholding`** (mic-silence inverse-gate тЖФ motion-stillness gate тАФ same "earn the sound by restraint" spine, different sensor). **Resurrect** when an adult cycle wants the genuine audio-only lane and the silence/restraint concept hasn't shipped recently тАФ give it a hard differentiator vs 571 (e.g. the stillness *teaches* a slow breath rhythm, or ties to real circadian/HRV-style data). Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `motion.ts`, `README.md`.

## ┬з414 banked seeds (cycle 414, KIDS DEEP тАФ one concept, *a luminous elastic sheet you grab and stretch; its tension bends a CONTINUOUS warm chord*, via three renderer/interaction approaches; both losers build-complete [clean tsc+eslint in isolation], `rm -rf`'d after losing to `579-silk-choir`; resurrect by re-spawning the brief, renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 579)

Cycle 414 fired a **kids DEEP** triple off ONE fresh concept тАФ *grab a luminous sheet of light and pull it like silk; the membrane's tension (verlet / position-based dynamics) bends a warm choir/bowed-string chord тАФ you bend the chord with your hands, you never tap a discrete note.* The directest break from JURY 2026-06-13's banned kids **pentatonic-tap-wash** (тЙИ6 of 7 kids pieces are "tap тЖТ a discrete consonant note тЖТ pretty viz"), on the **jury-starved WebGPU** renderer it explicitly wanted back, with the warmth the jury keeps daring. All three share: a 2-D verlet/PBD elastic membrane, multi-touch grab/flick, **continuous `setTargetAtTime` pitch-bend** of a sustained just-intonation chord over A2/110Hz (NO note-tapping anywhere), kids-safe `gainтЖТlowpassтЙд8kтЖТcompressorтЖТdestination` limiter, alive-from-frame-one shimmer + a silent idle auto-demo so the 06:30 glance sings with zero setup. Winner shipped = `579-silk-choir` (WebGPU compute solver + Canvas2D fallback + runtime hot-downgrade; sustained grab-stretch bends the chord up to ~5 semitones + brightening). Floor: honest **3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 Jakobsen verlet PBD / Ondes-Martenot-Theremin continuous-pitch lineage; #1 NOT claimed тАФ verlet exists at 303 as 1-D strings; #5 NOT claimed тАФ no <14-day bind).

### 580-silk-veil тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 414 ┬╖ multi-touch grab-stretch ┬╖ **Canvas2D** silk ┬╖ kids / warm-tactile) тАФ the bulletproof-iPad path
**Same concept as 579 (grab and pull a silk sheet; tension bends a continuous warm chord), rendered entirely in Canvas2D** тАФ a CPU verlet solver (32├Ч22 grid, 4 relaxation iterations) drawn as glowing translucent silk (additive gradient quad fills warming with stretch, warp/weft filament lines, a drifting specular highlight, grab halos), held to 60fps on a mid iPad; six column-regions each a voice of a JI major-add9 over A2, pitch gliding ~4 semitones with stretch + lowpass opening, via `setTargetAtTime` portamento. **Why it didn't win (cycle 414):** the **most reliable on every device** and a genuinely beautiful, warm, physical-feeling drape тАФ but it is **Canvas2D-only, so it does NOT revive the jury-starved WebGPU** (the jury's explicit ask this cycle), whereas 579/581 run WebGPU *when available* AND fall back to Canvas2D, making them strictly better on that axis. **Resurrect** when the cycle's priority is maximum iPad reliability / the lowest-end-device path, or to ship as 579's more-portable sibling; it is the most bulletproof of the three. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `membrane.ts`, `audio.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`.

### 581-silk-ripple тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 414 ┬╖ touch FLICK/slap тЖТ traveling waves ┬╖ **WebGPU** + Canvas2D ┬╖ kids / playful-splashy) тАФ the dynamic-gesture variant
**Same membrane, different interaction: flick or slap the sheet and an impulse propagates as visible traveling WAVES that roll across the silk and reflect off the pinned edges over ~2s; as each crest rolls through a vertical band, that band's voice pitch + brightness glide up and back continuously with the local wave amplitude тАФ so a flick sends an audible *bend* rippling through a 7-voice JI chord.** WebGPU compute solver (ping-pong displacement buffers, additive point-cloud render) + CPU/Canvas2D fallback. **Why it didn't win (cycle 414):** the **most immediately fun for a 4yo** (slap it, watch waves splash, hear the chord ripple) and it also revives WebGPU тАФ but (a) it is a *variant* of the headline concept rather than the headline itself (the brief's core is "grab and PULL," which 579 IS), and (b) its bend is subtler (~2.2 semitones vs 579's ~5), so the continuous-pitch break from the pentatonic-tap is less pronounced and it reads slightly less warm/expressive at a silent glance. **Resurrect** for a playful/percussive kids fire, or fold its wave-propagation into 579 as a "flick to send a ripple through the held chord" gesture (the clean cycle-2 deepening тАФ sustained-pull AND flick-ripple in one sheet). Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `membrane.ts`, `gpu.ts`, `audio.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`.

## ┬з416 тАФ banked from the cycle 416 KIDS DEEP fire (whole-body camera instrument)

Two non-winners from the 416 "dance and the room sings" DEEP fire. Both are built, demoable, and were `rm -rf`'d after curating `582-kids-dance-sky` тАФ resurrect from these specs (re-allocate fresh numbers).

### `kids-shadow-band` (built as 581, banked) тАФ status: `queued`
Pure **Canvas2D frame-differencing** whole-body instrument, **zero deps, bulletproof on any iPad** (no model download, instant). Front camera тЖТ 160├Ч120 offscreen diff тЖТ motion painted as warm additively-glowing colored light-trails (~0.5s fade) over a dark calm room тАФ never a mirror photo. 6 vertical zones, each a warm voice; *where* you move picks the voice, *how much* drives loudness/brightness, stillness settles to a root+fifth JI-Lydian drone bed. Krueger *Videoplace* / Daniel Rozin "body as light." **Resurrect when:** MediaPipe pose proves flaky on Karel's real iPad (this is the no-download fallback path), OR as an adult-mode bulletproof Videoplace. Was a hair closer to the spatial-grid reflex than 582's semantic body mapping тАФ the only reason it lost.

### `kids-light-ribbons` (built as 583, banked) тАФ status: `queued`
**Canvas2D dense optical-flow** (16├Ч12 grid, one-iteration Lucas-Kanade) тЖТ a **continuous body-bowed warm choir**: speed+upward motion glide the 5 voices up a JI-Lydian scale (log-space portamento via `setTargetAtTime`, never a clicked note), speed opens the lowpass, horizontal direction tilts the voicing; stillness тЖТ root+fifth+octave drone. Warm particles advected along the flow leave glowing ribbons. Ondes Martenot/Theremin continuous-pitch lineage + Krueger. Tension you **feel**, not solve тАФ exactly the jury ask. **Resurrect when:** `579-silk-choir` (the other continuous-bent-warm-choir) is out of the last-10 diversity window тАФ it lost THIS cycle only on adjacency to 579, not on quality. The freshest *musical* idea of the three.

---

### Banked ┬з417 (cycle 417 ADULT DEEP non-winners тАФ TEXT seeds, folders removed; renumber on revival, max folder now 583):
Both extend the jury-blessed + Karel-loved "his real piano as the seed, warm not puzzle" lineage; both lost ONLY on diversity-overlap with existing loved clusters, not on quality. Each is built-and-proven (lint/type-clean) and can be resurrected fast.

- **`584-piano-spectral-tide`** (phase-vocoder spectral FREEZE) тАФ `queued`. Load + STFT Karel's real piano (fftSize 2048, 75% overlap, magnitude+phase per frame); drag a playhead along his timeline and wherever you pause the spectral frame **freezes** into a sustained, infinitely-held warm drone (additive bank of the top-48 magnitude bins as continuously-phased sine oscillators тАФ no metallic frozen-FFT buzz); slow drag = a continuous time-stretched legato scrub through his harmonies; a vertical **depth** axis crossfades crisp-frozen тЖФ lowpassed-veil. WebGL2 fragment-shader **spectral tide** (1-D spectrum texture тЖТ drifting warm indigoтЖТvioletтЖТamberтЖТrose strata + playhead light), Canvas2D fallback, idle auto-self-scrub. Refs: Flanagan & Golden (1966) / Mark Dolson "The Phase Vocoder: A Tutorial" (1986); ├Йliane Radigue / William Basinski *Disintegration Loops*. **Promising:** the warmest, most oceanic of the three; a true "stop time inside his chord" piece; nods his loved ocean/aurora cluster (107тЭдя╕П/262тЭдя╕П). **Caveat that lost it THIS cycle:** spectral-freeze/spectral-cloud overlaps his already-loved spectral cluster (`243-spectral-cloud`тЭдя╕П, `267-spectral-drift`тЭдя╕П, `321-spectral-flight`тЭдя╕П) тАФ too close to ship in the same window. **Resurrect** once that cluster is out of the 10-window, or fold in as a "freeze lens" on 583's corpus. Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `audio.ts` (STFT), `vocoder.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md`.

- **`585-piano-grain-orrery`** (n-body physics тЖТ granular retrigger) тАФ `queued`. Slice his piano into ~130 grains (each remembering source offset + brightness + RMS); each becomes a luminous **body orbiting a soft central attractor** in a 2-D gravity field (central pull + short-range repulsion). **Stir** with pointer/touch тАФ a moving gravity well + a swirl impulse from drag velocity perturbs the orbits; a body **voices** its grain (panned by x, filtered by velocity/radius) when it swings near the core, the cursor, or crosses an outward sounding-ring. The music is the **emergent chorus** of his grains orbiting тАФ dense while you stir, sparse and meditative when it settles (тЙд16 simultaneous voices, limiter). WebGL2 additive point-sprites with ping-pong feedback-texture motion trails; Canvas2D fallback; idle auto-demo. Refs: Curtis Roads *Microsound* / Xenakis grain-clouds; Ventrella/Mohr *Particle Life*; music-of-the-spheres orrery framing. **Promising:** the richest *visual* of the three (852-line render), the most "alive while idle," cosmic-but-intimate. **Caveat that lost it THIS cycle:** physicsтЖТgranular is lovely but particle/n-body systems are heavily represented in the lab (`130-tsl-particle-compute`тЭдя╕П, `236-particle-life-song`тЭдя╕П, `262-aurora-particle`тЭдя╕П) and "physicsтЖТretrigger" is less of a lab-first than 583's target-matched concatenation. **Resurrect** for a physics-forward fire, or as 583's "orrery lens." Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `physics.ts`, `README.md`.

## ┬з419 тАФ 2026-06-14 (UTC) ┬╖ two banked DEEP/WIDE explorers from cycle 419 (built-and-proven, fast to resurrect)

Cycle 419 ran **WIDE** (3 orthogonal adult explorers, all warm / off-finger / clean on the 2026-06-13 jury bans). Shipped `588-tidal-organ` (live Open-Meteo marine swell тЖТ just-intonation sea-organ drone over a WebGPU ocean field тАФ the directest hit on jury provocation #2, real-world-data "music about something other than music"). The two non-winners were fully built, lint/type-clean in isolation, then `rm -rf`'d (never committed). Both are strong; resurrect by re-spawning from these seeds + the prior folder structure.

- **`589-still-bloom` (banked, was demoable):** an instrument that rewards **stillness**. Input = the visitor's bodily quiet via **DeviceMotion** (gravity-subtracted high-pass of accel + rotation тЖТ smoothed motion-energy тЖТ a slow "stillness accumulator"). Hold the device perfectly still and a glacial **├Йliane-Radigue / La Monte Young Dream-House** just-intonation drone (root ~61.7 Hz; partials 1/1┬╖3/2┬╖2/1┬╖9/4┬╖5/2┬╖3/1┬╖15/4 revealed one-by-one) blooms voice-by-voice; the smallest tremor drops the accumulator and the chord recedes on a multi-second release. Visual = **WebGPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** "coral that grows the stiller you are" (256┬▓ ping-pong compute, feed/kill driven by bloom), Canvas2D additive-bloom fallback. Pointer-stillness + ~22 s auto-demo breath so a motionless silent glance still hears it. **Why it didn't win:** strong + warm + off-glass, but it resurrects a banked ┬з413 seed and overlaps the already-touched stillness/withholding lane (cf. `571-the-withholding`) тАФ and the jury's loudest *named* adult ask was real-world-DATA, which 588 hit head-on. **Resurrect when:** a cycle wants an off-glass/embodied or WebGPU-compute piece and the data lane is fresh. Honest 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: motion sensing + JI drone + GPU RD + bloom envelope ┬╖ #3 Radigue/Young/Gray-Scott ┬╖ soft #1 first stillness-rewarding instrument).

- **`590-star-atlas` (banked, was demoable):** **aim your phone at the real sky and play the actual stars overhead** тАФ a live, embodied **John Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* (1961)**. Bundled ~120-bright-star catalog `{name, ra, dec, mag, hue}` + self-contained positional astronomy (`astro.ts`: Julian Date тЖТ GMST тЖТ LST тЖТ hour-angle тЖТ alt/az, Meeus low-precision) from `navigator.geolocation` + clock; **DeviceOrientation** (compass alpha = azimuth, beta = altitude) chooses the view window; stars inside it become soft sustained voices (altitude/center-proximity тЖТ loudness + lowpass; magnitude тЖТ gain; pitch quantized to a JI/harmonic chord over a low D2 root, 12-voice cap). Canvas2D star-field with magnitude-sized hue-tinted points, constellation lines (Orion/Plough/Cassiopeia/Crux/Gemini/Leo/Scorpius/Bootes/Cygnus/Pegasus), "now sounding" halos, az/alt readout. Pointer-drag + idle auto-pan + default 37┬░N/122┬░W so a silent glance hears a drifting star-chord within ~2.5 s. **Why it didn't win:** the most *surprising* of the three and the best named reference, but it renders on Canvas2D (not the jury-starved WebGPU), astronomy already exists in the lab (`347-the-place`), and it isn't live-data-API sonification (bundled catalog), so it doesn't answer provocation #2 the way 588 does. **Resurrect when:** a cosmic / "Cosmic Homecoming" cycle wants an embodied off-glass piece with a literary score-reference; could be upgraded to WebGPU and to a live catalog fetch. Honest 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: orientation sensing + alt/az astronomy + JI voice bank + Canvas render ┬╖ #3 Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* ┬╖ soft #1 first sky-aimed instrument).

## ┬з421 тАФ 2026-06-14 (UTC) ┬╖ two banked DEEP non-winners from cycle 421 (the disintegration fire)

Cycle 421 ran **DEEP** тАФ one concept ("a recording that audibly *crumbles* as it plays, with genuine accumulating state, and one lever between letting-go and holding-on"; refs **William Basinski _The Disintegration Loops_ 2002** + **Music Thing Modular "Degenerator"** self-overwriting looper, Synthtopia 2026-05-28) attacked by three techniques. Shipped `594-disintegration-loop` (the literal **self-overwriting tape**). Both non-winners were fully built, lint/TS-clean in isolation, then `rm -rf`'d (never committed). Both are strong and lost only on diversity-overlap with Karel's loved clusters, not on quality тАФ resurrect by re-spawning from these seeds (renumber on revival; max committed folder now 594).

### `595-disintegration-spectral` ("Fading Photograph") тАФ `queued` (spectral-domain erosion ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ adult / elegiac)
**The same disintegration, in the FREQUENCY domain.** A warm JI chord (~130.81 Hz C3 root, ratios 1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8, 2, weighted low for body) held as a bank of `OscillatorNode`+`GainNode` partials. Three persistent arrays survive every frame and are mutated, never rebuilt тАФ `oxide[i]` (0..1 surviving coating per partial), `detune[i]` (cents of accumulated drift), `live[i]` (eased render value) тАФ so damage compounds. Each pass (every 2тАУ5.5 s, cadence set by the lever) irreversibly attenuates bins (highs first, loss spreading downward), adds slow per-bin detune drift that grows as oxide is lost, and lets survivors flicker; at the very top of the lever a tiny stochastic re-seed can lift a near-dead bin a fraction but never restores it. Visual = a scrolling **spectrogram** driven directly by the live map (freq vertical, magnitude as emberтЖТcream brightness fading to ash) тАФ a developing print run in reverse. Master `gain тЖТ DynamicsCompressor тЖТ destination`; Begin-in-gesture; idle auto-run pulls the lever toward *let go* so a silent glance shows the field thinning. Refs: Basinski 2002 + Music Thing Degenerator 2026-05-28. **Why it didn't win:** beautiful and the cleanest "watch the photograph fade," but spectral-domain treatment overlaps Karel's already-loved spectral cluster (`243-spectral-cloud`тЭдя╕П, `267-spectral-drift`тЭдя╕П, `321-spectral-flight`тЭдя╕П) and the banked `584-piano-spectral-tide` тАФ too close to ship in the same window (exactly why 584 was banked). **Resurrect when:** the spectral cluster is out of the rolling-10 window, or fold in as a "fade lens" on his real piano. Honest 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 Basinski/Degenerator ┬╖ soft #1). Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `README.md`.

### `596-disintegration-dust` ("Dust") тАФ `queued` (granular crumble ┬╖ **WebGPU** compute particles + Canvas2D fallback ┬╖ adult / elegiac) тАФ the WebGPU-spectacle path
**The same disintegration, GRANULAR.** A warm JI phrase (1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8, octave over ~88 Hz) rendered once into an `AudioBuffer`, read back as overlapping raised-cosine grains panned across the field. A single monotonic `wear` variable climbs a little on **every grain** and only ever increases; from it the engine derives grain **density** (~38 тЖТ ~3 /s), **duration** (0.32 тЖТ 0.05 s), **pitch jitter/de-pitch** (grows), and a **drop-out fraction** (grows), so the cloud genuinely thins from a continuous texture to sparse motes over ~5 min. The lever (top *hold on* slows the fall + lends back тЙд0.22 recoverable density; bottom *let go* accelerates) can never drop below the accumulated wear floor тАФ it slows the fall, can't undo what flaked away. Visual: each surviving grain spawns a glowing mote via the real per-grain callback (dropped grains spawn nothing), so the picture is the audio state. A **WebGPU compute-particle renderer** (`gpu.ts` тАФ storage-buffer particles integrated in a compute pass, drawn additively; feature-detected with a minimal local typing surface, no `@webgpu/types` dep) runs when an adapter is present, falling back cleanly to a warm Canvas2D mote field (weighted as the primary aesthetic). Master `gain тЖТ slow lowpass тЖТ DynamicsCompressor тЖТ destination`; idle auto-start. Refs: Basinski 2002 + Music Thing Degenerator 2026-05-28; Curtis Roads *Microsound* / Xenakis grain-clouds. **Why it didn't win:** the richest *visual* of the three and it revives the jury-starved WebGPU тАФ but granular-into-particles overlaps Karel's loved particle/granular cluster (`227-paths-granular`тЭдя╕П, `236-particle-life-song`тЭдя╕П, `262-aurora-particle`тЭдя╕П, `130`тЭдя╕П) and is the least distinct on the TECH axis. **Resurrect when:** a cycle wants a WebGPU spectacle / the renderer well, or as 594's "dust lens." Honest 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 Basinski/Degenerator/Roads ┬╖ soft #1). Built files (removed): `page.tsx`, `gpu.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

## ┬з430 тАФ 2026-06-15 (UTC) ┬╖ two banked WIDE non-winners from cycle 430 (KIDS) тАФ built-and-proven, lint/tsc-clean in isolation, fast to resurrect (renumber on revival; max committed folder now 619)

Cycle 430 ran **WIDE** (3 orthogonal kids explorers, fired to break the silly-googly-creature 3-peat 603/609/617). Shipped `619-kids-plinko-bells` (the Galton-board / quincunx emergent instrument тАФ the only clean ambition-#1 of the three). Both non-winners were fully built, demoable, and self-reported clean tsc + ESLint in isolation; the full 467/467 build passed with all three present, so both are confirmed buildable. `rm -rf`'d after losing (twice тАФ the ┬з417 re-materialization race recurred). Resurrect by re-spawning from these seeds + the prior folder structure.

### `620-kids-music-mill` ("Music Mill") тАФ `queued` (tap-to-place pegs ┬╖ **WebGL2** rotating music-box cylinder ┬╖ Karplus-Strong pluck ┬╖ kids / maker-mechanical-wonder, self-playing)
**What if a 4-year-old could BUILD a music box and watch it play itself forever?** Tap to plant glowing pegs around a slowly-turning glowing wheel (one turn ~6тАУ10s); concentric **rings = pitch** (7 rings, inner=low), positions around the wheel = **time steps** (16). As the wheel turns, every peg crossing the striker wedge (12 o'clock) is plucked into a warm note; tap a peg to remove it тАФ nothing is destroyed by accident, nothing is ever "wrong." A **rotating-drum step-sequencer reimagined as a music-box / barrel-organ cylinder** the child authors live: the loop plays itself and reshapes as pegs are added/removed. Warm **Karplus-Strong** plucks (~6ms attack, exp decay) baked per-ring into `AudioBuffer`s for instant placement; slowly-detuning ambient bed; kid-safe master chain (lowpass 7.5k тЖТ comp тИТ16/6/12). JI Lydian-ish (`1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1` over F3), NOT pentatonic; per-ring bold hue (violetтЖТindigoтЖТskyтЖТtealтЖТgreenтЖТamberтЖТpink). Raw **WebGL2** (GLSL ES 3.00, full-screen wheel/striker shader + instanced glowing pegs flaring white-hot at the striker) + Canvas2D fallback + backend badge. Seeded melody on load so the wheel turns + plucks within ~2s (silent-glance self-play). Files: `page.tsx`, `sequencer.ts`, `audio.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md`. **Why it didn't win (cycle 430):** the strongest *constructive / self-play loop* toy and love-aligned to Karel's loop cluster (`172-loop-station`тЭдя╕П, `111-kids-shape-loop`тЭдя╕П) тАФ but honest **2/5**: a step-sequencer is **not a lab-first** (overlaps the loved loop-builders) and Karplus-Strong overlaps `140-kids-string-bridge`тЭдя╕П, whereas 619's Galton physics is a clean grep-0├Ч #1. **Resurrect when:** a kids "maker / build-your-own-loop" cycle wants a self-playing constructive instrument, or as a charming mechanical re-skin of the loop-station lineage. Honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: rotating-drum sim + striker-strike sequencer + Karplus-Strong pluck synth + WebGL2 render ┬╖ #3 Swiss cylinder music box 1796 / barrel organ / Wintergatan).

### `621-kids-duet-bloom` ("Duet Bloom") тАФ `queued` (TWO-finger cooperative multi-touch ┬╖ **Canvas2D** luminous meadow ┬╖ cooperative-consonance harmony ┬╖ kids / social-blooming) тАФ the cooperative two-player lane
**What if two little kids тАФ or a parent + child тАФ had to COOPERATE to make a garden bloom?** Each player drags their own glowing flower vertically (violet left / amber right; tracked independently by `Touch.identifier`, two pointers/handles on desktop) to set its **gliding** singing pitch (`setTargetAtTime` portamento тАФ a sung tone, never a clicked note; each voice pleasant alone over an ambient bed). The interval between the two voices is measured continuously in cents (`harmony.ts`) and compared to a just consonance table (1/1, 6/5, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1); as they approach a consonant ratio a **magnetic snap-assist** pulls the held flower toward it and the meadow brightens, so a 4-year-old can FEEL the "click" of locking in (┬▒45┬в lock, ┬▒130┬в cue). On a lock a warm shared triad swells, the flowers lean toward each other along a strand of light, and a wave of glowing flowers opens outward from the midpoint (`bloom.ts`, Canvas2D, тЙд140 particles for ~60fps). Drift apart тЖТ the bloom gently recedes (never a fail sound, just *less light*). Single-player + idle: a slow **ghost partner** auto-hunts consonance so a lone child (or a silent 06:30 glance within ~2.5s) still sees the meadow bloom; real touch preempts instantly. Kid-safe master chain (lowpass 7k тЖТ comp тИТ16/6/12). Files: `page.tsx`, `harmony.ts`, `audio.ts`, `bloom.ts`, `README.md`. **Why it didn't win (cycle 430):** the **freshest interaction of the three** тАФ cooperative two-player is a genuinely thin, developmentally-valuable kids lane (group-synchrony / joint-attention pedagogy) тАФ but it renders **Canvas2D** (the standing JURY-14-flagged renderer) and its cooperative-consonance CORE overlaps adult `508-accord-call`, and it's honest **2/5** vs 619's clean #1. **Resurrect when:** a kids **social / two-player / multi-touch** cycle wants the cooperation lane (it's the cleanest fill of that 0├Ч-ish gap), or upgrade its render off Canvas2D. Honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: multi-touch tracking + cooperative-consonance harmony engine + bloom envelope + Canvas2D meadow ┬╖ #3 group-synchrony pedagogy / cooperative-resolution model / Pythagorean consonance).

## ┬з431 тАФ 2026-06-15 (UTC) ┬╖ two banked DEEP non-winners from cycle 431 (ADULT) тАФ **CAUTIONARY: both duplicate existing prototypes; do NOT resurrect as-is** (max committed folder now 622)

Cycle 431 ran **DEEP**: one concept (cellular automata as an autonomous composer) attacked by 3 CA paradigms. Shipped `622-wolfram-rhythm` (1D elementary / Wolfram тАФ the only **grep-0├Ч** sub-lane). The two non-winners were fully built + demoable, but the curate-step corpus grep caught that **both duplicate prototypes already in the lab** тАФ so they are banked as cautionary records, not enthusiastic seeds. The umbrella concept ("CA-as-composer") is *not* fresh; only un-mined CA *paradigms* are.

### `620-life-engine` тАФ `do-not-rebuild` (Conway's Game of Life тЖТ scanning-playhead composer ┬╖ WebGL2 instanced + Canvas2D fallback ┬╖ adult / severe-mechanical)
2D Conway Life on a 64├Ч40 toroidal board; a vertical playhead scans LтЖТR and any live cell it crosses fires a metallic FM-bell note (rowтЖТinharmonic pitch), so oscillators become ostinati and gliders become traveling motifs. Long-form: a rolling population+hash window detects extinction / short-period loops / stalls and injects fresh material (glider, LWSS, pulsar, R-pentomino, Gosper gun, soup). FM bells with тИЪ2-ish inharmonic ratios, stretched-octave Dorian-with-tritone, 14-voice steal-oldest, limiter. WebGL2 instanced quads with birth-glow/death-fade + Canvas2D fallback. **Why it lost / DO NOT REBUILD:** it is a near-duplicate of **`25-cellular`** AND **`180-cellular`** тАФ both are already "Conway's Life as musical composer" (columnтЖТpitch, every column with a live cell sounds per tick). Shipping it would be the exact 580/588-ocean / 549-569 duplication the jury keeps flagging. **If anything is salvageable:** the *severe FM-bell / inharmonic sound design* could be a polish-pass re-voicing of the existing `25`/`180` (which use plain triangle waves) тАФ but that's a polish cycle on those, not a new build.

### `622-quickening` (Lenia) тАФ `do-not-rebuild` (continuous-state CA тЖТ organism-voice ┬╖ WebGL2 R8 ping-pong + Canvas2D fallback ┬╖ adult / organic-uncanny)
Lenia (Bert Chan 2019) continuous CA on a 150┬▓ grid тАФ canonical orbium kernel/growth/dt, published orbium seed glides smoothly; field descriptors (mass, centroid, velocity, spread, alive) drive an inharmonic-partials + formant-bandpass + motion-gated-breath voice (deliberately not a warm chord), audio smoothing decoupled from the visual rAF; keep-alive reseed/bleed. **Why it lost / DO NOT REBUILD:** the builder reused the Lenia step + R8 render **verbatim from `264-kids-lenia-pond`** (which already ships Lenia orbium creatures that sing) and said so тАФ it's a straight duplicate of an existing prototype, just adult-skinned. **If anything is salvageable:** the *fieldтЖТsound descriptor mapping* (mass/centroid/velocity/spread тЖТ an inharmonic organism voice) is a more sophisticated sonification than 264's, so it could be a polish-pass on `264` тАФ not a new folder.

**Standing adult lesson (carried to ┬з432+):** the genuinely 0├Ч adult lane after this cycle is **off-screen / audio-only / embodied-spatial**, BUT the spatial-audio back-catalog is occupied (`80-room-acoustic` image-source, `394-soundfield-room` ambisonics, `400-soundwalk-room` 6DoF+haptics, `576-presence-room` head-binaural) тАФ so any new spatial piece must bring a **fresh technique AND a distinct concept**, not another presence-room. And: **grep the corpus for the CONCEPT, not just the technique name, and never trust a `grep -E` with `\|`** (a false-negative there nearly shipped a duplicate this cycle).

## ┬з432 тАФ 2026-06-15 (UTC) ┬╖ two banked DEEP non-winners from cycle 432 (KIDS) тАФ **both fully built + demoable; same concept ("A Whole Day"), different renderer; resurrect either as a renderer-variant or a dedicated fire** (max committed folder now 624)

Cycle 432 ran **DEEP**: ONE concept тАФ the lab's first kids **long-form generative journey-arc with state/memory** ("A Whole Day": a ~9-min self-evolving dawnтЖТdayтЖТduskтЖТnightтЖТdawn journey; a diurnal phase state-machine + a motif-memory bank that re-voices each planted creature's abstract scale-degrees into the current region's scale, anchor-style per arXiv 2604.05343, so it coheres yet differs at minute 8 vs minute 1) тАФ attacked by 3 non-GPU renderers (the diversity audit banned WebGPU 5├Ч + WebGL2 4├Ч). Shipped **`624-kids-day-meadow`** (Canvas2D тАФ most legible/warm/bulletproof for a 4yo). Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; each shares the SAME `engine.ts` (diurnal phases + motif memory) + kid-safe `audio.ts`, so they are cheap to revive.

### `623-kids-day-journey` тАФ `queued` (the "massively bigger" 3D version ┬╖ **three.js** immersive day-world + Canvas2D fallback ┬╖ kids 4+ / calm-awe)
Same "A Whole Day" engine, rendered as an immersive **three.js** (v0.182) 3D world: a gradient sky **dome** whose vertex colors lerp with phase, glowing **sun & moon spheres traveling a circular arc**, low-poly parallax hills, soft fog, a star field that fades in at night, planted things as glowing low-poly meshes (cone flowers / octahedron birds / icosahedron stars), gentle idle camera drift; geometries/materials disposed on unmount; **Canvas2D fallback** if WebGL/three fails (still day-cycles + sings). `page.tsx` 878 / `engine.ts` 235 / `audio.ts` 202. **Why it lost:** the concept's ambition is renderer-independent, so the renderer should serve the audience тАФ and for a calm pre-sleep 4yo a 3D abstract world reads the day-arc *less* legibly than a side-on landscape, plus it re-introduces a GPU failure surface the recent ship-streak is saturated with. **Resurrect when:** GPU renderers cool in the rolling-10 and you want the bolder immersive swing (3D is a loved kids lane тАФ `537-kids-sky-murmuration` three.js was a gem); or as a "stand-inside-the-day" companion. The strongest "massively bigger" resurrect of this pair.

### `625-kids-day-paper` тАФ `queued` (the calmest version ┬╖ **inline SVG** matte cut-paper storybook ┬╖ kids 4+ / contemplative)
Same engine, rendered as matte **cut-paper inline SVG**: layered paper hills with `feDropShadow`, a sun/moon on an arc path, a sky `<linearGradient>` whose stops lerp with phase, paper stars fading in at night, friendly paper creatures тАФ NO glow/canvas/WebGL; per-frame attrs driven through element refs (no React churn per frame). `page.tsx` 645 / `engine.ts` 415 / `audio.ts` 187. **Why it lost:** warmest/calmest register but the flattest reading of a day-journey (no depth, less motion-energy at a glance) vs 624's painterly diorama. **Resurrect when:** you want the storybook/bedtime register explicitly, or to give SVG (тЙИ0├Ч recently) a fresh entry. 

**Kids lesson (carried forward):** the binding diversity audit (rolling-10) had inverted away from the jury's stale 2026-06-14 Canvas2D ban тАФ by cycle 432 the lab had over-corrected INTO GPU (WebGPU 5├Ч + WebGL2 4├Ч of last 10), making **Canvas2D the scarce renderer**. Don't reflexively apply an old jury ban once the rolling window has moved; re-run the audit each cycle. And: **funny went 3├Ч in a row (603/609/617)** before 619/624 broke it тАФ vary the kids emotional register deliberately (calm/awe/contemplative, not only silly).

## ┬з435 banked seeds (2026-06-15) тАФ two strong missing-middle explorers from the WIDE fire; NEITHER is a duplicate тАФ resurrect both

Context: cycle 435 was an adult **WIDE** fire attacking JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 (the missing middle тАФ danceable/groovy/tender; the lab has 630 prototypes and *zero* in a groove register). Three registers were built; `632-polymeter-loom` (hypnotic Reich/Euclidean) shipped. These two lost on margins (output diversity + honest-ambition + vibe-threading), NOT on quality тАФ both are real future builds.

### `631-drop-engine` тАФ `queued` (euphoric EDM build-and-drop journey engine ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ adult / ecstatic)
A generative festival arc: kick on every beat; bass+pad bus routed through a dedicated `pumpBus` GainNode that **ducks on each kick and ramps back** тАФ the signature EDM **sidechain "pump"** (verified **grep-0├Ч in the lab** тАФ a genuine lab-first technique, #1-eligible); swung noise hats; a 3тЖТ7-voice detuned **supersaw** lead on the drop; a white-noise riser sweeping pitch+volume through the build; lowpass filter automation; reverb tail in the breakdown. Auto-advances **BUILD тЖТ DROP тЖТ BREAKDOWN тЖТ loop** on the audio clock (long-form state тАФ minute 3 тЙа minute 1). One "Energy" lever (slider + keyboard тЖС/тЖУ/+/тИТ) biases climb speed / filter brightness / drop density; Space = manual drop. Canvas2D rings/core/strobing-bars/particle-burst pulses 1:1 on the shared pump value. Builder self-reported tsc+ESLint clean (~28 KB single file). **Why it lost:** Canvas2D output (632's three.js was the scarcer renderer); the drop *visual* is the most conventional of the three (EDM visualizers are everywhere). **Why resurrect:** it is the **most literal match to a Karel-named directive** тАФ "journey engine alternatives: EDM build-and-drop" (his care #4) тАФ AND it carries the lab's **first sidechain-pump** (#1 grep-0├Ч), so it can claim an honest **#1 + #2** = a clean floor-clear. The euphoric register is the most viscerally "off the doom autopilot." **Resurrect next adult cycle** unless a fresher #1 appears; pair the pump with a bolder drop visual (three.js particle wall or feedback bloom) to lift it past 3/5.

### `633-slow-burn` тАФ `queued` (tender neo-soul microtiming groove ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ adult / sensual тАФ WATCH the warm-ban)
~75 BPM lo-fi/neo-soul vamp. The heart is a **microtiming engine**: a 25ms lookahead scheduler queues 16th-notes ~120ms ahead on the audio clock, and each voice carries a per-voice timing offset (snare **late**/laid-back, hats **early**/pushed, kick **dead-on**) scaled by a global **"feel/looseness"** lever from 0 (robotic) through "in the pocket" to "too loose" тАФ toggling it makes the beat audibly start to *breathe*. Palette: soft kick, brushed-noise snare, lazy hats, gliding sub bass, **FM Rhodes** (sine carrier + 1:1 sine modulator, decaying tine) on a smoky Fm9тЖТBbm9тЖТEb9тЖТAbmaj9 vamp; vinyl crackle + lowpass haze. **Reharmonization state machine** drifts 9ths/walking-bass/fills over the minutes (living vamp, not a loop). The standout: a Canvas2D viz that draws the **grid vs. where each hit actually landed** тАФ a hollow anchor at the grid time, a line out to the actual onset, a glowing dot тАФ making microtiming **visible**. Refs: *Microtiming Deviations and Swing Feel in Jazz* (Sci. Rep. 2019) + Dan Charnas, *Dilla Time* (2022). Builder self-reported tsc+ESLint clean (~30 KB). **Why it lost:** the tender/sensual register is the most genuinely absent corner тАФ but it sits adjacent to the jury-**banned** "warm/cozy" vibe (warm went 5├Ч and got banned), so shipping it this cycle risked reading as the very thing the jury is tired of; and Canvas2D (vs 632's scarcer three.js). **Why resurrect:** it's the lab's **only tender/sensual candidate** and the **grid-vs-actual visualization is the most original idea of the three** (makes an invisible musical mechanism legible тАФ high Karel-surprise). **Resurrect when** the rolling-10 is cold on warmth so it can't be misread as cozy-autopilot, OR lean it harder into "grown/after-hours/sensual" (more dissonance, sparser, darker palette) to distance it from kids-warm. The microtiming engine itself is reusable infrastructure for any future groove piece.

**WIDE lesson (carried forward):** when the jury names a *vibe* gap (here: danceable/groove), the cleanest WIDE fan-out is **three registers of that one gap** (euphoric / hypnotic / tender), each via a different *mechanism* (sidechain-pump / Euclidean-phasing / microtiming) тАФ it *maps* the gap instead of scattering across unrelated concepts. And: find the mechanism that produces the vibe ("build joyful" is unactionable; "build interlocking microtiming + sidechain energy" is buildable).

## ┬з436 тАФ 2026-06-15 ┬╖ kids WIDE fire (non-touch, "missing middle" register) тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 436 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out of 3 orthogonal NON-TOUCH explorers (honoring JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #4: the touch ban) in the active/wonder *middle* register the jury says the kids side lacks (it's stuck "warm-or-silly with nothing between"). **Winner: `636-kids-star-pilot`** (gamepad тЖТ musical star-gates + loop-memory). The two strong losers, banked for resurrection:

### `634-kids-tilt-river` тАФ `queued` (tilt тЖТ flow-field light river тЖТ tuned chimes ┬╖ three.js ┬╖ kids / mesmerizing-flow wonder)
A 4-year-old **tilts the iPad** (DeviceOrientation `beta`/`gamma` тЖТ gravity vector) to pour hundreds of glowing "light droplets" (a `THREE.Points` additive-blended river) down a screen governed by a smooth **curl/value-noise flow field** + the steered gravity. Six glowing **chime gates** tuned to a JI-pentatonic-ish scale flash + ring soft additive struck-bell tones as droplets stream through тАФ the flow is stochastic so the melody is emergent and never repeats. 4 subsystems (tiltтЖТgravity ┬╖ flow-field+particle integrator ┬╖ struck-bell synth ┬╖ three.js instanced render) + named ref (Tyler Hobbs flow fields ┬╖ Wintergatan/Iwai lineage) = honest 2/5. Arrow-key + auto-rotating-gravity fallback, on-mount visual auto-demo, kid-safe `lowpassтЖТcompressor` chain with 40ms global + 90ms/gate rate limit. Builder reported the code build-clean (could not run `npm run build` тАФ no node_modules in its sandbox). **Why it lost:** the most *beautiful* of the three (three.js light river), but "emergent chime melody from falling particles" overlaps the already-shipped `619-kids-plinko-bells` (Galton) and `169-kids-marble-run` тАФ the freshest part is only the tilt+flow-field steering, not the core. **Why resurrect:** the tilt-river/flow-field steering IS a distinct, loved input (83-tilt-rainтЭдя╕П, 169-marble-runтЭдя╕П) and three.js is renderer-scarce; resurrect when the rolling-10 is clear of emergent-chime pieces, or push it toward a non-chime payoff (the river *paints*, or carves terrain) so it stops reading as "619 with tilt." Full working code exists at the folder path in git history if useful, but treat as a fresh build. **NOTE:** the builder left orphan files `audio.ts`/`flow.ts` (superseded, not imported) тАФ drop them on any resurrection.

### `635-kids-sing-kite` тАФ `queued` (mic voice-PITCH тЖТ kite altitude + auto-harmony ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ kids / soaring-joy)
A 4-year-old **sings or hums**; a real-time **McLeod-Pitch-Method** detector (`detectPitchMPM`, NSDF/autocorrelation, McLeod & Wyvill 2005) maps their fundamental pitch to a glowing **kite's altitude** on a painterly Canvas2D sky тАФ sing high, it climbs; hum low, it dips тАФ loudness drives glow/size, a fading pitch-hued trail follows. The sky **harmonizes back**: the sung note snaps to a C-major-pentatonic degree and a soft pad sustains a consonant 3rd/4th below, so the child is always in tune; sparkle-chime reward at the top. 4 subsystems (mic+MPM pitch detect ┬╖ pitchтЖТaltitude+scale-snap ┬╖ auto-harmonizing pad synth ┬╖ Canvas2D sky/kite/trail) + named ref (MPM 2005 ┬╖ Iwai Electroplankton) = honest 2/5. Pointer + Up/Down-arrow fallback, idle auto-drift demo, kid-safe master chain. Builder reported build-clean. **Why it lost:** strong + universally demoable ("your voice flies the kite" тАФ every kid can sing), and a meaningful *reframe* of mic-input from the recent silly-loudness toys (603/609) to musical-PITCH тАФ but mic was the input 2├Ч in the last 10, where 636's gamepad is 0├Ч recently (the bigger diversity swing), and 636 carries genuine evolving state (loop-memory) where this is more reactive. **Why resurrect:** the cleanest "joyful middle" concept the lab has, very high kid-delight, and the pitchтЖТaltitude mapping is reusable. Resurrect next kids cycle when mic is cold in the rolling-10. **NOTE:** the builder left orphan files `music.ts`/`pitch.ts` (the page.tsx is self-contained) тАФ drop them or wire them in on resurrection.

## ┬з437 тАФ 2026-06-15 ┬╖ adult WIDE fire (3 registers of the jury's named "missing middle") тАФ 2 banked seeds

Cycle 437 ran an adult **WIDE** fan-out of 3 orthogonal corners of the missing MIDDLE register the jury (2026-06-15) named тАФ ecstatic/danceable/groovy/tender тАФ each via a DIFFERENT mechanism ├Ч renderer ├Ч ref (the "WIDE lesson": map a named vibe-gap). **Winner: `637-slow-burn`** (tender/sensual neo-soul + SVG grid-vs-actual microtiming plot). NB the jury's "0├Ч lanes" (MIDI, multi-user/WebRTC) and "nobody built EDM build-drop" all turned out FALSE on corpus check (Web MIDI 12 files; `508-accord-call` WebRTC; `387-drop-engine` EDM) тАФ so the ┬з435-banked `631-drop-engine` was REJECTED as a 387-duplicate, and these two are the genuine fresh corners. Both lost on margins (renderer/viz duplication), NOT quality.

### `638-gospel-lift` тАФ `queued` (ecstatic/euphoric gospel-house ┬╖ three.js ┬╖ adult / hands-in-the-air тАФ a journey-engine alternative DISTINCT from 387)
A 122 BPM Chicago/gospel-house groove (four-on-the-floor kick, off-beat open hats, congregation handclaps, Hammond/Leslie drawbar organ, Rhodes comping a gospel **iiтАУVтАУI with passing diminished chords**). The signature mechanism: every **16 bars the WHOLE progression modulates UP one semitone** тАФ the church "modulation"/"lift" тАФ re-voicing the chords, stepping pad brightness, firing a short riser, **octave-folding the root** when it climbs too high so it stays in range while the perceived ascent continues. **There is NO drop** тАФ the euphoria comes purely from continuous upward harmonic modulation (the explicit anti-EDM-build framing; this is why it's distinct from `387-drop-engine`'s GROOVEтЖТBUILDтЖТDROPтЖТRELEASE). A **PRAISE/intensity** lever (тЖС/тЖУ + slider) stacks tambourine 16ths / octave bass / soprano choir "oohs" / faster Leslie vibrato; Enter forces an early lift. three.js ascending light column (stacked additive rings + emissive core + sparks + halo, goldтЖТwhite, beat-pulse + lift-flash, camera drifts upward with cumulative key-step) + Canvas2D fallback + synthetic-heartbeat so the idle ~1.8 s auto-demo's VISUAL is alive even with audio suspended. 4 subsystems (house look-ahead scheduler ┬╖ gospel reharm/key-lift state machine ┬╖ multi-voice organ/Rhodes/choir synth ┬╖ three.js renderer) + named refs (gospel "shout"/"drive" + semitone-modulation tradition тАФ Hezekiah Walker, Kirk Franklin; Chicago/gospel-house тАФ Frankie Knuckles) = honest 2тАУ3/5. `page.tsx` ~1308 lines, build-clean by hand-review (no node_modules in builder sandbox). **Why it lost:** three.js re-introduces GPU verification risk (the recurring build-verified-not-browser-verified surface), AND an ascending-light-column reads as a more conventional EDM-adjacent visualizer; 637's SVG was the scarcer renderer + the more surprising "legible mechanism." **Why resurrect:** it's the lab's strongest **ecstatic/euphoric** middle entry AND a genuine journey-engine alternative (Karel care #4) that is NOT an EDM build-drop тАФ fills a real open corner. Resurrect next adult fire when GPU renderers are cold in the rolling-10, OR pair the key-lift mechanic with a non-GPU renderer (the lift reads fine on Canvas2D/SVG too). Full working code is in git history at the folder path; treat as a fresh build.

### `639-afro-pulse` тАФ `queued` (joyful/danceable afrobeat-highlife ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ adult / sunlit тАФ REDO THE VIZ off rings)
~108тАУ116 BPM afrobeat/highlife. A West-African **bell timeline** (gankogui two-pitch "standard pattern" over a 12-pulse cycle + a clave high stroke) keeps time while **two interlocking plucked melodic ostinati on coprime cycle lengths (7 vs 5 тЖТ 35-step melodic repeat)** ride call-and-response on alternating 8ths so they phase in/out as an audible **melodic weave**; a Tony-Allen-style kit (ghost-note hats, rim, kick), shaker 16ths, brassy horn stabs on accents. A **HEAT/intensity** lever (тЖС/тЖУ + slider) adds the 2nd guitar (>45%), horn stabs (>60%), denser hats; a variation/reharmonization state machine transposes the riff (0, +5, тИТ2, +7тАж) + rotates horn voicings over 4-bar sections (living, not a loop). **Major-key, melodic, bright, danceable** тАФ the explicit OPPOSITE of monochrome Reich/Euclidean minimalism (so distinct from `632-polymeter-loom`'s *audio*). 5 subsystems (bell-timeline ┬╖ interlocking-ostinato Chris-Wilson scheduler ┬╖ multi-voice pluck/kit/horn synth ┬╖ variation state machine ┬╖ Canvas2D renderer) + named refs (Fela Kuti / Tony Allen; West-African bell timeline тАФ Kofi Agawu *Representing African Music*; ClaveNet ACM 2024) = honest 2тАУ3/5. `page.tsx` ~950 lines, build-clean by hand-review. **Why it lost:** its Canvas2D viz is **concentric rotating rings with beads flashing on each onset** тАФ which is a near-twin of the just-shipped `632-polymeter-loom`'s "loom of concentric bead rings that flash on each onset, phasing rings counter-rotating." Shipping it = a visual duplicate of last adult fire's winner. **Why resurrect:** the AUDIO is genuinely fresh (major-key melodic highlife тАФ the joyful/danceable corner of the middle, distinct from 632's minimalism and 387's EDM) and very demoable. **Resurrect with a NON-RING payoff** тАФ dancing cut-paper figures, a sunlit street/market scene, light-trails per ostinato voice, anything but concentric rings тАФ so it stops reading as "632 with a different palette." Full working code in git history; treat as a fresh build, redo the renderer.

### `642-piano-chroma` тАФ `queued` (cycle-3 of 606тЖТ630 piano spine ┬╖ supervised harmonic-comb NMF ┬╖ SVG chroma wheel ┬╖ adult / clinical тАФ **banked, build-verified**)
The most FAITHFUL reading of 630's banked cycle-3 ("supervised NMF, fixed basis тЖТ true pitch classes, not register bands"). Keeps the proven HPSS ground, then fixes the NMF basis `W` to **12 pitch-class harmonic-comb templates** (Gaussian-in-log-freq bumps at fundamental + 6 partials for every octave A0..C8 of each chroma; positive floor; `H` updated full-strength while `W` blends only 25% toward the seed each iteration тЖТ components stay nameable). 72 KL iters chunked. Per-pitch-class Wiener mask on the original complex harmonic STFT тЖТ ISTFT тЖТ up to 13 instant click-free solo/mute/gain voices (Hammers core + present chromas; classes <8% peak energy collapse out). Renderer: **SVG chroma WHEEL** тАФ 12 annular-sector wedges pulsing to live level, soloed wedge glows (feGaussianBlur), chromaticтЖФcircle-of-fifths toggle. Honest 3/5: #4 (real cycle-3) + #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (Lee&Seung'99, Smaragdis&Brown'03, Fujishima'99, Fitzgerald'10). **#1 NOT claimed** (NMF used by 630). **Why it lost to 643:** more INCREMENTAL тАФ 4тЖТ12 voices is finer resolution but adds no NEW interaction (still solo/mute masked voices), so it's a clean 3/5 not the 4/5 REACH the jury wants; 643's REPLAY layer turns the decomposition into a playable instrument (the genuine cycle-3 "add the interactive layer" move). **Why resurrect:** it's the cleanest, most build-bulletproof piece (self-reported a FULL `npm run build` pass; pure SVG = zero GPU surface) and the SVG chroma wheel is a beautiful, scarce-renderer visual. Resurrect as the safe-glance companion, OR fold its supervised-NMF isolation into 643's salience-mask for sharper note separation. Full working code was built this cycle (treat as fresh build from this spec).

### `644-piano-respeak` тАФ `queued` (cycle-3 of 606тЖТ630 piano spine ┬╖ maskedтЖФadditive-resynth PURITY lever ┬╖ Canvas2D ┬╖ adult / clinical тАФ **banked, diversity-blocked this cycle**)
The BOLDEST reconstruction reading, driven by the 2026 restoration reframe (arXiv 2603.16926, Mar 2026: masking leaves degraded stems тЖТ add a reconstruction stage that RE-SYNTHESIZES a clean source). Per pitch class, build TWO sample-aligned loop renderings: **MASKED** (softmax-normalized Wiener mask on the original complex STFT тЖТ his real isolated timbre) and **RESYNTH** (extract each note's per-frame amplitude envelope, drive a continuous-phase additive sine-oscillator bank тЖТ a glassy DDSP-lite reconstruction; cf. Serra&Smith SMS, "Sines Transient Noise" arXiv 2409.06513). A global **PURITY lever** equal-power crossfades maskedтЖТresynth for all 12 notes at once тАФ at purity=1 you hear Karel's exact performance, same notes/timing, rebuilt entirely from pure tones. 12 Canvas2D lanes morph grainy "real" fill тЖФ concentric "resynth" rings as purity moves. Honest 3/5: #4 + #2 (4 subsystems) + #3 (four named refs incl the Mar-2026 paper). **Why it lost:** **diversity gate** тАФ Canvas2D is at 3├Ч in the rolling-10 (624/636/640); shipping 644 would push it to 4├Ч (the banned threshold). The concept is arguably the most surprising of the three. **Why resurrect:** next adult fire when Canvas2D is COLD in the rolling-10 тАФ this is the truest "reconstruction beyond masking" piece and a strong 4/5 reach; OR re-skin its viz to SVG/three.js to dodge the Canvas2D count. Also a great cycle-4 fold INTO 643 (a per-note purity fader on top of the replay grains). Full working code was built this cycle (treat as fresh build from this spec).

## ┬з442 тАФ banked from cycle 442 kids WIDE fan-out (2 non-winners, built-and-proven, fast to resurrect)

Both were built to demoable in isolation this cycle (tsc-clean, hand-audited against the ESLint pitfalls) and benched only because **652-kids-dance-band** was the directer hit on the jury's "build the danceable register nobody is building." Resurrect either as a near-drop-in.

- **651-kids-choir-leader** (mic VOICE-pitch тЖТ in-key choir, Canvas2D, TENDER). *"What if a 4-year-old could lead a choir with their own voice?"* Real-time monophonic pitch detection (normalized autocorrelation + parabolic interp over `getFloatTimeDomainData`, RMS-gated, clamped 180тАУ950 Hz, median+exp smoothing) тЖТ C-major-pentatonic snap (no wrong notes) тЖТ 4-voice additive choir (root/3rd/5th/octave, warm low-pass) under a scrolling luminous pitch-ribbon; always-on detuned-fifth pad; degrades to 84px in-key note buttons on mic-deny. **This is the realization of banked seed `635-kids-sing-kite`** (RESEARCH ┬з436) and is **love-aligned** (`158-kids-hum-paint`тЭдя╕П). Ambition #2 (mic+pitch-detect+additive-harmony+canvas ribbon=4) + #3 (Bobby McFerrin call-and-response / Imogen Heap harmonizer / Toca Band). **Resurrect-deepen:** swap autocorrelation тЖТ YIN/CMNDF in an AudioWorklet to kill octave-halving on breathy child voices; this is the one fragility flagged. Tender is the cleanest *un-built* kids register тАФ strong next-kids-cycle pick.
- **653-kids-bounce-band** (device-TILT тЖТ collision-quantized beat, Canvas2D, BOUNCY/JOYFUL). *"What if tilting the tablet turned bouncing balls into a danceable BEAT?"* Tilt steers gravity (gamma/beta, first-reading=neutral zero); 2D circle physics (softened restitution, speed cap, dt-clamp); **every collision is queued onto the next 16th-note tick** via a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler so chaos self-organizes into a pentatonic groove; ball identityтЖТtimbre/register; тЙд3 notes/tick voice-allocator + compressor for pile-up safety; legible groove playhead ring; pointer/arrow/тЙе64px-D-pad fallback. Ambition #2 (tilt+collision-physics+groove-quantizer+canvas=4) + #3 (Iwai Electroplankton/SimTunes ┬╖ Reactable ┬╖ BlockBob). **Resurrect-deepen:** per-corner instrument zones (pour balls to swap the kit) + tilt-magnitudeтЖТtempo/swing so the steeringтЖТarrangement link is unmistakable. Note overlap risk to flag at resurrection: 619-plinko / 169-marble-run (physicsтЖТbells) тАФ the quantized-groove twist is what keeps it distinct.

## ┬з447 тАФ 2026-06-16 (UTC) ┬╖ two banked DEEP non-winners from cycle 447 (the piano-spine cycle-4 fire) тАФ built-and-proven, tsc-clean in isolation, fast to resurrect (renumber on revival; max committed folder now 666)

All three cycle-447 explorers were the SAME cycle-4 concept ("the piano remembers you": a looper/phrase-memory built on Karel's 12 isolated piano notes from the 643 engine, growing itself over minutes via an **asymmetric-consonance** growth rule [De Roure 2026, arXiv:2606.16412] + level decay тАФ NO scale-snap). They differ only in renderer/interaction/register-thread. `666-piano-still` (audio-first / minimal SVG) shipped because it uniquely answers the jury's three-juries-running standing #1 ask ("get off the glass") in the scarcest renderer while still hitting tender + cycle-4. The two below lost on the off-glass axis ONLY тАФ both are real future builds. Each reuses the proven 643 engine (`audio.ts`/`hpss.ts`/`chroma.ts` copied verbatim) + a `consonance.ts` growth rule.

### `665-piano-loom` тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 447 ┬╖ tap-to-stamp ┬╖ **raw WebGL2** scrolling phrase-tape ┬╖ adult / tender) тАФ **the most legible "looper" visual**
**What if Karel's 12 isolated piano notes became a LOOPER you can SEE тАФ a horizontal scrolling tape-ribbon where each tap stamps the current pitch class at the playhead, the loop re-fires stamps as the beam crosses them, un-refreshed stamps decay over ~90тАУ130s, and the asymmetric-consonance rule buds new consonant notes every few cycles?** Raw hand-written **WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00)** single fullscreen-quad glow-field: cells = note stamps (hue per pitch class), flaring on fire, fading on decay, fixed warm playhead beam at center; `backend:"none"` тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio still plays. Keyboard `A W S E D F T G Y H U J` + `space` for selected note; `growтЗДrest` lever. Auto-seeds a consonant CтАУGтАУEтАУA phrase + loops on load (alive in ~2s). Files: `page.tsx`, `ribbon.ts` (WebGL2), `consonance.ts`, + 643 engine. **Why it didn't win (cycle 447):** the clearest *visual metaphor* for the cycle-4 idea (you literally watch the loop remember you) and the boldest render тАФ but it is **another glass-screen render** (WebGL2 at 4├Ч in the window), exactly the monoculture the jury's Karel-facing line told this fire to break, whereas 666 gets off the glass. **Resurrect FIRST** when an adult cycle wants the cycle-4 piano looper as an ON-glass immersive piece, or fold its visible-tape metaphor into 666 as an optional "show the tape" view. Ambition equal to winner: #4 (cycle-4) + #1 (first looper of a performer's own isolated notes) + #2 (тЙе3 subsystems: HPSS+salience isolation + phrase-memory/decay sequencer + grain-replay synth + WebGL2 ribbon) + #5 (De Roure 2606.16412, dated cycle-day).

### `667-piano-tide` тАФ `queued` (banked DEEP non-winner, cycle 447 ┬╖ drop-a-note ┬╖ **three.js** reflective ripple pool ┬╖ adult / tender-meditative) тАФ **the most immersive/beautiful**
**What if the looper were a still reflective POOL тАФ drop one of his notes and a slow ring spreads across the water, rings interfere and persist, and as a ring crosses the center it re-fires his note, so a quiet phrase accretes on the surface and grows itself over minutes?** **three.js** horizontal water surface: interfering-ripple height field summed in a fragment shader, soft specular glints + caustic banding, deep tealтЖТindigo water with warm amber/rose note glows тАФ deliberately NOTHING like 643's orbiting-star constellation (no points/orbits/core). `calmтЗДgrow` lever; ~13s loop; decay over minutes. Files: `page.tsx`, `scene.ts` (three.js), `consonance.ts`, + 643 engine. **Why it didn't win (cycle 447):** the most beautiful/immersive of the three тАФ but (a) **another glass-screen render** (off-glass was the jury's explicit ask for this fire) and (b) **three.js is at 3├Ч in the window AND is 643's own renderer family**, so it's the closest of the three to the thing it extends (the jury wants a cycle-N to open a *new world*, not re-skin the prior renderer). **Resurrect** for an immersive-visual adult cycle when off-glass isn't the priority, or fold its ripple-interference water shader into a future water/tide piece. Ambition equal to winner (#4 + #1 + #2 тЙе3 subsystems incl. three.js water shader + #5 De Roure).

## ┬з450 тАФ 2026-06-16 (UTC) ┬╖ two banked WIDE non-winners from cycle 450 (KIDS) тАФ both fully built to demoable + self-reported tsc/ESLint-clean in isolation; fast to resurrect (renumber on revival; max committed folder now 675)

Cycle 450 ran **WIDE** тАФ 3 orthogonal kids "real harmonic event" explorers (honoring JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1: kill the pentatonic/scale-snap crutch, let a 4yo *hear* harmony move), each a DIFFERENT harmonic event ├Ч input ├Ч output ├Ч palette. **Winner: `675-kids-deep`** (touch stones over a migrating drone тЖТ functional recontextualization; WebGL2 abyss). Won on the ┬з448/┬з450 developmental anchor: for an actual 4yo the perceptible harmonic events are (a) *change itself / a moving drone* and (b) *closure & its denial* тАФ NOT the major/minor emotional flip (that emerges ~age 7тАУ8). 675 lands (a) directly, is the freshest concept vs the recent kids stream, and uses the renderer-scarce WebGL2. The two strong losers, banked:

### `674-kids-two-moons` ("Two Moons") тАФ `queued` (tilt тЖТ continuous MODE-GLIDE тЖТ **three.js** crossfading sun-moonтЖФghost-moon ┬╖ kids/family / cosmic awe, brightтЖФeerie) тАФ realizes banked ┬з448 seed `668-two-suns`
**What if tilting a tablet turned a happy song spooky тАФ and back тАФ so a child discovers the SAME notes feel completely different?** A single mood dial `mтИИ[0,1]` (tilt `gamma`, or a big gradient slider, or arrow keys) drives **parallel-mode interchange done as a continuous portamento morph**: a sustained chord's voices keep their identity and `setTargetAtTime`-glide between bright (Lydian-ish: maj3, #4, leading tone) and dark (Phrygian-ish: min3, b2, b7) tunings тАФ the third audibly melts majтЖТmin, the 7th flattens. Six 72px melody pads play the "same" degrees, recolored by `m`. **Strictly NO pentatonic scale-snap** (continuous semitone interpolation, no quantization). three.js: gradient sky + star field + two crossfading celestial bodies hue-shift with the mode. Kid-safe master chain, ~2s auto-demo, full degradation (slider/keys), `text-rose-300` no-sensor note. Ref: **Kate Hevner, "The Affective Character of the Major and Minor Modes" (Am. J. Psych. 47, 1935)**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: tiltтЖТmode-engine + reharmonizer/portamento synth + three.js render = 4 ┬╖ #3 Hevner 1935). Files: `page.tsx` / `mode.ts` / `audio.ts` / `gl.ts` / `README.md`. **Why it lost:** the most visually spectacular of the three, BUT the lab's own ┬з448 developmental research says the majorтЖФminor *emotional* flip isn't reliably legible to a 4yo (emerges ~7тАУ8) тАФ it's a **family / older-kids (6+)** piece, not a 4yo one; the continuous-glide mitigation makes it "the change itself" but the central *discovery* still leans on mode-affect the target age lacks. **Resurrect when:** a "Resonance Kids 6+ / family" tier opens (it's the flagship for that audience), or as an ADULT cosmic mode-morph (the three.js + portamento-reharmonization engine is reusable and renderer-scarce). Strongest visual of the batch.

### `676-kids-night-boat` ("A Little Boat on the Night Sea") тАФ `queued` (rock-the-tablet DeviceOrientation тЖТ **deceptiveтЖТauthentic CADENCE** тЖТ audio-first / minimal inline-SVG ┬╖ kids / night-voyage mysteryтЖТarrival) тАФ **the top OFF-GLASS resurrect**
**What if a 4yo could rock a little boat across a night sea, eyes closed, and hear an unseen choir get *almost* home, turn to mystery, then land on home?** OFF-GLASS / audio-first: the screen is a minimal inline-SVG horizon + bobbing boat + a glow that warms only at homecoming. A **functional-cadence engine** (`cadence.ts`, I/ii/IV/V/vi/тЩнVII in D) voices one chord per detected rock (gamma zero-crossings; fallback тЙе64px button + Spacebar; iOS motion permission from the Start tap). Three phrases loop: **deceptive VтАУvi** (withheld home, "the boat turns to mystery") ├Ч2, then **authentic VтАУI** (arrival, audio + glow bloom warmer). The V carries the real leading tone (CтЩп) so the deceptive turn registers as genuine denial. **NO pentatonic snap** тАФ real triadic functional harmony; night-voyage register, NOT cozy-lullaby (warm color reserved strictly for the home cadence). Kid-safe master chain, never-silent sea/drone bed, auto-demo that real rocking preempts. Ref: **deceptive cadence (VтАУvi) in J.S. Bach's four-part chorales**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems: motion-rock detect + cadence state-machine + choral pad synth + SVG = 4 ┬╖ #3 Bach chorale deceptive cadence). Files: `page.tsx` / `audio.ts` / `cadence.ts` / `README.md`. **Why it lost:** excellent and on the firmest developmental ground (closure & its denial IS perceptible to a 4yo), and it's the OFF-GLASS piece the jury keeps asking for тАФ BUT `669-kids-hum-answer` shipped off-glass kids built on tensionтЖТresolution just **2 cycles ago** (cycle 448); shipping a second off-glass closure piece back-to-back would cost diversity. **Resurrect FIRST when off-glass is cold in the rolling window** (it's the strongest banked off-glass candidate the lab has) тАФ likely the very next kids cycle that isn't adjacent to 669. Near-drop-in.

## Banked from Cycle 461 (adult DEEP fire тАФ ONE concept: *the music dreams a picture, and the dream changes the music* тАФ a closed audioтЖТimageтЖТaudio loop, JURY 2026-06-17 #4 "extend the ceiling builds [689], not a sixth tonal-tension toy." Two technical approaches to **how the image returns to audio**. Winner shipped = `704-spectral-seance` [the LITERAL return trip тАФ image re-sonified as a spectrogram]. Loser banked below; folder `rm -rf`'d after the winner's authoritative build passed. Renumber on revival тАФ max committed folder now 704.)

### `703-latent-oracle` тАФ `queued` тнР (the SOFT-closure twin of 704: the loop closes via **color**, not literal re-sonification. A 5тАУ7 voice D-Dorian pad ensemble auto-evolves through four weather phases [calmтЖТluminousтЖТveiledтЖТresolving]; each phase self-composes a prompt тЖТ flux image тЖТ **WebGL2 ping-pong feedback dissolve** [Anadol latent-flow тАФ old dreams smear into new, never fully vanish] тЖТ dominant color sampled offscreen тЖТ glided back into the synth [hueтЖТfilter cutoff/detune-spread, brightnessтЖТshimmer/reverb send, saturationтЖТdissonance], so the SOUND drifts toward the color of what it just dreamed; the HUD shows the fed-back color swatch + resulting cutoff/shimmer/diss values.) This is the long-banked **687-latent-oracle** seed, fully built this cycle (Refik Anadol latent data-paintings + Memo Akten *Learning to See*; guarded flux route + procedural domain-warped fog fallback, runs zero-network). **Why it lost to 704:** the closure is a *soft parameter-nudge* whose audible range **narrows without a `FAL_KEY`** (the procedural fog skews cool/dark, so the keyless drift is subtle) тАФ and Karel reviews on the public preview, which is usually keyless, so 704's *literal* image-as-spectrogram return trip demonstrates the closed loop far more legibly with no key. 703 is also closer to existing parameter-mapping than 704's never-before-seen re-sonification. **Why resurrect:** it's the more *beautiful* of the two (the Anadol feedback smear is gorgeous) and the only one that closes the loop back into continuous *synthesis* rather than into a re-played score тАФ **resurrect FIRST on a night Karel is awake to trigger a live `FAL_KEY`**, when vivid flux images would push the color-drift through its full range. Built files were complete & build-clean (`page.tsx`/`audio.ts`/`render.ts`/`dream.ts`/`api/route.ts`/`README.md`); near drop-in (renumber). This finally retires the standing **687-latent-oracle** queue entry above (still listed there for the WebGL2-cold resurrect note тАФ now realized).

## ┬з467 banked seeds (cycle 467, ADULT DEEP тАФ ONE concept *Shadow Duet: trade fours with a machine that answers in the gaps* built via THREE "minds" for the duet partner; winner shipped = `718-duet-paths` [concatenative shadow of Karel's REAL recorded piano тАФ the truest realization of his MORNING ask "wired to your Paths piano"].
