Renumber on revival; max committed folder now 718.)

### `716-shadow-duet` тАФ `queued` тнР (the **heuristic / Voyager-taste** mind тАФ the lab's most BULLETPROOF duet build: pure synth, zero network/key dependency, so it's a perfect no-fetch companion if 718's grain-answer proves unmusical OR for an offline/installation context). **Play a phrase; when you pause, a rule-based responder answers тАФ complementary register, inverted contour, density-matched, weighted scale step-walk, forced consonant chord-tone landing тАФ a reply structurally guaranteed never to echo your pitches.** Key+mode inferred by scoring 12 tonics against Dorian/Mixolydian/Aeolian templates (D Dorian fallback). Built files (removed; clean tsc+eslint self-reported): `page.tsx` (36 KB тАФ three inputs [Web MIDI hot-plug + `asdfghjkl`/`wetyuo`/`z/x` keyboard + on-screen тЙе44px keys], phrase detection, heuristic responder, ducking, idle auto-demo, Canvas2D river, FM-epiano L / flute R + binding pad, masterтЖТgain(0.45)тЖТcomp(тИТ3/20:1)) + `README.md`. Named refs: **George Lewis *Voyager*** ┬╖ jazz trading-fours. Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе4 subsystems + #3 named refs). Tags: MIDI/keyboard INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ heuristic call-response TECH ┬╖ jazz-responsive VIBE. **Why it lost:** Karel's ask was specifically "wired to your *Paths* piano" тЖТ 718 (his real recording) is the truer realization, and 718 binds this cycle's MACataRT dive; 716 is the generic-synth version. **Resurrect** as the dependency-free Shadow Duet (installation/offline), or merge its key-inference + step-walk taste INTO 718 as a cleaner answer-line generator. **Deepen:** velocity-sensitive dynamics (soft phrase тЖТ tender answer); harmonic memory (a pad following a slow form seeded by your recurring pitch-sets).

### `717-duet-mirror` тАФ `queued` тнР (the **Continuator / style-learner** mind тАФ the genuinely SURPRISING one: the partner *learns you* live and its answers grow to sound like your own playing recombined; the lab's first real-time live-trained style model). **As you play, a variable-order [orders 1тАУ3, back-off] Markov model absorbs your pitch-INTERVAL sequence [key-agnostic, ┬▒12] + your rhythm [fast/med/slow buckets]; on each phrase-end it folds the phrase into a persistent session model and answers by SAMPLING that model seeded from your tail тАФ so it starts generic-Dorian and, over ~a dozen phrases, mirrors *your* vocabulary back transformed.** A "learned: N phrases" + "memory richness" meter make the growth legible. Built files (removed; clean tsc+eslint self-reported): `page.tsx` (31 KB тАФ same three inputs, the live Markov learner, ducking, idle demo that FEEDS the model + ticks the count, Canvas2D river, FM-epiano L / bell R + pad, masterтЖТgain(0.42)тЖТcomp limiter) + `README.md`. Named refs: **Fran├зois Pachet *Continuator* (2002)** ┬╖ IRCAM **OMax / Somax2**. Ambition honest 3/5 (**#1** first lab live-trained style model [grep-checked: no prior dream piece builds a variable-order Markov over the player's own live input] + #2 тЙе4 subsystems + #3 named refs). Tags: MIDI/keyboard INPUT ┬╖ Canvas2D OUTPUT ┬╖ live-Markov style-learning TECH ┬╖ jazz-responsive VIBE. **Why it lost:** the "it sounds like *you*" payoff is the LEAST legible at a silent 06:30 glance (the learned-count climbs but you can't HEAR the learning without playing a minute yourself), and it doesn't bind this cycle's concatenative dive. **Why resurrect тнР:** it carries the only #1 of the three and the freshest *surprise* тАФ lead a future adult fire framed as "**the instrument learns you over a session**" (deepen: a "play me back what I taught you" button that improvises a solo entirely from the accumulated model; persist the model to localStorage so it remembers you across visits). Strongest when the diversity pick wants a *learned* technique, not a sensor reskin.

## ┬з469 тАФ 2026-06-18 ┬╖ adult DEEP fire ("fly inside your own recording" тАФ ONE concept, 3 technical approaches; answers JURY 2026-06-18 #3 "extend the ceiling builds 710/718, reward depth" + #1 "ban Canvas2D, use the scarce WebGPU stack" + #5 "use his real music") тАФ winner `720-paths-grainfield`; **2 banked seeds**

Cycle 469 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out. Research path (b)/(c): extends ceiling builds **710-presence-bloom** (WebGPU compute particle field) + **718-duet-paths** (concatenative grains of Karel's real Welcome Home piano), grounded by CataRT + Audio Latent Space Cartography (RESEARCH ┬з469). All three turn his real recording into a navigable corpus you move through to re-sound it. **Winner: `720-paths-grainfield`** тАФ the only approach on WebGPU compute (lab's scarcest renderer; JURY #1's literal ask) + truest 710 cycle-2. Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc+eslint; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (exit 0, 720 prerendered static) is the gate; losers moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` then removed before it.

**NUMBERING NOTE (important):** `720-paths-grainfield` is now a **real committed folder** тЖТ **max committed folder after this fire = 720.** The ┬з468 banked kids seed-labels "720-kids-shake-pop" / "721-kids-blow-balloon" were never committed folders тАФ when resurrected they must be **renumbered to тЙе721** (suggest `721-kids-shake-pop` тнР, `722-kids-blow-balloon`). The two adult seeds below are likewise just text тАФ renumber to тЙе721 when consumed.

Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`paths-spectral-cloud`** тнР (was built as 722; renumber тЙе721 when consumed) тАФ **the most conceptually novel of the three.** His recording's full **STFT becomes a 3D point cloud** (time ├Ч log-frequency ├Ч loudness) you **orbit and fly the camera through**; flying into a (time,freq) region re-sounds the grains living there тАФ *navigating the SHAPE of his sound plays it back*. Hand-written radix-2 FFT (1024 window / 512 hop), sparse-peak cloud capped ~55k three.js Points, additive + fog, CataRT-style region resynthesis. Named refs: **Xenakis UPIC** (drawing sound in a time-freq plane) + **Ikeda** data-as-points. Extends loved **243-spectral-cloud** + **321-spectral-flight** + 718. Lost only because it shares three.js (already 3├Ч in the window) with 721 while 720 carried the scarcer WebGPU compute тАФ but its interaction ("fly the spectrogram to play it") is arguably the lab's freshest. **Next-cycle deepening:** STFT in a Web Worker w/ progress bar; k-d-tree nearest-grain (replace stride-scan); TSL compute pass so points pulse with their grain's envelope as they sound; UPIC-style "draw a path, auto-fly it" re-composition.
- **`paths-constellation`** (was built as 721; renumber тЙе721 when consumed) тАФ Karel's recording as a **drifting three.js star-galaxy**: each grain a star, *angle* = time / *radius* = brightness / *height* = loudness (spiral arms); a soft violet attractor eases toward the pointer and re-sounds the nearest ~3 stars with curl-noise drift + orbiting camera. Rides the loved GPU-points cluster **130-tsl-particle-compute** + **262-aurora-particle** + 718. Warmest/most-legible of the three; lost on renderer-scarcity (three.js, not WebGPU) and a ZCR brightness proxy vs a true FFT centroid. **Next-cycle deepening:** Web-Worker/GPU kd-tree for 100k+ grains; a "constellation-line" overlay tracing the attractor's path (the actual concatenative score); reverb send sized by attractor speed.

**Standing adult seeds still unshipped (carried):** `717-duet-mirror` тнР (the live "learns-you" Continuator style-learner, the only #1 banked from cycle 467) ┬╖ the **WebGPU-compute audio-reactive field** modulated by his piano FFT (Ghost-Arcade June-2026 reference, RESEARCH ┬з468; now that 720 lands a real WebGPU-compute foundation in the lab, this is the natural deepening) ┬╖ **real cross-device multi-user** (JURY #4 тАФ all 3 multiplayer pieces are same-browser BroadcastChannel; 0├Ч truly cross-device).

### IDEAS ┬з473 тАФ banked from cycle 473's adult DEEP cross-device fire (winner shipped `729-piano-portal-jam`)

Both are complete, build-reviewed implementations (compile+lint-clean) moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` this cycle тАФ resurrect by copying the folder back in and renumbering above the then-current max. The shared concept: **a genuine cross-device WebRTC jam on Karel's real Welcome Home piano** (jury #4 lab-first), with the "send note-events not PCM тАФ both peers re-sound from the same corpus" twist. They differ on the **signaling handshake ├Ч renderer**.

- **`728-piano-relay-jam`** тнР (queued ┬╖ adult ┬╖ zero-server **copy-paste two-code** WebRTC handshake ┬╖ raw **WebGL2** two-color shared field ┬╖ concatenative grains of his recording) тАФ the purest zero-dependency handshake (native `CompressionStream` gzip тЖТ base64url SDP codes, non-trickle ICE, no backend at all) on the **scarcer renderer** (WebGL2 vs the winner's three.js). *Why it lost:* the two-codes-back-and-forth copy/paste is higher-friction than 729's shareable link, so it's less likely a real person completes the two-phone handshake тАФ and retiring the BroadcastChannel asterisk *in practice* was the deciding axis. *Why resurrect:* it's the most robust-by-construction link (no server, no lambda fragility) AND carries the scarcer renderer; pair its WebGL2 field with 729's `navigator.share` link flow for the best of both. Files exist verbatim.

- **`730-piano-room-jam`** тнР (queued ┬╖ adult ┬╖ friendly **4-letter room code** via a **guarded serverless SDP relay** [`api/route.ts`, POST-only, guard-compliant] ┬╖ **WebGPU** compute particle field ┬╖ concatenative grains) тАФ by far the **friendliest UX** (type the same 4 letters, no copy/paste) and the **scarcest renderer** (WebGPU, 1├Ч). *Why it lost тАФ the decisive flaw, in its own README:* the relay stores `{codeтЖТ{offer,answer}}` in a **module-level `Map` in per-lambda memory**, and Vercel routes the two peers to *different* lambda instances where that map isn't shared тЖТ the offer one peer deposits may **never reach the other**, so on real Vercel it likely **won't connect** тАФ which fails the jury's exact ask ("make it *actually* cross-device"). *Why resurrect (high value):* it's the **best piece the moment a backing store exists.** The dedicated next step is to ask Karel to approve moving the relay store to **Vercel KV / Upstash Redis** (a `package.json` change, which only he can make per the scope fence); with that one swap, 730 becomes the real magic тАФ frictionless room-code cross-device jamming on the scarcest renderer. Flag this dependency ask explicitly in a morning question.

## ┬з474 тАФ 2026-06-19 ┬╖ kids DEEP fire (ONE concept тАФ *Star Scoop: reach bare hands into a 3D night sky and scoop handfuls of glowing stars that chime* тАФ 3 renderer ├Ч synth approaches, orchestrated; resurrecting the twice-banked тнР `726-kids-star-scoop` seed = the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-18 #3 "stop banking and walking away") тАФ winner `731-kids-star-reach` (raw WebGL2); **2 banked seeds**

Cycle 474 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out (deliberate alternation off the last two kids WIDE fires, ┬з470/┬з472). ONE embodied/off-glass concept тАФ bare-hands MediaPipe scoop of a glowing star-field that rings consonant bell clusters, awe/wonder, **no beat/loop/groove** тАФ attacked via three renderers: three.js (730) ┬╖ raw WebGL2 (731, WON) ┬╖ WebGPU compute (732). Research path (c): consumed the twice-banked тнР seed `726-kids-star-scoop` (┬з472/┬з470, born of RESEARCH ┬з470's iOS-WebGPU finding); RESEARCH ┬з474 confirmed gestureтЖТparticle-swarm is a live 2026 commodity but the *musical-scoop* mapping is the open Resonance move. **Winner = `731` (raw WebGL2)** on the deciding axis of **renderer-scarcity + iOS reviewer-path reliability**: WebGPU is warming hard in the rolling window (721/724/727, the scarce renderer becoming its own monoculture) and three.js was just used last cycle (729), where **raw WebGL2 is the scarcest renderer AND the most bulletproof on Karel's 06:30 phone** (iOS has WebGL2 reliably; zero CDN renderer dep beyond the shared MediaPipe). All three were demoable + self-reported clean tsc+eslint; the two losers `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` before the authoritative winner-only build. тЪая╕П The authoritative `npm run build` **compiled + linted clean** (zero issues in the winner folder) but couldn't run static-generation тАФ the container's anomalous **4096 fd ceiling** killed it with `EMFILE`; proven environmental (pristine `main` fails identically тАФ see STATE.md cycle 474). **Max committed folder after this fire = `731`.** Resurrect by re-spawning the brief + the prior folder structure (both losers were fully built in `/tmp/dream-losers/` this fire):

### `730-kids-star-scoop` тАФ `queued` тнР (the three.js sibling тАФ the renderer every 2026 hand-particle repo reaches for; warmest/most-legible glow). **Reach bare hands into a 3D night sky and scoop handfuls of glowing stars that chime.** MediaPipe Hands (CDN, analysis-only, numHands 2) тЖТ a **three.js** `THREE.Points` field of ~2,400 additive glow sprites with `FogExp2` depth, swaying camera, per-star twinkle. Close a fist тЖТ nearest ~20 stars gather to the palm + a soft sparse C-major-pentatonic cluster; open wide тЖТ owned stars spill upward with a 5-step rising glissando; hand height indexes register. Kids-safe `voices тЖТ gain 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 6.5k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`, always-on open-fifth (C2+G2) drone, ghost two-hand auto-demo on camera-deny/idle >3.5s (`text-rose-300` notice), Canvas2D fallback reproducing the gather/spill physics, full teardown (three.js dispose + forceContextLoss). **Tags:** MediaPipe-hands camera INPUT (off-glass) ┬╖ three.js 3D-points OUTPUT ┬╖ gesture particle-gathering + spatial bell-cluster TECH (NOT loop/groove) ┬╖ awe/wonder VIBE. **Named refs:** MediaPipe Hands ┬╖ *Journey* (thatgamecompany) ┬╖ Refik Anadol. **Why it lost:** three.js was just used last cycle (729) and is the warmest of the trio in the rolling window; the WebGL2 sibling is the scarcer, more iOS-bulletproof scarce renderer. **Resurrect when** the kids side wants the richest-looking glow and three.js is cold in the rolling-10, or as the direct three.js comparison to 731. Honest 2тАУ3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [MediaPipe hands + three.js 3D point-field + spatial bell-cluster audio] + #3 named refs). Full build exists at `/tmp/dream-losers/730-kids-star-scoop/` this fire (treat as a fresh build on revival).

### `732-kids-star-cradle` тАФ `queued` тнР (the WebGPU-compute sibling тАФ the scarcest, biggest-particle-count renderer; the bolder swing once WebGPU cools). **Same Star Scoop concept on a WebGPU compute particle field.** MediaPipe Hands тЖТ ~**12,000 particles** in a storage buffer integrated each frame by an **inline WGSL compute pass** (ambient drift + per-hand attract/repel falloff + a *cradling swirl* when a fist closes), drawn as instanced additive glow sprites (compute + render passes). Hand position(s) + grab strength (0..1, 1 = fist) passed as uniforms; fresh fist-close/open events edge-detected in JS ring a pentatonic bell cluster / rising glissando; hand height = register. **First-class Canvas2D fallback** runs the *same* gather/spill physics (~2,600 glow blobs) so the reviewer's likely no-WebGPU path still feels good; a badge shows the live renderer ("WebGPU compute ┬╖ 12k stars" vs "Canvas2D fallback"). Kids-safe `gain 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`, always-on open-fifth drone, ghost two-hand auto-demo, all GPU init try/caught (never throws into the loop), full teardown (destroy buffers + device). **Tags:** MediaPipe-hands camera INPUT (off-glass) ┬╖ WebGPU-compute particle OUTPUT (Canvas2D fallback only) ┬╖ gesture particle-gathering + spatial bell-cluster TECH (NOT loop/groove) ┬╖ awe/wonder VIBE. **Named refs:** MediaPipe Hands ┬╖ *Journey* ┬╖ Refik Anadol. **Why it lost:** WebGPU is the most ambitious renderer but is warming to a monoculture itself (721/724/727 тАФ 3 of the last kids/adult ships) and WebGPU-on-iPad (Safari 26) is still fragile, so Karel's 06:30 phone glance most likely lands on the Canvas2D fallback тАФ whereas 731's WebGL2 runs the real scarce renderer reliably on iOS. **Resurrect when** WebGPU is cold in the rolling window AND there's a real iPad to verify the compute path, OR as the spectacle/installation version (12k GPU particles read bigger than 731's 2,600). Honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [MediaPipe hands + WebGPU compute particle field + spatial bell-cluster audio] + #3 named refs). Full build exists at `/tmp/dream-losers/732-kids-star-cradle/` this fire.

## ┬з475 (2026-06-19) тАФ banked from the adult DEEP disintegration fire (winner: `734-paths-tape-erosion`)

Two non-winners from cycle 475's 3-way bake (one concept тАФ *Karel's real Welcome Home recording slowly disintegrates & re-forms over a 6тАУ8 min arc; Basinski* The Disintegration Loops *+ Eno* Music for Airports/Reflection тАФ three renderer attacks). Both are demoable-grade and clear the ambition floor; resurrect either when the renderer rotation favors it.

### `733-paths-disintegrate` тнР тАФ WebGPU compute, 40,000 GPU particles
The boldest, scarcest-renderer swing at the same concept. A WGSL **ping-pong storage-buffer compute shader** updates 40k particles in parallel; per-movement behavior (*Intact* orbit тЖТ *Eroding* fly-away тЖТ *Sparse* dim-drift тЖТ *Ghost* near-invisible flashes тЖТ *Reforming* home-pull), color warm-amberтЖТcool-blueтЖТvioletтЖТamber. Same audio engine as 734 (Hann grains of his recording, look-ahead scheduler, per-movement LP/reverb/dropout, soft pad drone, offline fallback synth). Canvas2D fallback (~8k CPU particles). **Why it lost:** a 40k-particle storm visually overlaps the lab's recent particle-storm pieces (`710-presence-bloom`, `724-presence-drift`) and 735 тАФ the *spectral-feedback spectrogram* of 734 was the fresher register; AND WebGPU may show only its Canvas2D fallback on an iPad (WebGPU is Baseline Jan 2026 but Safari support is newer than WebGL2's). **Why resurrect:** WebGPU compute is the scarcest renderer in the window AND the boldest; once we confirm Karel's review device runs WebGPU (it likely does on desktop Safari 26 / Mac), 40k GPU particles disintegrating read much bigger than the Canvas2D fallback. Built monolithic (1255-line page.tsx) тАФ refactor to the 734 file-split on resurrection. Full code was preserved off-tree this cycle; rebuild from the README spec.

### `735-paths-revenant` тнР тАФ three.js, 60,000 `Points` volumetric ghost (Anadol lineage)
The warmest-looking attack: 60k `THREE.Points` with `AdditiveBlending` + `FogExp2` in three radial shells (dense core 55% / mid 30% / outer veil 15%), warm-amber-coreтЖТcool-blue-veil; every frame the active-point fraction (18%тАУ100%), scatter, opacity, fog density and slow camera-orbit are driven by the 5-movement state + live FFT; a core glow mesh pulses with bass. Same grain/movement audio engine; Canvas2D 3k-particle fallback. Named ref **Refik Anadol тАФ data-as-fog** (*Melting Memories* / *Living Architecture*). **Why it lost:** three.js was just shipped last cycle (`729-piano-portal-jam`) so it's the least-diverse renderer of the three, and a point-cloud ghost again overlaps the particle-storm register; the *Reforming* movement only restores ~60% density (intentional but reads incomplete), and 60k per-frame JS position updates risk <60fps on low-end devices. **Why resurrect:** it is the warmest, most "Anadol installation" of the three тАФ pull it when three.js has cooled in the rotation and pair it with `@react-three/postprocessing` `UnrealBloomPass` (the README notes bloom is currently faked via additive blending) for a genuinely richer glow.

### Process note for next cycle (worktree quirk)
Builder subagents this cycle self-isolated into **git worktrees** (`.claude/worktrees/agent-*`), so one builder's files (734) were invisible in the main tree until the agent finished тАФ nearly got curated out as "empty/failed." Next fire: after spawning, check `git worktree list` / the worktree paths as well as the main tree before judging a builder "broken." (`.claude/worktrees` is gitignored тАФ safe, just invisible.)

### 734 next-cycle deepening (the multi-cycle commitment)
`734-paths-tape-erosion` is designed to extend: (cycle-2) drive the read-head + erosion params off **onset/phrase detection** of his recording (spectral flux) so the decay reflects his *musical* structure, not a fixed scrub; add a **longer algorithmic reverb tail** (current convolver is short тАФ the *Ghost* movement wants seconds of wash); optional **WebGPU compute** port (resurrect 733's engine) for a denser field on capable devices. (cycle-3) a gentle single-touch "press to slow the decay / hold a motif" interaction so the listener can *resist* the erosion тАФ the Basinski tension made playable.

## ┬з479 banked seeds (2026-06-19, from the cycle-479 adult WIDE fire)

### тнР `745-room-listener` тАФ the lab's FIRST in-browser neural net (status: queued, HIGH priority)
**The brief that was built and banked, not shipped.** The room, sung: a real neural network (**TensorFlow.js + COCO-SSD**, `lite_mobilenet_v2`, loaded from `esm.sh` CDN via `webpackIgnore`'d dynamic `import()`; weights from `storage.googleapis.com`, CORS-open тАФ no npm install, no API route) watches the live camera at ~5fps on a 320px offscreen copy and turns **each detected object into a sustained Web Audio voice** тАФ class name тЖТ hashed D-dorian pitch, box-x тЖТ pan, box-y тЖТ filter cutoff, size├Чconfidence тЖТ loudness; objects fade in/out as they enter/leave frame. The chord is a living portrait of your space. **Why promising:** ambition **3/5** (#1 first TFJS/neural inference in the lab тАФ grep-verified never used; #2 тЙе4 subsystems; #3 Memo Akten *Learning to See*), the exact "novel technique тЖТ ceiling" the jury keeps asking for, and **triple love-aligned** (`101-camera-song`, `86-sound-to-video`, `323-latent-condensation`). **Why banked not shipped:** for an unattended cycle I couldn't verify, its entire headline lives inside an **unverifiable CDN model load** (ghost fallback would show a generic substitute if it fails), and the builder shipped it on **Canvas2D** тАФ the renderer the 2026-06-18 jury most loudly told the lab to stop defaulting to. **How to resurrect (next adult cycle, DEEP):** rebuild on a **scarce renderer** (WebGL2/WebGPU per JURY #1); **verify the esm.sh model load actually resolves** under the deploy network (or self-host weights / pin a known-good CDN); keep the robust ghost fallback. This is the strongest banked seed in the queue тАФ the boldest swing and the most jury-and-love-aligned. (Working code exists in this cycle's transcript / the curated-out folder if a fast restart is wanted.)

### `746-orbit-bell` тАФ live ISS telemetry тЖТ cosmic globe (status: queued)
Hear the ISS overhead in real time: `https://api.wheretheiss.at/v1/satellites/25544` (keyless, CORS-open, read-only GET тАФ no `guard`), polled ~every 4s. Altitude тЖТ drone register, velocity тЖТ tremolo rate, latitude тЖТ harmonic tilt + hemisphere pan; the instant `visibility` flips `daylight`тЖФ`eclipsed` between polls, ring an **inharmonic struck bell** (bright entering sun, dark entering shadow). Visual: three.js shader globe with a **live-computed day/night terminator** (sub-solar point from UTC), pulsing ISS marker on the real ground track, rolling orbit trail, starfield, crossing flash synced to the bell. **Why promising:** genuine live real-world sonification on a source the lab hasn't used (orbital telemetry); event-detection (terminator crossings) drives a designed bell; self-contained ghost-orbit sim (~51.6┬░ track, compressed eclipse cadence) keeps it fully alive offline. **Why banked:** honest 2/5 (#2 + #3 NASA/*Quindar*); cosmic-space-data overlaps existing `314-solar-wind` territory, and `744`'s compass was the higher-confidence, more-novel pick this cycle. **Resurrect** as a cosmic palette-extension (loved-cosmic-adjacent) or fold the terminator-bell idea into a future space piece.

## ┬з482 banked seeds (2026-06-19, from the cycle-482 kids DEEP fire тАФ "a child says a word and it becomes music")

Both were built to demoable and curated out (winner was `752-kids-word-band`). Working code existed in this cycle's transcript / the curated-out folders; rebuild from the brief below. Both clear the floor (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + qualified-#5 RESEARCH ┬з411/┬з482 + kids-first speech) and dodge every JURY 2026-06-19 ban.

### тнР `751-kids-say-a-zoo` тАФ semantic word тЖТ singing creature (status: queued, HIGH priority тАФ the most pure-4yo-delightful of the three)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A 4-year-old SAYS a word тАФ "dog!", "sunshine!" тАФ and it instantly becomes a bright bouncy **creature** that sings, filling a sunny Canvas2D meadow with the child's own vocabulary as a living consonant chord-garden. Mapping: word LENGTH тЖТ creature size; stable HASH тЖТ bold hue + base pitch (quantized C-major pentatonic, nothing wrong); VOWEL count тЖТ sung-phrase length (1тАУ4 notes); hash bit-fields тЖТ eye/leg/wing style. Cap ~12 creatures (oldest hops off). Web Speech API (auto-restart) + 8 always-visible тЙе64px emoji picture buttons (ЁЯР╢ЁЯР▒тШАя╕ПтнРЁЯРЯЁЯРжЁЯМ╕ЁЯМИ, identical mapping, zero-mic playable) + 3s auto-demo. Kids-safe chain (master тЙд0.27 тЖТ lowpass 5.5kHz тЖТ 20:1 compressor), always-on C2/G2/C3 pad. Refs: Toca Boca / Sago Mini. **Why promising:** the clearest, most magical cause-effect for a literal 4-year-old ("say dog тЖТ see+hear a dog"); clean compile+lint. **Why banked not shipped:** the winner `752` filled the JURY-named SVG/DOM-no-shader gap (#2) and had the more *musical* (phonetic-riff) mapping; `751` is Canvas2D (fine, scarce) but the semantic one-chord-per-creature is less musically rich. **Resurrect FIRST** next kids cycle тАФ strongest delight, and Canvas2D vs SVG diversifies off whatever 752 establishes.

### `753-kids-spell-parade` тАФ rhythmic word тЖТ accumulating marching-band groove (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A child SAYS a word; each letter parachutes down as a giant Canvas2D character, lands on one of five colored drum pads, and adds its beat to a **growing parade groove** (Chris-Wilson scheduler, 90 BPM, 16th grid). LettersтЖТpads via stable mapping (KICK/SNARE/HAT/TOM/BELL); a C-pentatonic bell layer under all percussion (nothing wrong). **Long-form stateful:** the last ~5 words form the living loop, older characters march off-screen тАФ genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 (the thin kids-stateful category the jury keeps asking for). Web Speech + 8 picture buttons + auto-demo; kids-safe chain + C-major drone. Refs: Incredibox; marching-band toys. **Why promising:** the only of the three that is long-form/stateful (jury-valued); "the parade grows as you talk" is a strong sustained-play hook. **Why banked:** self-reported risk тАФ at ~40 characters across 5 pads, visual crowding/overlap on small phone screens needs tuning, and groove musicality depends on word choice (consonant-heavy words stack on one pad). Resurrect with per-pad character-spacing fixes + a light per-word rhythmic-spread so any word grooves.

## ┬з483 тАФ Conducted Room banked explorers (from cycle 483 DEEP fan-out; winner shipped = 754-conducted-table, Canvas2D)

The cycle-483 DEEP concept: **"The Conducted Room"** тАФ extend 729-piano-portal-jam's WebRTC note-event ceiling to a 3+ player CONDUCTED ensemble, but replace 729's (banned) grain engine with a **non-grain phrase-remix** of Karel's real recording (onset/silence-segmented 0.6тАУ3s phrases; each seat plays whole phrases via playbackRate register-shift). Long-form stateful arc (migrating harmonic center, breathing density, per-seat drift; minute 5 тЙа minute 0). Star/conductor-hub WebRTC topology (zero-server shareable-link handshake from 729). Ghost ensemble keeps it fully alive + sounding solo on one device; remote players fill chairs. Both banked builds are demoable + tsc/eslint-clean тАФ they were de-selected on the renderer-scarcity axis, NOT on quality.

- **`753-conducted-orbit` тнР (three.js).** "Concert in the round": glowing central conductor + ~5 orbiting luminous musician-orbs over a warm cream-amber-rust radial-gradient stage (genuinely bright, not a dark void). **Conduct by dragging a baton anywhere on the stage** тАФ vertical = dynamics, horizontal sweep speed = tempo, release holds. ~6-min arc; ghost conductor auto-sweeps after ~2.6s idle. `Hub` class stacks one Portal per chair (star). Per-pulse rings + drifting Points sparks. **Why banked:** three.js was used *last cycle* (729) тЖТ warmest renderer of the trio in the rolling window; the baton-on-a-3D-stage gesture is the most physically expressive conducting model of the three. **Resurrect when:** three.js cools in the rolling window, or as the DEEP companion if a future cycle wants the in-the-round spatial reading. Clean next step noted in its own README: true full-mesh (guests hear each other, not just host broadcast) + phrase-aware harmony (pick phrases whose detected pitch fits the current chord).

- **`755-conducted-stage` (SVG/DOM).** "Conductor's dashboard": the distinctive feature is a **long-form TIMELINE RIBBON** across the screen (6 sections, density-silhouette strokes, crawling playhead) that makes the 5.5-min stateful arc legible at a glance тАФ past scrolls behind, structure hints ahead. Seats as DOM/SVG cards; baton control (vertical=dynamics, sweep speed=tempo). Bright warm amber/rose palette. **Why banked:** SVG/DOM shipped the **two prior cycles in a row** (748, 752) тЖТ a third would itself be a monoculture; and its self-reported caveat is that phrases fire at the current audio clock rather than sample-accurately at each future beat (tighten the look-ahead before resurrecting). **Resurrect when:** the timeline-ribbon idea is wanted as a long-form-legibility layer тАФ it is the best of the three at *showing* the arc, and could be grafted onto the shipped 754 as an optional "score view." First fix the scheduler to schedule each beat sample-accurately.

## ┬з484 banked seeds (2026-06-19, from the cycle-484 kids WIDE fire тАФ "the bright/joyful/active-middle kids register, off every JURY-2026-06-19 ban")

Cycle 484 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out (deliberate alternation off the two prior DEEP fires ┬з482/┬з483; and the jury's loudest 2026-06-19 message тАФ *every ban hardened into a new monoculture* тАФ is a WIDE-shaped anti-monoculture ask). Three divergent **bright daylight, active/joyful** explorers (JURY #4), each off every 2026-06-19 ban (no grain-resynthesis ┬╖ no WebGPU/raw-WebGL2 shader-field ┬╖ no mic/camera ┬╖ no dark-glow), diverging on INPUT ├Ч OUTPUT ├Ч TECHNIQUE ├Ч PALETTE. Winner shipped = **`755-kids-bounce-house`** (Canvas2D Verlet trampoline membrane тАФ the researchтЖТbuild chain from RESEARCH ┬з484, the literal JURY #2 "no-GPU-shader, Canvas2D-is-scarce-again" answer + JURY #4 bright/joyful). Both non-winners are demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint (no `any`, no `use*` helpers, no API route, SSR-safe); de-selected on ambition-floor height + the renderer-scarcity tiebreak, NOT on quality. Rebuild from the briefs below (full briefs are in this cycle's STATE entry / the curated-out folders).

### тнР `756-kids-hill-roller` тАФ sculpt sunny hills, then TILT to roll a ball over them = play the melody you drew (status: queued, HIGH тАФ the love-aligned tilt sibling)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A bright daylight landscape: ~10 rounded hills the child shapes by **dragging each up/down** (taller hill = higher major-pentatonic note, color shifts greenтЖТgold with pitch, immediate audio on shape). A happy ball rolls across under gravity driven by **device tilt** (`gamma`); every crest it rolls over **chimes that hill's note** тАФ so the child *composes by sculpting terrain* then *performs by tilting*. Robust **no-tilt fallback** (giant left/right tap zones + a "Play the hills" auto-sweep that rolls the ball across the whole contour) so it's fully playable + sounding on the reviewer's desktop glance with zero tilt. SVG/DOM only (zero canvas/WebGL/shader), kids-safe chain (`gain тЙд0.3 тЖТ lowpass 7500 тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`), always-on pad, 3s-idle auto-demo. **Why promising:** the *sculpt-the-terrain-then-tilt-to-play* loop is a genuinely fresh kids mechanic (distinct from the saturated dropтЖТcollision pieces), it's embodied (KIDS.md tilt principle), and it is **love-aligned** (`83-kids-tilt-rain`тЭдя╕П, `82-kids-color-piano`тЭдя╕П). **Why banked not shipped:** honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [tilt input + 1D rolling-ball integrator on a child-editable height field + crest-detection synth + SVG render] + #3 [xylophone/color-pitch pedagogy ┬╖ Loopimal/Toca Boca]); the winner `755` had the higher floor (research chain + lab-first cloth membrane) and Canvas2D was the cleaner JURY-#2 renderer answer than another SVG/DOM ship. **Resurrect FIRST** next kids cycle тАФ strongest banked seed, love-aligned, and SVG/tilt diversifies off whatever ships next. Code was clean + demoable this fire.

### `757-kids-balloon-band` тАФ inflate balloons whose pitch rises with size; released, they accrete a poppable sky-chord (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A bright daytime sky: **press-and-hold anywhere** to inflate a bright balloon тАФ it grows and its note **glides UP in pitch with size** (continuous gestureтЖТpitch, quantized to C-major-pentatonic on release, theremin-glide brought down to a 4yo). **Release** тЖТ it detaches, floats up with gentle buoyancy/sway, and holds a **sustained voice**; the drifting balloons form an evolving, always-consonant **chord in the sky** the child builds. **Tap a floater** тЖТ soft bright "ding" + sparkle `THREE.Points` burst; its note leaves the chord. Cap ~10 (oldest drifts off top + fades). three.js mesh scene-graph (MeshStandardMaterial spheres, NOT a full-screen GLSL/WebGPU shader field), kids-safe chain (`gain 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 6800 тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`), always-on pad, 3s-idle auto-demo, full three.js disposal (`renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). **Why promising:** `growth = pitch` is a clear, tactile, fresh-for-the-lab cause-effect, and the accreting *poppable* harmony is a lovely "build then take apart" loop; bright/joyful. **Why banked:** honest 2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 [Toca Boca/Sago Mini ┬╖ balloon play ┬╖ theremin glide]); three.js is warmer in the rolling window than Canvas2D, and the winner's research chain + lab-first membrane outranked it. **Resurrect when** three.js is cold in the rolling-10 and a bright accreting-harmony toy is wanted; pair the pop with a slightly richer particle burst. Code was clean + demoable this fire.

## ┬з490 banked seeds (2026-06-20, from the cycle-490 kids WIDE fire тАФ "the bright/joyful/active-middle kids register, off every JURY-2026-06-19 ban")

Cycle 490 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out (even-cycle kids rotation; JURY 2026-06-19 #4 wants the bright daylight active/joyful MIDDLE). Three divergent explorers, each off every 2026-06-19 ban (no grain-resynthesis ┬╖ no GPU-shader field ┬╖ no mic-hum ┬╖ no dark-glow), diverging on INPUT ├Ч OUTPUT ├Ч TECHNIQUE ├Ч NAMED-REF. Winner shipped = **`773-kids-parade-caller`** (Canvas2D, speech-ASR тЖТ syllable-rhythm parade groove тАФ the researchтЖТbuild chain from RESEARCH ┬з490, the lab's first speech-as-RHYTHM). Both non-winners are demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint (no `any`, no `use*` helpers, no API route, SSR-safe); de-selected on the surprise / research-chain axis, NOT on quality тАФ both rebuild from the briefs below (full briefs are in this cycle's STATE entry).

### тнР `774-kids-marble-symphony` тАФ build a Wintergatan-style marble machine: drop marbles, place bell-bars, gravity makes the music (status: queued, HIGH тАФ scarcest renderer + love-aligned)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A bright daytime stage: a marble drops from a spout, falls under real gravity, and BOUNCES off a zig-zag of tilted bell-bars тАФ each collision rings a velocity-scaled marimba/bell ping and flashes the bar; the kid TAPS to drop more marbles or place new bell-bars (the simplest cause-and-effect), and the machine **always self-plays** (auto-timer recycles marbles from the spout). `physics.ts` = a resolution-independent Euler integrator with **circle-vs-segment collision + restitution** (bars are line segments; reflect velocity about the contact normal, ~0.72 bounce); `bells.ts` = live Web-Audio bell/marimba + woody thump + C2 bass, **C-major-pentatonic** tuning (higher bars = higher pitch, nothing can sound wrong). **Output: SVG/DOM** (`<circle>` marbles with a radial shine, `<rect>` stage, `<line>` bars, repainted each rAF) тАФ the **scarcest renderer in the lab** (JURY #2 explicitly wants SVG/DOM proven) and zero canvas/WebGL/shader. Ref: **Wintergatan Marble Machine** (Martin Molin) тАФ watching gravity + marbles MAKE the music; nods to marble-run toys / Rube Goldberg. **Why promising:** the physics feels alive and mechanical (not a tap-pad), it's the only SVG/DOM piece of the three (best renderer-diversity answer), and it is **love-aligned** тАФ the loved `169-kids-marble-run`тЭдя╕П is the exact territory ("do more in this direction"). **Why banked not shipped:** honest 2/5 (#2 four subsystems [2D physics solver + collisionтЖТbell synth + touch placement + SVG render] + #3 [Wintergatan]); the winner `773` had the higher *surprise*/research-chain (lab-first speech-as-rhythm bound to today's ┬з490 dive) and ASR is the literal hook of the dive. **Resurrect FIRST** next kids cycle тАФ strongest banked seed, SVG/DOM is the starved renderer, love-aligned, and pure-touch so it runs perfectly on the phone reviewer-path with zero permissions. Code was clean + demoable this fire (folder held at `/tmp/dream-losers/774-kids-marble-symphony`).

### `775-kids-stamp-band` тАФ stamp bright characters onto a grid a playhead sweeps = build a looping band (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A bright grid (6 rows ├Ч 12 steps): TAP a cell to drop a big cute character stamp (one instrument per row), tap it again to remove it; a glowing vertical **playhead sweeps leftтЖТright on a loop** (~110 BPM) and every stamped cell it crosses bounces + plays its sound тАФ the child BUILDS a repeating song and hears it thicken as they add/remove stamps. `sequencer.ts` = a persistent mutable Grid model (genuine **compositional memory/state** тАФ the thin kids-stateful category JURY-valued, ├а la 738-song-sprout) with a kick + clap **percussion backbone** + 4 pentatonic mallet rows + a preloaded default groove (never blank/silent); `voices.ts` = live-synthesized kick (pitch-swept sine) / clap (filtered noise burst) / mallets (triangle + octave). **Output: Canvas2D** (sweeping playhead + many stamps); a look-ahead Web-Audio scheduler. **Always self-plays** (default pattern loops with zero interaction; "Surprise!" randomizes, "Clear" empties). Ref: **Toshio Iwai** тАФ *SimTunes* (1996) / *Electroplankton* (2005): a line sweeps creatures placed on a grid into music; nods to *Incredibox* (Yann Seznec) for the layered build-a-band joy. **Why promising:** real groove with a beat + genuine looping state (not a one-shot tap that resets), constructive "I built a band" hook, bright/joyful; sequencer-loop territory is **love-aligned** (`172-loop-station`тЭдя╕П, `111-kids-shape-loop`тЭдя╕П). **Why banked:** honest 2/5 (#2 four subsystems [grid-sequencer state machine + polyphonic synth + playhead clock + Canvas2D render] + #3 [Iwai SimTunes/Electroplankton]); the lab is warmer on step-sequencers than on speech-as-rhythm, and the winner carried the research chain. **Resurrect when** a bright constructive build-a-band toy is wanted, or to seed a longer-form stateful kids piece (graft on evolving/maturing voices like 738). Code was clean + demoable this fire (folder held at `/tmp/dream-losers/775-kids-stamp-band`).

## ┬з491 banked seeds (2026-06-20, from the cycle-491 ADULT WIDE fire тАФ "his music a new non-grain way / off the GPU-shader field," off every JURY-2026-06-19 ban)

Cycle 491 ran an ADULT **WIDE** fan-out (JURY 2026-06-19's loudest message: every ban hardened into a new monoculture тАФ a WIDE-shaped anti-monoculture ask). Three divergent explorers, each off every 2026-06-19 ban (no grain-resynthesis ┬╖ no GPU-shader field ┬╖ no mic-hum ┬╖ no dark-glow), diverging on INPUT ├Ч OUTPUT ├Ч TECHNIQUE ├Ч NAMED-REF. Winner shipped = **`777-song-architecture`** (Canvas2D chroma-Self-Similarity-Matrix heatmap of his *real* Welcome Home recording + playhead + click-to-hear-the-repeat тАФ the researchтЖТbuild chain from RESEARCH ┬з491, the lab's first SSM-of-his-recording; the directest hit on JURY #1 *use his music a new non-grain way* + JURY #2 *off the shader onto scarce Canvas2D*). Both non-winners are demoable + self-reported clean (no `any`, no `use*` helpers, no API route, SSR-safe; tsc couldn't run in-container for lack of `node_modules`, hand-reviewed); de-selected on the his-music + research-chain axis, NOT on quality. Rebuild from the briefs below.

### тЬЕ `778-markov-mirror` тАФ **SHIPPED cycle 493** (adult WIDE winner). Built demoable: live variable-order Markov chain + self-walking SVG transition graph; Cope-EMI / Illiac-Suite refs; implements the Feb-2026 "visible live-music-agent" design-space axis. See INDEX. **Open next-cycle deepening:** let it learn from his *recording's* onset+pitch note-stream so it improvises in **Karel's** style тАФ bind the visible model back to his music. (Original brief retained below.)

### тнР `778-markov-mirror` тАФ teach a small keyboard your melodic style, watch it improvise back in it on a glowing transition graph (status: SHIPPED ┬з493 тАФ brief retained for the deepening step)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A small on-screen C-major keyboard (tap + computer-keys `a`тАУ`l`); as you play, the app builds a **live variable-order Markov chain** (order-1 pairs + order-2 triples, counts accumulate, phrase-chaining resets on pause) of YOUR note transitions, then "Let it improvise" **walks the chain forever** in your style (prefers order-2 evidence, weighted by your counts; humanized timing; soft bass root every 4 steps), voiced as a warm triangle+sine ADSR piano through a lowpass+convolution-reverb bus. **Output: SVG/DOM** тАФ a bright networked transition GRAPH (nodes = notes on a ring, directed edges weighted by use, thicker/brighter = more used); during improvisation the **active node + traversed edge glow live** so you watch the melody walk its own learned web. Teach / Improvise (space) / Forget. Bright violet-emerald-on-deep-blue constellation, NOT a dark-glow field. Ref: **David Cope *Experiments in Musical Intelligence* (EMI/Emmy)** тАФ recombinant style-modeling composition; nods to **Hiller & Isaacson *Illiac Suite* (1957)** (first Markov-generated composition). **Why promising:** the teachтЖТimproviseтЖТwatch-it-walk loop is a genuinely fresh, legible interaction (the model is *visible* and *reshapes* as you play тАФ stateful memory you can see); off his music so it spreads the fire; SVG/DOM is the scarce renderer JURY #2 wants. **Why banked not shipped:** honest 2/5 (#2 five subsystems [tap input + live-learning variable-order Markov + walk scheduler + polyphonic synth + SVG graph] + #3 [Cope EMI / Hiller]); the winner `777` carried the his-music directive + today's ┬з491 research chain + the audible click-to-hear-the-repeat payoff. **Resurrect FIRST** next adult cycle when SVG/DOM is cold and a learns-your-style instrument is wanted; clean next step тАФ let it learn from his *recording's* note-stream (onset+pitch) so it improvises in *Karel's* style, binding it back to his music.

### `779-ink-score` тАФ a machine slowly draws an abstract graphic score and plays the very marks it inks, evolving for minutes with motif memory (status: queued тАФ the long-form-state reach)
**The brief that was built and banked.** Autonomous (no input required) + two sliders (Density, Register). A **stateful generative-notation grammar** invents abstract marks (dots, weighted lines, arcs, clusters, hooked glyphs) and lays them on a slowly **left-scrolling staff-less field of warm cream paper**; a bright red **playhead** sweeps and **each mark sounds as it's crossed** (yтЖТpitch snapped pentatonic, weightтЖТdynamics/duration, shape-familyтЖТtimbre: dot=pluck, line=bowed sustain, arc=glissando, cluster=chord, hook=gestural flick). **Long-form memory (the reach toward #1):** a bounded **motif bank** тАФ each phrase the machine re-states a remembered motif (transposed / inverted / retrograde / time- & interval-stretched / fragmented, `uses` counter drifts it further over time), coins a fresh one, or emits free material; `register`/`density`/`tension` random-walk toward the sliders but never snap тАФ so **minute 5 is recognizably related to but different from minute 1, never an exact loop.** Look-ahead Web-Audio scheduler (~1.4s ahead), deterministic mulberry32 PRNG (Seed button re-rolls the bank live). **Output: SVG/DOM**, bright ink-on-cream Ikeda-meets-handwriting, NOT a dark void. Ref: **Cornelius Cardew *Treatise* (1963тАУ67)** (193-page wordless graphic score) + **Earle Brown *December 1952* / *Available Forms*** (open-form graphic notation) тАФ a *living Treatise* the machine writes and reads at once. **Why promising:** real long-form state/memory (the thin "evolving, not a loop" category JURY values); a distinct adult register (avant-garde notation) that isn't the glow-meditation; SVG/DOM scarce renderer. **Why banked:** honest ~2.5/5 (#1 long-form stateful + #2 four subsystems + #3 Cardew/Brown); graphic-score territory is partly anticipated by `319-hub-score` (Canvas2D "time-river" living score), and the winner `777` carried his-music + the research chain. **Resurrect when** a long-form autonomous adult piece is wanted, or graft its motif-memory engine onto a his-music source (let his recording's phrases BE the motif bank that the machine re-states transformed тАФ binding the strongest idea here back to Karel's music).

## ┬з492 banked seeds (2026-06-20, from the cycle-492 kids DEEP fire тАФ "your drawing IS a song: Xenakis's UPIC for a 4-year-old," off every JURY-2026-06-19 ban)

Cycle 492 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out (deliberate alternation off cycles 490/491 which both ran WIDE; JURY #3 "protect the depth habit"). ONE concept тАФ *a moving reader sweeps across a child's freehand-drawn curves, reading **x/angle = time** and **y/radius = pitch** as a continuous, evolving graphic score* (Xenakis's **UPIC**, 1977 CEMAMu: "with UPIC, music becomes a game for children: they draw, they hear"; modern UPISketch / SonicSketch) тАФ attacked via three reader/interaction models. Winner shipped = **`781-kids-paint-conductor`** (linear playhead sweeps a free paint canvas; the purest, most legible UPIC + the cleanest build + genuinely long-form-stateful). All three are Canvas2D (off the JURY-banned GPU-shader field), pure touch (no mic-hum), bright daylight (not dark-glow), drawn-curve-as-score (not grain-resynthesis) тАФ clean on all four 2026-06-19 bans, and hit JURY #4 (bright/joyful/active middle) + #3 (long-form stateful, the thin kids-depth category). The lab's existing paint pieces (loved 100/104/158/160/152) are per-stroke-loops or splat-triggers; a single global time-axis playhead reading ALL strokes' y as pitch is lab-first. Non-winners are demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint (no `any`, no `use*` helpers, no API route, SSR-safe). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### тнР `782-kids-sun-clock-song` тАФ draw on a round "sun clock"; a sweeping sun-hand reads your doodle around and around into a hypnotic looping round (status: queued, HIGH тАФ the most surprising form)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A bright peachтЖТamber dial with a smiling sun face at center; a glowing **sun-hand sweeps the dial continuously** (~9s/revolution) and NEVER stops (seeded with a gentle pre-drawn arc so a silent glance is alive). The child finger-paints on the dial: **angle = time**, **radius = pitch** (outer=high, inner=low, pentatonic-quantized so nothing is wrong), **color = timbre** (5 friendly voices: bell, flute, filtered saw, FM chime, Karplus-Strong pluck). Because the surface is a clock, the score is **inherently cyclic** тАФ any drawn arc becomes a repeating phrase, concentric strokes layer into a round. Kids-safe chain (`gain тЙд0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7k тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`), always-on pad, тЙе64px swatches, design-notes toggle, sparkle clear. Ref: Xenakis UPIC wrapped onto a circle. **Why promising:** the radial/round form is the most *surprising* of the three (a drawn loop that's literally a clock) and the cyclic structure is naturally satisfying for a 4yo (their doodle = their song, forever). **Why banked not shipped:** the winner `781` was the purer/most-legible UPIC, the cleaner build (`781` 0 lint issues vs `782`'s deps warnings, since fixed by the builder), and the canonical demonstration of the reference. **Resurrect FIRST** next kids cycle тАФ radial/round diversifies off `781`'s linear canvas; consider continuous-spline capture (currently discrete polar samples leave a dotted line on fast gestures). Code was clean + demoable this fire.

### `783-kids-melody-rider` тАФ draw a wiggly line across a sunny sky; a cute character RIDES your line and sings its shape as the tune (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A full sunny-meadow scene (sun, clouds, hills, flowers тАФ the most exuberant/game-like of the three). The child finger-draws a freehand line; a friendly character (star/bird/cloud/bug/frog, bold color) immediately **rides along that exact line leftтЖТright and loops forever**, bobbing with its shape. Mapping: **horizontal = time**, **line height under the rider = pitch** (pentatonic-quantized) тАФ so the SHAPE drawn literally IS the melody the rider sings. Multiple stacked lines = multiple riders + voices = layered tune (long-form stateful). 5 color/voice swatches, тЙе64px, sparkle clear, seeded line+rider on load. Ref: Xenakis UPIC read by a traveling avatar. **Explicit differentiation from `761-kids-hill-roller`:** the rider travels at steady horizontal speed and height=PITCH (a graphic score), NOT a gravity/physics roll. **Why promising:** the most joyful/active register (JURY #4) тАФ a cute character performing the child's drawing is the most legible, delightful cause-effect for a 4yo. **Why banked:** the riding-character-on-a-line is the closest to existing kids tropes (761 + many creature pieces), and it carried a minor lint warning; `781`'s purer UPIC + cleaner build won. **Resurrect when** a bright character-driven build is wanted; clean next step = let each rider leave a little sparkle trail at its current pitch so the melody contour is doubly legible. Code was demoable this fire (one lint warning to fix on resurrect).

## ┬з493 тАФ banked from the adult WIDE fire (cycle 493) тАФ two non-winners, built to demoable then removed (folders not committed; rebuild from these briefs)

Cycle 493 ran an ADULT **WIDE** fan-out answering JURY 2026-06-20 ("Canvas2D is 10/15, spread don't flip; rest his recording (6├Ч); body/camera collapsed 4├ЧтЖТ0├Ч; SVG/DOM is starved"). Three orthogonal explorers, none using a banned tag (no Canvas2D-primary, no his-recording). Winner shipped = **`778-markov-mirror`** (SVG/DOM тАФ the single starved renderer the jury named, purest researchтЖТbuild chain, lowest 06:30 glance-risk). The two non-winners below were complete, self-reported clean (TS strict + ESLint zero errors), and de-selected on the *"don't flee to one new wall"* axis тАФ both fled to a WebGL2 shader, exactly the trap JURY #1 cautioned against. Rebuild from these briefs under the fresh numbers shown.

### тнР `786-body-organ` тАФ your whole standing body becomes a chord: an off-glass, adult-meditative organ you play by moving (status: queued, HIGH тАФ the most-starved INPUT register; resurrect for a DEEP body cycle)
**The brief that was built and banked (was `784`).** Webcam тЖТ **MediaPipe Tasks-Vision `PoseLandmarker`** (CDN, analysis-only, frames discarded тАФ nothing recorded/sent). Cross-modal map: **arm-span/openness тЖТ chord width/voicing** (closed cluster тЖТ wide open voicing, 2тАУ6 tones of a D-Lydian field), **vertical reach тЖТ register/brightness**, **lateral lean тЖТ stereo pan + filter bend**, **overall motion energy тЖТ density/shimmer/tremolo** (stillness rewarded with a held glowing chord, never silence). Voiced by 8 detuned triangle+sine organ voices тЖТ pan тЖТ gain тЖТ lowpass тЖТ compressor + reverb. **Output: full-screen WebGL2 GLSL field** (fbm-warped aurora ribbons + radial body-aura + energy sparkles; Canvas2D fallback). **Ghost-body fallback** = a slow Lissajous body auto-plays if no camera, so a 06:30 phone glance is alive + sounding. **Built clean** (page 409 / harmony 211 / pose 144 / field-shader 282 lines, TS+ESLint zero errors). **Named refs:** *Rhythm in the Air: Vision-based Real-Time Music Generation through Gestures* (arXiv 2511.00793, Nov 2025) ┬╖ MediaPipe Pose ┬╖ *A Design Space for Live Music Agents* (arXiv 2602.05064). **Ambition 3тАУ4/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [pose tracking + cross-modal mapping + generative organ + WebGL2 field] ┬╖ #3 refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з493). **Why banked not shipped:** the directest hit on JURY #4 (body 4├ЧтЖТ0├Ч) тАФ BUT MediaPipe was *just* used in 731 (kids hands) and 724 (pose), so shipping it 2 cycles later risks re-forming the very stack we just left; and it flees to a WebGL2 shader (one new wall) where 778's SVG/DOM is the genuinely scarce surface. **Resurrect FIRST for a DEEP body cycle** once the MediaPipe stack has cooled ~3+ cycles and a shader is wanted тАФ this is the strongest body-as-instrument adult concept in the bank. The full-body adult register (vs 731's kids hands) is the differentiation.

### `785-aurora-weather-organ` тАФ hear the Sun's weather right now: the live magnetosphere played as a slow organ, under the aurora that same weather would paint (status: queued тАФ the real-world-data-sonification lane, rests his recording)
**The brief that was built and banked (was `783`).** No mic/camera/recording тАФ the instrument is **live NOAA SWPC data** fetched client-side (planetary K-index + solar-wind plasma; 10s timeout; defensive header-column parsing; `simulateSpaceWeather()` sinusoidal-drift fallback live within 2s if CORS/fetch fails, amber notice). **Sonification:** 7 oscillators via `setPeriodicWave` (pipe-organ partials), base C3-Lydian; **rising Kp activates tension tones (Bb3/Db3), raises tremolo 0.15тЖТ2.8Hz and lowpass 700тЖТ2800Hz**; solar-wind speed тЖТ swell tempo, density тЖТ partial richness; all `linearRampToValueAtTime` over 3.5s, min-gain guaranteed (never silent/harsh). **Output: full-screen WebGL2 GLSL aurora** (6-octave fbm curtains, vertical rays, 1тАУ4 Kp-driven layers, greenтЖТtealтЖТvioletтЖТcrimson ramp, hash starfield, filmic tonemap; Canvas2D fallback). HUD shows live Kp/speed/density + a **manual calmтЖФstorm override slider** so a reviewer hears the full range without waiting for a real storm. **Built clean** (5 files, TS+ESLint zero errors, full teardown via `WEBGL_lose_context`). **Named refs:** NOAA SWPC ┬╖ the lab's data-sonification family (588-tidal-organ, 744-magnetic-walk, 760) ┬╖ Inigo Quilez fbm. **Ambition ~3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [live API + sonification mapping + WebGL2 aurora + organ synth] ┬╖ #3 refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з493). **Why banked:** hits JURY #3 (rest his recording, data works) cleanly, but data-sonification is an established lab lane (less of a fresh *register* than 778's symbolic-model) and it flees to a WebGL2 shader. **Resurrect when** a cosmic data-sonification piece is wanted and the shader surface is cold; verify live NOAA CORS works in-browser (the manual slider + simulated fallback guarantee a glance regardless).

Cycle 500 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out (deliberate alternation off the 498/499 DEEP run; JURY 2026-06-20 was a *spread* signal тАФ "spread, don't flip onto one new wall"). Three orthogonal explorers, each calm (the jury's reintroduced "middle"), each dodging all four current bans (touch-primary / Canvas2D-primary / his-recording-as-conductor-analyzer / uniformly-bright-active-kids), spread across renderers (three.js / SVG-DOM / WebGL2). Winner shipped = **`805-kids-snow-piano`** (tilt тЖТ Karel's real piano snow globe тАФ the milestone build using his recording, JURY #3, triple love-aligned, research-chain direct). Both non-winners were built to demoable and self-reported clean (`tsc --noEmit` zero errors in-folder; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helpers). Folders were copied to `/tmp/dream-losers-500/` then removed before the authoritative build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### тнР `806-kids-sky-lullaby` тАФ the REAL sky right now (sun, clouds, moon phase) sings a 4-year-old a slow dusk lullaby they stir with a tilt (status: queued, HIGH тАФ **RESURRECT FIRST**, the renderer-diverse pick)
**The brief that was built and banked.** The child's **live local sky** from **Open-Meteo** (free/no-key/CORS; `current=temperature_2m,cloud_cover,is_day,weather_code` + `daily=sunrise,sunset`; coords from `navigator.geolocation`, London silent default) is the **composer**: `is_day`+time тЖТ key & register (day = warm major celesta; dusk/night = soft suspended pads, octave-down), `cloud_cover` тЖТ note density, `temperature` тЖТ timbral warmth (sineтЖТtriangle), **computed moon phase** тЖТ a slow shimmering high voice (bright near full, near-silent at new). A **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** plays a sparse pentatonic ostinato that **mutates/re-seeds every ~45тАУ90s** (Eno, never an exact loop); the child **tilts/drags** a glowing star-cursor across the sky and where it rests adds a key-snapped twinkle. **Output: inline SVG/DOM** (deep-blueтЖТvioletтЖТgold gradients, blurred moon/cloud/star shapes; rAF repaint) тАФ the renderer the lab is genuinely scarce on (three.js shipped the last TWO cycles, 799+803, *and* the 805 winner is three.js #3 тАФ **this is the spread-correct renderer next cycle**). Kid-safe `gain тЙд0.3 тЖТ lowpass тЙд7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, soft attacks / 2тАУ4s releases, always-on drone bed, тЙе64px Start, iOS AudioContext + orientation perm both in the first tap, full teardown (scheduler/rAF/nodes/`audioCtx.close()`/abort fetch). Degrades: geo denied тЖТ default city; fetch/CORS fail тЖТ baked "example sky" + `text-rose-300` notice while audio plays on hands-free within ~2s. Refs: **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports* / *Reflection*) ┬╖ **Andrea Polli** + **Natalie Miebach** (weather/data sonification) ┬╖ **Open-Meteo**. **Explicit differentiation from `575-kids-sky-song`:** 575 is a Canvas2D/WebGL *bright* weather toy you touch; 806 is its **quiet SVG/DOM twin** тАФ dusk-calm, moon-aware, tilt-stirred, generative-not-performed. Ambition ~2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [live API + generative scheduler + SVG render + synth] + #3 refs + soft-#5 RESEARCH ┬з500). **Why banked not shipped:** 805 was the milestone build on his real recording (JURY #3 + Karel's #1 directive + triple love-aligned). **Resurrect FIRST next kids cycle** тАФ it is the renderer-spread answer to three straight three.js ships; clean next step = verify Open-Meteo CORS in a real browser (the baked fallback guarantees a glance regardless).

### `807-kids-breath-bubbles` тАФ blow softly into the tablet and grow a slow drifting cloud of glowing bubbles that chime as they rise and pop (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** The mic reads **breath ENERGY only** (RMS off an `AnalyserNode`, analysis-only тАФ never pitch/speech/recognition, never wired to output, frames discarded, nothing recorded/sent). A soft blow spawns glowing bubbles; **harder blow = bigger, lower-toned** bubble; they drift up and sway, and on reaching the top (or a big gust) **pop with a soft C-major-pentatonic sine-bell chime** (big = warm/low, small = bright) тАФ accreting into a calm rising cloud over minutes, long-form, never a hard loop. **Output: raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00)** additive `gl.POINTS` glow-sprites (iq soft exponential falloff + faint rim, `SRC_ALPHA, ONE`) over a dim warm-dusk gradient тАФ the iPad-reliable scarce renderer (last WebGL2 ship was `788`, cycle 494). Synth only (rests his recording). Kid-safe `gain 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp(тИТ10/20:1)`, always-on CтАУGтАУC pad, soft attacks/long decays, тЙе64px "Start blowing", iOS AudioContext+getUserMedia (EC/NS/AGC off) both in the first tap, full teardown (rAF + mic tracks + nodes + `audioCtx.close()` + delete GL program/buffer/VAO + lose-context). Degrades: mic denied тЖТ a **ghost-breath auto-demo** spawns+pops hands-free within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 тЖТ Canvas2D bubble field that still drifts+chimes. Refs: **Toshio Iwai** (Electroplankton low-floor play) ┬╖ breath/wind-controller lineage (EWI) ┬╖ **Inigo Quilez** (additive glow). Ambition ~2/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [breath-RMS analysis + particle spawn/growth physics + WebGL2 render + pop-chime synth] + #3 refs). **Why banked:** honest self-framing тАФ blow-to-bubbles is a familiar toy form; and mic was just used in the prior kids cycle (799 voice), so a 3rd-in-the-window mic-input is the weaker diversity pick. **Resurrect when** a breath/vocalization piece is wanted on a cold mic window; clean next step = let bubble *clusters* harmonize (chord on a multi-pop) so the cloud sings, not just chimes.

## ┬з503 banked seed (2026-06-21, from the cycle-503 adult DEEP fire тАФ "give the answering-room agent a long-form memory," JURY 2026-06-20 #2 return-and-extend of 770)

Cycle 503 ran an adult **DEEP** fire (two approaches to ONE concept: the live-music agent that REMEMBERS, so minute 5 тЙа minute 1 тАФ the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-20 #2, "the depth ceiling collapsed 4тЖТ1, RETURN AND EXTEND 770 to a real 4/5"). Both built to demoable, self-reported clean. Winner shipped = **`814-remembering-room`** (SYMBOLIC motif memory тАФ an Adaptive Phrase Bank that quotes/develops its own and his material via transpose/augment/fragment/invert, with a legible "memory shelf"; the more novel ceiling build and the directest reading of "accrete a *motif*"). The non-winner below was de-selected because textural-residue accretion sits close to last cycle's `808-sympathetic-strings` sustain-pedal accretion and the lab's drone-bed family; 814's symbolic memory is the fresher register. Folder removed before the authoritative build (not committed). Rebuild from the brief below.

### `815-accreting-room` тАФ the answering agent with a TEXTURAL memory: every phrase it plays leaves a sustained ghost-layer residue, so the room thickens over minutes into an Eno tapestry (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** Soloist = Karel's real "Welcome Home" recording played whole (read-only GET `/api/audio/549fc519-тАж`, 4s abort, JSON/`{url}`/direct handling; `OfflineAudioContext` ~16s warm fallback + emerald badge, never silent, runs offline). Listener = FFTтЖТ12-bin chroma тЖТ 24-template triad fit + tension, energy/flux, phrase-gap state machine (+`chordPitchClasses()` so the bed stays consonant). Agent = pad + gap-answer (as 770) PLUS the **accretion engine**: every agent note/phrase routes into a long-tail residue тАФ a feedback-delay bus (two self-feeding taps, feedback rising with a **memory** slider and the room's age, hard-capped 0.88) + a 7-voice ghost bank where each answer deposits its landing pitch as a slowly-decaying held tone. A global age/density rises over minutes (bed louder/thicker/brighter); a per-frame **consonance gate** fades out-of-chord ghosts fast and an **anti-mud duck** lowers the bed when crowded or when he's loud; master `DynamicsCompressorNode` limiter is the safety net. **Output: audio-forward DOM/CSS hearth + small `<canvas>` of accreting horizontal strata** (one faint layer per agent phrase, brightening with density) тАФ NOT fullscreen Canvas2D, NOT a shader. Sliders: **company** (shyтЖФtalkative) + **memory** (room forgets quickly тЖФ holds everything). **Named refs:** *A Design Space for Live Music Agents* (arXiv 2602.05064, the long-term-memory "Adaptation" gap) ┬╖ Christopher Raphael *Music Plus One* ┬╖ Brian Eno *Music for Airports* (accreting generative ambient). **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#1 long-form stateful accretion + #4 cycle-2 + #3 refs + #5 RESEARCH ┬з503). **Honest limit (builder-reported):** at the extreme "holds everything" setting on a dense passage it can get hazy тАФ the honest edge of textural-only memory, recoverable by easing the memory slider. **Resurrect when** an ambient/installation register is wanted and a textural (non-symbolic) memory is the point; clean next step = make the residue *pitch-quantize* to the live chord (not just gate) so the bed is always a clean voicing, and add a slow spectral tilt so the oldest residue darkens as it ages (depth-of-time cue).
