## ┬з504 banked seeds (2026-06-21, from the cycle-504 kids WIDE fire тАФ "let a 4-year-old SHAPE harmony or rhythm," JURY 2026-06-21 kids verdict: ban pentatonic-crutch + UPIC)

Cycle 504 ran a kids **WIDE** fire тАФ three orthogonal explorers, each letting the child SHAPE harmony or rhythm (off the jury-banned pentatonic-never-wrong crutch and UPIC pitch-painter), on three spread renderers (SVG / WebGL2 / audio-forward; none Canvas2D, none three.js). All three built to demoable, self-reported clean. Winner shipped = **`816-kids-tone-tower`** (touch-stack тЖТ just-intonation chord construction; harmony genuinely *shaped*, the directest answer to the jury and the rarer/harder register). The two below were de-selected for the reasons noted; folders saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-504/` and removed before the authoritative build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `817-kids-clap-back-band` тАФ the child claps a rhythm and a band plays the child's OWN groove back (status: queued)
**The brief that was built and banked.** Child claps into the mic; real-time **spectral-flux onset detection** (NOT speech recognition) captures the inter-onset timing of the claps as a ~1тАУ2 bar pattern; an animal band echoes that exact rhythm back and, over repeats, layers a drum / shaker / bass thump onto the CHILD'S captured rhythm тАФ so the groove that grows is the one the child clapped, not a pre-approved beat. Light quantization (~50% strength) keeps the child's feel. **Renderer: raw WebGL2** (GLSL ES 3.00 additive particle bursts/character blooms; the cold/fresh surface) with SVG fallback. Kids-safe master chain, runtime-synthesized clap/drum/shaker/bass, soft drone bed. **Crucial fallback that's its strength:** the whole screen is an always-live **tap pad** feeding the identical `onInput тЖТ capture тЖТ quantize тЖТ loop` path, so a 4-year-old with no mic gets the exact same toy (`text-rose-300` notice for the grown-up); a 3s hands-off **auto-demo** loops a built-in clapped pattern until real input cancels it. **Named refs:** **Orff Schulwerk** (echo-clapping / call-and-response, foundational children's rhythm pedagogy) ┬╖ **Konnakol** (clapped/spoken rhythm as material тАФ distinction: this captures real CLAPPED AUDIO ONSETS, not recognized speech syllables) ┬╖ **Steve Reich *Clapping Music***. **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#1 clapped-audio-onset rhythm capture [`773-parade-caller` used speech syllables, never real audio onset] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic onset detection + loop capture/quantize + multi-voice perc synth + WebGL2 render = 4] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** rhythm-capture-from-the-child rhymes hard with the recent **`773-kids-parade-caller`** (cycle 490, speech-syllable rhythm) тАФ two kids rhythm-capture pieces ~14 cycles apart is the "too similar" trap the mandate guards against; the harmony-shaping winner (816) is the rarer register the jury explicitly asked for. **Resurrect when** the kids lane wants a bright/active mic (or tap) rhythm piece and 773 has cooled out of the window; clean next step = let the band's added layers play *complementary* counter-rhythms (off-beats, fills) derived from the child's pattern, not just doublings.

### `818-kids-pendulum-choir` тАФ pull back a row of pendulums and SHAPE a slowly-phasing polyrhythm (status: queued, FIX the pentatonic palette first)
**The brief that was built and banked.** A row of ~10 pendulums of graduated lengths; the child pulls one (or several) back with a finger and releases тАФ each swings with its own period (period тИЭ length) and CHIMES at the bottom of its swing. Because the periods differ, the chimes form a **pendulum-wave polyrhythm**: in sync at the start, fanning out into a shimmering scatter, re-converging ~30s later. The child SHAPES the rhythm by choosing WHICH pendulums to start and HOW FAR to pull each (amplitude тЖТ loudness/brightness). A ЁЯМК "swing them all" button gives the classic wave reveal; ЁЯМЩ "calm them" resets; auto-starts on load. **Physics (builder-verified stable):** semi-implicit (symplectic) Euler on the small-angle ODE with a clamped fixed `1/240s` accumulator (frame-rate independent, no whip/explode after a backgrounded tab); pendulum k does `18+k` whole swings per 30s cycle тЖТ guaranteed re-convergence every 30s; the visual swing AND the chime trigger come from the SAME simulated angle. **Renderer: audio-forward + minimal SVG** (spare glowing lines/bobs; the sound is the star). Calm/hypnotic bedtime register (the jury liked the kids calm register returning). **Named refs:** **Harvard Pendulum Wave** (15 graduated pendulums cycling through phase) ┬╖ **OSZILOT** (contemporary pendulum sound installation) ┬╖ **Gy├╢rgy Ligeti *Po├иme Symphonique*** (1962, 100 metronomes drifting in/out of phase). **Ambition ~2/5** (#1 pendulum-wave physics polyrhythm engine [grep-0├Ч] + #2 тЙе3 subsystems [physics sim + per-chime synth + SVG render] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (FIXABLE flaw):** the chimes use a **D-major-pentatonic** consonant set тАФ exactly the "pentatonic-never-wrong" crutch the JURY 2026-06-21 banned 6├Ч. The polyrhythm (the actual point) is genuinely shaped by the child, so this is salvageable, but **before resurrecting, swap the pitch palette** so harmony isn't the pre-approved pentatonic тАФ e.g. tune each pendulum to a just-intonation overtone of one root (the longest = fundamental, shorter ones = 2nd/3rd/4th... partials) so the pitches come from the physics/length ratios themselves rather than a snapped scale. That makes the pitch *derive from the same lengths that set the rhythm* тАФ a tighter, non-pentatonic concept. **Resurrect when** a calm kids piece is wanted; it's the cleanest calm-register dodge in this fire once the palette is de-pentatonic'd.

## Cycle 505 тАФ adult DEEP fire (one concept ├Ч 3 feedback-synthesis approaches), shipped 1

Cycle 505 ran the lab's **first feedback-instrument** fire тАФ ONE massively-bigger concept ("an instrument born from a self-oscillating feedback loop you tame," grep-0├Ч for any prior no-input/Larsen/feedback-as-sound piece) attacked via three Web Audio synthesis approaches, in parallel. All three reached complete implementations. Winner shipped = **`820-feedback-ecology`** (the coupled-dynamical-system "ecology" тАФ the conceptually biggest and the only one with genuine **long-form evolution** [minute 2 тЙа minute 0], the depth-ceiling quality JURY 2026-06-21 prizes and the exact gap it flagged in pruning-candidate `805`). The two below are real, build-verified implementations тАФ resurrect from the briefs (and the code, where noted).

### `819-no-input-mixer` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ a faithful no-input mixer played by an XY pad (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable (984-line page, self-reported tsc+ESLint clean; saved to `/tmp/dream-loser-819/` this fire).** Three parallel Web Audio feedback channels, each `feedbackGain тЖТ bandpass(high-Q) тЖТ delay тЖТ waveShaper(tanh) тЖТ back`, with a cross-coupling send bus so channels beat against each other (real no-input mixer send/return). **Hero control: an XY pad** тАФ X = bandpass center (80 HzтАУ6 kHz log), Y = loop gain / edge-of-chaos (low = hum, mid = singing Larsen, high = beating drones, top = controlled noise); CH1/2/3 select; тЪб Kick seeds oscillation; тЖУ Calm tames a runaway; Q / delay(comb) / cross-coupling sliders. **Renderer: WebGL2 oscilloscope** (LINE_STRIP additive-blend glow) + Canvas2D spectrum/RMS-bloom overlay, Canvas2D fallback тАФ **the scarcest renderer in the window (WebGL2 1├Ч)**, the cleanest diversity-renderer pick. Ear-safety: feedback hard-cap 0.97, brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (тИТ9 dB, 20:1), master default 0.28, no auto-start, Panic/Mute. Ambition ~3/5 (#1 lab-first no-input feedback instrument + #3 Nakamura / Body Synths Superbooth-2026 / David Tudor + #5 RESEARCH ┬з505). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** it is a *faithful emulation of an existing effect* тАФ superb and the more directly *playable* of the two, but `820` is the genuinely "massively bigger" concept (a dynamical SYSTEM that self-organizes and evolves) and answers the jury's depth-ceiling priority. **Resurrect when** an adult wants the most directly-playable feedback instrument on the cold WebGL2 surface; clean next step = the README's "spectral-freeze 4th channel" (convolver with long feedback IR = a no-input mixer with tape-loop memory).

### `821-larsen-field` тАФ live acoustic feedback (Larsen) sculpted by notch/peak carving (status: built complete in an isolated worktree, banked)
**Built to demoable (970-line page, builder self-reported tsc strict clean) тАФ but its builder wrote into an isolated git worktree, so it never entered this fire's tree; resurrect from the worktree/brief.** Mic тЖТ feedback ring (`micSource тЖТ inputGain тЖТ loopGain тЖТ series BiquadFilters тЖТ delay(22ms) тЖТ analyser тЖТ loopGain`) plus a **virtual self-oscillating path** (two detuned saws тЖТ bandpass тЖТ loop) so it blooms and demonstrates fully and SAFELY **on headphones / muted speakers / no-mic** without acoustic coupling. **Hero interaction:** tap/drag the WebGL2 spectral heat-field to place **notch** (kill a ringing tone) and **peak** (encourage one) filters in series тАФ literally sculpting the feedback's pitch content live; an FFT **howl-guard** drops loop gain if sustained energy exceeds threshold; loop gain hard-capped 0.92, brick-wall limiter (тИТ10 dB, 20:1), master default 0.20, pre-start headphone/volume warning screen, graceful mic-denial тЖТ virtual mode. Ambition ~3/5 (#1 first live acoustic-Larsen instrument + #3 Robert Henke / David Tudor / Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* / Nakamura / Body Synths Superbooth-2026 + #5 RESEARCH ┬з505). **Why de-selected:** highest ear-risk of the three (real acoustic feedback) and the live-mic-on-speakers path can't be glance-verified on a single unattended phone; the virtual fallback makes it safe but `820`'s self-organizing evolution is the stronger concept. **Resurrect when** an adult live-performance mic piece is wanted (point a mic at the real piano/PA and conduct the feedback); clean next step = the README's second parallel ring (~37ms delay) cross-coupled to the first.

## ┬з506 banked seeds (2026-06-21, from the cycle-506 kids WIDE fire тАФ "let a 4-year-old SHAPE rhythm or the *feeling* of harmony," JURY 2026-06-21 #4: kill pentatonic-never-wrong + #5: ship a banked sibling)

Cycle 506 ran a kids **WIDE** fire тАФ three orthogonal explorers, each letting the child SHAPE rhythm or harmony off the jury-banned pentatonic crutch, across three spread renderers (Canvas2D / SVG-DOM / WebGL2) and three inputs (touch / touch-drag / mic). Two of the three deliberately resurrected ┬з504-banked siblings (JURY #5: clear the bank). All three built to demoable, self-reported clean. Winner shipped = **`822-kids-shape-drums`** (touch тЖТ rotating-polygon polyrhythm; the child SHAPES rhythm, the grep-thin kids register, complementing 816's harmony and the most robust unattended тАФ no mic/network). The two below were de-selected for the reasons noted; folders saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-506/` and removed before the authoritative build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `823-kids-feelings-chords` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ drag one sun across a feelings-sky and SHAPE the chord's emotion (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable (page + README, self-reported tsc/ESLint clean; saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-506/` this fire).** A big friendly **SVG sun** the child drags anywhere on a full-screen affect field; position **bilinearly blends four chord qualities** тАФ up-left bright **major** (happy), down-left **minor** (cozy/wistful), down-right **sus** (floaty/mysterious), up-right **add9/maj7** (dreamy). A fixed Web Audio pad keeps a single tonal center (root drone + steady fifth ALWAYS present, so it's always "in tune"); two **color voices** glide тАФ the third between maj3/min3/P4, plus a high added voice fading in toward the dreamy corner тАФ all via `setTargetAtTime`/ramps so the harmony morphs **click-free**. Sky gradient, sun face/expression, glow, and CSS motes all shift with the feeling; a bell sparkle trails the finger. iOS gesture-gate, no-audio notice, optional 12-min goodnight fade with tap-to-wake. **Renderer: SVG + DOM** (the renderer-diverse pick тАФ off Canvas2D and off the three.js 799/803/805 streak). **Named refs:** **Russell's circumplex model of affect** (valence├Чarousal as a feelings-wheel) ┬╖ **Hevner's affective chord/mode associations** (major=happy, minor=cozy, sus=floating, add9=dreamy). **Ambition ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [pad synth + chord-quality morph engine + 2D affect-field mapping + SVG render = 4] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** it's harmony-shaping, and cycle 504 *just* shipped harmony-shaping (816, JI chord-stacking) тАФ shipping rhythm-shaping (822) this cycle completes the jury's "harmony OR rhythm" pair and hits the grep-thin kids register; 823's *continuous affect-morph* mechanism is genuinely different from 816's *discrete interval-stacking* though, so it's a strong distinct piece. **Resurrect FIRST when** the kids lane wants the renderer-diverse SVG/DOM surface and a harmony piece; clean next step = a second touch adds a harmonizing companion sun (parent+child, diatonic тАФ the dyadic-synchrony research, RESEARCH ┬з506).

### `824-kids-clap-loop` тАФ clap a rhythm and a glowing band loops your groove back (status: built complete, banked; resurrects ┬з504-banked 817)
**Built to demoable (800-line page + README, self-reported clean; saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-506/` this fire).** The ┬з504-banked **`817-kids-clap-back-band`** brief, built. Mic тЖТ `AnalyserNode`; per-frame **spectral-flux + energy onset detection** (140ms refractory) captures each clap's position in a ~3.2s bar; on release the claps **snap to a 16-step grid** (forgiving) and become a looping percussion layer played by a **Web Audio look-ahead scheduler** (25ms tick / 120ms ahead). Clap again to stack up to 4 layers, Incredibox-style; each layer is a tappable glowing creature (mute/remove). Synth drums (no samples): sine-drop kick, noise clap, woodblock, shaker; soft C-major pad so it's never silent. **Renderer: raw WebGL2** fragment shader (the scarcest renderer, 1├Ч in the window). **Crucial fallback = its strength:** mic-denied тЖТ **tap-to-clap** on the same captureтЖТquantizeтЖТloop path (`text-rose-300` notice), so the toy works with no mic and never throws. **Named refs:** **Boss RC loop-station** (capture a bar, loop, overdub) ┬╖ **Incredibox** (stacked-layer groove of visible characters) ┬╖ **spectral-flux onset detection** ┬╖ (lineage: **Orff echo-clapping**, **Reich *Clapping Music***). **Ambition ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [mic onset detection + capture/quantize + look-ahead loop scheduler + WebGL2 render = 4] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** mic-onset reliability is the unattended-straight-to-prod risk the lab repeatedly flags (the EMFILE-free but ear/eye-unverifiable path), and rhythm-capture-from-the-child rhymes with `773-kids-parade-caller` (speech-syllable rhythm, cycle 490) тАФ the polygon-polyrhythm winner (822) authors rhythm via robust physics instead. **Resurrect when** the kids lane wants a bright mic/tap rhythm piece on the cold WebGL2 surface and 773 has cooled; clean next step = the band's added layers play *complementary counter-rhythms* (off-beats/fills) derived from the child's pattern, not just doublings.

## IDEAS ┬з507 тАФ 2026-06-21 (cycle 507 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ two banked explorers

Cycle 507 ran an adult **WIDE** fire тАФ three orthogonal explorers (inputs MIDI / pointer / mic; techniques waveguide-mesh / orbital-sequencer / spectral-paint), each deliberately **energetic/percussive** (the direct answer to the JURY 2026-06-21 adult-ambient ban) and dodging every this-cycle ban (his-recording, machine-listens, pentatonic, UPIC, adult-ambient). Winner shipped = **`827-waveguide-mesh`** (audio-rate 2-D FDTD membrane played by MIDI; live-performance fitness + starved MIDI input). The two below are built complete and de-selected only on the curate tiebreakers тАФ rebuild from these briefs.

### `825-gravity-sequencer` тАФ compose a polyrhythm by arranging GRAVITY, not a grid (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + physics.ts + audio.ts + render.ts + README; `npx eslint` тЖТ one harmless `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` warning on a `useCallback`, otherwise clean; folder removed before the authoritative build, NOT committed).** A playable **cosmic step-sequencer where orbital mechanics is the clock.** Tap empty space to drop a heavy tuned **bell** (each new bell = the next pitch up a **D-rooted just-intonation set** 1/1┬╖9/8┬╖6/5┬╖4/3┬╖3/2┬╖5/3┬╖9/5┬╖2/1 тАФ deliberately NOT C-pentatonic, the 6/5 & 9/5 give a modal/minor color); press-drag-release to **fling a satellite** (dashed slingshot aim line shows predicted velocity). Each satellite is integrated under inverse-square gravity from every bell with a **velocity-Verlet (leapfrog) symplectic integrator** (energy-conserving so stable orbits *stay* stable and the rhythm doesn't decay), softening + 4├Ч sub-stepping for close skims. **Perihelion = the trigger:** when a satellite's radial velocity `(r┬╖v)/|r|` flips negativeтЖТpositive inside a bell's influence radius (the local distance minimum), that bell STRIKES тАФ a short percussive FM/mallet hit, velocity scaled by pass speed/closeness. Orbit period = the rhythmic interval, eccentricity = natural swing, multiple satellites on different orbits = drifting **polyrhythm**; three-body chaos and slingshots make grooves breathe; a satellite that falls all the way in is absorbed with a louder accent. Canvas2D motion-blur trails, glowing bells that flash on strike. Master `gain тЖТ lowpass 12 kHz тЖТ compressor`; audio gesture-gated; alive on load (3 bells + 3 satellites in stable-ish orbits before sound). **Named refs:** **Batuhan Bozkurt тАФ *Otomata*** (moving agents trigger notes on events) ┬╖ **Kepler / celestial mechanics** (perihelion/eccentricity/period as the musical clock). **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [symplectic integrator + perihelion trigger-detection + percussion synth bank + trail renderer = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ arguable #1 *orbital-mechanics-as-discrete-rhythm-sequencer* vs the existing `432-three-body` which sonifies orbits as a continuous DRONE, not a sequencer). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** 827 edged it on Karel priority #3 (live-performance/MIDI fitness тАФ a more directly stage-playable instrument) and the cleaner build; 825 is arguably *more novel* (less direct ancestor than 827's FDTD-pond family) and energetic. **Resurrect FIRST when** the adult lane wants a cosmic/geometric rhythm piece on the pointer+Canvas2D surface; fix the one `exhaustive-deps` warning (memoize `seedScene` or add it to deps) first; clean next step = orbit-period quantization to a global tempo grid (snap-to-groove toggle) and a Poincar├й-section HUD so the chaosтЖФlock transition is legible.

### `826-spectral-loom` тАФ freeze your own voice as a spectrogram and paint the frozen sound (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + audio.ts + render.ts + README; builder reports `eslint` + `tsc --noEmit` 0/0 on the folder; folder removed before the authoritative build, NOT committed).** A clinical / Ryoji-Ikeda **spectral instrument where the visitor's OWN LIVE MIC is the material** (NOT his piano, NOT any server audio тАФ dodges the his-recording ban). Make a sound (sing/speak/whistle/clap); a live STFT (`AnalyserNode`, fftSize 1024, dBтЖТ0..1, perceptual freq curve) scrolls a rolling spectrogram. **тЭД Freeze** copies the rolling window into an editable magnitude matrix `buffer[TIME][FREQ]` тАФ a held "image." **Edit the picture to edit the sound:** pointer **smear** drags spectral energy sideways in time (freeze-stretch), **raise/lower** brushes magnitude with a falloff kernel, a **freeze-stretch slider** runs a per-frame IIR time-blur, and a **scrub head** sweeps the frozen frame with a **loop** toggle for rhythmic re-triggering (active, not a drone). Resynthesis = a capped **96-oscillator additive bank** reading the buffer column under the scrub head every frame with `setTargetAtTime` smoothing (no zipper). Master `gain тЖТ lowpass тЙд13.5 kHz тЖТ compressor`. **Crucial mic-free path:** mic denied/absent тЖТ visible `text-rose-300` notice + a **"Use demo sound"** button that routes an internally-generated evolving chord/whistle/noise through the identical captureтЖТfreezeтЖТscrub pipeline, so the whole mechanic is fully demoable without a mic; canvas animates a demo spectrogram on load. **Named ref:** **Jean-Fran├зois Charles тАФ "A Tutorial on Spectral Sound Processing Using Max/MSP and Jitter"** (Computer Music Journal 32:3, 2008) тАФ spectrogram-as-editable-image-buffer (GRM/IRCAM spectral-freeze lineage). **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [live STFT capture + frozen editable spectral buffer + additive resynth + spectrogram renderer] ┬╖ #3 named ref). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** spectral processing has several lab ancestors (`34-spectral-morph`, `321-spectral-flight`) and mic was a warm input in the recent window; 827's MIDI input was the starved/diverse pick. But the *paint-the-frozen-spectrum-from-live-mic* framing is genuinely fresh and the surprise ("the picture IS the sound") is high. **Resurrect when** the adult lane wants a clinical-Ikeda mic piece; clean next step = a true IFFT/overlap-add resynth path (vs the additive bank) for transient fidelity, and a second frozen frame you cross-fade/morph between (the spectral-morph the title promises).

---

## ┬з508 banked seeds (2026-06-21, from the cycle-508 kids WIDE fire тАФ "let a 4-year-old SHAPE the *feeling/color* of harmony," JURY 2026-06-21 #4: kill pentatonic-never-wrong + #5: ship a banked sibling)

Cycle 508 ran a kids **WIDE** fire тАФ three orthogonal explorers, each letting the child SHAPE the feeling/color/density of harmony off the jury-banned pentatonic crutch, across three spread renderers (SVG-DOM / WebGL2 / Canvas2D) and three shaping-mechanisms (feeling-position / color-mix / gather-orchestration). The winner deliberately resurrected the ┬з506 тнР banked `823` (JURY #5: clear the bank). All three built to demoable, self-reported clean. Winner shipped = **`828-kids-feelings-sun`** (drag-a-sun affect-field chord-quality morph, SVG/DOM тАФ the directest "shape the FEELING of harmony," the most robust unattended, and the banked-sibling ship). The two below are built complete and de-selected only on curate tiebreakers; folders saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-508/` and removed before the authoritative build (not committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `829-kids-color-blend` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ mix two glowing colored lights and the color you make IS the chord (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + audio.ts + gl.ts + README; builder reports `eslint` 0/0 + `tsc --noEmit` clean on the folder; saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-508/`, removed before the authoritative build, NOT committed).** A **raw WebGL2** light-field (inline-GLSL additive glowing metaballs with domain-warp smear + bloom on near-black тАФ **the lab's COLDEST renderer, 0├Ч in the last 10 shipped**, the renderer-diverse pick). Three bold draggable color-drops (warm gold-red тЖТ major/add9 ┬╖ cool blue-violet тЖТ minor ┬╖ teal-green тЖТ sus/open) drift, collide and **additively mix**; the code samples the brightest blended region of the light field тЖТ hue/warmth/greenness/saturation/brightness тЖТ drives the live chord over ONE fixed in-tune center (C root + G fifth always sounding): warmтЖТbright major/add9, coolтЖТminor, greenтЖТsus/open, mixingтЖТthe in-between harmony, richness rising with overlap, all click-free via `setTargetAtTime`. So the child paints with light and hears the harmony they mixed тАФ color is literally the language (**love-aligned `82-kids-color-piano`тЭдя╕П / `317-kids-color-bells`тЭдя╕П**). тЙе64px drag targets; iOS gesture-gated; **WebGL2-null тЖТ CSS `mix-blend-mode:screen` glowing-blob fallback + `text-rose-300` notice** (never blank, never silent); full dispose (program/buffer/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **Named refs:** **Isaac Newton's 7-colorтЖФ7-note mapping** ┬╖ **Scriabin's *clavier ├а lumi├иres*** ┬╖ additive/subtractive color theory for kids ┬╖ **Synesthesia "Color to Sound" 2026 AURA mode** (a captured color тЖТ a multi-voice chord). **Ambition ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [touch drag-physics + additive-light-field color sampling + colorтЖТchord-quality morph synth + WebGL2 render = 4] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** colorтЖТquality is an approximation (audio reads the brightest *sampled* blend region from a handful of points, not a GPU pixel readback), so the mapping is musical/continuous but not pixel-exact under the finger; and 828's drag-a-feeling is a cleaner single-gesture 4yo causeтЖТeffect + the JURY #5 banked-sibling ship. **Resurrect FIRST when** the kids lane wants the COLD WebGL2 surface and a color-as-language harmony piece; clean next step = a real GPU pixel-readback (`readPixels` a 1├Ч1 under the finger) so the heard chord exactly equals the seen color, and a third primary so the child can reach every quality corner. **Builder note:** its folder *vanished once mid-build* (likely a transient working-tree reset by a parallel process) then was rebuilt and stable тАФ re-confirm folder presence before any future authoritative build.

### `830-kids-feelings-choir` тАФ gather singing creatures into a circle and the SET they make becomes the chord (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + audio.ts + creatures.ts + README; builder reports `eslint` clean + `tsc --noEmit` no errors on the folder; saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-508/`, removed before the authoritative build, NOT committed).** A **Canvas2D** twilight meadow of 8 glowing radial-gradient creatures with friendly faces, gentle bobbing/drifting, a pulsing center gathering-circle, sparkle bursts on join. **Tap a creature** to call it into the circle (its voice fades IN, soft attack), **tap again** to send it home (fades OUT) тАФ all click-free via `setTargetAtTime`. Each creature carries ONE chord-tone + a bold **Plutchik-mapped color** on a fixed C center (root/fifth anchors + bright-major-third / cozy-minor-third / dreamy-9th-maj7 / open-sus families), so the SET currently gathered is voiced into a continuously-sounding chord: 2 creatures = an open dyad, 5 = a rich pad; pick the bright one = happy, the cozy one = wistful. The child shapes harmonic **density AND color**, never a "wrong note" (more friends never feels punished тАФ registers hand-picked non-colliding). Seeded with 2 creatures already singing so an untouched screen is alive + sounding. тЙе64px tap targets; iOS gesture-gated; voice cap 8; always-on drone pad; no Web Audio тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + visuals alive; rAF + listener + `audioCtx.close()` teardown. **Named refs:** **Toca Band** (tap a character, it joins in key тАФ the combination is the music) ┬╖ orchestration/voicing (which notes present shapes openness + color) ┬╖ **Plutchik's emotion wheel** (colorтЖФemotion for the families). **Ambition ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [touch gather/orchestration + voice fade-in/out engine + density/quality voicing + Canvas2D render = 4] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** of the three it's the closest to existing lab patterns (Toca Band is the explicit ref; chord-by-assembly rhymes with `816`'s stacking), and Canvas2D is at ~3├Ч while 828's banked-sibling ship (JURY #5) + continuous-emotion axis won. **Resurrect when** the kids lane wants a Toca-Band-style gather-a-chord toy; clean next step = a gentle bass-note that follows the lowest gathered creature so re-voicings have a moving root, and a "scatter/again" button that re-seeds the meadow colors.

## ┬з509 тАФ 2026-06-22 (cycle 509 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE) тАФ two explorers built, but caught REDUNDANT at curate (NOT fresh seeds)

Cycle 509 ran an adult **WIDE** fire (three orthogonal energetic explorers; winner = **`833-spectral-loom`**, the resurrect, which clears the bank per JURY #5). The two non-winners below are **complete, demoable code** (saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-509/`, removed before the authoritative build, NOT committed) тАФ but a corpus grep at curate found **both re-tread registers the lab already owns.** They are logged here for honesty + a *salvageable* angle, NOT re-seeded as fresh ideas (re-seeding owned territory is exactly the "too similar" rut). **Process lesson (propose adding to AGENT.md Decide step): grep INDEX + READMEs for every brief's data-source / technique / arc BEFORE fanning out тАФ "fresh in the world" тЙа "fresh in this 800-prototype lab."**

### `831-solar-wind-organ` тАФ REDUNDANT (тЙИ `314-solar-wind` + `471-helios-orbit`); do NOT rebuild as-is (status: built, redundant, archived /tmp)
Live NOAA SWPC space-weather telemetry (plasma speed/density, mag Bz, planetary Kp, GOES X-ray flares) тЖТ a **dynamic, event-punctuated** composition (NOT ambient): speedтЖТtempo, densityтЖТvoice count, BzтЖТmodal tension (LydianтЖТLocrian), KpтЖТstorm crescendo, flaresтЖТbell strikes; Canvas2D SunтЖТEarth magnetosphere viz with flare-front-triggers-strike coupling; full synthetic-fallback so it's demoable with no network. Clean code, good "non-ambient" framing тАФ **but `314-solar-wind` already sonifies the same SWPC feeds (warm drone) and `471-helios-orbit` already does NOAA-space-weather тЖТ an EDM build-and-drop arc ("storm = the drop").** So the data source AND the dynamic-arc angle are both taken. Anchored by genuinely-2026 refs (Helioradar AV ┬╖ Nexus Sonance AES Europe 2026). **The ONLY non-redundant salvage:** a *different* live data source the lab does NOT own тАФ e.g. live **aircraft/ADS-B** (OpenSky), **Wikimedia recentchange EventStream** (SSE, "Listen to Wikipedia" lineage), **transit/seismic-already-owned-skip**, **NOAA ocean buoys** тАФ sonified with this same defensive-fetch + fallback skeleton. Don't rebuild the *sun*; reuse the *engine* on an unmined feed.

### `832-drop-engine` тАФ REDUNDANT (тЙИ `387-drop-engine` + `631-drop-engine`); do NOT rebuild as-is (status: built, redundant, archived /tmp)
A generative **EDM build-and-drop arrangement engine**: 25ms look-ahead scheduler, 16th-note sequencer @124 BPM, a section state machine (introтЖТbuildтЖТdropтЖТgrooveтЖТbreakdownтЖТbuildтЖТdropтЖТoutro), all-synth voices (kick/sub/supersaw lead/detuned-saw pads/hats/claps/noise riser), real **sidechain pump** (kick ducks a gain bus), minor 4-chord progression (AmтАУFтАУCтАУG7), a "Drop it" trigger + rideable filter macro + autopilot, raw WebGL2 reactive tunnel locked to the pump. Clean code, directly serves Karel priority #4 (journey-arc alternatives) тАФ **but `387-drop-engine` already exists AND `631-drop-engine` was the lab's FIRST sidechain pump (an EDM build-and-drop + sidechain piece).** Even the slug collides. So the arc + the sidechain primitive are both taken. **The ONLY non-redundant salvage:** NOT another build-drop arc тАФ instead the *unbuilt* journey-engine alternatives from Karel priority #4 that the lab is genuinely thin on: **ritual** (slow accretive ceremonial arc), **jazz-responsive** (comps under a live player тАФ note `338-live-accompanist` is the banked candidate here), or **cinematic narrative** (scored-to-a-story arc). Use a journey arc the lab hasn't shipped, not a fourth drop.

## ┬з513 banked seeds (2026-06-22, cycle 513 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE тАФ two built-complete explorers, de-selected on curate)

Cycle 513 ran an adult **WIDE** fire тАФ three orthogonal energetic explorers (INPUT external-API / pointer / mic), all dodging the JURY 2026-06-21 bans (his-recording, machine-listens, UPIC, adult-ambient-default). Winner shipped = **`842-air-veil`** (live air-quality data тЖТ harmony that audibly *fouls* with pollution тАФ the genuinely-cold real-world-data category, grep-0├Ч lab-first, JURY #3). The two below are **built complete + demoable** (each self-reported ESLint/tsc clean on its folder), de-selected only on curate tiebreakers (842 was the freshest, opening new ground vs. the lab's deep physics/spectral lineages). Folders removed before the authoritative build, NOT committed. Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `843-gravity-sequencer` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ compose a polyrhythm by arranging GRAVITY, not a grid (status: built complete, banked; = the ┬з507 тнР banked `825` rebuilt clean)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + physics.ts + audio.ts + render.ts + README; builder reports ESLint + tsc clean on the folder, exhaustive-deps gotcha fixed тАФ all mutable physics/audio/canvas state in refs).** A playable **cosmic step-sequencer where orbital mechanics is the clock.** Tap empty space тЖТ drop a heavy tuned **bell** (next pitch up a D-rooted just-intonation set `1/1┬╖9/8┬╖6/5┬╖4/3┬╖3/2┬╖5/3┬╖9/5┬╖2/1` тАФ the 6/5 & 9/5 give modal color, NOT C-pentatonic); press-drag-release тЖТ **fling a satellite** (dashed slingshot aim preview). Each satellite is integrated under inverse-square gravity from every bell with a **velocity-Verlet (leapfrog) symplectic integrator** (energy-conserving so stable orbits stay stable and rhythms don't decay), softening + 4├Ч sub-stepping. **Perihelion = the trigger:** when a satellite's radial velocity `(r┬╖v)/|r|` flips negativeтЖТpositive inside a bell's influence radius, that bell STRIKES a short percussive FM/mallet hit (velocity scaled by pass speed/closeness). Orbit period = rhythmic interval, eccentricity = swing, multiple satellites = drifting **polyrhythm**; three-body chaos breathes the groove; a satellite that falls all the way in is absorbed with a louder accent. Canvas2D motion-blur trails, glowing bells flashing on strike, influence rings + ratio labels. Master `gain тЖТ lowpass 12 kHz тЖТ compressor`, 14-voice cap, gesture-gated, alive on load (3 bells + 3 satellites). **Named refs:** **Batuhan Bozkurt тАФ *Otomata*** (moving agents trigger notes on events) ┬╖ **Kepler / celestial mechanics** (perihelion/eccentricity/period as the musical clock); discrete strikes (a sequencer), NOT the continuous orbit-DRONE of `432-three-body`. **Ambition ~2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [symplectic integrator + perihelion trigger-detection + percussion synth bank + trail renderer = 4] ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ arguable #1 orbital-mechanics-as-discrete-rhythm-sequencer). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** 842 opened genuinely-new ground (a never-touched data feed + the cold real-world-data category JURY #3 explicitly flagged) and the *fouling-harmony* inversion was higher-surprise; 843 re-treads the lab's deep cosmic/physics lineage. **Resurrect FIRST when** the adult lane wants a cosmic/geometric rhythm piece on the pointer+Canvas2D surface (clean, lint-fixed, ready to ship); clean next step = orbit-period quantization to a global tempo grid (snap-to-groove toggle) + a Poincar├й-section HUD so the chaosтЖФlock transition is legible.

### `844-overtone-mirror` тАФ sing one note and climb its hidden tower of overtones (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + pitch.ts + audio.ts + render.ts + README; builder reports ESLint + tsc clean on the folder).** A live-mic **harmonic-series instrument**: sing a sustained note; a hand-written **NSDF / McLeod Pitch Method** detector (energy-normalized, first-qualifying-peak to dodge octave errors, parabolic interpolation) locks your fundamental as the tower's base after ~0.3s of stable pitch (`LOCK_CENTS 28┬в` / `LOCK_FRAMES 18`). A 16-node **just-intonation overtone tower** (1f..16f, labeled with ratios) rises; as you **slide your voice up** toward each integer multiple (within `CENTS_TOLERANCE 35┬в` тАФ deliberately generous so the climb feels rewarding), that overtone node LIGHTS, a soft additive voice tuned to the exact overtone RINGS, and a bell blooms тАФ so you accumulate a harmonic-series chord by climbing it with your own pitch. Canvas2D crystal-lattice tower with depth shading, parallax sway, additive glow, and a climbing live-pitch comet. Soft base drone keeps it tonal; master `gain 0.25 тЖТ lowpass тЖТ compressor`, click-free `setTargetAtTime`. **Crucial mic-free path:** mic denied тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + **"Use a demo voice"** button running a slow sine glide UP through the overtones through the identical detectтЖТlightтЖТring pipeline, so the whole mechanic is demoable with no mic; canvas animates on load. **Named refs:** **Stockhausen тАФ *Stimmung*** (overtone singing as a whole composition) ┬╖ **La Monte Young** / just-intonation overtone drones ┬╖ **McLeod & Wyvill тАФ "A Smarter Way to Find Pitch" (NSDF/MPM)**. **Ambition ~2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [real-time NSDF pitch detection + overtone-tower additive synth + lock/climb game-state + lattice renderer = 4] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** mic was a warm input this window and harmonic-series/JI is a well-trodden lab lineage, so it opened less new ground than 842's cold data feed; the meditative register also brushes the JURY adult-ambient-default caution. **Resurrect when** the adult lane wants a live-mic harmonic-series/overtone piece (the climb-the-tower game is genuinely fresh as an *interaction*); clean next step = tighten `CENTS_TOLERANCE` into a "strict intonation" mode toggle + let the locked base re-seat if the singer drops out, and a second tower you cross-fade between (modulate the overtone root).

### `845-kids-sing-meadow` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ one sung note тЖТ exactly one flower on the literal golden-angle spiral (status: built complete, banked; the discrete/legible DEEP sibling of shipped 846)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + audio.ts + meadow.ts + README; builder reports tsc 0 / eslint 0 on the folder).** The *literal, most 4yo-legible* reading of the ┬з514 sing-a-meadow concept: the child hums/sings, a hand-rolled autocorrelation (Chris Wilson ACF) pitch detector snaps each note to C-pentatonic (no wrong notes) and plants **ONE flower per note** at the next position on the **closed-form H. Vogel (1979) phyllotaxis spiral** (`╬╕ = n┬╖137.508┬░`, `r тИЭ тИЪn` тАФ flowers pack like a real sunflower head, never colliding). Pitch тЖТ hue (warm rose/gold тЖТ cool sky/violet) + petal count (5тАУ8 by scale degree) + stem height; loudness тЖТ flower size + glow + bloom speed; flowers accumulate over minutes (fuller meadow at minute 5). After ~1s silence the meadow **sings the melody back**: each flower's emissive center brightens in planted order while a soft bell voice replays the note тАФ a call-and-response that rewards even a single hum. three.js warm-daylight scene (sky-blue fog, grassy ground, soft sun disc) with `InstancedMesh` petals/centers/stems (smooth past 200+, capped 400). Kid-safe `gain 0.28 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ compressor(тИТ10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad; iOS gesture-gated; **mic-denied тЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + ghost-hum auto-singer + 5 emoji tap-pads** (ЁЯМ╣ЁЯМ╖ЁЯМ╗ЁЯМ╝ЁЯТР, fully demoable mic-free); full teardown. No API route тЖТ no guard; zero new npm deps. **Named refs:** H. Vogel (1979) sunflower head ┬╖ Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976) ┬╖ Chris Wilson autocorrelation ┬╖ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [ACF pitch + phyllotaxis InstancedMesh bloom + melody call-response sequencer] + #3 named refs тАФ Vogel placement is the *static formula*, which the lab already owns, so NOT a #1). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** the *closest call* тАФ it's the clearest one-noteтЖТone-flower cause-effect and the most immediately legible for a 4yo (a child sees their song accumulate as a real sunflower head fills). 846 won because it realizes today's *actual* research finding (emergent phyllotaxis, arXiv 2509.06498 тАФ #5) and is genuinely long-form (self-organizing + self-singing when quiet), where 845 plots the static Vogel formula. **Resurrect FIRST on the kids lane** when the want is maximal legibility / the cleanest pure-delight cause-effect тАФ it's the more "I made THAT flower" of the two and ships clean as-is. Clean next step: let a held note grow a visibly *bigger* blossom (stem keeps rising while sustained) and add a gentle butterfly that lands on the most-recently-planted flower as a "your turn" cue.

Cycle 519 ran an adult **WIDE** fire тАФ three orthogonal GPU-surface explorers (INPUT his-piano-file / external-API / webcam-optical-flow), all dodging the JURY 2026-06-22 bans (Canvas2D hard-ban, touch+mic-only). Winner shipped = **`859-paths-compute-bloom`** (drop a piano recording тЖТ 500k-particle **WebGPU compute** bloom тАФ the scarcest surface the jury keeps begging for, 0├Ч in the rolling window). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `860-marine-gamelan` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ the live ocean plays a bronze gamelan, and rough seas DETUNE the metal (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + marine.ts + audio.ts + gl.ts + README; structure copied from the working `463-terra-gamelan` sibling тАФ lowest runtime risk of the three).** A keyless, CORS-enabled **Open-Meteo Marine API** fetch (no API route, no guard) pulls live `wave_height / wave_period / wave_direction / swell` for four contrasting presets the visitor switches between тАФ **Oahu North Shore ┬╖ Bay of Biscay ┬╖ Drake Passage (big seas) ┬╖ Maldives (calm)** тАФ re-polling every 5 min. A single normalized `seaToDrive()` signal feeds BOTH a **modal physical-modeling bronze engine** (each key = a noise exciter тЖТ bank of high-Q bandpass resonators at inharmonic partial ratios, slendro/pelog tunings) AND a hand-written **WebGL2 caustic water-light shader** (domain-warped value-noise interference, ridged veins, foam, violet strike-bloom) тАФ so sound and image never disagree. **The consequence is the point and it's audible:** wave height drives a `roughness` value that simultaneously densifies the strike rate, drops the register, lowers resonator Q, and detunes each bronze partial up to **┬▒35┬в** тАФ heavy seas roughen into a beating clang, calm seas stay sparse and sweet; periodтЖТtempo, directionтЖТpan, all through the same signal that drives the shader's churn/speed/drift. Full synthetic-fallback sea-state + `text-rose-300` notice if the fetch fails; full teardown (rAF, abort fetch, `audioCtx.close()`, delete GL program/VAO, `WEBGL_lose_context`). **Named refs:** gamelan slendro/pelog tuning ┬╖ **Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*** (data-as-music clinical stance). **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [live-data fetch + state machine ┬╖ modal physical-modeling synth ┬╖ WebGL2 caustic shader] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not a quality flaw):** the *close* runner-up тАФ lowest runtime risk AND it hits the jury-PRAISED real-world-data-with-consequence register (842-air-veil was a standout). 859 won purely on answering the jury's loudest #1 ask (WebGPU 0├Ч / GPU-only) with the scarcest surface + the cleaner today's-research chain. **Resurrect FIRST on the adult lane** тАФ it's built, clean, and on a jury-loved register; clean next step: a global tempo grid so the wave-period quantizes to a groove (snap toggle), and a second listening location cross-faded so you hear two seas at once.

### `861-flow-veil` (adult) тАФ conduct a luminous veil with the raw RIVER of your motion, not tracked joints (status: built complete, banked; **needs 1-line fix before resurrect**)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + gl.ts + audio.ts + README).** Deliberately **off-glass, embodied, NON-landmark** input: webcam **optical flow** (whole-frame motion energy via a brightness-constraint frame-diff `flow = тИТIt┬╖grad/(|grad|┬▓+╬╡)`, spatially smoothed + EMA'd тАФ NOT MediaPipe joints, NOT touch, NOT mic). Everything runs in hand-written WebGL2/GLSL ES 3.00: grayscale+mirror тЖТ flow estimation тЖТ flow smooth тЖТ **advected dye ping-pong FBO** (semi-Lagrangian back-trace + dissipation + diffusion + motion-driven pigment injection) тЖТ tone-map render, plus a downsample/`readPixels` path that aggregates motion into audio control signals. A Web Audio **granular engine** maps: energyтЖТgrain density/brightness, vertical centroidтЖТpitch register, horizontal balanceтЖТstereo pan, burstsтЖТaccent clusters, over a detuned-saw drone + convolution reverb. **Mic/camera-free demoability:** camera denied тЖТ synthetic Lissajous-drifting Gaussian blobs feed the SAME flow field so the veil swirls and sound plays within ~1s + a `text-rose-300` "(no camera тАФ demo motion)" note. Full teardown (stop MediaStream tracks, rAF cancel, `audioCtx.close()`, delete GL programs/textures/FBOs, `WEBGL_lose_context`). **Named refs:** **`@epok.tech/glsl-optical-flow` (Eoghan Keeffe)** + **TouchDesigner Optical Flow TOP** тАФ reimplemented from scratch, no npm shader dep. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [GPU capture ┬╖ GPU optical-flow ┬╖ ping-pong advected dye ┬╖ motionтЖТgranular audio] + #3 named refs). **REQUIRED FIX before resurrect (the reason it didn't ship):** `gl.ts:388` passes an `OffscreenCanvas` straight to `texImage2D`, which the TS DOM lib rejects (`OffscreenCanvas` not assignable to the `texImage2D` source overloads) тЖТ `npm run build` fails type-check. Fix: either `createImageBitmap(offscreen)` and upload the `ImageBitmap`, or draw the offscreen onto a regular `<canvas>` first, or upload the `<video>` element directly. Also note: the audio read uses an RGBA8 encode of the float flow (a precision compromise) and flow gain/dissipation constants are eye-tuned. **Why de-selected:** optical-flow is already in the lab (`221-optical-flow-music`, `295`), so it opened less new ground than the WebGPU surface, AND it carried the build-blocking type error. **Resurrect when** the adult lane wants an embodied off-glass camera piece (starved input) тАФ apply the texImage2D fix first, then it ships clean.

## ┬з525 тАФ 2026-06-23 (adult ┬╖ DEEP, 1 concept ├Ч 2 GPU approaches, shipped 1)

Cycle 525 ran an adult **DEEP** fire (deliberate alternation off three WIDE nights 522/523/524; JURY #5 "develop what you have, don't open a new tab" тЖТ develop the `820-feedback-ecology` thread to cycle-3). ONE concept тАФ **"Living Topology": coupled high-Q feedback resonators whose small-world coupling matrix is continuously rewired by a Lorenz attractor, so the network reorganizes and the drone never repeats** тАФ built via 2 parallel approaches on the two renderer-safe GPU surfaces (Canvas2D HARD-banned, raw-WebGL2 at the 4├Ч audit-ban). **Winner shipped = `872-living-topology`** (three.js тАФ kept WebGPU off a 4th-night monoculture + most robust for a no-GPU review + most legible Lorenz ghost-curve). The seed below is **built complete + demoable** (own folder), `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-525/` and removed before the authoritative build (NOT committed). Rebuild from the brief.

### `873-living-topology-gpu` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ the SAME Living Topology, computed and rendered on WebGPU (status: built complete + verified clean [eslint 0 / tsc 0 after a 5-error fix pass], banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + lorenz.ts + topology.ts + audio.ts + gpu.ts + fallback.ts + README).** Identical dynamical concept to the shipped 872 тАФ 12 high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass feedback resonators on the A1 overtone series, per-edge coupling `GainNode`s retuned each frame, ring backbone always on + chaos-gated shortcuts, brick-wall limiter тЖТ master 0.22, clamps (fb 0.88 / coupling 0.3) тАФ but the visual is **WebGPU**: a hand-written WGSL `@compute` pass swirls a **40k-particle** field around the graph and integrates the Lorenz driver **GPU-resident** (state in `GPUBuffer`s); instanced additive passes render ghost-cloud / particles / edges / nodes; `destroy()` frees buffers + device. Graceful **Canvas2D fallback** (rose-300 notice) draws the same node-graph-with-Lorenz-drift on the same audio when `navigator.gpu` is absent. Gesture-gated AudioContext, tap-to-perturb, always-visible master volume + panic mute, hands-free auto-demo (seed + self-resonance ramp on Start), full teardown. **Named refs:** Lorenz 1963 ┬╖ the 2026 *Chaos, Solitons & Fractals* Watts-Strogatz/Lorenz-sync paper (pii S0577907326001188) ┬╖ Tudor *Rainforest* / Nakamura no-input mixing. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#4 multi-cycle [820 thread] + #1 chaotic-attractor self-rewiring topology [lab-first] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) **renderer diversity** тАФ WebGPU led the last several adult nights (859/866/869), so shipping it would be a 4th-night monoculture; three.js (872) was 2├Ч/10, the freshest GPU surface. (b) **robustness** тАФ its no-GPU path falls back to the jury **HARD-banned Canvas2D** aesthetic, where 872's WebGL renders anywhere for an unattended 06:30 glance. (c) **legibility** тАФ 872 draws the literal Lorenz ghost-curve + bead; 873's particle-cloud attractor reads less clearly as the driver. Genuinely strong (the GPU-resident integration + 40k-particle field are the richest visual of the pair) тЖТ **resurrect FIRST on the adult lane the next time WebGPU is scarce.** Brief + code in `/tmp/dream-losers-525/873-living-topology-gpu/`. **Thread note:** the 820-feedback-ecology lineage is now 820 (Canvas2D static) тЖТ 847 (WebGL2 FBO-trails, banked) тЖТ 872 (three.js Lorenz-rewiring, SHIPPED) + 848 (3D-orbit, banked) + 873 (WebGPU, banked) тАФ consider consolidating into one "Feedback Ecology" piece with a render/mode toggle rather than shipping each variant separately.

### `920-kids-sing-a-sprout` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ hum and a glowing garden GROWS over minutes, then SINGS your melody back (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + pitch.ts + audio.ts + garden.ts + README; builder reports `eslint` 0 + `tsc --noEmit` 0 on the folder).** The directest hit on the thin, **jury-valued long-form/STATEFUL depth** category (888's register) in the KIDS lane тАФ unlike instant per-tap loops, the garden **accumulates and evolves**: a child hums, a hand-written **Chris-Wilson autocorrelation (ACF)** pitch detector (RMS-gated, ~70тАУ1000Hz, no library) snaps each stable note to C-major-pentatonic (no wrong notes), and plants **ONE luminous plant per note** at the next position on the **H. Vogel (1979) phyllotaxis spiral** (`╬╕=n┬╖137.508┬░`, `rтИЭтИЪn` тАФ packs like a real sunflower head, never collides), rendered with two `THREE.InstancedMesh` buffers (stems + per-instance-colored blossoms, cap 400, smooth past 200+). Pitch тЖТ blossom hue + height (color is the language); the garden is materially fuller + different at minute 5. **Long-form memory + call-and-response:** every plant remembers its note + planted order; after ~1s of silence the garden **sings back** тАФ each plant's center brightens in planted order while a soft bell replays its note, so even a single hum is rewarded. Always-on detuned C/G/C drone w/ filter LFO. three.js warm-daylight scene (sky-blue, grassy ground, soft sun, slow orbit). Kid-safe `gain 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 7kHz тЖТ compressor(-10/20:1)`; mic тЖТ AnalyserNode only (no feedback); AudioContext + mic gesture-gated in the Start tap; seeded with 28 grown plants so an untouched screen is alive + sounding within ~1s. **Mic-free path:** mic denied тЖТ `text-rose-600` notice + a **ghost-hum auto-singer** (slow sine glide through the safe scale) drives the IDENTICAL plantтЖТgrowтЖТsing-back pipeline, PLUS тЙе72px emoji tap-pads (ЁЯМ╣ЁЯМ╖ЁЯМ╗ЁЯМ╝ЁЯТР) that each plant a note тАФ fully demoable with no mic. Full teardown (rAF, stop mic tracks, `audioCtx.close()`, dispose InstancedMesh + `renderer.dispose()`). No API route тЖТ no guard; zero new npm deps. **Named refs:** **H. Vogel (1979)** sunflower phyllotaxis ┬╖ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976)** ┬╖ **Chris Wilson ACF pitch detection** ┬╖ **Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening***. **Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [ACF pitch + phyllotaxis InstancedMesh growth + long-form memory/call-response sequencer + three.js render + ghost-hum/emoji fallback] + #3 named refs; #5 in-README ┬з542 citation). **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw тАФ the closest call + the most bulletproof of the three):** 918 answers the bigger 0├Ч directive (multi-user, named every jury) where long-form-stateful has lab priors (734/754/888 adult; 845-kids-sing-meadow banked is a near-cousin). **Resurrect FIRST on the kids lane** when the want is depth/long-form or maximal unattended robustness тАФ it ships clean as-is. Clean next step: a richer plant taxonomy per pitch-class (deeper morphology, not just density/color) so "different at minute 5" is structural, and a held note grows a visibly bigger blossom.

### `919-kids-rain-bowl` (kids) тАФ gently tilt the iPad to pour glowing rain that chimes as it splashes (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + wgsl.ts + webgpu-pour.ts + three-pour.ts + audio.ts + README; builder reports `tsc --noEmit` + `next lint` clean on the folder, and the production build compiled its files with zero refs).** The **JURY 2026-06-24 #1 "swing back to GPU"** answer on the scarcest surface тАФ a from-scratch **WebGPU compute** particle system: a single `GPUBuffer` holds ~30k droplets (GPU-resident), a WGSL `@compute` (workgroup 64) spawns from a tilt-following spout, integrates under gravity + sideways tilt-gravity + air drag, and on each droplet crossing the pond line does an **`atomicAdd` into an impacts buffer** packing `(x, speed)`; that buffer is `MAP_READ`-mapped async (one-frame latency) so the CPU turns each impact into one velocity-scaled **C-pentatonic bell + one ripple** тАФ **physics is the composer** (rhythm/texture from where/when drops land, pitch held deliberately dumb). Instanced additive render tints blueтЖТtealтЖТviolet. **Input:** `deviceorientation` tilt (primary) + a тЙе64px `ЁЯМз pour` tap-pad fallback. **Crucial fallback (what most review phones show today):** `navigator.gpu` absent тЖТ a **deliberately-lush three.js/WebGL2 `THREE.Points` pour** (~9k drops, custom additive sprite + a shimmering pond-glow ripple band) running the SAME gravityтЖТimpactтЖТchime/ripple logic + same audio, w/ a `text-rose-300` "(showing the simple rain)" notice. **Unattended glance:** an **auto-pour** starts within ~1s (the bowl auto-tilts on a slow sine); real tilt overrides, ~4s idle resumes it. Kid-safe `gain тЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpass ~6.5kHz тЖТ compressor(-10/20:1)`; ambient water pad + rain hiss never silent; AudioContext + iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap. Full teardown (rAF; remove resize/deviceorientation; WebGPU `device.destroy()` + buffer `.destroy()` OR three.js dispose + `renderer.dispose()`; `audioCtx.close()`). No API route тЖТ no guard; zero new npm deps. **Named refs:** the **rainstick** (tilt a tube тЖТ cascading chimes) ┬╖ **cymatics / water-surface physics** ┬╖ **Houdini / TouchDesigner GPU particle "pour" sims** (reimplemented from scratch in WGSL). **Ambition honest 2тАУ3/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [tilt sensor + WGSL @compute gravity sim + atomic impact-readback chime synth + GPU render + three.js fallback] + #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** (a) the **WGSL is unvalidated headless** (no GPU/WebGPU device in-container тАФ buffer layouts, the `atomic<u32>` channel, and `createShaderModule` compilation are untested at runtime тАФ runtime risk if WebGPU IS present and a shader bug slips the init guard), and (b) **a phone shows the three.js fallback anyway**, so the WGSL "win" wouldn't land at the 06:30 glance. 918 answered the bigger 0├Ч directive. **Resurrect when** the lab wants the cold WebGPU surface on a **desktop/Tauri** window (where the WGSL actually renders + can be validated), OR simply **ship the three.js pour** on a GPU kids cycle (it's lush and bulletproof). Clean next step: validate the WGSL on a real device; add a true accumulating pool (a small fluid-height field) so the pond visibly fills.

### `923-aeolian-globe` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ spin a small planet and hear its WINDS sing (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + field.ts + peaks.ts + globe.ts + audio.ts + README; builder reports `next lint` + full-project `tsc` clean).** The directest browser homage to **arXiv:2601.15982** ("Real-Time Inviscid Fluid Dynamics and Aero-acoustics on a Sphere", Jan 2026): a glowing deep-blue planet, ~36k luminous cyanтЖТwhite **GPU wind particles** (THREE.Points, Euler-advected on-sphere + re-projected each step тАФ the *spirit* of the Closest Point Method) streaming over the surface around a steerable zonal jet + drifting Gaussian vortices; 7 fixed glowing **peaks** (lat/long, varied effective diameter `d`) each shed an **Aeolian whistle `f=St┬╖U/d`** as wind streams past, **stereo-panned by on-screen longitude** so spinning the globe pans the choir. INPUT drag-to-orbit + device-tilt to tip the prevailing wind (the *wind* is the instrument, so it dodges the touch-as-primary ban). Visuals + audio read the SAME `field.ts` (`sampleWind`/`windSpeed`/`windShear`) тАФ no GPU readback, one velocity field. Broadband wind-noise bed tracks total wind energy; always-blowing from load so peaks sing within ~1s, slow auto-rotate when idle. Master gain тЖТ 7kHz lowpass тЖТ compressor тЖТ destination; full three.js dispose + audio teardown. No API route тЖТ no guard; zero new npm deps. **Named refs:** arXiv:2601.15982 (CPM surface flow + FW-H aeroacoustics) ┬╖ Aeolian tone/Strouhal ┬╖ FW-H analogy ┬╖ Jos Stam advection. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 тЙе4 subsystems [on-sphere wind field + 36k GPU particle render + per-peak aeroacoustic synth + tilt/drag input] + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з543 citation). **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw тАФ most visually striking of the three):** its flow is an **analytic prescribed** field (sum of vortices + zonal jet), NOT an integrated fluid PDE тАФ honestly documented тАФ so it's the weakest on the concept's core "live *simulation* aeroacoustics" claim that 922 nails with a real GPU stable-fluids solver. **Resurrect FIRST on the adult lane** when the want is the cosmic/planet visual or the on-a-sphere paper homage; **fix-first:** replace the prescribed field with a real integrated surface-flow solve (CPM or an equirectangular stable-fluids step advected onto the sphere) so the winds are *solved*, then the "live simulation aeroacoustics" claim is fully earned. Clean next step beyond that: terrain that grows/erodes with wind, and a true FW-H far-field (retarded-time) term.

### `921-aeolian-loom` (adult) тАФ stir a fluid with your hand and the vortices past tuned rods sing (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + fluid.ts + audio.ts + README; builder reports `eslint` + `tsc` clean on the folder).** The same lab-first technique as the SHIPPED 922 тАФ **live GPU stable-fluids aeroacoustics** тАФ but driven by **pointer-drag "stir the air"** instead of breath: a full Jos Stam pipeline (curl, vorticity confinement, divergence, 24/14-iter Jacobi projection, gradient subtract, semi-Lagrangian advection, Gaussian wind/dye splats along pointer velocity) on raw WebGL2 float RTs (256┬▓ RGBA32F, half-float/128┬▓ fallback), soft circular rod obstacles via in-shader `rodMask`, an 8├Ч1 GPU probe `readPixels` feeding per-rod `f=St┬╖U/d` whistles (bandpass noise + sine partial, hysteresis-smoothed, vorticity FM/AM warble) + a kinetic-energy wind bed. Idle >2s тЖТ wandering auto-breeze so it sings hands-free; first stir injects two splats so it sounds instantly. A "top tone" HUD shows the highest current shedding frequency tracking the physics. No API route тЖТ no guard; zero new npm deps. **Named refs:** Jos Stam GDC 2003 ┬╖ Strouhal aeolian tone ┬╖ FW-H / arXiv:2601.15982. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 live-fluid aeroacoustics + #2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 ┬з543). **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** pointer-drag is **touch on mobile** тАФ the input JURY 2026-06-24 banned (~6├Ч); 922's mic-breath dodges it cleanly and adds an embodied 4th subsystem with higher surprise. **Resurrect when** the lab wants a **desktop/trackpad** "stir the air" instrument (where mouse-drag isn't a touch violation), OR fold its **tuned-rod-loom obstacle layout** into 922 as a touchable variant on big screens. Clean next step: let the rods be *placeable* (drag rods into the flow to compose your own loom) and add vortex-shedding *lock-in* (the resonance feedback where the tone pulls the shedding rate).

## ┬з545 banked seeds (2026-06-25, cycle 545 adult WIDE тАФ 2 non-winners of the depth-room fire)

Both were built to demoable in this fire (clean tsc+eslint on their folders) and removed un-committed per the orchestration rule. Each is a tight resurrect spec.

### 928-tilt-orrery тАФ `queued` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST
**Tilt a little cosmos and the gravitational rhythm of orbiting bodies becomes the music.** INPUT device-tilt (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS `requestPermission`-gated, pointer/slider + auto-tilt-demo fallback). OUTPUT a **real WebGPU compute shader** (the scarce GPU surface the jury keeps asking for; loved `130-tsl-particle-compute`): inline WGSL integrating ~1,400 bodies in storage buffers (central-gravity + tilt, semi-implicit Euler, perihelion flag), double-buffered async readback so render never stalls; CPU N-body fallback (тЙд256 bodies) тЖТ Canvas2D additive-glow when no `navigator.gpu`. TECHNIQUE physicsтЖТrhythm: a body reaching **perihelion** fires a granular percussion hit, timbre from radius/speed (close+fast = bright bell; far+slow = soft thud), **stereo pan from angular position** so you hear the cosmos rotate; density from clustering, pulse-rate from tilt steepness; pitch a fixed drone + pentatonic, so music lives in **rhythm/density/space, not pitch**. Ref: the **orrery** (clockwork solar-system) + Houdini-POPs / BarnesтАУHut GPU N-body lineage. Ambition 3/5 (#1 WebGPU-compute + tilt both lab-fresh ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [gyro + GPU sim + granular synth + viz] ┬╖ #3 named lineage). **Why resurrect first:** it's the cleanest unbuilt swing at the WebGPU-compute surface, fully built and isolation-clean тАФ a near-drop-in next adult fire. Full code existed at `src/app/dream/928-tilt-orrery/` this cycle (page.tsx / gpu.ts / sim.ts / audio.ts / README) тАФ rebuild from the ┬з545 brief.

### 929-cathedral-rhythm тАФ `queued`
**Stack interlocking rhythmic pulses, pitch held to a drone, and a raymarched stone cathedral breathes them into reverberant space.** INPUT three-way: Web MIDI + computer-keyboard (`a s d f`тАж) + on-screen тЙе44px lane pads; no-MIDI тЖТ rose notice, keys+pads still play; auto-demo pattern on Start. ENGINE a lookahead Web Audio scheduler over several lanes, each a **Bjorklund Euclidean rhythm `E(k,n)`** the user grows/shrinks and phase-shifts so lanes drift like **Reich phasing**; one timbre at one fixed pitch per lane over a root+fifth drone тАФ all interest is the polyrhythm + the space; spatialized through a **procedurally-synthesized ~4.2s cathedral impulse тЖТ `ConvolverNode`**, per-lane stereo pan. OUTPUT **WebGL2 raymarched SDF nave** (box + domain-repeated columns + arched ceiling) lit *only* by per-lane onset-flash lights, camera drifting down the nave; Canvas2D arch-frame fallback. Music from **rhythm + reverberant space, not pitch theory** (JURY #3). Refs: **Steve Reich** *Piano Phase* (1967) + **Godfried Toussaint** *The Euclidean Algorithm Generates Traditional Musical Rhythms* (2005). Ambition 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [MIDI/key input + Euclidean/phasing sequencer + convolution-space + raymarch] ┬╖ #3 two dated named refs). Full code existed at `src/app/dream/929-cathedral-rhythm/` this cycle (page.tsx / engine.ts / euclid.ts / renderer.ts / README) тАФ rebuild from the ┬з545 brief.

## ┬з551 тАФ banked seed (adult DEEP non-winner) тАФ 2026-06-25

### `943-depth-tonnetz-room` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ the raw-WebGL2 twin of 942
Status: `queued` (built complete + build-green this fire, removed before the authoritative commit per the curate rule тАФ code lives only as this seed). The **same** concept as the shipped `942-depth-harmonic-room`: webcam **monocular depth** (Depth Anything V2 small via Transformers.js on WebGPU) тЖТ position on a neo-Riemannian **Tonnetz** тЖТ real **P/L/R voice-led chord changes** with SATB nearest-tone voicing + portamento glides, over a warm drone bed (`gainтЙд0.26 тЖТ lowpassтЙд7kHz тЖТ compressor`). The difference is the renderer: **943 uses a hand-written raw WebGL2 fragment shader** (`scene.ts`) painting a warm depth-room + a glowing Tonnetz constellation with a pulsing moved-node, where 942 leads with raw WebGPU/WGSL. **Why banked, not shipped:** WebGPU is the scarcer GPU surface (1├Ч/10) and the directest answer to jury #1, so 942 won on diversity + jury-responsiveness; 943's raw-WebGL2-as-primary sits at the audit 4├Ч/10 ban-edge. **Why тнР resurrect-first:** it's the **bulletproof no-WebGPU render path** тАФ if 942's WebGPU init disappoints on a real machine, 943 is the proven WebGL2 twin; resurrect it when WebGL2 is cold again in the diversity window, or to A/B the two render paths on real hardware. **Honest limitation the builder surfaced (carry it forward):** a *rectangular* (col,row) grid can't make **both** orthogonal axes globally P/L/R-parsimonious тАФ the Tonnetz is triangular тАФ so 943 keeps the lateral axis perfectly parsimonious (R/L chain) and lets the proximity axis use **P / Slide**. A future deepening could lay the cells on a true triangular/hex lattice so *every* adjacency is a clean single transform (this is also 942's latent limitation тАФ 942 sidesteps it by applying P per-row to the current cell). **Next-cycle deepenings (shared with 942's README):** seventh chords + DouthettтАУSteinbach *Cube Dance*; two-body harmony (two near-regions тЖТ two lattice walkers voice-leading against each other); hexatonic colour-field tinting; bass-line inversions driven by horizontal velocity.

## ┬з553 тАФ 2026-06-25 (adult WIDE fire) тАФ 2 banked sibling explorers (non-winners; seeds, not committed code)

Cycle 553 ran WIDE (3 orthogonal pitch-is-the-idea explorers), shipped `947-overtone-loom` (WebGPU-compute dissonance-curve instrument). The two non-winners тАФ both returned **complete, build-green, self-reported clean**, `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-553/` then `rm -rf`'d (never committed):

- **`948-cantus-engine` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult).** A **long-form (5+ min), stateful, self-developing counterpoint** piece тАФ the lab's thin **long-form/memory** menu category. Seed a 3тАУ6-note motif (on-screen keyboard or Web MIDI); a deterministic engine develops it via real **Fux/Bach** operations тАФ diatonic transposition, **inversion**, **retrograde**, **augmentation/diminution**, **stretto**, **modulation** тАФ over a ~330s escalating arc (Exposition тЖТ Episode тЖТ Modulation тЖТ Stretto тЖТ Coda, looping with key drift) so minute 5 тЙа minute 1. 2тАУ4 voices with a Fux voice-leading scorer (rewards stepwise/consonance, penalizes parallel 5ths/8ves); clean additive/FM-triangle voices with ADSR + a Web-Audio look-ahead scheduler; **raw-WebGL2** scrolling piano-roll score that color-codes the subject's transformations as they enter (Canvas2D fallback). Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-553/948-cantus-engine/` (page.tsx 924 + engine.ts 191 + README 116). **Why it lost (close):** WebGL2 is healthier at 4├Ч/10 vs WebGPU compute's 1├Ч (947 answered jury #1 harder), AND the counterpoint/voice-leading lane was *just* mined three cycles running (550 choir-bloom, 551 Tonnetz, 552 bird-round canon) тАФ so 947's psychoacoustic angle was the fresher pitch-is-the-idea bet this fire. **Resurrect FIRST on the next adult fire** where WebGL2 isn't over-represented; it is the lab's strongest answer to the long-form-with-memory gap and squarely on Karel's "workspace for composers" line. Ambition 3/5 (#1 first long-form>5min stateful counterpoint engine ┬╖ #2 4 subsystems ┬╖ #3 Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* 1725 / Bach *Art of Fugue*).

- **`949-maqam-road`.** A **non-Western microtonal** melodic instrument тАФ a vertical **maqam ladder** (Rast, Bayati, Hijaz, Saba) tuned by **exact cents, not 12-TET**, so the **quarter-flat / neutral-third** degrees land true; tap a step (with a grace-note ornament) or **drag to slide** (portamento) continuously through the neutral intervals тАФ the slide through a microtone is the whole point. Warm sawтЖТbandpass voice with vibrato, a soft tonic+fifth drone, a glowing amber **Canvas2D "road"** tracing the melodic contour; idiomatic auto-demo loop. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-553/949-maqam-road/` (page.tsx 695 + maqam.ts 128 + README 97). **Why it lost:** lowest ambition (2/5 тАФ #2 subsystems + #3 maqam/ajnas) and Canvas2D is the least-scarce GPU-wise surface; the spread/jury-#1 pull favored the WebGPU-compute pick. **Resurrect** when the lab wants a "surprise / non-Western structure" beat or a warm-ritual vibe off the cosmic cluster тАФ it brings genuinely new pitch *material* (microtonal cents a 12-TET keyboard can't make). Honest gap: the cent values are reasonable common-practice approximations, not a single canonical source тАФ tighten against maqamworld.com on resurrect.

## ┬з554 тАФ 2026-06-25 тАФ banked from the kids DEEP fire (deepen 918 тЖТ two-player role ensemble); winner shipped = 950-kids-sky-conductor

Three approaches attacked ONE concept тАФ "two 4-year-olds, two devices, two DISTINCT interlocking musical ROLES, one song" (the jury-#4 deepening of the 918-starlight-friend WebRTC opener: 918's two kids fling *identical* twinkles; these give them complementary parts that combine into real music). Shared spine in all three: serverless WebRTC (gzip-SDP `#join=` link, no signaling server, reimplemented from 918), tiny role-tagged events, both peers synth+render locally, a **ghost friend** that auto-plays the other role within ~1s so one untouched device reads as a duet, kids-safe chain, no api route/guard, zero npm deps. All three make **pitch/structure the idea** (jury #2) WITHOUT a voice-leading engine (the harmony is social/structural тАФ the role split). Winner 950 (conductor+player, raw-WebGPU) shipped; the other two banked:

- **948-kids-duet-grove тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** тАФ roles = **GROOVE-KEEPER** (tap/shake a looping bass+drum pulse) + **MELODY-MAKER** (drag up/down to sing a C-pentatonic melody), both quantized onto ONE shared ~96 BPM 8-step clock so the two parts lock into a single song. Renderer = **hand-written raw WebGL2** (dawn meadow; warm "mine" groove bar + cool "friend" melody motes). Returned complete + self-reported ESLint-0 / tsc-clean in-folder, full teardown, ghost-friend works. **Why banked not shipped:** 948 is arguably the most *viscerally* legible "we made a song" for a 4yo (groove + tune is the clearest two-part music), and raw-WebGL2 is the bulletproof no-WebGPU path тАФ but its WebGL2 renderer sits at the diversity audit's 4├Ч/10 ban-edge (946/939/931/927), whereas the winner 950 lands the scarce raw-WebGPU surface the jury's #1 keeps begging for. **Resurrect-first** if 950's WebGPU disappoints on a real iPad, or as the safe-renderer twin. (The groove+melody role split is also the most different from 950's chord-context split тАФ resurrecting it keeps the two-player lane diverse.)
- **949-kids-echo-birds** тАФ roles = **CALL-AND-RESPONSE turn-taking**: the CALLER taps a 3тАУ4-note bird-phrase (tap height = pentatonic pitch), the birds fly to the friend's tree and sing, then that child becomes the ANSWERER and replies тАФ roles trade every exchange, the accumulating questionтЖТanswer IS the song. Renderer = **Canvas2D** (bright daytime sky, two trees warm/cool, perches glow to show whose turn). Returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint clean, ghost auto-answers within ~1s + runs a hands-free callтЖТanswer demo on cold load. **Why banked:** the most *charming/dialogic* of the three and Canvas2D is the freshest renderer (0├Ч in the last-10 committed) тАФ but it does not advance the jury's #1 GPU ask and is harmonically the thinnest (melodic dialogue, not chord-over-melody). Resurrect when a Canvas2D / turn-taking-conversation surface is wanted, or pair with 948 as the no-GPU kids-multiplayer twin.


## ┬з556 тАФ banked from cycle 556 (kids DEEP, Iron Garden, 1 concept ├Ч 2 approaches)

- **954-kids-iron-garden-gl тнР (resurrect-first, kids)** тАФ the **raw-WebGL2 GPU sibling** of the shipped `953-kids-iron-garden`. Same concept (drag magnet-flowers, iron filings trace Faraday's lines of force, two flowers' fields bridging blooms a pentatonic chord), but the filing field is GPU-advected: ~65тАУ80k filings live in an `RGBA32F` ping-pong float texture; a fragment pass steps each filing along `B(P)=╬г q┬╖(PтИТpole)/|PтИТpole|┬│` with hash-based respawn; a `gl_POINTS` additive pass colors each by nearest-magnet hue. Hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, no three.js. Returned complete + self-reported lint-0 / tsc-clean / context-loss + full teardown handled. **Why banked, not shipped:** for a *kids* fire, robustness + reach won тАФ 953's Canvas2D runs on any iPad with no `EXT_color_buffer_float` dependency and no per-frame React state churn (954 calls `setHandles`/`setGlow` every frame, 60 re-renders/sec fighting the GPU), and Canvas2D is the freshest renderer per the diversity audit (WebGPU is over the cap; the jury flagged a 12-of-15 GPU monoculture). **How to resurrect:** (1) refactor the per-frame `setHandles`/`setGlow` into imperative ref-driven DOM transforms (no React state in the rAF loop) so it holds 60fps with 80k filings; (2) ship on an adult/older-kid fire where raw-WebGL2 is the scarce surface and float-render-target support can be assumed; (3) consider it the "big-screen / installation" lens of Iron Garden (projector-dense field) vs. 953 as the "any-iPad" lens. Code preserved this fire at `/tmp/dream-losers-556/954-kids-iron-garden-gl/`. **Multi-cycle deepening for either 953 or 954:** (a) a *third* magnet whose field line threads through two others тЖТ a triad; (b) "bar-magnet" vs "horseshoe" flower shapes (different dipole geometries тЖТ visibly different fields); (c) a parent-corner toggle for scale/key; (d) the long-asked **A/B "what magnetism vs. cymatics each reveal"** companion. Named refs available to extend: Faraday's lines of force; Daniel Rozin (if a camera/pin-relief portrait mode is ever added).
