## ┬з558 banked seeds (2026-06-26, cycle 558 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE тАФ two built-complete explorers, de-selected on curate)

Cycle 558 ran a kids **WIDE** fire тАФ three orthogonal "**real melody/harmony IS the toy**" explorers (the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-25 #2 "make music from PITCH again" on the kids axis, where every prior kids build held pitch deliberately dumb тАФ the 935 pruning flag). All three dodged every JURY ban (no three.js / no mic / no granular / no pitch-dumb stance) across DIFFERENT renderers (WebGL2 / Canvas2D / WebGPU) ├Ч inputs (drag / tap / tilt) ├Ч techniques (cadence / contour / interval-harmony). Winner shipped = **`957-kids-come-home`** (drag a firefly up a hill, feel it want to fall *home* тАФ a real VтЖТI leading-tone cadence, grounded in Pachet's 1-day-old attractor paper arXiv:2606.24911). The two below returned **built complete + demoable** (each self-reported tsc/ESLint-clean on its folder), `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-558/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `959-kids-chord-kites` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ tilt to fly two kites; the DISTANCE between them is the harmony (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + wgsl.ts + gpu.ts + harmony.ts + audio.ts + README; builder reports tsc-clean after filtering the container's missing-dep artifacts, same as the known-good `130`).** The highest-ambition of the three and the first KIDS piece about **harmony as the interval between two voices** (medieval parallel organum for a 4yo). Tilt the iPad (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS `requestPermission()`-gated; drag/slider + auto-fly fallback) to fly a glowing kite up/down = a pentatonic melody note; a friend kite follows and the **interval you hear** is the harmony тАФ together = warm unison/octave, a third = sweet, a fifth = open/strong, a second = a gentle playful *spice* (kid-safe detune beat, never harsh). A **raw WebGPU `@compute` particle wind-field** (~18k GPU-resident particles) blooms the supporting **triad's color** around the kites тЖТ WebGL2 point-sprite fallback (identical physics) тЖТ Canvas2D last resort (no three.js anywhere). Kids-safe chain (`gain 0.26 тЖТ lowpass 7000 тЖТ comp тИТ10/20:1`), always-on wind bed, ~1s auto-breeze (interval opens/closes octaveтЖТthirdтЖТfifthтЖТsecondтЖТhome) with 4s idle-resume, full teardown. Named refs: parallel organum / parallel thirds-fifths ┬╖ infant consonance>dissonance preference ┬╖ **Pachet arXiv:2606.24911** (home interval as attractor) ┬╖ loved `130-tsl-particle-compute`. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 WebGPU compute ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems [tilt + GPU particle sim + interval/triad synth + render] ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 ┬з558 research). **Why de-selected (closest call, NOT a quality flaw):** for a *kids* fire robustness + reach won (the 953/954 lesson) тАФ (a) the **WGSL is unvalidated headless** (no GPU in-container; uniform byte-layouts 32B/48B + `arrayLength` are the watch-points тАФ JURY #3 verification debt), (b) **most review phones show the WebGL2 fallback** anyway at the 06:30 glance, and (c) WebGPU-compute is at the diversity audit's edge (~4├Ч across recent committed 954/950/947/942), where 957's raw-WebGL2 is the fresher + bulletproof surface. **Resurrect FIRST** on a kids GPU fire where float-render-targets/WebGPU can be assumed, or on a **desktop/Tauri** window where the WGSL actually renders + can be validated; OR simply ship the lush WebGL2 kite-sky on any GPU kids cycle. Clean next step: validate the WGSL on a real device; let the child *grab and place* the friend kite to build their own two-part harmony line. Code preserved at `/tmp/dream-losers-558/959-kids-chord-kites/`.

### `958-kids-stepping-stones` (kids) тАФ place lily-pad stones at heights; a frog hops your melody's CONTOUR, step vs leap (status: built complete, banked)
**Built to demoable this fire (page.tsx + melody.ts + audio.ts + README; builder reports its non-React helper modules type-check fully clean, real errors swept).** The first KIDS piece teaching **melodic contour** (the *shape* of a tune): tap a bright Canvas2D pond to drop glowing lily-pad stones at different heights (x = time, y = pitch, snapped to C-major pentatonic тАФ no wrong notes); a cheerful **frog HOPS** stone to stone leftтЖТright singing each note. Adjacent stones close in height = a gentle **step** (small hop, legato, white-dot marker); far apart = a big **LEAP** (high arc, brighter accented note, gold-star marker), with a dashed contour line so the tune's shape is legible. Soft diatonic auto-harmony (I/IV/V) follows the contour; loops continuously; seeded with a ~7-stone rise-then-fall arc so an untouched screen sings within ~1s. Web Audio **look-ahead scheduler** (25ms clock, ~0.12s ahead) for tight hop timing; soft-FM music-box voice + 3-note pad; kids-safe chain; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown; dark text on the bright pond per the light-bg contrast rules. Named refs: **Carnegie Hall Music Educators Toolbox Grade-1 *Melodic Contour*** ┬╖ **Kod├бly** solf├иge stepping ┬╖ contrast with Xenakis **UPIC** (781 is continuous-paint; this is the discrete, contour-legible version with a walking character). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [stone-placement model + walking-character look-ahead sequencer + contour-following auto-harmony + Canvas render] ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 ┬з558 research). **Why de-selected (NOT a quality flaw):** lowest ambition of the three and the place-notes/contour idiom rhymes with the existing UPIC/paint lineage (781-kids-paint-conductor, 100/152/160), so lowest surprise; Canvas2D is the freshest renderer but the concept overlaps priors more than 957's never-done felt-cadence. **Resurrect** when a bright daytime Canvas2D / melody-building beat is wanted, or as the bulletproof no-GPU kids piece. Clean next step: drag-to-reposition stones (currently tap-to-add / tap-to-remove); a held stone = a longer note. Code preserved at `/tmp/dream-losers-558/958-kids-stepping-stones/`.


## ┬з559 banked seeds (2026-06-26, cycle 559 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE тАФ two built-complete NON-harmony explorers, de-selected on curate)

Cycle 559 ran an adult **WIDE** fire of **3 orthogonal NON-harmony explorers** (the sharpest answer to the JURY 2026-06-25 "too similar / hardened house style" critique тАФ the live monoculture being *harmony itself*, the idea in 7 of the last 10 committed builds). Winner shipped = **`960-cristal-friction`** (real elasto-plastic stick-slip friction physical-modeling instrument, raw-WebGL2). The two non-winners returned **built complete + self-reported eslint/tsc-clean** with READMEs, `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-559/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

### `961-listen-to-the-world` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ the live planet, sonified (status: built complete, banked)
A generative **event-sonification of the live Wikimedia recent-changes SSE feed** (`https://stream.wikimedia.org/v2/stream/recentchange` via browser `EventSource`, public CORS, no key) тАФ every edit/new-page/new-editor across all Wikipedias becomes a discrete consonant **bell/marimba bloom** + an expanding **Canvas2D ripple**. A direct homage to **Hatnote's *Listen to Wikipedia*** (Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi, 2013). Mapping: `log10(|byte-delta|)` тЖТ C-pentatonic pitch (bigger edit = lower/larger), type тЖТ timbre (edit = soft inharmonic bell, new page = warm triangle swell, new user = bright FM chime); тЙд6 voices; `master 0.22 тЖТ lowpass тЖТ compressor`; ring radius тИЭ magnitude, hue by wiki-language, position hashed from title; тЙд70 concurrent rings with slow fade. **Discrete event-bells, NOT a drone** тАФ which is exactly the answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #6** ("a third live-data sonification needs a *different OUTPUT* than the 898/939 feedтЖТdrone template"). Robust **synthetic Poisson fallback** (fires if EventSource throws / no message in ~4.5s / onerror), amber "тЧЛ demo stream" vs emerald "тЧП live feed" status, bots toggle. Self-reported eslint-clean (EventSource closed in timeout/onerror/unmount). **Why banked (close):** 960 cleared 4/5 with a never-used technique + a direct research chain + Node-tested DSP; 961 is 3/5 (#2 тЙе3 subsystems + #3 named refs) and its live path is unverifiable in-container. **Why тнР resurrect-first:** it is the lab's freshest *output register* (calm data-poetry / Hatnote-Ikeda, off the cosmic + kids clusters), Canvas2D is a scarce renderer, and it's the standing jury-#6 answer. **Resurrect** on an adult data/ambient beat; clean next step = add a second feed (earthquakes/flights) as a counter-voice, or route the feed to a *different* modality again (dataтЖТAI-image) per the jury. Code preserved at `/tmp/dream-losers-559/961-listen-to-the-world/`.

### `962-effort-ink` (adult) тАФ the FEEL of a gesture makes the music, not its shape (status: built complete, banked)
A cross-modal calligraphic instrument where the **kinematics of your pointer gesture** (velocity / acceleration / curvature / jerk / stylus pressure) drive an expressive continuous synth + a living **Canvas2D ink** trail тАФ *how* you move is everything, *where* is almost irrelevant. Grounded in **Rudolf Laban's Effort theory** (Weight / Time / Space / Flow), surfaced live in a HUD; lineage = **Golan Levin's *Yellowtail* / *Scribble***. Slow+smooth тЖТ warm legato + clean thick ink; fast+jerky тЖТ bright/noisy/percussive + thin fraying/splattering ink; a flick тЖТ a filtered-noise transient accent. Pitch drifts gently through a just-intoned minor-pentatonic so it's always consonant but deliberately **secondary** (expression/timbre is the subject тАФ honors jury #2 without being a harmony engine). Continuous-excitation synth (saw+triangle тЖТ lowpass тЖТ gain; looping noise тЖТ bandpass for breath/transients; vibrato LFO; `master тЙд0.22 тЖТ lowpass тЖТ compressor`), **NOT granular**. Files: `page.tsx` + `kinematics.ts` (rolling-history Effort tracker, EMA-smoothed) + `audio.ts` (`setExpression` mapping) + README. Self-reported eslint/tsc-clean, full cleanup. **Why banked:** 3/5 (#2 + #3); strong concept but 960's friction model was the higher-ambition, more-novel, research-chained pick this fire. **Resurrect** when a cross-modal / embodied-gesture / Canvas2D-calligraphy beat is wanted (it's a distinct INPUT тАФ gesture *dynamics*, not position-to-pitch like the paint lineage). Clean next step: bow-stroke "ink memory" that re-sings a saved gesture; map curvature to a second timbral axis. Code preserved at `/tmp/dream-losers-559/962-effort-ink/`.

## ┬з567 banked seeds (2026-06-27, cycle 567 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP тАФ one concept "Echo Room", 3 render/sensor approaches; shipped 977-echo-room-gpu)

ONE concept: **build polyphony from your own past selves in space** тАФ move through an invisible C-major harmonic field; your motion is recorded over a ~7s bar and becomes a permanent **HRTF-spatialized ghost** that re-traces its path and re-sings its chord while you (the `AudioListener`) walk among up to 6 of your past selves. Research-chained to RESEARCH ┬з567 (DanXeReflect, CHI 2026 тАФ perform against your spatio-temporal past self) + Cardiff *Forty-Part Motet* + Reich phase-looping. All three returned **built complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean** (975/976 + winner 977 each ~31тАУ40KB page.tsx + README). Winner 977 shipped (Pose + raw WebGPU particle field тАФ the scarcest renderer, 1├Ч in last-10 vs Canvas2D 5├Ч / WebGL2 4├Ч). The two non-winners `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-567/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build (NOT committed). Rebuild from the briefs below.

- **`976-echo-room-flow` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST / VERIFICATION-DEBT CANDIDATE (adult).** Same Echo Room concept but **webcam optical-flow / frame-difference motion-centroid (NO ML model download)** + pure **Canvas2D** warm plan-view. x-axis walks IтАУIVтАУVтАУviтАУiiтАУI in C; per-ghost HRTF panner; auto-demo + mouse fallback; verified HTTP 200 under `next dev`. **Why it's the resurrect-first:** it is the lab's **most laptop-verifiable** Echo Room тАФ no CDN MediaPipe model, no WebGPU dependency, pure frame-diff + Canvas2D тАФ so it is the right one to **hand-verify on a real device** to start paying down the jury's #1 verification-debt liability. De-selected only because Canvas2D is at the diversity audit cap (5├Ч/10) and it's the least GPU-ambitious of the three. Code at `/tmp/dream-losers-567/976-echo-room-flow/`. Clean next step: hand-verify the optical-flow centroid thresholds + bar length on a real webcam; let the performer drag-place a ghost to reposition it.
- **`975-echo-room` (adult).** Same concept, **MediaPipe Pose** (torso/hip centroid) + raw **WebGL2** GLSL-ES-3.00 floor-plan render (bright comet performer + glowing ghost trails). x walks viтАУIVтАУIтАУVтАУI (common-tone voice-led); per-ghost HRTF; auto-demo + pointer fallback. De-selected because WebGL2 is at 4├Ч/10 (vs WebGPU's 1├Ч) and 977's particle-cloud ghosts are the more evocative realization of "stand among your past selves." Code at `/tmp/dream-losers-567/975-echo-room/`. Resurrect as the WebGL2 twin on a fire where WebGPU is over-represented, or fold its cleaner floor-plan legibility into 977.
- **Multi-cycle deepening for 977 (or any Echo Room):** (a) a **conductor mode** тАФ raise/lower a hand (Pose wrist-y) to swell/mute individual ghosts you're facing; (b) **harmonic memory across sessions** (persist a ghost ensemble to localStorage and re-enter your room tomorrow); (c) **two-performer** Echo Room over WebRTC (still-COLD adult multi-user lane) тАФ two people layering ghosts into one shared field; (d) a **decay/forgetting** axis so the oldest selves slowly fade in volume (long-form evolution).

## ┬з568 banked seeds (2026-06-27, cycle 568 ┬╖ KIDS ┬╖ WIDE тАФ two built-complete non-winner explorers, de-selected on curate; shipped 978-kids-cloud-weather)

All three explorers were a *non-pointer input into real (non-pentatonic) harmony* тАФ answering JURY 2026-06-26 #1 (ban pentatonic-no-wrong-notes; give kids a real mode/progression/tension) + #3 (force a non-pointer input) three different ways. Winner 978 took the camera/body + Laban-Effort + Lydian path (freshest input, most ambitious). The two below returned complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean (READMEs written); code at `/tmp/dream-losers-568/` (ephemeral тАФ rebuild from these briefs).

### `979-kids-happy-sad-tree` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) тАФ feel majorтЖФminor by flipping one switch (status: built complete, banked)
**The single most literal "feel real harmony" kids toy, and the most ROBUST one in the lab тАФ zero permissions, plays instantly on any phone/laptop/desktop.** A glowing musical tree on a WebGL2 sky (Canvas2D fallback). The child **taps** big glowing fruit (~68px targets, discrete taps only тАФ NOT drag) to pluck diatonic melody notes; an always-on warm pad plays a IтАУviтАУIVтАУV (minor: iтАУVIтАУivтАУv). A giant тШАя╕П/ЁЯМЩ toggle flips the whole world between **parallel C major тЖФ C natural minor** тАФ the SAME melody and SAME taps instantly feel happy vs. tender, with the held chord re-voicing (tones glide to the new mode) + a ~600ms warm-goldтЖФcool-indigo crossfade. Real diatonic tonal harmony, NOT a pentatonic safety scale тАФ the lowered 3rd/6th/7th are exactly where the feeling lives. Idle auto-player taps a phrase + breathes between modes so a silent glance demos the whole idea. Named ref: **Kate Hevner's mode/affect experiments (1935тАУ37)** (major=bright/minor=tender, independent of melody). **Why resurrect-first:** (a) it is the **easiest kids piece to hand-verify** (no camera/mic/accelerometer/GPU-required тЖТ directly dents the jury's #1 verification-debt liability on a real device), and (b) it's the most universally-playable 06:30 demo. De-selected only because tap-on-glass + WebGL2 (4├Ч recent) is a more familiar idiom than 978's camera/Laban novelty, and the diversity audit favored the camera/body input (0├Ч recent) for this fire. Code at `/tmp/dream-losers-568/979-kids-happy-sad-tree/`. Clean next step: ship as-is on a fire where camera/body input is over-represented; or deepen with a 3rd "dreamy" Lydian/Dorian mode on the same toggle.

### `980-kids-shake-bells` (kids) тАФ shake the tablet to build a real cadence (status: built complete, banked)
**SHAKE the device like a tambourine of magic handbells (accelerometer тАФ fully off-glass) to ring bells tuned to a real functional IтАУIVтАУVтАУI in C major that advances on a slow clock and resolves home to the tonic when you stop.** Shake intensity тЖТ how many bells ring + burst brightness (gentle = 1тАУ2 soft tones, big = full sparkling arpeggio). `devicemotion` shake-onset detection (adaptive threshold + 150ms refractory), iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` in the Start gesture, a 176px round SHAKE! tap-button for desktop, and a ghost auto-shaker for the hardware-free glance. Visuals = WebGPU/WGSL quad particle field тЖТ WebGL2 point sprites тЖТ Canvas2D radial-glow bells (full fallback chain); warm gold bells over deep-blue-violet night. Always-on root drone keeps it grounded. Named refs: **Orff Schulwerk** body-percussion/handbell pedagogy + a textbook functional authentic cadence. De-selected because the IтАУIVтАУVтАУI cadence rhymes with the two most-recent kids ships (957 VтЖТI, 974 V7тЖТI), WebGPU shows its fallback on most phones + is unverifiable headless, and the camera/Laban winner was both fresher-input and more ambitious. Code at `/tmp/dream-losers-568/980-kids-shake-bells/`. Clean next step: resurrect on a kids fire where the recent ships are NOT cadence-based; swap the IтАУIVтАУVтАУI for a modal color (e.g. a Mixolydian bell journey) to dodge the cadence rhyme; or make shake-direction (not just magnitude) choose the chord.

## ┬з573 banked seeds (2026-06-27, cycle 573 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 3 orthogonal explorers, 2 built-complete non-winners; shipped 986-empty-words)

Three explorers, each a *non-pointer, non-cosmic, sound-as-object* adult build clearing the ambition floor via a DIFFERENT input (text / live-data / tilt) тАФ directly attacking the jury's pointer-7├Ч input monoculture. Winner 986 took the text lane (freshest input ever + research-chained flagship + strongest verification dent). Both below returned complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean (READMEs written); code at `/tmp/dream-losers-573/` (ephemeral тАФ rebuild from these briefs).

### `985-quake-choir` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ hear the planet's last 24h of earthquakes (status: built complete, banked)
**The live USGS earthquake feed тЖТ a slow, evolving choir of inharmonic modal bells over a sustained drone, plotted on a raw-WebGL2 equirectangular seismographic map.** Client-side `fetch` of `https://earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/feed/v1.0/summary/all_day.geojson` (24h) / `all_week.geojson` (no key, permissive CORS, NO api route тЖТ no guard). Each quake = one struck modal bell scheduled on a compressed ~4-min timeline by its real timestamp (so the texture genuinely evolves тАФ quiet stretches then swarms, minute 5 тЙа minute 1, then loops). Mapping: **magnitude тЖТ register+amplitude** on a 5-octave **D Dorian** ladder (real mode, NOT pentatonic тАФ M6+ rings low near the D1/D2 drone, M1 pings high/quiet); **depth тЖТ timbre** (shallow = bright/near-harmonic, deep = dark/inharmonic partial-stretch + lowpass); **longitude тЖТ stereo pan**; **latitude тЖТ octave nudge + filter**. Sustained tonal bed (detuned sines on D1/D2/A2/F3) + small convolution reverb. **The sound is the object, the map is its readout тАФ NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell.** Named refs: **Andrea Polli** environmental data-sonification + **Florian Dombois** earthquake *audification*. **Robust offline path:** fetch fail/CORS/empty тЖТ amber "тЧЛ simulated quakes" status + the IDENTICAL pipeline on a seeded, deterministic, **GutenbergтАУRichter-distributed** synthetic catalog (with injected notable large events); emerald "тЧП live USGS feed ┬╖ N quakes" when live; `text-rose-300` on hard error. **Why banked (very close):** the builder **fetched the real feed end-to-end тАФ 202/202 features parsed, HTTP 200, permissive CORS тАФ and dry-ran both sources (0 invalid events, GR-shaped M1тЖТM7.1, bell freqs ~110HzтАУ2093Hz)**, making it genuinely near-shippable and one of the lab's more verifiable live-data pieces. De-selected only because 986's text input is the freshest-ever (0├Ч vs live-data's prior 842/961) AND was the research-chained flagship. **Why тнР resurrect-first:** it's near-shippable, verifiable (real feed + deterministic fallback), fills the live-data lane with a *different* output than 842/961 (seismographic globe + modal-bell-choir, not feedтЖТdrone), and Karel's love cluster leans toward data/tool pieces. Code at `/tmp/dream-losers-573/985-quake-choir/`. Clean next steps: hand-verify the bell timbre + timeline-compression by ear; add a 2nd live feed (e.g. flights, ISS) as a counter-voice; let a click on the map solo a region; real coastlines instead of the procedural land mask.

### `987-tilt-spectra` (adult) тАФ sculpt a sound's spectrum with your body (status: built complete, banked)
**Tilt the device through a 2-D field and you're not picking notes тАФ you're shaping the *spectrum itself* of one sustained drone; the WebGL2 CRT oscilloscope on screen draws the literal output waveform, so sound and image are the same signal.** Input: `DeviceOrientationEvent` (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` in the Start gesture) with resting-orientation calibration + frame-rate-aware smoothing; desktop fallback = mouse-as-tilt + an idle auto-orbit "ghost" so a hands-free glance still evolves. **X (gamma) тЖТ brightness / spectral centroid** (a `1/n^rolloff` partial roll-off, exponent ~4.2тЖТ0.3); **Y (beta) тЖТ inharmonicity** (stretched-partial law `f_n = n┬╖f0┬╖тИЪ(1+B┬╖n┬▓)` тАФ bell/metallic forward, slack/compressed back). Pitch stays anchored to a low ~D2 drifting slowly through a real mode, so it's musical while the *spectrum* is the subject. 16-oscillator additive bank rebuilt every frame with `setTargetAtTime` (no zipper noise); AnalyserNode feeds the scope. Raw GLSL ES 3.00 CRT renderer: beam pass + phosphor-persistence ping-pong + present pass (scanlines, barrel curve, vignette, greenтЖТamber tint warming with brightness). **Sound-as-object тАФ directest hit on JURY #2** (like 960-friction / 965-oscilloscope). Synth math validated across axis extremes (0 non-finite partials; max ~1.6kHz hard-clamped to 0.92┬╖Nyquist). Named refs: **Daphne Oram's Oramics** (drawing timbre) + the **oscilloscope-music** tradition (Jerobeam Fenderson). **Why banked:** 2/5 ambition (#2 + #3) and tilt is 3├Ч-recent (allowed but not the freshest); its core embodied feel needs a real tilt device to judge (the riskier unheard ship vs 986's type-and-hear). De-selected for 986's fresher input + headless-proven determinism. Code at `/tmp/dream-losers-573/987-tilt-spectra/`. Clean next steps: hand-verify the tilt feel + permission flow on a phone; add a 3rd axis (compass/heading тЖТ formant shift); record/replay a gesture as a re-sung timbre envelope; let two-finger pinch set the fundamental.

## ┬з577 banked seed тАФ `996-dream-rooms` тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (the WebGPU-compute twin of 997-resonant-halls)

**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** the same "walk a building of harmonic chambers, doorway = pivot-chord key modulation" concept as the shipped `997-resonant-halls`, but rendered top-down as a **floor-plan** and тАФ crucially тАФ with the resonating body being a **real WebGPU compute shader**: a 12,000-particle storage buffer advanced every frame on the GPU (particles swirl around loud chambers, drift toward the active doorway, shimmer), drawn as additive sprites tinted by circle-of-fifths hue. Six chambers CтЖТGтЖТDтЖТAтЖТEтЖТB in a hexagonal ring; `chamberWeights(lx,ly)` Gaussian wells; pivot-tone holding (each chamber's 3/2 == its neighbour's 1/1, gains cross-fade only). Three-tier render fallback WebGPU-compute тЖТ WebGL2-instanced тЖТ Canvas2D with a live path badge. Pointer-drag primary, WASD fallback.

**Why it's the resurrect-first:** it is the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6├ЧтЖТ1├Ч; force a real GPU-compute path") тАФ a genuine *compute*-shader instrument body, the scarcest capability in the lab right now. The ┬з577 fire shipped 997 over it only because 997's **per-room procedurally-synthesized convolution acoustics** (the reverb itself changes as you cross a threshold) is the more direct realization of the ┬з577 research finding (acoustics-as-navigable-field) and the bigger first-person-embodiment concept; 996's acoustics are fixed (only the drone mix changes). Resurrect 996 next adult GPU-compute cycle тАФ the build returned **lint 0/0 + tsc clean** from its builder, so it should drop in fast. **Pre-allocate a fresh number** when resurrecting (996 folder was removed un-committed per the non-winner rule).

## ┬з584 тАФ banked from the cycle-584 KIDS WIDE fire (2 non-winner explorers, built complete, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule)

### тнР `kids-breath-flute` (RESURRECT-FIRST, kids) тАФ blow/hum into the tablet to play a real jet-drive waveguide flute
**Built complete this fire as `1014-kids-breath-flute` (removed un-committed). Pre-allocate a fresh number when resurrecting.**

**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** a 4-year-old blows or hums into the mic and a glowing aurora air-column actually *sings* тАФ the mic's **breath/RMS envelope (NOT pitch detection)** is the excitation pressure for a genuine **jet-drive digital-waveguide flute** (Perry Cook / Julius Smith STK Flute): a single fractional-delay bore, a two-pole lowpass reflection that anchors the fundamental and kills octave-jumping, a non-inverting loop, a cubic non-linear jet for breath-brightening/overblow, a DC blocker. Pitch is picked by tapping big glowing recorder-holes (G-Mixolydian); harder breath = louder + brighter. Builder returned a **passing headless `selfTest()`** (all 7 scale notes oscillate, bounded, within ┬▒57┬в of target, no octave errors) and tsc/next-lint clean. AudioWorklet (Blob-URL) primary + ScriptProcessor fallback + tap-puff + 2s-idle auto-demo so it always sounds. Files: `flute.ts` 309 / `worklet.ts` 116 / `render.ts` 134 / `page.tsx` 542 / `README.md` 125.

**Why it's the kids resurrect-first:** it is the **lab's first wind/jet physical-modeling instrument** (grep тЙИ0├Ч) тАФ a genuine never-used-technique ambition hit, and the rare kids build that ships with passing verification. It lost to `1015-ink-garden` this fire ONLY on 06:30-phone-review friction: a flute needs the child to actually blow correctly into a mic (mic permission is the lab's recurring de-select reason) and the ~40тАУ60┬в intonation wobble is verified by offline Goertzel sweeps, not by ear. Resurrect next kids cycle on a fire where mic friction is acceptable; the waveguide is the genuinely novel asset.

### `kids-scarf-choir` тАФ wave a scarf/hands in front of the camera; optical-flow MOTION conducts a glowing choir

## ┬з585 (cycle 585, adult DEEP тАФ *Echo Halls* runners-up, banked un-committed)

The fire took ONE big concept тАФ **Echo Halls: turn `977-echo-room-gpu`'s single room into a suite of harmonic rooms you physically walk between** (JURY 2026-06-27 #2 "extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument" + #3 "make the sim the resonating body") тАФ and attacked it 3 ways. Shipped `1019-echo-halls-tonnetz` (neo-Riemannian Tonnetz + WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott body). The other two are strong and worth resurrecting; **pre-allocate fresh numbers when reviving.**

### тнР RESURRECT-FIRST тАФ `echo-halls-walk` тАФ first-person, full-sphere, FIND-THE-CHORD-BY-EAR
**Built complete this fire as `1018-echo-halls-walk` (removed un-committed).**

**Brief (resurrect, add a compute body):** a first-person 3D hall where **six harmonic rooms float on a sphere around you at varied azimuth AND elevation** (above / below / behind). Each room owns an HRTF `PannerNode` at its 3D position; **you are the AudioListener and your orientation updates every frame** (`forwardX/Y/Z`+`upX/Y/Z`, `setOrientation` fallback) so the field re-pans as you look тАФ you can close your eyes and walk toward a chord by ear. Real C-major neighbourhood (I┬╖vi┬╖IV┬╖ii┬╖V┬╖iii), ghost loops kept from 977, pointer-look+WASD primary / MediaPipe Pose head-turn upgrade / ~1.5s auto-tour between a low and a high room. Hand-rolled WebGL2 first-person render (camera basis copied from `997-resonant-halls`) + Canvas2D top-down minimap fallback (elevation = brightness + тЖС/тЖУ). Files: `page.tsx` ~1360 / `README.md`.

**Directly implements this fire's research** (RESEARCH ┬з585 / **arXiv:2606.24367, 24 Jun 2026** тАФ full-sphere human static sound-localisation), and the "Spatial Orchestra" walk-into-bubbles ancestor. **Why banked (not shipped):** the most embodied + spatially-novel of the three, BUT it renders in **WebGL2 with no GPU-compute** тАФ and raw-WebGL2-as-primary-output was the over-represented tag in the last-10 audit, so shipping it would have missed JURY #3. **Resurrect by giving it a WebGPU-compute body** (a particle/fluid field that fills each room) тАФ that turns its one weakness into the jury's exact ask and makes it the embodied-spatial flagship.

### `echo-halls-flock` тАФ top-down plan; a WebGPU-COMPUTE flock that pools in your room DRIVES the sound
**Built complete this fire as `1017-echo-halls-flock` (removed un-committed).**

**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** a top-down floorplan of 6 rooms (3├Ч2 with walls/doorways), each a functional C-major region (VтЖТI across the top, iiтЖТVтЖТI on a diagonal, viтЖТIV deceptive); vertical position re-voices. A **WebGPU compute shader advects ~120k particles** by curl-of-value-noise flow + inverse-square attraction to your body, so they **pool/bloom in your current room**; an in-pass **atomic reduction + non-blocking `mapAsync` readback** feeds the field's local densityтЖТlive-voice filter cutoff and energyтЖТa gated shimmer layer тАФ **the compute sim literally drives the audio**, the cleanest "sim is the body" loop of the three. PoseтЖТpointerтЖТauto-demo; WebGPU-compute тЖТ CPU-advected WebGL2 тЖТ Canvas2D fallback chain; ghost loops + HRTF from 977. Files: `page.tsx` ~1551 / `README.md`.

**Why banked (not shipped):** excellent computeтЖТaudio coupling and curl-noise is fresher than the shipped winner's reaction-diffusion тАФ but the **top-down plan view is closest in form to 977's existing top-down layout**, the least conceptual leap of the three. Resurrect as a cycle-2 deepening of the Echo Halls thread (graft its compute-readbackтЖТaudio loop onto the Tonnetz or the full-sphere walk), or ship standalone on a fire where the lab wants a clean compute-drives-sound demo rather than a new spatial metaphor.

## ┬з587 banked seeds (2026-06-28, cycle 587 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ WIDE тАФ 3 orthogonal live-data sonifications, shipped `1024-wiki-bells`; 2 built-complete non-winners below, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule)

Shipped the Wikipedia carillon (named Hatnote reference + most-reliably-live + most surprising). The two runners-up are strong and clean тАФ **pre-allocate fresh numbers when reviving.**

### `airspace-organ` (adult) тАФ the live airspace overhead as a slowly-recomposing just-intonation chord on a phosphor radar
**Built complete this fire as `1023-airspace-organ` (removed un-committed). Pre-allocate a fresh number when resurrecting.**
**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** the live OpenSky Network anonymous states feed (bounding-box per region preset) тЖТ each aircraft is one sustained additive voice (sine + triangle sub through per-voice gain + `StereoPanner` + vibrato LFO), capped at the 16 contacts nearest the scope centre into master тЖТ compressor. **Mapping:** baro-altitude тЖТ pitch snapped to a 5-limit just-intonation lattice `[1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8]` (higher = higher); bearing/scope-X тЖТ stereo pan; ground-speed тЖТ vibrato depth+rate (Doppler-like shimmer); proximity тЖТ amplitude; appear/cross/leave тЖТ voice spawn/retire so the chord recomposes (minute 5 тЙа minute 1). **Viz:** a clinical ATC phosphor Canvas2D radar тАФ range rings, bearing ticks, a sweeping conic-gradient radar line, blips greenтЖТamber by altitude, voiced contacts haloed with thin monospace callsign/FL labels + velocity leaders. **Infra:** guarded POST proxy route (`api/route.ts`, OpenSky is CORS-blocked in-browser; `maxDuration=30`, treats 429/non-200 as failure), client polls тЙд1/~75s + interpolates between polls; synthetic-airspace fallback (planes enter/cross/leave with realistic altitude/speed/bearing) so it's fully demoable with zero network; auto-start after ~2s idle; `text-amber-300/95` "simulated airspace" notice. Files this fire: `page.tsx` 771 / `api/route.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems = 4; #1 varies-relationship via non-pointer world-as-instrument).
**Why banked (not shipped):** the most *visually* striking of the three (the radar is gorgeous) and the cleanest "the sky tunes itself" metaphor. De-selected on **data-source fragility** тАФ OpenSky's anonymous endpoint is CORS-blocked from the browser AND has been heavily rate-limited / auth-gated since 2025, so for a 06:30 solo reviewer it would fall to **synthetic far more often** than the shipped `1024`'s keyless, CORS-open EventStreams, weakening the "the live world plays it" promise that is the whole point of a data piece. Resurrect when paired with a reliable aircraft source (or an authenticated OpenSky token via env, if Karel adds one); clean next steps: Doppler pitch-shift on true radial velocity; a "follow one flight" listen mode; altitude-layer filtering.

### `isobar-winds` (adult) тАФ a continent's live weather as one breathing just-intonation wind-organ on an isobar map
**Built complete this fire as `1025-isobar-winds` (removed un-committed). Pre-allocate a fresh number when resurrecting.**
**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** live METAR airport observations (`aviationweather.gov/api/data/metar`, keyless) for a ring of ~8 stations per region preset (US West / Europe / Pacific) тЖТ each station is one organ pipe (fundamental sine + detuned chorus partial + band-pass-filtered noise "breath" тЖТ per-pipe gain тЖТ pan тЖТ master), capped to the ring. **Mapping:** barometric pressure тЖТ drone pitch snapped to a just-intonation lattice (low = lower/ominous, high = brighter); wind speed тЖТ amplitude + noise breathiness; wind direction тЖТ pan; temperature тЖТ filter cutoff/brightness; dewpoint spread тЖТ chorus detune. A gentle LFO breath keeps it alive between тЙд1/~90s polls; the continental chord recomposes as the real weather drifts. **Viz:** Canvas2D inverse-distance pressure heat field + cyan iso-pressure contour lines + drifting dashed wind streamlines with barb heads + glowing station nodes (amber warm / cyan cold). **Infra:** guarded POST proxy route (`api/route.ts`, `maxDuration=30`, station list in body, 502 on upstream failure); synthetic-weather fallback (summed slow sines + bounded random walks per station) so zero-network demoable; auto-start after ~2s idle; `text-amber-300/95` "simulated weather" notice. Files this fire: `page.tsx` 746 / `api/route.ts` / `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems = 4; #1 varies-relationship via non-pointer atmosphere-as-instrument).
**Why banked (not shipped):** strong, clean, and the warmest/most meditative of the three. De-selected because it's the **third just-intonation slow-drone of the set** тАФ the least *surprising* axis, and the shipped `1024`'s event-driven inharmonic bells + the named Hatnote reference carry more novelty and a higher ambition score. Resurrect on a fire where the lab wants a warm continental ambient piece; clean next steps: add precipitation/`wxString` тЖТ granular rain texture; let a front passing (pressure-gradient spike between adjacent stations) trigger a swell; a "your location" auto-geolocated ring.

### `kids-star-weaver` (kids) тАФ tap glowing stars into the sky, connect them into a constellation, and a comet-spark walks the shape and SINGS it

**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** touch тАФ tap empty space тЖТ place a glowing star (node) that chimes when born; tap a star then another тЖТ draw a glowing string (edge) that plays the interval. A **graph-traversal sequencer**: a glowing "spark" continuously walks the edges (least-visited-edge greedy walk, never teleports) at tempo, ringing each star it arrives at тАФ so the *shape the child drew* becomes a self-playing melody/loop. Stars gently drift under a **bounded force-directed layout** (springs on edges + mild repulsion + center pull, clamped) so the constellation feels alive. **Harmony:** each star's vertical position picks a C-major scale degree (higher=higher); a slow **IтАУviтАУIVтАУV** bed advances every ~4s; on arrival the star's note is nudged to the nearest live-chord-tone тАФ real moving harmony, never pentatonic. Always-on drone. Canvas2D additive-glow night sky (twinkling dust, glowing lines, comet-spark with fading tail, sing-blooms; indigoтЖТviolet). тЙе72px Start gesture-gates AudioContext; 2s-idle auto-demo builds a small constellation + walks it; full teardown. ## ┬з589 banked seeds (2026-06-28, cycle 589 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ DEEP тАФ *Echo Halls II* runners-up, banked un-committed)

The fire took ONE big concept тАФ **Echo Halls II: cycle 2 of the lab's only-5/5 spatial-harmony thread (`1019-echo-halls-tonnetz`) тАФ a walk-BY-EAR spatial-harmony instrument where you orient yourself among HRTF harmonic rooms in 3D and a WebGPU-compute particle field is each room's resonating body** (JURY 2026-06-28 #2 "run the Echo Halls thread, don't abandon it" + #3 "keep WebGPU compute as the body" + #1 "vary the humanтЖФsound *relationship*") тАФ and attacked it via **3 competing technical approaches**. Shipped `1029-echo-halls-sphere` (full-sphere first-person find-by-ear; the explicitly-banked ┬з585 тнР resurrect-first). The other two are strong and built-complete; **pre-allocate fresh numbers when reviving.**

### тнР RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) тАФ `echo-halls-flock` тАФ a 100k WebGPU-compute swarm POOLS in your room and its MEASURED density/energy DRIVES the sound
**Built complete this fire as `1030-echo-halls-flock` (removed un-committed). Pre-allocate a fresh number when resurrecting.**
**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** a top-down floor of 6 harmonic rooms (C-major regions: VтЖТI across the top, iiтЖТVтЖТI diagonal, vi/IV deceptive; vertical position re-voices). A **WGSL compute shader advects ~80тАУ120k particles** by curl-of-value-noise flow + inverse-square attraction toward YOUR presence point, so they pool/bloom in your current room; an **in-pass atomic reduction** measures local **density** (count within a radius of you) + total **kinetic energy** (fixed-point `atomicAdd` of v┬╖v), copied to a **double-buffered staging buffer** and read back via **non-blocking `mapAsync`**; density тЖТ the active live voice's low-pass cutoff (more pooled = brighter), energy тЖТ a gated shimmer gain тАФ **the swarm you see literally controls the sound, no proxy** (the honest "sim IS the body" loop, the cleanest of the three). Per-room HRTF `PannerNode`, listener follows your presence, Gaussian wet-gain cross-fades. WebGPU-compute тЖТ CPU-flock(~3тАУ8k)-in-WebGL2 (identical aggregate math) тЖТ Canvas2D fallback chain. Pointer/WASD presence (continuous, not tap-to-trigger) + 2s auto-walk. **Verified:** `harmony.test.ts` **8156 assertions, 0 fail** (room weights sumтЖТ1 & peak at occupied room; chords diatonic; densityтЖТcutoff & energyтЖТgain monotonic+bounded); builder ran full `next build` тЖТ "Compiled successfully". Files this fire: `page.tsx` 894 / `harmony.ts` 228 / `flock.ts` 188 (CPU reference = fallback) / `harmony.test.ts` 177 / `README.md` 124. Named refs: Reynolds *Boids* (1987); Bridson curl-noise (SIGGRAPH 2007); Cardiff *Forty Part Motet*; WebGPU baseline 2026. **Ambition ~4/5** (#1 first honest GPU-readback-drives-audio flock in the lab ┬╖ #2 тЙе4 subsystems [compute flock + atomic readback + per-room HRTF + harmony state + render] ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #5 RESEARCH ┬з589).
**Why banked (very close, the strongest runner-up):** it is the most *honest* simтЖТaudio loop of the three and the directest #3 answer тАФ but JURY 2026-06-28 #1 explicitly warns that **"a physics sim IS the instrument's resonating body" is the calcifying 7├Ч groove** to *vary*, and its own ┬з585 ancestor note called the top-down-plan form "the least conceptual leap." The shipped sphere makes spatial *orientation* (find-by-ear) the primary mechanic while keeping a compute body as resonator тАФ so it varies the relationship (#1) where the flock leans into the groove. **Resurrect-first next adult fire** as cycle 3 of the thread: graft this honest densityтЖТcutoff readback loop onto the sphere's per-room compute bodies (the sphere ships one shared body driving shimmer-gain only; the flock's per-room densityтЖТcutoff is the deepening). Clean next steps: per-room buffer sets so all 6 fields evolve at once; two-presence WebRTC shared field (the lab is still 0├Ч multi-user).

### `echo-halls-gyro` (adult) тАФ hold the phone, CLOSE YOUR EYES, and TURN YOUR BODY to find a chord; the gyroscope IS the listener orientation
**Built complete this fire as `1031-echo-halls-gyro` (removed un-committed). Pre-allocate a fresh number when resurrecting.**
**Brief (resurrect ~as-is):** six HRTF harmonic rooms on a full sphere (one overhead, one underfoot, vi/iii behind). **`DeviceOrientationEvent` (alpha/beta/gamma тЖТ forward vector) drives the Web Audio `AudioListener` orientation every frame** (iOS `requestPermission` gated behind the Start tap, narrow-typed; `setOrientation` fallback) so physically turning re-pans the binaural field тАФ you find a chord with eyes closed. **Dwelling your gaze on a room ~1.2s LOCKS it** (swell + confirming bell) so turning becomes *playing a progression* IтЖТviтЖТIVтЖТV by looking тАФ a pure dwell-lock state machine, no touch. Calm full-bleed Canvas2D aurora brightens toward the focused room with a compass ring + elevation chevron (screen deliberately secondary тАФ eyes-closed is the point; Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* framing). Desktop/no-gyro тЖТ pointer-drag auto-fallback (mode shown in emerald); 2s auto-rotate hands-free demo visiting a low + high room. **Verified:** `geometry.test.ts` **50 assertions pass** (eulerтЖТforward unit + cardinal cases; focusWeights sumтЖТ1 & peak; dwell locks after threshold & releases on turn-away; chords diatonic; full-sphere spread). Files this fire: `geometry.ts` 301 / `geometry.test.ts` 149 / `page.tsx` 631 / `README.md` 109. Named refs: Cardiff *Forty Part Motet*; Spatial Orchestra (2510.23848); full-sphere localization (2606.24367); **Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening***; Sonic4D (2506.15759). **Ambition ~3/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems ┬╖ #3 named refs ┬╖ #1 varies relationship via embodied gyro).
**Why banked (not shipped):** the most embodied + zero-friction-on-mobile of the three (gyro-as-listener is a genuinely fresh input, and dwell-lock-to-play-a-progression is a lovely interaction) тАФ de-selected ONLY because its resonating body is **Canvas2D-only** (no GPU-compute тЖТ misses the jury's #3 scarce-capability ask, which the sphere keeps), and the gyro magic needs an on-device iOS permission flow that a 06:30 *desktop* reviewer won't trigger (it falls to pointer-drag, where the sphere already lives). Resurrect on a fire where the lab wants a deliberately mobile/eyes-closed piece, or graft the **dwell-lock-to-play-a-progression** mechanic onto the sphere (the sphere currently only blooms the faced room; dwell-to-lock would let you *compose* a progression by gaze). Clean next steps: quaternion sensor fusion (the current alphaтЖТyaw is linear & drifts); WebXR head-tracking; the measured eyes-closed localisation mini-game (target chord plays тЖТ turn to it тЖТ score angular error).

### Banked S590 (cycle 590, KIDS ┬╖ WIDE тАФ built but not shipped; strong, resurrect-ready)

**`1034-kids-rain-chimes` тАФ tilt a waterfall of light through singing chimes (WebGPU compute sim-as-body, kids).** *Built to demoable this fire, not shipped (winner was 1033).* Tilt (`deviceorientation` gamma/beta, iOS `requestPermission` from the Start tap; arrow-key/auto-sway fallback) sets a gravity vector for ~3000 glowing droplets. A **WebGPU compute shader** (semi-implicit Euler, line-for-line mirror of a pure `sim.ts`; degrades to the SAME integrator on CPU/Canvas2D) rains them through 4 horizontal chime bands; per frame the sim is **read back** and band-crossing counts ring inharmonic bell tones тАФ the 4 bands are the 4 voiced tones of a live **IтАУviтАУIVтАУV**, so heavier rain = louder chord tone (genuine functional harmony, not pentatonic snap). Ships with `sim.test.ts` (pure TS + `console.assert`, no framework, no auto-run) verifying free-fall position vs analytic and exactly-one band crossing. **Why strong:** directest kids-lane copy of 1015's celebrated recipe (sim-IS-body + real harmony + unit test) AND uses the scarce/encouraged WebGPU-compute capability; aurora rain palette. **Why not shipped:** the jury flagged "a sim IS the instrument body" as the 7├Ч monoculture тАФ vary the humanтЖФsound *relationship* тАФ and the kids lane already leans physics-sim (1027/1015/1005/1008); shipping another would lean into the groove. **Resurrect:** next KIDS fire that wants the WebGPU/sim slot тАФ it's ~95% done (the full build sits in git history of this cycle's losers; rebuild from the README spec). Known limit noted by builder: GPU readback is async (one in flight) so crossing counts lag render by 1тАУ2 frames (inaudible).

**`1032-kids-shadow-choir` тАФ your body's shadow sings (camera silhouette тЖТ functional harmony, kids).** *Built to demoable this fire, not shipped.* `getUserMedia({video})` тЖТ 64├Ч48 **luminance background-difference segmentation** (auto-captures ~1s reference, slow background adaptation for lighting drift) тЖТ silhouette **centroid-Y** picks which of 4 diatonic chords (**IтАУviтАУIVтАУV**) sounds, **coverage area** stacks 1тАУ4 "ah" choir voices. Canvas2D additive glow auras + drifting light particles; warm sunset palette; graceful no-camera fallback (drifting blob runs the same engine, `text-rose-300` notice). Non-pointer (body position/size is the only control). **Why strong:** fresh camera-body input on kids lane, four live subsystems (capture + segmentation + harmony + glow), real harmony. **Why not shipped:** no unit test (vs 1033/1034 both committed one), Canvas2D glow over WebGL, and segmentation is lighting-dependent; 1033's voice-pitch input was the more novel grep-0├Ч direction + closed the research chain. **Resurrect:** add a `seg.test.ts` for the centroid/coverage math, consider MediaPipe selfie-segmentation for robustness, pair with the shadow as a *duet* (two silhouettes = two chord voices).

## ┬з609 banked seeds тАФ 2026-06-30 (cycle 609 ┬╖ ADULT ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ WIDE тАФ the two de-selected non-winner siblings, each built complete by a parallel builder + builder-audited tsc/ESLint-clean, then `cp`'d to /tmp/dream-losers-609/ and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1066-cosmic-web` = the lab's first Physarum WebGPU-compute slime-mold instrument)

- **`1067-boundless-breath`** тЬЕ SHIPPED cycle 610 (was тнРRESURRECT-FIRST) ┬╖ `demoable` ┬╖ live at `/dream/1067-boundless-breath` тАФ **CONSUMED** as the cycle-610 DEEP winner (a fresh rebuild from this spec; the ┬з609 build was `rm -rf`'d). **Correction:** the ┬з609 ambition claim "lab's FIRST ShepardтАУRisset engine" is **false** (`40/132/187-shepard-tone` predate it); the honest fresh axis kept in the shipped README is the **breath-coupled, vection-paired, played** Shepard, grounded in today's auditory-vection research (RESEARCH ┬з610). See STATE/INDEX ┬з610. Original ┬з609 spec kept below for provenance тАФ "What if you could breathe a galaxy in and out тАФ inhale draws a vast point-cloud of stars into a single luminous core, exhale releases them to boundless drift тАФ while an endless ShepardтАУRisset tone rises forever and never arrives?" The scarce **three.js** slot + the lab's **first ShepardтАУRisset endless-glissando engine** + a genuinely fresh **active-breath-as-control** input (the jury explicitly wants breath-as-*control*, not breath-as-ambient). **Technique:** a `THREE.Points` buffer of 120k stars, each with a *drift* rest position (flattened nebular sphere) and a *core* target; a single `uGather` uniform lerps every point between them on the GPU (additive blending, FogExp2, center bloom that brightens as stars gather, slow rotation + parallax; indigo void, stars whiteтЖТgoldтЖТcyan). **Breath envelope (`breath.ts`):** mic mode samples low-band FFT energy through two followers (fast ~0.5 s vs slow ~4 s baseline) тАФ rising = inhale (gatherтЖТ1), falling = exhale (releaseтЖТ0) тАФ integrated into the gather scalar; **auto-paced 5.5 breaths/min raised-cosine LFO** when no mic (so it breathes itself, fully alive headless); pointer-hold = manual inhale. **ShepardтАУRisset (`shepard.ts`):** 9 octave-spaced sine partials under a fixed Gaussian log-frequency window with a wrapping global transpose (fresh partial always enters at the bottom as the top one leaves тЖТ rises forever); ascent rate `0.012 + 0.05┬╖breath` oct/s, breath also opens a 500тЖТ3200 Hz master lowpass + brightens a high-shelf. Under it: a just-intonation drone (fund + 3:2 + 2:1, detuned twin) + code-generated ~4 s convolution reverb (deepens on exhale) + compressor. Canvas2D star fallback if no WebGL; visuals breathe even with no audio device. **Why banked not shipped:** all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every ban; 1066 edged it on the stronger researchтЖТbuild chain (it IS this cycle's slime-mold dive) + higher surprise. **Resurrect FIRST when** the lane wants a meditative breath piece, the scarce **three.js** output, or to finally land **ShepardтАУRisset in-lane** (banked in 1062 too, still 0├Ч shipped). Ambition (honest 3/5): #1 never-used (ShepardтАУRisset engine; first three.js point-cloud breath instrument) ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems (point cloud + breath analyser + Shepard bank + drone + reverb + render) ┬╖ #3 named refs (Roger Shepard / Jean-Claude Risset; Lutz & Davidson PNAS 2004 jh─Бna gamma; resonant 5.5/min breathing; Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*). Files were `page.tsx` + `scene.ts` + `shepard.ts` + `audio.ts` + `breath.ts` + `README.md`; builder verified scoped tsc + eslint clean. **The one allowed external import is `three` (already a project dep тАФ do NOT add three.js addon packages; use pure-core or hand-write OrbitControls).** Brief: RESEARCH ┬з609.

- **`1068-attractor-temple`** ┬╖ status `queued` ┬╖ `state: hypnagogic geometric drift / DMT-adjacent "machine-elf architecture", kept calm ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient` тАФ "What if you could reach into the hidden machinery behind the visions тАФ a glowing strange-attractor whose two secret constants you bend with your hands, watching hundreds of thousands of points reorganize into impossible self-symmetric architecture, while the trajectory's own motion is the music?" The lab's **first strange-attractor flow piece**, and another **WebGPU-compute resonating body** (JURY #4). **Technique:** each point a `vec4f` (xyz + per-point speed) in a storage buffer (~350k, clamped to adapter limits); per frame an **integrate** compute pass advances every point a few Euler substeps of the chosen ODE тАФ **Thomas** cyclically-symmetric `dx=(sin y тИТ b┬╖x)┬╖s` (cyclic; `b` damping ~0.10тАУ0.34 bifurcates a lattice volume тЖФ tidy limit cycle near ~0.32) or **Aizawa** (toroidal shell + spike; expose `a` stretch + `b` shell) тАФ with the live hand-bent params + autonomous drift as uniforms; diverged/NaN points re-hashed into the spawn volume so the cloud never dies. A **reduce** compute pass (every ~4 frames) writes partial sums (speed/centroid/radius); read back via `mapAsync` (one in flight) тЖТ `FlowState { meanSpeed, spread, cx, cy }`: mean-speed тЖТ drone lowpass/brightness, spread тЖТ reverb send + voicing width, centroid-x тЖТ pan, centroid-y тЖТ which degree of a just pentatonic a sparse bell plays; **bell triggers fire on speed/spread threshold crossings so a bifurcation is an audible shower of bells.** Additive point-sprite render, self-built orbiting camera, tealтЖТvioletтЖТgold palette. CPU 28k-point fallback (same ODE, same `FlowState`, additive Canvas2D with trail fade). **Play:** drag bends the two constants, shift-drag orbits, wheel pushes the 2nd constant, thomas/aizawa toggle; autonomous LFO drift keeps it reorganizing (minute-5 тЙа minute-1). **Why banked not shipped:** strong + genuinely playable, but its state tag ("hypnagogic/DMT-adjacent, kept calm") is a slightly looser fit to the cosmic-ambient brief than 1066's awe-scaled cosmic web, and 1066 carried the researchтЖТbuild chain. **Resurrect when** the lane wants a WebGPU strange-attractor played body or a deterministic-chaos instrument. Ambition (honest 3/5): #1 never-used (strange-attractor flow; first GPU attractor integration in the lab) ┬╖ #2 тЙе3 subsystems (attractor integrator + GPU reduce readback + JI drone/bell engine + orbit camera + render = 5) ┬╖ #3 named refs (Ren├й Thomas; Aizawa; Clifford A. Pickover; Edward Lorenz). Files were `page.tsx` + `gpu.ts` + `attractor.ts` + `render.ts` + `audio.ts` + `README.md`; builder verified scoped tsc + eslint clean. Brief: RESEARCH ┬з609. **`1068-attractor-temple` STILL QUEUED** (this cycle's `1068` slot went to a different `vection-well` build тАФ renumber the attractor to a fresh тЙе**1069** on revival).

**For: adult psychedelic тАФ the COSMIC-AMBIENT тЖТ NDE-tunnel pole; pick it when you want a *plunging/rising tunnel of light* whose motion (not a stretched field) is the vection cue, breath-steered. тЪая╕П CAVEAT that de-selected it: it renders as a SINGLE full-screen WebGL2 fragment shader тАФ exactly the *form* JURY 2026-06-29 banned ("full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at"). ~5.5/min sine LFO fallback when no mic. **OUTPUT** **WebGL2 raw GLSL** full-screen radial optical-flow streak tunnel (`render.ts`): full-screen triangle + a fragment shader with `NRINGS` depth-staggered streak shells; a JS-accumulated `uDepth` (so motion is breath-rate-controlled + continuous, not `uTime`-locked) advances the radial flow window; warm core bloom at the vanishing point, cool cyan streaks toward the rim, chromatic-offset depth, per-streak sub-1 Hz decorrelated twinkle (no strobe тАФ global luminance only drifts). **TECHNIQUE** ShepardтАУRisset endless glissando (`shepard.ts`, 9 octave-spaced sine partials, Gaussian log-freq window, octave-wrapping transpose; exhale drives the transpose DOWN = descent, inhale slows/rises) + breath-RMS envelope + congruent radial visual vection. **AUDIO** (`audio.ts`) Shepard + JI drone (root + 3:2, detuned) + code-generated convolution reverb (decaying-noise IR, no fetch) тЖТ breath-opened lowpass + reverb send тЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **Why it's promising:** the radial-expansion optic-flow is the strongest forward-self-motion cue, breath-steerable plungeтЖФrise is visceral, and pairing it with the congruent Shepard descent directly exploits the auditory-vection finding (RESEARCH ┬з610). **Why de-selected this cycle:** all cleared the floor, but 1067 is the literal тнРRESURRECT-FIRST AND its three.js point-cloud is a genuine 3D body that **dodges the banned full-screen-fragment-shader form** 1068 sits in (real 3D optic-flow vection reads more honestly than a 2D shader fake), and brings the scarce three.js output back (Canvas2D was the 5├Ч-in-10 banned output last cycle). **To resurrect:** reframe off the flat-shader form per the caveat, then verify the streak density/brightness + breath plungeтЖФrise feel on a real GPU + mic. Named refs: Roger Shepard (1964); Jean-Claude Risset (continuous glissando); auditory-vection / postural-sway research on the ShepardтАУRisset glissando (metaphorical self-motion); optic-flow self-motion / vection literature. **For: adult psychedelic тАФ the DARK / NDE-void, dissociative pole, AND the lab's first HRTF-spatialised planetary instrument. - **`1143-wave-collapse`** тнР **TOP resurrect** тАФ the most *on-theme for ego-dissolution* of the three. A real-time **2-D time-dependent Schr├╢dinger** solver (split-step Fourier, hand-written radix-2 FFT, 128┬▓ periodic grid, unitary/stable) renders |╧И|┬▓ as a shimmering cyanтЖФmagenta interference field on near-black (WebGL2 RG32F data texture + fragment shader; Canvas2D fallback). **Tap = a Born-rule MEASUREMENT** тАФ samples a position from |╧И|┬▓, flashes a soft collapse bloom, collapses ╧И to a localized packet, which then re-spreads (the observer effect, played). **Drag tilts the potential** (harmonic well тЖФ free space) so the packet sloshes. Audio = the well's **energy eigenspectrum** (QHO = evenly-spaced partials; box = n┬▓): a drone tracks тЯиEтЯй, shimmer detune tracks spread ╬Фx (a real ╬Фx┬╖╬Фp feel), each collapse rings the nearest eigenmode. Named refs: Schr├╢dinger eqn, Born rule, QHO spectrum, wavepacket dispersion, split-step Fourier. **Why bank not ship:** 1142 is more *transporting* (3D cloud vs flat 2D field) and its palette-IS-the-physics hook reads faster on a phone; but 1143 is the purest "superposition until you look" instrument and is the strongest cosmic-ambient-adjacent bank. **Resurrect when:** an observer-effect / measurement-collapse lane is due, or fold its Born-collapse as a second interaction mode onto 1142. **One risk to check on real hardware:** the RG32F float-texture render path (needs `EXT_color_buffer_float`) тАФ verify the Canvas2D fallback triggers cleanly where it's absent.

- **`1144-two-slit`** тАФ the most *cerebral / pedagogical-yet-trippy* of the three: **waveтАУparticle duality as a playable knob**. Particles fire one at a time and pile up **dot-by-dot into interference fringes** (the Tonomura single-particle-buildup result) on a WebGL2 ping-pong accumulation buffer styled as a cyan/green **phosphor detector screen**. **Drag** sets slit separation d (тЖРтЖТ) and wavelength ╬╗ (тЖСтЖУ) тЖТ fringe spacing morphs (тИЭ ╬╗/d) тЖТ the standing chord's harmonic spacing shifts. A **which-path knob** continuously **decoheres** via the real **EnglertтАУGreenbergerтАУYasin** complementarity relation (V┬▓+D┬▓тЙд1): 0 = bright even fringes + consonant harmonic chord; 1 = two single-slit blobs + a detuned noisy cluster (**decoherence-as-dissonance**); partial = interpolated fringe visibility. Ships with a unit-tested (5/5 Vitest) pure-physics kernel `interference.ts`. Named refs: Young's double-slit, Tonomura buildup, EGY relation, decoherence. **Why bank not ship:** the phosphor-screen/physics-demo aesthetic is the least *transporting* of the three (reads cerebral, not cosmic) тАФ but it's the best "quantum pedagogy as instrument" bank and the which-pathтЖТdissonance mapping is a genuinely fresh audio idea. **Resurrect when:** a cerebral/Ikeda-adjacent or explicitly-pedagogical lane is due.

## ┬з693 тАФ 2026-07-07 ┬╖ non-winner banks from the DEEP navigable-interior fire (cycle 693)

Two strong sibling builds from cycle 693's DEEP fire (concept: *a first-person, navigable, PLAYED hypnagogic dream-architecture SPACE you are INSIDE*). Both were built to demoable, cleared the ambition floor, and were `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. The winner `1264-dream-cathedral` (three.js real-geometry walk) opened the **navigable-interior form** the jury demanded; these two extend it into a *suite*. Pre-allocate fresh numbers (тЙе1267) on resurrect.

- **`1265-dream-corridor`** тнР тАФ **the raymarched-SDF member: an endless hypnagogic corridor with NO geometry at all** (the whole interior lives in one WebGL2 fragment shader, sphere-traced through a signed-distance field). You drift forward continuously; drag (mouse/touch) steers heading; `opRep` domain repetition + a slow time/z morph make the hall infinite and self-rebuilding (minute 3 тЙа minute 1). **The clever, banked-for-reuse trick:** `corridorSDF.ts` mirrors the GLSL `mapAir()` **byte-for-byte on the CPU**, so a tap re-marches the SDF to recover the *exact* world-space hit point under the cursor тАФ that point lights with a decaying bloom in the shader AND drives a physical-model modal struck tone HRTF-panned to its camera-relative position. Just-intonation tuning тЖТ taps accrete into harmony. Palette: cold desaturated sodium/cyan-grey concrete (liminal-spaces/backrooms), explicitly not neon-on-black, not warm-paper. Named refs: liminal spaces/backrooms + Inigo Quilez SDF raymarching. **Why bank not ship:** a full-screen fragment-shader field is the *still-live-banned* OUTPUT the jury told us to escape тАФ 1264's real geometry dodges it, this doesn't тАФ so it lost on form-risk despite being the most technically impressive single trick. **Resurrect when:** the shader-field ban clears, or as the "corridor" member of a dream-architecture suite. **Next-cycle deepening (from its README):** let a struck surface stay faintly luminous and keep sympathetically resonating as you drift past тАФ the corridor behind you becomes a slowly-decaying chord you played into the walls (a spatial sequencer written into the building).

- **`1266-dream-recursion`** тнР тАФ **the recursion / mise-en-abyme member, and the freshest concept of the three: a room that contains a smaller copy of itself in every doorway, PLAYED hands-free by gaze-dwell.** Genuine **framebuffer-feedback** (two ping-ponging `WebGLRenderTarget`s: each frame draws the room over the previous frame zoomed+rotated a hair about the portal centre тЖТ the doorway fills with a smaller, slightly-turned copy of the whole room тЖТ an infinite, navigable Droste corridor of nested rooms тАФ no fractal SDF, real render-to-texture recursion). **Interaction is gaze-dwell** (there's nothing to click): rest the pointer/gaze on one of five just-intonation thresholds, a ring fills over ~0.8s, it blooms and rings an HRTF-spatialized additive struck-bell from its direction; dwelling the centre portal deepens the inward drift. **Real memory/evolution:** every bloom permanently brightens that threshold, seeds a ~24s accretion drone voice, and lifts a global memory M that drifts the celadon palette brighter/greener, opens the drone bed and deepens the reverb тАФ so minute 5 is audibly + visibly not minute 1. Palette: pale jade/celadon in milky fog (not glow-on-black, not warm-paper). Named refs: Droste effect / mise-en-abyme (Escher's *Print Gallery*, 1956) + hypnagogic recursive architecture. **Why bank not ship:** "navigable" reads weakest of the three (you sink into a receding portal rather than move around a space) and gaze-dwell is the subtlest interaction тАФ a jury told "make it hand/touch-PLAYED" could read it as near-passive. **Resurrect when:** a meditative/cosmic-ambient lane is due, or as the recursion member of the dream-architecture suite. **Next-cycle deepening (from its README):** give each nested recursion level its own slightly-detuned octave of the drone (a per-depth transposition read from the feedback texture's zoom rate) so falling deeper sweeps a Shepard-like descending harmonic series тАФ visual infinity fused with audible infinity.

---

## ┬з701 тАФ 2026-07-08 ┬╖ non-winner banks from the WIDE psychedelic-mathematics fire (cycle 701)

Cycle 701 (WIDE) built three orthogonal grep-0├Ч psychedelic-mathematics instruments and shipped **`1285-apollonian-gasket`** (the only one that renders a stroked line/structure drawing rather than a full-canvas accumulation field, so the only clean escape from the still-live shader-field ban). Both banks below were built to demoable by parallel folder-isolated builders, builder-verified (`tsc --noEmit` 0 + folder `eslint` clean + a standalone numeric check), backed up to scratchpad `dream-losers-701/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number тЙе1288.**

- **`1286-strange-lace`** тнРтнР **TOP resurrect** тАФ a genuinely fresh-to-lab **2D strange-attractor** instrument (Clifford `x'=sin(a┬╖y)+c┬╖cos(a┬╖x), y'=sin(b┬╖x)+d┬╖cos(b┬╖y)` + de Jong; grep-verified 0├Ч). You steer the four parameters a,b,c,d by fingertip-drag or sliders and a delicate lace of impossible-organic filaments morphs continuously through thousands of forms; the running trajectory sonifies (x/y тЖТ a stereo FM voice pair pitched to a JI pentatonic; recent-point dispersion тЖТ lowpass cutoff + chorus detune; parameter magnitude тЖТ drone drive). Idle auto-drift so it breathes hands-off. Builder-verified: 162/162 parameter combos bounded (no NaN/Inf). Named refs: Pickover *Computers, Pattern, Chaos and Beauty* (1990), Peter de Jong attractors, Julien C. Sprott *Strange Attractors: Creating Patterns in Chaos* (1993). **Why bank not ship:** it renders the attractor as a decaying-density `Float32Array` тЖТ `putImageData` FIELD тАФ closest of the three to the still-live shader-field ban. **Resurrect when:** a filament-field slot is clear, OR (higher value) **re-render the attractor as discrete stroked polylines / point-splats with `lighter` compositing** (like 1285's rings) instead of a full-frame density buffer тАФ that single change turns it from the banned field form into a clean line-drawing escape and it's a strong ship. `state: filamentary-hallucination / impossible-organic-lace ┬╖ pole: intense.`

- **`1287-fractal-flame`** тнР тАФ the **canonical psychedelic algorithm**: Scott Draves's **fractal flame / IFS chaos game** (the Electric Sheep engine), grep-verified 0├Ч. A running point iterates weighted affine maps each followed by a Draves nonlinear *variation* (linear/sinusoidal/spherical/swirl/horseshoe/polar/handkerchief/disc), accumulating a log-density + colour histogram tone-mapped (╬│тЙИ2.4) to a restrained **copper/steel duotone on ink** (a deliberate refusal of neon glow). You PLAY it by dragging 8 variation-weight sliders (each raises its own JI voice) + 4 geometry presets; histogram moments (spread/centroid/occupancy) drive the drone's partials/filter. Builder-verified: 400k iterations, log-density all in [0,1], zero non-finite cells. Named refs: Scott Draves *The Fractal Flame Algorithm* (2003) + *Electric Sheep*; Michael Barnsley *Fractals Everywhere* (1988). **Why bank not ship:** the log-density accumulation is a full-canvas `putImageData` FIELD тАФ the most ban-adjacent of the three (its own README honestly flags this), and the hardest to eye-verify headless. **Resurrect when:** the shader-field window clears тАФ the metallic LUT + PLAYED variation control already do real work to lift it off the generic-glow ground. `state: visionary-flame / plasma-fractal ┬╖ pole: intense.`

**Also queued (winner cycle-2):** тнРтнР **`1285-apollonian-gasket` cycle-2** тАФ live regeneration of gasket detail on deep zoom (currently bounded by the world-radius floor so diving eventually hits a smallest ring), a M├╢bius-transform "dive" that preserves tangency while sliding the frame toward a boundary tangent point (a true infinite fall), and a two-gasket interferometer (relative-bend detune тЖТ audible beating).

## ┬з703 seeds (banked 2026-07-08 тАФ cycle 703 WIDE non-winners; both fully BUILT then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule, code backed up to scratchpad `banked-703/`)

Both cleared the ambition floor and dodged every live JURY-2026-07-07 ban; they lost only to `1291-rijke-flame`'s tighter today's-researchтЖТtoday's-build chain + phone-glance legibility. Each is grep-0├Ч and ready to resurrect.

### тнРтнР `1292-wang-loom` тАФ a melody that mathematically **cannot repeat** (status: `demoable`, built + verified, banked)
**The question:** what if a canon were woven by an *aperiodic tiling* you steer? Uses the **JeandelтАУRao set of 11 Wang tiles** (Jeandel & Rao 2015 тАФ the *proven-minimal* aperiodic set; no 10-tile / 3-colour set can force aperiodicity), grown **column-major with a backtracking constraint solver** (`weave.ts`, ~1000-col strip solves in a few ms). Three JI voices (melody = steerable reading-row's matched horizontal edge-colour; bass = vertical axis; shimmer = top-row edge through a delay) over a `_shared/psych/droneBank` root+fifth bed, ~1тАУ3 notes/s. **Played:** tap a tile *ahead* of the reading head тЖТ it cycles to the next legal tile, locks, and **re-solves the whole downstream weave** (can even close a future off тАФ solver reports it); тЖС/тЖУ move the reading row, тЖР/тЖТ set speed, 1тАУ4 remap mode+terrazzo palette live. Palette: bold terrazzo chips on warm-grey matrix (NOT parchment, NOT glow). Builder verified `tsc`/eslint clean + dev route HTTP 200. **Why it's the highest ceiling of the fire:** plausibly 4/5 (grep-0├Ч technique + real named lineage Wang'61/Berger'66/Robinson/Culik/JeandelтАУRao'15 + тЙе3 subsystems + a genuine conceptual surprise). **Resurrect:** ship next as its own winner (give it a fresh research-dive backing so it satisfies the research-first gate cleanly), or as the "infinite non-repeating sequencer" slot. Files in scratchpad `banked-703/1292-wang-loom/` (page.tsx 652L, weave.ts, audio.ts, presets.ts, README.md).

### тнР `1293-neuron-choir` тАФ tap a **bursting-neuron** network into self-synchronising polyrhythm (status: `demoable`, built + verified, banked)
**The question:** play a living network of **HindmarshтАУRose** bursting neurons тАФ 46 HR neurons (classic bursting params, slow adaptation variable тЖТ real bursts), small-world graph (3-nearest + rewires), mean-diffusive voltage coupling, RK2 midpoint integrator, a **Kuramoto order-parameter** readout. Left alone the ensemble drifts through partial synchronisation and back (builder verified numerically: sync param sweeps 0.31тЖТ0.61тЖТ0.03тЖТ0.23, never repeating тАФ long-form, minute-5тЙаminute-1). **Played:** tap a neuron to inject current (it bursts = a note-cluster, cascades to neighbours), drag to prime a region, tap-tempo to **entrain** the network. Per-spike bell/marimba voices at fixed JI-pentatonic pitches (22-voice cap, limiter, sync-driven reverb bloom) over a drone. Palette: CRT-phosphor green/amber on graphite (NOT cosmic-glow); per-node glow + trails, no whole-screen strobe. **Resurrect:** for a phosphor/oscilloscope-vibe slot, or as the "emergent-synchronisation instrument" the live-planet suite could borrow. Files in scratchpad `banked-703/1293-neuron-choir/` (page.tsx 521L, network.ts 348L, audio.ts, README.md).

## ┬з707 banked seeds (cycle 707 WIDE тАФ 2 non-winners, folder-clean, fully built once)

Both were built to demoable this fire alongside the winner `1305-face-desk`, then removed per orchestration rule (never ship a non-winner's code). Both cleared the ambition floor + dodged the 2026-07-08 jury bans (sensor input ┬╖ TIME-based groove ┬╖ non-physics-sim ┬╖ non-JI-bell). Resurrect by re-running the brief.

- **тнРтнР 1307-clap-loom тАФ SHIP-NEXT.** *Build a dub groove with your voice/hands.* Mic as a **REAL input** (breaks the jury-flagged "mic = passive gain only" 0├Ч lane): **spectral-flux onset detection** + adaptive threshold (mean+2.4╧Г) тЖТ each clap/tap/beatbox hit **quantised to the nearest 16th** of a 2-bar loop and written to a band-classified layer (low=kick/mid=clap/high=hat + a tapped sub), replayed by a lookahead scheduler = a live-looper you overdub layer by layer. Circular "loom" viz weaves lit knots on the playhead sweep + a live flux/threshold trace. Feedback tamed 3 ways (high-passed detection band, adaptive threshold, scheduled-hit gate) + headphones prompt. Keyboard/tap fallback (Z/X/C/V) so never dead. Files were `page.tsx`+`engine.ts`+`renderer.ts`+`notes.ts`, tsc+lint clean. Echoes loved `172-loop-station` & `106-beat-cut`. Ref: Bello et al. 2005 onset-detection tutorial + Boss RC-505. **Why ship-next:** cashes a SECOND jury-0├Ч lane (mic-as-real-input) and is the most immediately *playable* of the three. Only weak spot vs the winner: its reference is academic, not a living AV artist тАФ swap in a living beatbox/looper artist when resurrecting.

- **тнР 1306-tilt-pour.** *Pour a groove by tilting your phone.* `deviceorientation`: **gamma** = swing/pan/accent-side, **beta** = "pour rate" (density of ghost kicks/hats/bass + bass gravity: deeper sub, longer decay). 124 BPM lookahead scheduler with a genuine **3-against-4** hat cross-clock over 4-on-floor kick + offbeat bass + dotted-8th dub-delayed lead. Canvas2D liquid field sloshes toward the tilt with beat-synced ripples/bubbles + a level-bubble indicator. Desktop fallback = pointer-as-tilt-proxy with a visible "open on your phone" rose note. Single-file `page.tsx`, tsc+lint clean. Ref: Ge Wang & Smule *Ocarina* (2008) phone-as-instrument. **Why banked not shipped:** tilt input is not lab-0├Ч (`83-kids-tilt-rain` used it) and the Ocarina ref, while a real instrument, is 2008 not the living AV frontier the jury asked for тАФ so it scored below the face piece on freshness. But it's the most *phone-delightful* of the three and ideal for Karel's 06:30 phone review тАФ a strong quick resurrect.
