## ┬з708 тАФ 2026-07-08 ┬╖ banked non-winners of the DEEP "re-perform Karel's REAL recording" fire (multi-cycle thread; ship these as the next two fires)

The concept: **Karel's fixed *Welcome Home* piano recording becomes plastic, live, re-performable material.** Winner shipped = `1310-piano-duet` (mic cross-synthesis). Both below are **fully built + self-verified** (tsc + lint clean in isolation) this fire, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ rebuild from these specs. Shared spine for all: fetch `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` into an AudioBuffer (JSON-{url} or raw-bytes, 5s abort) with a mandatory OfflineAudioContext synth-piano fallback (lydian enveloped partials) so it's never silent headless.

### тнРтнР `1308-piano-freeze` тАФ reach into the recording and FREEZE it (SHIP-NEXT)
*The wow of the fire.* MediaPipe **HandLandmarker** (runtime CDN `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14` via `/* webpackIgnore: true */` import, GPUтЖТCPU fallback тАФ the proven 1297/1305 pattern). **Hand-X scrubs the playhead** through Karel's recording; **raise a hand** to FREEZE тАФ a granular **Paulstretch-style spectral freeze** (140 ms Hann grains, ~62% overlap, 25 ms lookahead scheduler, 48-grain cap; freeze = scale the read-position chase-weight by `(1тИТfreeze)` so a raised hand pins the frame and the overlapping grains re-read one slice endlessly тЖТ an infinite shimmering drone; tiny per-grain read-jitter+detune keeps it glistening not buzzing); **pinchтЖФspread** = spectral tilt (low-shelf/high-shelf pair). Viz: a scrolling violet/indigo **spectral curtain** (AnalyserNode FFT) that **crystallizes** (halts scroll + <3 Hz shimmer + cyan-white cores) when frozen тАФ freeze is unmistakable at a glance; mirrored webcam thumb with amber landmark dots; amber playhead timeline. Fallbacks: no-camera тЖТ mouse driver (X scrub, top=freeze, scroll=tilt) + auto-drift; offline тЖТ synth carrier. Refs (living): **Robert Henke / Paulstretch (Nasca Octavian Paul)**. **Why banked not shipped:** the only reason it lost is diversity тАФ the last two ships were camera (705 hand, 707 face), so a third camera-hand piece would be camera 3├Ч-in-4, the exact "too similar" rut the jury named. **Resurrect** as the next fire the moment a non-camera piece has shipped in between (708's 1310 is mic тЖТ 1308 is now clear). Deepening: true phase-vocoder AudioWorklet freeze; two independent per-hand freeze layers (a chord built across *time*); onset-snap so freezes land on struck chords.

### тнР `1309-time-pour` тАФ pour his piano like liquid time (phone-first)
*Most phone-delightful.* **deviceorientation TILT** (iOS `requestPermission()` on the enable gesture; desktop pointer-proxy fallback if no orientation event in ~1.5 s: mouse-Y=velocity, mouse-X=pitch, + auto-drift). **Tilt forward/back (beta) = playhead VELOCITY** тАФ level тЙИ 1├Ч forward, rock forward to rush (~3├Ч), rock back тЖТ slow тЖТ **freeze** тЖТ **reverse** (negative velocity; achieved by walking the granular read-position backward while grains stay forward тЖТ click-free). **Tilt left/right (gamma) = grain pitch + size** (┬▒7 st, bright-close тЖФ deep-smeared). Granular engine: Hann grains 60тАУ140 ms, ~66% overlap, read-position moves *independently of grain rate* so stretch/freeze/reverse all fall out; 48-grain cap; master ramps from 0 тЖТ DynamicsCompressor limiter. Viz: a horizontal **liquid time-ribbon** river (tealтЖТskyтЖТviolet), glowing read-head that streams right/left or pools when frozen, amber grain-sparks, two live beta/gamma dials. Neutral beta captured on enable so "level" = however you hold the phone. Refs (living): **Robert Henke (Monolake) ┬╖ Curtis Roads *Microsound***. **Why banked:** tilt isn't lab-0├Ч (`83-kids-tilt-rain`) and tilt-review depends on Karel being on a phone (desktop gets the pointer proxy). **Resurrect** for a phone-review slot, or graft its reverse-scrub into 1308's freeze engine. Deepening: WebGL fluid-advection ribbon; waveform-aware ribbon height (see the loud phrases before you pour); haptic pulse per grain for an eyes-free pour.

## ┬з709 тАФ 2026-07-08 ┬╖ WIDE fire (3 orthogonal sensors: camera/mic/tilt). **SHIPPED `1308-piano-freeze`** (the ┬з708 тнРтнР; hand-camera granular spectral-freeze of the real piano тАФ its ┬з708 seed above is now CONSUMED). Re-banking the two non-winners below (both fully built + isolated-clean this fire, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ rebuild from these specs).

### тнРтнР `1307-clap-loom` тАФ build a dub groove with your voice/hands (SHIP-NEXT, the jury's most emphatic ask: TIME/rhythm)
*Mic as a REAL rhythmic controller, not a loudness bar.* **Spectral-flux onset detection** on an AnalyserNode FFT + **adaptive threshold** (running mean + ~2.4┬╖stddev over ~0.7 s), high-passed detection band + a blackout window around the loop's own scheduled hits so playback can't retrigger detection (feedback-tamed; prompt headphones). Each detected onset is **classified by spectral centroid** (lowтЖТkick, midтЖТclap, highтЖТhat) and **quantised to the nearest 16th** of a 2-bar (or 4-bar) loop, written into that layer's step grid; a **look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms, "Two Clocks") replays the grids through synthesized drum voices + a **ping-pong dub delay you can throw** + a master limiter тАФ a live-looper you overdub layer by layer. Viz: a circular **loom** (sweeping playhead, per-layer knot rings, connecting threads, downbeat pulse) + a live flux/threshold trace so detection is visible. **Fallback:** no mic тЖТ **Z/X/C/V + on-screen tap-pads** fire kick/clap/hat/sub, quantised identically (fully playable silent), and a demo groove auto-plays on start so it's never dead. Refs (living): the beatbox-looper lineage of **Dub FX / Reggie Watts / Beardyman** + the **Boss RC-505** loop-station; detector = classic MIR spectral-flux + adaptive threshold. Built as `page.tsx`+`engine.ts`+`onset.ts`+`render.ts`. **Why banked this fire:** the freeze piece was more transporting + cashed the loved real-piano lane; but 1307 is arguably the more *playable* and directly cashes the jury's loudest single note (there was "not one rhythm/groove/beat in the window"). **Resurrect** the moment the recent window isn't already mic-heavy (708 was mic cross-synth; a build with a non-mic ship in between clears it cleanly) OR as the antidote if the next window drifts back toward watched/texture pieces. Deepening: per-voice calibration pass; a couple bars of quantise-lookback so a hit landing on the playhead doesn't flam; velocity from onset strength; swing control.

### тнР `1306-tilt-pour` тАФ pour a dub groove by tilting your phone (phone-first, ideal for the 06:30 review)
*Tilt physically pours the rhythm.* **deviceorientation** (iOS `requestPermission()` on the enable tap, which also unlocks audio; **neutral beta captured on enable** so "level" = however you hold the phone): **gamma (roll)** = swing / stereo accent side; **beta (pitch forward/back)** = "pour rate" (density of ghost kicks/hats + bass gravity: deeper filter, longer decay). A **124 BPM two-clock look-ahead scheduler** runs a 4-on-floor kick + offbeat dub bass + dotted-8th dub-delayed lead **plus an independent triplet hat clock = a genuine 3-against-4 cross-clock**; tilt read fresh per note modulates swing/pan/density/cutoff тЖТ master limiter, click-free start, Stop ramps to 0 in ~60 ms then closes ctx. Viz (Canvas2D, phone-robust): a **liquid field** (two-sine slosh, tealтЖТviolet) that leans toward the tilt with kick ripples + a spirit-level bubble. **Fallback:** no orientation event within ~1.5 s (desktop) тЖТ **pointer-as-tilt proxy** (mouse X/Y тЖТ gamma/beta) with a `text-rose-300` "open on your phone" note; groove starts on the enable tap regardless. Ref (living): **Ge Wang & Smule *Ocarina*** phone-as-instrument lineage. Built as `page.tsx`+`engine.ts`+`render.ts`. **Why banked:** tilt isn't lab-0├Ч (`83-kids-tilt-rain`) and it echoes 707's dub-groove vibe; but it's the most phone-delightful of the fire. **Resurrect** for a phone-review slot when the window is groove-cold. Deepening: true fluid-advection field; `screen.orientation.angle` gravity remap; `devicemotion` shake тЖТ fill; waveform-reactive slosh.

## ┬з710 тАФ 2026-07-09 ┬╖ DEEP fire (one concept тАФ **"The World of Irreversible Change": a long-form тЙе5-min altered-states JOURNEY that REMEMBERS you** тАФ every gesture leaves a permanent, never-erased mark, so the end IS the record of your passage). **SHIPPED `1314-motif-weave`** (the memory made musical). Deliberate pivot off the real-piano/sensor lanes (now themselves ruts after 705тАУ709) into the menu-thin long-form-generative-with-memory lane. Living ref: **teamLab, *The World of Irreversible Change / Everything Exists in Infinite Continuity* (2026)**. Both banked below are **fully built + self-verified** (folder tsc + lint clean) this fire, backed up to scratchpad `banked-710/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ rebuild from these specs. Shared spine for all: a тЙе5-min phase-arc controller + a **never-cleared** irreversible-memory store + consequential PLAYED input (pointer + mic-breath w/ graceful fallback) + generative audio **WITH TIME** (a heartbeat/pulse that transforms across the arc тАФ no static JI-strike-bell drone) + read-only imports from `_shared/psych/{logpolar,shepard,safeFlicker}`.

### тнРтнР `1312-irreversible-bloom` тАФ a melt that only ever accretes your marks (SHIP-NEXT)
*The most elegant irreversibility mechanic of the fire.* WebGL2 **never-cleared ping-pong accumulation texture** (RGBA16FтЖТRGBA8 fallback), cleared to black exactly ONCE per run. Two GPU passes/frame: **ACC** re-samples the prior accumulation through the shared BressloffтАУCowan log-polar warp (`screenToCortex`тЖТadd inflow/swirlтЖТ`cortexToScreen`) so ink is *advected* inward along the tunnel + breathes, and stamps the pointer stroke as a gaussian along lastтЖТcurrent with **`max`-blended density that can only ever grow** (that IS the irreversibility тАФ no frame can reduce a mark); **DISPLAY** draws a live log-polar form-constant field (alive with no input) + composites the glowing record warmed to gold. Net inward inflow pulls the accumulated record into a growing central light тЖТ by minute 5 the center is a dense record of everything drawn. Canvas2D fallback runs the same accumulate-advect-stamp on a CPU float grid. ~5:30 arc (descentтЖТtunnelтЖТlight/breakthroughтЖТboundless-dissolutionтЖТreturn). Audio (`audio.ts`): scheduled lub-dub **heartbeat** that quickens then decelerates toward ego-death then revives + drone gliding dissonant-clusterтЖТconsonant-fifth with heartbeat-locked tremolo + falling shared Shepard. NDE tunnel-to-light palette. `pole: cosmic-ambient тЖТ intense`. Built `page.tsx`+`gl.ts`+`arc.ts`+`audio.ts`. **Why banked not shipped:** the only knock is diversity тАФ a WebGL log-polar melt reads aesthetically close to the recently-shipped `1300-carrier-bloom`, and 1314's musical-memory was the stronger jury-#2 answer + surprise. **Resurrect** in any slot where the recent window isn't log-polar-melt-heavy, OR **promote its never-cleared `max`-blend accumulation-texture to `_shared/psych/` as the lab's "irreversible memory buffer" primitive** (reusable by any piece that wants permanent marks). Deepening: two-hand / multi-touch stamping; onset-driven auto-stamps so the piece also records *itself*; a "look back" gesture that flies the camera out to reveal the whole accumulated record.

### тнРтнР `1313-sediment-descent` тАФ build a mineral shaft and sink through everything you laid down
*The most LITERAL teamLab-irreversibility, and the most diverse aesthetic.* Canvas2D vertical mineral shaft along a permanently-increasing `depth`. Each gesture `structure.deposit()`s a crystal shard at a fixed world-`depth = cameraDepth + ahead`, angle/radius on the shaft wall; the camera's `cameraDepth` **only ever increases** so a facet's `relD` shrinks, swells toward you (look-down-the-well `persp = focal/(focal+relD)`), and you fall through it. Once passed (`relD < NEAR_CLIP`) a facet is **not deleted** тАФ it is stamped into a **never-cleared additive offscreen buffer**, depth-banded into horizontal strata, so over minutes the deep accretes into a dense layered mineral field: the literal sum of the passage. Active set FIFO-capped (1100) тАФ hitting the cap **bakes** the oldest into the deep before reuse (detail thins into the static strata, but conceptually nothing is undone); survives resize (re-draws baked buffer). ~5.7-min 6-phase arc (surfaceтЖТthe-sinkтЖТthe-strataтЖТcold-deepтЖТboundary-dissolutionтЖТstillness). Audio (`audio.ts`): heartbeat **66тЖТ28 bpm** that thickens (sub layer) into the cold deep then **smears** (timing jitter + beat dropout) at boundary-dissolution + swept mineral C┬╖G┬╖C-fifth pad + a **teal bell-glint per deposit** (you hear the world you build) + falling Shepard driven by live sink rate. Pointer: angle/radius place crystal at chosen depth, vertical lean steers sink-vs-hover, drag speed drives blooms/veins/glints; mic-breath quickens+blooms (LFO fallback). Mineral/void palette. `pole: cosmic-ambient`. Built `page.tsx`+`descent.ts`+`structure.ts`+`audio.ts`. **Why banked:** 1314 better cashed jury #2 (TIME/playable-instrument) + the loved looping/memory cluster; but 1313 is the clearest *read* of the irreversible-change reference and the furthest-from-recent aesthetic (mineral descent, Canvas2D тЖТ holds three.js/shader-field down). **Resurrect** in a cosmic-ambient descent slot, OR **promote its `structure.ts` accretion+bake engine** as a reusable "permanent geometric memory" module. Deepening: WebGL for deeper strata counts; onset-synced deposits; a slow ascent mode to *review* the shaft you built; haptics per deposit on mobile.

## ┬з715 тАФ 2026-07-09 ┬╖ WIDE fire (3 orthogonal altered-states explorers, each PLAYED via a **distinct non-pointer/non-recent input** + a **living** reference, re-spreading input off the recent window's ruts [mic 4├Ч / camera 3├Ч / real-piano-file 3├Ч in the last 10]). **SHIPPED `1332-liquid-light`** (tilt-poured 1960s liquid light show тАФ the boldest diversity move [Canvas2D + tilt + a concept the lab has never built] + lowest ship-risk + most phone-glance-legible). Research-first: today's ┬з715 dive (analog liquid-light-show as browser dye-advection) тЖТ today's build. Both banked below are **fully built + self-verified** this fire (folder `tsc --noEmit` + `eslint --max-warnings 0` clean), backed up to scratchpad `banked-715/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule тАФ rebuild from these specs. All three read-only imported `_shared/psych/{droneBank,shepard,convolutionVoid}` and/or `_shared/psych/{logpolar,safeFlicker}`; none added deps or an api route.

### тнРтнР `1330-dream-machine` тАФ a drug-free Dreamachine you PLAY on a keyboard (SHIP-NEXT ┬╖ highest ambition of the fire, 5 subsystems)
*The research-adjacent, Karel-the-pianist-native explorer тАФ resurrects the ┬з713 banked concept and lands it.* **Input:** Web MIDI (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`, guarded) + **QWERTY** home-row AтАУL (D-Dorian) fallback + an always-on **demo phrase** that auto-plays until the first real note. **Output:** WebGL2 fragment shader splicing `_shared/psych/LOGPOLAR_GLSL`; sums up to 12 voices into Kl├╝ver form-constants (tunnel/spoke/spiral/honeycomb) under the BressloffтАУCowan `exp()` cortical warp. **Technique:** each note ignites a photosensitive-**SAFE** luminance pulse routed entirely through `_shared/psych/SafeFlicker` (тЙд3 Hz soft sine, luminance floor, instant kill, `prefersReducedMotion` cuts rate+contrast); a single global **`entropy тИИ [0,1]`** with **asymmetric rise/settle** (rises while chords are held, eases back on release) deepens the field тАФ more fBm octaves, faster churn, higher saturation, pastelтЖТgold, denser constants. **Mapping:** pitchтЖТwhich form-constant + hue ┬╖ octaveтЖТspatial density ┬╖ velocityтЖТbrightness ┬╖ onsetтЖТan expanding `1тИТexp` ignition ring ┬╖ sustained polyphonyтЖТentropy. **Audio:** warm **sustained pad-drone per note** (detuned-saw stack + sine sub, ~0.9 s attack / ~1.8 s release тАФ NOT a percussive strike, NOT a JI-strike-bell) + shared `droneBank` bed + faint `shepard` drift, all pushed up by entropy; master тЙд0.24 тЖТ limiter, 12-voice cap, full teardown. Palette hypnagogic pastelтЖТgold. `pole: cosmic-ambient тЖТ intense`. Ref (living): **Collective Act *Dreamachine* (2022тАУ)** (Gysin/Sommerville flicker lineage). Built `page.tsx`+`shader.ts`+`audio.ts`+`midi.ts`+`README.md`. **Why banked not shipped:** MIDI gates a 06:30 *phone* reviewer (Karel likely has no MIDI keyboard connected тЖТ he sees demo/QWERTY, which reads watch-ish) + the тЙд3 Hz flicker is the one safety element a headless box **cannot** eye-verify (it IS correctly gated) + it would be a 4th recent WebGL2 shader. **Resurrect** near-verbatim in a MIDI/keyboard slot (Karel's native input), **OR** promote its asymmetric **entropy walk** to `_shared/psych/entropyController.ts` тАФ the last unbuilt PSYCHEDELIC.md shared primitive (a single global scalar ramping noise-octaves/flow/reorg across an arc). Deepening (from its README): per-form ignition character (spiral ignites spiraling, honeycomb tessellates in); MIDI sustain-pedal (CC64) latch to build entropy hands-free; off-center warp per high note so dense chords read as distinct simultaneous visions; chord-quality (consonantтЖФclustered) тЖТ the pastelтЖФsaturated axis.

### тнРтнР `1334-comet-choir` тАФ conduct a luminous murmuration that sings a polyrhythmic choir (best love-fit + strongest audio TIME)
*Rides Karel's loved particle-flow cluster hardest and has the fire's richest rhythm.* **Input:** pointer/touch as a genuinely PLAYED **conductor** тАФ drag = a Gaussian attractor + tangential swirl the flock orbits; **Shift / right-drag / a Scatter toggle** = a repelling wind that blows it apart; a "ghost hand" auto-conducts a quiet demo before you grab it. **Output:** WebGL2 тАФ ~7k (4.2k reduced-motion) additive `gl.POINTS` drawn into a ping-pong **trail texture** (fade-quad decay тЖТ aurora ribbons), then a tone-mapped screen pass; aurora-spectral tealтЖТvioletтЖТrose, hue by coherence/speed. **Technique:** analytic **curl-noise flow field** (curl of a scalar potential ╧И тЖТ divergence-free, so the swarm never collapses or blows out) + **boids-lite** (grid-hashed separation/alignment/cohesion, bounded O(n)) тАФ living ref **Robert Hodgin** (*Flight Patterns* / flocking). **Audio (real TIME тАФ the strongest of the fire):** a transport runs **three concurrent pulse streams (3, 4, 5 accents per bar тЖТ shifting polyrhythm)**, bar tempo quickens with flock speed; **density** opens the drone bed + layers a fifth + gates low heartbeat & high shimmer; **coherence** brightens the choir formant filter + gates the mid stream + drives a Shepard whisper; **centroid-Y** band-crossings open sustained "ahh" pentatonic pads (6-voice cap, steal-oldest); **centroid-X** pans; bed=`droneBank`, space=`convolutionVoid`, drift=`shepard`; master тЙд0.24 тЖТ limiter, fade-in, full teardown. `pole: cosmic-ambient`. Built `page.tsx`+`flock.ts`+`shader.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`. **Why banked not shipped:** it uses **pointer** тАФ the exact over-represented input the 2026-07-08 jury keeps flagging тАФ whereas 1330 (MIDI) and 1332 (tilt, WINNER) both fill 0├Ч/under-used embodied lanes; plus moderate 7k-CPU-particle + WebGL2-trail ship-risk on a box that can't eye-verify. **Resurrect** either (a) **re-homed on a non-pointer input** (tilt-conduct on phone, or a MediaPipe hand as the wind) to clear the pointer ban, or (b) **near-verbatim in a pointer-allowed slot** тАФ its love-fit (the loved particle cluster `321`/`236`/`262`/`243`/`267`) is the strongest of the fire. Deepening (from its README): move the sim to GPU (transform-feedback / position texture) for 100k+; real gradient-noise curl for organic weather; two-handed multi-touch (attractor + wind at once); a slow meta-clock that travels the pentatonic centre through keys; coherence-driven vowel morph (ahтЖТooтЖТee).

## ┬з724 тАФ banked from cycle 724 (DEEP "The Gravity Choir"; winner shipped = 1384-gravity-choir-points)

The DEEP fire built one concept тАФ *a played gravitational swarm that SONIFIES its own orbital motion* (cross-modal geometryтЖТsound, not audio-reactive) тАФ via three technical approaches. `1384-gravity-choir-points` (three.js `THREE.Points`, 24k motes, place-stars + pick-pitches) shipped as most-robust + love-backed. Canvas2D JS-mote fallback when WebGPU absent. Auto-drift until you take over, so it's alive on Start. The fire's phone-delightful cosmic-ambient representative; de-selected as leaning toward the "conduct-and-watch" pole (builder itself: "reads more as texture than a tune") тАФ resurrect with a MORE played gesture (e.g. pinch-to-collapse a star-birth event that rings a chord) to lift it off the screensaver pole.

## ┬з725 тАФ banked from cycle 725 (WIDE "Fresh Substrates"; winner shipped = 1392-phase-loom)

Tilt (`deviceorientation`, iOS `requestPermission()` in the Start handler): forward `beta` = drift speed, roll `gamma` = steer the vanishing point; pointer-proxy fallback (down=faster, L/R=steer) with a `тЧП tilt`/`тЧЛ pointer` badge. The ONE genuinely additive thing 1388 built that 1348 lacks: **a real WebGL2 ping-pong-FBO fallback** (1348 degrades to a *notice* when WebGPU is absent) + reuse of the shared `_shared/psych/logpolar` engine on both paths + an explicit form-constant selector. ## ┬з728 banked seeds (2026-07-10 ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ DEEP "OUT OF TUNE" тАФ dissonance as the played medium; 2 non-winners, full rebuildable specs)

Both cleared the ┬з728 ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 jury ban; de-selected only on the DEEP "ship the strongest single realization" call (winner `1408-wolf-ring` shipped). Backed up to scratchpad `banked-728/`; folders `rm -rf`'d, never committed. Concept spine for all three: **being out-of-tune is the expressive gesture you push a chord INTO and release** тАФ NOT minimized (`496`/`508`), NOT a passive readout (`947`), NOT an autonomous drift (`404`), NOT exotic-scale navigation (`538`).

- **тнРтнР `1410-beat-field` тАФ TOP ship-next (the WGSL-compute cash of jury #1's *specific* "prove 1348 wasn't a fluke" ask).** *What if the music were composed in the BEATING itself?* You detune a stack of voices and sculpt the interference тАФ pure lock (silence-of-beating, dark calm field) тЖТ slow ~1тАУ3 Hz shimmer тЖТ amplitude modulation тЖТ dense roughness (the howl). Surface: a **WGSL compute shader** evaluates the PlompтАУLevelt/Sethares roughness field over a 320├Ч320 grid (x=probe freq log A1тАУA6, y=beating-phase window; kernel `r=a1*a2*(exp(-3.5*s*df)-exp(-5.75*s*df))`, `s=0.24/(0.021*min+19)`) тЖТ `rgba16float` storage texture тЖТ blit. **Audio:** 24-osc pool (4 chord tones ├Ч detuned pair `f┬▒bt/2` ├Ч 3 harmonics); the played parameter is the beat-rate `bt`; the h-th harmonic pair beats at `bt┬╖h` so upper partials roughen first. Input: pointer-drag (x=beat-rate 0.25тЖТ42 Hz log, y=brightness), keys 1тАУ5 chord / тЖСтЖУ root / тЖРтЖТ nudge. **Mandatory fallback chain (this is why it's ship-next not shipped):** WebGPUтЖТWebGL2-fragmentтЖТCanvas2D, badge shows live tier, audio independent of render; clear-colour + colour-floor are dark violet (never pure black) so even a misbehaving compute pass can't show a black frame. De-selected ONLY because its own builder could not confirm the WebGPU path renders vs. a quiet dark frame on a headless box тАФ it is **materially better black-frame-defended than ┬з727's `1402`** (real WebGL2+Canvas2D fallbacks, dark-violet floors). **One browser render-confirmation from shippable** тАФ Karel: open it once; if the field paints, ship as-is; the fallback chain means even a WebGPU miss degrades to WebGL2, not black. Ref: Sethares + PlompтАУLevelt + XenRoll (June 2026) "partials' beating" submodel. love-fit adjacent to the GPU-field cluster.
- **тнР `1406-tension-membrane` тАФ three.js buckling membrane (the spectacular one).** *Bend a pure triad into a howling, buckling roughness and pull it back тАФ the wrong note deforms 3D space.* Surface: a three.js 61├Ч61 displaced plane whose vertex displacement тИЭ live PlompтАУLevelt roughness (smooth breathing at purity тЖТ corrugation ridges тЖТ per-vertex tear grain at the howl; colour lerps violetтЖТhot-rose, emissive glow). **Audio:** own additive triad (root fixed anchor; third slides sharp +58┬в, fifth slides flat тИТ42┬в in opposite directions so it never re-consonates); one measured roughness number drives audio saturation + membrane buckle + HUD together. Input: pointer-drag (vertical = tension), tension slider, `deviceorientation` tilt, keys 1тАУ6 root / z-x-c-v-b quality. De-selected because three.js render can't be eye-verified headless (standing GPU verification-debt) and it's slightly less differentiated than the wolf (continuous-detune vs a named historical landmark). Resurrect where the GPU render is browser-confirmed, or as the intense-pole cousin of the shipped wolf-ring. Ref: Sethares *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* + Plomp & Levelt 1965.

## ┬з733 banked seeds тАФ 2026-07-11 (cycle 733 ┬╖ PSYCHEDELIC ┬╖ WIDE тАФ shipped `1430-echo-void`; 2 non-winners built demoable, backed up to scratchpad `banked-733/`, folders `rm -rf`'d, NEVER committed). Max committed folder after this fire = 1430. Resurrect each at a fresh number.

Both cleared the ┬з733 ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 jury ban (both use inharmonic/no-scale-index pitch, both on fresh non-Canvas2D/non-SVG substrates, both non-mic/non-keyboard-piano input). De-selected only on the WIDE "ship the strongest single explorer" call тАФ `1430-echo-void` won as the freshest 0├Ч interaction model + most on-theme (cosmic-ambient NDE) + best desktop self-demo. Full builder reports preserved; both are near-verbatim rebuildable from scratchpad.

- **тнРтнР `1434-orbit-compass` тАФ TOP ship-next (aim-the-phone celestial soundfield).** `input: device-orientation aiming (gyro/compass) + pointer-drag/arrow fallback ┬╖ output: three.js `THREE.Points` starfield ┬╖ tech: orientation-quaternion aim тЖТ angular-proximity gain (aim-to-audition a FIXED 3-D soundfield) ┬╖ pole: cosmic-ambient deep-space ┬╖ ref: planetarium/celestial-navigation ┬╖ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* ┬╖ Janet Cardiff spatial-audio walks`. **Concept:** ~40 "singing stars" placed on a Fibonacci sphere all around the listener; physically turn the phone and the star nearest your aim swells into a sustained drone, its angular neighbors murmur, the rest near-silent тАФ you "play" the constellation by pointing. Desktop falls back to pointer-drag look-around + arrow keys. **Files (6, all client, no route.ts):** `rng.ts` (`mulberry32`, `SEED=0x1434c0`), `stars.ts` (Fibonacci placement + inharmonic stretched-ladder tuning + `computeWeights` proximity fn; `STAR_COUNT=40`, `PROX_WIDTH_RAD=0.34`), `scene.ts` (three.js `THREE.Points` starfield + 900-pt backdrop, orientation-quaternion / look-angle camera, per-frame weight push, context-loss + no-WebGL fallback, full dispose), `audio.ts` (`StarAudio`: one sustained detuned voice/star, proximity-driven gain, stretched drone bed, void reverb, limiter, 2 s master ramp, teardown), `page.tsx` (gesture-gated Begin + iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` flow with silent 1500 ms-probeтЖТpointer fallback, reticle, HUD aimed-star readout, reduced-motion aware, `PrototypeNav`), `README.md`. Uses all 4 shared helpers. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 тЙе3 subsystems [Fibonacci star-field + orientation-quaternion aim + angular-proximity gain engine + three.js renderer + fallback] + #3 named refs). **Why banked, not shipped:** its whole soul is a real gyroscope тАФ the aimтЖТgain feel, falloff width, and voice peak can only be tuned on a physical phone, and it conceptually overlaps `1430`'s "navigate a 3-D soundfield" (1430 is the fresher active-emission version that self-demos on desktop). ESLint+tsc clean. **Resurrect:** the moment Karel opens it on a phone for a sensitivity/mix tuning pass тАФ this is a genuinely new *aim-to-listen* input the lab has 0├Ч and a strong deep-listening fit. Built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-733/1434-orbit-compass/`).

- **тнР `1438-mortal-tape` тАФ resurrect for a screen+file tuning pass (conceptual/critical; cashes Karel's "use your real Path music").** `input: click + drag-and-drop / file-picker (decode via `decodeAudioData`) ┬╖ output: WebGL2 spectral/amplitude ribbon (Canvas2D fallback + badge) ┬╖ tech: destructive/entropic playback (NO pitch-mapping at all) ┬╖ pole: warm memento-mori, amberтЖТbone`. **Concept:** load a piano recording (or use a built-in struck-string phrase); it's shown as a horizontal "tape" ribbon; pressing PLAY plays it тАФ but each pass PERMANENTLY erodes it (partials drop, highs wash to noise, the ribbon frays and bleaches where played most), asymptoting to a hiss-and-ghost `DECAY_FLOOR` that never dies or crashes. One costly "hold-to-preserve" gesture (a finite draining effort meter that force-releases at zero) trades the user's sustained effort for slower decay. About the lab's own immutability rule + William Basinski *The Disintegration Loops* (tape literally disintegrating as digitized). Erosion persists in-session. **Files (6, all client, no route.ts):** `rng.ts` (`mulberry32`, constant SEED), `erosion.ts` (pure wear model on typed arrays: per-column `wear`, asymptotic `applyWear`, `wearTo{Cutoff,Noise,Gain,Wet}` maps), `audio.ts` (`TapeAudio`: decode file OR synth looping struck-string phrase via OfflineAudioContext, degrade-with-wear graph [falling lowpass + rising noise bed + dropout + void reverb], compressor-limiter, master fade-in, teardown), `ribbon.ts` (WebGL2 1├ЧN data-texture ribbon, amberтЖТbone bleach + fray + playhead; Canvas2D fallback; GL teardown), `page.tsx` (drop-zone/file-picker, gesture-gated Begin/Play, plays counter + decay meter, hold-to-preserve, reduced-motion aware, `PrototypeNav`, "Every play costs the music" framing line), `README.md`. **Ambition 2/5** (#1 never-used destructive/entropic playback [grep-0├Ч] + #3 named refs [Basinski / Lucier / memento-mori]). **Why banked, not shipped:** it's the most audio-forward of the three with the least headless-verifiable visual (the `step(fray,wear┬╖edge)` fray threshold + bar heights want a real GPU to balance so worn bars thin without vanishing) and it sings most with a *real* dropped file (the built-in phrase is a fallback). ESLint+tsc clean, erosion bounded (no div-by-zero, no silent-to-crash). **Resurrect:** on a real screen with one of Karel's Path piano tracks dropped in, for a fray/mix tuning pass тАФ the concept is a strong surprise/critical piece and the direct cash of the "use your real music" directive. Built demoable this fire (scratchpad `banked-733/1438-mortal-tape/`).

## ┬з734 seeds тАФ banked from cycle 734 (2026-07-11, psychedelic DEEP "THE ONE THREAD")

Cycle 734 pivoted off a spent jury (see STATE ┬з734) to a proper DEEP on the grep-0├Ч **space-filling-curve / unity** lane; shipped `1440-thread-scan`. Four non-winners banked (backed up to scratchpad `banked-734/`, folders `rm -rf`'d, never committed). Full rebuildable specs тАФ resurrect near-verbatim.

- **тнР `1442-unweave`** (TOP ship-next of this fire). *The recursion DEPTH of a Hilbert space-filling curve made a continuous PLAYED axis for ego-dissolution unity: low depth = a few big calm separate loops (cosmic-ambient), push depth тЖТ the one line folds to fill the whole plane = a dense shimmering unified weave (intense melt), pull back = boundaries re-form.* WebGL2 `LINE_STRIP` + additive glow beads + ping-pong RGBA8 feedback trail; continuous-glissando pitch (no scale) following the traveling phase; `droneBank` bed opens with depth; breathe auto-mode (~0.1 Hz). Named ref Hilbert 1891 / Carhart-Harris REBUS. **Why banked, not shipped:** de-selected against `1440` on TWO grounds тАФ (1) it leans *watched* (a single depth-dial + a default self-running breathe) where `1440` is genuinely *played* (you paint); (2) its own README admits the central morph is "a linear vertex interpolation between adjacent integer orders, not a true continuous-order construction тАж an interpolation artifact, not itself a Hilbert curve." **Resurrect condition:** build a TRUE continuous-order space-filling construction (not interpolate-between-orders) so the intermediate curve is real, AND add a genuine played layer beyond the depth dial (e.g. paint/pluck into the weave, or steer a region of the fold), so it's played not watched. Then it's the strongest illustration of the unity phenomenon in the lab. Fully built demoable + `tsc`/`eslint`-clean.

- **тнР `1436-tilt-nova`** (WebGPU-compute, still a genuinely thin substrate тАФ only `1348`/`1418`). *A GPU compute swarm of 50kтАУ130k particles advected through a curl-noise flow field with a movable attractor you STEER BY TILTING the device; the swarm's aggregate statistics (avg speed / spread / angular momentum / centroid) sonify a stretched-spectrum (2.1├Ч octave) synth; ketamine-slow time-dilation, center-out "nova" bloom.* Hand-written WGSL compute (ping-pong `vec4` storage buffers, `@workgroup_size(64)`); a fully-functional Canvas2D fallback running the IDENTICAL curl-noise physics (`navigator.gpu` absent тЖТ ~5.2k-particle CPU swarm, same sonification, `text-rose-300` notice). Named refs the `1348` WGSL lineage / Marpi / Refik Anadol / curl-noise (Bridson 2007). **Why banked:** built for the spent 2026-07-10 jury #1 ("2nd WebGPU-compute") тАФ already cashed by `1418-beat-field` (730); its stretched-spectrum tuning also touches the now-saturated dissonance theme; and swarm-sonifies-its-motion is adjacent to shipped `1384-gravity-choir-points`. **Resurrect condition:** a cycle where WebGPU-compute is the *fresh* substrate again AND the concept moves off swarm-sonification (e.g. tilt-steered GPU reaction-diffusion or fluid, a genuinely different compute payload). Honest knock (own README): GPU path sonifies a ~1.4k CPU proxy of the field, not a read-back of the exact GPU particles. Built demoable + clean; fallback verified functional.

- **`1434-roughness-body`** (camera + three.js). *A camera-motion (frame-difference optical-flow, NO MediaPipe) instrument where sensory DISSONANCE is the played axis: your body's motion drives a movable partial cluster over an inharmonic bell timbre, real-time PlompтАУLevelt/Sethares roughness drives both an audible AM/grind axis and three.js visual turbulence, and you hunt for consonance troughs that sit at NON-JI ratios.* **Why banked (near-duplicate):** this is essentially `1418-beat-field` (cycle 730 тАФ WGSL-compute PlompтАУLevelt roughness as the played medium) with a camera front-end + three.js; the roughness-as-played-axis concept is shipped, and the dissonance theme is saturated ├Ч4 (1408/1418/1426/1430). The genuinely-fresh part is only the **cameraтЖТroughness** front-end. **Resurrect condition:** ONLY if the roughness/dissonance theme has rested a full month AND the camera-motion mapping is the actual novelty (not the roughness). Otherwise dead. Built demoable + clean.

- **`1438-bohlen-lattice`** (DOM/CSS-3D + BohlenтАУPierce microtonal). *A lattice-tunnel of 78 real transformed `<div>` cells (13 columns = one tritave ├Ч 6 depth rings) tuned to the **BohlenтАУPierce scale** тАФ 13 equal divisions of the 3:1 tritave, step 3^(1/13) тЙИ 1.08818, built on odd-harmonic 3:5:7 chords so triads sound consonant-but-alien; the 13-around geometry makes one trip round the tube = one tritave. MIDI-primary + pointer-drag fallback; brightness-ripple neighbor coupling; idle BP arpeggio.* Named refs Heinz Bohlen & John Pierce / Wendy Carlos alpha-beta-gamma. **Why banked:** DOM/CSS-3D is over-represented (1408/1428 recent) AND microtonal lands in the saturated dissonance theme. **Resurrect condition:** a cycle thin on DOM/CSS-3D where a non-octave/xenharmonic scale is the *fresh* axis (BP has never actually shipped тАФ genuinely novel tuning), ideally with a richer FM/physical-model voice than the deliberately-thin additive timbre. Built demoable + clean; only the pointer path was testable headless (no MIDI hardware).
